Comment: Always well there. Joined the lead final turn. Gained upper hand passing 300 M. Won unchallenged.
Towards rear. Was last rounding home bend. Ran on well final 200 M, doing best work close home.
Held 3rd until failing to hold place final 200 M.
Mainly 4th before giving ground passing 200 M.
Slightly better than midfield on inside. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield or slightly better. Ran on a bit from outside 200 M, just missed a minor placing.
Led field soon after start, was joined final turn, headed passing 300 M. Remained 2nd until failing to hold place closing stages.
Near rear. Was impeded 100 M while making some minor progress inside 200 M.
Raced greenly and never in contention. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Steadied soon after start, was last before making up some ground home bend. Kept on steadily from 5th 400 M without threatening.
Better than midfield. Dropped back a bit rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Prominent briefly early stages. Soon gave ground steadily to behind midfield. No response in straight.
Raced keenly in rear of midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Settled in midfield. Not much room on inner early in straight. Ran on steadily final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader to straight. No extra.
Never far off. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Attempted to make all. No extra when caught final strides.
Towards rear early. Made steady headway far side. Prominent rounding home bend but yielded ground upon straightening.
Towards rear early. Made steady headway on outside up back straight and rounding home bend to gain 2nd into home straight. Sustained progress to gain upper hand close to home.
Held up in midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening but only kept on at the one pace to finish.
Always in last few.
Midfield until faded home bend.
Wide throughout. Quickly improved to prominent position stable bend. Lost position coming out of back straight. Faded further after home turn.
Trailed field to straight. Ran past beaten runners under pressure.
Prominent to halfway. Lost position coming out of back straight. Dropped out under pressure from home bend.
Well back. Quickened well to reach 3rd inside 200 M but lost position late when no extra.
Was there until weakening out of contention 300 M out.
Led field to 200 M out. Weakened. (Bled.)
Prominent briefly early, soon raced in 5th. Slightly hampered 300 M. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. 2nd last turning in. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
In touch early. Dropped back to midfield 1000 M. Faded in straight.
In touch. 3rd rounding home bend. Weakened inside 300 M.
Towards rear. Moderate progress when under pressure in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Made up good ground inside 200 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear. Checked 300 M. No recovery.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily from outside while hanging in 250 M.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Ran on well 300 M to take lead passing 200 M. Just held off runner-up's late challenge.
In touch. Moved up to be 2nd 900 M. Came to tackle leader early straight, gaining slender advantage briefly near 200 M. Kept on to hold a minor placing narrowly.
Last to 700 M. Crept a bit closer final turn. Ran on well final 200 M, just missed a minor placing.
Well back. Never rearer.
Raced freely in midfield. Steadied for a run early in straight. Finished off race well.
Well there to 200 M. No extra.
Raced in forward of midfield. Did not find much room on rails in straight. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Ran on in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Switched off rails rounding home bend and became widest into straight. Ran on steadily down centre without threatening.
Ridden for speed early then held up just off the pace. Raced tightly behind runners early in straight. Finished well once into the clear final 150 M.
Never in the front.
Raced wide in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Sluggish at start. Raced freely and pulled to close-up position before home bend. Dropped out abruptly shortly after straightening.
Never better than midfield.
Held narrow lead until overhauled under pressure 200 M out.
Always prominent. Obtained split shortly after straightening and quickened well to assert authority about 200 M out.
Began well from wide draw and niggled along to race in midfield out wide with cover. Ridden along to maintain position turning for home. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.

Slowly away and raced at the tail. Ridden along and made steady progress from the outside turning for home. All out 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M without threatening the placegetters.

Jumped fairly and was soon eased to the rear section 2-wide. Made little progress from the outside at home bend. Ran on evenly in straight, but was checked to avoid heels at the 200 M and failed to recover thereafter.
Began fairly and niggled along to take lead on rail at 1000 M with no more than 3/4L advantage through to straight. Stayed one-paced when asked 300 M and further weakened inside final 150 M.
Lead briefly in the early stages and was headed at 1000 M mark to race 1/2L off leader to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Soon raced in mid-division 3-wide and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Found nothing in straight and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.

Began well from wide draw and was soon eased to midfield or worse 2-wide through to straight. Unable to obtain clear running in early part of straight to 200 M. Made up little ground in the closing stages.
Slow to begin and raced towards the rear section on rail through to straight. Tailed out 200 M out.

Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2-wide through to straight. Slightly held up in early part of straight, ran on steadily when clear running was obtained 200 M out to grab 3rd place near the line.
On jumping knuckled and unable to muster early speed to race in worse than midfield 2 to 3-wide. Unable to find clear running for the majority part of the straight and was not properly tested.
Jumped fairly and raced in better than midfield 3-wide through to straight. Stayed one-paced when asked 350 M and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Slightly slow to begin and steadily recovered lost ground to be in better than midfield on rail through to straight. All out 350 M out and cruised home to win convincingly.

Began well from wide draw and niggled along to race in better than midfield out wide without cover. Made little headway turning for home. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but was overhauled by 3rd placegetter near the line.
Jumped awkwardly and ridden along to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made up good ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Never prominent, 3-wide with cover about 8Ls off pace and one from rear at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 12th at 800 M and roughly the same on straightening, no gears.
2-wide and 3Ls off the speed in 5th at 1200 M, closer but 3-wide without cover from 800 M to home straight, had every chance when under a length down in 3rd at 200 M, no extra.
Led on fence 1300 M out, never clear by much more than 1L until the 600 M, skipped 2Ls clear off home turn, half a length up at 200 M, held on gamely.
On fence 8Ls off the speed in 12th 1200 M out, 7Ls down and one from rear at 800 M, in and rear and struggling entering straight, no chance.
About 10Ls last 1200 M out and 8Ls last at 800 M and into home straight, never on terms.
3-wide without cover 3Ls off the pace in 4th at the 1200 M, advanced to a neck 2nd out 2-wide 900 M out, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, faded out.
Couldn't lead, settled 2Ls off the pace and 2-wide in 2nd 1200 M out, 2Ls down in 4th at 800 M, 4Ls down entering straight, very one-paced thereafter.
Always worse than midfield, 2-wide and 8Ls off the speed in 11th at the 1200 M, about 6Ls down in 11th at 800 M and off final bend, no impression.
Slowly and awkwardly away, 2-wide and 5Ls off the speed at 1200 M, 3-wide without cover at 1000 M in midfield, 4-wide into straight when 4Ls down in 8th, ran on fairly well, nearest at finish.
Slowly away, in rear and 5-wide without cover at 1400 M, raced 3-wide with cover about 5Ls off pace in 10th down the back and into home straight, made a little late headway.
Had the run of the race on fence in 3rd place about 2Ls off the speed from 1400 M to home straight, every chance when half a length down in 2nd at the 200 M, couldn't overhaul winner.
On fence 4Ls off the speed in 6th from 1200 M to home straight, 3Ls down in 4th at the 200 M, always outpaced by leading trio.
6Ls off the pace and 2-wide in 9th 1200 M out, 4Ls down in 7th at the 800 M and off home turn when hard ridden, very one-paced.
Switched to fence from wide gate upon exiting, 6Ls off the pace in 8th on fence at 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield at 800 M and into stretch when under pressure, dropped out.
Raced 4-wide at midfield. Improved slightly rounding home turn despite being caught wide and got within a length of the lead 500 M. Kept on evenly in the straight.
Niggled along to race within a length of the lead from 3-wide position. Similar position into home straight and remained in contention until 300 M. Couldn't sustain effort in the closing stages.
3-wide in rear section early and middle stages. Made up steady ground in the straight.
3-wide behind midfield. Kept on same pace before tiring 300 M.
Led shortly after start. Maintained a length's advantage heading into home straight. Begin to pull away when pressured at 400 M and coasted home for an easy win.
Eased back to race wide in rear section. Steadied at 800 M. Caught wide rounding home and only ran past a weakening runner in the straight. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Raced on fence and within 2Ls of the lead until straightening. Kept on fairly in the straight but failed to hold onto a minor placing closing stages.
Jumped slowly and raced near the back early stages. Kept racing on fence rounding home turn and closed to within 3Ls of the lead on straightening. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M.
Raced within a length of the leader until straightening. Couldn't keep pace after 300 M and weakened closing stages.
Raced wide and within 2Ls of the leaders early stages. Dropped back steadily after 1200 M and was widest rounding home. Made no impression in the straight.
Slowly away and was detached in the early stages. Caught up with field 600 M but still racing in last place. Staged a good rally once straightened and made up good ground in the straight.
2-wide at midfield until 400 M. Failed to respond when pressured and was eased off inside 200 M.
2-wide when 1L 2nd 1000 M out, a neck 2nd at 800 M, still 2nd but under strong pressure entering straight, dropped out. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Best away but opted to settle in midfield about 4Ls off pace down back straight, under pressure when 3-wide and 4Ls down in 9th entering straight, faded away.
Slowest away, hunted up along fence to be 3Ls down in midfield at 800 M and entering home straight, lacked acceleration on the run-in.
Towards rear on fence at least 6Ls off speed until the 600 M, 5Ls down in 10th into home straight, kept on along fence and 4Ls down in 4th at 200 M, ran on very strongly to lead on line.
Raced 3 and 4-wide without cover down the back, 1L down in 3rd at the 800 M, 2Ls down in 5th when 3-wide into home straight and hung out wider, eased down from 300 M out. (Lame.)
Prominent, no worse than 3Ls off the pace in about 5th and 2-wide through to the home turn, excellent chance of at least a place 300 M out, was too one-paced to capitalise.
Held up in rear between 6Ls and 8Ls off the speed through to home straight, ran on quite well late on to be nearest at the finish.
Had the run of the race in 4th 2Ls off the speed at the 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off the final bend, all out to be 3Ls 2nd 200 M out, weakened markedly closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear 6Ls off the speed and 2-wide at the 800 M, 5Ls down entering straight, ran on fairly late to be nearest at finish.
Particularly keen through early stages, throwing head about, checked at 800 M and went 4Ls off pace in midfield, 3-wide and 4Ls down entering straight, no threat, kept on same pace.
Always towards rear, 3-wide and 6Ls off the speed at 800 M in 12th and no better off turning for home, no impression. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Soon led, clear on fence by 1L 1100 M out, 1-1/2Ls clear at top of straight and about 3Ls ahead at the 200 M, kept on well but was grabbed by winner in final strides.
3-wide with cover in 10th about 5Ls off pace until the 600 M, 5-wide (widest) into stretch, nudged wider at 400 M, 4Ls down at 200 M, ran on very strongly despite hanging in, just missed.
Had cover when 3-wide but prominent within 3Ls of lead down back straight, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn when nudged wider, soon weakened.
Always 3-wide mostly with cover in midfield 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace in midfield through to home straight, always looked held thereafter.
Always towards rear and never better than 5Ls off the speed at any stage.
Slowly away, about 5Ls down in 8th at the 800 M, always outpaced.
Always about 4Ls off the pace in midfield through to the 600 M, closer into home straight when 3-wide, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, one-paced final 100 M.
Didn't break well, slowest away, in rear about 7Ls or 8Ls off pace in rear until home straight when 4-wide (widest of all), no impression.
4Ls off the speed on inner in about 5th place down the back, closer and driven along entering straight, one-paced.
Led or disputed lead until the home straight, quickly fell away passing the 300 M.
Prominent early but was badly checked 1200 M out to be about 6Ls down in 9th, no better off entering straight, never a factor.
Awkwardly into stride, 6Ls down in 10th on fence at 800 M, 4Ls down in midfield on the swing, ran on well through final stages but had no chance of catching the winner.
Raced freely from 1100 M out until the 800 M when 3Ls off pace in 4th, 2Ls down in 3rd and travelling smoothly into home straight, led on the bridle 250 M out, drew away, comfortably.
Raced keenly throwing head around early on, went 3-wide without cover 1L off the pace in 3rd from the 800 M and led at the 600 M and into home straight, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra.
Disputed lead early on, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, in front again off home turn, steadily faded out.
About 5th into straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Worse than midfield to home bend before making up some ground closing stages.
Well there to straight where he kept on till finding no extra close home.
Was 4th before failing to hold place coming into straight.
Mostly midfield to home turn. Kept on without threatening final 300 M.
Never on terms despite improving a bit closing stages.
About 10th rounding home bend. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Midfield halfway. Ran on well from 300 M to challenge close home. Just failed by the narrowest margin after being interfered before the line. (Finished 2nd, placed 1st.)
Well there before dropping out steadily approaching 200 M.
5th or 6th approaching home turn. Quickened on straightening to lead passing 200 M. Kept on well before shifting out and hampering BULLISH LUCK. (Finished 1st, placed 2nd.)
In rear to straight. Never nearer.
Never in contention after losing considerable ground at start.
Led field to 200 M. Found no extra.
Made no show.
Always prominent. Raced 2nd passing 400 M. Kept on without threatening the winner, lost 2nd narrowly near finish.
Began awkwardly, mainly 5th throughout the race. One-paced.
Raced alone around 4th on the inner rail. Failed to quicken 200 M out.
Took lead to 200 M out. Found no extra.
Never better than mid-division.
Last to 200 M. Only ran past a couple of beaten horses.
Around midfield to 400 M. Weakened.
Not far off early, soon behind midfield. Faded from 300 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Ran on from 5th 400 M to snatch 2nd near finish.
Always well there. Took clear lead 200 M out. Held on well to the line.
Soon 2nd last. Made up some ground 250 M out.
Settled towards rear. Tightened over 200 M out. Finished off race well. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Never better than midfield.
Never better than midfield.
Broke well. Settled behind midfield. Dropped to rear rounding home bend.
Midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening but only one-paced.
Always well there. Gained upper hand inside 200 M and just held on from runner-up's late challenge.
Midfield. Took closer order home bend. No extra final 200 M.
Forward of midfield. Made some impression early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Broke well and settled in prominent position. Gradually weakened under pressure in straight.
Niggled along. Moved up to dispute lead rounding home bend. Soon dropped out after straightening.
Last into straight. Produced good late finish closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Shifted out for a run upon straightening and ran on to miss narrowly.
Soon took up running and led field until narrowly headed inside 200 M. Kept on one pace.
Behind midfield. Moved up steadily along rail to be 3rd 800 M. Dropped back a bit to 5th home turn. Kept on without quickening.
Pushed along to take lead from 800 M. Was joined from final turn. Weakened when headed 200 M.
Jumped well and led early stages. Then raced within 1L behind the leader before sharing the lead final turn. Took over 250 M out and won readily.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress while hanging out in straight. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
In touch early, soon in midfield or behind. Kept on one-paced in straight.
In touch. Lost position when crowded 700 M, dropping to behind midfield. Never recovered.
Towards rear. Slightly improved to 8th home bend. Ran on steadily 300 M to take 2nd close home.
Always in touch but was wide without cover. Gained 3rd on straightening. Found no extra closing stages.
Began awkwardly, near rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on under pressure in straight to be 2nd near 100 M. One-paced close home.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Midfield or slightly better. Weakened steadily 300 M out.
Travelled in 5th. Loomed up to hold every chance over 200 M out but unable to peg back winner throughout closing stages.
Mostly wide in midfield. Gave ground from home bend.
Held up in rear early. Took closer order home bend and made some late impression closing stages.
Chased leader to 200 M then weakened.
Settled in midfield on rails. Commenced move after straightening and asserted authority inside 200 M.
Led field until overhauled inside 200 M.
Well back with some impression briefly coming out of back straight.
Never far off. Steadied for a run on inner early in straight but only produced moderate progress when clear passage final 200 M.
Missed the break but soon in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Lost touch shortly after straightening.
In similar position throughout.
Sluggish at start. In last few to straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Last into straight. Produced good late run final 200 M before hampered near finish.
Soon in rear.
Jumped well and soon raced 1-1/2Ls off pace 1 off the rail through to straight. Kept on well when asked 350 M out but weakened slightly in the closing stages and was swamped near the line.
Broke fairly from wide draw and was steadily eased to worse than midfield 3 wide. Commenced to lose ground at home turn and tailed out in straight.
Soon raced in midfield 2 wide. Around the 800 M whilst proving difficult to settle was awkwardly placed on heels. Unable to go up a gear when asked 400 M out and ran on evenly to the line.

Slow to begin and raced in worse than midfield on rail. Steadily switched to the outside in straight to obtain clear running. All out 300 M out and ran on well inside final 200 M to miss 3rd place by a narrow margin.
Began fairly from wide draw and niggled along to race in midfield 3 wide. Pushed along to maintain position at home bend. Ran on well inside final 200 M to grab 3rd place on the line.
Raced in midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but failed to respond and steadily dropped out inside final 250 M.

Broke fairly from wide draw and soon eased to the tail on fence through to straight. Short for room in early part of straight, obtained running 300 M out and made up good ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and niggled along to race in prominent position on rail. Took lead near 1200 M with 1/2L advantage to straight. Kept on fairly up until the 200 M mark and steadily weakened thereafter.
Broke awkwardly and soon recovered to race in better than midfield on fence. Failed to respond when asked 400 M out and steadily dropped out thereafter. (Mucus in trachea + early "roarer".)
Soon eased to the rear section 2 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running but only able to plug on evenly to the line.
Began well and ridden along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. Pushed along to maintain position turning for home. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

Broke awkwardly and niggled along to race in worse than midfield 2 wide. Peeled out and made steady progress at home turn. All out 350 M out and ran on gamely inside final 200 M to grab win near the line.

Jumped well from wide draw and niggled along to lead narrowly 2 wide. Near the 1200 M mark eased back to race 1/2L off leader to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but weakened slightly in the final stages.

Best out from widest and soon raced 1-1/2Ls off pace 2 to 3 wide. Under pressure to go forward turning for home. Slightly flat in early part of straight but fought back gamely inside final 200 M to take 2nd place.
3Ls off pace when 3-wide without cover 1200 M out, sent on to dispute the lead out 2-wide from the 1000 M to home straight, went 2Ls clear at 300 M, headed about 100 M out, no extra.
Never travelled well, hung in early on, 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace in 7th at the 1000 M, in rear and 4-wide entering straight when 7Ls behind, no impression.
Always wide, unlucky loser, 4-wide without cover down back straight when 6Ls or 7Ls down in 11th place, 6-wide (widest) into straight, 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra close home.
On fence 8Ls off the speed in 12th at 1000 M, 2-wide and 6Ls down at 800 M and into home straight when hanging out 5-wide, ran on fairly well, nearest at the finish.
On fence 5Ls off the speed in 9th at the 1000 M, 2-wide and 5Ls down at 800 M and 3-wide and 5Ls off pace in 9th off home turn, made some late headway without threatening principals.
4-wide without cover in 8th when 5Ls off the pace at the 1000 M, caught 3-wide without cover and 3Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 800 M to home straight, soon weakened.
On fence 3Ls off the pace in 6th at the 1000 M, 4Ls down at 800 M and into home straight and still 6th, one-paced and beaten when he tried to take a lump out of PROFIT DAY at 200 M.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace in 5th at 1000 M, niggled along 500 M out when 3-wide and 5Ls off the speed, staying on when 3Ls down in 5th 300 M out, soon flattened out.
Had to work hard (and hung in) to lead on fence at the 1100 M, disputing lead from 1000 M to home straight, soon dropped out and beaten over 300 M out.
Briefly led out 2-wide at 1400 M, settled on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th 1000 M out, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn and at 200 M, one-paced late on.
Slowly away, 12Ls last 1400 M out, 9Ls down on fence in 13th at 1000 M, improving 6Ls down in 10th entering straight, 2.5Ls down in 4th at 200 M, kept on to lead inside 100 M, ran on.
Very wide (5-wide) in rear about 10Ls off the pace 1400 M out, always in rear bunch, always wide and never closer than 5Ls off the pace at any stage.
2-wide and 2Ls off the pace in 3rd at the 1000 M, under pressure to hold position from as far as 800 M out, beaten well before turning for home, tailed off.
6Ls behind the lead in 10th and 3-wide at 1000 M, over-raced at 800 M when wider and without cover, 5-wide and 5Ls off pace in midfield entering straight.
Jumped well from widest draw and raced wide in midfield without cover. Responded well when pressured on straightening and got to the lead 300 M. Stayed on well but was caught final strides.
Began well and dropped back to race 3-wide rear section. Swithced out on straightening and rallied strongly to capture win close to line.
3-wide and near the back in the early stages. Made up some ground after 800 M but was caught widest rounding home turn. Every chance at 200 M but unable to sustain effort to line.
Pressed forward to race alongside the leader. Stayed near the lead until weakening inside final 300 M.
Raced 2-wide and just behind the leaders. Made a brief dash at 400 M but nothing more thereafter.
Began fairly and raced near the pace early stages. Dropped back steadily to midfield after 1000 M. Not much response when asked in the straight.
Niggled along to be racing within 2Ls of the leaders until straightening. Held up near 400 M and was steadied at 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Quickest out and raced 2-wide just behind midfield. Picked up well inside 300 M and made steady ground in the final stages.
Blundered on jumping and raced within 2Ls of the lead. Steadied at 1000 M and dropped back slightly. Improved steadily in the straight but was crowded 200 M. Couldn't find extra thereafter.
Jumped fairly and was ridden to lead. Continued to lead until weakening inside 300 M.
Slow to jump. Raced near the back despite being pressured. Didn't pick up when pressured again at 600 M and only ran past a weakening runner.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Trailed field until straightening and only ran past few weakening runners.
Over-raced early on and without cover throughout, 3-wide and no cover in 5th and 2.5Ls off pace at 1200 M and at 800 M, still close up entering straight but soon wilted.
5-wide but with cover when 6Ls off pace at 1300 M, slipped in 3-wide with cover in rear at 1000 M, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls down in 12th, moderate late headway.
Didn't break very well, prominent early on, on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, struggling to hold this spot off the final bend, faded steadily.
Allowed soft lead and 1L clear on fence 1200 M out, led to top of home straight when briefly headed, reasserted at 300 M and went 2Ls clear at 200 M, ran on well.
On fence in 4th about 2.5Ls off the pace at 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield at 800 M and into home straight, ran on fairly but always looked held.
In 12th 6Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1200 M, 5Ls down at 800 M, 3-wide into stretch when 3Ls down in midfield, staying on but baulked both 300 M out and 150 M out, still ran on well for 2nd.
Very wide without cover early on, slipped inside to 2-wide and 8Ls off the pace in rear at the 1200 M, never on terms and only ever passed one rival.
2-wide and 2Ls off the pace in 3rd at the 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, steadied at top of home straight and left 2Ls down in 5th, could only plug on at same pace after that.
Over-raced in places, on fence 5Ls off pace in 9th or 10th at 1200 M and similarly placed at 800 M and turning for home, held up briefly for a run about 100 M out, nearest at the finish.
2-wide and 4Ls off speed in 7th at 1200 M and at 800 M, went 4-wide entering straight when 2Ls down in 3rd, wavered badly under pressure and one-paced close home.
3-wide and 4Ls off the pace in 8th at the 1200 M and at 800 M, looped field out 4-wide from 700 M to lead at top of home straight, soon headed at 300 M and one-paced through final stages.
Had cover out 4-wide 5Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover and 5Ls behind leader at 800 M, 5-wide into straight when 3Ls down in midfield, kept on well, nearest finish.
Slowly away, raced freely, 2-wide and 3Ls off the pace in 5th or 6th from 1200 M to 600 M, shuffled back entering straight to 4Ls down in midfield, found nothing under pressure.
Slowly away and squeezed at start, on fence 7Ls off the pace when one from rear 1200 M out, 6Ls down in 12th at 800 M, very one-paced in home straight.
Very wide 1st bend, 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1600 M, 3Ls down in 4th at the 800 M, 4Ls down in 4th taking home bend and at 200 M, always staying on at same pace.
Never a factor, 9Ls last on fence at 1400 M, 10Ls last entering home straight, never remotely on terms.
Broke gates, reinstalled, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 6th at 1400 M, 5Ls down in 7th at 800 M, hard ridden entering straight when 6Ls down in 5th, ran on well for pressure, nearest finish.
4Ls off the pace in 7th on fence at the 1400 M, 6Ls down in about 9th at 800 M, under strong pressure at 600 M, 6Ls down at top of home straight, made a little late progress.
6Ls off pace on fence in 9th at the 1400 M and much the same at 800 M, about 7Ls down and well outpaced at top of home straight, ran on at the same pace to be nearest at the finish.
On fence in 12th 8Ls off the speed at the 1400 M and was about 9Ls behind at the 800 M, plugged on at the same pace in straight to be nearest at the finish.
Fractious in gates, settled 2-wide and 5Ls off slow pace when sent to front from 1000 M to lead at 900 M, skipped 3Ls clear at 600 M, 2Ls ahead off home turn but headed at 200 M, no extra.
Extremely wide at first bend (1700 m out), 3-wide without cover in 3rd 1L off pace from 1600 M to 900 M, struggling well before home turn, dropped out rapidly.
Switched from wide alley towards fence upon exiting, 9Ls off pace and 2-wide when one from rear 1400 M out, 10Ls down and 4-wide entering straight in rear off final bend, no chance.
Always caught 3-wide down back straight but had cover, 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1400 M, 5Ls down in 6th at the 800 M, 5-wide and 6Ls down entering straight, kept on at the same pace.
Led 1700 M but went 4th on fence 2Ls down in 4th at 1600 M, 4Ls down in 5th at 800 M, about 3Ls 3rd into stretch, every chance 300 M out, no chance with winner but hung on well for 2nd.
Led 1600 M out on fence by 1L but was headed 900 M out and left 3Ls 2nd at 600 M, 2Ls 2nd entering straight, shaken up to regain lead passing 200 M, driven out.
3-wide with cover in 11th 7Ls off pace at 1400 M, 4-wide without cover from 1200 M, 6Ls down in 8th at the 800 M, 5-wide into home straight and labouring at least 7Ls adrift, no impression.
2-wide and 7Ls behind leader in 10th place 1400 M out, 3-wide and 6Ls down in 10th at 800 M, not much better off and 4-wide entering straight, ran on fairly, never nearer.
Midfield halfway and remained there turning into straight. Stayed on to threaten inside final 200 M, drifting out under pressure.
Midfield rounding home bend. Unable to trouble leaders on straightening.
Was 2nd or 3rd before sharing lead from 1000 M to straight. Faded rapidly from 250 M.
Led or shared pace to straight where he gave ground steadily from the 300 M.
Made no show.
Always well there. Ran on to challenge inside final 200 M. Claimed victory near finish.
Ran 5th into home bend and similar position on straightening. Unable quicken to challenge.
Never on terms.
About 5th or 6th into straight. Kept on without quickening under pressure. No extra close home.
Soon improved towards leaders and was in touch into straight. Ran on to lead passing 300 M but found winner too strong close home.
Worse than midfield 1000 M and was among rear group swinging into straight. Ran on a bit from the 250 M.
Last approaching home turn. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
In rear to straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
About midfield into straight. Found nothing when asked.
Towards rear early, soon recovered some ground to be in midfield. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Jumped moderately. Ridden hard early to soon be prominent. Tracked the leader before taking over turning in. Held on until headed 50 M out.
Slowly away, towards rear. Crept closer to 7th or 8th along inside final turn. Ran on well final 200 M to just miss narrowly.
Mainly 4th to 200 M out. Found no extra.
Behind midfield throughout.
Midfield. Dropped to 10th passing 800 M. Made up some late ground inside 150 M.
Pushed along from widest draw to be prominent. Raced 3rd 650 M. Sustained effort 200 M out to claim victory final 50 M. Won marginally.
Jumped well and led field to final turn. Weakened badly final 150 M.
Never a factor.
Slightly behind midfield. Widest final turn. Kept on early straight. Weakened 200 M.
In touch, raced 5th from 800 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Last throughout.
Well there. Hit front shortly after straightening but swamped about 150 M out.
Led till headed over 200 M out, then weakened.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Well back to straight. Made up some late ground.
Chased leader to home bend, then weakened.
Settled behind midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Ran on well to assert authority inside 200 M.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Always prominent. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Well back. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Around midfield to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Close up early then dropped to some 3Ls off lead far side. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Slightly behind midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Soon led. Kept on for 2nd when headed 200 M.
Made no show.
Behind midfield throughout.
Slowly away, towards rear. Steady progress on outside passing 400 M. Found no extra closing stages.
In touch early, soon eased down by the rider. (Lame.)
Near rear to 200 M. Ran on closing stages.
Better than midfield. 3-wide 4th turning in. One-paced.
Prominent. 1L behind lead from 700 M. Came to tackle leader final turn, taking lead 200 M. Won readily.
Slowly away, pushed along to recover some ground to behind midfield halfway. Faded closing stages.
Never far off. Raced 3rd from 500 M. Kept on but never able to threaten.
Tracked leader to 700 M. Gave ground to 5th rounding home bend. Weakened inside 200 M.
Never better than midfield. Kept on at the one pace in straight.
Attempted to make all, but unable to sustain effort and swamped close to home.
Broke well and settled just off the pace. No extra closing stages.
Wide in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend but dropped away quickly after straightening.
Mostly around midfield to straight, then weakened. (Lame.)
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Raced keenly in midfield far side. Ran home one pace.
Settled behind leader. Switched out for a run upon straightening and ran on to take charge closing stages.
Slightly slow out. Last into straight. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Towards rear. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Well back. Made up a lot of ground in straight despite steadied 200 M out.
Towards rear. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.

Tardy start and raced towards the rear on rail. Around the 800 M got its head up and shifted away from heels. Switched out and made little headway at home bend. Only kept on one pace to the line when asked 250 M.

Broke fairly and settled in midfield or worse on rail. Switched out and ridden along to go forward at home bend. Made up good ground inside final 250 M but was unable to run down the 1st pair to settle for 3rd.

Began fairly and settled in better than midfield 2-wide. Switched out and went forward to join leaders turning for home. Responded well when asked 300 M out and took charge at 200 M to win convincingly.
Began fairly and was soon taken back to the tail 2-wide through to straight. Made no impression in straight.
Began awkwardly and raced towards the rear section 2 to 3-wide. Switched wide and made little progress at home bend. Unable to sustain effort in straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M.

Began well from widest and niggled along to race in forward position. Took outright lead on rail passing 1200 M through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 300 M out but was unable to match speed with winner inside 200 M.
Broke fairly and soon eased to midfield or worse 2-wide. Ridden along and made little progress turning for home. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 300 M out.
Began fairly and was soon taken to the tail on rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Broke well and niggled along to race in a prominent position on rail. Ridden along to maintain position turning for home. Unable to quicken in straight and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.

Began well and raced in better than midfield on rail in the early stages. Around the 1000 M got shuffled back to midfield. Under pressure 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M without troubling the placegetters.
Ridden along to race in mid-division out wide without cover. Commenced to lose ground quickly at home bend and tailed out in straight.
Jumped awkwardly from wide draw and soon recovered to race in a prominent position 2-wide through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 300 M out and weakened slightly over the concluding stages.
Had cover out 3-wide 6Ls off the pace in 10th 1100 M out, improved from 800 M out to be 3Ls down in 6th and 3-wide entering straight, ran on fairly well without threatening principals.
Either last or one from last on fence about 7Ls off the pace through to home straight, made a little late headway.
Caught 4-wide 1400 M out and steadied back to 2-wide and 2Ls off the speed in 4th at 1100 M, 3Ls 4th at 800 M and 3Ls down in 5th place entering straight, one-paced thereafter.
Much too keen when 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace in 6th 1100 M out, 5Ls down in 9th entering straight, found nothing under pressure.
Bumped at start, 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1100 M to home straight when all out to hold this position, faded.
Bumped at start, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 9th at 1100 M, still 5Ls down but 3-wide entering straight, found no clear running whatsoever on run-in and was not properly extended.
3-wide without cover when 4Ls off the pace in 7th 1100 M out, advanced out wide from 800 M out to be just over 1L down in 3rd and 3-wide into straight, ran on gamely, no extra final 200 M.
Slowest away, 8Ls off speed and 2-wide in rear 1100 M out, improved from 800 M out 4-wide without cover and 5-wide (widest) into stretch when 4Ls down in midfield, one-paced.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 1L, hung out a bit from 600 M, half a length up entering straight, drifted in straight under pressure but was always in command.
Slipped across to fence from wide gate to sit 2Ls down in 3rd or 4th from 1100 M out to home straight and at the 200 M, always held by winner but ran on well to take 2nd close home.
On fence about 5Ls off the speed in 8th 1100 M out, same distance behind leader on fence but was one from rear off final bend, no impression. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Bumped rail when 4Ls off the speed in 5th 1100 M out, still 4Ls down but in 7th entering straight, very one-paced.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Improved to within 3Ls of leader before straightening. Responded well when asked and took control final 100 M.
3-wide behind midfield. Steadied at 700 M whilst improving and dropped to rear section. Wide turning in and ran past some beaten runners in the straight.
Easily got to the lead. Continued well in the home straight but unable to hold off the winner in the closing stages.
2-wide midfield in the early stages. Steadied when crowded after 700 M and dropped back slightly. Steadied again at home turn and was held up after 300 M. Ran on nicely and made up some late ground.
On fence at midfield. Ridden at 600 M but was steadied and shifted out rounding home turn. One paced in the straight.
2-wide rear section in the early stages. Improved slightly when hard ridden after 600 M. Steadied shortly after straightening and continued to make steady ground in the closing stages.
Pressed on early to race in a forward position. Raced about a length behind pace in the back straight. Unable to keep pace despite being pressured at 500 M. Found nothing in the straight.
Niggled along on fence to keep within 2Ls of the pace. Similar position heading into home straight. Kept on well but couldn't find extra to challenge in the closing stages.
Slowly away and raced in last place. Improved slightly 700 M out but commenced to drop back after 600 M. Made no impression in the straight.
2-wide and kept racing within 3Ls of the pace. Pressured at 600 M and strode forward to raced upside leader. Unable to overtake the leader despite being ridden at 400 M. Kept pace in the straight.
4-wide without cover in rear section. Improved to within 3Ls of the lead 600 M out but couldn't keep up despite being ridden. Widest turning in and weakened shortly after straightening.
Settled on fence in a rearward position. Dropped to last place 600 M out but moved up along the fence to midfield rounding home turn. Improved gradually in the closing stages.
Slowly away and always 3-wide but with cover within 3Ls of the pace until the home turn, all out when 4Ls down in 6th at the 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
Settled about 4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 800 M and similarly placed entering straight when under pressure, ran on well final stages to be nearest at the finish.
Best away and raced 2-wide within 1L of the pace mostly in 2nd through to home straight, failed to pick up, beaten 300 M out.
Outpaced early and deep on track 4-wide without cover, always in rear and never better than 5Ls behind the lead at any point, well beaten when widest of all turning for home.
Slowly away, caught 3-wide but had cover and wasn't any better than 4Ls off the speed between 8th and 10th through to home straight, kept on evenly late on.
On fence and about 1L off the lead in leading quartet through to home straight, gave sole chase after winner and 2Ls down at 200 M, no extra close home and just hung on for 2nd.
About 3Ls off pace in midfield and 2-wide until taking the final bend, stayed on at the same pace.
About 4Ls down in 9th when towards about 800 M out, never got any closer, 5Ls last entering straight, one-paced on run-in.
No speed early and at least 6Ls last 800 M out and one from rear entering straight, ran on well through beaten rivals, never nearer.
Narrow lead out 2-wide at 800 M, could only cross to fence off home turn when 1L clear off home turn, shot 2Ls clear at 200 M, drew further ahead, impressive.
Within 1L of the lead in 3rd place but always 3-wide through to home straight, faded thereafter.
Slowly away, on fence in midfield about 3Ls off the speed until final bend, kept on fairly well without threatening principals final 300 M.
Better than midfield. Was difficult to settle and awkwardly placed near 600 M. Kept on quite well in straight.
Well there. Dropped back gradually 250 M out.
Never better than midfield. Weakened soon after straightening.
Led field to 900 M. Raced 5th rounding home bend. Kept on well early straight but was weakened closing stages.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made up good ground from outside in straight.
Never far off. Steady progress to 4th rounding home bend. Sustained effort in straight to take lead 300 M. Held on while dropping his left rein 100 M.
Checked at start, rider unbalanced. Was last throughout.
Towards rear. Improved gradually from 600 M. Ran on well from 7th final turn but failed to pick up the winner final 200 M.
Prominent. Joint lead from 800 M. One-paced when headed 300 M.
Behind midfield. Kept on without quickening 250 M out.
Towards rear. Steadied for a run 300 M. Made minor recovery thereafter.
Prominent. Joint lead from 800 M. Faded out of contention passing 400 M.
Tracked leaders, racing keenly far side. Quickened to assert authority inside 200 M. Hung on well from runner-up's late challenge.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Settled in forward of midfield. Switched out for a run upon straightening and ran on well to do best work at finish.
Jumped best. Shared pace to 200 M then weakened.
Forward of midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Midfield to halfway then faded.
Towards rear. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening but only kept on at the same pace.
Joint leader to 200 M then unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Sluggish early. Checked when raced keenly around home bend. Produced good late impression final 200 M.
Wide in midfield far side before giving ground gradually around home bend. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Soon in rear. Trailed field into straight. Ran past some beaten horses.
Behind midfield. Given a bump about 300 M out before making steady headway to the line.
In touch early, settled towards rear. Recovered some ground rounding home bend. Kept on early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Tardy start, towards rear early. Soon recovered ground to be better than midfield, further progressed to 3rd home bend. Weakened on straightening.
Behind midfield. One-paced before weakened closing stages.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily in straight to take 2nd close home.
Jumped well, always there. Kept on.
Soon led. With 3Ls advantage home bend. Failed to quicken when headed 250 M.
In touch early, settled towards rear. Ran on steadily 300 M out.
In touch from widest draw. Was 2nd from 1300 M. Ran on steadily to take lead 250 M. Held on.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from outside 200 M out.
Towards rear early, soon in midfield on inside. Failed to find a clear run on the rail inside 100 M, not properly tested.
Mainly in midfield. Made no show inside 200 M.
Soon dropped to the rear. Made some moderate progress final 200 M.
Bounded in the air and lost ground at start. Never a factor.
Ridden along to be in touch. Faded from final turn.
Led till joined into straight, then soon overhauled.
Around midfield. No clear run virtually the length of straight.
Made no show.
Slightly slow at start, then quickly recovered to forward of midfield. Weakened under pressure in straight.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Wide in midfield to straight. Made some headway early on but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Towards rear. Made up some ground down centre of straight without threatening.
Settled in forward of midfield. Obtained clear passage about 250 M out and finished strongly to take charge close to home.
Raced freely in close-up position. Hit front turning in but quickly overhauled final 200 M.
Well back to straight. Ran past beaten runners closing stages.
Lost considerable ground at start and tailed off throughout.
Never far off. Fought on steadily under pressure but never able to match pace with winner.
Settled towards rear. Made steady headway early in straight before finished off race well to just miss 2nd place.
Midfield throughout. Forced to steady approaching home bend. One-paced in straight.
Slow to begin and raced in rear section 3 wide. Switched out and ridden along to go forward at latter part of home turn. Made up steady ground in straight but was no match for the winner.
Soon settled in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Had trouble obtaining clear running in early part of straight. Only ran on evenly when running was obtained inside final 200 M.
Broke well from wide draw and ridden along to race in a prominent position 3 wide without cover. Ridden along to hold position at home turn. Steadily dropped out in straight.
Settled at the tail of the field around 2 wide through to straight. At the 200 M whilst closing the race off strongly was short for room. Obtained running at 100 M and ran on strongly to the line.
Tardy start from wide draw and ridden along to race in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Began well and steadily eased to midfield or worse 3 wide. Switched wide and made little headway turning for home. All out 300 M out and sprinted away inside final 150 M to win convincingly.

Broke well from wide draw and niggled along to race in midfield out wide without cover. Made steady progress from the outside at the home bend. One-paced in straight and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly and soon settled in midfield 2 wide. Switched out to find clear running on straightening. Ran on evenly in straight with limited daylight and was short for room in the final stages.

Began fairly from widest and ridden along to take up running on rail with no more than 1-1/2Ls advantage through to straight. Unable to quicken when aksed 400 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly and was eased to midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to obtain clear running near the 200 M mark and made up little ground over the concluding stages.
Soon raced in rear section 2 wide through to straight. Made no impression in the straight.

Began fairly and raced in prominent position on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M but failed to sustain effort final 200 M and was swamped by placegetters in the final stages. (Blood and mucus in trachea.)
Jumped very awkwardly and soon recovered to race in rear section on rail through to straight. Raced tight near the 300 M and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Broke well and raced in prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Responded fairly when asked 200 M out but effort was only short lived and was overhauled over the concluding stages.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th from 1200 M through to home straight, led 250 M out, drew well clear.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1000 M to home straight, every chance when disputing lead 300 M out, one-paced and soon left behind.
Always very wide and without cover, 5-wide down back straight when in rear and never better than 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed, never on terms.
Slowest away, jumping badly left, 8Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M, 2-wide and 5Ls behind at 800 M and 4Ls down in midfield off final bend and 3Ls down at 200 M, one-paced final stages.
No speed early, in 11th place 6Ls off the pace at 1000 M, niggled along at 800 M and hard driven when 6Ls down 12th on fence entering straight, faded.
Never travelled well, despite inside draw was 3-wide under pressure and 6Ls off pace towards rear at 1000 M, in last place and toiling at 600 M, well detached entering straight.
Hung out 5-wide at 1400 M, 3-wide without cover in 6th place when 4Ls behind lead at 1000 M, hard ridden when 4Ls off pace in midfield and 4-wide off home turn, weakened.
Slipped towards inner 5Ls off pace in 9th 1000 M out and about 4Ls 9th entering straight, failed to accelerate and soon beaten.
4-wide at 1400 M, had cover 3-wide and 8Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M, closer about 5Ls off pace towards rear at 800 M and into straight when 4-wide and under pressure, no impression.
3 back the fence 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in about 5th or 6th from 1200 M to home straight, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, ran on fairly final stages.
Worked quite hard out wide early on to lead on fence by 2Ls at 1200 M, tended to over-race, headed by a neck at 800 M and sat a neck 2nd entering straight, didn't find much off the bridle.
2Ls down in 3rd at 1200 M, pressed on to dispute lead out 2-wide at 1000 M and take clear advantage from 800 M to home straight, headed 250 M out but kept on well to hang onto 2nd.
Quite wide throughout, 4-wide without cover at 1100 M when 5Ls off pace in 8th, soon gained cover in 3-wide at 900 M and same into home straight when 5Ls down in 10th, dropped out.
Switched towards rail from wide gate on exiting, 2-wide in 7th and 4Ls off pace at 1000 M, 3-wide and 3Ls down in 6th off final bend, finished off at same pace.
Kept 2-wide in a rearward position. Did not find much in the straight.
Raced just off the pace before moving up alongside the leader at 600 M. Took the lead into home straight. Briefly headed 200 M but fought back to regain a slim lead and held advantage to line.

Slowly away and was ridden along the fence to settle behind the leaders. Pressured to keep up at 600 M. Dueled with the eventual winner from 400 M onwards and took a brief lead final 200 M before losing by a narrow margin.
Slowly away and raced 3-wide in a rearward position. Only ran past a weakening runner in the straight.

Trailed field in the early stages. Moved up to be racing behind midfield 900 M. Checked at 700 M and was pressured to maintain position. Closed to within 4Ls of the leader at 400 M but was one-paced in the straight.
On fence behind midfield in the early and middle stages. Improved gradually rounding home turn but was steadied when crowded at 400 M. Found no extra thereafter.

Caught wide in a forward position in the first run. Continued to be wide and raced just behind the leaders in the back straight. Continued well on straightening but couldn't find extra to challenge closing stages.
Behind midfield early. Dropped to the rear in back straight and trailed field into home straight. Made no impression thereafter.
2-wide at midfield. Pushed hard 600 M and was 4-wide rounding home turn. Unable to pick up in the straight.
Jumped well. Settled 2-wide and within 3Ls of the pace in the middle stages. Kept on well in the straight but couldn't draw closer final stages.
Slow to begin and raced 3-wide behind midfield. Widest rounding home turn and staged a good rally in the straight.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield until straightening. One-paced to line.
On fence at midfield in the early stages. Kept within 4Ls of the lead in the back straight. Continued well in home straight but unable to draw closer to winner.
Ridden hard to get to the lead. Pressured to keep pace 500 M and dropped out quickly after straightening.
2-wide and 5Ls off the pace in 7th at 1000 M, 3-wide and still 5Ls down off home turn in midfield, into the clear 350 M out, ran on strongly but never looked like catching winner.
Slowly away, on fence 5Ls off the pace in 8th at 1000 M, still on inner and 3Ls down in midfield entering straight, weakened steadily from 300 M out.
Led very early on but headed by winner 1100 M out, 1L off speed on fence in 3rd from the 900 M until home straight, found very little off the bridle and beaten over 300 M out.
Slowly away, on fence about 8Ls off the speed when one from rear at 1000 M, 8Ls behind leader off home turn, never a factor.
Pressed on to lead out 2-wide 1100 M out, led by 1L on fence at 900 M, 1L clear off home turn going easily, shot 2Ls clear at 200 M, stayed on well.
2-wide and 1.5Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd off home bend, still 2nd but over 2Ls down at 200 M when only staying at the same pace, lost further ground close home.
2-wide and 6Ls off the speed in 11th at the 1000 M and similarly placed off home turn, 4Ls down when held up slightly at 200 M, ran on very strongly closing stages, just missed 2nd place.
Slowest away, 8Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 12th at 1000 M, 6Ls down towards rear and 3-wide from 800 M to stretch, staying on well when 3Ls down in 4th at 200 M, no extra final 100 M.
Bumped and crowded at start, at least 12Ls last at 1000 M, took his time to finish. (Lame.)
Bumped and crowded at start, 3-wide with cover and 5Ls or 6Ls off pace in 10th from 1000 M to home straight, comprehensively outpaced thereafter.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 5th at 800 M and entering home straight, never threatened staying on at the one pace to line.
4-wide without cover at 1000 M when 3Ls off pace in 5th, 3-wide and 3Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight and still 3Ls off pace in midfield, same at 200 M, faded a bit close home.
On fence 6Ls off the pace in 9th at the 1000 M, 5Ls down at 800 M, 2-wide and 4Ls down in 8th entering straight, held up for a run from 300 M and clear at 200 M, ran on fairly but too late.
3-wide without cover and 2Ls behind leader at 1000 M, gained some cover 800 M out but 3-wide again within 2Ls of pace in 4th into home straight, well outpaced from 300 M out.
Crossed from wide gate to be 2Ls off pace on fence in 2nd from 1000 M to home straight, all out to stay within 2Ls in 2nd 250 M out, faded thereafter.
3 back on the fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, niggled along at 600 M and entering straight to hold this spot, soon faded.
3Ls off the pace in 4th on fence at 1000 M, over 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, tended to hang in under pressure and still over 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, made a little late ground.
Raced keenly and steadied when 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 7th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 4th when 3-wide into home straight, one-paced and faded steadily.
On fence in rear at least 12Ls off the speed at 1000 M, wide and 8Ls down entering straight, never on terms.
Checked at 1000 M back to be 7Ls off pace in 9th when 2-wide, 3-wide into home straight when 5Ls off pace in midfield, very one-paced.
Didn't break well, 6Ls off the pace in 8th on fence at 1000 M, 2-wide and 4Ls down in 5th off home turn, about 3Ls down in 4th at 200 M, kept on fairly for a place.
Always wide without cover, 3-wide in 5th and 4Ls off the pace at 1000 M, under pressure when 4-wide when about 5Ls down in midfield entering straight, beaten over 300 M out.
Squeezed at the start and one from rear and 10Ls off the pace and 2-wide at 1000 M, never better than 8Ls off the speed at any point.
Soon led on fence, 1L clear at 800 M and skipped 2Ls clear off home turn, held similar margin at 200 M, driven out, stayed on well and always in command.
3Ls down in 3rd and 2-wide at 1000 M, hung out 5-wide without cover when 4Ls off pace at 500 M, beaten 200 M out.
Inconvenienced at 1000 M and sent 3-wide with cover in 10th and 7Ls off the speed, 4-wide into the home straight when 6Ls down, no impression whatsoever.
Jumped right from gates, 9Ls off speed and 2-wide in 12th at 1000 M, still towards rear and hanging out 4-wide off home turn when 6Ls down, finished off only fairly down centre of track.
Checked at 1000 M to end up 8Ls off pace on fence in 11th, 3-wide into home straight when 2-wide and 6Ls down in 10th, 5Ls down in midfield at 200 M and ran on well on fence close home.
Never far off to straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Made headway into home bend and was close up turning into straight. Kept on steadily.
Close up early and was about 5th into straight. Improved to be 3rd 200 M. Found one-paced towards finish.
Behind midfield and wide into straight. Kept on well closing stages for 3rd.
Always prominent. Quickened to lead 200 M. Unable to hold winner near finish.
Was midfield before dropping to rear 800 M. Recovered some ground on straightening.
About 6th approaching home turn. Ran on and was doing best work at the finish.
Soon took up running and led field before finding no extra 200 M out.
In rear to straight where he did not find much room.
Worse than midfield home bend. Came under pressure 250 M and ran on well to lead final strides.
Towards rear till improving a bit in straight.
Never better than mid-division.
Near rear. Made some progress under pressure 400 M. One-paced in straight.
Last from widest draw. Ran past a few beaten horses 200 M out.
Took lead from 1400 M. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily passing 600 M.
Held 3rd with 6Ls behind lead far side. 4Ls 4th final turn. Kept on.
In touch. 7Ls 4th far side. 4-wide final turn. Made no show thereafter.
Raced 8th from a wide draw. Made some minor progress far side to be 5th final turn. Kept on without quickening.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit to 8th rounding home bend. Ran on steadily in straight for a remote 2nd.
Settled midfield. Crept closer to 3rd final turn. Sustained effort to take charge 200 M. Won going away.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made up a little ground in straight.
Led field to 1400 M. 2Ls 2nd to straight. Stayed on until weakened close home.
Began awkwardly, never able to feature.
Mostly in forward of midfield. Kept on one pace.
Midfield. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Began fairly, then quickly improved down centre of back straight to join leaders before home bend. Dropped out after home turn.
Never seen with a chance.
Never in contention.
Always well there, sharing pace early in straight, but unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Rider lost iron briefly early, then settled in rear. Quickened well down straight to win convincingly.
Around midfield to straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Jumped well. Disputed lead most of way but unable to sustain effort final stages.
Never better than midfield.
Lost considerable ground early stages. Remained last to straight. Made up ground running past beaten horses final 200 M.
Began well. Close up early. Midfield rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Mainly 4th before racing 5th from final turn. Kept on one pace thereafter.
Began awkwardly, near rear. Became last 1000 M out. Ran on well final 200 M but unable to reach the first pair.
Checked soon after start, dropped to the last. Recovered some ground on outside 1200 M. 8th rounding home bend. No extra.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit inside 200 M.
Prominent. 2nd from 1100 M. Weakened out of contention soon after straightening.
Led field soon after start. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped back steadily in straight.
Towards rear throughout. (Saddle Shifted.)
Led field early, 2-1/2Ls 3rd 1100 M. Responded well early straight to re-gain advantage 200 M out. Held on but was captured narrowly close home.
Around midfield throughout.
Settled 8th. Made some progress on outside from 500 M. One-paced when under pressure in straight.
Held 5th on inside. Ran on from final turn to just get up close home.
Never far off to straight the weakened.
Worse than midfield throughout.
Midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Chased leader throughout. Kept on same pace under pressure without quickening closing stages.
Rear to straight. Made up good ground down centre to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few but could find no clear passage final 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always struggling at the back.
Midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily to just get up on line.
Soon took up running and attempted to make all. Only caught in the shadows of the post.

Ridden along to race in better than midfield on rail and raced keenly in the early stages. Pushed along to hold position turning for home. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and further weakened inside 100 M. (Lame.)
Soon settled in worse than midfield around 2-wide through to straight. Failed to make any impression in the straight.

Jumped fairly and ridden along to race in a forward position 2-wide. Eased back to better than midfield at back straight. Shortly after straightening was steadied when closed to heels. Kept on one-paced to the line.
On jumping blundered and dropped to the tail of the field on rail through to straight. Kept on evenly in straight and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Began fairly and settled in midfield or worse 2-wide. Around the 1350 M was checked away from heels. Ridden along to go forward at home bend. All out 200 M out and ran on well to grab victory on the line.

Tardy start from wide draw and niggled along to race in prominent position wide without cover. Was able to get to the rail going up Rock. Under pressure 350 M out but was able to run on evenly to the line.
Jumped well from wide draw and ridden along to take lead on rail through to straight. Found nothing when asked 300 M out and dropped out quickly inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2-wide. Made steady headway from 600 M and took charge shortly after straightening. Ran on fairly but failed to fend off late challenge from winner on the line.
Soon settled in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. Had trouble obtaining clear running in major part of the straight and was not properly tested.

Jumped well and soon settled in better than midfield around 2-wide. Near the 1350 M was severely checked when crowded for room. Soon recovered to race in midfield 2-wide to straight. Ran on evenly to the line when asked 300 M out.
Tardy start and raced in the rear section on rail. Switched to the outside on straightening to find clear running. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M to grab 3rd place near the line.
Slow to begin and raced in the rear section 2-wide. Made steady progress from the outside turning for home. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
4Ls off the speed and 2-wide in 5th at 1200 M, hard driven when 500 M out when 4Ls down in 4th and 4-wide (widest of all) into home straight, no impression.
On fence 6Ls off the speed in 6th at the 1200 M, over-raced 1000 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 7th turning for home, kept on only evenly.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, caught 3-wide without cover from the 1000 M, advanced 3-wide without cover in 3rd 1L off pace at 500 M, one-paced and faded steadily on run-in.
3 back on the fence and between 4th and 6th place about 4Ls off the pace through to home straight, kept on stoutly on the run-in.
Always towards rear, 2-wide and 9Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, hard ridden at 500 M when 3-wide with cover and about 6Ls off pace in 9th, very one-paced thereafter.
Made all, never more than 2Ls clear through to home turn, quickly settled the race shooting 3Ls clear at 200 M, pushed out, easily.
In rear when unbalanced and checked about 1300 M out, in 10th 9Ls off pace on fence at 1200 M, 7Ls down in 11th off final bend, ran on well close home, nearest at finish.
On fence 8Ls off the speed in 8th 1200 M out, niggled along 700 M out, bumped at 600 M and checked entering straight when 7Ls down in 11th, dropped out.
Steadied 1500 M out, settled about 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M out through to home straight, ran on fairly well but had no chance of catching the winner.
Always prominent until home straight, always 2-wide between 1L and 2Ls off the pace in 2nd until the home straight, very weak thereafter.
Slowest away, in rear when unbalanced hitting rail, on fence 11Ls off the speed in 12th at 1200 M, 8Ls down and still last entering straight, no impression.
Never really got involved, 2-wide and 8Ls off the speed in 9th 1200 M out, 6Ls down in 8th place off final bend, got no closer.
3-wide behind midfield. Made steady progress in the straight despite hanging in over the concluding stages.
Best out and led. Joined by others in the lead after 700 M. Regained a length's lead on straightening and held that advantage until being overtaken by the placegetters inside final 50 M.
Slowly away. Niggled to race along the fence in rear section. Checked at 500 M dropped further back. One-paced on straightening and ran past a few beaten runners.
Began fairly and raced within 2Ls of the pace. Dropped back to behind midfield after 600 M despite being pressured. Found nothing in the straight.
Began fairly and was niggled to race among the leaders after 600 M. 2-wide turning in and stayed on well in the straight.
Began fairly. Lost ground when steadied at 900 M and dropped back to race 4-wide in last place. Remained close to the rear on straightening but closed the race off well.
Rear section early and dropped to last place after 600 M. Recovered some ground in the straight.
Began well from widest draw and raced 4-wide behind the leaders. Taken very wide rounding home turn. Kept pace to line.
Jumped awkwardly and was pushed along to a forward position. Raced 3-wide among the leaders 600 M but hung out badly rounding home turn and was in last place on straightening. Never recovered.

Stumbled on jumping and was ridden along from 4-wide to keep within 2Ls of the pace. Wide turning in and closed to within a length of the lead on straightening. Kept a good pace but couldn't find extra to challenge.
Began fairly and raced in a prominent position until straightening. Kept on well in the straight and was just edged out by the winner in the closing stages.

Shortly after start was steadied when crowded and raced near the back. Improved gradually from 3-wide to race behind the leaders 600 M out. Picked up well inside final 200 M and took over the lead final 50 M.
About 3-wide at 1000 M but had cover, no worse than 4Ls off the speed in 4th or 5th until turning for home, one-paced in the stretch.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than a length until the 600 M, joined entering straight and headed about 300 M out, faded inside final 100 M.
No better than 4Ls off the pace when worse than midfield and 2 or 3-wide (with cover) until the home turn, kept on strongly, nearest at finish.
2-wide and 3Ls off the speed in 4th at 800 M and roughly the same entering straight when under strong pressure, one-paced on the run-in.
Towards inner about 5Ls off pace in midfield until home straight, kept on only fairly thereafter.
Awkwardly and slowest away, in rear at least 8Ls off the speed until home straight, never a factor.
Had the run of the race in 3rd about 2Ls off the speed until home straight, still 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, no chance with winner but went 2nd 100 M out.
Always caught very wide (4-wide) without cover in midfield when about 4Ls off the speed until home straight, faded.
About 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace and mostly 2-wide from gates to home straight, kept on at same pace latter stages.
Awkwardly away, in 2nd place out 2-wide 1L off pace until 500 M, disputing lead off home turn, clear over 250 M out, drew clear, comfortably.
Crowded at the jump, one from rear and 8Ls off the speed 800 M out, about 9Ls down entering straight, moderate late headway in straight.
Checked at the start, 6Ls off the pace in 8th on the fence at 800 M, badly checked 600 M out but 8Ls off the pace and out of the race, no chance but ran on fairly in the straight.
Last from 850 M.
Better than midfield. Raced 4th on inside 800 M. Weakened steadily 250 M out.
Behind midfield. Kept on quite well final 200 M.
Prominent to 200 M. Found no extra.
Sat outside the winner until fading out of contention approaching 200 M.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily from 5th inside 300 M.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Ran on steadily but just missed narrowly at finish.
Made all. With 3Ls advantage 200 M, just held off runner-up's challenge closing stages.
Midfield. Made no show soon after straightening.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily from outside in straight.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made ground under pressure in straight. Steadied passing 200 M. Kept on closing stages.
Slowly away, last to 850 M. Remained 2nd last until making up some ground inside 150 M.
Jumped well, soon raced in midfield. Ran on from 7th 400 M, doing best work closing stages.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Always in forward of midfield. Not much room behind runners in straight and kept on steadily to the line.
Wide in last few. Effort rounding home bend. No further impression in straight.
Niggled along in midfield far side. Found nothing in straight.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily down centre of straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Always well there. Quickened well to assert authority inside 200 M.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground in straight producing good late impression.
Broke well settling in midfield, then ran on steadily to reach 3rd late.
Raced outside leader to straight then dropped away quickly.
Well back. Produced good headway early in straight.
In forward of midfield to straight then dropped out of contention.
Attempted to make all, but caught inside final 200 M.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Midfield to final turn. Ran on steadily to take lead passing 200 M. Held on.
Took lead soon after start. Found no extra when headed approaching 200 M.
Slowly away, at the back. Only made minor recovery in the straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Behind midfield from widest draw. Crowded for room early straight. Recovered some ground thereafter.
Rear. Ran past a few beaten horses 200 M out.
Mainly 5th to straight. Made up good ground through runners inside 300 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Prominent. 1L 2nd from 900 M. Gained brief advantage approaching 200 M. Failed to quicken when headed passing 200 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer to 7th turning in. Ran on quite well but failed to catch the winner.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily inside 300 M.
In touch early. Dropped back to midfield 1400 M. Made no show in straight. Always raced wide.
Began awkwardly, never a factor.
Held up just off slow pacemakers to straight then ran home one-paced. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Settled at the back. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Made steady headway under pressure down home straight without threatening.
Disputed lead to straight. Unable to sustain effort upon straightening.
Broke well and disputed lead to straight, then weakened badly.
Well there. Quickened to hit front upon straightening but swamped about 200 M out.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Not much room early on then ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Never far off. Obtained split over 200 M out and quickened to hit front shortly afterwards. Held on well to the line.
Held up towards rear of slowly-run field. Ran on through runners down straight to be nearest at finish.
Always struggling at the back.
Wide in midfield far side then shifted inside towards rear before home bend. Never able to obtain run in straight.
In similar position throughout.
Settled 3 or 4 wide in midfield. Maintained same position but wider turning in. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in midfield on rail through to straight. After the 300 M had difficulty obtaining clear running. Obtained running 200 M out and closed the race off fairly to be closest at finish.

Broke well and steadily settled in better than midfield 2 wide. Switched to 4 wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Ran on well when asked 400 M out to snatch win on the line in a 3 way ding dong battle.
Soon settled in worse than midfield on rail. Under pressure to maintain position at home bend. Hung in and ran on one-pace in straight, slightly weakened over the concluding stages.
Jumped awkwardly and niggled along to race in worse than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.

Broke fairly from wide draw and was soon eased to the tail 4 wide without cover. From 1000 M slowly edged forward from the outside to be in midfield on straightening. Made up little ground inside final 200 M when asked 350 M out.

Broke fairly and raced in midfield 2 wide. Switched to 5 wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Responded well when asked 400 M out but missed the 1st pair by a narrow margin after a tight battle down the straight.
Slow to begin and settled in rear section 3 wide. Switched out and made little progress at home turn. Under pressure 400 M and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Jumped well and soon box seated behind leader through to straight. Unable to find clear running early straight. Ran on fairly inside final 200 M to be closest at finish when clear running was obtained 250 M out.

Began well and soon raced in better than midfield 3 wide without cover. Steadily edged forward at home turn and took charge shortly after 400 M. Responded well when asked 350 M out but was overhauled by winner on the line.

Tardy start and pushed along to take lead on rail from 1400 M through to straight. Did not respond when asked 400 M out, near 200 M whilst weakening was checked when crowded for room and steadily dropped out thereafter.

Jumped well and soon raced around 1L off pace 2 wide. Nudged forward at home turn to join leader on straightening. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out further weakened inside final 200 M. (Mucus in trachea.)
Slowly away and raced in a rearward position 2 wide through to straight. Made no impression in the straight.
Always widest down centre of track, 1L down in 3rd 800 M out, 2Ls down in 4th at the 400 M, stayed on well to claim 2nd without much trouble but never likely to catch the winner.
Always prominent within a length of the speed in 2nd until taking up the running 250 M out, drew clear quite comfortably closing stages.
Managed to stay within 2Ls of the pace in about 4th place against far rail, under pressure and 3Ls down in 5th at the 200 M, no extra close home. (Saddle shifted.)
Worse than midfield within 3Ls of the pace until 500 M out, no headway from then on.
Fractious in the gates and bumped at the start, 3Ls down at the 800 M but improved to be 2Ls down in 3rd at the 400 M, one-paced thereafter.
Towards rear about 3Ls off the speed at the 800 M, driven along to keep up 600 M out, soon faded right out. (Tendon injury.)
Awkwardly away and soon detached, at least 6Ls off the main body of the field 700 M out, ran on past a few very tired rivals inside the final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped at the start, 4Ls off pace in 13th early on, staying on but still 4Ls down at 400 M out, one-paced through latter stages.
Led narrowly very early on, headed 500 M out and faded gradually.
Always prominent and led 500 M out, headed 250 M out, ran on evenly through final paces.
Heavily bumped and unbalanced at the jump, 2Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M out, weakening and eased down as far as 400 M out.
Within 2Ls of the speed in midfield until the 500 M when under pressure to keep up, lost ground steadily thereafter.
Prominent within 2Ls of the leader until the 600 M, under strong pressure and fading 400 M out, left well behind final 200 M.
Managed to stay within 3Ls of the speed until the 400 M when in midfield and under pressure, weakened badly close home.
Near the back early but was pressed to be closer to midfield after 1200 M. Drifted back after 800 M despite being pushed and was near the rear on straightening. Made no impression thereafter.
Settled well in midfield. Urged forward after 600 M and was 4Ls down at 400 M. Closed in steadily on leader after 300 M and took over inside final 100 M.
Wide and behind midfield early. Dropped to the back after steadying at 1200 M. Improved slightly after 800 M but caught widest turning in. Made up ground in the final stages.
2-wide near the rear until straightening. Ran past some beaten runners in the straight.
Jumped well from widest draw and strode to the lead after 1400 M. Built a 4Ls lead going into home straight. Pressured to stay on final 200 M but couldn't hold off winner final stages.
Blundered and nearly fell shortly after start then raced in a rearward position. Trailed field into home straight and only ran past a weakening runner in the straight.
Ridden to lead early but settled 2 to 3Ls behind leader from 1200 M to 400 M. Couldn't pick up pace on straightening and weakened final stages.
4-wide behind midfield. Dropped further back to rear section rounding home turn. Rallied well in the straight to be closest at finish.
