Slowly away and raced near the back. Pressured to be closer to midfield 1000 M out. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Wide at midfield early but dropped steadily to a rearward position. 4-wide turning in and made steady ground in the straight.
2-wide and 2Ls behind leader early stages. Unable to keep pace after 600 M and weakened in the straight.
5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 9th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield at 800 M, pressed on to be 1L down in 3rd into straight and at 300 M when with every chance, faded badly final 200 M.
7Ls off pace and 2-wide in 11th 1200 M out and at 800 M, 4-wide into straight when 4Ls down in midfield, switched inside and every chance of a place when 2Ls down in 3rd 300 M out, one-paced.
Had cover when 3-wide and 4Ls off the pace in 8th at the 1200 M, a little closer 800 M out, under pressure to maintain this position entering straight, very one-paced on the run-in.
8Ls down and 3-wide in 12th at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 13th 800 M out, 6-wide (widest) into straight when 3Ls down in midfield, staying on well and 1L 5th at 200 M, no extra close home.
Led by a neck 1200 M out but was headed at the 800 M, struggling to keep up when back-pedalling in midfield entering straight, faded right out.
Under pressure early on, 9Ls off pace against the rail and one from rear at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 12th at 800 M, 5Ls down off home turn, made a little late ground but was always well held.
Raced half a length off the pace in 2nd 1200 M out, 1L down in 4th at 800 M, rapidly losing ground entering straight when 4Ls down, soon eased down.
2-wide and 4Ls down in 7th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in midfield at 800 M, fading out when 2-wide and 6Ls down entering the homestretch, soon well behind and eased down.
Caught 4-wide without cover when 3Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, 2Ls down at 800 M, improved out 4-wide to dispute lead entering straight and at 200 M, kept on gamely, no extra final 50 M.
Never on terms with principals, 10Ls last at 1200 M, 7Ls last at 800 M, 6Ls down in rear and 5-wide entering straight, ran on past a few tired rivals late on. (Lame.)
4 and 5-wide down the back with and without cover, 5Ls off pace in 10th 1200 M out and at 800 M, driven along 5-wide into stretch when 3Ls down in midfield, ran on very well for a place.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide without cover in 4th when 2Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 1L down in 3rd at 800 M, faded from 600 M out and well behind and eased down 300 M out.
3Ls off pace in 5th on fence at 1200 M and same at 800 M, under pressure to hold this position entering straight, dropped out steadily.
2Ls off pace and 2-wide in 3rd at 1200 M, led at 800 M by a neck, disputing lead entering straight and at 200 M, kept on resolutely under pressure, tough and game win.
Had cover when 3-wide 6Ls off the speed in 8th 1200 M out, 5Ls down in 7th at the 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in 6th, very one-paced and weakened right out.
Bounded in the air at the start, on fence 10Ls off the speed in 12th at the 1200 M, 2-wide and 7Ls behind in 13th at 800 M, same position and distance behind but 4-wide into straight, no impression.
Led by half a length out 2-wide at the 1200 M, 1L clear on fence at 800 M, joined by two others at top of home straight, weakened from 300 M out.
Over 10Ls off pace and 2-wide in rear at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover and 8Ls off pace in rear at 800 M, 6Ls down in 11th into straight, 5Ls down in midfield at 200 M, no extra.
On fence in rear about 10Ls off pace at 1200 M and 8Ls down at 800 M, 7Ls behind in 12th entering home straight, never on terms.
6Ls or 7Ls off speed on fence in 9th down back straight, 4Ls down in midfield on inner into straight, staying on and 3Ls down in 5th 200 M out, run petered out but ran on past two tired rivals.
5Ls off the pace in 7th and 2-wide at 1200 M, under pressure to keep up at 800 M, weakening badly entering straight, soon eased down.
3-wide without cover and half a length off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, under pressure to hold this spot 600 M out, fading entering straight, weakened right out.
Awkward start, 3 and 4-wide often without cover down the back, 5Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 5th at 800 M, joint lead into straight, led 300 M out, grabbed at 100 M, no extra.
On fence 4Ls off the pace in 5th at 1200 M, about 3Ls down in 6th at 800 M, under pressure entering straight when 2Ls down in 4th, faded steadily.

Under pressure very early on, 2-wide and about 6Ls or 7Ls behind leader in 10th place down the back straight, hard driven when 4Ls down in midfield entering straight, no further headway. (Dropped whip 300 M.)
2-wide and 2Ls off the pace in 4th at 1200 M and at 800 M, 2-wide and disputing lead entering home straight with every chance, didn't pick up and beaten over 200 M out.
9Ls off pace and 2-wide in 11th at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover at 900 M when 6Ls down in 10th, 4-wide into straight when 4Ls down, picked up well to be 1L 2nd at 200 M, led 100 M out, ran on.
On fence 1L off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, keen with head up at 1100 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th entering straight and hard pressed to lie up, dropped out rapidly.
Well there before failing to hold place approaching straight.
Never far off to straight where he kept on to dispute for 2nd closing stages.
2nd into straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Behind midfield home bend. Reached 3rd 250 M and found no extra close home.
In touch briefly and was 9th halfway. Made no show on straightening.
Among rear group turning for home before running on a bit closing stages.
Midfield home turn. Kept on well despite having no chance with winner.
Never better than midfield.
Never near to challenge.
Always well there. Stayed on to take command 200 M out. Won impressively.
Always at the back.
Led soon after start and was 2L clear into straight. Unable to hold winner approaching 200 M and dropped out steadily.
Never on terms.
About 6th passing 1200 M and remained in similar place home bend. Could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Midfield. Steadied for a run final turn. Ran on but was checked 200 M. Run ended.
Never better than midfield. Made no show in straight.
Slowly away, last to 350 M. Responded well on outside to take command final 100 M. Held on well.
Better than midfield. Mainly 5th rounding home bend. Kept on steadily for a minor placing closing stages.
Prominent. Led field approaching 1000 M. Was headed 400 M. Kept on until weakened badly 150 M.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield from 900 M. Dropped out passing 400 M.
Better than midfield. Ridden along to become 3rd from 600 M. Kept on well in straight until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Held up when crowded on straightening. Made ground steadily inside 250 M, just missed a minor placing.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Ran on well in straight but failed to match speed with winner closing stages.
Behind midfield early, soon dropped to the rear. Recovered some ground 200 M out.
Towards rear. Made up some ground on inside 250 M out.
Led briefly early. Remained in touch until fading out of contention soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Made up some ground when under pressure 300 M.
Well there. Sat outside leader from 1000 M before taking over at 400 M. Held on until headed 100 M.
In similar position throughout. Kept on same pace under pressure.
Towards rear. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Never in contention.
In similar position throughout. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Prominent to 400 M then weakened.
Well there. No extra final 200 M.
In similar position throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there to halfway then gradually weakened.
Always well there, but unable to keep pace with winner close to home.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent onto course proper, then tightened and soon dropped out.
Never better than midfield.
Jumped slowly then remained in rear. Made up ground past beaten runners final 200 M.
Always well there. Went clear final 200 M to win readily.
Towards rear. Made up considerable ground on outside 200 M out.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Recovered ground gradually to be 2nd 600 M. Kept on until failing to hold place final 200 M.
Taken back from widest draw to the rear on inside. Crept closer to midfield final turn. Ran on well final 200 M, just beaten narrowly at finish.
Began awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Dropped back to behind midfield 800 M out. No progress.
Never in contention.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily from 1000 M to be midfield rounding home bend. No improvement in straight.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit to behind midfield rounding home bend. Ran on well from 300 M to take lead closing stages, just got up in a ding-dong battle near finish.
Led field until headed passing 200 M. Fought on for a minor placing.
Prominent. Came to tackle the leader 1000 M. Remained prominent until gaining brief advantage passing 200 M. Failed to match speed with the placegetters closing stages.
Lost ground at start, never a factor.
Midfield. Made progress from 900 M to be in touch home bend. Made no show in straight.
Midfield. Made progress from first turn to be prominent home bend. Faded on straightening.
Settled in midfield. Shifted out for a run early in straight and ran on to snatch victory final stride.
Disputed lead into straight. Kicked 1L clear under pressure 200 M out but caught on the line.
Led to straight then gradually weakened.
Prominent to straight then weakened. (Lame.)
Always prominent. Ran on steadily though without threatening final stages.
Prominent to straight then dropped out.
Midfield or worse. Kept on same pace in straight.
Held up in forward of midfield. Steadied for a run turning in. Finished off race well.
Never nearer.
Mainly in last few before making up late ground in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Produced good impression final stages.
Well back. Some headway rounding home bend. Produced good late impression in straight.
Well there, but only kept on at the one pace final 200 M.
Around midfield rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight.

Began fairly and pushed along to share lead 2 wide. Steadily eased back to be in 3rd place down back straight. Took lead shortly after the 400 M mark and ran on well but just failed to hold out late challenge from the winner.

On jumping bounded in the air and ridden along to share lead on rail. Near the 1200 M was headed and raced 1/2L off leader. Ridden along to hold position at home turn. Only able to keep on evenly to the line.
Slow to begin from wide draw and raced in rearward position 2 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running but was unable to quicken and kept on same pace to the line.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and soon settled in midfield on inner. Switched out and made little headway turning for home. All out 400 M out and responded fairly. Near the 100 M became badly unbalanced and one-paced thereafter.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in mid-division on rail through to straight. Responded well when asked 400 M out before being slightly held up after the 200 M. Regained running shortly after that and kept on fairly to the line.

Broke fairly and niggled along to race in prominent position 3 wide. Shortly after the 1400 M nudged forward and took lead near the 1200 M. Kept on well in early part of straight but slightly weakened inside final 200 M.
Slightly slow out of the gates and eased to the tail around 2 wide. Switched to the widest on straightening to obtain clear running but failed to make any impression in straight.
Slowly away from widest and ridden along to race in better than midfield 3 wide without cover. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and steadily dropped out inside final 300 M.

Jumped well from wide draw and steadily eased to midfield or worse 2 wide through to straight. Ran on quite well when asked 350 M out but near the 100 M was heavily bumped and became badly unbalanced. One-paced thereafter.
Broke well and soon settled in better than midfield on rail. Switched to 3 wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but became one-pace inside final 150 M.

Soon settled in rear section on rail. Switched wide to find clear running on straightening. Under pressure 400 M out and found the line strongly inside final 200 M to grab the winner spot over the concluding stages.

Broke fairly and ridden along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. Switched out and made little progress at home turn. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Settled in a rearward position on rail through to straight. All out 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M before forced to ease inside final 50 M.
Jumped well and steadily eased to race in midfield 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 4th at 900 M, hung out when 3Ls down in 4th on straightening, soon beaten.
Awkwardly away, on fence 7Ls off pace in 10th at 900 M, 3-wide and 5Ls off pace and towards rear entering straight, shifted out at 300 M, one-paced through latter stages.
Slowly away, 3Ls off pace in 3rd on fence at 900 M, losing position entering straight, very weak inside final 200 M.
Caught 3-wide without cover in 5th when 4Ls off pace at 900 M, 2Ls down in 3rd entering straight and under pressure, all out to be a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, weakened thereafter.
Caught 4-wide without cover when 5Ls off the speed in 7th 900 M out, still 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls off pace in 6th, 1L down at 200 M but no extra and tired close home.
2-wide and 2Ls off the speed in 2nd at 900 M, 1L down in 2nd off home turn, all out to lead 250 M out, headed about 150 M out and dropped away quickly.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 6th at 900 M, 4Ls down in 9th when disappointed for running off home turn on fence, soon in the clear but under pressure, found nothing.
Keen early on, bumped at 1000 M when on fence 6Ls off pace in 9th, 2-wide and 4Ls down in midfield entering straight, held up until 250 M out, quickened nicely to lead 150 M out, ran on well.
Had cover when 3-wide 10Ls off pace in rear 1000 M out, hung out from 800 M to home straight when 5-wide (widest) and 6Ls down and one from rear, kept on strongly out wide on the run-in.
Driven along to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1000 M, 1L to the good off home turn, all out when headed 250 N out, weakened.
Bounded at start, 10Ls last 900 M out, detached entering straight, never a factor.
7Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover in 11th at 900 M, still worse than midfield 5Ls off pace and 3-wide into straight, bumped when 2Ls down and staying on at 200 M, no extra close home.
2-wide and 5Ls off the speed in 7th 900 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls off pace in midfield entering straight, 1L off pace (upsides winner) in 5th at 200 M, ran on well but couldn't head winner.
Bit slowly away, switched across from wide gate, 9Ls off pace and 2-wide in 12th at 900 M, 5Ls off pace in 13th into straight, 3ls down in midfield at 200 M, kept on at same pace late on.
Rear section early. Switched out to be 3-wide and improved to be closer to midfield after 800 M. Closed the race off fairly.
Trailed pacesetter all the way into home straight. No clear passage for most of the straight and was not ridden out to the line when racing close to heels in the final stages.

Raced wide and within 2Ls of the pace early. Moved up to tack alongside leader after 1400 M and remained in similar position heading into home straight. Took the lead 300 M out but was headed by winner inside final 50 M.
2-wide behind midfield. Drifted further back after 1200 M and was near the rear heading into home straight. Made up some ground in the straight.

Raced among leaders early. Dropped back slightly after steadying at the first turn. 3-wide and better than midfield in the middle stages. Closed to within a length of leader 400 M. Swamped shortly after.
Settled on fence at midfield in the early and middle stages. Couldn't get closer in home straight.
On fence behind midfield early and middle stages. Unable to find extra in the straight. (Lame.)
4-wide at midfield and was difficult to settle early stages. Crept to within 4Ls of the leader at 800 M. Continued to make steady progress in the straight.
2-wide at midfield at 1400 M. Drifted back slightly after 1200 M and was behind midfield at 800 M. In rear section heading into home straight and closed the race off well.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in a rearward position until home straight. Continued well in the straight and was closest at finish.
Dropped to race at the rear shortly after start and trailed field heading into home straight. Staged a strong rally to claim win final strides.
Raced within a length off the pace until 1400 M. Eased back slightly and kept within 3Ls of the lead in the back straight. Stayed on well in the closing stages.
2-wide and within 3Ls of the lead. Dropped back steadily after 1400 M to be at midfield. Unable to gain much ground on straightening and raced awkwardly close to heels final 100 M.
Jumped well and led until being headed final 300 M. Held on well after surrendering the lead.
Over-raced at bit when 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1200 M to 800 M, still 1L down in 2nd off home turn, found nothing off the bridle and weakened markedly in final 200 M.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 3-wide and 2Ls down in 4th entering straight, picked up well to lead 200 M out, ran on strongly.
4-wide without cover early on, 3-wide with cover when 6Ls in 10th at 800 M, hung in when 5Ls down in 10th into straight, every chance of a place at 200 M when 1L 4th, weakened final 50 M.
Slowly away, always well outpaced, on fence 7Ls off speed in 12th at 1000 M, under pressure at 800 M, 10Ls down and struggling off home turn, no chance.
2-wide and 9Ls off pace in rear at 800 M, still well behind when inconvenienced and forced 5-wide into home straight, had little hope thereafter.
Led by 1L on the fence from 1200 M to home straight, hung out under pressure and headed 300 M out, weakened.
Over-raced early on, within 2Ls of the pace in 3rd until turning for home, held brief lead 300 M out, headed by winner a little over 200 M out, kept on dourly for 2nd.
5Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 8th at the 900 M, 3-wide into straight when 4Ls off the pace in midfield, never troubled principals.
Slowly away, 6Ls off pace on fence in 9th at 900 M, 4Ls down in midfield off final bend, staying on when 2Ls off the lead at 200 M, no extra closing stages.
Always 3-wide without cover until home straight, 4Ls down in 5th at 1100 M, 3Ls 4th at 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th off home turn, all out to be 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on gamely for a place.
Very keen early on, 2-wide and 5Ls off speed in 7th down the backstretch, similarly placed and under strong pressure to take closer order entering straight, no impression.
Slowly away, 7Ls off the speed and 2-wide in 13th at 900 M, a little closer when badly checked entering straight, struggling 6Ls down in 11th at 200 M, eased close home when well beaten.
Settled 6Ls off pace when 3-wide (with cover) in 10th from 900 M through to 500 M out when he broke down, pulled up. (Lame.)
Slowly away, on fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 6th off final bend, one-paced thereafter.
Keen early with head up, 3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, gained cover from 800 M to stretch when 2Ls down in 4th, a neck down at 200 M, kept on gamely, just held.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 9th 1000 M out, 6Ls down in 11th on straightening, ran on okay but never troubled leaders.
Fractious in the gates and bounded at the start, on fence 10Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, about 6Ls down and two from rear off home turn, never much looked like improving his position.
8Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1000 M, 3-wide and 5Ls down in 10th off final bend, finishing off strongly when 2Ls down in midfield at 200 M, kept on well but couldn't get to principal trio.
In 2nd place on fence 1L off pace at 1000 M, 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd and under pressure to pick up off home turn, overtaken by principals at 200 M and kept on at same pace.
Slowly away, on fence 6Ls off pace in 7th down back straight, 4Ls down in 7th on straightening, failed to quicken up and soon beaten.
Surprisingly lacklustre effort, 10Ls off pace in 13th 1000 M out when 3-wide without cover, quite a way detached in rear entering straight, tailed off.
12Ls last and 2-wide at 1000 M, hung in when 3-wide into home straight when 9Ls down in 13th, kept on fairly down centre of track to be nearest at the finish.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, improved to 3-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, a neck down disputing 2nd at 200 M with every chance, kept on well but just couldn't stick his in front.
2-wide and 6Ls off the speed in 8th at 1000 M, 5Ls down in midfield into stretch, 3Ls down and staying on at 200 M, kept on but couldn't reach leaders.
Well placed on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, on fence from 800 M to home straight when 1L 3rd, led 300 M out, a neck clear 200 M out, came under strong pressure but hung on tenaciously.
No speed early and 2-wide and 10Ls off pace in 11th at the 1000 M, 6Ls down and 3-wide entering straight in 12th, 4Ls down at the 200 M, made some late headway but always looked held.
Couldn't lead and settled 2-wide 5Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 3-wide and 3Ls off pace in 6th entering straight when under pressure, steadily lost position staying on at same pace to line.
Soon led and was 1L clear on fence from 1100 M to home straight, under pressure and headed 300 M out, faded out.
About 5th into straight where he quickened to lead 100 M. Kept on well under pressure.
Worse than midfield 800 M and could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Made no show.
Led field before 1000 M and was 2L clear 400 M. Unable to hold winner 100 M and found no extra.
Midfield into straight where he ran on a bit.
Slowly away but soon recovered. Midfield into straight where he kept on before fading under pressure close home.
Well there to straight. Found little when asked.
Towards rear till improving a bit in straight. Found no extra towards finish.
Well there briefly.
Led to 1200 M and joint-2nd into straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Towards rear 1000 M and remained there turning for home. Stayed on well closing stages despite not reaching winner.
Was 4th rounding home bend before reaching 2nd 300 M. Found one-paced close home.
Rear early but soon improved towards leaders. Behind midfield into straight where he kept on quite well close home.
Never a factor.
Always there. Made slight progress final turn. Stayed on well to have some chance 200 M. One-paced closing stages.
Well there to final turn. Weakened.
Raced 4th to 600 M. Moved up to take lead 450 M out. Held on until finding no extra final 200 M.
Near rear. Crept closer turning into straight. Checked 200 M. Kept on.
Soon led when pushed along from a wide draw. Was headed 450 M. Remained prominent until fading out of contention 150 M.
Around midfield from widest draw. Taken back to the last from first turn until 500 M. Recovered good ground 250 M when still in rear early straight.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit to 5th rounding home bend. Kept on well in straight.
Slightly better than midfield within 6Ls behind lead. Made progress from outside 400 M. Sustained effort to take lead passing 200 M. Held on.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear throughout.
Mainly 8th before running on quite well inside 200 M, just missed a minor placing.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. 6-wide (widest) final turn, recovered some ground 200 M out.
Raced in forward of midfield to straight then one-paced.
Raced freely without cover far side. Lost touch under pressure in straight.
Always struggling at the back. (Stiff hind limbs.)
Tracked leader. Responded well under pressure to take charge closing stages.
Attempted to make all. Caught in the shadows of the post.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back, racing keenly far side. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader. Failed to quicken under pressure in straight.
Held up in midfield. Weakened upon straightening.
Well back. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Around midfield throughout. Kept on steadily in straight.
Slowly away, last to 600 M. Made progress from outside rounding home bend. Ran on well in straight to just get up final stride.
Well there. Took lead from 1400 M to 200 M. Kept on while shifting out early straight and in the closing stages.
Pushed along from widest draw to become 3rd 1200 M. Held on until failing to hold place on straightening.
Towards rear. Ran past a few beaten horses from last 250 M.
Midfield. Was crowded several times from 1400 M. Remained in similar position before weakened from final turn. (Lame.)
Maintained 4th on inside. Took slender advantage passing 200 M when asked 300 M. Held on well but was just captured on the line.
Midfield or better. Kept on quite well from final turn.
Checked soon after start, towards rear. Made some minor progress when asked early straight.
Never a factor.
Led field early stages, then remained 2nd to straight. Kept on while inconvenienced passing 200 M. Failed to maintain a minor placing.
Midfield and was wide without cover. Faded passing 400 M.
Midfield. Gave a little ground to behind midfield far side. One-paced.
Waited with. Flew home final 200 M to grab victory final strides.
Never far off to straight. (Saddle shifted 800 M out.)
Wide in midfield. Went wider turning for home. Never recovered.
Missed the break losing ground. Remained well back to straight. Made some late impression.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened.
Midfield most of way. Tightened 200 M out then kept on.
Always struggling at the back. Checked 200 M out.
Midfield. Made modest progress on rails in straight.
Prominent to straight. Kept on one pace without quickening under pressure.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight.
Attempted to make all but outsprinted by winner close to home.

On jumping was crowded for room and pushed along to race in midfield on rail. Made up some ground at home bend and switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Only able to run on evenly in the straight.
Niggled along to race in worse than midfield around 2-wide. At 400 M pushed along and made little progress. On straightening lost its footing and almost fell. Was eased down thereafter.

Began well and ridden along to race 2Ls off pace 2-wide. Steadily edged forward at home turn to be 1/2L off leader on straightening. Took charged near the 200 M mark and ran on well to win convincingly.

Broke fairly from widest and soon settled in rear section around 3-wide without cover. Made little headway from the outside at home turn and on straightening was hampered. Only able to run on evenly thereafter.

On jumping got its head up and lost ground. Soon recovered to race at the tail and made up little ground from the outside at home bend. All out 200 M out and made up little ground to be closest at finish.
Broke well and ridden along to race in better than midfield on rail. For some distance after the 400 M was held up and unable to improve. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 250 M out.

Tardy start and was unable to munster early speed to be in rear section 2-wide through to straight. Only ran on evenly when asked 200 M out and was unable to obtain clear running over the final 100 M.
Began well and raced in prominent position through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 250 M out but became one-paced over the concluding stages.

Unable to munster early speed to be in midfield or worse on rail. Near the 1000 M was awkwardly placed and lost ground. Held up for a few strides in early part of straight. Soon regained running and ran home well to claim 2nd place.
Jumped early from wide draw and ridden hard to lead narrowly. Took outright lead on rail shortly after the 800 M mark. Found nothing in the straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M.

Best out and settled in midfield 2-wide. Made steady progress turning for home to be 2Ls down on straightening. Under pressure 250 M out and ran on fairly but failed to find the extra gear to overhaul the 1st pair.

On jumping blundered and raced towards the rear section on rail. Near the 300 M whilst switching out to find clear running was badly hampered. Unable to quicken when asked 200 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
2-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 4th from 1200 M to home straight, looked the winner when looming dangerously 1L off pace in 3rd 150 M out, failed to sustain effort.
2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in 6th from 1200 M to 600 M, driven along into home straight when 3-wide, made some late headway but never reached leaders.
Slowly away, 7Ls off pace on fence in 9th at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 9th on straightening, always held but ran on quite well late on, was short of room final 50 M and wasn't fully ridden out.
On fence in 7th place 6Ls off pace at 1200 M, about 4Ls down in 6th from 800 M to home straight, finished off well to take 2nd in final strides.
Dwelt at the start and lost at least 6Ls as a result, ridden along to 9Ls off pace and 2-wide when one from rear at 1200 M, 7Ls down in 10th entering home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Soon led on fence, led by 1L at 1100 M and never clear by more than 1L through to straight when disputing the lead, failed to quicken up and was headed 100 M out and lost 2nd final strides.
Prominent but 3-wide without cover 1300 M out, went 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1100 M, disputing lead off home turn, stayed on well to lead 100 M out, kept on.
Had the run of the race on the fence in 3rd place about 2Ls off pace from 1200 M to home straight, about 1L down when crowded 200 M out, no extra close home.
About 8Ls off pace throughout on fence, ran on strongly through closing stages along inside though he never looked likely to reach the frame.
6Ls off the speed and 2-wide in 8th 1200 M out, 5Ls down in 8th entering home straight when he was 3-wide, ran on well late to be nearest at the finish.
Always about 3Ls off pace in 5th from 1200 M to home straight, made a little late ground but always looked held.
Held up in rear on fence about 10Ls off pace at 1200 M, 8Ls down in rear into straight, made some good late headway through to final 100 M when short of room, not ridden out late on.
On fence behind midfield. Improved a bit after the Rock and trailed leader by 3Ls on straightening. Responded well when pressured but unable to get gain ground on winner final stages.
Slow to begin and raced near the rear. One-paced in the straight.
Eased back to settle 2-wide behind midfield. Difficult to settle in the middle stages. Near the rear entering home straight. Switched out and ran on strongly to be closest at finish.
2-wide at midfield. Lost footing and blundered 500 M out. Found nothing thereafter and finished tailed out.
Pushed to the lead shortly after start. Stayed on well despite being headed final 150 M.
Jumped awkwardly and soon raced in last place. Switched out to be widest rounding home turn and made up good ground in the straight.
Began fairly and settled on fence better than midfield. Closed to within 2Ls of the leader at 400 M. Made good progress and took the lead final 200 M. Held off a late challenge at the line.
Jumped well and settled on fence in a forward position. Kept within 2 to 3Ls of the leader before being pressured to keep pace at 500 M. Couldn't find extra in the straight.
Niggled along early to race 3-wide at midfield. Dropped further back rounding home turn and closed the race off only fairly.

Began awkwardly and was pushed along to a forward position. Kept 2-wide and 3Ls behind the pace in the back straight. 3-wide turning in and closed to within a length of the lead 200 M, couldn't sustain effort thereafter.

Began awkwardly. Settled on fence in rear section before making its run 400 M out. Checked and shifted out at 250 M whilst making good progress. Continued well after finding daylight but fell just short of catching winner.
Raced alongside the leader in the early stages. Kept within 2Ls of the leader in back straight. Weakened shortly after entering home straight.
Bounded at start, losing ground. Never able to feature.
Soon 2nd. Kept on well to take command closing stages.
In touch early, soon dropped back to 6th. Made some improvement halfway to be 4th passing 400 M. One-paced thereafter.
Lost ground at start, last early. Soon recovered some ground to be 5th halfway. Weakened closing stages.
Around midfield to course proper. Dropped back steadily. (Hung in.)
2nd early stages before racing 3rd near 700 M. 4Ls behind lead 250 M. Kept on quite well final 200 M.
Made most. Failed to contain the winner closing stages.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Failed to quicken 250 M out.
Rear. Recovered some ground inside 200 M.
Settled at the back. Angled off rails early in straight to charge home and assert authority final strides.
Towards rear. Gained midfield saving ground on inside turning in. Sustained headway down straight though without threatening.
Never better than midfield. Faded into straight.
Always struggling at the back.
Chased leaders. Not much room on rails early in straight. Kept on steadily without threatening final 200 M.
Wide throughout. Midfield early stages. Took closer order far side but dropped out rounding home bend.
Not far off to straight. Lost touch over 200 M out.
Headway around stables bend to lead or dispute lead far side. Dropped away quickly shortly after straightening.
Held up in forward of midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening running on steadily to hold some chance closing stages, but found winner too good.
Midfield. Lost position coming out of back straight. Ran past beaten runners from last position into home straight.
Close up. Quickened to hit front upon straightening, going 1L clear before swamped close to home.
Began awkwardly. In last few most of way with short-lived effort early in back straight.
Mostly in midfield. Made some impression early in straight.
Shared pace to straight then soon weakened.
Made all. Quickened well when being challenged passing 500 M, then never threatened inside 300 M.
Within 5Ls behind lead at the back. Made ground 250 M out to just miss 2nd. (Iron slipped and rider unbalanced halfway.)
Soon 3rd. Moved up at course proper, trying to pose a threat to the winner. Effort not sustained as the winner is too strong.
Never able to feature. (Bled.)
Mainly 2Ls behind lead in 5th to 450 M. Failed to quicken.
Soon 2nd. Gave ground to 5th at course proper. Kept on under pressure passing 200 M.
Slightly slowly away, soon recovered some ground to be 4th, gained 3rd 250 M out. Failed to quicken with the placegetters closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Sluggish at start, then quickly picked up to midfield. Weakened steadily in straight.
Well back until some late impression closing stages.
Broke well and led early but joined before home bend. Fought on doggedly gaining slender advantage over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort nearing finish. (Lame.)
Towards rear throughout.
Well there. Disputed lead rounding home bend and into straight. Hit front inside 200 M and hung on gamely under pressure.
Tailed-off throughout.
Well there, joining leaders rounding home bend. Dropped out of contention upon straightening.
Niggled along early. Lost touch approaching home turn.
Settled at the back. No clear passage upon straightening before running on to be nearest at finish.
Always thereabouts. One-paced in straight.
In similar position throughout.
Raced in mid-division 2 wide and proved difficult to settle. Around the 1200 M was crowded for room and near the 800 M steadied away from heels. Unable to make any impression in the straight.
Jumped fairly and raced in better than midfield on rail. Ridden along at home turn to maintain position. All out 300 M out and made up little ground inside fianl 200 M to be closest at finish.
Raced in worse than midfield 3 wide and near the 800 M was inconvenienced. Switched wide on straightening to find clear running. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 400 M out.
Soon raced keenly in midfield or better around 2 wide through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 400 M and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Tardy start and ridden along to race 1-1/2L off lead 1 off from rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and kept on fairly without threatening the 1st pair to settle for 3rd place.

Broke fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to a rearward position 3 to 4 wide. Made little progress from the outside turning for home. A bit flat in early part of straight but made up some ground over the final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and pushed along to race in midfield on rail. Dropped back to worse than midfield when making the turn. No extra in straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Broke well from wide draw and soon eased to midfield or worse towards the outside through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and kept on fairly but weakened slightly over the concluding stages.

Began well from widest and pushed along to race in a prominent position 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but was never in position to trouble the winner to settle for 2nd place.
Tardy start and shortly after that was crowded for room. Soon recovered to race very keenly in worse than midfield 2 wide and near the 800 M was checked away from heels. Kept on one-pace in straight.

On jumping got its head up and lost ground to race at the tail of the field. After the 1000 M got its head up and hung out. Switched to widest on straightening to find running but failed to make any impression.

Jumped well and niggled along to lead with 1/2L advantage 2 wide. Near the 1100 M took outright lead on rail with around 1L advantage to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and kicked away from the rest to win comfortably.
Broke fairly from wide draw and raced keenly around 2Ls off pace 2 wide through to straight. Unable to go up a gear when asked 400 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

Unable to muster early speed to race in the rear section around 2 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 400 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
4-wide without cover early on, slipped in 2-wide 8Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, 5Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, every chance of a place at 200 M when 2Ls down in 4th, no extra.
Always towards rear and never better than 5Ls off pace at any stage, 10Ls off the speed down back straight, under pressure off home turn, nearest at the finish.
A little slowly away, on fence 7Ls off the speed in 9th at the 1200 M, 8Ls down at 800 M, 3-wide and 4Ls down but crowded off final bend, soon clear but never loomed a threat.
Had a nice spot on fence in 3rd 2Ls off pace at 1200 M, about 4Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, 2Ls down off final bend disputing 4th, same at 200 M, always looked held by principals.
Awkwardly away, 12Ls last 1000 M out, never a factor.
Led by 2Ls racing a bit too freely on the fence at 1200 M, 3Ls clear 800 M out, headed 350 M out, weakened rapidly.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 2nd 1200 M out, 3Ls down in 2nd at 800 M, a neck down in 2nd entering straight and led briefly about 300 M out, soon headed, faded gradually.
3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 4th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at top of home straight, quickened up to lead 250 M out, drew away, convincingly.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, 6Ls down at 800 M, 3-wide without cover at 600 M, 3Ls down in 5th off home turn, ran on pretty well, narrowly missed out on quinella spot.
On fence 10Ls off the pace in 11th at 1200 M and at 800 M, 6Ls off pace in 11th when steadied and forced to switch out wider entering straight, no extra through final 300 M.
On fence 4Ls off the speed in 5th at 1200 M, 6Ls down at 800 M, 3Ls down in 6th and bit short of room off final bend, no chance with winner but stuck on gamely for 2nd close home.
Awkwardly away, on fence 6Ls behind leader in 7th at 1200 M, 7Ls down at 800 M, 3Ls down off final bend and same when bumped and checked 300 M out, kept on at same pace final stages.
2-wide and 6Ls behind the lead in 8th at 1200 M, 8Ls down at 800 M and was briefly caught 3-wide without cover, 4Ls down in midfield into straight, one-paced thereafter.
Slowly away and switched across to fence from wide gate, no better than 10Ls off pace in rear down back straight, never competitive.
Jumped well and led until 400 M. Weakened steadily.
Ridden hard to race among leaders early. Commenced to drop back steadily after 600 M and made no impression in the straight.
Slow to begin but was pressed forward to race 3-wide just behind the pace. Every chance at 300 M but couldn't sustain effort inside final 200 M.

Settled on fence at midfield. Made up ground rounding home turn and closed to within a length of the leader on straightening. Checked badly at 300 M whilst improving. Recovered some ground final stages.
Broke well but dropped steadily to behind midfield. Only one-paced in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and raced near the back until 400 M. Ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.
Jumped well but unable to keep pace with leaders early and raced 3-wide at midfield. Made up steady ground in the straight but no threat to top pair.
Slowly away and was checked shortly afterwards. Raced at the rear until 400 M. Closed the race off nicely.
2-wide at midfield. Pressed on rounding home turn to close to within 2Ls of leader 400 M. Charged on strongly to take control inside final 200 M.
Ridden hard from wide draw to remain close to leaders early stages. Continued to be ridden and was caught wide rounding home turn. Stayed on well in the straight to make the frame.
2-wide behind midfield. Switched wider out rounding home turn and made up some ground in the straight.
Niggled along early to track leader. Checked at 700 M but maintained position. Took over the lead 400 M but unable to fend off the winner 200 M out.
Always towards rear, 10Ls off pace on fence in 10th at 1200 M, 6Ls down in rear bunch entering straight, no threat whatsoever.
On fence 6Ls off the pace in 7th at 1200 M, 5Ls down at 800 M, steadied 550 M out when 4Ls down in midfield, posed little threat in the straight.
3-wide without cover in 8th when 7Ls off pace at 1200 M, got cover from 1000 M out, 5Ls down in 7th at 800 M, 5-wide into straight when 3Ls down, led 200 M out, caught final strides.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, 7Ls down and worse than midfield at 800 M, 6Ls down and struggling entering home straight and at 200 M, well beaten.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, niggled along when 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, hard ridden entering straight when 2-wide and 3Ls down in midfield, weakened steadily.
10Ls off pace and 3-wide in 12th at 1200 M, caught 4 and 5-wide without cover down the back straight, towards rear when 6-wide (widest of all) and 5Ls down entering straight, faded out.
2-wide and 10Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 10th at 800 M, 4Ls down and 3-wide in 8th entering home straight, staying on well when 1L down in 5th at 200 M, led final strides.
2Ls clear on fence 1400 M out but less than a length clear from 1200 M to home straight, headed about 300 M, faded.
2-wide and 11Ls off pace and one from rear 1200 M out, hard driven 600 M out when 3-wide and 6Ls off pace in rear bunch, never looked like troubling leaders.
Hung out 1600 M out, 3-wide without cover to half a length 2nd at 1200 M and at 800 M, same distance off pace and 3-wide in 3rd into straight, a neck down at 200 M, faded final 200 M.
2Ls off the pace on fence in 4th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 4th at 800 M, half a length off pace in 2nd at top of stretch and led briefly 250 M out, soon headed, no extra through final 150 M out.
2-wide and 1L off the speed in 3rd at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, roughly the same distance off pace but in 5th or 6th entering straight and at 200 M, always too one-paced to line.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 6th at 1200 M, 5Ls down at 800 M, on fence and 3Ls down in 4th into stretch, squeezed for room when staying on 250 M out, ran on again but too late.
12Ls off pace on fence in rear at 1200 M, 8Ls down in rear at 800 M and 5Ls down off final bend, staying on well when 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, kept on strongly, just failed.
4Ls off pace in 5th when 3-wide without cover at 1200 M, 2-wide and 4Ls down in 4th at 800 M, sent on 3-wide a neck down in 3rd into straight, disputed lead 300 M out, no extra, soon faded.
10Ls off pace and 2-wide towards rear at 1200 M, 7Ls down in 9th at 800 M, improved 3Ls off pace in midfield off home turn, gave vain chase to winner, never looked like catching him.
7Ls off pace on fence in 7th at 1200 M and at 800 M, held up briefly for a run at top of stretch, 4Ls down worse than midfield at 200 M, kept on nicely close home to reach the money.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace in 4th when 1200 M out and roughly the same at 800 M, 2Ls down in 6th off final bend, outpaced by principals.
Settled in rear, on fence or 2-wide and between 7Ls and 10Ls behind the leader from back to home straight, always outpaced.
8Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th at 1200 M, advanced out 3-wide from 800 M to top of home straight when 4-wide and 1L off pace, a head in front 300 M out, 1L clear at 200 M, ran on strongly.
Very keen down the back straight, repeatedly throwing head out when 2-wide and within 1L of the lead in 2nd, pressed on to dispute lead turning for home, headed 300 M out and faded rapidly.
Couldn't lead, sat 3Ls off pace in 3rd on fence at 1200 M, had a nice tow through to home straight when 1L down 4th, held up by tiring pair in front 350 M out, clear 250 M out but failed to pick up.
At least 10Ls off pace and 3-wide in rear 1000 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls off pace in 11th, midfield and over 3Ls down at 200 M, no further improvement.
Slowly away, unbalanced 1300 M out when 9Ls off pace on fence in 9th, 7Ls behind on the swing, no impression.
Raced freely in the lead when clear by about 1L until 800 M, disputing the lead off final bend, headed 300 M out, faded right out very quickly.
Raced a little keenly when 6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 6th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 7th at 800 M, 3Ls down in midfield entering straight, kept on at the one-pace under pressure.

Crowded at start, 9Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th 1200 M out, 8Ls down in 10th at the 800 M, driven along from 600 M and 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 10th into straight, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Was 4th halfway and 3rd into straight. Found winner too strong but stayed on well for 2nd.
In touch to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Mostly midfield to straight where he made no show.
Among rear group into straight where he failed to run on.
In rear to straight. Never nearer.
Soon in midfield where he stayed.
Midfield into home bend. Kept on to dispute for 3rd 200 M. No extra towards finish.
Led soon after start till headed and faded 350 M.
About 6th rounding home bend. Plugged on final 200 M.
Among rear group into straight where he stayed on a bit.
Never a factor. (Saddle shifted.)
Mostly 4th or 5th to straight where he kept on without threatening final 200 M.
Never on terms.
Always well there. Ran 2nd into straight where he took charge 350 M. Kept on strongly when threatened passing 200 M.
Held 3rd and no more than 1L behind lead before taking over approaching 400 M. Maintained slender advantage until headed passing 200 M. Failed to match speed thereafter.
Prominent to 350 M. Faded.
Behind midfield. Made some minor progress rounding home bend to be 5th final turn. One-paced.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground from 400 M but never able quicken to challenge.
Settled towards rear on inside. Never in contention.
Gradually moved up from midfield to be 4th or 5th far side. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Slowly away, last to final turn. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Jumped well and took lead to 450 M. Held 2nd before regaining advantage passing 200 M. Won going away.
Midfield to halfway. Dropped out. (Bled.)
Behind midfield. Checked at 400 M and steadied for a run on straightening. No progress.
Slowly away, near rear. Ran on from outside inside 150 M for a minor placing.
In touch. Gained 3rd final turn. Kept on until weakening 100 M out.
Well there. Took lead from 1300 M. Held on until headed 150 M. One-paced.
Midfield or slightly behind. Crept closer on the rail to be 3rd final turn. Sustained effort in straight to assert authority 150 M. Held on.
Last to 250 M. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Led field briefly early. Sat outside leader 1300 M to 400 M. Dropped back steadily.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit to 4th far side. Weakened soon after straightening.
Never better than midfield. Raced wide without cover.
Near rear. Gained ground on inside on straightening. Ran on quite well but failed to capture the winner.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from outside passing 400 M. Run ended 100 M out.
Better than midfield from widest draw. Found nothing when asked rounding home bend. Faded in straight.
In touch, raced 3rd far side. Moved up to 2nd 400 M. Kept on until failed to hold place inside 200 M.
Midfield. Steadied for a run 400 M. Made ground steadily to obtain a minor placing final 50 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped to the rear group far side. Only produced minor recovery in straight.
Sat outside leader to 200 M. Found no extra.
Towards rear throughout.
No more than 3Ls behind lead to straight. Ran on solidly to take command 100 M. Never threatened.
Took lead from 800 M. Held on for 3rd when headed 100 M out.
Always at the back.
Led early. Raced 3rd from 800 M. Failed to hold place 200 M out.
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Made some minor progress to midfield rounding home bend. Kept on quite well in straight.
Rear. Made ground passing 400 M to be 7th early straight. Unable to find clear run inside 200 M. Kept on after being checked 100 M.
Towards rear early, soon recovered ground to 5th from 800 M. 4-wide turning in. Ran on for a 2nd closing stages.
Midfield or behind. Weakened 250 M.
Behind midfield. Made some minor progress inside 200 M.
Prominent to straight where he could find no extra 250 M out.
Always there, having every chance under pressure inside 150 M.
Towards rear until effort home bend and continued to make steady headway to line.
Never on terms.
Midfield stable bend and similar position on straightening. Kept on steadily.
Never better than midfield and dropped out rapidly early in straight.
Made no show.
Behind midfield approaching home turn before improving a bit inside 200 M.
Well there to straight where he kept on same pace.
Made virtually all. Kept on under pressure when challenged closing stages.
5th early back straight and remained there home turn. Plugged on under pressure.
7th rounding home bend. Stayed on without threatening in straight.

Shared lead on rail in the early to middle stages. Took outright lead from 800 M. 1L up on straightening and kept on well but was unable to match speed with winner in the final stages to settle for 2nd.

Broke fairly but steadily eased to a rearward position 3-wide without cover. At the 1200 M commenced to go forward from the outside to be in better than midfield turning for home. Found nothing in straight.
Broke fairly and raced in midfield or better 2 to 3-wide. Commenced to lose ground rounding the home turn to be in worse than midfield on straightening. Made no impression in the straight.
Soon settled in midfield on rail. Niggled along to maintain position rounding the home turn. Under pressure 300 M out and responded fairly to take 3rd place without threatening the 1st pair.

Soon took lead with around 1/2L advantage 2-wide but proved difficult to settle. From 1000 M steadily eased back to 2nd place 2-wide. Hard ridden to hold position at home bend. No extra in straight and faded inside final 200 M.

Soon raced in rearward position 2-wide. Made little headway from the outside down latter part of back straight and rounding the home turn. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and ran on evenly to the line.

Broke early and niggled along to race in midfield or worse 2-wide. Switched out and ridden along to hold position at home bend. Slightly short for room early straight, only ran on evenly to the line when clear 200 M out.
Soon raced in worse than midfield on rail through to home straight. Made up little ground inside the final 200 M to be closest at finish when asked 250 M out.
Crossed to the fence to rear from widest draw. Switched out and edged forward turning for home. Hung in down home straight but still able to show good turn of foot to grab lead near finish.
Slightly slow into stride and niggled along to race in better than midfield. Under pressure at home turn to hold position. No response in straight and dropped out quickly inside final 200 M.
Soon eased to the rear section 2-wide. Switched wide and made little progress turning for home. Under pressure 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Began well and settled in better than midfield on rail. Pushed along at home bend and crept closer to the leader. Kept on fairly down home straight but was unable to fend off late challenge from 3rd placegetter.
Bumped at the start, settled on fence in 3rd 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed from 1200 M to 600 M out, improved to 1L down in 3rd off home turn, slipped up inner to lead 150 M out, pulled clear.
In rear 9Ls or 10Ls off pace and 2-wide from 1200 M to 600 M, last and widest of all (6-wide) turning for home when 6Ls off speed, made a little late headway.
About 8Ls off the pace and 2-wide in 10th from the 1200 M to 600 M out, forced 5-wide turning for home when 5Ls down in 10th, ran on fairly well late on.
Slowest away, raced and 2 and 3-wide with cover in midfield between 5Ls and 7Ls off the speed until 600 M out, 3Ls down and 4-wide into stretch, soon emptied out.
Couldn't lead, tended to hang in and raced in snatches in 2nd place 2-wide and 1L off pace from 1200 M until turning for home, dropped away markedly through final 300 M.
Checked at the jump, one from rear on fence when 9Ls off pace at 1200 M, still in 11th place when 5Ls down and 3-wide turning for home, ran on strongly to claim 2nd in final strides.
On fence 6Ls or 7Ls behind the leader in 9th at 1200 M and same at 600 M, 4Ls down in 9th off home turn, well held and only staying on at same pace when steadied a little 150 M.
Troublesome in barriers, on fence in 6th 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed from 1200 M to 600 M out, 3Ls down in 6th off final bend, ran on at same pace, always looked booked for a place at best.
3Ls off pace in 4th when 2-wide at 1200 M and 2Ls down and 2-wide when hemmed in by weakening REWARD in front and SUCCESSFUL SPIRIT outside, swamped once clear at 200 M.
Awkwardly away, caught 3-wide without cover from 1300 M out when 4Ls off pace in 5th, improved to 1L off pace in 3rd at 600 M, struggling to hold position into straight, faded out.
Led by 1L on fence at 1200 M, over-raced early on and tended to hang out throughout, still 1L clear turning for home, headed by winner 150 M out, run out of 2nd place final strides.
Bumped at start and 1400 M out, 4Ls or 5Ls off pace from 1200 M to 600 M when 2-wide in 7th place, short of room from home turn to 200 M, found very little under pressure.
Began fairly from wide draw and was pressed forward into the lead. Challenged on straightening and was headed by eventual winner 200 M. Stayed on well to make the frame.
Jumped awkwardly and was ridden to race 2-wide behind the pace. Unable to keep up rounding home turn and couldn't find extra to challenge in the straight.
Slow to begin and was taken back to race at the rear. Strode to midfield after 800 M but was 4-wide. Widest turning in and was one-paced in the straight.
Raced 3-wide and within 3Ls of the pace until home straight. Weakened thereafter.
2-wide in rear section early and dropped further back to last place at 800 M. Improved along the fence rounding home turn and made up some ground in the straight.
Taken back to race three wide in rearward position. Dropped to last place 600 M out and was wide turning in. Responded well in the straight and made up good ground in the closing stages.
Raced in a prominent position behind the pace until switching out at 400 M. Took over the lead final 200 M to claim victory.
2-wide behind midfield. Drifted back despite being ridden to keep up near the Rock. Made no impression in the straight.

Slowly away and raced on fence in a rearward position. Improved slightly after 1200 M but dropped back again after being checked 1000 M. Crept up to midfield rounding home turn and improved steadily in the final stages.
Quickest out. Settled on fence at midfield until being pressured at 400 M. Unable to make up much ground on winner closing stages.
Began well from wide draw and was taken back to race 3-wide behind midfield. Ridden 400 M out but couldn't pick up pace.
2-wide better than midfield. Drifted back 600 M out and needed to be ridden to keep up. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Dropped to the last 600 M. Recovered some ground in straight.
In touch and was mainly 2Ls 4th to 400 M. Lack of daylight when trying to improve. Ran on well when in clear 200 M but missed by the narrowest margin.
Behind midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
In touch from widest draw. Progressed to 3rd 850 M. Weakened from final bend.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily from 300 M, never nearer.
Better than midfield. Improved a bit 800 M out. Run ended on straightening.
Jumped well and took lead to final turn. Held 2nd until weakening out of contention 200 M out.
Midfield. Was held up when found no clear run early straight. Ran on when in clear.
Behind midfield. Made ground steadily from 400 M, having every chance passing 200 M. Just beaten narrowly.
Last to 600 M. Never able to feature.
Prominent. Found no extra 200 M out.
Behind midfield. Dropped back rounding the home bend.
Pushed along to be prominent. Sat outside leader from 1100 M until taking over on straightening. Just held on to win narrowly at finish.
Near rear from a wide draw. Brief effort to make up a little ground early straight.
Never better than midfield. (Lame.)
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily to hold some chance in straight but unable to match pace of winner.
Led far side. Headed around home bend. Regained advantage turning in but swamped close to home.
Held up in rear. Quickened well upon straightening but forced to steady inside 200 M, then kept on behind runners to finish.
Well back into straight. Ran on past beaten horses down centre of track.
Close up far side. Took up running rounding home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Settled in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
In last few throughout.
Prominent. Gradually faded under pressure final 200 M.
Niggled at early stages, then restrained in midfield on rails. Hampered and lost position coming out of back straight. Dropped further back in home straight.
Waited with. Responded well in straight to get up on line.
Near rear. Made some minor progress on outside final 400 M.
Midfield or behind on outside throughout.
Prominent early, settled midfield. Responded well from 250 M to gain advantage briefly closing stages. Just lost marginally.
Began awkwardly and was last early. Soon recovered ground to be midfield 1000 M. Crept closer order final turn but found no extra 200 M out.
Towards rear throughout.
Mainly 9th before running on well final 300 M to win narrowly at finish.
Jumped well from a wide draw, settling 4th. Ran on 400 M to be 2nd 250 M. Failed to match speed with 1st pair when under pressure closing stages.
Well there to 300 M. Faded badly. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Towards rear. Crept a bit closer turning for home. One-paced.
Moved up to take lead approaching 1000 M. Held on with 2Ls advantage 200 M. Soon found no extra.
In touch early, soon gave ground to behind midfield. Hung out in the rear from home turn.
Jumped well and led briefly early, soon raced 3rd to straight. Kept on without quickening inside 200 M.
Always in rear.
Led to halfway. Dropped out upon straightening.
Wide and rear throughout.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Prominent to straight, then weakened.
Towards rear. Kept on at the one pace in straight.
Settled at the back. Ran on well in straight.
Close up. Hit front rounding home bend. Went clear under pressure in straight.
In similar position throughout.
Rear early. Took closer order far side. Weakened in home straight.
Midfield far side. Gave ground gradually from home bend.
Always thereabouts. One-pace in straight.
Forward of midfield to straight. Found nothing.

Began awkwardly and niggled along to race in a forward position out wide. Shortly after the 1000 M took outright lead and crossed to the rail. Kept on fairly when asked 300 M out but slightly weakened over the concluding stages.

On jumping got its head up and lost ground. Settled in the rear section on rail. Switched out and crept clear to the pack turning for home. From the 400 M was short for room, only ran on evenly to the line clear 250 M out.

Shortly after the start was checked when crowded for room and raced towards the rear. After the 1000 M went forward from the outside to be sharing the lead turning for home. Found nothing when asked 400 M out.

Jumped well from wide draw and pushed along to race in a forward position 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Shortly after straightening was crowded for room, found nothing after that and steadily faded out.

Broke fairly and settled in midfield on rail. Checked near 1200 M and dropped to worse than midfield. Made steady progress from the outside at home turn. Ran on well and hit the lead at 200 M. Just failed.

Began fairly and ridden along to race in better than midfield on rail. After the 800 M was checked away from heels and dropped back to worse than midfield. Kept on same pace to the line when asked 350 M out.

Slightly slow to begin and soon recovered to race in midfield or better 2 wide. Short for room in early part of straight, obtained clear running around the 300 M and ran home strongly to grab victory near the line.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and soon settled in midfield 3 wide. Made up steady ground at home turn to be 1-1/2Ls off leader on straightening. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M but was overhauled by the 3rd near the line.

Began fairly and niggled to race in midfield on rail. Around the 600 M whilst proving difficult to settle was awkwardly placed on heels. Made up some ground early straight but steadily became one paced 200 M.
Slowly away and soon raced at the tail 2 wide. Switched wide and made little headway turning for home. No clear running early straight. Made up good ground when obtaining clear running 200 M out.

Niggled along to take lead and steadily crossed to the rail. Around the 1000 M eased back to race 1-1/2Ls off leader through to straight. Unable to go up a gear when asked 350 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
Broke well and was quickly eased back to the rear section 3 wide. Switched to the widest on straightening to find clear running but failed to make up any ground.

Jumped well and steadily eased to worse than midfield around 3 wide. Made little headway from the outside turning for home. Stayed on same pace when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and dropped out steadily inside final 200 M.
Had head up 1400 M out, 3-wide and roughly 5Ls off pace in 9th down the back, 6Ls off pace entering straight when hanging out, well beaten when steadied 200 M out.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 4Ls off the speed in 8th at the 1200 M, under pressure entering straight when just over 3Ls off pace in 5th, faded steadily.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M and in 12th at 800 M, still 6Ls behind when 4-wide off final bend, ran on fairly well through final stages to be nearest at the finish.
Always caught 4-wide without cover down back straight when about 5Ls off pace in 10th, similarly placed when 5-wide into home straight, found very little under pressure.
3-wide with cover and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, a little over 3Ls behind in 6th at 800 M, never likely to reach leaders in straight and already weakening when 5Ls down 200 M out.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 5th at 800 M and struggling to maintain this position at top of home straight, faded.
Settled in rear 3-wide with cover about 7Ls or 8Ls off pace down back straight, same on straightening for home when 5-wide, picked up very well to lead 50 M from the line and stay on.
Soon led on inside, 1L clear at 1200 M and still 1L to the good off home turn, all out when headed about 100 M out, no extra.
Slowly away and crowded at start, on fence 6Ls off the pace in 12th at 1200 M and similarly placed at 800 M, 5Ls down entering straight, steadied and switched at 200 M, always outpaced.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, still 1L down in 2nd entering home straight but under pressure, dropped out very rapidly. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
3-wide without cover and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, same distance behind lead but in 5th at 800 M, 2Ls 4th at top of home straight, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M and all out, hung on for a place.
3-wide and 4Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M and same at 800 M, 3-wide and 3Ls down in 6th off home straight, led briefly about 100 M out but no extra when headed about 50 M out.
On the inside 3Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, 2Ls off speed in 3rd at 800 M and at 400 M, one-paced on the run-in.
Never a factor, never better than 7Ls off the pace at any stage.
Slowly away and was pressured to midfield early. Made up some ground rounding home turn to reach within 3Ls of the pace 400 M out. Kept on same pace to line.
Jumped slowly and raced in a rearward position until 800 M. Improved along the fence rounding home turn. Ran on steadily in the straight.
4-wide and a length behind the pace. Continued in same pace in home straight.
Pushed to a forward position. Raced 3-wide and within 2Ls of the pace until home straight. Kept on steadily for a distant 2nd place.
Jumped well and pursued leader until home straight. Unable to pick up pace when pressured at 400 M and weakened in the closing stages. (Bled.)
Began well from wide draw. Unable to keep pace and raced wide in midfield. Dropped further back after 600 M and made no impression in the straight.
Quickest out to be in front. Held a length's advantage going into home straight. Further increased its lead over the final 300 M and coasted home to win by a wide margin.
Refused to jump, lost significant ground at the start and was never in contention.
Jumped awkwardly and raced wide in rearward position. Widest turning in and made up some ground in the straight.
Midfield early stages. Struggled to stay on at 800 M. Made no impression in the straight.
4-wide at midfield. Drifted back at 800 M despite being pressured and found nothing in the straight.
Ridden hard early to keep pace. Drifted back steadily to midfield after 800 M. Unable to find extra in the straight.
3-wide about 4Ls off pace in midfield until home straight, never troubled principals and very weak through final 200 M.
Covered up 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield through to home straight, picked up well to lead 150 M out, drew clear.
Disputed lead 1200 M out, 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th turning for home, beaten 300 M out.
Always rear until home straight at least 7Ls off the speed, never remotely dangerous.
Towards inside about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until the 800 M, improved round circle to be 1L down in 2nd at top of home straight, led 300 M out, headed 150 M out but hung on well for 2nd.
Troublesome at the start, whipped around as gates opened, took no part.
On inside 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 5th on inner at 800 M, improved to 1L 2nd off home turn, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, faded markedly final stages.
Tardy start, lost about 3Ls, in rear about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace down the back, 5Ls down on the swing, held up at 200 M on stand's rail, switched inside and ran on quite well.
Never travelled well, niggled along on inner when 6Ls off pace in rear at 800 M, detached 300 M out.
A little bit keen when 3-wide towards rear about 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed through to home straight and under pressure, no impression.
3 and 4-wide and about 5Ls off pace worse than midfield until home straight, staying on along stand's rail when 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, found no more.
Within 3Ls off the speed in 4th from 1200 M to home straight, 1L down in 2nd at the 200 M, no extra late on but hung on for 3rd okay.
Disputed lead early on, 2Ls clear on inner at the 800 M, still in front but under pressure into home straight, headed 300 M out, faded out.
Advanced out wide without cover 2Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, 3Ls 5th and heading towards stand's rail on straightening, struggling to keep up with leaders at 200 M, weakened.
Never troubled leaders.
Well there turning for home where he made no show.
Never in contention.
Midfield halfway and remained there into straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Never better than midfield.
Always prominent. Found one-paced near finish.
In touch and held some chance 200 M. Found no extra.
Settled in rear to straight. Switched in 300 M and kept on steadily.
Behind midfield to straight. Ran on well final 250 M to dead-heat with FIGURES on line.
Made virtually all, only having to share glory with GEM OF INDIA final stride.
About 5th or 6th turning for home. Kept on to be nearest 200 M. Found no extra near finish.
About 5th into home bend and could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Slow into stride. Towards rear till running on a bit closing stages.
Towards rear. Made some progress 400 M out to be 8th turning in. No further advancement.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch early, soon gave a little ground to be midfield far side. Crept closer order turning for home, then one-paced.
Rear. Pushed along early to be 2nd passing 800 M. Wide turning in. Weakened.
2nd early, soon in midfield. Rider found difficult to settle while racing wide without cover. One-paced without quickening in straight.
Jumped well and made all. Just held off challenges from placegetters closing stages.
In touch. Made progress rounding home bend to be 2Ls 2nd final turn. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Last from widest draw. Made up some ground from outside soon after straightening.
Never a factor.
Behind midfield. Weakened rounding home bend.
Sat outside leader approaching 1000 M. Dropped back a bit far side to be 4th passing 600 M. Ran on steadily in straight to take 2nd 100 M out.
Mainly 7th to 200 M. Ran on quite well to just miss 2nd.
Well back. Produced good late finish under pressure down centre of straight.
Chased leader to straight. Faded under pressure.
Behind midfield. Improving when steadied about 200 M out. Quickly renewed effort and sustained headway to the line.
Wide in midfield. Went wider home turn. Made no show in straight.
Rear. Ran on without threatening in straight.
Held up within striking distance. Quickened upon straightening to hit front briefly 150 M out but soon found no extra.
Raced 3-wide most of way in forward of midfield. Given reminders rounding home bend and soon weakened.
Settled in midfield. Ran on gamely under pressure in straight to just get up on line.
Raced outside leader. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening but gradually weakened. (Lame.) (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Reared and rider lost iron early stages losing considerable ground. Remained at the back of the field until making late impression final 200 M.
Attempted to make all. Faded under pressure 200 M out.
Settled in midfield. Quickened to hold every chance final 200 M but just failed to peg back winner.
Soon raced 3rd on the rail. 2Ls 2nd final turn. Sustained effort to take control inside 200 M. Held on.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground in straight. Was held up final 50 M and not ridden out to the line.
Behind midfield. Found little when under pressure in straight.
Towards rear. Kept on without quickening from final turn.
Slightly behind midfield. Weakened in straight.
Midfield early, 4th from 800 M. Kept on steadily from outside 200 M out.
Tardy start, last throughout.
Slowly away, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from a wide draw. Took lead to 200 M. Weakened steadily.
Held 5th or 6th throughout. One-paced.
Well there. Kept on without quickening in straight. Lost 3rd close home.
Slightly better than midfield. Ran on from 4th early straight, doing best work closing stages.
Close up but unable to quicken under pressure to challenge.
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Wide in midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Always well three. Found no extra close to home.
Quickly took up running from widest draw and led until no extra over 200 M out.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened well to take charge final 150 M.
Always struggling at the back.
Rear into straight. Ran on steadily past beaten horses.
Towards rear. Kept on in straight.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.

Was tightened for room shortly after the start and raced near the tail on inner. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Kept on evenly when asked 250 M out and only ran past weakening runners inside final 200 M.

Soon settled in a rearward position on rail. After the 800 M was steadied when awkwardly placed on heels. Switched out on straightening to find clear running and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to take 2nd place.

Ridden along to race in a prominent position 2-wide. Went forward to race outside leader going up the Rock. Under pressure and took lead around the 500 M mark. Headed soon after the 200 M mark and kept on one pace.
Best out and settled in better then midfield on rail. Steadily dropped to midfield at back straight. Under pressure at home bend but continued to give ground steadily and laboured to the finish.
Began well and pushed along to race in midfield or worse 2 to 3-wide. Hard ridden to hold position and steadily switched to the widest at the home bend. Made no impression in the straight.

Hard ridden in the early stages to force the issue on rail. Headed winning post first time to be in prominent position. Under pressure to maintain position at home bend. No extra in straight and tailed out inside final 200 M.

Began fairly from wide draw and niggled along to race in a forward position out wide in the early stages. Took up running on rail passing winning post first time. Headed near the 500 M and gave ground quickly in straight.

Tardy start from widest and pushed along to race in midfield 2-wide. Switched out and made little progress turning for home. Only kept on evenly in straight and further weakened over the concluding stages.

Shortly after the start was tightened for room and niggled along to race in midfield on rail. Shuffled back to worse than midfield at back straight. Under pressure 250 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.

Slow to begin and immediately eased to the tail on rail. Made up little ground going up the Rock and continue to progress forward from the outside at home turn. Pulled away from the rest when asked 250 M out to win comfortably.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2-wide. Improved to prominent position down back straight. One-paced in straight and weakened steadily inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to the rear section 2-wide. Around the 700 M niggled along to go forward to be in midfield on straightening. Ran on fairly when asked 250 M out to grab 3rd over the final stages.
Had the box-seat passage 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to home straight, switched out and quickened up nicely to lead 150 M out, comfortably.
Restrained at the jump and switched from wide gate to fence to be 10Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M, 2-wide and 10Ls off speed still in rear entering straight, moderate late headway.
Bumped at the jump, 2-wide and 7Ls or 8Ls off speed in 9th from 1100 M to home straight, finished off only fairly down centre of track.
Bumped at the start, pressed on to lead on fence by 1L from 1200 M to home turn when headed, faded markedly.
Pressed on to be 1L off pace and 2-wide in 2nd from 1200 M to home straight, led 300 M out but headed by winner 150 M out, no problem hanging on for 2nd.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace from 1200 M to home straight, one-paced on the run-in but did make a little late headway.
A little slowly away, on fence 6Ls or 7Ls off pace in 8th from 1100 M to home straight, ran on quite well to be nearest at the finish.
Raced 3 and 4-wide without cover about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until 900 M out when slipping in 2-wide 4Ls off pace in 5th until home turn, much too one-paced finishing off.
On fence 5Ls off the speed in 6th from 1200 M to 800 M when niggled along to maintain position, bumped rail at 600 M and closer but very hard ridden on the swing, faded out final 200 M.
2-wide and between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace in 4th from 1100 M to home straight, all out to move 3rd when still 2Ls off the speed 200 M out, no extra.
Slowly away, checked at 1400 M and was on fence in 10th about 9Ls off pace from 1100 M through to stretch.
Settled 2-wide at midfield until straightening. Not much progress in the home straight and over the final stages raced tight and was not ridden out to the line.
Began fairly from widest draw and went forward to race aside the leader. Couldn't pick up speed on straightening and was one-paced to line.
Got to the lead shortly after start and held advantage going into home straight. Couldn't find extra after being headed final 200 M.
Slowly away. Trailed field until home straight. Charged home strongly and made up good ground in the straight.
2-wide behind midfield in the early and middle stages. Ridden 400 M out but didn't find much in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield. Kept on steadily in the straight.
3-wide without cover in a forward position and started to weaken at 700 M. Never recovered and tailed out.
Raced prominently behind the leaders before switching out on straightening. Gave good acceleration when asked final 250 M and pulled away from the rest of the field for an easy win.
Settled 2-wide near the rear. Ridden from 400 M and shifted out further before straightening. Staged a late rally and just missed a minor placing.
Jumped awkwardly and raced on fence in a rearward position. Not much response when asked on straightening and was steadied final 50 M.
Jumped well and settled 2-wide behind the leaders. Kept within 3Ls of the pace in the back straight. Ridden to stay on 600 M out and was one-paced in the straight.
Towards rear. Ran on from halfway to take 3rd closing stages, failed to threaten the quinella pair.
