Bounded at start, ridden along to soon be in touch. Came to tackle winner inside 150 M, effort not sustained.
Prominent to 350 M. Faded.
Tardy start, towards rear. Held up on inside 500 M and steadied twice shortly after. Ran on when clear passing 200 M.
Well there to 400 M. Found no extra.
Bounded at start, losing ground. Remained at rear group. Ran on 250 M until one-paced inside 100 M.
Led field to 250 M. Kept on without quickening.
Mainly midfield. Weakened close home.
Raced greenly near the rear. Hung out badly at course proper.
Midfield or slightly behind. Steady progress passing course proper, gaining slender advantage 250 M. Kept on quite well to hold off challenges closing stages.
Last to 150 M. Ran past a couple of beaten horses closing stages.
Mainly in rear of midfield. Found nothing in straight. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Settled wide in midfield. Made rapid progress under reminders around field home bend. Sustained headway down straight to miss narrowly.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Prominent far side, but yielded ground gradually from halfway.
Ridden early to chase behind leader far side. Gradually weakened upon straightening.
Never better than midfield.
Settled towards rear. Snuck up on rails turning in, hitting front shortly afterwards. Just held on to the line.
Never far off. Made moderate progress down the straight without threatening.
Never nearer.
Well back to straight. Made up good ground on rails to be nearest at finish.
Midfield throughout. One-paced under pressure.
Led field until overhauled inside final 300 M.
Midfield to straight, then gradually faded.
Towards rear. Ran on under pressure past beaten horses.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Moved up from 900 M to hold slender advantage from 750 M. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Prominent from a wide draw, raced 2Ls 5th rounding home bend. 4-wide turning in, ran on solidly to take command 200 M. Ridden vigorously to just hold off late challenges.
In touch, 3Ls 6th rounding home bend. Failed to quicken while hanging out in straight.
Led briefly early, soon in prominent position. Held 3rd final turn, found no extra 250 M.
Took lead approaching 1000 M to 750 M. Kept on well for a close-up 2nd until one-paced closing stages.
Lost significant ground at start. Last to 300 M. Ran past a few beaten horses thereafter.
Well there early, soon in midfield. Steadied for a run passing 400 M. Ran on under pressure 300 M, just failed to catch the winner.
Rear from widest draw. Recovered ground inside 400 M to be nearest at finish. (Mucus in trachea.)
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Tardy start, last early. Made up some ground from 11th early straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Made up good ground on outside in straight.
Prominent to 600 M. Dropped back steadily.
Settled in rear. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight. Weakened badly.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Raced keenly in prominent position far side. Gradually faded from midfield into straight.
In similar position throughout. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Never far off to straight then gradually faded.
Sluggish at start. Travelled in last few before producing some impression in straight.
Slow into stride. Soon recovered to rear of midfield. Dropped out of contention upon straightening.
Well back. Went past beaten horses closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Restrained behind leaders far side. Faded under pressure in straight.
Made all to win readily.
Settled at the back. Made moderate progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Wide in midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Raced in better than midfield 2 wide and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Slightly held up for a few strides in the early part of straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line.
Began well from wide draw and steadily eased to a rearward position towards the outside through to straight. Only kept on evenly to the line when asked 400 M out.

Began fairly and raced in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Responded fairly when asked 400 M out but caused interference inside final 200 M and lost 3rd place after Stewards' enquiry.
On jumping was crowded for room and raced in mid-division. Near the 1100 M was crowded for room and dropped to rear section. Switched out on straightening and made up some ground inside final 200 M.
Began well from wide draw and was immediately taken back to the tail on rail as instructed through to straight. Made no impression in the straight.
Niggled along to race around 1L off pace 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Stayed one-pace when asked 400 M out and was crowded for room near the 300 M. Kept on evenly to the line thereafter.
Raced in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and dropped out quickly inside final 250 M. (Heart irregularity.)

Tardy start and niggled along to be box seated behind leader. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Kept on well when asked 400 M out but was unable to match speed with winner to settle for 2nd place.

Slow to begin and pushed along to race in worse than midfield 3 wide. Near the 900 M was crowded for room. Ridden along and made up little ground at home bend. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 400 M out.

Began well from wide draw and steadily eased to the rear section 3 wide. Made little headway from the outside turning for home. Unable to find an extra gear when asked 400 M out and stayed one-pace to the line.
Broke well and soon took up running on rail with around 1L advantage through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out and pulled away from the rest inside final 200 M to win comfortably.

Tardy start from widest and soon steadied to the rear section on rail. Made some progress rounding the home turn to be in midfield on straightening. Stayed one-pace when asked 400 M out and slightly weakened inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly and pushed along to race in midfield or better around 3 wide through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M out and was carried away from its rightful running inside final 200 M. (Finished 4th, placed 3rd.)
On jumping was crowded for room and soon recovered to race in midfield towards the outside. Commenced to give ground at home bend and tailed out in straight. (Heart irregularity.)
On fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at the 1200 M, 4Ls off speed in 5th on inner at 800 M, 1L down in 3rd entering straight and with every chance, failed to quicken up but still kept on well for a place.
Slowest away and sat 2-wide 8Ls off the pace in 11th 1100 M out, 3-wide and 6Ls off the speed turning for home, made a little late headway to be nearest at the finish.
Settled on fence 8Ls off the pace in 10th 1100 M out, still towards rear and 7Ls off pace off home turn, 4Ls down in midfield entering straight, ran on strongly but just couldn't get to winner.
6Ls off pace on inside in 9th at the 1200 M, hung in at 800 M when similarly placed, bumped rail at 700 M, same distance off lead when under pressure into straight, one-paced.
One from rear when 11Ls off pace at the 1200 M, last and detached entering straight, no impression.
Awkwardly away, in rear 12Ls off pace 1200 M out, one from rear and 8Ls behind leader turning for home, made a small bit of late ground but never properly involved.
Keen when hanging in early on, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th at the 1200 M, 4Ls down in 4th and 2-wide at 800 M, about 1L down in 3rd at top of home straight, well outpaced from then on.
Awkwardly away, led by half a length on fence at 1200 M, headed by winner at 1000 M, still on terms at top of home straight, dropped out very rapidly. (Lame.)
On fence 5Ls off the pace in 7th at the 1200 M, niggled along to take closer order at 600 M when about 4Ls off speed in midfield, never troubled principals in the stretch.
10Ls off the speed and 2-wide in 12th 1100 M out, 8Ls down in 12th entering home straight, finished off down centre of the track without threatening much. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
2-wide and 5Ls off the speed in 6th for most of back straight, 3Ls off the lead in 6th on straightening, never got any closer to the leaders after that.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M and at the 800 M, 2-wide and 3Ls down in 7th turning for home, looked dangerous when 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M but found no extra.
Prominent but keen early when 3-wide without cover, relaxed and led by half a length out 2-wide from 1000 M to home straight, shot 2Ls clear passing the 200 M pole, kept on gamely.

Broke well from wide gate and got half a length off pace out 2-wide at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 3rd at 800 M and 2Ls down in 5th at top of home straight, outpaced a little thereafter but still stayed on well.
Niggled to a forward position and raced just behind the pace at 1200 M. Improved to race alongside the lead 600 M. Remained with leaders until fading out final 200 M.

Settled in a prominent position until home straight. Ran on well in the straight but was steadied from heels at 200 M, had trouble finding a clear run in the final 100 M and was unable to ride out to the finish.

Raced 3-wide and within 3Ls of the pace in the early stages. Steadily improved after 800 M and closed to within 1/2L of leader on straightening. Continued well when pressured but couldn't gain further ground on winner closing stages.
Behind midfield early and was asked to improve to midfield 1000 M out. Continued to advance rounding home turn and made steady progress in the straight to be closest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in a rearward position. Trailed field going into home straight. Responded only fairly when pressured in the straight.
Midfield early. 2Ls behind the lead at 400 M and ran on well in the closing stages to be closest at finish.
Slowly away and raced wide at midfield in the early stages. Drifted back to behind midfield at 1000 M. Weakened shortly after straightening and tailed off. (Significant blood in trachea.)

Bounced well and was eased back to race at midfield. Improved rounding home turn from a 4-wide position and closed to within a length of the leader at 400 M. Kept on well in the closing stages to make the frame.
Began fairly and was taken back to race near the rear until home straight. Closed the race off only fairly.
Began awkwardly and was pressed forward to midfield before steadying to avoid heels at 1000 M. Behind midfield going into home straight and unable to find extra thereafter. (Lame.)
4-wide at midfield. Drifted back when racing wide rounding home turn. Couldn't find extra in the straight.
Slowly away and raced in rearward position until straightening. One-paced in the straight.
Niggled along to race on fence at midfield. Made up some late ground in the closing stages.
Jumped well and was pressed forward to lead. Continued to hold a slight advantage heading into home straight. Stayed on well under pressure and held off challengers in the closing stages.
Settled on fence 4Ls off the pace in 6th down the back, 5Ls off pace entering straight (and over 2Ls behind the winner), ran on very strongly but never looked like reeling in TIBER.
5Ls off pace in 7th and 2-wide at the 1200 M, about 4Ls down still in midfield at the 800 M, drifted back on the bend and was about 8Ls down at top of home straight, no chance from there.
7Ls off speed and 2-wide in 11th at 1200 M, 5Ls down at the 800 M in rear group, about 9Ls last on straightening, no impression.
Over-raced early on, 3ls off speed in 4th and 2-wide at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 5th at 800 M, lost place on the circle and was 7Ls down in midfield on straightening, one-paced thereafter.

2-wide and 6Ls off the speed in 9th at the 1200 M, left 3-wide without cover from the 800 M to top of home straight when 5Ls down and under pressure in midfield, stayed on at the same pace. (Mucus in trachea.)
Led by 1L on the fence from 1200 M out, kicked on for home passing the 600 M to be 3Ls clear at top of home straight, grabbed by winner at 200 M and weakened noticeably final 100 M.
2-wide and 1L 2nd at the 1200 M, settled back 2Ls 4th and 2-wide at 800 M, 4Ls down in 3rd at top of home straight, quickened up very well to lead 200 M out, driven out, ran on well.
Had a nice spot on the fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at the 1200 M and the 800 M, 4Ls down in 3rd off the home turn and still competitive at the 200 M, no extra after that.
3-wide without cover when 3Ls down in 5th at 1200 M, pressed on to go 1L 2nd when 2-wide 800 M out, 3Ls down in 2nd at top of stretch but 1L down in 3rd 200 M out, no exra close home.
On fence 6Ls off the speed in 8th at the 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield at the 800 M but 6Ls down on straightening, making some headway when 4Ls down at the 200 M but couldn't sustain the effort.
Raced a little freely early, well covered up on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed in 10th down the back straight, 8Ls adrift entering home straight, no impression.
Didn't break well, 7Ls off pace and 3-wide in 12th 1200 M out, 5Ls off pace in rear at 800 M, 3-wide into stretch but 6Ls down in midfield, ran on well through final stages to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away and steadied at the 1400 M, 7Ls or 8Ls off pace in rear and at least 2-wide down the back, never a factor.
5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1200 M, 6Ls down at 800 M, 4-wide into straight when 5Ls down, about 3Ls down in 5th at 200 M, kept on steadily but always held by principals.
3Ls off the pace and 2-wide in 5th 1200 M out, 4Ls down on fence at 800 M, 2-wide and 3Ls down off final bend, 2Ls down in 4th and looking held when checked 150 M out, still kept on.
Had a good spot on fence 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 1200 M until 800 M out, under pressure to hold this spot 500 M out, soon weakened and well beaten 300 M out.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 4th at 800 M, 3-wide into straight when still 2Ls down, led from 300 M but headed 150 M out, hung on pretty well for 2nd place.
4-wide with cover at 1200 M when 4Ls off speed in 7th, 3-wide without cover at 600 M when still about 4Ls down in midfield, all out to be 3Ls down still in midfield at 200 M, no further impression.
Slowly away, very keen early and led out 2-wide 1300 M out, only crossed to fence at 800 M, headed at top of home straight and soon beaten.
11Ls off speed on fence in rear at 1200 M, 10Ls down at 800 M, 7Ls down on inner in 12th off home turn, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish without threatening the principals.
3 and 4-wide without cover 1L off pace in 4th at 1200 M, covered 2-wide 4Ls down from 800 M to 500 M, 3-wide into straight when 3Ls down in 5th, quickened up to lead 150 M out, driven out.
Very awkwardly away, 7Ls off pace in 12th at 1200 M and at 800 M, 6Ls down in 11th turning for home and short of room until 250 M out, ran on strongly and nearest at the finish.
4 and 5-wide without cover in midfield at 1200 M, pressed on to be 2-wide and half a length 2nd 700 M out, a neck 2nd into straight and all out to hold this spot at 200 M, no extra final stages.
3-wide with cover and 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, 2-wide about 5Ls down at 800 M and into home straight when still in midfield, some headway to 150 M out when 3Ls down, no extra.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 9th at the 1200 M, niggled along to improve on the turn and 5Ls down at top of stretch, tended to hang in under pressure, never better than midfield.
Settled one from rear down the back straight about 9Ls off pace, 3-wide into straight and still 9Ls last, stayed on down centre of track, 6Ls off pace at 200 M, kept on, nearest at finish.
Quite deep but with cover from back to home straight when about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace towards rear, widest of all (about 5-wide) turning for home, never threatened.
In similar position most of way. Kept on without troubling leaders close home.
Tracked leader to straight where he could find no extra 200 M out.
In rear to straight. Was running on when baulked close home.
Well there to home turn. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Never a factor.
Soon led and went 2L clear early in straight. Found winner too strong inside 100 M.
Towards rear till staying on a bit closing stages.
Among rear group to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Never troubled leaders.
Behind leaders in 5th into home bend. Ran on resolutely in straight to take command close home.
Well there before failing to hold place final 200 M.
Was last rounding home bend before running on quite well closing stages for 3rd.
6th halfway and similar position into straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Settled behind midfield to straight. Kept on steadily under vigorous riding.
Well there to 1200 M, soon gave a little ground to race in 4th. Faded passing 400 M.
Last to 1300 M. Remained in the rear group to final turn before improving to 6th early straight. Continued to make ground to take 2nd near 150 M.
Prominent early, soon dropped back to midfield or behind from 1200 M. No subsequent progress.
Made all.
Towards rear. Crept closer on inside to 5th final turn. Kept on without quickening.
In touch from widest draw. Dropped back steadily from stable bend to be in midfield. Failed to make any impression in straight.
In touch early, soon behind midfield. Weakened further from 500 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Recovered ground from outside to be 2nd near 1000 M. Weakened out of contention inside 150 M.
Midfield or behind. Improved to 5th approaching 600 M. Gained 3rd early straight when given reminders. Held on.
Crowded for room at start, towards rear. No improvement.
Last from 1300 M. Ran on quite well in straight, doing best work final 200 M. Just missed a minor placing.
Towards rear early, soon improved to 3rd. Weakened out of contention in straight.
Never in contention.
Held slender advantage most of way. Fought on stoutly to prevail narrowly.
Ridden to contest lead from middle draw. Raced 3-wide outside leaders until faded rounding home bend.
Behind leaders. No extra final 200 M.
Soon in rear. Made up late ground running past beaten horses closing stages.
Niggled at in rear of midfield. Took closer order but stumbled rounding home bend. Raced greenly in straight and gave ground steadily.
Never nearer.
Never far off. Failed to quicken to challenge in straight.
Raced 3-wide in midfield. Faded into straight. (Lame.)
Raced in rear of midfield. Finished off race strongly.
Soon moved up to dispute lead. Hit front momentarily 200 M out. Fought on doggedly but just failed to peg back winner.
Disputed for lead early, took clear advantage far side. Won unchallenged.
Pushed along to be 2nd from widest draw. Mainly 2Ls behind lead until finding no extra closing stages.
Behind midfield. No improvement in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear. Crept closer to 6th final turn. Kept on.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily from final turn. Wide without cover throughout.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Rear. Hung out 1000 M and home turn. Made no show.
Disputed for lead early, raced 3rd from 1000 M. Dropped to 4th 600 M. One-paced thereafter.
Better than midfield. Ran on from 5th final turn to take a remote 2nd close home.
Midfield. Progressed to 4th far side. Further improved to 3rd passing 600 M. Kept on.
Fractions and reared at start, losing significant ground. Never in the race.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Raced mainly in forward of midfield. Fought on well under pressure to grab placing late.
Chased leader. Disputed lead into straight but soon weakened.
Held up in midfield, then faded under pressure rounding home bend.
Always well there. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening but could find no extra passing 200 M.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily in straight.
Settled within striking distance. Ran on dourly to assert authority final stride.
Never a factor.
Towards rear and wide. Rapid headway around field rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace under pressure in straight.
Took up running before stables bend and nearly made rest of the running but caught in shadows of the post.
Always at the back. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Midfield to straight. Weakened.

Soon settled in a rearward position on rail. Near the 700 M switched out and pressed forward to be 2-1/2Ls off pace on straightening. Unable to sustain effort in straight and plugged on evenly to the line.
Tardy start from wide draw and soon settled in worse than midfield 2-wide through to straight. Unable to make any impression in straight.

Began fairly from wide draw and soon settled midfield or worse 2-wide. Switched wide and made some headway at home turn. Ran on well when asked 300 M out but just failed to match speed with the 1st pair in the closing stages.
Began fairly and soon box seated behind leader through to straight. Responded well when asked 300 M out and fended off late challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.
Best out and pushed along to lead narrowly on rail. Headed near the 350 M mark, only ran on evenly when asked 300 M out and further weakened inside final 150 M.

Slow to begin and pushed along to race in midfield or worse on fence through to straight. Switched to the middle to make his run and made up good ground inside final 200 M to miss the winner by a narrow margin.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in the rear section on rail. Near the 1300 M became unbalanced after being dragged down behind. Did not make any impression in the straight.

Niggled along to race in midfield on rail. At the 400 M shifted out and pushed along to improve to be 1L off pace on straightening. Ran on fairly in straight but was out ran by placegetters over the concluding stages.

Niggled along to race 1L off pace 2-wide. Switched to 3-wide and went forward to take up running rounding the home turn. Kept on fairly when asked 300 M out but was headed near the 200 M and became one-paced thereafter.
On jumping stumbled and pushed along to race outside the leader. Under pressure to maintain position at home bend. No extra in straight and dropped out inside final 200 M.

From the widest draw was immediately eased to the tail and crossed to the fence. Near the 1300 M clipped heels and switched to 3-wide. Made up some ground going up the Rock. Only kept on evenly to the line when asked 250 M out.
Began well and raced in mid-division but was caught wide without cover in the middle stages. Pushed along to hold position at home bend. Only able to keep on evenly to the line.
2-wide and between 2Ls and 3Ls off the speed in midfield through to home straight, kept on steadily on the run-in but never likely to reach the frame.
Awkwardly away, one from rear about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace on fence until home straight, very short of room thereafter and was not fully extended, nearest at the finish.
In rear and 2-wide and 5Ls off pace at 800 M, 6Ls last and niggled along to stay in touch at 600 M and into straight, stayed on well up the fence to be nearest at the finish.
Always very deep on the track at least 3 or 4-wide without cover about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in midfield or worse, 6-wide (widest of all) off home turn, soon faded out.
Prominent in about 4th or 5th place racing 3-wide without cover until 400 M out, turned for home 4-wide, still only 2Ls down in 4th at the 200 M, weakened badly final stages.
Always in 10th place and about 4Ls off pace and 2 or 3-wide until 500 M out, 5-wide into home straight, never troubled principals.
Pressed on to dispute lead or race a close 2nd on fence from 800 M to home straight, still a neck 2nd but all out at 200 M, no extra final stages.
Awkwardly away, on fence 3Ls off the speed in midfield until home straight, short of room until 150 M out when 2Ls down, quickened up very well once clear to lead final strides.
Unbalanced at jump, 3-wide without cover and worse than midfield until 500 M out, 5-wide into straight when 4Ls down in 8th, kept on quite well down centre of track without threatening.
Had to work quite hard to dispute lead or lead narrowly out 2-wide from 800 M to home straight, a neck to the good at the 200 M, headed 100 M out, no extra but hung on well for 3rd.
Best away, led on fence early on before settling into the run of the race on fence about 1.5Ls off pace in 3rd until home straight, stayed on fairly well but always appeared held, checked 50 M out.
Always well placed about 2Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th or 5th through to home straight, led 100 M out, grabbed by winner final strides.
Shortly after the start was checked and raced in a rearward position in the early stages. Urged to improve position in the backstraight and advanced to midfield at 600 M.
Slowly away then checked shortly after the start. Remained racing in a rearward position until straightening. Only ran past a weakening runner.
Ridden hard early and raced 3-wide behind leaders. Couldn't keep pace after 700 M and dropped back steadily. Widest turning in and made no impression in the straight.
Jumped quickly from widest draw. Raced in a forward position but trapped 3-wide. About a length down on straightening. Continued well in the straight and took control in the final 200 M.
Broke well. Niggled along on fence at midfield middle stages. Continued to make steady progress in the straight and just missed a minor placing.

Behind midfield shortly after start and raced further back after being checked at 1000 M. Ridden hard to improve after being crowded 600 M out. Ran on well in the closing stages to be closest at finish.
Raced wide in a rearward position in the early stages and remained at the rear in the backstraight. Trailed field into home straight and made up some ground closing stages.
Jumped well and raced on fence just behind the leaders. 2Ls behind the pace at 600 M and was niggled to improved position rounding home turn. Kept on well in the straight.

Ridden hard on jumping but couldn't muster speed to stay with the leaders. Steadied at 1000M and fell further back to behind midfield. Urged to stay on 700 M but still remained near the rear on straightening. No extra.

Stumbled on jumping and was ridden up to race among leaders. Continued to race alongside the pacesetter in the backstraight. No response when asked 500 M out and was eased out of the race shortly after.
2-wide at midfield early stages. Improved to be racing just behind the leaders 800 M. Fell back to midfield rounding home turn and was one-paced in the straight.
Raced to the lead early and maintained about a length's advantage heading into home straight. Headed by winner final 200 M but managed to hang onto a minor placing.
Behind midfield throughout.
Towards rear throughout.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Recovered ground gradually to become prominent halfway. Ran on solidly to assert authority near 100 M. Won well.
Prominent to 400 M. Dropped back steadily. Hung in.
Midfield early, soon dropped to the rear group. No progress.
Prominent. Failed to quicken when asked inside 200 M.
Last to 600 M. Made ground steadily final 400 M.
Led. Looked like a winner when still having 1L advantage 200 M. Failed to withhold the winner when headed near 100 M.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Better than midfield. Weakened 300 M out.
Made no show. Hung out.
Never a factor.
In touch. Improved to 2nd 300 M. Found no extra inside 100 M. Hung in.
Around midfield. Ran on quite well 200 M out to just miss 2nd.
Settled behind leaders. Came to challenge upon straightening and ran on to assert authority final strides.
Held up on rails disputing the lead. Went some 1L clear upon straightening but caught final strides.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Ridden but lacked pace early. Ran on past beaten horses final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Not much room in straight. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Wide in midfield to straight then weakened.
Held slender lead mostly one off inside rails. Came under pressure to maintain advantage turning in but soon weakened.
Niggled along in midfield. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish despite interferences in straight.
Sluggish at start. Towards rear into straight. Improved along rails until badly baulked final stages. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
In similar position throughout.
Slow into stride. Remained well back most of way.
Led briefly early stages. 2Ls 3rd rounding home bend. Ran on under pressure final 200 M to snatch victory near finish.
Jumped well and took lead near 1000 M. Held 1L advantage on straightening. Kept on but just lost marginally final strides.
Always there. 2Ls 4th early straight. Kept on well final 250 M.
Midfield. Kept on but failed quicken to challenge in straight.
Began awkwardly, at rear early. Recovered a little ground passing 1000 M. 5Ls 8th final turn. Ran on well from outside to just miss the 1st pair.
Held 5th to straight. Found no room and checked when trying to improve on inside. Held up again when no clear run 300 M. Kept on when in clear.
Pushed along from widest draw to reach 2nd at 800 M. Held on until weakened 200 M.
Towards rear. Made some minor improvement rounding home bend to be 7th final turn. Kept on.
Last from 1000 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Never able to feature. Wide throughout.
Forward of midfield. Ran on late without threatening first two.
Around midfield to straight. Faded.
Made all. Hung on well under pressure.
Never seen with a chance.
Well back to straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Soon in last few. Remained same into straight, then ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Made up some late ground but missed 3rd place narrowly.
Restrained outside leader to straight, then weakened.
Always well there. Kept on steadily but unable to quicken to threaten.
Mostly in forward of midfield. Kept on same pace under pressure.
In last few. Made up good ground on inner to be nearest at finish.
Gave ground gradually from midfield rounding home bend.
Around midfield to straight. Faded.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.

Began fairly and niggled along to race around 1L off pace 2 wide through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but just failed to match speed with the placegetters over the concluding stages.
Slowly away and soon raced in rear section on rail through to straight. Switched to the widest at 300 M and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

From a wide draw was immediately steadied to the tail but closer to the rail. On straightening switched to the outside to obtain clear running. Made up little ground inside final 200 M when asked 400 M out.

Jumped well from widest and steadily eased to midfield or worse out wide without cover. Ridden along and made little headway at home turn. No extra in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Began well and niggled along to take lead on rail with around 1L advantage through to straight. Ran on well when asked 400 M out and fended off repeated challenge from placegetters to win narrowly.

Jumped fairly and soon settled in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Did not see clear daylight in the early to middle part of the straight. Made up good ground when clear running was obtained inside final 150 M.

Soon raced in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. Unable to find clear running in early part of straight. Switched out and obtained clear running 300 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.
Broke fairly and soon settled in worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
Broke fairly and soon settled in midfield 2 wide. Near the 600 M switched to 3 wide and niggled along to improve position. Kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but became one-pace in the final stages.
Niggled along to race 2Ls off pace 2 wide with cover through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.

Began well and soon box seated behind leader through to straight. Short for room in the early part of straight and near the 200 M was inconvenienced. Fought on well thereafter to miss the winner by a narrow margin.

On jumping became unbalanced and soon recovered to race in worse than midfield 2 wide through to straight. After the 200 M whilst weakening was checked when crowded for room and dropped to last place thereafter.
Soon raced in midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M and kept on fairly to the line without threatening.

On jumping became unbalanced and dropped to a rearward position around 2 wide through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M out but shortly after the 200 M was crowded for room and kept on evenly thereafter.
Led at 1400 M, clear by 2Ls on fence at 1200 M, set a fast pace from there through to home straight, headed about 250 M out, dropped out very quickly.
8Ls off the speed and 2-wide in 12th at 1200 M out and at 800 M, 5Ls down and still towards rear off home straight, about 2Ls down in midfield at the 200 M, kept on well for a place.

Didn't break well, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th at the 1200 M, 4Ls down in 5th at 800 M and at top of stretch, fading when 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, continued to fade out. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
2-wide and 1L 2nd at 1200 M, about 2.5Ls down in 3rd at the 800 M and at the top of the homestretch, was quickly outpaced.
Towards rear 3-wide and 7Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, 3-wide without cover and 8Ls down at 800 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight 6Ls down in 12th, no impression.
Never better than midfield at any stage, at least 10Ls last and 2 and 3-wide with cover down the back straight, 8Ls last entering straight, ran on past a few tired rivals.
Never competitive, always in rear bunch and never better than 6Ls off pace at any stage.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 9th down the back, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in midfield, stayed on well down the centre of track to be a neck 3rd 200 M out, no extra late on.
On fence 7Ls off the speed in 10th at the 1200 M and at 800 M, 5Ls down in 9th off final bend, 3Ls down and still worse than midfield at 200 M, weakened through closing stages.
3Ls off pace in 6th on fence at 1200 M, 5Ls off pace and under pressure 800 M out in 6th, 3Ls down in 4th off home turn, led 200 M out, ran on well.
Awkwardly away, 5Ls off the speed on fence in 8th at the 1200 M, 6Ls down in 7th at 800 M, 4Ls down in 6th and under pressure entering straight, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, one-paced.
Niggled along when 5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 7th at 1200 M and roughly the same at 800 M, 4Ls down in midfield at top of stretch, 3Ls down at 200 M, very weak close home. (Lame.)
Broke well, 2Ls off speed in a nice spot in 3rd at the 1200 M, 3Ls down in 4th 800 M out, 1L down in 2nd off home turn, brief lead about 250 M out, soon headed, just clung onto 2nd.
Awkward start, 3-wide without cover and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd at the 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn when wavering under pressure, eased out of contention.
Began well but was eased back to a rearward position to find cover. Continued to be 3-wide near the back rounding home turn. Made a brief dash but unable to sustain effort in the closing stages.
Blundered on jumping. Dropped steadily to race at the rear. Remained in last place entering home straight and only ran past a pair of beaten runners.
Slowly away and raced in a rearward position until straightening. Staged a late rally to make the frame.
2-wide better than midfield. Responded well when pressured on straightening. Every chance 300 M out but unable to sustain effort in the closing stages.
Raced on fence and within 2Ls of the pace. Unable to quicken on straightening and faded closing stages.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Picked up well when being ridden on straightening and advanced steadily in the straight to be closest at finish.
Began well from wide draw and raced closely behind the leader until home straight. Moved into the lead with ease 300 M out and stayed on well to hold off late challengers.
Led until 400 M. Hung on briefly after being headed and was swamped final 200 M.
Raced on fence in rear section until home straight. Improved steadily along the inside fence in the home straight.

Niggled to race on fence at midfield. Similar position entering home straight. Couldn't find a clear run until inside final 200 M. Charged home strongly after seeing daylight and just missed 2nd place.
Slowly away and was niggled to race 3-wide at midfield. No response when pressured on straightening.
9Ls off pace and 2-wide in 7th at 1400 M, 2-wide and 3Ls down still in midfield at 800 M, 3Ls behind in 5th entering stretch, stayed on at the same pace.
Couldn't lead, 4Ls off the speed in 2nd at 1400 M, a neck 2nd and 2-wide at 800 M, led off home turn and soon headed at 300 M, faded out quite quickly.
Fractious in gates, 6Ls behind in 3rd on fence at 1400 M, head up at 900 M when 3-wide and 1L down in 3rd and into home straight, all out to be 1.5Ls 2nd at 200 M, soon swallowed by pursuers.
Checked at 1800 M, 10Ls behind leader in 8th at 1400 M, 5Ls down in 10th at the 800 M, 6Ls down and struggling in rear off home turn, soon detached.
7Ls off pace in 5th at the 1400 M, 2Ls down in 4th on fence at 800 M and even closer turning for home, led 300 M out, about 2Ls clear 200 M out, collared by winner final strides.
2 and 3-wide mostly with cover down back straight, 10Ls off pace in 11th at 1400 M, about 4Ls down in midfield at 800 M and straightening up when 5-wide, stayed on well.
7Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th at 1400 M, caught 3 and 4-wide without cover for much of back straight, still wide and 2Ls down in 5th at 800 M, 3Ls down in 6th entering straight, faded right out.
Dropped out one from rear about 12Ls off pace at 1400 M, 5Ls down at 800 M and same into home straight when 5-wide, ran on well down centre of track, no extra through final 100 M.
Slowly away, switched to rail from wide 1800 M out, 10Ls last 1200 M out, 7Ls last at 800 M, 6Ls down and 5-wide into straight, finished off strongly down centre of track, led final strides.
2-wide 10Ls off speed in 10th at 1400 M, steadied when 4Ls down in 9th and 2-wide at 800 M and into home straight, held up for a run until about 200 M out, stayed on well through final 200 M.
Slowly away, on fence 10Ls off speed in 9th at 1400 M, 6Ls off pace and one from rear at 800 M and 5Ls down at top of home straight, staying on well when 3Ls down at 200 M, no extra thereafter.
Raced freely to lead at 1600 M and go 4Ls clear at 1400 M, only a neck clear at 800 M, under pressure and headed at top of home straight, weakened out.
9Ls off pace on fence in 6th at 1400 M, 3Ls down in midfield at 800 M, under pressure to hold position at 600 M, 4Ls down and all out at 400 M, plugged on at same pace.
Slowly away, 7Ls off pace on fence in 10th at 1000 M and much the same into the home straight, was the only one to stay on from off the pace, did it well, barely missed a place.
5Ls behind leader in 7th on fence at 1000 M, 6Ls down and under pressure off final bend, drifted further back.
3Ls behind on fence in 5th at 1000 M, niggled along to maintain this position at 700 M, 5Ls down in 5th off home turn, kept on only at the one pace.
Caught 4-deep without cover when 6Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, off the bridle to keep up 600 M out, 4-wide into straight when already beaten, dropped out.
Crowded on fence at 1200 M when about 9Ls off pace in rear, never a factor, always detached.
Raced too freely early on when 1L 2nd out 2-wide at the 1000 M, struggling to hold position before home turn, beaten 300 M out.
Always prominent, 3Ls behind leader and 2-wide in 4th at 1000 M and same into home straight, always held by Quinella pair on the run-in and just hung on for a place.
4Ls off pace in 6th at the 1000 M, about 5Ls down in 6th entering straight, stayed on at same pace, bled from both nostrils.
Flew the start but restrained to settle 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, still 2Ls off pace in 2nd at top of home straight, kept on all right but never looked like reeling in the winner.
Slowly away, about 9Ls or 10Ls off pace and 2-wide in last through to home straight, plodded on past a few tired rivals.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1000 M, hung out on circle and steadily drifted back to 9Ls down and 5-wide into home straight, soon eased down.
3-wide without cover in 8th when 5Ls off the speed at 1000 M, struggling to keep up when 7Ls down and 3-wide in 9th off home turn, faded steadily.
Knuckled and checked at start, 8Ls off pace and 2-wide in 12th at 1000 M, similarly placed into home straight, back-pedalled.
Led 1200 M out, 1L clear on fence at 1000 M, 2Ls clear off home turn and at 200 M, always in command.
Never a factor.
Made no show.
Better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Ridden along to soon be 2nd. Kept on but failed to maintain position 200 M out.
Towards rear. Ran on from outside inside 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Raced 4th early. Improved to 3rd rounding home bend. Steadied for a run on inside 300 M. Never recovered.
Soon led. Found no extra when headed 250 M.
Always there. 2-1/2Ls 4th on straightening. Kept on steadily to take 2nd 200 M out.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Jumped well from a wide draw, settled behind midfield. Remained in similar position until gaining ground steadily final 300 M for a minor placing closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. Ran on well from 5th final turn to claim victory inside 250 M out. Never threatened.
Midfield to 300 M. No extra.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Crept a bit closer final turn. Soon weakened.
Raced alone on inside rail in a prominent position. Faded 250 M.
Led field until headed closing stages. Shifted in abruptly from outside while under pressure final 100 M.
In touch. Only one-paced final 400 M.
Better than midfield. Ran on well from 300 M to take charge while shifting in from outside rail closing stages.
Midfield to halfway. Faded.
Began awkwardly, slightly behind midfield. Gained ground steadily to be 5th near 300 M. Kept on without quickening for a remote 4th.
Midfield or slightly behind. Weakened 200 M out.
Towards rear. Made some minor progress over final 400 M.
Never better than midfield.
Began awkwardly, never a factor.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear. Very moderate progress from halfway. Hung out.
Always at rear.
Always prominent. 1/2L inside the leader to 150 M. Failed quicken to threaten the quinella pair.
Attempted to make all but caught by fast-finishing winner final strides.
Behind midfield. Did not find much room in straight.
Raced wide in forward of midfield most of way. Kept on steadily in straight.
Niggled along and chased leader to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Well back. Produced good late impression in straight.
Never nearer.
Settled in forward of midfield. Did not find much room early in straight before quickened up well final 200 M to snatch victory final stages.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening under pressure in straight.
Wide in midfield into straight. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Held up in rear. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in midfield on rails. No clear passage in straight but fought on to reach 3rd late.
Midfield. Weakened into straight.
Behind leaders to straight, then gradually faded under pressure.
Ridden along early to remain at 3rd. 3-wide 4th final turn. Kept on same pace in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led field early stages, then tracked leader before regaining lead passing 300 M. Kept on when headed closing stages.
Midfield or slightly better. Failed to quicken in straight.
Always in the rear group. (Significant mucus in trachea.)
Last but within 10Ls behind lead to final turn. Given reminders when 7th early straight. Responded well final 250 M to snatch victory near finish.
Slightly behind midfield. 5-wide into straight. Weakened.
In touch. 2Ls 3rd 600 M. Stayed on solidly to challenge the leader passing 200 M. Gained brief advantage close home but failed to resist challenges from winner near finish.
Towards rear. Made some progress rounding home bend to be 6th turning in. Stayed on well in straight.
Led field from 1400 M. Found no extra when headed passing 300 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped back steadily rounding home bend.
Never far off to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Midfield to straight. One-paced.
Towards rear. Came under pressure rounding home bend and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear far side. Effort around field rounding home bend. Sustained effort from prominent position into straight to assert authority over 200 M out.
Never seen with a chance.
Close up. Gave ground coming out of back straight.
Well there to straight. Dropped out.
Forward of midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Midfield most of way. Kept on past some beaten runners closing stages.
Well back into straight. Never nearer.
Led to straight then dropped out.
Towards rear. Found nothing under pressure rounding home bend.
Never in contention.
Around midfield before weakened rounding home bend.
Jumped awkwardly and soon recovered to race around 5Ls off pace on rail through to straight. Only ran on evenly when asked 400 M out and around the 200 M was awkwardly placed behind heels.
From a wide draw was soon eased to worse than midfield closer to rail. Switched out and made up little ground turning for home. Made up little ground inside final 200 M when asked 400 M out.
On jumping sat back and lost ground and raced at back 2 wide. Made up some ground from the outside turning for home. No extra in straight and dropped out.
Tardy start and pushed along to race 3Ls off leader on rail through to straight. Kept on well when asked 400 M out but was unable to match speed with the 1st pair and settled for 3rd place.
Began well and soon raced 3Ls off pace 2 wide. Edged forward at home turn. Found nothing in straight and steadily weakened from 350 M.
Began awkwardly and soon raced in a rearward position on rail through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 350 M out and after the 200 M was steadied to avoid heels.
Soon settled in mid-division on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and made up some ground inside 250 M to be closest at finish.

Began fairly and niggled along to race 4 to 5Ls off pace 2 wide. Made little headway at home bend and switched out on straightening. Made up steady ground when asked 400 M out but without threatening the winner.

Began fairly from wide draw and soon settled in mid-division 2 wide. Little headway home bend. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish. (Severe corneal ulcer to left eye.)
Broke well and pushed along to race 2Ls off pace on fence through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but became one-pace inside final 250 M.
Began fairly from widest and soon eased to a rearward position 2 wide. Under pressure to maintain position at home bend. Made no impression in straight.
On jumping stood flat-footed and raced at back on rail. Ridden along and switched out turning for home. Unable to quicken in straight and only ran past several beaten runners. (Mucus in treachea.)
Jumped well and niggled along to take up running on rail from 1700 M with around 1-1/2 to 2Ls advantage through to straight. Ran on well when asked 350 M out to win comfortably.
Best away, disputed lead until about 450 M out when under pressure to fight back, faded steadily.
Mid-division about 3Ls off pace until the 400 M when off the bridle, well beaten 200 M out.
Awkwardly away, about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace and worse than midfield on stand's rail until 400 M out, weakened.
Tacked across closer to stand's rail while disputing lead, about a neck clear 400 M out and at 200 M, kept on strongly through closing stages.
In midfield early on down centre of track about 3Ls off pace, lost position and under pressure passing 400 M marker, no further impression.
2Ls down in 4th early on, 3Ls off the speed in midfield at 500 M, soon under pressure, faded out.
Slowly away, 4Ls off pace and one from rear 800 M out, under pressure from 500 M out, switched inside for clear running 300 M out, stayed on quite well without threatening leaders.
Widest of all down centre of track without cover when about 2Ls off pace in about 6th place until 500 M out, weakened steadily thereafter.
Stumbled at start, midfield early, 2Ls down in 4th at 400 M, 2Ls down in 3rd when all out at 200 M, no extra through concluding stages.
Bumped and squeezed out at the start, 5Ls down in last from 800 M to 400 M when short of room, made only a little late headway past beaten rivals.
Always in midfield about 2.5Ls off the pace until 400 M out, outpaced thereafter.
Prominent early on, towards stand's rail 2Ls down in 5th at 400 M, got a clear run up the fence from 300 M out, kept on stoutly for a place.
Always prominent along stand's rail within 1L of the speed through to the 400 M, every chance when a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, no chance with winner but comfortably held onto 2nd.
Tended to hang in throughout, about 4Ls off pce towards rear until 400 M out, switched wider when short of room at 300 M, 6Ls last at 200 M, made back some small late ground.

Led soon after start and maintained a 2Ls advantage until 400 M. Not pressured until opponent closed to within a length final 200 M. Kept on well when pressured and held challengers at bay closing stages.
Began fairly. Taken back to race at the rear but was difficult to settle early stages. Trailed field into home straight and closed the race off fairly.

Raced 2-wide better than midfield early stages. Reached within 3Ls of the leader 800 M. Continued to steadily improve in the straight with every chance final 200 M. Stayed on well but couldn't gain further ground on winner.
Jumped awkwardly and was niggled to race on fence just behind midfield. Dropped further back rounding home turn and was near rear on straightening. Only ran past a weakening runner in the straight.
Slightly slow to jump and raced near the rear until straightening. Didn't pick up pace until final 300 M and made up some late ground.

Settled 2-wide just behind midfield early stages. Improved steadily rounding home turn and reached within 4Ls of the lead on straightening. Charged on well but failed to gain further ground on winner final stages.
Began fairly and was taken back to race in a rearward position. 3-wide rounding home turn and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Niggled to race within 2Ls of the lead. Continued to be in similar position until 400 M but couldn't find extra when asked. Faded closing stages.
Began well and settled on fence at midfield. Not much response when asked on straightening and was one-paced to line.
Raced wide and without cover behind midfield. Improved to within 3Ls of the leader at 400 M but weakened thereafter.
2-wide and about 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed through to home straight, very one-paced thereafter.
In 3rd or 4th place about 2-wide 2Ls off pace through to home straight, loomed with every chance when half a length down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra, missed a place close home.
Away well, disputed lead on fence through to home straight when travelling well, half a length clear and hard ridden at 200 M, hung on gamely under pressure.
Always caught wide without cover, half a length off pace at 800 M and 3-wide at 800 M, 4-wide into straight when 2Ls down in 4th, still 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
Never really got involved, 3-wide and 4Ls off pace in 10th at the 800 M, ridden along when 6Ls down and 3-wide on straightening in 10th place, found nothing under pressure. (Lame.)
Bumped at the start, hindered about 900 M out, 3-wide with cover and 3Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, steadily lost position on the circle, soon beaten.
Pressed on to dispute lead out 2-wide down back straight, a neck down in 2nd off home straight, all out to get within 1L of the pace in 3rd at the 200 M, weakened.
Couldn't lead despite hard riding, raced on fence between 2Ls and 3Ls off the speed from 800 M to home straight when under strong pressure, faded out gradually. (Lame.)
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 11th at 900 M, hung out badly around the circle, last when 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight and 8Ls down, made a little late ground.
Steadied at start, on fence about 4Ls off pace in about 8th or 9th at 800 M and same into home straight, stayed on well in the home straight for a place.
On fence about 6Ls off pace in rear until 500 M out, ran on steadily through closing stages, never really troubled principals.
In midfield and 2-wide niggled along to hold position 900 M out when 4Ls off pace, 5Ls down and hard ridden and in 9th on straightening, kept on very well for pressure to nearly win.
Towards rear and 3-wide with cover about 6Ls off pace down backstretch, 4-wide and still about 6Ls down off final bend, kept on at the one pace down centre of track.
Keen early on, 3-wide with cover when 5Ls off pace in 8th at 1000 M, under pressure when 3-wide and about 4Ls down in 9th entering straight, one-paced thereafter.
Slowly away, keen early caught 4-wide without cover in midfield before looping field from 1000 M to lead 900 M out, 2-wide and still disputing lead into home straight, soon swamped.
Slowly away, raced freely early on when 7Ls off pace and one from rear down back straight, never threatened, always outpaced.
Veered left from gates, towards rear about 6Ls off pace on fence down backstretch, 5Ls down off home turn, 4Ls down staying on at one pace when briefly held up 200 M out, no extra.
3-wide without cover 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 4th and still 3-wide at 800 M, 1L down in 3rd entering straight, brief lead at 300 M, soon headed, just hung on for a place.
Soon led on fence, led or disputed lead through to home straight, headed 300 M out, soon beaten. (Lame.)
Had the run of the race in 3rd about 2Ls off the pace in 4th or 5th through to home straight, stayed on at the same pace along fence through final stages.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 9th at 800 M and roughly the same into home straight, kept on fairly without threatening.
Very keen early on when 3Ls off pace in midfield 3-wide with cover at 1200 M, travelled better at 800 M, 3-wide into straight when 3Ls down in 6th, led 250 M out, ran on well.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 6th at 800 M, still 3Ls down but in 7th entering home straight, had little chance with winner but ran on quite well to take 2nd.
Held up in rear, 9Ls last at 900 M, 7Ls last and 2-wide entering straight, 4Ls down in 10th at 200 M, stayed on strongly but was hindered slightly inside final 50 M, nearest at finish.
Very keen early on, raced 2 and 3-wide without cover within 1L or 2Ls off the pace in 2nd or 3rd from backstretch to homestretch, beaten 300 M out.
Awkwardly away, on fence 4Ls off the pace in 6th at the 1000 M, 4Ls down in 8th entering straight, didn't find much under pressure and soon beaten.
In touch to straight. Found little when asked 300 M.
In rear into straight where he ran on strongly closing stages to just fail narrowly.
Well there to straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Always thereabouts. Kept on till outpaced near finish.
Behind midfield rounding home bend. Ran on well final 250 M to snatch race on post.
Trailed field to straight where he ran on quite well. (See Racing Incidents.)
Close up to straight. Took lead 300 M before headed and finding no extra close home.
Midfield to straight where he failed to get a clear run closing stages.
8th halfway and similar position turning into straight. Unable to get a clear run 250 M before hitting front 100 M. Lost race final stride.
Never a factor.
Soon took up running and led field to 300 M. Found no extra.
Worse than midfield home turn. Was improving when baulked for run inside 200 M.
Made no show.
Ran 6th into home bend. Kept on same pace under pressure in straight.
Near rear. Only minor recovery in straight.
Towards rear. Ran off from first turn. Shifted back towards the rail far side and improved to 3-wide 2nd 650 M. Well beaten passing 400 M.
Behind midfield. One-paced.
Pushed along to be prominent from widest draw. Gave ground steadily from the Rock.
Around midfield. Dropped a bit to the rear group rounding home bend. Widest turning in. No significant progress.
Prominent on the rail. Within 2Ls behind lead into straight. Ran on solidly to claim victory close home.
Slowly away, last to 400 M. Made ground final turn to be 7th turning in. Continued to improve until failed to quicken 100 M out.
Jumped well and took lead to 1400 M. Remained 4th or 5th before racing in midfield far side. Weakened steadily passing 800 M.
Behind midfield. Steady progress rounding home bend to be 4th final turn. Kept on without quickening.
Soon prominent, mainly 2nd to final turn. Failed to hold position 200 M out.
Tardy start, near the rear. Crept closer to 5th final turn. Ran on steadily to claim 3rd closing stages.
Led field from 1400 M. Held 1L advantage 250 M. Kept on but failed to contain the winner close home.
Well there. Disputed lead rounding home bend holding every chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Ridden along on rails behind leader. Kept on early in straight before finding no extra 200 M out.
Niggled along in rear. Saved ground on inner turning in, then ran home one-paced.
Never in contention.
Well back to straight. Finished off race strongly to do best work at finish.
Always 4-wide in forward of midfield to straight. Fought on dourly under pressure to just get up on line.
Midfield. No clear passage early in straight then made up some late ground closing stages.
Wide in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Towards rear. Obtained split upon straightening, then ran on to be nearest at finish.
Broke well and led far side. Joined rounding home bend but fought on doggedly in straight until no extra near finish.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Wide behind midfield throughout. Never seen with a chance.
Settled 5th. Kept on same pace throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Took lead from 1000 M. Held on well but failed to resist challenges from winner when headed close home.
Made no show.
Soon towards rear. Ran on quite well in straight to take 3rd near finish.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Behind midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield. Slight progress to 4th rounding home bend. No extra final 200 M.
Better than midfield from a wide draw. 4-wide turning in. Failed quicken to challenge.
Soon moved up to 3rd. Improved to 2nd near 500 M. Came to tackle leader final turn. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Led field early stages, then remained prominent to straight. Ran on well to assert authority close home.
Unseated rider at start.
Towards rear early, soon improved to midfield. Failed to maintain position from halfway.
Well back. Clipped heels over 250 M out. Made up some late ground.
Wide in midfield to straight then ran home one-paced.
Behind midfield to straight. Kept on steadily.
In similar position throughout.
Never far off. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Well there. Came under pressure rounding home bend then dropped out quickly upon straightening.
Attempted to make all but unable to sustain effort final 100 M.
Around midfield. Kept on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off in 3 or 4-wide to straight, then dropped out of contention.
Always in last few. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Settled in last few. Finished strongly final 200 M to snatch victory final strides.
Always thereabouts. Ran on to hit front briefly inside 200 M but worn down by fast-finishing winner close to home.
Very slow to begin and hard ridden to race in better than midfield 2-wide. Ridden along at home turn to maintain position. No extra in straight and steadily tailed off inside final 200 M.
Slow to begin and pushed along to take up running on rail from the 1400 M through to straight. Stayed one-paced when asked 250 M out and further weakened inside final 100 M.
Jumped fairly and steadily eased to a rearward position 2-wide. Switched to the widest and made little headway at home bend. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped fairly and soon settled in worse than midfield 2 to 3-wide. At the 500 M whilst being ridden along to hold position was carried wider. Only able to run on evenly in straight.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in prominent position 2-wide. Edged forward to join leader turning for home. Responded fairly when asked 250 M out but was headed shortly after the 200 M and became one-paced in closing stages.
Soon raced in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

Broke well from wide draw and led briefly in the early stages. From 1400 M steadily eased back to midfield around 2 to 3-wide through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.

Soon settled in rearward position on rail. Made little headway going up the Rock. Switched out and ridden along to go forward at home bend. Ran on well in straight but was unable to match speed with 1st pair in the final stages.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section on rail. Switched wide on straightening to find clear running. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M without threatening the placegetters.

Began fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to worse than midfield position on rail. Took a short while to find clear running in straight, ran on strongly when running was obtained at 200 M to grab the winner spot on the line.
Broke fairly from widest and soon eased to the tail closer to the rail through to straight. Unable to make any impression in the straight.

Began well and ridden along to be box seated behind leader. Switched to 3-wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Responded well when asked 250 M out but was overhauled by the winner on the line.
3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 3rd at 1200 M, between 1L and 2Ls down in 3rd and 4th through to home straight, every chance 300 M out, didn't follow through.
3Ls or 4Ls off pace and 2-wide in 5th from 1200 M until home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Awkwardly away, checked at 1300 M, 2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 10th 1200 M out, 9Ls off pace in 11th at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 6Ls 10th, stayed on, nearest at the finish.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1300 M, clear by 1L from 900 M to home straight, still 1L to the good 200 M out, grabbed by winner final strides.
Slowly away, over-raced when pushed out 3-wide 1300 M out, pressed on to be 1L 2nd and 3-wide at 900 M, 2-wide at 600 M, 1L down in 2nd entering straight, soon weakened. (Saddle shifted.)
Bumped at start, settled on fence 8Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, 7Ls last and 3-wide into home straight, ran on strongly, nearest at finish.
5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 7th at 1200 M, 7Ls down in 8th at 800 M, under pressure turning for home when 4-wide and 5Ls down in 8th, stayed on only fairly, never troubled leaders.
Driven along early, 4Ls down in 4th at 1200 M, under pressure 800 M out to hold position 5Ls off pace in 6th, faded steadily thereafter.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, 2 and 3-wide with cover down the back, 4-wide into straight when 4Ls down in 6th, stayed on fairly well without threatening.
8Ls off pace 2-wide in rear at 1200 M, advanced 3-wide without cover 5Ls off pace in 7th, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 4Ls down, stayed on well to lead final strides.
Tight on fence at 1300 M, 5Ls down in 8th at 1200 M, 8Ls down in 10th at 800 M, 6Ls down one from rear into stretch, 5Ls down and beaten when short of room at 200 M, no extra.
2Ls off pace in 2nd at 1200 M on fence, in this spot in 3rd or 4th until home straight, a bit short of room until 200 M out when switched into the clear, ran on fairly but was always held.
Niggled forward from widest draw to race 2-wide and just behind the leader. Continued to follow the pace closely before fading out inside final 250 M.
Got to the lead shortly after the start and held no more than a length's advantage entering home straight. Headed final 150 M and hung on for a minor placing.
Raced 3-wide at midfield until home straight. Found nothing in the straight.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Steadied 600 M out and dropped back slightly. Ridden to keep up rounding home turn. Made up some late ground in the straight.
Jumped well and raced on fence and 2Ls behind the pace. Ran on steadily in the straight and was no threat to winner.
Settled mostly 2-wide behind midfield. Didn't quicken much on straightening.
Behind midfield early and dropped further back to the rear after being crowded at 1000 M. Trailed field into home straight and only ran past a few beaten runners.

Began awkwardly and soon raced on fence in a rearward position. Improved position rounding home turn and reached within 5Ls of the lead on straightening. Continued well in the closing stages to be closest at finish.
Shifted in to race on fence at midfield shortly after the start. Settled in same position before commencing its run at 400 M. Quickened well on straightening and took control final 150 M.

Caught 4-wide without cover in rearward position early stages. 3-wide in rear section but with cover in the backstraight. Pressured to improve from a wide position rounding home turn. Made up steady ground in the straight.
Better than midfield but 3-wide without cover until 400 M. Not much response when ridden and was eased off shortly after straightening.
Jumped awkwardly and raced near the back. Made no impression in the straight.
Soon 4th. 2Ls behind lead final turn. Kept on in straight until one-paced closing stages.
Prominent. Mainly 3rd to early straight where he was held up on inside. Failed to quicken when in clear 200 M.
Raced 5th and switched 3-wide on straightening. Responded well to take charge 250 M. Won convincingly.
Slowly away, soon last. Ran on well from outside final 300 M to just miss the 2nd.
Mostly 6th. Steadied when crowded 300 M. Kept on without quickening thereafter.
Slowly away, near rear. Slight progress from 700 M. Widest (4-wide) turning in. Made up some ground in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Pushed along to join the leader passing 1000 M. Failed to match speed with the winner inside 250 M. Just kept on for a 2nd.
Led early. Was joined passing 1000 M. Weakened soon after straightening.
Led until overhauled over 200 M out.
Always in last few.
Wide throughout. Midfield to straight then dropped out.
Around midfield throughout.
Well back. Quickened well in straight to take charge final stages.
Always thereabouts. Kept on one pace without quickening in straight.
Wide in midfield. Commenced move turning in, hitting front about 200 M out. Swamped close to home.
Ridden in midfield far side. Dropped out from home bend.
Around midfield to straight. Improving steadily under pressure when checked 200 M out. Never recovered.
Settled in forward of midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Never seen with a chance.
Soon improved to prominent position. Held some chance early in straight, but swamped by winner final stages.
Towards rear throughout. Steadied closing stages and was not ridden out.
Raced 5th before improving a bit to 4th rounding home bend. Ran on well in straight to claim victory close home.
Raced 6th to 800 M. Gave ground steadily.
Last to 600 M. 4-wide (widest) 6th turning in. Made up a little ground in straight.
Remained 3rd to 300 M where he ran on to gain brief lead 100 M out. Failed to contain the winner near finish.
4th to 800 M where he gave a little ground to 5th. One-paced when lack of clear run inside 200 M.
Sat outside leader and was 1L behind final turn. Failed quicken to challenge 200 M out.
Soon led. Kept on when headed 100 M out.
Midfield throughout.
Led to halfway. Just 2Ls off lead turning in. Fought on under pressure.
Settled in midfield. Quickened into straight to gain upper hand close home.
Prominent to straight. One-paced in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Never in contention.
Midfield to home bend then weakened.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress in straight, despite hanging in in straight.
Settled some 2Ls off the pace. Took off coming out of back straight to hold some 3Ls break rounding home bend. Still 2Ls clear early in straight but unable to sustain effort caught nearing finish.
Midfield to straight then faded.
Raced keenly in prominent position most of way. Ran home one-paced.
Very slowly away. Trailed field to home bend. Ran past some beaten runners.
Mostly in midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Towards rear throughout.

Tardy start and niggled along to race in midfield or worse 2 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 350 M out and showed good turn of foot inside final 200 M to win convincingly.

Jumped well from wide draw and pushed along to race 2Ls off leader 2 to 3 wide without cover to straight. Kept on well when asked 400 M out but unable to match speed with placegetter in the closing stages.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Responded fairly when asked 400 M out but became one-pace over the concluding stages.
Unable to muster early speed to race in midfield or worse wide without cover. At the 1000 M went forward to race in better than midfield to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line.
From a wide draw was soon eased to the rear but closer to fence through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Broke well and steadily settled in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out and held out late challenge from 3rd placegetter to hold onto 2nd place.

From widest niggled along to race in midfield or better 3 wide without cover in early to middle stages. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Kept on fairly and hung in when asked 400 M out, one-pace final stages.
Jumped awkwardly then was bumped heavily and lost ground. Raced in the rear section around 3 wide. Switched wide and made little headway at home bend. Kept on one-pace to the line.

Hard ridden in the early stages to race in midfield on rail. Near the 1000 M got shuffled back to rear section. Under pressure at home bend to maintain position. Made up little ground inside final 300 M to be closest at finish.

Began fairly and soon eased to rear section on inner through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and steadily shifted out to get clear running, made up good ground inside final 200 M to miss the 2nd placegetter by a narrow margin.
Tardy start and ridden along to take outright lead on rail from the 1200 M mark through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but was headed near the 100 M and weakened thereafter.
Hard ridden in the early stages to be box-seated behind leader. Under pressure to hold position turning for home. Found nothing in straight and dropped out inside final 200 M.
Tardy start and pushed along to lead narrowly in the early stages. Near the 1300 M eased back to race 1/2L off pace and hung out at home turn. No extra in straight and steadily faded from 250 M.
Ridden along to race in forward position out wide in the early stages. From the 1400 M steadily dropped back to race in rear section 3 wide to straight. Made no impression in straight.
A neck down in 2nd and 2-wide at 1000 M, led at top of home straight until 300 M out when headed by winner, faded steadily.
Awkwardly away, raced freely when 7Ls or 8Ls off pace towards rear down back straight, about 6Ls down in rear off home turn, no impression.
3-wide but with cover towards rear about 8Ls off pace down back straight, 4-wide without cover at 600 M, 6-wide (widest of all) off home turn when 6Ls down, always well outpaced.
5Ls behind the pace in 7th when 2-wide at 900 M, about 4Ls down in 6th off home turn, lacked any acceleration.
3-wide but with cover down the back when 6Ls off pace in 9th, 5-wide turning for home when 4Ls down, held every chance when 1L down in 2nd 250 M out, no extra, faded final 100 M.
Dropped out about 8Ls or 9Ls last along backstretch, 4-wide and about 6Ls last off home turn, made some moderate late headway past some beaten rivals.
2Ls off pace and well-placed in 4th through to home straight, caught in a pocket off home turn until the 300 M, about 2.5Ls down in 5th at 200 M, bumped under pressure closing stages.
On fence about 6Ls off pace in midfield down back straight, 3Ls or 4Ls down on fence when held up from top of home straight to the 200 M, found nothing much once in the clear.
Raced keenly when 3-wide without cover half a length off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, hung out at 700 M, 4-wide into home straight when weakening under pressure, faded out.
Settled worse than midfield about 7Ls off pace down back straight, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls off speed, stayed on well to take 2nd in final strides.
Soon led on fence, a neck clear at 1000 M, headed at top of home straight, faded out.
2-wide 2Ls behind leader in 5th at 1000 M, 3-wide at 600 M, 2.5Ls down in 5th and 3-wide off home turn, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, ran on well but tight for room closing stages.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, travelled strongly 3Ls off lead in 5th at 700 M, picked up well off home turn to lead 300 M out, 1L clear at 200 M, driven out.
Slow start, raced greenly, 2-wide about 6Ls or 7Ls off speed down the back, switched inside off home turn when 5Ls down in 10th, never troubled leaders but did make up some late ground.
Led by less than a length's advantage until home straight. Swamped inside final 250 M.

Raced in last place before being asked to improve after 900 M. Continued to improve rounding home turn from a wide position to be among the leaders on straightening. Ran on well in the straight to claim a minor placing.
Raced on fence and 3Ls behind leaders. Closed to within 2Ls at 400 M but was unable to follow through shortly after straightening.

Jumped awkwardly and raced behind midfield early stages. Made up ground from a 4-wide position rounding home turn to be among leaders on straightening. Stayed in contention before fading out closing stages.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Responded nicely when pressured on straightening to take the lead at 200 M. Held advantage to line.
Led on fence early. Raced slightly behind the pace in the back straight. Continued to be among leaders on straightening but weakened thereafter.

Dropped back to race in a rearward position. Improved from a 4-wide position rounding home turn and closed to within 2Ls of the lead on straightening. Continued well in the straight but was unable to catch winner.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Niggled forward to be closer to pace after 800 M and was among leaders on straightening. Led briefly in the early part of the straight before being headed final 200 M.
On fence behind midfield. Drifted back after 800 M and was in last place entering home straight. Made up some late ground.
Settled on fence at midfield. Niggled to maintain spot at 800 M. Towards rear but only 4Ls down entering home straight. Late rally after shifting into clear run and was closest at finish.
Always prominent, about 1L down in 4th at 400 M marker, hung in under pressure, winner was too strong inside the final 200 M.
2Ls off pace in 2nd until 400 M out, led at 300 M, hung right under pressure but ran on strongly, very smart debut.
2Ls 3rd down centre of track early on, all out at 400 M when just 1L 4th, weakened rapidly.
Between 3Ls and 5Ls off pace in midfield until the 400 M marker, failed to keep up with the main players.
About 10Ls last early on, always well behind.
Between 6Ls and 8Ls off the speed until 400 M out, weakened again.
About 6Ls off pace and worse than midfield until the 400 M, lay in late under pressure, never threatened.
4Ls down in 5th at 800 M, under pressure to hold this spot 600 M out, weakened markedly through final 300 M.
Under pressure 700 M out when 6Ls down towards rear, never a factor.
Broke well and soon led on stand's rail, about 1L clear until the 400 M marker, headed about 300 M, no extra but hung on to 3rd place fairly easily.
Managed to stay within 3Ls or 4Ls of pace in about 5th place until 400 M out, outpaced thereafter and hung in late under pressure.
Within 3Ls or 4Ls of the speed in midfield until 400 M out, switched towards far rail 350 M out to challenge, never able to challenge principals.
About 5Ls off pace in 8th through to 400 M pole, one-paced thereafter.
One from rear about 8Ls off pace through to the 200 M marker, made minor late headway past some tired rivals.
Bumped at the start, 2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 8th at 900 M, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls down in midfield, one-paced.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 9th at 900 M, ridden along to take closer order when 5Ls down in midfield entering home straight, kept on at same pace only.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 800 M and at top of home straight, faded steadily.
Led 1100 M out, 1L clear on fence at 900 M, 1L clear off home turn, 2Ls up at 200 M, kept on strongly.
Worse than midfield about 7Ls or 8Ls off the pace down the back, niggled along at 600 M to hold position, beaten shortly after straightening.
Troublesome at gates, awkwardly away, raced freely when 5Ls off the speed and 2-wide in 7th at 1000 M, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls off the speed, no impression thereafter.
Held up about 8Ls off pace in rear down back straight, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 8Ls off the speed, finished off at the same pace down the centre of the track.
5Ls off pace on fence in 6th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 6th off home turn, kept on quite well to nick a share of money close home.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, hung out entering straight when 3-wide and 2Ls off speed in 3rd, lost ground rapidly.

On fence 3Ls off the speed in 5th at 1100 M, 2-wide and 4Ls down in 5th into straight, switched out wider to challenge 350 M out, still 3Ls down at the 200 M, kept on well but little hope with winner.
Briefly 3-wide without cover down back straight, 6Ls off pace and 2-wide at 900 M in 11th, turned for home out 5-wide, finished off well down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Disputed lead early, raced freely when settled 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 900 M, 2-wide and 2Ls down in 4th off final bend, 1L down in 3rd at 300 M, no extra and lost a place close home.
Bumped at the start, about 9Ls off pace in rear down back straight, 7Ls behind off home turn, made little impression.
Raced keenly when about 8Ls or 9Ls off pace and one from rear down back straight, 5-wide into home straight when 7Ls down in rear, made up a little late ground past beaten rivals.
Towards rear till running on closing stages to claim 3rd near finish.
Always at the back.
Never on terms.
Never in the hunt.
Soon outpaced and was worse than midfield into straight. Could make no impression on leaders.
Soon led and made running before headed and faded approaching 200 M.
Well there before dropping out of contention from the 300 M.
Among rear group into straight where he stayed on a bit.
Well there into straight where he was steadied 250 M. Kept on close home.
