Midfield into straight where he cruised to lead 150 M to win cleverly.
About 6th approaching home turn. Improved to lead 200 M out but found winner too strong.
Was prominent before finding no extra final 250 M.
Mostly midfield to straight. Found one-paced under pressure.
5th halfway and remained there to straight. Improved to be close up 200 M out but did not sustain effort final 150 M.
Better than midfield. Gave some ground from 1000 M to be behind midfield far side. Stayed on final 200 M.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Was last to final turn. Found not much room when trying to improve early straight. Ran on a bit when in clear 150 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent. Advanced to 2nd passing 1200 M. Faded out of contention 200 M out.
Slowly away, towards rear. Slightly hampered near 600 M. Made up some ground inside 250 M.
Ridden under pressure early from a wide draw. Maintained 3rd before weakened soon after straightening. Always wide.
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily in straight for a minor placing closing stages.
Prominent. Gave some ground to 3Ls 5th from 1000 M. Only one-paced in straight.
Led field and with 2Ls advantage final turn. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Made some progress to 6th passing the Rock. 4-wide turning in. Ran on to gain slender advantage 200 M. Just held on.
In touch on inside and was 2Ls 4th far side. Made ground final turn to be 2nd inside 200 M. Just failed to catch the winner. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Always struggling in last few.
Wide in midfield. Towards rear into straight. Made up some late ground.
Forward of midfield to 400 M then weakened under pressure.
Never in the hunt.
Always well there on rails. Hit front turning in and went clear under pressure final 200 M.
Held slender lead 2 or 3-wide. Just headed turning in. Kept on for 3rd.
Midfield to straight. Made modest headway without threatening.
Always prominent. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight without quickening.
Close up. Lost touch into straight.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Well there. Lost touch rounding home bend.
Crossed to the fence and caused interference near 1400 M. Mainly 8th before advancing to 5th soon after straightening. Made ground steadily to take 2nd final 100 M.
Midfield or slightly better. Crept closer to 4th final turn. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Mainly 9th to final turn. Made minor progress when under pressure in straight.
4th early. Gave a little ground to 6th far side. Widest turning in. No improvement.
Midfield from widest draw. Moved up from 1200 M to be 3rd 1000 M. Dropped back steadily from 400 M.
Always there. Ran on from 4th 400 M out to take command 200 M. Won unchallenged.
Mainly 10th to 300 M. Made up good ground when under pressure in straight.
Led field to 1100 M. Remained 2nd until fading out of contention final 200 M.
Midfield. Weakened 200 M out.
Near rear. Checked near 1400 M. Remained 2nd last until making up some ground inside 200 M.
Well there, gained lead approaching 1000 M. Held on until finding no extra when headed 200 M.
Last. Checked at winning post first time. Never in contention.
Led early, then settled just off the pace from 1400 M. Regained advantage rounding home bend but headed shortly after straightening.
Never better than midfield.
Always in last few.
Settled around midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend and hit front 200 M out. Hung on under pressure to the line.
Well there. Took up running about 1400 M out. Headed approaching home bend. No extra in straight.
Never nearer.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield to straight. Made modest progress without threatening.
Towards rear. Fought on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back to straight. Shifted in for a run over 200 M out and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Broke well and settled in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Always prominent. Fought on under pressure in straight to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Never far off. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.

Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in forward position 3-wide. At the 800 M took up running and steadily crossed to the fence with 1L advantage to straight. Kicked away from the rest in straight to win comfortably.

On jumping sat back and lost significant amount of ground to race at the tail. Made up some ground from the outside going up the Rock. No extra in straight and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.
Began awkwardly and unable to muster early speed to race in rear section on rail through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line.
Soon settled in a rearward position 2-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and stayed on same pace to the line.
Ridden along to race in midfield 2-wide. Near the 700 M was slightly hampered and rounding the home turn hung out. Unable to make any impression in straight.

Broke fairly but unable to muster early speed to race in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 250 M out but just failed to match speed with 2nd and 3rd placegetters in the final stages.

Tardy start and ridden along to race in worse than midfield 2-wide. Under pressure at the 400 M mark and switched to the outside. Kept on fairly in straight but became one-paced over the concluding stages.
Best out and ridden along to the lead on rail. Near the 600 M lost its rightful running and took hold. Only able to run on evenly in straight and slightly weaken over the concluding stages.

Jumped well and pushed along to race in better than midfield on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Responded well when asked 250 M out but just failed to overhaul the 2nd placegetter.

Jumped fairly from widest and soon eased to rear section closer to the rail. Switched to the widest from last on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 250 M and made up good ground 200 M to be closest at finish.

Broke well and raced in a prominent position 2-wide. Near the 700 M struck interference but soon recovered lost ground. Ran on well when asked 250 M out to fend off late lunge from 3rd placegetter to hold onto 2nd place.

Raced in midfield. 3-wide in the early stages. From the 800 M steadily edged forward from the outside to be in prominent position on straightening. Kept on one-paced in straight and further weakened in the final stages.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, pressed on steadily to be 1L 2nd and 2-wide turning for home, found nothing under pressure.
Knuckled at the start, always prominent but 3-wide without cover within 2Ls of the speed until 500 M out, weakening under strong pressure entering straight, faded out badly.
Had a nice run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd through to home straight, a neck 3rd and with every chance at 200 M, no extra concluding stages.
Always in midfield about 4Ls off pace through to home straight, stayed on fairly along the fence but never really threatened.
Awkwardly away, on fence 5Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, still 5Ls down in 10th turning for home, held up on fence at 250 M, kept on fairly, nearest at the finish.
3-wide but with cover 4Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, caught 4-wide without cover when 3Ls down in 5th, hung out on circle and 6-wide into home straight and 4Ls down, very one-paced on run-in.
5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th at 1200 M and 800 M, 4Ls down and 3-wide on straightening, ran on strongly, wasn't far away.
Awkwardly away, 7Ls behind leader and 2-wide in 10th at 1200 M, 3-wide but with cover at 900 M, 4-wide and 4Ls down in 8th entering home straight, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide and about 3Ls off pace in 5th from 1200 M to 500 M out, 4-wide into home straight, led 200 M out, ran on well for pressure.
Awkwardly away, 8Ls off pace and 2-wide in rear at 1200 M, 5Ls or 6Ls last through to home turn when 5-wide, ran on very strongly down centre of track.
Raced keenly throughout, led on fence by 1L at 1200 M, still 1L to the good off home turn, found nothing under pressure.
Broke well and was ridden along to be in a forward position but 3-wide. Kept close to the leader before fading out final 250 M.
Raced in a rearward position until straightening. Made no improvement in the straight.
Niggled along on fence behind midfield. Remained 6Ls behind the lead from 400 M onwards and made up some ground in the final 100 M.
Raced near the back. Hampered near 800 M and continued to race in that position into home straight. Found nothing thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and raced wide behind midfield. Got on the back of another runner and fell further behind after 800 M. Near the rear into home straight and made no impression thereafter.
Raced in a prominent position just behind the pace. Continued well after straightening but unable draw closer to winner in the closing stages.
Jumped fairly and was ridden to take an early lead. Maintained about a length's advantage entering home straight and stayed on well in the closing stages to hold that advantage to line.
Slowly away and raced at the rear throughout the race.
Pushed along to follow leaders closely early stages. On fence and 3Ls down at 400 M. Kept on steadily in the straight and lost 3rd place final strides.
Raced at midfield. Near the 800 M was dragged down by another runner and was eased out of the race.
Urged to race close to leaders early stages. 2Ls behind the leader at 400 M. Continued well in the straight despite hanging in and proving difficult to ride.
Jumped well and niggled along at midfield early stages. 5 to 6Ls behind the pace at 400 M. Made steady ground in the straight to grab a minor placing.
Prominent. 2Ls 2nd 400 M. No match with the winner 200 M out.
Towards rear. Recovered a little ground 300 M. Soon found no extra.
Prominent. Gave some ground to 4th course proper. Weakened steadily.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Dropped back steadily from halfway.
Made all. Won going away.
In touch. Improved to 3rd 600 M. Kept on.
Began awkwardly, never a factor.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Recovered ground steadily to the 4th halfway. One-paced 200 M.
Remained in similar position throughout.
Made running to 400 M then soon weakened.
Well back into straight. Ran on steadily down centre of track.
Towards rear and wide. Ridden around home bend. Made up some ground down centre of straight.
Well there. Disputed lead into straight then gradually faded under pressure final 200 M.
Well there to straight then weakened.
Well there to home bend then gradually weakened. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Settled in forward of midfield. Commenced move approaching home turn. Obtained clear passage about 250 M out and soon asserted authority.
Towards rear. Did not find much room early in straight. Ran on stoutly between runners to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. On rails turning in. Baulked for a run early in straight before making up late ground final 200 M.
Around midfield. Steadied inside 300 M, then switched out and ran on final stages.
Held up in rear. Kept on same pace in straight.
Not far off to home bend then dropped out under pressure.
Wide towards rear. Effort into straight and sustained steady progress until no extra final 100 M.
Settled in midfield. Moved up to the lead turning in. Lost advantage when swamped inside final 100 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on from 7th early straight to take 3rd close home.
Tracked leader before taking over 300 M. Kept on to hold off runner-up's challenges closing stages.
Never a factor.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Jumped well and led briefly early. Raced 3rd from 850 M. Kept on until one-paced inside 200 M.
Always there. 2-1/2Ls 4th final turn. Ran on quite well 200 M out but failed to catch the winner.
Checked soon after start, towards rear. Recovered some ground inside 250 M.
Mainly 5th and within 5Ls behind lead to straight. Kept on same pace throughout.
Slowly away, towards rear. Widest turning in. Made ground under pressure final 250 M.
Rear of midfield. Failed to quicken 200 M out.
Pushed along from widest draw, taking lead soon after start. Headed 300 M and weakened further closing stages.
Began awkwardly, always at the back.
Raced keenly in midfield early. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Wide in midfield early. Made steady headway coming out of back straight to hit front turning for home. Went 2Ls clear shortly after straightening but overhauled nearing finish.
Towards rear. Went very wide into straight. Ran on under pressure to grab 2nd late.
Soon took up running and led till headed about 300 M out.
Settled behind leaders. Had nowhere to go when leading pair weakened and was baulked the length of straight.
Never on terms.
Settled towards rear. Not much room early in straight. Obtained split inside 200 M. Produced good late impression.
Settled at the back. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening and ran on well to snatch victory final strides.
Prominent to straight. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Improved to dispute lead into straight then gradually weakened.
Mostly in midfield to straight then one-paced.
Began awkwardly then never in contention.
Midfield most of way. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Ridden along to race in rearward position 2 to 3 wide. Switched wide turning for home and was inconvenienced prior to straightening. Made up steady ground in home straight to be nearest at finish.

Jumped fairly from wide draw but unable to muster early speed to be at the tail closer to rail through to straight. Took a while to click into gear when asked 400 M out, made up little ground inside final 200 M.
Began awkwardly and pushed along to race in midfield or worse 2 wide through to straight. Kept on fairly to the line when asked 350 M out.
Soon settled in a rearward position 2 to 3 wide. Switched to the widest turning for home. Unable to make any impression in straight.

Jumped fairly and steadily settled in worse than midfield 3 wide. Switched wide at home turn and became unbalanced prior to straightening. Kept on evenly in straight and slightly weakened in the final stages.

Broke fairly and raced in better than midfield 2 wide whilst proving difficult to settle in the early to middle stages. Switched out on straightening to find clear running. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M.
Began fairly from widest and ridden along to race in a forward position 3 wide without cover. Commenced to give ground prior to straightening and tailed out in straight.

Best out and steadily eased to race 1-1/2Ls to 2Ls off pace 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Responded fairly when asked 350 M out but failed to match speed with the 1st pair in the final stages.

Began fairly and soon raced 1-1/2Ls off leader on rail. Edged closer to the leader prior to straightening. Responded well when asked 350 M out and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.

Broke well and pushed along to take lead on rail from the 900 M with around 1/2L advantage. Rounding the home turn steadily moved away from the rail. Kept on one-pace in straight and slightly weakened in the closing stages.
Tardy start and niggled along to race 1/2L off leader 2 wide through to straight. Ran on well when asked 350 M out but was unable to find an extra gear to overhaul the winner.
Broke well and soon eased to worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.
2-wide and 3Ls behind lead in 5th from 1200 M to home straight, picked up well for pressure to be 1L down in 3rd 200 M out, gamely kept finding more, got up close home.
Keen early on, had the run of the race 2Ls off pace on fence in 4th from 1200 M to home straight, always looked held by leading players thereafter.
Reared as gates opened and broke slowly, on fence 9Ls off pace and one from rear at 1000 M, 7Ls down in rear off home turn when held up, clear 250 M out, made a little late ground.
4Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 7th at 800 M, 5Ls down in midfield off home turn, steadied and switched inside 200 M out when over 2Ls down in 6th, ran on strongly, just failed.
9Ls off pace and 2-wide in rear at 1000 M, under pressure 500 M out when 7Ls down, 4-wide into home straight, finished off at same pace widest of all down centre of track.
5Ls off pace in 8th and 3-wide at the 1200 M and same off the final turn, hung out badly under pressure and beaten over 200 M out.
Awkwardly away, 7Ls off pace and 2-wide in 12th at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover and 6Ls behind in 12th at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight, no impression.
Tended to hang out throughout, 7Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 11th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 9th at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight, one-paced on the run-in.
About 6Ls off pace in 10th on fence from 1200 M to home straight, staying on when still about 4Ls down at 200 M, ran on well late, nearest at the finish.
5Ls off pace in 9th and 2-wide at 1200 M, under strong pressure 600 M out to lie up, 3-wide into straight when 6Ls down in 11th, weakened.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, half a length down in 2nd off home turn, led 250 M out, grabbed by quinella pair very late on.
4-wide without cover and 4Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover and 3Ls down in 6th at 800 M and into home straight, weakened rapidly.
Caught 3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1100 M out to home straight, failed to quicken up with principals.
Soon led on fence, never more than 1L clear through to home straight, headed 250 M out, no extra.
Jumped well and travelled comfortably with a length's lead until being asked inside final 400 M. Cruised away from others over the concluding stages.
Slowly away and trail field. Only ran past a weakening runner.
Niggled to keep racing within 2Ls of the lead early stages. Improved to within a length at 400 M and was ridden hard to challenge leader. Unable to draw any closer in the final stages.
Raced just behind the leader until 400 M. Unable to match winner's acceleration over the concluding stages.
Settled near the back before being asked near 400 M. Was checked to avoid heels at 200 M whilst closing the race off. Made up some late ground.
Raced about a length off the lead. Became unbalanced and dipped at 400 M and weakened thereafter.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily in the closing stages.
Raced behind midfield. Kept on fairly in the concluding stages.
Jumped awkwardly and was urged forward to tag along the leader. Kept close to the lead before fading out of contention final 200 M.
Settled at midfield. Pressured at 450 M but was only one-paced over the concluding stages.
3-wide but with cover 7Ls off pace in 10th at 1400 M, 5Ls down in 9th at 800 M, 5-wide into home straight when 3Ls behind, 1L down and with every chance at 200 M, ran on well.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide when 8Ls off the pace at 1400 M, 5Ls down at 800 M, 4Ls down and 3-wide into home straight towards rear, didn't quicken up.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 1L through to home straight, headed about 200 M out, kept on well for pressure, narrowly missed out.
4Ls down and 2-wide in 6th at 1400 M, 3-wide with cover and 4Ls down in 6th at 800 M, ridden along 600 M out, 4-wide into home straight, every chance 300 M out, no extra closing stages.
Fractious in gates and slowly away, 10Ls off pace in last at 1400 M, niggled along to make good headway on fence to be 4Ls down in 12th off home turn, ran on steadily, nearest at the finish.
9Ls off pace and 2-wide in 12th at 1400 M, 7Ls down at 800 M, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, hindered about 250 M out, ran on very strongly once clear, just failed.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1400 M to 800 M, 3-wide and 1L down in 3rd off home straight, all out and still 1L down at 200 M, outpaced from thereon.
Bumped at start, raced freely in places but had run of the race on fence in 3rd or 4th about 2Ls off pace from 1600 M to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
On fence 7Ls off speed in 9th at 1400 M, 5Ls down at 800 M, 3Ls off pace in midfield entering straight when a bit short of room, could only stay on at same pace once in the clear.

Keen with head up in rear 1600 M out, 9Ls last and 2-wide at 800 M, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 5Ls last, ran on fairly well, nearest at the finish. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Between half a length and a length off pace in 2nd out 2-wide from 1400 M to home straight, led 200 M out, all out, hung on gamely.
Raced 3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1400 M to homestretch, every chance at 300 M but faded quickly inside final 200 M.
Slowly away, 4Ls behind in 7th on fence at 1400 M and 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in 6th, held up from 300 M to 200 M and again 50 M out, never fully extended on run-in.
9Ls off pace on fence in 11th at 1400 M, about 7Ls behind at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, still well behind when squeezed for room at 300 M, no impression.
Keen in places, had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until home turn, still about 2Ls down when short of running room at 200 M, no extra through closing stages.
On fence 9Ls off pace and one from rear at 1000 M, bumped out 6-wide (widest of all) on straightening when 6Ls behind towards rear, no impression.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, over 4Ls behind in midfield and under pressure taking final bend, one-paced thereafter.
3-wide and 6Ls behind leader in 8th at 1000 M, no better off when 5-wide turning for home, 4Ls down in 6th at 200 M, kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
4Ls behind and briefly without cover in midfield early on, 3-wide with cover and 3Ls 6th at 800 M and same into home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Soon led on fence, no more than 1L clear through to home turn, headed about 200 M out, still kept on well for pressure.
Pressed on to track leader out 2-wide down the backstretch, 1L down in 2nd entering straight, led 200 M out, stayed on well.
Bumped at the start, on fence 6Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, 3-wide and 4Ls down in 7th off home turn, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, kept on finding but post came too soon.
In rear about 10Ls off pace and 2-wide down back straight, under pressure when 5-wide into straight and 8Ls last, made up a nice bit of ground late down centre of the track.
Raced 3-wide without cover about 2.5Ls off pace in 3rd down the back and through to home straight, didn't pick up and beaten 300 M out.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th when checked at 1000 M, 3-wide with cover and 4Ls behind in 9th at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 7th at 1000 M, under pressure to lie up at 600 M, weakening off home turn, well beaten over 300 M out.
Awkwardly away, in 11th place on fence 8Ls off the speed at 1000 M, one from rear and still about 7Ls behind entering straight, no kind of threat.
4Ls off speed when 2-wide in 6th at 1000 M, about 2.5Ls down in 5th off home turn, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, stayed on well.
Prominent to straight where he held some chance 250 M. Found one-paced under pressure.
In similar place most of way. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Made most. Unable to hold winner near finish.
Always thereabouts. Plugged on under pressure.
In rear to straight. Ran on a bit at the finish.
Among rear group turning for home. Came under pressure 250 M but hung in badly, racing very awkwardly to line.
Worse than midfield to straight. Unable to make any impression on leaders.
5th into straight where he ran on resolutely to lead close home.
6th rounding home bend. Came under pressure 200 M and kept on.
Made no show.
Was last home bend before making up some ground close home.
In touch to straight where he faded steadily inside final 200 M.
Never on terms.
Never troubled leaders.
Ridden early and crossed to the front at 1000 M. Held 2Ls advantage after final turn. Kept on but failed to contain the winner close home.
Prominent briefly early, then raced in the rear group. Ran past a few beaten horses from last early straight.
Jumped well and led briefly early. Remained prominent and was 2Ls 2nd final turn. Kept on but found no extra inside 150 M.
Towards rear from widest draw and gradually shifted to the inside. Crept closer to 6th turning in, then one-paced.
Mainly 4th or 5th to straight. Soon weakened.
Never better than midfield. Widest turning in. One-paced.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Soon recovered ground to be in midfield. Steady progress rounding home bend. Ran on from 3rd early straight to snatch victory final strides.
Pushed along early to be prominent. Dropped out of contention 400 M out.
Clipped heels soon after start, towards rear. Steady progress from 600 M. Held up when found no clear run home turn. Ran on in straight.
Slowly away and was steadied. Remained at rear to final turn. Made ground steadily to obtain a minor placing at finish.
Around midfield. Dropped back steadily from 500 M.
Towards rear. Kept on a bit final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Gained some ground turning for home. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Very sluggish at start. Trailed field to straight. Ran past some beaten horses.
Raced wide in prominent position. Weakened over 400 M out.
Prominent to 450 M then weakened.
Disputed lead far side. Came under pressure rounding home bend. Dropped out into straight.
Made all to win easily.
Never better than midfield.
Ridden along in rear far side. Hampered on rails over 200 M out, then ran home one-paced. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Never far off to straight but failed to quicken to threaten.
Badly checked at start. Remained well back to straight. Made up some late ground.
Slowly away, towards rear. Widest turning in. Made up a little ground early straight.
In touch. 3rd from 1000 M. Held on until weakening out of contention approaching 200 M.
Towards rear on inside. Made minor progress from 800 M to reach 6th 200 M. No extra.
Towards rear. Minor progress inside 200 M.
Tardy start, soon recovered ground to be around midfield. Held similar position until running on well in straight to just miss narrowly.
Well there, took lead from 1200 M. Kept on when headed inside 200 M.
Better than midfield. Rider lost stirrup iron from 1400 M to 1300 M. Kept on steadily and was 4th 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Settled behind midfield. Towards rear far side. Made up some ground when under pressure in straight.
Led field to 1200 M. Remained 2nd to final turn. Faded.
Never a factor.
Midfield or behind. Dropped back steadily from 800 M. Wide throughout. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
3-wide 3rd soon after start, raced 4th in the back straight. Responded well from 400 M, gaining slender advantage passing 200 M. Just held off runner-up's late challenge.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Ridden for lead and remained in front till 200 M. Kept on for 2nd.
Wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Never seen with a chance.
Always thereabouts. Failed to quicken to challenge in straight.
Never a factor.
Held up in rear of midfield. Switched out for a run upon straightening then ran on steadily to the line.
Towards rear. Behind runners early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mostly in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Prominent to straight then gradually faded.
Settled in last few. Not much room behind runners early in straight. Produced good late impression final strides.
Tracked leader to 200 M. Dashed home to win comfortably.
Soon settled in midfield on rail through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 250 M out.
Raced in a rearward position 2 to 3-wide. Commenced to give ground at the 800 M and tailed out in straight.
Began fairly and raced in better than midfield 2-wide. Switched to the widest on straightening to get clear running. Only able to run on evenly in home straight.
Soon settled in worse than midfield on fence. Switched out and made little headway at home turn. Responded very well when clear running was obtained 150 M out to snatch win on the line.

Began well and soon settled 2Ls off leader on rail through to straight. Short for room in early part of straight. Ran on well when clear 200 M out but was overhauled by the winner on the line. (Finished distressed.)
Tardy start from widest and soon raced in rearward position 2-wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running but failed to make any impression in straight.
Soon raced in a rearward position on rail. Around the 800 M shifted out and went forward to race out the leader. Kept on fairly when asked 250 M out but became one-paced over the closing stages.
Soon settled at the tail of the field on rail. Ridden along to hold position turning for home. Made no impression in straight.

Broke fairly and pushed along to take up running on rail. From the 600 M ridden along to hold the lead. Kept on fairly when asked 250 M out but unable to match speed with the placegetters in the final stages.
Jumped fairly and raced in better than midfield on rail. Switched out on straight to obtain clear running. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
Raced in mid-division out wide in the early stages. Near the 1600 M crept forward to race around 1-1/2 to 2Ls off pace 2-wide. Commenced to give ground at the 500 M and steadily faded in straight.
Jumped fairly and soon settled in midfield 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M but just failed to run down the 1st pair.
Led on fence, never clear by much more than 1L until stretch, headed about 150 M out, attempted to savage KONRAD THE GREAT as he passed 50 M out, eased down.
Caught 3-wide without cover and 4Ls off pace at 1200 M, 3Ls off pace at 600 M and 4-wide and 4Ls down in 5th off home turn, ran on quite well despite the tough trip.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 10th 1100 M out, 6Ls down in 10th at 800 M and entering straight, staying on well when switched inside 200 M out when 4Ls down in 7th, stayed on strongly.
Always 2-wide and about 3Ls off pace in 4th until straightening for home, stayed on at the same pace.
Never a factor, never better than 8Ls off the speed at any stage.
Settled 2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 9th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 9th at 800 M and into home straight, held up for a run until 150 M out, ran on.
Raced freely when 2-wide and 4Ls behind leader in 6th from 1200 M to home straight, too one-paced and always held on the run-in.
2-wide and about 1L off pace in 2nd from 1200 M to home straight, every chance at 300 M, no extra and weakened rapidly.
Awkwardly away, on fence 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace in midfield from 1200 M to home turn, 3Ls down in 5th at the 200 M, no extra.
8Ls behind and 3-wide with cover at 1100 M when 7Ls off the pace, 5Ls off the speed at 800 M, turned for home 5-wide (widest of all) when still 5Ls down, stayed on well, nearest at finish.
9Ls off pace in rear and 2-wide at 1200 M, 8Ls down in 11th and 3-wide off final bend, ran on fairly well down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls or 3Ls in 3rd until home turn, picked up fairly well to lead 150 M out, driven out.
Began awkwardly and was hard ridden to keep position on fence near midfield. Remained in same position until straightening. Ran on without threatening.
Raced 2-wide and kept within 2Ls of the pace. Improved to race alongside the leader rounding home turn. Every chance 200 M but unable to find extra to challenge in the concluding stages.
Slowly away and trail field until home straight. Made up some late ground.
2-wide in front of midfield early. Shuffled back after 1400 M and raced on fence in rear section. Dropped further 600 M out and nearly trail field on straightening. Found nothing in the straight.

Jumped well and raced behind the early leader. Improved into the lead 1200 M out. Maintained a length's advantage into home straight. Stayed on well but was unable to match strides with winner in the closing stages.
Jumped slow and was difficult to settle early. Raced in a rearward position after being checked near 1500 M. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Led briefly before taking a sit behind the leader 1200 M out. Continued to follow leader closely in the back straight. Ran on nicely on straightening and took command final 200 M.

2-wide and just behind midfield. Very difficult to settle early stages and was steadied near 1500 M. Improved position after 800 M and closed to within 5Ls of the pace 400 M. Unable to find more in the straight.
Settled on fence and 2 to 3Ls behind the pace until straightening. Ran on steadily in similar position in the home straight.
Began well and was eased back to race 3-wide in a rearward position. Continued to race wide and without cover behind midfield until straightening. Couldn't find extra thereafter.
Settled 3-wide near the back. Not much response when asked to improve rounding home turn and was one paced to line.

3-wide at midfield in the early stages. Improved to be 2-wide in the back straight and steadily crept to within 2Ls of the leader at 600 M. Continued well in the straight but unable to draw closer to the 1st pair.
Led field to 250 M out. Found no extra.
Last to halfway. Only managed to run past a few beaten horses.
Near rear throughout.
Prominent. Kept on well to take 2nd 200 M. No match with speed of winner.
Never in contention.
Better than midfield. Kept on 400 M until one-paced closing stages.
Around midfield throughout.
Made no show.
Slightly better than midfield. Failed to quicken inside 200 M.
Never better than midfield. Weakened closing stages.
Rider unbalanced and lost iron momentarily when the horse began awkwardly. Towards rear until recovering some ground to midfield halfway. Ran on well inside 200 M to just miss 2nd.
Towards rear throughout.
Tracked leader before taking over at 250 M out. Won going away.
In touch to 400 M. Found no extra.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Remained well back to straight. Never nearer.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran on down straight to assert authority close to post.
Led till joined into straight, then gradually weakened. (Bled.)
Raced freely in midfield. Dropped out upon straightening.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Well back. Ran on well final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Prominent briefly, soon dropped back to midfield. One-paced in straight.
Tracked leader. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M but soon overhauled.
Always thereabouts. Fought on dourly under pressure in straight without threatening.
Settled behind leaders. Baulked for a run early in straight. Finished off race well final 200 M.
Restrained behind midfield. Produced good late impression in straight.
Forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Never seen with a chance.
Slowly away, last to 1200 M out. Crept closer order final turn. Continued to make ground in straight while steadied for a run closing stages.
Led briefly from a wide draw, soon raced in 6th. Ridden along to regain advantage passing 1200 M. Held on until headed near 100 M. No extra.
Never a factor.
Midfield or slightly better. Checked for a run 250 M while weakening.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit towards the rear 1300 M. Switched to 5-wide early straight. Ran on well to assert authority closing stages.
Behind midfield on outside. Dropped to the rear group 1000 M out. Wide throughout.
Tardy start, towards rear. Made some minor progress final 200 M.
Towards rear early, soon recovered ground to be just behind midfield. No further improvement in straight.
In touch early. Dropped back steadily to midfield or behind halfway. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear. Moved up passing 1400 M to reach 2nd 800 M out. Dropped back steadily from 500 M. (Finished distressed.)
Settled 12th from widest draw. Moved up steadily from 1100 M to tackle the leader 600 M. Failed to hold place while hanging in in straight.
In touch on inside. 3Ls 6th final turn. Ran on under pressure inside 200 M.
Held 2nd to 1200 M. Gave ground steadily to be 5th rounding home bend. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Led field from 1400 M until passing 1200 M. Held 3rd or 4th to straight. Responded well 200 M out, taking brief advantage near 100 M. Soon beaten.
Settled behind leaders. Did not find much room early in straight. Made up some late ground final 200 M.
Midfield early. A bit tightened early in straight. Finished off race well.
Led far side, then settled just off the pace. Regained slender advantage turning in. Fought on doggedly down straight but pipped at post.
Raced keenly in prominent position. Came to challenge shortly after straightening to just get up on line.
Forward midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Never seen with a chance.
Very sluggish at start. Picked up quickly to rear of midfield before home bend. Ran on steadily in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses down centre of straight.
Never in contention.
Forward of midfield to straight, then gradually faded.
Settled 3-wide in midfield. Kept on same pace before producing good late impression closing stages.
Moved up between runners to take up running coming out of back straight. Led until weakening under pressure passing 400 M.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Jumped fairly and pushed along to race in midfield or worse on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Only able to run on evenly in straight.
Slow to begin and raced in a rearward position on rail through to straight. Unable to make any impression when asked 400 M out.
Best out and led briefly, soon eased to race 1-1/2 to 2Ls off pace 2 wide through to straight. All out 350 M out and kept on fairly but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.
Tardy start and pushed along to race in midfield 3 wide. Near the 1000 M was shuffled back to worse than midfield. Hung out badly at home turn and tailed out in straight.
Awkwardly away and soon crowded for room. Raced in a rearward position 3 wide, on straightening switched wide to find clear running. All out 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M.
Broke well and hard ridden to race in better than midfield on fence through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out without quickening and steadily faded inside final 250 M.
Began fairly and raced in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Kept on fairly in straight without threatening.

Slowly away and niggled along to race in worse than midfield out wide without cover. Near the 800 M was crowded for room and carried wider. Made no impression in straight. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)

Began well and pushed along to take lead on rail with around 1/2L advantage through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M but was unable to fend off challenges from the 1st pair to be overhauled in the final stages.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and ridden along to race in better han midfield out wide in the early stages. Near the 850 M moved up to race outside the leader to straight. Ran on well inside 200 M to fend off late charge from 2nd.
Broke well but was soon outpaced to race in midfield or worse towards the outside. Near the 800 M was crowded for room and carried wider. Only able to run on evenly to the line.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and pushed along to race in better than midfield 3 wide through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 350 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly but was unable to muster early speed to race in a rearward position 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and made up good ground inside final 250 M to miss the winner by a narrow margin.

Unable to muster early speed to race in worse than midfield 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to find clear running. Obtained clear running near the 300 M and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
3Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M when 3-wide without cover, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in midfield, dropped out rapidly.
3-wide early but got in 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 6th at 900 M, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th entering straight, stayed on stoutly but was never likely to catch quinella pair.
Bumped at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover and 5Ls off pace in 10th at 800 M, a little closer turning for home, ran on best of those from the chasing pack.
Fractious in the gates, flatfooted at the jump and lost 3Ls, one from rear and 3-wide with cover about 7Ls off pace at 800 M, 4-wide into straight, weak effort thereafter.
Switched inside towards rail exiting wide gate, about 8Ls last down back straight, about 6Ls behind off home turn, never dangerous.
On fence about 5Ls off the speed in 8th down the back straight, 4Ls off pace in midfield into straight when steadied, staying on fairly when hampered 200 M out, didn't recover.
Raced freely early and pressed on to lead at 1000 M, got to fence 1L clear at 900 M, 2Ls clear off home turn and travelling well, quickened well, stylishly.
On fence 3Ls off the speed in 4th or 5th from 900 M to home straight when under pressure, one-paced on the run-in.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 900 M, 2Ls off pace and disputing 2nd at top of home straight, had little hope with the winner but comfortably hung onto 2nd place.
Slowly away, about 7Ls off pace in 12th down the backstretch, about 6Ls down in 10th off home turn, no impression.
Led early on fence but headed by winner at 1000 M, threw head up when crossed at the 900 M, disputed 2nd 2Ls off pace turning for home when under pressure, faded out.
Always 4 and 5-wide without cover about 4Ls off pace in midfield down backstretch, worse than midfield and 5Ls down and 4-wide off home turn, soon struggling.
Squeezed at start, 4-wide with cover at 900 M when about 4Ls off pace in midfield, 3-wide and 4Ls down off home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Worse than midfield and 2-wide and niggled along when about 6Ls off pace at 800 M, no better off on straightening, faded.
Led briefly in the early stages before settling behind the pace after the 1400 M. 3Ls behind the leader on straightening and kept on same pace to line.
Raced near the back. Remained in same position heading into home straight and only ran past a weakening runner.
Raced 3-wide without cover behind midfield until home straight. Unable to pick up pace in the straight.
Began well from a wide draw and raced 2-wide just behind the pace. Still within 2Ls of leader 400 M out but weakened rapidly over final 250 M.
Raced near the fence at midfield. Continued well on straightening and ran on strongly over the final 200 M.
Settled 2-wide at midfield until being pressured just before straightening. Quickened well and improved steadily to take command final 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled on fence behind midfield until straightening. Responded well when pressured and closed the race off nicely.

Jumped awkwardly and then was taken back to race close to the rail in rear section. Remained near the back and about 10Ls down 400 M out. Rallied late but unable to get clear path final 50 M and couldn't be ridden out to the line.
Raced 2 to 3Ls behind the lead but proved very difficult to settle in the early stages. Stayed on well in the early part of the straight but unable to keep on concluding stages.
Raced on fence and kept within 3Ls behind the leader. Picked up well when asked 300 M and took a brief lead near 150 M. Unable to find extra to hold off placegetters closing stages.
Moved into the lead after 1400 M and held a 2Ls advantage going into home straight. Headed final 150 M but stayed on gamely for a minor placing.
Jumped well from widest draw and was taken back to race at the rear. Switched out on straightening and staged a good rally down the home stretch to be closest at finish.
3-wide in rear section. Improved slightly from a wide position rounding home turn. One-paced in the straight.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 3rd at 1600 M, about 2.5Ls 4th at 800 M and 2-wide, 2Ls down in 3rd entering straight, disputing lead at 300 M, half a length clear at 200 M, pulled further clear.
Fractious in gates, 4-wide without cover when 9Ls off pace in 12th at 1400 M, pressed on 3Ls down in 6th but still without cover at 800 M, hard ridden when 5-wide into stretch, dropped out.
10Ls off pace and 2-wide in 11th at 1400 M, 5Ls off pace in rear at the 800 M and same on straightening, ran on strongly late on to be nearest at the finish.
2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 8th at 1400 M, about 4Ls down in mid-division at 800 M, loomed a threat off the home turn and was 2Ls down at the 200 M, stayed on well for a place.
Had cover when 3-wide and 9Ls off pace in 8th at 1400 M, worse than midfield and 4Ls behind leader from 800 M to home straight, never likely to run the quinella but still ran on nicely.
Keen when caught 3-wide without cover and 8Ls off pace in 6th at the 1400 M, pressed on 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide from 1200 M to home turn, all out to vie for lead 300 M out, faded fast.
6Ls off pace on fence in 4th at 1400 M, 4Ls behind in midfield at 800 M, briefly held up entering straight when 3Ls 5th, about 1.5Ls down in 2nd at 150 M out, winner was too strong.
8Ls off pace in 7th at 1400 M, about 5Ls down in 9th or so at 800 M and on straightening, failed to quicken up and beaten over 200 M out.

Slowly away, 12Ls last at the 1400 M, 3-wide with cover and 5Ls off pace in rear at 800 M, 6Ls last and 7-wide (widest of all) on the swing, a little headway to be 4Ls down in 10th at the 200 M, no extra.
Pressed on to lead, went about 4Ls clear 1600 M, 1L clear from 1200 M to home straight when all out, headed 300 M out, faded steadily.
Slowest away, tended to over-race on fence through first half of race, 9Ls down in 10th 1400 M out, 5Ls down in 12th at 800 M and much the same off home turn, kept on only at the same pace.
Switched inside exiting wide gate, 10Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover in 13th at 1400 M, 4Ls down in midfield at 800 M, outpaced when 6-wide into home straight, never much of a threat.
7Ls off pace and 2-wide in 5th at 1400 M, 4-wide without cover 3Ls down in 4th at 600 M, 2Ls 4th entering straight, every chance 300 M out, all out when 1L down at 200 M, no extra, faded.
3Ls off pace on fence in 2nd at 1600 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at 1200 M and at 800 M, under pressure to lie up turning for home, weakened.
One from rear 8Ls off pace and 2-wide in 12th at the 1000 M, 4-wide without cover at 600 M, bumped out 5-wide into straight when 5Ls last, ran on strongly, wasn't far away at the finish.
9Ls off the speed in rear at 1000 M, 7Ls down at the 800 M, over 4Ls down in rear off home turn, ran on strongly once in the clear 300 M out when 3Ls down, narrowly missed.
2Ls off pace on fence in 2nd at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 5th at 800 M and roughly the same into home straight, soon outpaced and beaten 200 M out.
Checked at 1400 M but had run of the race on fence about 2Ls off pace in 4th through to home straight, still fairly prominent 300 M out but swamped inside final 200 M.
Crossed to lead by 2Ls on fence 1300 M out, 1L clear at 800 M and disputing lead at top of home straight, stayed on very gamely in straight to fend off a host of pursuers, won on bob of heads.
Unbalanced on fence at 1400 M, 4Ls down in 7th at 1200 M and at 800 M, under pressure to hold this spot entering straight, stayed on at the same pace.
2-wide 6Ls off the speed in 10th at 1100 M, 3-wide with cover and 5Ls down at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls 7th, picked up very well, briefly led 50 M out, lost on bob of heads.
2-wide and 5Ls behind lead in 9th at 1200 M, 2-wide and 5Ls down in 10th, 4Ls off pace and 4-wide into stretch, a neck down at the 200 M with every chance, kept on, just failed.
Awkwardly away, on fence 7Ls off pace in 11th at 1100 M, 5Ls down at 800 M and the same entering stretch when 10th, ran on well along fence to be nearest at the finish.
Caught 4-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, got in 2-wide and 1L off pace 2nd at 900 M, disputing lead entering straight and at 200 M, weakened close home.
2-wide and 5Ls off the speed in 6th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 8th at 800 M and entering straight, stayed on dourly but at the one pace.
3-wide with cover and 3Ls off pace in 5th at the 1200 M, left without cover at 900 M when 2Ls down in 4th, half a length down in 4th entering straight, no acceleration and beaten over 200 M out.
3-wide with cover in 8th at 1200 M when 4Ls off pace, 3Ls down in midfield at 800 M and about 2Ls down when 3-wide into home straight, stayed on well but was outpaced closing stages.
Towards rear of main group turning for home. Stayed on well despite not having a clear passage most of straight.
Pulled hard in 5th 1000 M and was 3rd on straightening. Ran on to lead 200 M, only to be caught final stride.
Well there before failing to hold place early in straight.
Never in contention.
Ridden to be in touch early and was well there before fading steadily under pressure approaching 200 M.
Improved from midfield home bend and continued to make steady headway on straightening to line.
Never on terms.
Towards rear till making up some ground in straight.
Never better than mid-division.
Took clear lead passing 1200 M. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
2nd last into straight where he ran on strongly closing stages to snatch race on post.
Prominent to straight where he kept on same pace inside final 200 M.
Midfield into straight where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
Behind midfield halfway and similar position into straight. Stayed on quite well close home despite not reaching first 2.
Midfield. Made no show in straight.
Last to straight. Recovered some late ground closing stages.
Well there. Led field from 1400 M to 1100 M out. Remained prominent until fading out of contention passing 500 M.
Towards rear soon after start. 5-wide on straightening and only made some minor progress.
Well there. 2nd from 850 M. Kept on until failing to hold place final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up steady ground in straight.
In touch. Advanced to 3rd final turn. Weakened inside 250 M.
Prominent on inside. Took lead 1100 M out. Held 2Ls advantage on straightening. Never threatened.
Slowly away, behind midfield. Crept closer to 6th final turn. Kept on well but without threatening.
Well there. Gave a little ground near 900 M to be 4th or 5th. Kept on similar position thereafter.
Began awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Lost ground at start, rear. Recovered ground gradually from outside to be midfield turning in. Ran on until one-paced close home.
Led briefly early. Dropped back steadily to home bend. Failed to quicken in straight.
Dropped to the 2nd last near 1100 M. Late headway inside 200 M.
Ridden to forward of midfield early. Did not find much room early in straight. Produced late impression closing stages.
Never in contention.
Always in last few.
Well back. Kept on well in straight. No clear run final stages.
Never on terms.
Settled in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Not far off to straight then ran home one-paced.
Settled in midfield. Shuffled back rounding home bend. Made up good ground from towards rear into straight.
Prominent to straight. Swamped final 200 M.
Prominent to straight. Not much room after straightening. Found nothing under pressure final 200 M.
Wide behind midfield. Kept on same pace down centre of straight.
Ridden and soon took up running and led until headed about 200 M out. Fought on under pressure for 2nd place.
Wide in midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Gradually faded under pressure in straight.
Broke well and soon settled behind leader. Came to challenge under pressure early in straight and gained upper hand final 200 M.
Midfield or behind. Steadied rounding home bend, became 8th turning in. Recovered good ground in straight, just missed the 3rd.
Towards rear from widest draw. Always wide.
Well there from a wide draw. Raced 5th in 3-wide before improving to 3rd final turn. Kept on without threatening.
Soon led. Headed on straightening. Kept 2nd until weakening out of contention inside 200 M.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit 600 M out. Failed to respond when given reminders early straight.
Soon 2nd last. Made up some ground final 300 M.
Slowly away, last early. Remained in 10th to final turn. Ran on a bit from outside until one-paced closing stages.
Well there. Sat outside leader near 900 M. Took lead on straightening. Won convincingly.
Towards rear. Progressed to midfield 600 M. Made no show in straight.
Jumped well but soon dropped to the rear.
Towards rear. Recovered ground steadily to soon be in midfield. Kept on but failed to quicken final 200 M.
Midfield early, soon improved to 3rd or 4th on inside. Kept on to hold a minor placing narrowly at finish.
Settled in rear. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear most of way.
Settled in midfield. Quickened into straight to take charge shortly afterwards. Just held on under pressure.
Led to halfway. Checked on rails coming out of back straight. Dropped further back turning in.
Raced keenly disputing lead most of way to 300 M. Weakened.
Never a factor.
Prominent early. Caught behind fading runner on rails far side eventually checked approaching home bend. One-paced in straight.
Held narrow advantage around home bend and into straight. Kept on steadily for placing.
Missed the break badly. Tailed off into straight. Ran past beaten horses.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily down centre of straight.
Settled wide in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Always well there. Ran on steadily down straight to miss narrowly.
Around midfield to straight then weakened.
Settled in midfield. Fought on steadily down straight without threatening.

Began well and soon settled in midfield on rail. Near the 1200 M was shuffled back to worse than midfield. Switched to 5-wide on straightening, came under pressure at 250 M and made up good ground but just failed to run down the winner.
Began fairly and raced in midfield on rail through to straight. No extra in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Tardy start and raced in worse than midfield 2-wide through to straight. Only kept on one-paced in straight and ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Hard ridden to race in a forward position on rail. Commenced to give ground around the 450 M mark and tailed out in straight.
Soon outpaced at the tail of the field on rail through to straight. Unable to make any impression in straight.
Began well and pushed along to take up running on rail with around 1-1/2 to 2Ls advantage through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out to win convincingly.
Tardy start from wide draw and was soon eased to mid-division 3-wide with cover. Ridden along at home bend and made little headway. All out 400 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.
Broke well and ridden along to race in a forward position 2-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
Pushed along to race in better than midfield around 2-wide. Hard ridden to maintain position at home bend. Only able to keep on some pace in the straight.
Awkwardly away and was soon steadied away from heels. Soon recovered to race in midfield 2-wide to straight. Hung in in straight and found nothing inside final 200 M.
Began well from wide draw and soon eased to a rearward position 2-wide. Made little headway from the outside turning for home. Kept on evenly to the line when asked 350 M.

Jumped awkwardly but soon recovered to race in better than midfield 2-wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Unable to go up a gear when asked 350 M and stayed one-paced to the line.

Began awkwardly from widest and was steadily eased to a rearward position closer to the rail. Switched to the widest to obtain running on straightening. Made up little ground inside final 200 M when asked 350 M out.

Jumped well from wide draw and pushed along to race in a forward position 3-wide without cover through to straight. All out 350 M out and kept on fairly but was unable to match speed with the 1st pair to settle for 3rd place.
4Ls off the lead and 4-wide without cover down back straight in 9th place, gained cover about 600 M out but 5-wide into straight when 5Ls down in 11th place, no impression.
5Ls off the lead in 11th when 2-wide 800 M out, 3Ls down and 3-wide off home turn in 10th place, just over 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M and with definite place prospects, didn't follow through.
2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls off speed in midfield through to home straight, 3Ls down and short of room 200 M out, ran on well for a place once in the clear through final 150 M.
Slowly away, race 3-wide without cover 2Ls off pace in 4th at 800 M, hung out on circle and 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 3Ls down in 7th and under pressure to keep up, faded.
2-wide and about 2Ls off the speed in 5th or 6th until 600 M out, still close up but 3-wide into stretch, briefly held up for a run 350 M out, could only stay on at the same pace once in the clear.
Raced in 2nd pace 2-wide and 1L off pace until 500 M out, weakened steadily.
4Ls off pace and 3-wide but with cover at the 800 M in 10th, advanced on circle and turned for home 4-wide and 2Ls down in 5th, picked up well to lead at 200 M, driven out.
Pressed on to lead on fence by 1L at the 800 M, under pressure to hold advantage entering straight, headed 300 M out, weakened right out rapidly.
Awkwardly away, 3Ls or 4Ls off pace on fence in midfield through to home straight, held for a run at the 200 M and switched out wider into the clear, very one-paced.
3-wide but with cover when 3Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M, pressed on to dispute lead out 3-wide entering straight, briefly led 300 M out, headed 200 M out, kept on fairly for 2nd place.
Led early on but headed 1000 M but and settled on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 800 M, travelled well off home turn but blocked for a run until being checked about 200 M out, didn't recover.
Stumbled at start and already detached in last and 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, well detached and very, very wide into home straight, never a factor.
Settled on fence at midfield. Responded only fairly on straightening and weakened over the concluding stages.

Raced 2-wide at midfield. Improved gradually rounding home turn and reached within a length of the leader at 400 M. Ran on strongly to take the lead final 100 M. Held off a late challenger final strides.
Began awkwardly and raced near the back until straightening. Switched out and staged a late rally to be closest at finish.

Ridden hard from the gate to race in a disputed lead. Held a slight advantage on straightening and kept lead until final 200 M. Continued well thereafter despite hanging in and proving difficult to ride.
Raced near the back and was last to enter home straight. Only ran past a weakening runner in the straight.
Began fairly and was urged to race in a disputed lead. Continued to be on the pace before fading steadily final 400 M.
Slowly away and was urged forward to race behind midfield. Ran on steadily in the straight and made up some ground in the closing stages despite having difficult finding clear run.
Raced wide and without cover behind midfield. Widest making home turn and improved to within a length of the lead on straightening. Weakened final 300 M.

Began well from wide draw and was eased back to race in rear section. Improved rounding home turn in widest position and closed to within 3Ls of the pace at 400 M. Continued to close the race off strongly and just missed catching winner.

Among leaders early before settling 2 to 3Ls behind the pace after 1400 M. Moved up gradually after 1000 M to be just behind the leader on straightening. Clipped heels and nearly fell at 400 M. Never recovered thereafter.

In midfield and raced 6Ls off the pace in the early stages. Made up ground steadily after 800 M and raced with the leaders at 400 M. Remained among leaders final 150 M but unable to keep effort to line.
Jumped awkwardly and raced 2-wide in rear section. Remained in similar position and was 4Ls behind the pace at 400 M. Checked at 300 M whilst closing the race off and was one-paced to line.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. 3-wide turning in and improved to within a length of the lead at 400 M. Remained in contention before fading out final 200 M.
Niggled along to race on fence behind midfield. Responded well on straightening and closed the race off well despite encountering traffic in the straight.
Towards rear from widest draw. Never a factor.
Slightly behind midfield. One-paced.
Well there. 1L behind lead early straight. Never able to match with the winner.
Mainly 4th before taking 3rd on straightening. Lost the minor placing when one-paced closing stages.
Slightly behind midfield early. Dropped to the rear group 900 M out. No progress.
Led briefly early, soon raced behind the first pair. Lost 3rd 400 M. Kept on to regain the minor placing closing stages.
Began awkwardly, last early. Recovered ground steadily to be 8th rounding home bend. Made up further ground 300 M but unable quicken to challenge inside 200 M.
Better than midfield. Mainly 4Ls behind lead in 5th but found no extra 250 M out.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Last 500 M out. Only ran past three beaten horses early straight.
Midfield to 300 M. Weakened.
Led field soon after start. Won unchallenged.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Soon recovered some ground to be midfield or slightly better. Found no extra closing stages.
Settled at the back. Commenced run upon straightening and ran on well to assert authority final stages.
Forward of midfield to straight. No extra final 200 M.
Tracked leaders. Quickened to challenge upon straightening and hit front briefly inside 200 M but outsprinted close to home.
Mostly in forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Well back to straight. Ran past beaten horses final 200 M.
Wide in midfield far side. Remained same into home straight then soon weakened.
Chased leader to straight then weakened.
Towards rear. Did not find much room early in straight. Made up some late ground final 200 M.
Never better than midfield and wide throughout. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Well back. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Always at the back.
Midfield to straight. Faded under pressure.
Held clear advantage to straight but unable to sustain effort and overhauled inside final 200 M.
Towards rear early. Soon ridden along to be better than midfield rounding home bend. Weakened soon after straightening.
In touch. 3rd briefly early straight. Faded passing 300 M.
In touch, ridden along to be 2nd from 1000 M. Kept on until one-paced and lost a minor placing close home.
Ridden from the widest draw and showed good early speed. Crossed to the fence and took the lead early stages. Won readily.
Towards rear. Recovered good ground on outside inside final 300 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made some minor progress 800 M. Made no show in straight.
Slow into stride, soon last. Made up good ground in straight, never nearer.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on a bit final 250 M.
Slowly away, never in contention.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Recovered ground to midfield from 900 M. Kept on early straight to be 4th briefly 250 M. Soon found no extra.
Led briefly early. 2Ls 4th rounding home bend. Kept on in straight to grab 2nd close home.
Jumped OK, dropped gradually to the rear group. Recovered good ground on inside in straight to pick up a minor placing near finish.
Prominent briefly, soon behind midfield. Steadied several times in straight. Found no clear run and was not ridden out close home.
Well back. Behind runners turning in. Made no impression in straight.
In rear to straight. Made modest headway without threatening.
Led far side. Behind leaders turning in. Faded under pressure in straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Forward of midfield to straight. Weakened.
Always in last few.
Settled behind leaders. Quickened well to hit front inside final 200 M but caught near finish.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Took up running coming out of back straight. Led until headed passing 200 M.
Midfield to home bend. Dropped away quickly.
Midfield to straight. Made modest progress without threatening.
Prominent briefly far side. Dropped out into home straight.
Never better than midfield.
Settled on rails in midfield. Took some time to shift out for a run early in straight and finished off race well to assert authority final strides.
Soon raced in better than midfield on rail for major part of the race hung out. Hard ridden to maintain position at home turn. Unable to make any impression in straight.

Slow to begin and ridden along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. Dropped back to midfield down back straight and had trouble to hold position at home bend. Tailed out in straight. (Mild throat inflammation.)
Began awkwardly and soon recovered to race in midfield 2 wide. Around the 700 M switched out and pushed along to go forward. Ran on fairly in straight but became one pace over the concluding stages.
Pushed along to race in a forward position 2 wide. Under pressure to hold position turning for home. No extra in straight and steadily faded inside final 250 M.
Began well and pushed along to take lead on rail. Around the 800 M was headed and near the 600 M commenced to give ground. Faded quickly in straight.
Slowly away and raced at back on rail. Made little headway at home bend. Only able to run on evenly to the line.

On jumping knuckled and soon recovered to race in midfield or worse out wide without cover. Commenced to give ground quickly from the 700 M and tailed out in straight. (Lost left front plate and luceration to left hind.)

On jumping was crowded for room and raced in midfield around 3 wide. At the 1000 M went forward to race in a prominent position 3 wide to straight. Only ran on evenly in straight and slightly weakened in the closing stages.

Bumped on jumping out and soon settled in midfield on rail. Steadily switched out and made headway turning for home. Responded well when asked 350 M out and pulled away from the rest inside final 200 M to win comfortably.
Broke fairly and pushed along to race in a forward position in the early stages. Dropped to midfield when making the stable bend, gave ground quickly down back straight and was soon eased down.

Broke fairly and raced in worse than midfield 2 wide. Pushed along to make little headway at home turn and switched out on straightening to obtain running. Made up steady ground inside 250 M to grab 3rd near the line.

On jumping was crowded for room and raced in the rear section 2 wide. Ridden along and switched to the widest at home turn. Only kept on same pace in straight and ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Best out from widest and ridden along to race in a forward position 3 wide. Near the 1200 M moved up to share lead and took charge on rail after the 800 M. Kept on well in straight but was unable to match speed with the winner.
Was crowded for room shortly after the jump and raced in a rearward position 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
Slowly away, towards rear when 2-wide and about 5Ls off the speed down the back, still 5Ls down when 4-wide into home straight, no impression.
About 6Ls off pace in rear through to home straight, never got any closer.
Towards rear when 3-wide with cover about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace down back straight, 6Ls last and 4-wide into straight, made some good late headway to steal a place on the line.
Led at 1000 M and clear by 1L on fencre at 800 M, half a length clear off home turn and 1L to the good at 200 M, pulled further clear.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 900 M, 3Ls down in 5th at home turn when 3-wide, dropped out very quickly.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed and slightly worse than midfield when 2-wide until home straight, very weak thereafter. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Led on fence early on, headed 1000 M out and steadied when 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, a neck down with every chance 300 M out, no chance with winner, hung on for 2nd okay.
Awkwardly away, on fence about 5Ls off pace towards rear down the back, briefly short of room at top of straight, ran on fairly well along fence late on.
Slowest away but moved up nicely on rail to be 3Ls off pace in 5th at 900 M, under pressure to be 2Ls down in 4th on the swing, faded steadily.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 900 M, 4-wide into straight when still 2Ls down in 3rd, one-paced thereafter.
3-wide with cover about 4Ls behind the lead down the backstretch, under strong pressure to take closer order at 600 M, still 4Ls down entering straight, weakened.
Keen early on, 4-wide but with cover when 5Ls off pace in 12th at 800 M, 6-wide (widest of all) into straight when 4Ls off pace in midfield, staying on well when just over 2Ls 3rd at 200 M, no extra.
On fence in midfield about 4Ls behind leader until turning for home, kept on at the same pace.
Had a tough trip and often without cover, 3Ls off pace and 4-wide at 800 M, 5-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in 6th, all out to hold this margin at 200 M, weakened final furlong.

Kept 2Ls behind the lead before being checked near 1200 M. Shuffled back to race near midfield after being crowded early in back straight. Carried back 600 M and fell further behind. Made no impression in the straight.
In last place shortly after start and trailed field until 400 M. Responded well when pressured and made up good ground in the straight.

Ridden hard to be among leaders early. Steadied and shifted in to race behind the pacesetter at 1200 M. Carried back when runner in front weakened at 600 M. Didn't pick up pace when pressured on straightening.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield. Urged to stay on 800 M out and was ridden to stay on rounding home. Found nothing in the straight.

Led briefly before settling 3-wide without cover ahead of midfield. Improved steadily after 1000 M to be alongside leader at 400 M. Continued well in the straight despite hanging in badly. (Finished 1st, placed 3rd.)
Ridden hard early to take the lead. Struggled to maintain lead from 800 M, weakened thereafter and finished tailed out.
2-wide at midfield. Urged to improve 600 M out but stayed on similar pace to line.

Midfield early and improved to race within 3Ls of the pace in back straight. Gained steady ground in the straight and was locked in a 3-way battle before being severely checked in the final 100 M. (Finished 3rd, placed 2nd.)

Ridden to midfield shortly after start but drifted back after being held wide first turn. Remained in rear section until home straight and was taken wide on straightening. Found nothing in the thereafter.
Slowly away and was niggled to race on fence at midfield. Drifted back slightly after 800 M and was 8Ls down at 400 M. Closed the race off well and was closest at finish.
Settled on fence near the rear early and middle stages. Ridden from 500 M out and made up steady ground in the straight.

Held 3-wide behind midfield before being asked to improve after 800 M. Made ground from a 4-wide position rounding home turn and reached within 3Ls of leader 400 M. Unable to draw any closer and faded final 200 M.
Ridden to race alongside the lead in the back straight and took over the lead 800 M. Led field into home straight. Stayed on but was interfered with inside final 100 M. (Finished 2nd, placed 1st.)
Settled in a rearward position. Ridden to improve 600 M out and improved rounding home turn. Broke down near 400 M.
5Ls off pace and 3-wide but with cover in 8th at the 1000 M, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls off pace in 8th, faded out steadily.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1000 M out to home straight, about 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, found quinella pair too strong but hung for a place well.
3Ls off pace on fence at 1000 M in 5th, 3Ls down in 7th off home turn, definite place at 200 M when just over 2Ls down in 4th, one-paced late on.
Slowly away, 8Ls off pace down the backstretch in 12th, about 5Ls down in 12th off home turn, very one-paced and never posed much of a threat.
Prominent but 2 and 3-wide without cover down the back, a neck 2nd out 2-wide at 800 M and 1L down on straightening when with every chance, soon faded out.
Fractious in gates, 3-wide without cover 3Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, pressed on 3-wide into home straight when 1L down in 3rd, weakening when 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, faded further.
Checked at the start, 5Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 9th off home turn when 3-wide, stayed on fairly well out wide but never troubled principals.
4Ls off pace and 2-wide in 7th at 1000 M, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls off pace, picked up well to be a neck 2nd at 200 M, kept on well, narrowly failed.
Always under pressure and either last or last but one, never closer than 8Ls off pace at any point.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 11th and under pressure off home turn when 4-wide, very one-paced thereafter.
10Ls off pace in rear down the back straight, one from rear and 7Ls off speed on straightening, no impression.
2-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls behind leader in 5th down back straight and on the circle, always outpaced from thereon.
Soon led, 1L clear on fence at 1000 M, a neck clear at 800 M and 1L to the good off home turn, a neck clear at 200 M, all out to hang on, gamely.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace down the back when 3-wide but with cover, caught 5-wide without cover at 600 M and 5-wide (widest of all) into straight when 5Ls down in 10th, no extra.
Pulled hard in 6th 1100 M and in mid-division turning for home. Soon lost ground on leaders.
About 9th halfway and similar place into straight. Stayed on a bit closing stages.
Midfield before home turn and unable to hold place 250 M.
Towards rear swinging into straight where he ran on strongly to just fail to get up on line.
Never on terms.
Worse than midfield approaching home turn. Plugged on final 250 M.
4th or 5th rounding home bend. Made no show on straightening.
Never far off before losing ground closing stages.
Towards rear when pulled up early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there early and was at the back coming into straight. Kept on steadily to take 3rd close home.
Prominent into straight where he faded rapidly.
Narrow leader to 1000 M and was 2nd early in straight. Unable quicken to challenge, dropping out final 200 M.
Always prominent. Took charge before 1000 M and was 2L clear 200 M. Just held on to win by the narrowest margin.
About midfield into home bend. Kept on steadily in straight till outpaced close home.
Midfield or slightly better. Kept on quite well final 200 M.
Led briefly early. Regained advantage from 900 M. Faded when headed early straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Checked soon after start, was last to final turn. Made up good ground in straight but was crowded and failed to ride out inside 100 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped back steadily approaching 900 M.
Midfield to 200 M. Weakened.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Behind midfield. Gave ground steadily far side to be 2nd last final turn. Made up some ground on outside when whipped in straight.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit 300 M but found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear early, soon recovered ground to be in touch. Was 2Ls 4th 400 M, then kept on similar pace to the line.
Took lead approaching 1200 M until 900 M. Held 2nd before regaining advantage early straight. Kept on well but failed to contain winner close home.
Always in touch. Found no extra closing stages.
Midfield early, soon moved up to be 3rd. No more than 2Ls behind leader into straight. Kept on well but failed quicken to challenge closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear. Ran on well from 12th early straight to take command close home.
Led field to 200 M then gradually weakened.
Around midfield into straight. No extra.
Soon dropped to rear. Made no impression in straight.
Raced mainly in rear of midfield despite hampered on rails home bend. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Sluggish at start. Never seen with a chance.
Wide in forward of midfield to straight. No extra closing stages.
Niggled along to hold close-up position far side. Settled just off the pace rounding home bend. Renewed effort upon straightening but unable to peg back winner throughout.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Never far off. Lost position on rails behind leader rounding home bend. Ran on to assert authority about 200 M out. Held on well.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Made no impression in straight. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Always in last few. (Bled.)
Midfield just some 3Ls off pace turning in. Kept on steadily in straight making some late impression final few strides.
Pushed along from outside draw to take lead near 1000 M. Held on but was headed when one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Lacked early speed and was near rear on inside. Made up good ground under vigorous ride inside 300 M.
Towards rear early, soon recovered ground to be prominent. Raced 6th on inside passing 1000 M. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Widest (6-wide) final turn. Ran on well from 8th early straight to assert authority final 100 M.
Soon midfield. Made no show in straight.
Well there. Lost place when failed to quicken inside 200 M.
Slowly away, last to 200 M. Ran on well on outside to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Towards rear. Made up a little ground from 300 M.
In touch. 4-wide turning into straight. Soon weakened.
Midfield. Dropped to the 9th when steadied near 800 M. Made ground on inside early straight but failed to ride out closing stages.
Led briefly soon after start, then raced 5th to final turn. Responded well to take brief advantage 100 M out. Failed to match speed with winner close home.
Slightly behind midfield. Made ground rounding home bend to be 5-wide 5th final turn. Ran on under pressure in straight.
Led briefly early, then remained prominent to final turn. Soon faded.
Around midfield. Came to challenge under pressure shortly after straightening. Gained upper hand about 100 M out.
Midfield to straight, then gradually faded.
Midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Always struggling at the back.
Wide in prominent position to straight, then soon weakened.
Ridden along from widest draw to take up running on rails 400 M after start. Led field until headed over 300 M out, then one-paced.
Tracked leader. Hit front shortly after straightening but unable to sustain effort and worn down final 100 M.
Rear to straight. Widest turning in. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Did not find much room early straight. Obtained split about 200 M out and made up some late ground.
Towards rear. Awkwardly placed early in straight. Made up some late ground final 200 M.
Niggled along in prominent position early. Dropped out shortly after straightening.
Just worse than midfield to straight. Kept on at the one pace.
Midfield and wide to straight. Faded soon after straightening.
Niggled along to race midfield on rail through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out but failed to fend off late challenge from winner to be overhauled on the line.
