On jumping bounded in the air and soon recovered to race 1-1/2 to 2Ls off pace on rail through to straight. Took lead around the 300 M but was headed after the 200 M and failed to match speed with placegetters thereafter.

Jumped awkwardly and niggled along to dispute lead on rail. Took outright lead shortly after the 1200 M. Headed on straightening and failed to respond to pressure. Further weakened inside final 200 M.
Unable to muster early speed to race in a rearward position around 3 wide. Near the 1000 M dropped to the tail and switched to the widest in straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M.
Broke well and niggled along to race in a forward position 2 to 3 wide through to straight. No extra in straight and dropped out inside final 250 M.
Broke fairly and ridden along to race in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and show good turn of foot inside final 200 M to snatch victory in a ding-dong finish.
Unable to muster early speed to race in rear section on rail. Made up little ground rounding home bend. Unable to find an extra gear in straight and kept on evenly to the line.

Jumped awkwardly and ridden along to dispute lead in a 2 wide position. Near the 1200 M eased to race in 2nd place. Took lead on straightening but effort was short lived and steadily faded inside final 200 M. (Mucus.)
Began well from wide gate and pushed along to race in better than midfield 3 wide through to straight. Kept on evenly when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 150 M.

Began well from widest and steadily eased to the rear section wide without cover. Made slight headway at home turn. Ran on well when asked 300 M out, but hung out and proved difficult to ride to miss the placegetters narrowly.

On jumping was checked and raced in a rearward position around 3 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 400 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

On jumping was crowded for room and raced in the rear section 2 wide. Switched out on straightening and made up good ground when asked 350 M out. Near the 200 M steadied to avoid heels, just failed to catch the first pair.

Soon raced in midfield or worse 2 wide through to straight. Switched to the middle in home straight to find running asked 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Raced in a forward position out wide in the early stages. After the 1400 M eased back to midfield 3 wide to home straight. Did not see clear daylight in straight and only ran on evenly to the line.
Switched from wide gate to inside rail, 10Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M, 2-wide and 8Ls last at 800 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 7Ls down, made some minor late ground.
Pressed on to lead on fence by 1L from 1200 M to home turn, headed by impressive winner 150 M out, no worries hanging on for 2nd.
Awkwardly away losing a little ground, 6Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, 5Ls down and worse than midfield into home straight, ran on fairly well under pressure.
Slowly away, raced a bit freely when 4Ls off the speed in 6th at 1200 M, similarly placed off home turn, 3Ls down in 5th at 200 M, no extra.
8Ls off pace and 2-wide in 12th at 1200 M, 6Ls behind leader in 11th at 800 M and into home straight when 3-wide, soon beaten.
Ran around a bit racing keenly very early on, 2-wide and 1L off the pace in 2nd at 1200 M, almost disputing lead off home turn, weakened markedly through final 250 M.
5Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 8th at the 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield from 800 M to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
2Ls or 3Ls off the pace in 5th when 2-wide from 1200 M to homestretch, soon weakened.
Caught 3-wide without cover down back straight when about 2Ls off pace in 4th, same entering home straight, well outpaced by quinella pair and all out to hang on for 3rd.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd through to home straight, travelling strongly when switched off inner to challenge off home turn, eased to the front 150 M out, very comfortably.
4Ls off speed when 2-wide in 7th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 9th at 800 M when tending to hang out, 3-wide into home straight and towards rear, ran on again late past a few tired rivals.
7Ls off pace on fence in 11th at 1200 M, 7Ls last and 3-wide entering home straight, beaten when hanging out towards of centre track at 200 M, no impression.
4-wide without cover when 6Ls off the pace in 9th at 1200 M, a little closer but still wide at the 800 M and into home straight, very weak thereafter, finished detached.
Broke well from widest draw. Drifted back to midfield shortly after and raced wide and without cover until straightening. Made no impression in the straight.
Jumped well and settled within 3Ls of the pace early stages. Closed to within 2Ls of leader on straightening but weakened thereafter.
Slowly away and raced 3-wide behind midfield. Shifted further out before straightening and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Jumped fairly and was allowed to drift back to rear section. Continued to race near the back on straightening. Made up some ground in the closing stages.
Began fairly and drifted back steadily to the rear. Fell further behind the field after 800 M. Made no improvement in the straight.
Slowly away and raced behind midfield early. Drifted further back to rear section after 1000 M and was widest rounding home turn. Ran on well and made up ground in the straight.
Raced 2-wide and 3Ls behind the leader until straightening. Stayed on well until 200 M but couldn't find extra to challenge.
Jumped awkwardly and blundered. Settled 2-wide at midfield until being ridden to keep position at 800 M. Continued with same pace in the straight.
Led shortly after the start and kept a 2Ls advantage until straightening. Unable to hold onto its lead after 200 M and faded steadily thereafter.
Niggled along on fence at midfield until straightening. Closed the race off fairly and just missed out on a minor placing.
Raced 2Ls off the pace until straightening. Improved steadily after 400 M and moved past the leader final 200 M. Unable to hold off the winner inside final 100 M.
Settled 3 to 4Ls behind the pacesetter in the early and middle stages. Stayed on before weakening final 200 M.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Made up ground rounding home turn and reached within 4Ls of leader at 400 M. Picked up well once shifted into clear running and took control final 100 M.
Always outpaced on fence, managed to keep within 5Ls off the speed until 500 M out, faded right out.
About 4Ls behind leader at 800 M, lost position steadily from 500 M out, no chance from 400 M out.
2Ls off pace in 6th early on, 1L down in 3rd at 400 M out, all out but 2Ls down at 200 M, no hope with winner but hung on for 2nd okay.
Kept within 1L or 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until the 400 M when tending to hang in, weakened markedly final 200 M.
Comprehensively outpaced from the start.
About 4Ls off pace in midfield until 400 M out, outpaced by principals but stayed on well past remainder.
Away well and prominent early on, struggling from 400 M out when 2Ls off pace in 5th, drifted further back.
Away well and made all on fence, half a length clear until 400 M, 2Ls clear and travelling easily, pulled further ahead, very impressive.
Missed the start and lost about 4Ls as a result, never better than 8Ls off the speed at any stage.
Prominent on fence very early on, outpaced from 400 M out when 4Ls behind in 7th, faded further.
5Ls off pace at back of main bunch until the 400 M, one-paced through closing 200 M.
4Ls or 5Ls down in midfield or worse until the 400 M when hard ridden, lost more ground.
About 3Ls off pace in midfield until the 400 M when under pressure to quicken up, failed to do so sufficiently, well beaten.
Briefly disputed lead very early on, about half a length down in 2nd until the 400 M, passed for 2nd 300 M out, no extra.
Held up 9Ls off pace when 2-wide in 12th at the 1200 M, 4-wide turning for home when 5Ls down in 10th, kept on fairly, no threat to leaders.
Slowest away, 9Ls last at 1200 M on fence, 3-wide and 8Ls last into home straight, weakened further.
Raced 2 and 3-wide with cover down back straight when about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace in 10th or so, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight when about 4Ls off pace in midfield, ran on fairly well.
Over-raced on fence 6Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, checked both at 850 M and 700 M and 7Ls down and one from rear entering home straight, no impression.
About 3Ls behind leader when 2-wide in 3rd at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M and on straightening, outpaced through final 300 M.
On fence 4Ls off the speed in 4th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 5th at 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th off home turn, failed to quicken up and never likely to run down winner, narrowly missed 2nd place.
Settled 2-wide and 7Ls off the pace in 9th at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 11th off home turn, detached from then on.
Had cover when 3-wide about 6Ls from the front in 8th at the 1200 M, 3-wide into homestretch when a little over 3Ls down in midfield and at 200 M, outpaced thereafter.
Always caught without cover, 4-wide without cover 7Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, pressed on to be 5-wide into straight when 4Ls off speed in midfield, weakened rapidly, bled.
Always well placed on fence 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd down back straight and into home straight when momentarily held up for a run, clear 350 M out, led 250 M out, driven out, comfortably.
Over-raced a little when 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, 4Ls behind in midfield on fence entering straight, kept on quite well at same pace without bothering principals.
3-wide without cover when 4Ls off speed in 5th at 1200 M, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th when 3-wide off home turn, 2Ls down in 4th at the 200 M, no extra late on.
Led on fence at 1500 M, never much more than 1L clear through to home straight, headed by winner at 350 M, hung on gamely for 2nd.
Worse than midfield into straight where he ran on a bit.
Trailed field to straight. Never in contention.
Never on terms.
Midfield 600 M. Made some headway from 300 M and found no extra close home.
In touch to home turn where he could find no more.
Always at the back.
Was prominent before fading rapidly out of contention early in straight.
About 5th 1000 M and similar place turning into straight. Ridden 300 M and kept on till finding no extra close home.
About 6th rounding home bend. Ran on well closing stages to lead towards finish.
2nd into straight where he kept on same pace.
Jumped awkwardly and was towards rear coming into straight. Unable to get a clear run 300 M before staying on strongly near finish.
Took charge before 1000 M and led field till finding winner too strong near finish.
Soon in rear and remained there rounding home bend. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Worse than midfield approaching home turn. Came under pressure 300 M and ran on quite well close home.
Remained 3rd from a wide draw. Kept on until failing to hold place inside 250 M.
Lost ground at start, last throughout.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight. (Finished distressed.)
Led early. 2nd from 1000 M. Faded out of contention soon after straightening.
Held 4th to final turn. Attempted to tackle the winner when 2nd inside 300 M. However effort not sustained.
Slightly behind midfield. Hung out passing 800 M. Widest turning in. One-paced.
Soon joined the leader. Took clear advantage from 1000 M. Kept on to hold off challenges closing stages.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Soon recovered a little ground but still towards the rear. Improved to midfield final turn. Kept on.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Midfield on outside. Gave ground final turn. Stayed on closing stages.
Mainly 5th. Improved to 3rd when 4-wide turning into straight. Kept on without threatening.
Near rear. Hung in early straight while making up good ground. Stayed on while hanging out inside 200 M.
Towards rear. 2nd last early straight. Ran past a couple of tiring horses closing stages.
Midfield or slightly better. One-paced.
Forward of midfield. Not much room early in straight. Kept on steadily closing stages.
Midfield early. Dropped out of contention around home bend.
Slightly slow out. Remained in rear until making steady headway under pressure on the inner in home straight.
Prominent to straight, then weakened.
Rear. Made up good ground past beaten horses in straight.
Well back. No clear run early in straight. Made up some late ground.
Towards rear. Commenced run rounding home bend. Made good progress down centre of straight to take charge final 150 M.
Wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Broke well and settled just off the pace. Found nothing under reminders upon straightening.
Disputed lead rounding home bend. Hit front briefly 200 M out then soon swamped.
Midfield. Shifted out for a run early in straight and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Did not find much room.
Ridden to lead early. Then joined by runners coming out of back straight. Headed 200 M out and soon weakened.
3-wide in prominent position to straight, then weakened.
Tardy start, behind midfield. Steadied 800 M. Shifted to the outside to obtain clear run 400 M. Ran on.
Checked soon after start, towards rear throughout.
Began well and always in touch. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Slowly away, last from 400 M.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Midfield early, soon dropped to the rear group.
In touch. Weakened final 400 M.
Towards rear. Severely checked 400 M. Never recovered.
Towards rear. Short-lived effort passing 400 M. Soon found no extra.
Better than midfield. Kept on quite well 250 M, just missed a minor placing.
Midfield or better. Improved to 5th at course proper. Failed to quicken 200 M out.
Made all. Won easily.
Always 2nd. 1L behind the winner 200 M out. Failed to match speed closing stages.
Bounded in the air at start, mainly in the 3rd until finding no extra inside 100 M.
Broke well and led to straight, then gradually weakened.
Chased leader to straight then weakened.
Well back. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Steadied for a run 400 M out. Finished off race well.
Always in last few.
Trailed field to straight. Made up good late ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader to straight then gradually weakened.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well final 300 M to just fail to get up on line.
Never far off. Quickened to hit front over 300 M out. Hung on well to finish.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Never far off to straight. Kept on steadily to lose 3rd late.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Slightly slow into stride but soon picked up to forward of midfield. Dropped out under pressure soon after straightening.
Never better than midfield. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to worse than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Gained ground steadily in early to middle part of the straight and kicked away from the rest inside final 100 M to win convincingly.

On jumping bounded in air and raced towards the rear section 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 350 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and niggled along to race in midfield or better 3 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain running. Failed to quicken when asked 400 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Best out from widest and niggled along to take lead on rail with no more than 1-1/2Ls advantage through to straight. Kept on well when asked 350 M out but became one-pace inside final 150 M.

Began fairly but unable to muster early speed to race in midfield 2 wide. Took a while to click into gear in the 1st half of the straight but showed good turn of foot inside final 200 M to grab 2nd place near the line.
Tardy start from wide draw and soon eased to the rear 2 wide. Switched wide on straightening to find clear running but failed to make any impression in straight.
Soon settled in rearward position on rail through to straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish when asked 350 M out.
Slow to begin and ridden along to race in better than midfield on rail. At the 800 M commenced to lose ground steadily and tailed out in the straight.

Broke well and pushed along to be box-seated behind the leader through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M out but unable to match speed with 1st pair over the concluding stages to settle for 3rd.
Began fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and only able to run on evenly to the line.
Jumped fairly and hard ridden along to race in a forward position 2 wide through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but slightly weakened inside the final 100 M.
Hard ridden along in the early stages to race in midfield or worse around 3 wide. Switched to the widest on straightening to obtain clear running. Unable to make any impression in the straight.

Tardy start and ridden along to race in midfield or better towards the outside. Rounding the home turn ridden along to maintain position and hung out. Found nothing in straight and dropped out inside final 300 M.
Slowly away and then checked when crowded for room. Raced at back on rail through to straight. Failed to show any running in the straight.
4-wide without cover at 1800 M, sent on from 1400 M to be 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, 2Ls 2nd at 800 M and under pressure a neck 2nd off home turn, hung sharply right at 300 M, weakened.
5Ls behind leader and 2-wide in 7th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield and 3-wide off home turn, hampered at 300 M, always well held thereafter.
Ridden to lead early on, never more than 2Ls clear at any stage, under pressure off home turn and headed 300 M out, faded right out very quickly.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th down back straight, lost position on the circle soon with no chance.
Never a factor, always wide and in rear at least 9Ls off the speed, detached entering home straight, eased.
Awkwardly away, 7Ls behind leader and 2-wide in 11th at 1200 M, niggled along to make headway on circle to be 5-wide (widest of all) into stretch when 4Ls down in midfield, stayed on.
7Ls behind in 10th at 1200 M, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down still in about 10th place, never troubled principals.
6Ls off pace on fence in 8th at 1200 M, 5Ls behind and still quietly ridden off home turn, found nothing whatsoever off the bit.
Held up in rear early on, 9Ls off pace in 13th at 1200 M, 5Ls down but still one from rear at 400 M when switched out wider to challenge, ran on well but never looked like catching winner.
Settled 3Ls off pace when 2-wide in 5th at 1200 M, closer, 2Ls down in 4th entering home straight, still there when checked at 300 M, kept on only fairly final 200 M once balanced again.
Worse than midfield early on, left 3-wide without cover at 1200 M when 6Ls off pace in 9th, steady improvement to be 4-wide into home straight when 2Ls down, led 300 M out, ran on well.
Niggled early on, 4Ls off pace on fence in 6th at 1200 M, niggled again at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 5th turning for home, always much too one-paced.
2-wide and 2Ls off the speed in 3rd at 1200 M, niggled along when 3Ls down in 4th at 1000 M, under strong pressure entering stretch when 3Ls down in 5th, soon swamped.
Settled on fence 9Ls off the speed in 12th at the 1200 M, held up from home turn to 300 M when 5Ls off pace towards rear, didn't find that much once clear.
Jumped well from widest draw and able to lead without being pressured. Continued to lead before being headed on straightening. Every chance at 300 M but faded out of contention final 200 M.

Among leaders early and gradually moved towards rails to settle in a prominent position behind the leader. Angled out on straightening and quickened well. Fought on nicely with others before taking control final 100 M.
Settled on fence at midfield early and middle stages. Ridden from 600 M out and made up some ground. Kept on evenly in the straight.

Best out and was taken back to race 4-wide behind midfield. Drifted further back 700 M after being steadied from heels. In rear section on straightening but closed the race off well once finding clear running after 300 M.
Settled on-fence behind midfield. Drifted back slightly rounding home turn and was near the back 400 M. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Raced near midfield but was difficult to settle in the early and middle stages. Ran on fairly in the straight and made up some ground.
Kept within 3Ls of the pacesetter until home straight. Unable to quicken much when pressured 400 M and was one-paced in the closing stages.

Among leaders early. Settled 2-wide just behind the pacesetter after the 1400 M. Improved gradually making the turn and held a slight advantage from 400 M onwards. Stayed on well but couldn't keep up with winner final 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly and settled 2-wide behind midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Raced 3-wide better than midfield until 500 M. Faded gradually after straightening.

Midfield early stages. Dropped slightly back to settle 3-wide behind midfield after 1400 M. Improved slightly rounding home in a 4-wide position. Made a brief run on straightening but unable to keep on after 200 M.
Raced wide and without cover near midfield until straightening. Made no impression in the straight.
Slowly away and trailed field until 600 M. Found nothing in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and raced near the back. 3-wide rounding home turn and was in last place 400 M. Ran on well and made up some ground in the straight.
Always within 1L of the pace on the fence until the 400 M, led narrowly at 200 M, always looked to be holding the runner-up close home.
Prominent about 3Ls off pace in midfield down centre of track until the 400 M, tended to hang out and weakened thereafter.
About 3Ls down in 6th early on, 4Ls behind at 400 M, dropped further behind.
Slowly away and unbalanced at the start, always detached, never a factor.
Within 2Ls of the speed in 4th until the 400 M, lost ground with principals rapidly, one-paced.
Slowly away and 10Ls last as early as 800 M out, made up some late ground past very well beaten rivals.
Always on fence and tended to hang in, struggling when 4Ls down in 8th at 400 M, lost further ground.
Prominent about 3Ls off pace in midfield down centre of track until the 400 M, no impression thereafter.
Kept within 3Ls of the leaders in midfield until 400 M, no extra.
Unbalanced at the start, always detached, never a factor.
Disputed lead early on, about 2Ls down in 3rd at 400 M, no chance with quinella pair but still hung on fairly for a place.
Always outpaced and detached.
Led by a neck early on, about 1L clear at 400 M, hung right when headed 200 M out, kept hanging but rallied well, just held, several lengths clear of 3rd home.
3Ls off the pace in 4th when 2-wide at the 1200 M, disputing lead at top of home turn, narrow advantage 300 M out, headed 200 M out, stayed on well but no extra.
2-wide and 9Ls off the speed in 9th at 1200 M, niggled along 800 M out to take closer order, 6Ls down at 800 M, 4Ls down in about 8th place into home straight, always well held.
Held up 5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 6th at 1200 M, pressed on out 3-wide from the 700 M to be disputing lead out 4-wide off home turn, still there 300 M out but faded badly final 200 M.
Caught wide early on but slipped in 2-wide 7Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 8th at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in midfield, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, no extra.
Bounded exiting gates, one from rear 14Ls behind the leaders at the 1200 M, 10Ls down at 800 M, 5Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, ran on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
Slowly away, 12Ls behind in 12th at 1200 M, 8Ls down in 11th at 800 M, 5-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in midfield, never troubled leaders.
5Ls off the pace in 5th at the 1200 M, 4Ls down but losing position under pressure off home turn, faded right out.
Detached in rear about 15Ls behind at 1400 M, about 9Ls last off home turn and veered towards stands' rail, never a factor.
Slowest away, 11Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, 7Ls down at 800 M, 4Ls down in 12th off home turn, one-paced.
Had the run of the race in 3rd or 4th when about 2Ls off pace on fence until home straight, picked up nicely to lead 200 M out, all out, just hung on.
Bounded exiting gates, pressed on out wide to go half a length 2nd at 1200 M, led narrowly 900 M out, all out when swamped at the top of the home straight.
Soon led on fence, headed 900 M but disputing again under pressure entering home straight, soon faded rapidly.
8Ls behind the lead in 8th at 1200 M and on fence, 5Ls down in 7th at 800 M, 3Ls down at top of home straight, stayed on well on run-in making ground all the time, nearly figured in the money.
One from rear 14Ls behind leader at 1200 M, improved out 3-wide from 700 M to home straight when 4Ls down but 6-wide (widest of all), finished off very strongly, just failed.
Midfield home turn. Could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Last to straight where he made up some ground final 200 M.
About 4th halfway and was 3rd 250 M. Unable to sustain effort close home.
1st or 2nd to straight where he quickened to lead 300 M. Kept on gamely when strongly challenged inside final 200 M, only to be caught last stride.
Midfield rounding home bend. Ran on well on straightening to challenge closing stages, having every chance.
Soon improved to take up running from 1200 M. Was headed 300 M and dropped out quickly.
Worse than midfield into straight. Was running on strongly when severely baulked 100 M, losing all his chance.
Towards rear before staying on strongly final 250 M to snatch race on post.
Never in the hunt.
Was 4th 1000 M and 5th swinging into straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Ran 3rd 1200 M and same place on straightening. Plugged on under pressure.
Slightly behind midfield. Kept on steadily inside 250 M.
Towards rear early. Made ground along rail to be just behind midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Never in contention. (Bled.)
Always there. Was 3rd 300 M. Kept on but found no extra close home.
Checked soon after start, towards rear throughout.
Tardy start, last early. Towards rear to straight. Found not much room when trying to recover ground early straight. Ran on when in clear 200 M.
Well there to straight. Faded.
Prominent early. Dropped back steadily 900 M out. Wide throughout.
Better than midfield. Moved up on outside from 750 M to be 3-wide among leaders on straightening. Took clear lead passing 300 M. Won going away.
Jumped well and led briefly early. Soon raced within 2Ls behind lead in 4th or 5th to final turn. Kept on well to take 2nd 200 M.
Pushed along early to take lead soon after start. Weakened when headed 300 M.
Never better than midfield.
Wide in midfield far side. Took closer order rounding home bend. Couldn't get any closer in straight.
Always well there. Unable to quicken under pressure to threaten.
Never nearer.
Wide throughout. Towards rear early. Effort rounding home bend. No further impression in straight.
Tailed-off into straight. Made up some late ground past beaten horses.
Ridden behind leaders far side, then gradually weakened.
Always in last few.
Midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Forward of midfield to straight and weakened.
Forward of midfield to straight. Weakened halfway out.
Made all. Always in command.
Mainly midfield. Switched to 6-wide on straightening. Ran on to take 2nd 200 M. No match with the winner.
In the front pair to 1100 M. Prominent to final turn. Faded badly. (Bled.)
Tardy start, last from 1st turn. Only ran past a couple of tiring horses in straight.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made some minor progress in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Recovered some ground early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Midfield early, soon dropped towards rear. Steadied early straight. Kept on inside 200 M.
Better than midfield. 4th far side. Dropped back from 700 M while hanging out.
Towards rear. Stayed on closing stages.
In touch. Raced 5th far side. 5-wide and 2Ls behind lead into straight. Kept on.
Began awkwardly, near the rear. Hung out badly 700 M.
Slightly slowly away. Hard ridden from outside to take lead 1100 M. Faded when headed 300 M out.
In the front pair to 1100 M. Remained prominent until weakening out of contention soon after straightening.
Soon better than midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to be 2nd final turn. Took command 300 M out. Won unchallenged.
Slowly away, towards rear. Crept closer on inside final turn. Failed to find clear passage 300 M. Ran on when in clear closing stages.
Took up running coming onto stable bend. Shared pace far side and around home bend. Regained lead turning in but collared final strides.
Towards rear. Ridden rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
With leaders to straight, then gradually weakened.
Prominent to straight. One-paced.
Never a factor.
Always well there, sharing pace most of way to straight. Unable to sustain effort close to home.
Midfield into straight. Never nearer.
Settled in rear. Produced good late progress on rails to be nearest at finish.
Prominent until swamped final stages.
Settled in midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Sluggish at start. Quickly improved to midfield. Sustained effort down straight to get up on line.
Around midfield to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure.

Tardy start and ridden along to race in midfield on rail. Hung out rounding the home turn. Under pressure 400 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M but was unable to find an extra gear to overhaul the winner.
Jumped awkwardly and failed to muster early speed to be in a rearward position on rail through to straight. All out 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Began well from wide draw and ridden along to race in better than midfield towards the outside through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 350 M out and ran past beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Began fairly from widest and hard ridden along to race in midfield or worse towards the outside through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 400 M out.
Began well and ridden along to race in a forward position 2-wide through to straight. Kept on some pace when asked 350 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Slow to begin and ridden along to race in a rearward position towards the outside through to straight. Dropped out in straight. (Significant of mucus in trachea.)
Broke fairly and pushed along to race in midfield 3-wide. Commenced to give ground rounding the home turn. Tailed out in straight. (Heart Irregularity.)

Began fairly and pushed along to race 2Ls off pace on rail. Crept closer to leader rounding the home turn. Responded well when asked 400 M out, took charge inside final 100 M and held off late challenge from 2nd placegetter.
Broke well and ridden along to lead narrowly 3-wide. Headed around the 450 M and gave ground steadily down the home straight. (Bled.)

Slowly away and unable to muster early speed to race in a rearward position 2-wide. Hung in rounding the home turn. Under pressure 350 M out and made up good ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Began well and niggled along to race in a forward position on rail. Took outright lead around the 450 M, kept on well in straight but was overhauled by the 1st pair 100 M out and became one-paced thereafter. (Lame.)
Broke fairly and ridden along to race in midfield or better 2-wide. Commenced to give ground steadily round the home turn. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Led 1600 M out, no more than 1L clear until 1000 M, headed 900 M out, always tended to hang out and shifted out further when losing position off home turn, dropped out very rapidly
6Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M on fence, made nice headway on the fence to be 4Ls down in 6th entering home straight, led 200 M out, driven out, easily.
Bounded in air at start losing ground, checked 1500 M out, on fence 8Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, always well behind, detached entering straight, never a factor.
6Ls off pace in 10th when 2-wide at 1200 M, same off home turn, moderate late headway.
Slowly away, 3-wide with cover but 3Ls off the pace in 6th at 1200 M, lost place on circle and all out when 5-wide entering straight when 6Ls down in 10th, faded.
Caught 4-wide without cover towards rear at 1600 M, 7Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover in 11th at 1200 M, no chance when 6-wide and 10Ls behind in rear on straightening.
2-wide and 4Ls behind in 8th at 1200 M, 5Ls down when 3-wide into straight in 7th, stayed on at the same pace, narrowly missed 2nd place.
2-wide and a neck off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, narrow lead at 900 M, hard ridden to be 1L to the good turning for home, headed 300 M out, faded right out.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace on fence in 4th at 1200 M, ridden along on circle, 2Ls down in 3rd on straightening, no chance with winner but hung on gamely for 2nd.
8Ls behind when 2-wide and one from rear at 1200 M, similar into home straight, made some late headway past tired rivals.
4Ls off pace in 7th on fence at 1200 M, under pressure to hold this spot from 800 M out, still 4Ls down in midfield at 200 M but one-paced, weakened right out close home.
Bounded at start and lost ground, 10Ls last and 2-wide at 1200 M, similar into home straight but 5-wide, ran on but no chance of figuring in the finish.
Awkwardly away, always 3-wide without cover, 1L down in 3rd at 1200 M, hung out from 800 M and lost position on circle, 6Ls down and worse than midfield entering straight, weakened further.
Bumped at start, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 5th from 800 M to home straight when 3-wide and under strong pressure, weakened steadily.
Jumped awkwardly and raced near the back early and middle stages. Ridden from 600 M out and made up ground in the closing stages.

Jumped awkwardly from wide draw and was shifted to the fence to race at midfield. Improve gradually after 400 M and was locked in a head to head battle with winner inside final 200 M. Found no extra to overtake winner closing stages.
Ridden forward early and settled 2-wide at midfield after 1200 M. Little response when pressured on straightening.
Ridden out of the gates and raced 2Ls off the pace early stages. Drifted back to midfield after 1000 M and was urged to stay on rounding home turn. Made no impression in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and was hard ridden to a leading position. Overtaken after 1000 M but regained the lead 700 M out. Held a slim advantage on straightening but faded shortly after.
Caught wide entering first turn and then raced 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace in the back straight. Came with a length of leader on straightening but was one-pace thereafter.

On fence and settled 3 to 4Ls behind the pace. Closed in on leader rounding home turn and was shifted out to be in a disputed lead shortly after straightening. Fought gamely inside final 200 M to deny challenger final stages.
Ridden to a forward position. Raced alongside the leader and led briefly after 1000 M. Commenced to weakened before straightening and finished tailed out.
Slow to begin. Raced 2-wide behind midfield. Hard ridden and 4-wide rounding home turn. Failed to quicken in the straight.

3-wide at midfield early stages. Improved position slightly in back straight. Closed in on leaders rounding home turn in a 4-wide position and held a slight advantage at 400 M. Continued with a slim lead before being headed 200 M.

Held wide going into first turn and was shifted to race on the fence behind midfield in backstraight. Held up and unable to improve rounding home turn. Made steady progress in home straight and just missed 3rd place.

Best out but was eased back slightly after failing to muster speed to cross to fence. Carried further back to behind midfield after 1400 M. Improved in a 4-wide position after 800 M to be 1L of leader 200 M. No extra thereafter.
Caught widest going into first turn and was wide without cover in a rearward position. Dropped further back to last place 800 M out and never recovered.
Trailed field shortly after start and remained at the tail until being urged forward 900 M. Widest rounding home turn. Made up ground in the closing stages.
Among front runners early. Always remained prominent. Kept on but lost 2nd final strides.
Began awkwardly, never better than midfield.
Tardy start, recovered some ground to be just behind midfield. 5-wide final turn. Kept on without quickening.
Last. Crept closer order to 8th on straightening. Ran on to snatch 2nd near finish.
Midfield or slightly better. Kept on from 5th early straight.
Among front runners. Still in the leading pair rounding home bend. Found no extra when headed on straightening.
Always there on inside. 1-1/2Ls 3rd final turn. Responded well to take command 200 M. Won unchallenged.
Lost ground at start, towards rear throughout.
In touch. Improved to join the leaders 900 M. Dropped back a bit to 5th 700 M. Faded on straightening.
In touch at start, soon gave ground steadily towards the rear. Remained in similar position until staying on a bit in straight.
Ridden along to be in the front. Remained in the leading pair home bend. Headed 200 M. Weakened.
Never able to feature.
Raced keenly early disputing lead around stables bend. Gradually weakened out of contention in straight.
Never a factor.
Settled just better than mid-division on rails. Did not find much room early in straight. Closed on leader steadily closing stages to just fail to get up on line.
Never better than midfield.
Always in last few.
Tracked leader. Quickened to gain slender lead 200 M out. Just held on.
Towards rear. Came under pressure rounding home bend. Ran on in straight to do best work at finish.
Always thereabouts. Fought on steadily in straight for a placing.
Never far off to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Led to 200 M then weakened under pressure.
Well back to straight. Made up some late ground.
Slowly away, towards rear. Soon recovered a little ground to be just behind midfield. Kept on in straight.
Mainly 2nd last. Made ground while hanging in from final turn.
Better than midfield. Progressed to 4th final turn. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Ridden along from a wide draw to be prominent. Was 3rd at 500 M. Weakened on straightening.
Began awkwardly, never better than midfield.
Prominent on inside. 2Ls 3rd or 4th far side. Kept on until finding no extra close home.
Lost ground at start, towards rear throughout.
Took lead soon after start. Held 1L advantage far side. Was joined 400 M. Headed 200 M out and failed to fight back.
At rear throughout.
Was crowded soon after start, towards rear. Faded soon after final turn.
Slightly better than midfield. Ran on steadily final 200 M to take 3rd close home.
Jumped well. Sat outside leader before joining at 400 M. Gained upper hand 200 M out. Stayed on.
Behind midfield. Weakened into straight. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Rear early. Shortlived effort coming out of back straight, but went very wide home turn. Never recovered.
In last few to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Broke well, settling behind leaders. Fought on under pressure down straight without threatening.
Raced very freely at the back of the bunched field. Sprinted home after straightening to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield to straight then weakened.
Disputed lead most of way to straight, then weakened. (Saddle shifted.)
Virtually made all. Hung on well to the line.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace to the line.
Towards rear. Effort rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Prominent to straight. Came under pressure turning in. Swamped final stages.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Ran on steadily on rails final 200 M. Did best work at finish.
Ridden along to race in midfield or better 3 wide. Ridden along to maintain position at home bend and switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Only able to run on evenly to the line.
Best out from widest but was soon steadied to midfield or worse around 3 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain running but only able to keep on same pace to the line.

Niggled along to race in midfield or better 2 wide. Ridden along to hold position at home bend and switched out on straightening. One-paced when asked 250 M out and further weakened inside final 150 M.
On jumping was crowded for room and soon recovered to race outside the leader to home straight. Only kept on evenly when asked 250 M out and further weakened over the concluding stages.

On jumping stumbled and ridden along to race in mid-division on inner. Prior to straightening was awkwardly placed on heels. Had a tendency to lay in in straight and made up steady ground inside final 150 M to be closest at finish.
Broke fairly from wide draw and ridden along to race in midfield towards the outside through to straight. No extra in straight and steadily faded inside final 150 M.

Began fairly and raced in midfield or worse 2 wide. Made little headway at home bend and switched wide on straigh- tening to obtain running. Under pressure 250 M out and made up little ground inside final 150 M without threatening.
Soon became detached from the rest around 3 wide. Recovered little ground rounding the home bend but failed to make any impression in straight.

Broke fairly and ridden along to lead on fence with no more than 1/2L advantage through to straight. Responded well when asked 250 M out and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win by a narrow margin.
Broke well from wide draw and ridden along to race in mid-division out wide without cover. Gave ground steadily from 400 M and tailed out in straight.

Unable to muster early speed to race in a rearward position on rail. Made steady headway rounding the home bend. Ran on fairly in straight but was tight and near the 50 M checked when losing its rightful running.
Jumped fairly and pushed along to race around 1-1/2Ls off pace on rail through to straight. Ran on well when asked 200 M out but was unable to find an extra gear to run down the winner.
Bumped at start, ridden along but couldn't lead, 8Ls down and 2-wide in 10th at 1100 M, held up for a run entering straight, clear at 300 M but found nothing.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th at 1100 M, same into home straight, made some late headway.
Crowded at start, 6Ls behind in 8th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 6th into home straight when under pressure, very one-paced thereafter.
Very wide (5-wide) at 1300 M, pressed on to be 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1100 M, hard pressed to hold position at 600 M, beaten before home turn.
5Ls off pace on fence when in 4th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 4th entering straight, staying on well when 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, always just held close home.
2-wide when 4Ls off leader in 4th at 1100 M, under pressure to hold this spot at 600 M, 5Ls down and weakening right out off home turn.
Soon led, never clear by much more than 1L through to home straight, still 1L up at the 200 M, hung on gamely.
3-wide with cover when 8Ls behind and one from rear at 1100 M, under pressure when 4-wide (widest of all) when 6Ls down in 9th, weak thereafter.
9Ls off pace on fence in 12th at 1100 M, 7Ls last on the circle, one-paced.
3-wide without cover when 6Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, pressed on 4-wide without cover to be 1L down in 2nd at 600 M, all out to be 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, plugged at same pace for a place.
Slowly away, 8Ls off pace in 9th on fence at 1100 M, roughly the same on turning for home, made a little late ground.
Awkwardly away, 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 3rd on fence from 1100 M to home straight, 1L down in 2nd off home turn and at 200 M, no extra and very weak final 100 M to lose out on a place.
Slowly away and then was crowded. Settled on fence behind midfield. Improved rounding home turn and reached within 4Ls of the pace on straightening. Ran on without threatening.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled 2-wide behind midfield until straightening. Made up steady ground in the straight to be closest at finish.
Began fairly and went forward to race alongside the leader after 1200 M. Continued to be alongside the leader before fading before home straight.
Slowly away and then settled 3-wide in rear section. Ridden from 600 M out but didn't find much in the straight.
Ridden vigorously from the gate to keep position behind the leader. Continued to settle behind the pace middle stages and was one-paced in the straight.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Hard ridden 600 M out but failed to pick up. Found nothing in the straight.
Jumped well and led shortly after start. Maintained a 2Ls advantage entering home straight but lead diminished gradually until being headed final 100 M. Hung on for a minor placing.
Settled 2-wide behind the leaders. No response to riding 600 M out and finished well back.

Slowly away. Became detached early stages before joining the field after 1000 M. Remained in last place 400 M, quickened well on straightening and closed the race off strongly to be closest at finish.
Ridden from widest draw and was caught wide and without cover at midfield. Ridden to stay on after the rock but weakened thereafter.

Ridden to follow leaders early. Settled on fence and 2 to 3Ls off pace in the back straight. Angled out near 400 M and was pressured to take on the leader. Responded well in the straight and took command final 100 M.
On fence in rear section. Improved rounding home turn to be at midfield on straightening. Continued to make ground steadily in the straight.
8Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, same into home straight, 6Ls down at 200 M, ran on very strongly thereafter.
6Ls down when 2-wide in 8th at 1100 M and same into home straight and at 200 M, dashed home well very late, never nearer.
4Ls behind when 2-wide in 6th at 1100 M, 5Ls behind in 6th entering home straight, still 4Ls down in midfield at 200 M, ran on well late, nearest at finish.
Very awkwardly away losing about 4Ls at the start, always well behind in rear thereafter, never a factor. (Lame.)
3Ls off pace on fence in 5th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 5th on straightening, 3Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th, under pressure to stay within 3Ls of the pace at 600 M, kept on dourly and made some ground from then on but was always outpaced.
Slowly away, 10Ls off pace and one from rear 1200 M out, nearest at the finish but always in rear group.
On fence about 1L or 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd from 1200 M to home straight, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, led 100 M out, ran on well.
Led out 2-wide by 1L at 1100 M, on fence and 1L clear at 700 M, 2Ls clear off home turn, 1L to the good and all out at 200 M, headed about 100 M out, swamped close home.
5Ls off pace on fence in 7th at 1100 M, same on straightening, never troubled principals.
Caught 3-wide without cover and 1L off pace in 3rd at 1100 M, 1L 2nd and 2-wide at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd and fading off home turn, very one-paced thereafter.
held up 6Ls off the speed when 2-wide in 9th from 1100 M until home turn, still 5Ls behind at the 200 M, ran on well, nearest at the finish.
Always worse than midfield and never better than 5Ls off the speed at any stage after 800 M out.
No worse than 3Ls off the speed in midfield until home straight, fine turn of foot to assume command over 200 M out, pushed out, impressive.
Caught 4-wide without cover when 3Ls down in 5th at 800 M, 2-wide and 2Ls behind in 2nd at 600 M, hard ridden entering straight, kept on at same pace.
Not much worse than 2Ls off pace in 4th through to home straight, same 200 M out, one-paced close home.
3-wide without cover early on, led at 1000 M out wide, led by 2Ls on fence at 700 M, headed 250 M out, hung on for a place.
Awkwardly away, about 12Ls last at the 600 M, 4-wide off home turn, ran on strongly late on to be nearest at the finish.
Always worse than midfield, hardly figured from 600 M out.
About 4Ls off pace in midfield or slightly worse through to home straight, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, kept on well but had no hope of catching the winner. (Lame.)
Awkwardly away, always towards rear, never better than 7Ls off the speed at any stage.
Led very early on, 2-wide about 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls behind in 5th place, one-paced thereafter.
4Ls off pace in midfield early on, steadily lost ground and very weak in the home straight.
3Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, left 3-wide without cover at 600 M, 5Ls off pace and 3-wide into home straight, weakened.
Was midfield before improving to be 3rd coming into straight. Kept on same pace under pressure.
Made no show.
Hard ridden in 3rd at 700 M and was 2nd coming into straight. Stayed on well close home despite not reaching winner.
Led before headed approaching 600 M. Lost ground steadily thereafter.
Midfield at best.
Never far off before weakening under pressure from 600 M.
Never in the hunt.
Tracked leader before taking command passing the Rock. Never threatened thereafter.
Never on terms.
In rear to home bend. Never nearer.
Worse than midfield before making some headway home bend. Was 5th on straightening where he kept on steadily for a remote 3rd.
In rear throughout.
Mainly 3Ls 5th to straight. Ran on well along inside to snatch victory close home.
Led briefly early, then settled 3rd within 2Ls behind lead. Ran on early straight to regain advantage 200 M until headed closing stages.
Remained 7th throughout. Checked just passing 200 M.
Was 2nd last before making up some ground inside 200 M.
Bounded at start, towards rear. Crept closer order on inside turning into straight. Ran on but was one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Never a factor.
Held 4th to 200 M. Weakened.
Midfield. Checked 200 M. Found no extra.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield. Widest (5-wide) turning in. Ran on well to look like winner closing stages. Just beaten.
Was 2nd outside leader before failing to hold place inside 150 M.
Ridden along to take lead from 1400 M. Faded when headed 200 M.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Well back. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Prominent before dropping out abruptly in straight. (Bled.)
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Around midfield. Made some headway down straight without threatening.
Prominent to straight. One-paced.
Behind midfield. Made some late progress under pressure final 200 M.
Wide in midfield. Dropped out before home turn.
Midfield. Fought on steadily under pressure to reach 2nd late.
Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily in straight.
Broke well and ridden to muster pace for early lead. Went clear in straight to win unchallenged.
Towards rear. 5-wide final turn. Very minor progress in straight.
Always thereabouts. One-paced.
Well there. Took lead from 1200 M. Faded rapidly 500 M out.
Last to final turn passing two well beaten horses.
Well there. Took lead from 1400 M to 1200 M. Then remained 2nd until regaining advantage near 600 M. Held on well.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Raced behind midfield and was inconvenienced passing 800 M. Made up a little ground final turn. Stayed on same pace in straight.
Midfield. Crept closer to 5th final turn. Stayed on well final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear and hung in from first turn. Ran on quite well in straight but without threatening.
Led briefly early, then remained 3rd from 500 M. Failed to hold place inside 200 M.
Prominent. Chased the leader rounding home bend. Remained 2nd until finding no extra closing stages.
Around midfield. Dropped out on straightening.
Always wide in midfield. One-paced in straight.
Prominent. Came to challenge upon straightening, holding some chance early in straight. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Led early, then settled just off the pace. Fought on doggedly on rails in straight holding every chance. Just failed to peg back first two.
Always in last few.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened upon straightening to hold every chance but outsprinted final strides.
Soon took up running and led till swamped final stages.
Soon outpaced. Ran past beaten horses late.
Never better than midfield.
Broke well then raced mainly in forward of midfield. One-paced in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Finished strongly final 200 M to just get up on line.
Never a factor.
Never nearer.

Raced in midfield wide without cover in the early stages. Near the 1300 M went forward to race outside the leader. Under pressure at home bend to hold position. No extra in straight and steadily faded inside final 150 M.
Slow to begin and raced in a rearward position on rail. Ridden along and made little headway rounding the home turn. Unable to sustain effort in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and was soon eased to the tail closer to rail. Became detached in the middle stages. Recovered some lost ground at home bend. Made up little ground inside final 150 M.
Began fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to a rearward position closer to rail. Switched to widest on straightening and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Broke fairly and soon settled in midfield on rail. Made little headway turning for home. Kept on well in straight but failed to find an extra gear to overhaul the 1st pair.

Unable to muster early speed to race in midfield or better 3-wide. Ridden along to maintain position at home bend. One-paced in straight and further weakened inside final 100 M. (Lame left front leg next day.)
Began fairly and was soon box seated behind the leader through to straight. Responded well when asked 250 M out and took charge inside final 150 M to win by a short margin.

Jumped well and pushed along to take up running on rail with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 250 M out but was unable to match speed with winner inside final 150 M.
Soon settled in behind midfield on rail. Pushed along at home turn and made up little ground. Ran on fairly in straight without threatening the placegetters.
Soon raced in midfield or worse 2-wide. Shuffled back to rear section turning for home. Under pressure 250 M out and made up little ground inside final 150 M to be closest at finish.
Soon raced in midfield 2-wide. Gave ground steadily from 600 M out and failed to make any impression in straight.
Broke fairly from wide draw and raced in better than midfield 2-wide. Had trouble holding position at home turn. Steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.
Always widest, 3 and 4-wide without cover down back straight when 3Ls off pace in 5th through to home straight, about 2.5Ls down in 4th at 200 M, no extra.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd until home straight, all out but half a length down in 3rd 200 M out, ran on but had no extra close home.
Awkwardly away, 3Ls behind in 6th at 800 M until home straight, kept on at same pace.
Awkwardly away and bumped at start, 2-wide and about 5Ls off pace when midfield or worse until home straight, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide and about 3Ls off pace in 4th until home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Worse than midfield, steadied and 7Ls off pace on fence 600 M out in 10th, well beaten and steadied again 300 M out when making some late headway in the straight.
3-wide but with cover and about 4Ls off pace in midfield until home straight, very weak thereafter.
Slowest away, detached in rear 10Ls behind leader at 800 M, moderate late headway past beaten rivals, nearest at finish. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Soon led, never clear by more than 1L through to home straight, grabbed by winner 150 M out, kept on well but just held.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 800 M to home straight when switched into the clear, led 150 M out, driven out.
One from rear about 7Ls off pace at 800 M, still well behind and under pressure when 4-wide into home straight, made some minor late headway.
Had cover when 3-wide 4Ls behind leader in 8th at 800 M, under pressure to take closer order at 500 M, no impression.
Raced on fence and kept within 4Ls of the pace. Ran on well on straightening but had difficulty riding out over the concluding stages when racing close to heels.
Raced mostly 2-wide in a rearward position. Ridden going into home turn but responded only fairly in the straight.
Raced 3-wide without cover early stages then sat just outside the leader from 1000 M. Remained racing close to the lead before dropping out final 200 M.

Taken back gradually to race on fence in a rearward position. Remained near the back and 7Ls behind the lead at 400 M. Crowded in the concluding stages whilst closing the race off strongly. (Finished 3rd, placed 2nd.)

Checked shortly after start and raced 2-wide at midfield. 3-wide in back straight and home turn. Picked up well on straightening and raced head to head with winner until last few strides. (Finished 2nd, placed 3rd.)

Travelled in a forward position alongside the leader in the early stages. Raced keenly and shifted to be 3-wide when being crossed in front after 1000 M. Ridden from 500 M out but faded shortly after straightening.
Jumped awkwardly. Checked shortly after and raced on fence behind midfield early stages. Had its run interrupted whilst commencing its run on straightening. Charged on well final 200 M.

Ridden out of the gates and settled in a prominent position behind the leader. Quickened well when asked on straightening and gained a slender lead 200 M. Hung on well to defy challengers concluding stages.
Checked shortly after start and raced in a rearward spot. Travelled 3-wide in back straight and was last to enter home straight. Picked up well when pressured and made up ground in the straight.
Raced within 2Ls of the pace in the early stages. Fell slightly back to midfield before the Rock. Within 3Ls of the lead on straightening but ran on without threatening thereafter.
Led shortly after jumping from widest draw. In front by no more than a length's advantage in back straight. Lead diminished gradually on straightening. Faded final 200 M.
Eased back to race 3-wide behind midfield in the early stages. Remained in similar position in back straight. Widest turning in and was under pressure 400 M out. Gradual improvement in the straight.
Slowly away, switched swiftly to fence, 5Ls off pace in 8th or 9th from 1200 M to home turn, ran on strongly once in the clear, just missed out on 2nd.
2-wide and 2Ls behind in 4th at 1000 M, steadied at 600 M, disputing lead out 2-wide entering straight, weakened markedly through final 300 M.
Slowly away, raced freely when 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1100 M to home straight, picked up well to lead over 200 M out, ran on well.
4-wide (widest) 1300 M out, 3-wide without cover in 3rd less than 1L off pace until 500 M out, disputing lead entering straight out 3-wide, led 300 M out, headed 250 M out, no extra.
A little slowly away, 5Ls behind the speed in 9th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 3Ls behind in 8th off home turn, kept on at the same pace to line.
Switched from wide gate to fence on exiting, detached 10Ls off speed in rear at 1000 M, 7Ls last entering straight, no impression.
2-wide and 3Ls off speed in 6th at 1000 M, closer about 2Ls down in 5th at 400 M, every chance 350 M out but became unbalanced, failed to quicken up.
Awkwardly away, disputed lead early on, led by 1L on fence at 1100 M, disputing lead 500 M out, swamped well over 200 M out.
On fence 8Ls off the speed in 11th at 1000 M, steadied 800 M out, 5Ls down and still one from rear off final bend, steadied again 100 M out when staying on, nearest at the finish.
Raced 3-wide but had cover 3Ls off pace in about 5th or 6th from 1000 M to 600 M, 2Ls down and under pressure when 4-wide (widest of all) into home straight, faded rapidly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never threatened, 7Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 10th entering home straight, one-paced.
Awkwardly away, 3Ls behind leader in 7th from 1000 M to home turn, stayed on well along fence but winner had too many gears.
Jumped well from widest draw and took the lead. Joint lead from 1100 M before taking clear advantage 200 M out. Held on well.
Midfield or behind. Moved up on outside from 1000 M to be 3rd approaching 800 M. Kept on until finding no extra soon after straightening.
Always there. 2Ls 3rd far side. Dropped back a bit to 5th home bend. Kept on evenly.
Tardy start, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily from 11th early straight.
Began awkwardly, never better than midfield.
In touch. Found no extra from 4th 200 M out.
Midfield or slightly behind. Made progress from 1100 M to be slightly better than midfield. Weakened from 300 M.
Prominent. Gave ground from 1100 M to soon be in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight to claim 3rd final 100 M.
Prominent. Joined the leader passing 1100 M. Was still in the front pair until headed 200 M out. Kept on.
Midfield or slightly behind. 6-wide final turn. Made ground steadily to be nearest at finish.
Lost ground at start, never in contention.
Rear. Ran on from last early straight, never nearer.
Never a factor.
Missed the break. Made no impression throughout.
Settled outside leader, disputing lead briefly turning in. Unable to sustain effort close to home.
Virtually made all. Just held on under pressure in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in rear. Made up a lot of ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well down straight to do best work at finish.
Rear of midfield. Found no extra in straight.
Settled just off the pace. Held moderate chance early in straight but failed to quicken to threaten.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield or slightly better rounding home bend. Made no show final 250 M.
Took lead soon after start. Shifted in from 1100 M and caused interference. 2nd from 850 M. Ran on in straight to re-gain lead 150 M. Just held on.
Towards rear. Only minor improvement in straight.
Always at the back.
Moved up steadily from midfield at start. Steadied and held up momentarily around 1100 M. Stayed on before recovered good ground in straight, doing best work close home.
Towards rear. Stayed on final 200 M.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit when checked 1000 M. Held up early straight when lacked of galloping room. Ran on well final 150 M to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield. Weakened 200 M out.
In touch. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Well there. Severely hampered passing 1100 M. 2-1/2Ls 4th final turn. Ran on well 200 M out, just failing to catch the winner.
Midfield. One-paced throughout.
Well there. Took lead passing 900 M. Found no extra when headed 150 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Settled in forward of midfield. Pulled out for a clear run early in straight and fought on gamely to prevail readily.
Broke well, settling behind leaders. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening but only kept on at the one pace.
Prominent early. Midfield rounding home bend. Kept on well in straight.
Not too far off when hampered and lost good ground approaching home bend. Finished strongly from towards rear into straight.
Never in contention.
Wide in midfield throughout. Kept on steadily in straight.
Lost some 3Ls at start. Quickly recovered to rear of midfield before home bend. No clear passage early in straight. One-paced closing stages.
Niggled at early. Taken back to settle behind leaders before home bend. Quickened to hold every chance in straight but just failed to peg back winner.
Well there with brief lead early in straight. Faded final 200 M. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Gradually dropped towards rear under pressure. Produced moderate late impression under pressure closing stages.
Ridden to muster pace early. Took up running coming out of back straight and led to 400 M, then gradually weakened.
With leaders briefly then dropped abruptly to forward of midfield before home bend. Renewed effort in straight and ran on steadily without threatening first pair.
Slow into stride. Raced in rear before straight. Improved to midfield turning in. Baulked and eventually checked 200 M out. Never recovered.

Slowly away and soon raced in rearward position on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 350 M out and made up steady ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish.

Broke fairly from wide draw and soon took lead on rail. Near the 1000 M eased back to race 1-1/2Ls off pace to straight. No extra when asked 350 M out and near the 200 M was checked. Steadily dropped out thereafter.

Jumped awkwardly and ridden along to race in midfield or better 3 wide. Pushed along to maintain position at home turn. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Slow to begin and niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on same pace to the line.

Broke well from widest and steadily eased to midfield around 2 wide through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but near the 200 M was checked when crowded for room. Became one-pace thereafter.
Slowly away and pushed along to race in midfield or better 2 wide. Around the 600 M commenced to ride along to hold position. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and steadily tailed out thereafter.

Began well and raced in prominent position 2 wide. After the 1000 M went forward to race outside the leader to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out but was overhauled by the winner on the line to settle for 2nd.

Tardy start and soon recovered to race in midfield 2 wide. Switched out and made little headway at home turn. Responded well when asked 300 M out but hung in badly and just lost out to the 1st pair in a close finish.

Broke fairly from wide draw and soon eased to the tail around 2 wide. Switched wide and made little headway turning for home. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Soon settled in rearward position 2 wide, and made little headway, rounding the home turn. Unable to go up a gear when asked 400 M and kept on evenly to the line.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to a rearward position 3 wide. Made steady headway from the outside at home turn. Made up good ground when asked 400 M out to snatch win on the line in a ding-dong battle.

Slow to begin and steadily recovered to race in midfield on rail. Rounding the home turn was shuffled back worse than midfield. All out 300 M out and ran on well but just failed to get into the placings.

Broke well and raced in a forward position on rail. Around the 1100 M was allowed to stride forward to take up running to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Tardy start and raced in worse than midfield on rail. Overraced in the middle stages, near the 600 M hung out and checked away from heels. Tailed out in straight.
Settled towards rear about 7Ls behind on fence in 12th until 600 M, 5Ls down off home turn, stayed on well through field to be nearest at the finish.
A little keen when 3-wide without cover on fence in 3rd at 1000 M, 1L 2nd at 800 M, under pressure to hold this spot at the home turn, faded out.
Bounded in air and slowest out, always in rear, never better than 8Ls off the pace at any stage, detached entering straight. (Distressed.)
Had the run of the race about 2Ls off pace on fence in 4th from 1000 M to home straight, kept on at same pace thereafter.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, niggled along at 800 M, under pressure when 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, one-paced through final 300 M.
Soon led, on fence and 1L clear at 900 M, same entering straight when travelling well, a neck to the good at the 200 M, kept on well, won going away.
Awkwardly away, 5Ls behind leader in 10th on fence at 1000 M, 4Ls behind and 3-wide in midfield off home turn, bumped and no clear run until 200 M out, ran on well once clear.
2-wide and 4Ls behind leader in 7th at 1000 M, 5Ls behind at 800 M, niggled along to hold spot in midfield at 600 M, always well held from home turn.
Caught 4-wide but mostly had cover down back straight when 4Ls off pace in 9th, 4-wide without cover 700 M out, 4Ls behind in midfield entering straight, one-paced to line.
2-wide and 2Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 5th at 800 M, 3-wide into straight when 2Ls down in 4th, every chance when a neck 2nd at about 300 M and 200 M out, no extra.
4Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover in 8th at 1000 M, 3Ls behind and 3-wide entering home straight, kept on quite well without troubling principals.
About 4Ls off pace on fence in 6th at 1000 M, under pressure to hold position at 600 M, tailed off rapidly and eased in home straight.
Bumped at start, one from rear 7Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1000 M, niggled along to take closer order at 600 M, still 6Ls behind off home turn and under pressure, didn't threaten.
Didn't break well, mostly 5-wide without cover down back straight when about 5Ls off speed towards rear, hard ridden when 5-wide (widest) and 5Ls down entering straight, no impression.
Bounced well and led with ease. Sat calmly in front with a length's advantage final 400 M. Kicked away from its pursuers final 250 M and cruised home for its record setting 11th straight win.
Raced within 3Ls of the pace until home straight. Couldn't pick up on straightening and weakened final stages.
Ridden along from the gate and then settled on fence at midfield after 1000 M. Drifted back steadily to rear section rounding home turn. Made no impression in the straight.
Ridden to midfield early but fell back to rear section after steadying at 900 M. Near last at 400 M and only ran past a few beaten runners closing stages.
Ridden forward to race alongside the leader. Followed leader closely into home straight. Ran on fairly to the finish.
Settled at the rear. Turned out on straightening and closed the race off strongly.
In rear section despite being ridden along early. Niggled along until being pressured 500 M out. Quickened well on straightening and was closest at finish.
Travelled just behind the pace. Unable to quicken when pressured on straightening and was one-paced to line.
Wide and without cover at midfield early stages. Made ground rounding home turn in a 3-wide position to reach within a length of leader 400 M. Found no extra thereafter.
Settled behind midfield. Niggled rounding home turn and quickened well when pressured on straightening. Closed the race off well despite laying in final 200 M.
Broke well and settled behind the pace. Pressured 400 M out and kept on strongly before fading final 100 M. (Bled.)
Settled in a rearward position until straightening. Made up ground in the final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Stayed within 3Ls of leader until 400 M. Faded away thereafter.
2-wide and 3Ls off the speed in 4th at 1600 M, niggled along when 4Ls down in 5th at 800 M, 3-wide at 600 M and 3Ls down disputing 4th off home turn, always looked held. (Lame next day.)
Had the run of the race on the fence in 3rd or 4th through to 600 M out, 2Ls down in 2nd and going well with every chance off home turn, didn't find much under pressure.
On fence 8Ls off the pace in 9th at 1400 M, 6Ls behind in 9th at 800 M, 5Ls behind in 9th off home turn, staying on 2Ls down in mid-division when squeezed at 200 M, didn't recover.
3-wide without cover 10Ls off pace in 13th at 1400 M, 8Ls down in 12th at 800 M, about 6Ls down in 10th off home turn, looked well held when squeezed for room at 200 M.
Led by 1L on fence at 1600 M, 2Ls to the good at the 800 M and off home turn, grabbed 200 M out, weakened.
4Ls behind leader on fence in 5th at 1600 M, 3Ls down when disputing 3rd off home turn, picked up well and narrowly 2nd at 200 M out, kept on gamely but always held by winner.
Keen early, 10Ls behind when on fence at the 1400 M, 7Ls down in rear off home turn, never a factor. (Lame.)
Held up 12Ls last 1400 M out, 7Ls last but 3-wide off home turn, ran on strongly down centre of track, nearest at finish.
Over-raced when 9Ls behind 2-wide in 10th at 1400 M, 2-wide and 8Ls down in 10th at 800 M, 5-wide (widest) into home straight when 5Ls down towards rear, didn't trouble leaders.
A little keen when 2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 8th at 1400 M, 6Ls off pace in 9th at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, 2Ls down and disputing 4th at 200 M, no extra.
9Ls off pace on fence in 11th at 1400 M, still towards rear and 7Ls down off home turn, made little impression.
On fence 6Ls off the speed in 7th at the 1400 M, 5Ls behind in 6th at 800 M, roughly the same entering straight, held up for a run until 300 M out, ran on well once in the clear, nearest at finish.

3-wide without cover early, pressed on to be 2-wide 1L off pace in 2nd at 1600 M, 2Ls down in 2nd at 800 M, under pressure at 600 M, dropped out rapidly, eased from top of home straight. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
2-wide about 5Ls off pace in midfield until 800 M out, pressed on to be 4-wide and 3Ls down disputing 3rd off home turn, quickened up well to lead 200 M out, stayed on strongly.
10Ls off pace on fence in 13th at 1000 M, pushed out 6-wide (widest) entering straight when 7Ls down in 13th, never able to land a blow.
2-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 6th from 1000 M to home straight, 2Ls down and disputing 3rd at the 200 M, stayed on well without grabbing principals.
Pressed on to lead from wide gate 2Ls clear on fence at 1200 M, about half a length clear from 1000 M to home turn, same at 200 M, just hung on.
7Ls off pace and 3-wide without cover in 11th at 1000 M, under pressure to take closer order at 600 M, 6Ls down in 11th entering straight, made a little late headway.
Very reluctant to race and immediately detached by 15Ls, always a very long way behind. (Lame.)
In 12th place 9Ls behind and 2-wide at 1000 M, hung out turning for home to be 5-wide and 7Ls down in 12th, 5Ls behind at the 200 M, nearest at the finish.
Pressed on to be a close 2nd out 2-wide at 1100 M, still only half a length down in 2nd off home turn, headed by pursuers at about 200 M but didn't lose much ground on run-in, much better effort.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 2Ls behind in 4th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 4th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn and all out to hold this same spot at 200 M, beaten when checked 100 M out.
8Ls behind on fence in 11th at 1000 M, 7Ls behind on fence and worse than midfield at 800 M and into home straight, ran on quite well late without threatening principals.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 6th off home turn, same at 200 M, stayed on strongly closing stages to take 2nd.
7Ls behind and 2-wide in 10th at 1000 M, roughly the same into home straight, made some late headway without posing much of a threat.
Awkwardly away, in midfield 6Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1000 M, under pressure at 700 M, 5Ls down off home turn, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, kept on, nearest at finish.
Always niggled along, 2-wide and 6Ls off pace on fence in 8th at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 8th turning for home, 4Ls down and all out at 200 M, kept finding, nearest at the finish.
2Ls off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until home straight, half a length down in 2nd at 200 M, all out, couldn't lead, lost 2nd place on line.
Never far off to straight where he failed to find any extra closing stages.
Made no show.
Never on terms.
Always well there. Was 2nd 350 M and kept on under strong pressure.
Midfield into home bend. Kept on to snatch 2nd placing final stride.
Soon dropped to rear and remained there to straight. Stayed on to be nearest at the finish.
In rear to straight where he was steadied 200 M out. Stayed on a bit near finish.
Never far away to straight. Unable to make any impression on leaders.
Worse than midfield to home turn before making up some headway final 250 M.
Was 5th approaching 800 M and similar position early in straight. Unable to hold place final 200 M.
Midfield home turn. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Always prominent. Took charge approaching 1000 M and made rest.
Last to straight where he ran on a bit.
Ridden from 1200 M to be close up 2nd home bend. Unable to sustain effort 200 M out.
Gave ground gradually behind midfield. Only made some minor recovery in straight. Hung around and raced ungenerously.
Mainly 4th to final turn. Dropped back steadily.
Better than midfield. Crept closer final turn. Advanced to 3rd briefly 300 M. Soon found no extra.
Lost ground at start, behind midfield. Widest in the straight. One-paced.
Jumped well and was soon 3Ls behind leader. Ran on steadily from 2Ls off early straight. Took charge passing 200 M and never threatened.
Slightly behind midfield. Made minor progress rounding home bend to be 6th on straightening. Kept on steadily.
Steadied soon after start, towards rear. Ran on evenly in straight to just miss 2nd.
Midfield on inside. Made ground to 3rd passing 1000 M. Held on until finding no extra inside 300 M.
Led field soon after start. Held advantage until headed 200 M. Never able to fight back.
Midfield early, soon dropped back towards the rear. Made up some ground on inside 200 M out.
Towards rear throughout.
Slow into stride, never a factor.
Never better than midfield.
Tracked leaders. Quickened well to take charge final 200 M.
Niggled at towards rear early. Ran home one-paced on rails.
Prominent to straight then weakened under pressure.
Disputed lead into straight. Fought on under pressure without threatening.
Very sluggish at start. Always struggling.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in forward of midfield to straight, then kept on steadily to finish.
Niggled at around midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Attempted to make all but overhauled final 200 M.
Not far off to straight then gradually weakened.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran home quite well to miss placing narrowly.
Settled at the back. Made up late ground steadily in straight.
Began awkwardly. Always in last few.
Better than midfield. Hung out middle stages and early straight. Kept on.
Mainly 3rd to 200 M. Weakened.
Near rear from widest draw. Ran on from outside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Soon raced 4th until improving on inner to 2nd 400 M. Kept on but failed to catch up with the winner.
Near rear to straight. Made ground steadily inside 400 M but failed to quicken close home.
Midfield. Moved up to 2nd passing 1000 M in a 3-wide position. Failed to respond soon after straightening.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. No extra closing stages.
Soon last. Made up good ground final 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made all.
Towards rear. Made some minor improvement final 200 M.
In touch early. Soon dropped to midfield. Crept closer to 5th early straight. Weakened 200 M out.
Midfield to straight then faded.
Settled behind midfield. Shifted out for a run early in straight. Ran on under pressure to assert authority final 200 M.
Chased leader to straight then weakened under pressure.
Attempted to make all. Broke some 2-1/2Ls clear early in straight and flattered. Swamped final stages.
Prominent to 500 M then weakened.
Forward of midfield to straight then weakened.
Always in last few.
