Prominent to straight then weakened.
Towards rear. Took closer order rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Travelled towards rear. Effort around field rounding home bend. Improving well when jostled early in straight. Sustained progress to just fail to get up on line.
In mid-division to halfway, then tired markedly.
Settled in midfield. Badly squeezed early in straight then only kept on at the one pace.
Never a factor.
Never on terms.

Slowly away and raced in a rearward position and 2-wide. Switched wide and made little progress rounding the home bend. Under pressure 400 M out and make up little ground inside 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began well and pushed along to the narrow lead on rail. Around the 400 M mark was headed and failed to quicken. Further weakened inside final 200 M.

Began fairly and pushed along to race in prominent position 2-wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out but was unable to match speed with the winner inside final 100 M to settle for 2nd place.
Jumped well and niggled along to race outside the leader. Took narrow lead 400 M and held 1-1/2Ls advantage early straight. One-paced after 200 M and was overhauled by the placegetters final stages.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to the tail closer to the rail. Pushed along home bend with little progress. Showed good turn of foot when asked 350 M out and grabbed up the field inside final 150 M to win convincingly.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in midfield 2-wide but proved very difficult to settle in the middle stages. Ridden along to hold position at home bend. Failed to make any impression in straight.

Raced in rear position, hung out badly making the 1st turn and proved very difficult to ride. Shifted slightly closer to other runner down back straight. Hung out badly again at home bend and tailed out in straight.

Broke fairly and hard ridden along to race in midfield or better on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 350 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to grab 3rd place near the line.
Unable to muster early speed to race in a rearward position around 3-wide through to straight. Failed to respond to pressure in straight and dropped out.
Began fairly and pushed along to be box-seated behind the leader through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but became one-paced inside final 150 M.

Soon raced in worse than midfield around 2-wide. Switched wide and made little headway rounding the home bend. Only able to keep one-paced in straight and slightly weakened over the concluding stages.
Tardy start and niggled along to race in midfield or worse on rail. Ridden along at home bend to maintain position. Only able to keep on evenly to the line when asked 400 M out.

Pushed along but slightly outpaced in the early stages to race in midfield or better wide without cover. Made slight improvement down back straight and rounding the home bend. Kept on same pace in straight and weakened inside 200 M.
At least 10Ls off pace in rear when mostly without cover down back straight, very wide (8-wide) off home turn when 7Ls last, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M nearer stand's rail, no extra.
On fence 8Ls off pace in 8th until the 800 M, held up when 6Ls off pace and 3-wide into home straight in midfield, clear 300 M out, kept on at same pace.
10Ls off pace and 2-wide in 11th at 1400 M, caught 3-wide without cover at 1200 M and about 7Ls down in midfield at 800 M, 6-wide off home turn, soon outpaced.
5Ls off pace on fence in 4th at 1600 M, 5Ls down in 5th at 800 M, 4Ls down in 5th off home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Pressed on to lead by 2Ls off pace on fence at 1600 M, disputed lead at 1300 M but 1L clear again at 1100 M, still 1L clear off home turn, headed 250 M out, faded.
On fence in 6th when 6Ls behind at 1600 M and 800 M, 5-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in midfield, ran on fairly well, nearest at finish.
8Ls behind when 2-wide in 9th at 1600 M out and at 800 M when niggled along to take closer order, 4-wide off final bend when 6Ls down in 10th, some late headway without threatening.
6Ls off pace when 2-wide in 7th at 1600 M and at 800 M, 4-wide off home turn when 5Ls down in midfield, went about 1L 2nd at 200 M, kept on making ground but post came too soon.
5Ls off the speed when 2-wide in 5th at 1600 M, 3Ls down in 4th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, led 250 M out, stayed on dourly, just hung on.
Led on fence at 1800 M but soon headed and raced 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd from 1600 M to home straight when held up for a run, clear 300 M out when 2Ls down in 4th, didn't quicken.
4Ls off pace and 2-wide in 3rd at 1600 M, pressed on to dispute lead at 1300 M out 3-wide without cover, 1L down in 2nd at 1100 M and off home turn, faded from 300 M out.
10Ls behind in 10th on fence at the 1400 M, 8Ls down in 9th at 800 M, under strong pressure entering straight when worse than midfield and 6Ls down, no impression.
Held up about 12Ls off pace in 11th at 1600 M, a little closer at 800 M, 7-wide into home straight when 7Ls behind in rear, 3Ls down towards stands rail at 200 M, no extra. (Lame.)
13Ls last at 1600 M on fence, 10Ls in rear at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight, stayed on well towards inside, never nearer.
Began awkwardly and improved to race on fence at midfield. Remained in same position until straightening. Made ground steadily in the closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and was difficult to settle behind midfield middle stages. Drifted back to a rearward position after 800 M. Quickened fairly on straightening and made up some ground closing stages.
Trailed field all the way into home straight. Made no improvement in the home straight.
Settled prominently behind the leader from 1400 M onwards. Pressured at 400 M but quickened only fairly. Held on for minor placing.
Raced better than midfield in the early stages. Steadily drifted back to race behind midfield from 1000 M onwards. Responded fairly under pressure and made up some ground final stages.
Raced alongside the leader until final 300 M. Faded gradually thereafter.
Raced behind the leaders until 800 M. Commenced to drift back rounding home turn and then weakened in the straight.
3-wide and within 2Ls of the leader until 800 M. Crept up rounding home turn and closed to within a length on straightening. Stayed on in the straight.
Taken back to race 3-wide behind midfield. Kept on same pace in home straight.
Slowly away and raced near the back throughout back straight Slightly held up at 400 M. Didn't quicken much and was one-paced to line.
Settled 3-wide at midfield until final 400 M. Responded well under pressured and improved steadily over the concluding stages to take control final 100 M.
Led shortly after start. Continued to lead into home straight and kept a length's advantage final 200 M. Couldn't withhold winner final stages.
Always at the back.
In touch. Inconvenienced passing 400 M. Weakened thereafter.
Better than midfield. Shifted in abruptly 400 M, causing rider to stop riding and straightened. Renewed effort to run on and took command closing stages.
Midfield to 250 M out. Weakened steadily.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made up good ground on outside 200 M out.
Well there. Faded from 350 M. (Finished distressed, blood in trachea.)
Never able to feature.
Slightly better than midfield. Improved to 4th near course proper. Ran on quite well inside 300 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Made most. Held on until headed closing stages.
Prominent to 200 M. No extra.
Slowly away, raced in the rear. Recovered good ground when ridden along hands and heels inside 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or slightly behind. Shifted to the inside to make up some ground passing 400 M. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made ground 450 M while hanging out. Ran on closing stages.
Always thereabouts with inside rails runners. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Prominent to 400 M then dropped out.
Never far off. Fought on steadily closing stages.
Prominent onto course proper. Dropped out.
Soon dropped to the rear.
Always struggling in last few.
Settled around midfield. Fought on under pressure to pinch 3rd late.
Settled in midfield along inside rails. One-paced under pressure near finish.
Well there to 200 M then dropped out.
Well there to 200 M then one-paced.
Always well there with inside rails runners. Hung on well under pressure.
Niggled along in prominent position. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Settled in rear of stand's side runners. Finished off race well to grab 2nd late.
Soon in rear.
Behind midfield from a wide draw. Made minor progress to 6th halfway. Ran on steadily in straight to claim victory close home.
Began awkwardly, remained 2nd last to final turn. Shifted to the inside to obtain clear run after 400 M. Made up good ground but again steadied from heels passing 200 M.
Never better than 9th.
Always in touch. Gradual progress from final turn to be 3Ls 2nd 300 M. Continued to make ground steadily to just miss narrowly at finish.
Slightly slowly away, ridden along to be in midfield. Ran on quite well 250 M out. Steadied final 100 M.
Began awkwardly, never a factor.
Slightly better than midfield. Failed to quicken in straight.
Towards rear throughout. (Blood in trachea.)
Pushed along from widest draw to take the lead. Still with 3Ls advantage early straight. Found no extra when headed close home.
Towards rear. Made minor progress rounding home bend to early straight. Soon one-paced.
Dropped back steadily to the last at 1000 M. Widest turning into straight. Ran on well on outside to be nearest at finish.
Ridden along to be 2nd from 1600 M. 3Ls behind lead early straight. Failed to hold place 200 M out.
In touch. 3rd passing 1200 M. Weakened soon after straightening.
Settled midfield. Weakened steadily 600 M out.
Midfield most of way. Found nothing in straight.
Well back. Made up late ground past beaten runners in straight.
Forward of midfield to straight. No extra.
Settled behind leaders. Came to challenge late final stages but unable to close on winner.
Broke well and soon crossed to lead before home bend. Hung on well.
Always in last few.
Midfield early. Towards rear into straight. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Mainly in midfield. Produced some late impression final stages.
In similar position throughout.
Always well there. Kept on well without quickening under pressure.
Prominent to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Tightened at start. Last to straight. Ran on past beaten runners.
Never in contention.
Chased leader throughout. Faded final 100 M.

Jumped awkwardly and failed to muster early speed to race at the back on rail. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 400 M out and made up steady ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish.
Broke fairly and raced in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Began fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail. Pushed along to maintain position at home turn. Under pressure 300 M out but failed to make any impression.

Began well from widest and ridden along to share lead in the early stages. Took outright lead on rail after the 1300 M to straight. Headed 350 M out and steadily dropped out thereafter. (Lame left front leg.)
Soon settled in worse than midfield around 3 wide. Switched out and made little headway turning for home. All out 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish.
Slow to begin and was soon steadied when crowded for room. Pushed along to race in midfield on rail to straight. Kept on same pace and only ran past couple of beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly and ridden along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. After the 1200 M improved to prominent position to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M out but became one-pace in the closing stages.

Jumped well and led narrowly in the early stages, after the 1400 M steadily eased to race around 1L off pace on rail to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and made good impression inside final 200 M to grab 3rd place in the final stages.

Tardy start and raced towards the rear section 2 wide through to straight. Unable to see clear daylight in early part of straight, made up little ground inside final 200 M when clear running was obtained 250 M out.
Tardy start and soon settled in a rearward position on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and only ran on evenly to the line.

Slowly away from wide draw and pushed along to race in midfield 3 wide. Made little headway after the 600 M to be 2Ls down on straightening. Ran well when asked 400 M out but just failed to find an extra gear to overhaul winner.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or worse 2 wide. Switched out and edged closer turning for home. Hung in in straight and proved difficult to ride, only ran on evenly to the line.

Began well from wide draw and soon settled in better than midfield around 3 wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 400 M out and fended off late challenge from 2nd placegetter to win by a short margin.
Unable to show early speed and raced at the tail 2 wide. Switched to the widest on straightening to obtain clear running. Failed to make any impression in straight.
3-wide and 5Ls off pace in 8th at the 1000 M, 6Ls down and worse than midfield off home turn, no impression.
2-wide and 3Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, 1L 2nd at the 200 M, no extra and was grabbed on the line for Quinella spot.
On fence 7Ls off speed at 1000 M, hard ridden off home turn when 8Ls behind towards rear, no danger.
Slowly away, on fence 4Ls behind in 6th at 1000 M, 5Ls down in midfield off home turn, no impression.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until 500 M out, one-paced in the straight.
Caught 5-wide without cover early but 3-wide with cover when 6Ls off pace at 800 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight, kept on steadily to be nearest at the finish.
Had cover when 3-wide about 4Ls off pace in midfield through to home straight, 2Ls down in 4th at the 200 M, looked certain of a place 50 M out but lost out final strides.
About 8Ls off pace in rear and 2 and 3-wide down the backstretch and same off home turn, staying on when 4Ls down in midfield at 200 M, kept on well to nick 2nd on the line.
Very keen when 2-wide and about 6Ls off pace in 9th for most of backstretch, failed to quicken off home turn.
3-wide without cover when half a length down in 2nd at 1000 M, led out 2-wide at top of home straight, driven out, never looked like getting caught.
Led out 2-wide by half a length at 1000 M, on fence at 800 M, headed at top of home straight, faded rapidly.
Keen at the 1200 M, mostly 3-wide without cover, 2Ls down and wide at the 800 M, 3-wide off home turn when a neck 2nd, soon outpaced.
Slowest away, raced in rear group 2-wide and about 8Ls off pace down backstretch, held up for a run entering straight, made some moderate late headway.
Slowly away and raced keenly early on, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 7th at 1000 M, niggled along 600 M out, about 5Ls down in midfield entering straight, one-paced thereafter.
Raced 3-wide and a length off the speed early stages. Moved up to the lead before straightening and kept on a slim advantage before fading out of contention final 300 M.
Off slowly and was in last place despite being ridden hard. Trailed field into home straight and only ran past beaten runners.

Off fairly from wide draw. Ridden along to a forward position. Marginally in front but held 5-wide rounding home turn. Gained a 1/2L advantage 200 M out but had no extra to hold off the top pair final stages.
Towards rear early. Progressed steadily to midfield at 800 M and was 3-wide rounding home. Picked up well in home straight and charged through final 100 M.
Held a length's advantage early stages. Raced along the fence and remained among leaders rounding home turn. Never picked up in the straight.
Off slowly. Settled 2-wide and 5Ls behind at 800 M. Quickened well when asked final 300 M and made up some late ground.
Quickest out from wide draw and raced among leaders before staying a length off from 1000 M. Held 4-wide and slightly off pace rounding home turn. Tired on straightening.
Failed to muster speed out of the gates and fell behind to rear section 800 M out. Remained at the rear despite being ridden and was wide turning in. Made no impression in the straight.
Jumped well and was ridden to stay in front. No more than a length off the lead until straightening. Ran flat on straightening.
Kept within 2Ls of the leaders early stages. Slipped slightly back after 900 M. 3Ls down on straightening and quickened well in the final 200 M.
Jumped fairly and settled behind midfield. Switched out 5-wide at 600 M to make its run. Made steady progress in the straight to be closest at finish.
2Ls off the pace at 1000 M. Eased back to settle at midfield until home straight. Ran on fairly in the straight.

Began fairly, failed to muster early speed and raced in a rearward position. Remained near the back despite being urged at 800 M. Had a 6Ls deficit final 400 M. Picked up final 300 M and made a late run to be closest at the line.
Among leaders early but dropped slightly behind after 1000 M. On fence and 3Ls down rounding home turn. Evenly paced in the straight.
Led on fence early on, 1L clear at 1200 M, headed at top of home straight, one-paced final 200 M.
Slowly away, 4Ls off pace on fence in 5th at the 1200 M, went wrong on the circle and eased out of the race at top of home straight. (Heart irregularity.)
Bumped at start, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 7th at the 1200 M, niggled along at the 1000 M, 8Ls down and struggling entering straight, faded.
Caught 3-wide without cover when 5Ls off pace in 6th at the 1200 M, 4Ls behind in 5th at the 800 M and off home turn, ran on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
8Ls off pace when 2-wide in 10th at 1200 M, 4-wide into home straight when ridden along 5Ls off the speed, ran on very strongly but was always held by the winner.
3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th at 1200 M, closer 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, found very little.
Had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide and 6Ls behind the leader in 9th at the 1200 M, 3-wide and 5Ls off pace in midfield entering home straight, steadied 300 M out, always outpaced by principals.
Held up about 8Ls off pace down the backstretch, marginally closer turning for home, kept on steadily, never nearer.
1L off the pace in 2nd place out 2-wide at 1200 M, led at top of home straight, 1L clear at 200 M, kept on strongly.
About 5Ls off pace in midfield through to home straight, made a little late headway but always well held.
No speed early on, 10Ls last on fence at 1000 M, towards rear when 6Ls behind leader and 4-wide into home straight, stayed on strongly, missed out narrowly on a place.
In rear bunch about 8Ls off pace down back straight, on fence and under pressure on the swing, all out to get within 4Ls of the speed at the 200 M but faded again.
Ridden from gates, towards rear about 8Ls off the pace down backstretch, 7Ls down and one from rear entering straight, ran on strongly, never nearer.
Settled on fence about 3Ls or 4Ls behind leader in midfield through to home straight, good progress on inside to be a neck 2nd at 200 M, winner too strong but still a good effort.
About 5Ls off pace in midfield and about 2 or 3-wide through to home straight, some progress to be 3Ls off pace in about 6th at the 200 M, didn't follow through.
Raced about 4Ls behind the speed when 2-wide in about 6th place through to home straight, a little closer turning for home, staying on only fairly when steadied 250 M out, didn't recover.
Never got involved, always in rear, never better than 8Ls off the speed at any point.
3-wide but with cover down backstretch in midfield 5Ls off pace, 4Ls down and 5-wide into home straight, quickened up very well while hanging right to lead 200 M out, driven out.
Well placed for first half of race 2-wide and about 3Ls behind the speed in about 5th, struggling to keep up entering home straight, faded out rapidly.
Pressed on to lead by 1L on fence at 1000 M, always a little bit too keen, headed at top of home straight, faded right out.
Worse than midfield when about 6Ls or 7Ls behind the speed until home straight, never threatened.
Keen early on when 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1000 M, led at top of home straight, headed 200 M out, no extra and faded close home.
Had a nice spot on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until 800 M out, loomed up with every chance 300 M out when close to leading, still there at 200 M but weakened markedly thereafter.
Disputed lead early on, mostly caught 3-wide without cover about 2Ls off pace in 4th from 1000 M out, under pressure to lie up at the 600 M, faded steadily from top of home straight.
Slowest away, worse than midfield about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace through to home straight, very one-paced from then on.
About midfield rounding home bend. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Made steady headway from midfield home bend. Could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Well there into straight where he ran on to threaten approaching 200 M.
Worse than midfield approaching home turn before finishing strongly inside final 200 M.
2nd into home bend and failed to hold place before straight.
About 6th 1000 M before reaching 4th 250 M. Unable to sustain effort close home.
Soon took up running and led field to 200 M. Found no extra near finish.
In rear before home turn. Unable quicken to challenge.
Towards rear halfway and same position into straight. Quickened well under pressure closing stages.
Never nearer.
Always handy. Moved up to lead passing 200 M, holding on under pressure.
Last to 200 M where he ran on quite well.
Just behind midfield 600 M. Kept on without threatening.
Settled midfield to straight where he kept on but was checked close home.
Soon prominent. Gave ground from 700 M to be 4th. Kept on until weakening out of contention passing 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight to take 2nd passing 200 M. Failed to match speed with winner.
Very slowly away in the rear. Made some minor progress in straight.
Midfield from widest draw. Made progress down the Rock to join the leaders home bend. Took lead briefly early straight. Found no extra when headed 150 M.
Checked soon after start, remained at rear to 200 M. Ran on under pressure to grab a minor placing near finish.
Prominent. Came to tackle leader 500 M. Kept on but faded rapidly 200 M out.
Well there. Took lead 1000 M out. Was joined 500 M. Maintained advantage on inside until headed soon after straightening.
Settled behind midfield from a wide draw. Widest final turn. Responded well to take control 150 M. Held on well.
Led briefly after start, soon raced better than midfield. Remained in similar position to straight. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Midfield. Inconvenienced near 800 M. Gave ground steadily.
Behind midfield. Checked 1000 M. Steadied again down the Rock when in midfield. Crowded for room soon after straightening. Failed to recover.
Well there briefly early, then raced towards the rear. Ran on when given reminders inside 200 M. Gained 3rd briefly final 50 M.
Always thereabouts but unable to quicken to threaten.
Towards rear. Ran on well down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back into straight. Ran on past beaten runners final 200 M.
Prominent. Held slender lead briefly far side. Dropped out approaching home turn.
In similar position throughout.
Virtually made all. Hung on well.
Midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Always well there but unable to sustain effort near finish.
Towards rear. Commenced run rounding home bend. Ran on steadily in straight.
Forward of midfield to 400 M then weakened.
Midfield before losing position halfway out. Made some late impression final stages.
Well there from widest draw. Soon failed to muster speed and was wide in midfield. Kept on while hanging in.
Always at the back.
Better than midfield. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Behind midfield soon after start. Made up a little late ground close home.
Led briefly early. Sat 1L outside leader before joining the lead 500 M. Headed early straight and weakened closing stages.
Midfield. Ran on quite well 200 M out but without threatening.
Towards rear early. Soon made ground to be just behind midfield. Kept on steadily on inside in straight to just miss 2nd.
Began awkwardly, never a factor.
Towards rear throughout.
Made no show.
In touch. Took lead 700 M out. Was joined 500 M. Gained upper hand early straight and won readily.
In touch on the rail. Gained 3rd passing 800 M. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Settled at the back. Commenced move rounding home bend. Did not find much room passing 200 M. Produced good late impression final stages.
Chased leader into straight but unable to peg him back throughout.
Midfield. Weakened under pressure around home bend.
Always in last few.
Made all to win readily.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Never far off. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Held up behind midfield. Ridden into straight but had nothing to give. (Lame.)
Settled in forward of midfield. Gained 3rd into straight. One-paced.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled in midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening.
In last few. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.

Slow to begin and ridden along to race in better than midfield 2-wide. Pushed along to maintain position turning for home. All out 250 M out but failed to quicken and only able to keep on evenly to the line.
Began fairly and soon raced in a forward position 2-wide. Under pressure at home bend to maintain position. Kept on fairly in early part of straight but became one-paced inside final 150 M.
Soon raced in mid-division 3-wide with cover. Commenced to give ground after the 400 M mark and tailed out in straight.
Soon settled in a rearward position 2 to 3-wide with cover. Switched to the widest on straightening to obtain clear running but failed to show anything.
Unable to muster early speed to race in a rearward position on inner. Hard ridden to hold position making the home turn. Unable to make any impression in straight.
Began well and pushed along to race in a forward position 3-wide without cover through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Slowly away from wide draw and soon settled at the tail on rail through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 300 M out and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Near the 300 M was slightly held up, soon obtained clear running and ran on well to match 2nd place on the line. (Lame.)

Jumped well and was box-seated behind the leader through to straight. Responded well when asked 300 M out, took charge shortly after the 200 M and steadily pulled away from the rest to win comfortably.

Tardy start from widest and niggled along to race in midfield or worse 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M but without threatening the placegetters.

Broke well from wide draw and ridden along to take lead on rail with no more than 1-1/2Ls advantage to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 300 M out but failed to fend off challenges from the 1st pair to settle for 3rd.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.
Slowly away, 6Ls off the speed in 9th and on fence at 1100 M, caught 3-wide without cover at the 700 M, 3Ls down and 4-wide into home straight when vying for a place, no extra and faded.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1200 M to about the same into home straight, kept on without quickening.
On fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 7th from 1100 M out to home straight, quickened up impressively taking a nice run up the fence to lead 100 M out, comfortably.
No speed and switched towards fence from wide gate, 11Ls last at the 1200 M, 7Ls down and one from rear off home turn, made no headway.
On fence 8Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, 7Ls behind in rear at the 800 M and into home straight when 3-wide, ran on well but much too late.
2-wide and 5Ls behind leader in 6th at the 1100 M, lost position 600 M out, never threatened in straight but still ran on quite well late.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at the 1200 M, same 700 M when niggled along, swamped 600 M out, soon in trouble, beaten on straightening.
One from rear and 2-wide about 9Ls off pace in 11th from 1100 M out to 600 M, about 6Ls down in 9th off home turn when 4-wide, ran on strongly to snare the quinella close home.
Had to press on out 4-wide without cover to lead on fence by 1L at the 1200 M, joined from 600 M to home straight, headed 300 M out, weakened steadily.
On fence 4Ls behind the leader in 5th at the 1100 M, still 5Ls behind but in 6th and ridden along entering straight, one-paced thereafter.
5Ls off pace in 8th when 2-wide at 1100 M, caught 3-wide without cover from 850 M out, pressed on to dispute lead at 600 M, clear lead 300 M out, headed 100 M out, caught for 2nd final strides.
2-wide and 2Ls behind leader in 4th at the 1200 M, tended to lay in at the 600 M, 3-wide entering straight when over 2Ls down in 2nd, faded thereafter.
Alongside the leader early. Shifted in to race behind the pace from 1600 M until home straight. Duel with winner before bowing out inside final 200 M.

Settled on fence in a rearward position before being pressured after 600 M. Ran into traffic at the 200 M. Steered clear and quickened into an explosive run in the closing stages. Fell short by a narrow margin.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Switched out to improve in a 4-wide position rounding home turn. Ran on a bit in early straight but unable to maintain progress closing stages.
Settled 2-wide at midfield before being pressured at the 500 M. Kept on same pace in home straight.
2Ls off pace but 3-wide and without cover at 1400 M. 2-wide and raced 3 to 4Ls behind the pace in the back straight. Weakened from 600 M out.
Eased back to race at the rear and trailed field all the way into home stretch. Only ran past a weakening runner.
Off well and drifted back to settle on fence at midfield. Remained racing at midfield and 6Ls off pace in back straight. Ridden on straightening and made steady progress in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and fell behind midfield. Pressed on at the first turn to race alongside the lead. Settled 2-wide and 1 to 2Ls behind from 1600 M onwards. Dropped out steadily after 500 M.
In front shortly after start and remained in the lead entering home straight with a length's advantage. Faded away shortly after straightening.
Settled 2-wide in a rearward position. Pressured from 600 M out without much response. Made no impression in the straight.

On fence and kept within 4Ls of the leader. Made ground rounding home turn to be just behind the lead on straightening. Quickened well before being steadied at 200 M. Regained momentum and just missed a minor placing.

Settled 2-wide behind midfield until the Rock. Pressed forward at the 700 M and reached within 1L of the leader on straightening. Shook off a pursuer for the lead at the 200 M and just managed to hold off a late challenger.
Held up 7Ls behind the speed in 10th and 2-wide at the 1100 M, one from rear and 6Ls down when 4-wide (widest of all) into home straight, moderate late headway.
Head up at the 1300 M, had the run of the race in 4th on fence at the 1200 M, under pressure at the 600 M to keep up, nothing thereafter.
Bounded in air exiting gates, 2-wide and half a length off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, still well there but 3rd at the 600 M, every chance 300 M out, weakened inside final 200 M.
Never threatened, always towards rear.
Had a nice trip 2-wide and 2Ls behind in 5th at the 1200 M, about 2Ls down in 4th on fence into the home straight, every chance at the 300 M, weakened final 150 M.
Head up the 1400 M, 2-wide and 5Ls behind in 9th at the 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield entering straight, had to steadily switch right into clear running 250 M out, ran on well.
Very keen 4-wide without cover when 4Ls off the pace at the 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield when 3-wide off home turn in midfield, ran on well but lacked pace of winner.
3 back on fence 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, same when switched out to challenge 500 M out, 4-wide off home turn, 2Ls down and closing at 200 M, kept on well to lead close home.
3-wide without cover when 1L off pace in 3rd at the 1200 M, without cover through to home straight when 2Ls down in 3rd, swamped at the 200 M and no extra.
Awkwardly away, had cover when 3-wide and 3Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, still well there off home turn, led over 150 M out, headed late on.
Led by half a length on fence at the 1200 M, disputing lead or marginally in front from 600 M to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
In rear 9Ls off the speed on fence at the 1100 M, badly unbalanced at the 600 M, no danger thereafter.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Crept a bit closer final turn. Soon found no extra.
Pushed along to soon be in touch. Gained 3rd 800 M out. Kept on until finding no extra inside 300 M.
Prominent. 2Ls 3rd final turn. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Made all. Won unchallenged.
Behind the main bunch. Inconvenienced passing 800 M. Dropped back steadily.
Towards rear from the widest draw. Made ground from 1000 M to be 6th rounding home bend. One-paced. Wide without cover throughout.
Mainly 4th or 5th throughout. (Dropped whip after 300 M.)
In touch early. Gave ground steadily to stay in the rear group from 1000 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Ridden along to soon be in midfield. Dropped back to behind midfield home bend. No progress.
Well there, within 1L behind lead to 400 M. Stayed on same pace thereafter.
Midfield. Around 3Ls 7th early straight. Kept on steadily to claim a remote 2nd closing stages.
Checked soon after start, always at the back.
Wide in forward of midfield. Gave ground gradually from home bend.
Ridden early but soon dropped to midfield. Faded into straight.
Broke well. Close up till lost touch into straight.
Never on terms.
Slightly sluggish at start. Soon raced keenly in forward of midfield. Dropped out approaching home straight.
Raced wide throughout. With leaders far side. Lost position round home bend. Faded further into straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Not much room early in straight before quickening well final 200 M to just fail to get up on line.
Always thereabouts. Fought on steadily under pressure to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Soon in last few. Failed to quicken under pressure early in straight only ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Gained narrow lead coming out of back straight. Just held on to finish.
Towards rear and ridden early. Never better than midfield.
Pulled up shortly after start.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Chased leaders into straight. Baulked briefly early on. Driven to challenge final 200 M but unable to peg back first two.
Among leaders soon after start. Kicked 2Ls advantage early straight. Kept on well but was one-paced close home.
Jumped well at start from widest draw, soon in midfield. Made no show in straight. Wide throughout.
Last 600 M out. Never a factor.
Always there. Gave a little ground final turn to be 6th early straight. Recovered well inside 250 M to just miss by a nose at finish.
Among leaders to 400 M. Faded. (Bled.)
Towards rear. Shifted to the rail 300 M. Ran on well but shifted out closing stages. Just missed by a narrow margin on the line.
Towards rear on outside. Steady progress rounding home bend. Ran on from midfield early straight to snatch win narrowly when piped up at finish.
Slowly away, last early. Soon recovered some ground to be just behind midfield. Crept closer to 4th final turn. Found no extra closing stages.
Among leaders soon after start. Was 2nd while hanging in home turn. Kept on well and was beaten marginally final strides.
Slightly better than midfield. Weakened 200 M out.
Last soon after start. Made up some ground 200 M out.
Settled in midfield. Not much room early in straight. Finished off race well.
Virtually made all. Hung on well to finish.
Wide behind midfield. Made up good ground from 3rd last into straight.
Well back. Made significant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield to straight. Faded under pressure final 200 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Behind leaders to straight. Kept on without quickening.
Settled in rear of midfield. Made moderate late progress final 200 M.
Settled in rear. Commenced move approaching home turn but baulked for a run early in straight. Produced good late impression final 200 M.
Forward of midfield to straight, then gradually faded under pressure.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Broke well then restrained in 2nd position just outside leader. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening but failed to peg back winner throughout.
Midfield to straight, then gradually faded.
Midfield to 200 M, then weakened.

Jumped well and pushed along to race in a forward position on rail. Near the 900 M commenced to ride along to maintain position. Under pressure 400 M out and did best work inside final 150 M to grab 3rd place near the line.
On jumping bounded in the air and ridden along to race in a rearward position on rail. Near the 800 M dropped to the tail of the field and made no impression in the straight.
Began fairly from widest and soon eased to the rear section to straight. Made up little ground in the early part of straight but became one-pace inside final 150 M.
Slow to begin and ridden along to race in worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 350 M out and ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Jumped fairly and ridden along to race outside the leader. Near the 700 M lost its rightful running and checked. Under heavy pressure to hold position at home bend. One-pace in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly from wide draw and ridden along to race in prominent position 2 wide. Near the 900 M went forward to take narrow lead to straight. Kept on well when asked 350 M but was unable to fend off late challenge from winner.

Began fairly from wide draw and ridden along to race in midfield or better out wide without cover through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but weakened slightly over the concluding stages.
Hard ridden along in the early stages to race in mid- division 2 wide. Pushed along to hold position at home bend. No extra in straight and steadily dropped out. (Dropped whip 300 M.)

Soon raced at the tail on rail. Switched to the widest and made little headway when making the home turn. Under pressure 400 M out and made up steady ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish.
Pushed along to race in midfield or worse wide without cover. Commenced to give ground steadily at home bend. Tailed out in straight.

Began well and niggled along to race midfield around 2 wide. Switched to 3 wide and pushed along to improve position at home turn. Made up steady ground when asked 300 M out and took charge over the concluding stages.
Jumped well and pushed along to race in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Broke fairly and niggled along to take lead on rail. Around the 900 M was headed and raced 1/2L off lead to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but became one-pace inside final 200 M.
Slowly away and raced in a rearward position 2 to 3 wide. Made slight headway turning for home. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Raced 3 and 4-wide without cover down back straight when about 4Ls behind in midfield, beaten entering home straight when unseating rider after clipping heels and pecking.
2-wide and about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace in midfield until the 800 M and into home straight, no impression.
Had a nice spot on fence when about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th down the backstretch, same on straightening, one-paced thereafter.
Travelled well about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 5th or 6th through to 600 M out, 3Ls down in 3rd at top of home straight and same at the 200 M, kept on well for pressure to get up final strides.
Hard ridden from gates to race in main bunch, in about 10th place about 7Ls behind at 1000 M, some headway on fence to be 6Ls down in 5th entering straight, soon dropped out.
Awkwardly away (rider lost his whip), pressed on to lead by 2Ls on fence 1100 m out, 3Ls clear off the home turn and at 200 M, one-paced closing stages and grabbed dying strides.
Worse than midfield when about 6Ls off pace and niggled along to take closer order at the 700 M, 3-wide into home straight, always outpaced. (Lame.)
Tried to lead but was headed by runner-up 1200 M out, raced 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, under pressure to keep within 2Ls of the pace in 2nd into home straight, dropped out tamely.
About 7Ls off pace towards rear until 800 M, hung out entering straight when 5-wide and about 8Ls behind the speed, made some moderate late headway.
Bounded at start and slowest away, always deepest on the track and no better than 6Ls behind the speed, 5-wide at the 600 M, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight, well outpaced.
3Ls down in 4th and 2-wide and hanging out at the 800 M, under pressure from 700 M out to hold this position, steadily faded.
In midfield, caught without cover occasionally when 4-wide about 5Ls off pace down backstretch, hard pressed to keep up turning for home, no threat.
Always at least 6Ls behind and worse than midfield, very one-paced from 600 M out.
Settled about 7Ls off pace in rear down the back straight, no better entering straight, well adrift and remained well adrift of quinella pair but kept on through the remainder for a place.
Settled behind midfield. Ridden from 600 M out but unable to quicken. Made no impression in the straight.
2-wide behind midfield early stages. Slipped further back in back straight and was near last at halfway mark. Remained in a rearward spot on straightening. Ran past some beaten runners.

Followed leaders in the early stages. Settled 6Ls off pace in 3rd place back straight. Closed gap with leader from 800 M out and was length off on straightening. Kept on but unable to turn up a notch in the closing stages.

Broke into the lead. Took a 2Ls advantage into back straight and increased lead to 5Ls at 1200 M. Still in front by a short margin heading into home straight and held it until the last 150 M. Stayed on for a minor placing.

Raced alongside the lead before taking a sit behind the pace at the 1600 M. 5Ls behind in 2nd place in the back straight. Improved gradually at home turn and came within a neck of the lead. Stayed on before fading inside 200 M.

Settled on fence at midfield early and middle stages. Improved along the rails home turn and a length down on straightening. Held up in traffic until final 200 M. Charged through and drew clear final stages.
Behind leaders early. Settled 6Ls behind the pace in back straight. Closed to within a length going into home straight. Kept on fairly in the closing stages to make the frame.
Raced 3-wide and without cover at midfield. Reached within 3Ls of the lead on straightening. Kept on evenly to line.

Settled in a rearward position. Niggled at the 1200 M and improved to behind midfield at home turn. Quickened well in the straight and had every chance 200 M out. Unable to keep pace with winner in the final stages.
Off slowly and trailed field all the way into home straight with an 8Ls deficit. Only ran past a pair of weakening runners.
2-wide at midfield. Remained 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, closed gap to within 3Ls on straightening. Weakened.
Never better than midfield or closer than 4Ls or 5Ls to the lead from 800 M out.
Always at least 7Ls off the speed in rear and never competitive.
About 4Ls off pace in midfield early on, under pressure from 600 M out and faded away.
Slowly away, always ridden along about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace towards rear, never likely to challenge.
About 2Ls or 3Ls behind in 6th until the 400 M, faded thereafter.
4Ls behind in midfield until 500 M out, no threat afterwards.
About 1L behind in 3rd or 4th until the 400 M towards centre of track, struggling and 3Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, ran on gamely to gain 2nd close home.
About 7Ls behind in last at the 600 M, made a little late headway past beaten runners.
On stands' rail 2Ls off pace in 4th at the 800 M and at 400 M, struggling to maintain this position and 3Ls behind in 3rd at the 200 M, faded further.
Always under pressure exposed widest of all down centre of track, 5Ls down in midfield at 500 M out, faded out.
Prominent but towards centre of track early on, retreating 400 M out when 3Ls behind in 6th, weakened further.
Disputed lead early on, a neck 2nd at the 400 M, 2Ls down in 2nd at the 200 M, no extra and faded close home.
Well there until 600 M out in 3rd, 2Ls behind in 4th at the 400 M, 4Ls down at the 200 M, one-paced to line.
Soon disputing lead, clear by about 1L at the 400 M, carried head a little high but still drew well clear, impressive.
3-wide without cover when 6Ls behind in 6th at 1400 M, still without cover when 4Ls down in 3rd at the 1000 M, under pressure when gaining cover at the 800 M, beaten before straightening.
Slowest away, mostly in rear about 13Ls off the speed from 1400 M to 1000 M out, 9Ls behind off home turn, no impression.
Raced 6Ls off the pace when 2-wide in 5th at the 1400 M, under pressure when caught 4-wide without cover at the 600 M when 5Ls behind in midfield, dropped out tamely in the stretch.
On fence 4Ls off speed in 4th at the 1400 M, still 4Ls behind but in 5th at the home turn, always outpaced on the run-in.
Held up in rear or one from rear at least 13Ls off pace until 1000 M out, 10Ls last when 5-wide into home straight, made some good late headway, nearest at the finish.
In 12th place when 2-wide and about 12Ls off the speed at the 1400 M, still towards rear when 6-wide (widest of all) and 8Ls down on straightening, stayed on fairly, never nearer.
On fence 7Ls behind leader in 7th at 1400 M, 6Ls behind in 6th at the 800 M, 3-wide and 4Ls behind in 4th off home turn, quickened up well to lead at the 200 M, driven out.
Settled about 10Ls behind speed in 9th at 1400 M, steady headway on fence on the circle to be 4Ls down in 3rd off home turn, a head down in 2nd at the 200 M, winner too strong close home.
On fence 11Ls behind in 10th at the 1400 M, 8Ls behind in 11th at 800 M and 6Ls down in 6th on straightening, ran on well to nick a place in the final 50 M.

Soon led on fence, wouldn't settle and over-raced until 1400 M out, 4Ls clear at the 1200 M, 1L clear off home turn, headed a little over 200 M out, was entitled to fade out but still plugged on well.
4-wide without cover when 2Ls down in 3rd 1800 M out, 4Ls 2nd at the 1200 M, under pressure when 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd off home turn, beaten at 200 M, faded markedly close home.
8Ls behind when 2-wide in 8th at the 1400 M, still 8Ls behind but losing position on straightening, very one-paced.
4Ls down in 3rd when 2-wide at 1400 M out, lost place on the circle and beaten entering straight when 7Ls behind in midfield, dropped out further.
Held up in 11th place on fence about 12Ls off pace through first half of race, about 8Ls behind in 10th off home turn, stayed on fairly well without troubling principals.
In touch before fading to hold place coming into straight.
Never a factor.
Ran 6th into home bend before reaching 3rd early in straight. Stayed on to challenge 200 M. Found winner too strong.
About 9th halfway, and was 6th 250 M out. Could make no impression on leaders thereafter.
Soon dropped to rear and made no show after.
Close up before fading rapidly turning into straight.
Towards rear rounding home bend. Stayed on to be nearest at the finish.
Behind leaders in 6th 1400 M and lost ground approaching home turn.
Led soon after start and remained there till headed 150 M. Just held on for 3rd.
Settled in rear before improving approaching home turn. Continued to make progress along rails in straight till steadied 300 M. Kept on same pace under pressure.
Never far off till starting to lose ground from home bend.
Never far off and was 2nd into straight. Attempted to threaten 200 M out but effort not sustained close home.
Towards rear till making up some ground in straight.
Worse than midfield early and was 5th at 400 M. Ran on to lead 150 M, winning with a bit in hand.
Better than midfield. Ridden along the rail to be 2Ls 3rd 600 M. Steadied on straightening. Renewed effort to take lead passing 150 M. Just beaten narrowly final stride.
Always there. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear. Crept closer to 8th early straight. Ran on well inside 200 M to grab victory near finish.
Well there. Came to tackle leader 700 M. Led or disputed lead to final turn where he was badly unbalanced. Faded steadily on inside.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on from outside 200 M out.
Led, was joined at 600 M. Disputed lead until regained advantage early straight. Kept on when headed passing 150 M.
Midfield early, improved to 3rd 800 M. Kept on 2Ls behind the leading pair until weakening out of contention inside 150 M.
Checked early stages, behind midfield. Made ground final turn. One-paced.
Around midfield to straight. Found no extra. Hung in throughout.
Soon last.
Lost ground at start, never a factor.
Checked early stages, towards rear. Made some minor progress closing stages.
Settled behind leaders. Fought on steadily under pressure in straight but unable to peg back first duo. (See Racing Incidents.)
Racing in 5th when severely hampered by broken down horse at 1000 M bend. Never recovered.
Virtually made all. Seriously challenged the length of straight but just prevailed by the narrowest of margins. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield early. Forward of midfield into straight. One-paced.
Raced outside leader. Drew level turning in holding every chance but unable to sustain effort final strides. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear to straight. Made modest headway without threatening.
Midfield or behind. Swung wide into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Well there when dropped away abruptly before 1000 M bend.
Midfield when badly hampered at 1000 M bend. Never recovered.
Behind midfield early. Midfield rounding home bend and into straight. One-paced.
Towards rear. Commenced run rounding home bend. Improving for a gap over 100 M out when forced to switch out and sustained good headway but the post came too soon. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Made up some late ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Slightly behind midfield. Steadied at 200 M on inside when lack of daylight. Ran on when in clear.
Led field to 1200 M. Within 1-1/2Ls behind leader to straight. Kept on same pace closing stages.
In touch. Dropped back to 8th first turn. Under pressure 300 M. Failed to respond.
Midfield from widest draw. Dropped back to the rear group 1200 M out. Last from final turn.
Prominent. Mainly 2-1/2Ls 3rd far side. Shifted to inside early straight. Ran on well 150 M to take command closing stages.
Well there. Took lead from 1200 M. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Slow into stride, 2nd last to 250 M where he ran on a bit.
Slowly away and was steadied, last to home bend. Widest into straight. Made up good ground on outside to just miss 3rd.
Midfield. Slightly improved to 5th from 1200 M. Switched to 4-wide final turn. Responded well to take lead 200 M. Effort not sustained.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Recovered ground gradually to be 4th passing 1200 M. Weakened from 400 M.
Towards rear. Minor progress early straight. One-paced.
Midfield or slightly better. Made no show in straight.
Always in last few.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened.
Settled just off the pace. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening holding every chance when jostled on the hindquarter nearing finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never in contention.
Improved to prominent position outside leader stables bend. Dropped to midfield into straight. One-paced.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Came under pressure rounding home bend. Gave ground steadily in straight.
Waited with. Finished strongly from last into straight, shifting ground away from whip closing stages, to just get up on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Attempted to make all but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Well there. Hit front upon straightening but unable to sustain effort closing stages and denied a place final stride.
Settled towards rear. Commenced move rounding home bend and only made moderate headway in straight.
On jumping was crowded for room and checked. Raced in a rearward position on rail to straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M when asked 250 M out.

Broke fairly from wide draw and pushed along to race in worse than midfield 2-wide. Made little headway at home turn and switched wide on straightening. Made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
On jumped was crowded for room and checked. Raced in worse than midfield on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running but only able to run on evenly to the line.

Broke fairly and pushed along to race in a prominent position 2-wide. Steadily edged forward to join leader at home bend. Ran on fairly in straight. Was bumped and became unbalanced 100 M. (Finished 3rd, placed 2nd.)
On jumping became badly unbalanced and lost ground. Soon recovered to race in midfield 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly from widest and steadily taken back to the tail on rail through to straight. Unable to make any impression when asked 300 M out.
Broke well and soon took up running on the rail. Tackled by 2nd placegetters rounding the home turn. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened inside the final 200 M.

Began well and soon sat box-seated behind the leader through to straight. Raced tight in early part of straight, ran home strongly when clear running was obtained at 200 M to overhaul the 2nd and 3rd placegetters near the line.

Jumped fairly and soon raced in better than midfield 2-wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 250 M out but was unable to match speed with the winner over the concluding stages. (Finished 2nd, placed 3rd.)
Niggled along to race in midfield or better out wide without cover through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.

On jumping became badly unbalanced and lost ground. Soon recovered to race in midfield on rail but proved difficult to settle in the early stages. No extra in straight and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.
Soon raced in a rearward position around 2-wide through to straight. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Had a nice run on the fence 2Ls off the speed in 4th or so until home straight, always a bit too one-paced in the finish.
Always 3-wide without cover, 1L down in 3rd from 1200 M to 600 M, lost place on the circle and dropped right out.
Switched to fence from wide gate to 6Ls behind leader in 9th at 1100 M, 2-wide and 5Ls worse than midfield off home turn, tended to hang left when running on without troubling principals.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1100 M, disputing lead entering home straight and a neck 2nd at the 200 M, no extra.
Held up 7Ls behind leader in 10th at the 1100 M, 5-wide when 6Ls down and still in 10th entering home straight, ran on well, never nearer.
2-wide and 3Ls behind in 5th at the 1100 M, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn and 2Ls 3rd 200 M out, kept on at same pace.
Sluggish start and raced detached in rear 14Ls behind the leader 1200 M out, never a factor.
In 6th place on fence 1200 M out, under pressure and 5Ls behind towards rear when checked 400 M out, no threat thereafter.
On fence when 1L clear 1200 M out, disputing lead off home turn and marginally ahead at the 200 M, caught by winner final strides.
Had cover when 3-wide and 4Ls off pace in 8th 1100 M out, over-raced in places, 3-wide into home straight when still 4Ls behind in midfield, always held.
On fence 10Ls off speed and one from rear at the 1100 M, still in 11th when 6Ls behind and forced 6-wide (widest of all), hung right but ran on very strongly to lead final strides.
2-wide and 4Ls behind leader in 7th 1100 M out, similarly placed but under pressure off final bend, no impression.
Duel for early lead. 3-wide and 1/2Ls off pace rounding home turn. Faded shortly after straightening.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Steadied and drifted back slightly at 600 M. 8Ls down on straightening. Rally belatedly to be closest at finish.
3-wide and niggled along at midfield. 6Ls down going into home straight. Kept on same pace to line.
Off slowly. Trailed field into home straight. Never reached contention in the straight.
Raced behind leaders early. Settled 2Ls behind the pace 700 M onwards. Kept on well in the closing stages.
Wide and without cover in a rearward position. Widest turning for home and closed to within 6Ls of leader on straightening. Finished well in the straight.
Duel with others early before holding a length's lead rounding home turn. Responded well when asked on straightening and drew clear from pursuers.
Slowly away and was urged forward to race behind midfield. Checked at the 600 M and among last few into home straight. No rally in the straight.
Off well and raced at midfield. Steadied and shifted out at 200 M whilst closing the race off fairly.
A length off the leaders early. Gave way gradually from 700 M and among last pair entering straight. Came up empty in the run to the line.
Ridden hard early to vie for the lead. Raced no more than a length off until straightening. Continued well but unable to draw closer in the closing stages.
Vied for the lead in a 4-wide position before dropping behind cover at 600 M. Ridden hard to stay on rounding home turn. Ran flat in the straight.
Towards rear. Maintained similar position when 8th 400 M.
Slowly away, always in the last pair.
Slowly away, always in the last pair.
Towards rear. Only made some minor progress in straight.
Jumped well but lacked early speed to race behind midfield. Slightly progressed to 6th final turn. Kept on but found no extra closing stages.
Well there. 2Ls 4th rounding home bend. Ran on along inside early straight to take 2nd 300 M. Failed to match speed with winner.
Dropped back to midfield or behind from the widest gate. Weakened steadily 600 M out.
Slightly better than midfield. Improved steadily to 3rd 800 M out. Ran away to outside rail from home turn. Hung out badly throughout.
Led field soon after start. Held 1L advantage final turn. Kept on well to win readily.
Midfield or slightly better. Kept on until weakened inside 200 M.
Prominent. Soon dropped back a bit to 5th. Made progress 600 M out to be 2nd home turn. Kept on for a remote 3rd.
In touch. Improved to 2nd 850 M. Steadied 650 M, becoming 4th rounding home bend. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Rear of midfield to straight. Made some headway early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Midfield. Made up some late ground final 200 M.
Towards rear. Produced moderate late impression closing stages.
Mostly 3-wide in forward of midfield. Soon weakened in straight.
Last into straight. Ran on past beaten horses down centre of track.
Never far off to straight. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Always in last few.
Settled in midfield. Not much room early in straight before making moderate late headway.
Prominent to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Made all. Hung on well to the line.
Towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield to straight. Made up some late ground under pressure.
Prominent before faded under pressure final 200 M.
Chased leader. Failed to quicken under pressure to challenge in straight.
Lost considerable ground at start, last to straight. Recovered good ground to be nearest at finish.
Midfield or behind. Weakened soon after straightening.
Settled 10th. Crept closer to 6th early straight. Ran on well 250 M to take command close home.
Sat outside leader before joining the lead 500 M out. Gained slender advantage briefly 200 M. Soon beaten.
Towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield. Failed to respond when given reminders early straight.
Settled 6th on inside. Steady progress 600 M to be 4th final turn. Stayed on but failed quicken to challenge.
Settled at the back from widest draw. Made up some ground on outisde final 300 M. (Dropped whip 300 M.)
Never a factor.
Mainly 9th, 5-wide turning into straight. Stayed on until finding no extra closing stages.
Led field from stable bend. Was joined near 500 M. Found no extra when headed 200 M out.
Led early, settled 3rd on stable bend. Held up when lack of galloping room 300 M. Responded well when in clear inside 200 M to reach front briefly 100 M. Failed to contain the winner close home.
Slightly behind midfield. Crept closer on inside rounding home bend to be 5th 400 M. Stayed on well final 200 M.
Midfield on outside. Ridden along to be 4th from 1600 M. Faded steadily final 400 M.
With leaders when wide far side. Raced in 3rd outside leaders round home bend. One-paced in straight.
Trailed field most of way running past some beaten horses final stages.
Contested lead under pressure down centre of back straight. Lost position rounding home bend and soon dropped out upon straightening.
Never far off. Fought on under pressure without threatening.
Always well there. Quickened to gain 1L advantage about 200 M out. Just held off runner-up's strong late surge.
Settled in last few. Quickened well inside final 200 M to just fail to get up on line.
Held narrow advantage until faded under pressure inside final 300 M.
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Towards rear early. Improved to midfield rounding home bend. Kept on steadily from midfield into straight.
Raced keenly wide in midfield. Dropped out into straight.
Broke well but held up in midfield when widest. Soon weakened into straight.
Ridden early. Midfield most of way. One-paced in straight.
Began fairly from wide draw and steadily settled in midfield or worse 3 wide without cover to straight. No extra when asked 350 M and steadily faded out inside final 250 M.

Jumped fairly from widest and was steadily eased back to the rear section around 3 wide with cover. Switched to the widest on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Tardy start and hard ridden along to race around 2Ls off pace 2 wide through to straight. Made good impression 200 M when asked 400 M out to overhaul 2nd placegetter inside final 100 M to win convincingly. (Distressed.)

Broke fairly and soon settled in midfield 2 wide. After the 600 M steadily edged out to a 4 wide position on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M to grab 3rd closing stages.
Broke fairly and ridden along to take up running on rail through to straight. Was headed soon after the 400 M mark and only able to keep on same pace. Further weakened inside final 100 M.
On jumping got its head up and rider became badly unbalanced. Raced at the tail of the field around 2 wide to straight. Failed to show any running in the straight.

Jumped fairly and niggled along to race 1 to 2Ls off pace on rail. Switched to 3 wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Only able to run on evenly when asked 350 M out and slightly weakened in final stages.

Broke well from wide draw and niggled along to race in a forward position 2 wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 400 M out and took lead near the 300 M but was overhauled by the winner inside final 100 M.

Soon raced in midfield or worse 2 wide. Made little headway at home bend and switched out on straightening to find clear running. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M.

Began fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to a rearward position on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and made up good ground inside final 250 M to miss the 3rd place by a narrow margin.
Refused to jump and took no part in the race.
Slow to begin and steadily recovered to race in worse than midfield on rail. Near the 700 M was checked to avoid heels. Under pressure 400 M out but only able to run evenly to the line.

On jumping bounded in the air and then knuckled. Ridden along to recover lost ground and raced in midfield on rail to straight. Found nothing when asked 350 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Slowly away and soon settled in a rearward position around 2 wide through to straight. Unable to make any impression when asked 350 M out.
2Ls off pace in 2nd when 2-wide at 1200 M, held same spot until entering home straight when under pressure, one-paced thereafter.
6Ls behind leader in 9th when 2-wide at 1200 M, occasionally 3-wide but always had cover, 3-wide on straightening but 5Ls off pace in 7th, stayed on at the one pace.
Very wide 1500 M out on first bend, always at least 3-wide without cover until about 700 M out when over 2Ls down in 3rd, weakened right out from the top of the home straight.
Awkwardly away, on fence 4Ls behind in 5th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 6th at 800 M, 4Ls down in 5th off home turn and going well, gave vain pursuit of winner, held 2nd comfortably.
On fence 8Ls off the speed in 11th at 1200 M out, under pressure and in rear when 10Ls down off home turn, dropped out.
Over 10Ls behind in 2nd last when 2 and 3-wide until 600 M out, 4-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 8Ls behind in about 12th place, no impression.
2-wide and 8Ls behind in 10th at the 1200 M, 3-wide and 7Ls behind in 9th off the home turn, ran on fairly closing stages, never nearer.
2-wide and 4Ls behind in 7th at the 1200 M, 6Ls behind and under pressure to lie up 600 M out, beaten when 8Ls down in 11th off home turn.
Soon led, 2Ls clear on the fence at the 1400 M, always about the same margin clear until the home turn, headed 250 M out and faded rapidly.
Held up 2-wide and 9Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, much the same entering the home straight, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
3-wide with cover when 4Ls behind in 6th at 1200 M, 2-wide and about 5Ls behind still in 6th off the home turn, steadily faded out.
Had the box-seat run on fence about 2Ls or 3Ls behind leader in 3rd or 4th from 1200 M to home straight when travelling well, quickened up to lead 250 M out, pushed out, easily.
About 12Ls last until home straight, never a factor.
On fence 6Ls behind the speed in 8th at 1200 M, similarly placed off the final bend, didn't trouble principals.
Chased the pace early before settling 2 to 3Ls off the pace. Closed to within a length but was held in traffic at the 400 M. Late effort to make the frame.
Began fairly and eased back gradually to rear section. Made a brief dash on straightening but couldn't sustain effort final 200 M.
Broke awkwardly and lost ground at the start. Recovered gradually and settled on fence in a rearward position from 800 M. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners in the straight.
Awkwardly away and raced near the back going into home straight. Put on a late bid in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and raced 3-wide in a rearward position. Remained wide and trailed field rounding home turn. No response in the straight.
Quickly opened a clear lead. Took a sit off the pace at 1000 M and tracked leaders entering home straight. Shook off others 150 M out, dueled gamely with winner to the wire and just missed.

Off slowly but soon hurried back to midfield. Advanced 3-wide in the home turn to be a length off on straightening. Responded well in the straight and dug in gamely over the final stages to win by a narrow margin.
Off fairly. Hurried to the lead after 1000 M and kept no more than 2Ls in front. Joined by others at 600 M and alternated for the lead before being headed by the top pair inside final 200 M.
Niggled along the rails at midfield until straightening. Failed to quicken in the straight.
Off well and settled 2-wide at midfield until straightening. Stayed on same pace to line.
Jumped well and raced wide at midfield. Advanced 4-wide at the home turn for a share of the lead on straightening. Couldn't stay with the leaders in the final 200 M.
Off well and kept within 3Ls of the leader early stages. Inched up and dueled for the lead at 600 M. Remained in contention before being outbid in the final stages.
5Ls off pace and 3-wide in 9th at the 1000 M, caught 4-wide without cover at the 600 M when still 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield, made no impact in the straight.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls off the speed in 6th at 1000 M, steadied at the 900 M, under pressure and 4-wide into home straight when about 5Ls down in 11th, dropped out.
2-wide and 6Ls off the speed in 11th at the 1000 M, wider 600 M out when 5Ls off pace in 10th, always well held in the stretch.
In 12th place 7Ls behind lead and 3-wide but with cover at 1000 M, still 7Ls behind and 5-wide off the home turn, made some late headway down centre of track.
Didn't break well and under pressure in rear from the start, well detached entering straight, tailed off.
Slowly away, on fence in 10th place about 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed through to homestretch, never likely to trouble leaders.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd through to home straight, always outpaced by principals.
Slowly away, about 10Ls off pace when one from rear at 1000 M, 7Ls behind towards rear into straight, still 6Ls down in 12th when bumping 200 M out, ran on strongly, never nearer.
4Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th at the 1000 M, 3-wide and still 4Ls down in midfield entering home straight, one-paced thereafter.
2Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 4th at 800 M, same position entering straight and with a place chance 300 M out, faded badly final 200 M.
On fence 4Ls down in 7th at 1000 M, 5Ls behind at 800 M but closer again over 3Ls down in 6th off home turn, well beaten when bumped 200 M out.
1L clear on fence from 1000 M to home straight, about half a length to the good 200 M out, grabbed by winner final strides.
Caught 3-wide without cover when 1L down in 3rd at 1000 M, 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 800 M and into home straight, half a length 2nd at 200 M, kept on well to lead final strides.
2-wide and 2Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, 3-wide into home straight when over 2Ls down in 5th, ran on well and held 3rd comfortably but had little chance with quinella pair.
Awkwardly away, unbalanced at 1100 M, disputed 3rd place on fence 2Ls behind at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, outpaced thereafter.
2-wide and 2Ls behind in 4th at the 1000 M, bumped entering straight when 1L down in 2nd, still about 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M, always held by quinella pair inside the distance.
2-wide and 6Ls behind the lead in 11th at the 1000 M, 3-wide with cover and 6Ls down in 13th at 800 M, 5-wide into home straight when 7Ls off pace, ran on strongly on run-in, never nearer.
4-wide without cover and 2Ls off pace in 6th at the 1000 M, 4-wide into home straight when about 4Ls behind in midfield, soon beaten.
Over-raced a bit when 4-wide but with cover when 4Ls behind in 9th at the 1000 M, 5-wide into home straight when about 6Ls down in 10th, ran on fairly without troubling leaders.
On fence 7Ls off the pace in 12th at 1000 M, on fence into home straight when still about 6Ls down towards rear, no impression.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 8th at 1000 M, 2-wide and 2Ls down in 4th at the top of home straight, every chance when 1L down in 2nd and staying on well at the 200 M, no extra.
Pressed on to dispute lead out 2-wide at the 1000 M, lost place on the circle and eased out of race over 300 M out, bled.
Slowly away, on fence 10Ls last at the 1000 M, 4-wide into home straight when about 7Ls last, made a little late headway past beaten rivals.
3-wide with cover when 6Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, roughly the same entering home straight, ran on at the same pace.
4Ls off pace and 3-wide without cover in 7th at the 1000 M, 3Ls behind in midfield at 800 M, under pressure off home turn when 5Ls down and losing place, faded.
2-wide and about 5Ls down in 10th or so from 1000 M to home straight, faded out steadily.
Driven to lead early on, crossed to fence at 1000 M when disputing the advantage, 1L clear at top of home straight, same margin clear but looked vulnerable 200 M out, stayed on gamely.
3-wide and 2Ls behind in 5th at the 1000 M, 4-wide entering straight when 3Ls behind in 5th, outpaced thereafter.
Always well there. Cruised to take charge before 250 M. Won impressively.
Led narrowly to straight. Was headed 250 M and soon beaten.
In touch before failing to hold place 300 M.
Was a remote 7th halfway and unable to quicken to threaten in straight.
About 6th into straight where he dropped out quickly. (Bled.)
Was prominent before fading rapidly from the 300 M.
Soon in rear and remained there to straight. Stayed on well final 250 M.
Worse than midfield home bend before reaching 3rd passing 200 M. No extra.
Was 5th 800 M and same place turning into straight. Attempted to threaten but found winner too strong.
Never on terms despite staying on a bit close home.
Never on terms.
Among rear group into straight where he swerved through the field and kept on to be nearest at finish.
Made no show.
At back to straight where he was baulked 200 M. Kept on near finish.
Midfield on 3-wide. Dropped out steadily from home turn. (Saddle shifted from 1000 M.)
Behind midfield. Gave further ground towards the rear far side. Ran on steadily from 9th final turn to just miss 2nd at finish.
Soon led. Headed passing 800 M. Was 2nd until weakening out of contention final 200 M.
Lost ground at start, raced 10th to final turn. Ran on steadily but failed to find clear run passing 250 M. One-paced when in clear closing stages.
Prominent early. Dropped back steadily to midfield or behind 1000 M out. Recovered good ground on inside 250 M without threatening.
Began awkwardly. Near the rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon last. Widest on straightening. Just ran past some beaten horses inside 200 M.
Raced 6th to home bend. Commenced to improve rounding home turn. Responded well when given reminders early straight to take charge final 100 M.
Prominent. 2Ls 4th on inside far side. Failed to quicken 200 M out.
Prominent. Was 2nd outside leader 1200 M. Dropped back to 3rd passing 800 M. Ridden along from 400 M but failed to respond soon after straightening.
Began awkwardly. Soon recovered ground to be 4th. Made good progress 3-wide from 800 M to take lead approaching the Rock. Found no extra when headed 100 M.
Broke well. Settled just off the pace. Kept on steadily without quickening when baulked in straight.
Never in contention. (Lame.)
Always struggling at the back.
Midfield into straight. Made moderate progress without threatening.
Wide in midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to narrowly miss placegetters.
Soon took up running from widest draw, crossing to rails going up Rock. Fought on doggedly under pressure to prevail by the narrowest of margins.
Broke well then settled outside leader. Disputed lead around home bend and into straight. Held every chance but just denied narrowly.
Never nearer.
Midfield early. Commenced move rounding home bend. Close-up 3rd turning in and came to tackle leaders under pressure but unable to peg them back.
Midfield early. Took closer order rounding home bend. Kept on steadily without quickening when not much room in straight.
Towards rear. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Behind midfield. One-paced throughout.
Prominent. Settled for 4th 600 M. 3Ls behind leader final turn. Ran on well inside 200 M to take control 100 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Bounded at start in the widest draw, losing some ground. Recovered ground to be 5th 650 M. Ran on without threatening in straight.
Near rear. Crept a bit closer final turn. Kept on quite well but just missed 3rd narrowly at finish, never nearer.
Well there, was soon in the leading pair. Dropped to 2nd and 3rd when steadied 600 M and 450 M respectively. Further inconvenienced passing 150 M. Run ended.
Never a factor.
Soon last. Just ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Midfield. Faded 400 M. (Mucus in trachea.)
Led. Joined at 800 M. Gained 1-1/2Ls advantage rounding home bend. Kept on until headed near 100 M.
Tardy start, pushed along to recover ground to be 3rd 600 M. Further improved to 2nd early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Behind midfield. Gained ground to 6th 600 M. Under pressure inside 200 M to take 3rd close home.
Attempted to make all. Collared final stages.
Held up behind leaders. Quickened to challenge upon straightening and asserted authority closing stages.
Well back into straight. Making good headway when tightened about 200 M out.
Wide and not far off before losing touch into straight. (Lame.)
Well back. Made up some late ground down centre of straight.
Raced freely in midfield. Not much room early in straight. Kept on same pace when tight between runners closing stages.
Chased leaders to straight then weakened.
Wide towards rear. Circled field around home bend and one-paced from midfield into straight.
Settled in midfield. Switched out for a run upon straightening and ran on steadily without threatening.
Slightly slow out, then travelled mainly in midfield to straight. No extra.
Always well there. Just failed to sustain effort close to home.
Rear into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Soon settled around 2Ls off leader and obtained rail running shortly after the 1200 M mark. Remained in similar position to straight. Ran on well when asked 300 M out to grab 2nd place near the line.

Crowded for room shortly after the start then near the 1600 M lost rightful running and checked. Soon recovered to race in worse than midfield 2-wide and ridden along at home turn to hold position. Kept on same pace in straight.
Shortly after the jump and again near the 1500 M was crowded for room. Raced in midfield or worse 2-wide through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 300 M out.
Shortly after the start was crowded for room and raced in a rearward position on rail through to straight. Unable to make any impression in straight.
Soon raced in a forward position around 2-wide. Pushed along to hold position and hung out making the home turn. No extra in straight and dropped out inside final 200 M.
Soon settled in rearward position 2-wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running but only able to plug on evenly to the line.

Broke fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or better 2-wide. Switched wide shortly after the 400 M mark to obtain clear running. Ran on fairly in early part of straight but was outpaced by placegetters inside final 200 M.
