Had its head up on jumping and lost a lot of ground. Raced at the back and made little headway going up the Rock. Effort was short-lived and commenced to give ground after the 600 M. Tailed out in straight.
Soon raced in midfield or better on rail. Made little headway at home turn and switched to 3-wide on straightening. Under pressure 300 M out and charged home inside final 200 M to win convincingly.
Shortly after the start was crowded for room and raced in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.

Began well from wide draw and niggled along to take up running with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Kept on well when asked 300 M out but just failed to fend off late challenge from 2nd placegetter.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, 6Ls behind at 800 M, improved out 3-wide with cover from 600 M to be 4-wide (widest) off home turn, ran on well but never looked like winning.
2-wide and 9Ls behind in 12th at 1100 M, same entering home straight, made some late headway but never troubled leaders.
On fence 8Ls off pace in 11th at the 1100 M, same entering home straight when steadied, had no running room on fence and clipped heels and nearly fell 200 M out, eased.
2-wide and 1L behind in 2nd at the 1100 M, driven along 600 M out in same spot and still 1L down off home turn, kept on dourly to lead 150 M out, just hung on.
Unbalanced at 1700 M, on fence about 4Ls behind leader in 7th from 1100 M to home straight, 3Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, kept on strongly, failed only narrowly.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls down in 3rd from the 1100 M to home straight when under strong pressure to lie up, faded steadily.
2-wide and 5Ls behind in 8th at the 1100 M, lost place on circle and was 7Ls behind and one from rear on straightening, outpaced.
Awkwardly away, on fence 6Ls off the speed in 9th from 1100 M out to home straight when steadied and checked, no clear run until 200 M out, ran on well, nearest at finish.
3Ls off the speed when 2-wide in 5th from 1100 M to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Had a nice run on fence about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 4th from 1200 M to home straight, faded right out from top of the home straight.
Soon led, no more than 1L clear from 1200 M to home straight, all out when headed 150 M out, no extra.
Steadied 1400 M out, raced 3-wide with cover when 4Ls down in 6th at the 1100 M, under pressure from 700 M out, 5Ls down off home turn, always held.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Angled out on straightening and chased winner with a just over a length to make up. Continued willingly in the straight but could not get by.
On fence in a rearward spot. Made progress along the rails prior to straightening to be within 4Ls of the leader. Kept on without threatening.
Urged forward to set the pace. Opened up a big lead in the back straight but had little left once headed on straightening.

Urged to a forward position. Raced 6Ls off pace in 2nd place early in the back straight. Closed gap gradually and was right behind leader rounding home turn. Vied for the lead before fading out inside final 200 M.
Mostly 2-wide at midfield. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Eased to the back and trailed field until final 400 M. Closed the race off well to claim a minor placing.

Vied for early lead before settling in a forward position. In 3rd place and 8Ls behind the pacesetter at 800 M. Closed in on leader steadily and was 2Ls down at 400 M. Took the lead near 200M and held on gamely under urging.
Settled 2-wide in a rearward position. Pressured at 500 M but only made little progress. Could not offer the necessary late kick.
Crowded at the start and soon raced near the back. Raced wide at the home turn and trailed field into home straight. Offered a mild rally in the final 200 M.
Off awkwardly and soon settled behind midfield. 3-wide rounding home turn and in rearward position on straightening. Had no response in the straight.
Raced along the fence at midfield. Shifted 2-wide before home turn. Troubled at 500 M and was hard ridden to maintain position. Tired in the straight.
Midfield or better, mainly within 3Ls behind leader. Crept closer to 4th final turn. Ran on quite well to claim victory 100 M out.
Towards rear. Ran on from 10th at 200 M to be nearest at finish.
In touch from a wide draw. Kept on same pace until weakened inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Made ground on outside to reach 4th or 5th passing 800 M. Faded inside 300 M.
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Slight progress rounding home bend to be just behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Checked soon after start and was at the last. Recovered good ground on outside final 200 M, never nearer.
Prominent. 1L 2nd 400 M out. Failed to hold place final 200 M.
Slowly away, last early. Soon recovered a little ground to race in 10th. Made progress to midfield home turn. Ran on in straight.
Soon 2nd. Weakened steadily from 3rd after straightening.
Midfield early. Gave ground steadily towards the rear. No progress in straight. (Lame.)
Pushed along to take lead soon after start. Held 1L advantage to straight. Found no extra when headed 100 M out.
Midfield. Short-lived effort 250 M but found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear from the widest draw. 5-wide early straight when making ground under pressure. Did best work final 200 M while drifting out to the outside rail at finish.
Always well there but unable to quicken to match pace with winner.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent. Found nothing under pressure passing 200 M.
Never far off to 200 M, then weakened.
Not far off to 200 M, then one-paced.
Broke well and showed pace to 200 M, then no extra.
Well back, making nice headway past beaten horses closing stages.
Travelled some 2Ls off the lead in midfield before failing to hold place under pressure inside final 200 M.
Travelled behind runners in mid-division of bunched field. Kept on well final 200 M.
Always thereabouts. Failed to quicken to threaten.
Settled just off the pace. Quickened well to hit front closing stages.
Led early, well there to 200 M. Weakened. (Agitated.)
Never seen with a chance.
Soon outpaced.
In touch early, soon raced in 6th. Dropped back steadily final 400 M.
Towards rear. Slightly hampered home turn. Made ground from 5th to take 2nd 150 M. No threat to the winner.
Slowly away, slightly behind midfield. Hung in early straight. Ran on final 250 M.
Jumped OK, soon dropped towards the rear. Recovered some ground inside 200 M.
Started well and was in the front pair. Took clear lead 1000 M out. Found no extra when headed 250 M out.
Slowly away, towards rear. Only made very minor improvement in straight.
Midfield or behind. Ran on while hanging out soon after straightening. Rider had to stop to straighten his mount after 200 M.
Slowly away, always at the back.
Slightly better than midfield. Steady progress on inside to reach 4th 400 M. One-paced when under pressure in straight.
Jumped well from widest draw and was in the leading pair. Raced within 1-1/2Ls behind leader from 1000 M. Responded well in straight to take over 250 M. Won readily.
Soon last. Recovered some ground but on the widest rounding home bend. Failed to quicken in straight.
Better than midfield. Weakened from 5th final turn.
Never a factor.
Prominent on outside. 3Ls 3rd on 3-wide rounding home bend. Weakened 200 M out.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Attempted to make all. Just caught final strides.
Settled around midfield. Kept on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled towards rear. Made up some late ground in straight.
Towards rear. Made up ground under pressure final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Checked and lost position at start. Trailed field most of way.
Missed the break. Raced keenly in mid-division. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Settled in last few. Made up good late ground down outer of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Produced some impression closing stages.
Well there to 300 M, weakened. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.) (Lame.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Some progress turning in but soon faded.
Prominent to straight. Kept on one pace.
Settled just off the pace. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening. Asserted authority close to home.
Never seen with a chance.

Broke fairly and soon raced in midfield or better 2 wide. Switched to 3 wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 350 M out and charged home inside final 250 M to win convincingly.
Slowly away and raced at the tail on inner. Hard ridden along at home bend and made little headway. Only kept on same pace in straight and further weakened inside final 150 M.

Jumped fairly and ridden along to take lead on rail, with around 2-1/2Ls advantage down the back straight. Pulled away from the rest rounding the home turn. Kept on well in straight but was ran down by the winner inside final 100 M.
Unable to muster early speed to race in worse than midfield out wide without cover. Commenced to give ground turning for home and tailed out in straight.
Soon raced in a forward position on rail but proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Pushed along to maintain position at home bend. Only able to run evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.

Broke awkwardly and was soon crowded for room. Raced in mid-division 2 wide but from the 700 M was steadily shuffled back to a rearward position. Under pressure 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly from widest and was soon eased to the rear section closer to the rail through to straight. Switched to the outside in straight and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Began awkwardly from wide draw and pushed along to race in a handy position 3 wide. Made little headway rounding the home turn. Responded fairly when asked 350 M out but was never in position to trouble the 1st pair.
Soon raced in worse than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 350 M out and slightly weakened over the concluding stages.
Broke well and soon settled in prominent position around 2 wide. Ridden along to hold position at home turn. No extra in straight and steadily faded inside final 250 M.
Broke well and pushed along to race in midfield or worse 3 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up little ground inside final 200 M when asked 350 M out.
Jumped awkwardly and pushed along to race in mid-division 3 wide. Under pressure at home turn to maintain position. Found nothing in straight and steadily dropped out inside final 250 M.
Tardy start and niggled along to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M without threatening the placegetters.
10Ls off pace on fence when one from rear at 1200 M, 5Ls behind on fence in 12th off home turn, always looked held but hadn't much room at the 200 M, no threat close home.
3-wide without cover when 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 5th at the 800 M and into home straight, one-paced from then on.
Always wide and without cover, 6Ls off pace and 4-wide without cover in 9th at 1200 M, weakening when about 7Ls behind in rear off home turn when still wide, faded.
2-wide when 1L down in 2nd at the 1200 M, 2Ls down in 2nd entering straight and same at 250 M, swamped 200 M out.
Had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, 4Ls behind in 5th or 6th at 800 M and home turn, dropped out tamely. (Lame.)
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, hard ridden to hold this position turning for home, faded.
Settled 7Ls off pace on fence in 10th at 1200 M, 3-wide into home straight when 5Ls off pace, 4Ls down in midfield at 200 M, ran on strongly and failed only narrowly.
4-wide towards rear at 1400 M, in rear 10Ls off pace and 2-wide at the 1200 M, 5-wide into home straight when still in rear and 7Ls off pace, ran on strongly, never nearer.
Crossed from widest draw to be 5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 6th at 1200 M, niggled 700 M out and forced 5-wide off home turn to be 4Ls down in 6th, ran on well but outpaced close home.
Slowly away, 7Ls off pace when 2-wide in 11th at the 1200 M, still towards rear when 4-wide and 7Ls off pace on the swing, made some late headway but never threatened principals.
3-wide with cover when 8Ls behind in 12th at 1200 M, 5-wide off home turn and 5Ls off pace when worse than midfield, never really got involved.
3-wide with cover when 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, turned for home out 6-wide (widest of all) when about 4Ls down in midfield, ran on strongly to lead 50 M out, kept on gamely.
4Ls or 5Ls off pace on fence in 6th or 7th from 1200 M to home straight, outpaced thereafter.
Soon led, never clear by much more than 1L from 1400 M to home straight, went 2Ls clear at 200 M out, all out when headed 50 M out, faded.
Reserved in a rearward position in the backstraight. Swung wide after the 500 M and improved swiftly up to within striking distance on straightening. Cleared rivals without much effort.
Niggled forward to chase the leader from the outside. Remained among leaders at 400 M but was out-sprinted home.
Led shortly after start and no more than 2Ls in front. Held a length's going into the straight but unable to pick up a notch when pressured and was headed 300 M.
Tucked in behind the leader shortly after the start and followed it into home straight. Had some trouble getting a clear run on straightening. Quickened well after finding clear run to just fail.
Jumped awkwardly and was hurried back to midfield 3-wide and without cover. 2Ls off pace and remained wide rounding home turn. Swamped final 300 M.
Raced along the fence in a rearward position. Switched out on straightening and closed off steadily in the straight.
Off awkwardly from widest draw and raced at the back of the field. Trailed field into home straight and lacked response when called upon.
2-wide at midfield until straightening. 3Ls behind the leader at 400 M but was held up in traffic until final 200 M. Made a belated run to make the frame.
Ridden out of the gates and in a forward position early. Gradually drifted back to midfield after 1200 M. Could not muster a closing response.
Unhurried early and settled 2-wide behind midfield. Switched out and launched its bid on straightening. Remained in close contention until the final 200 M.
Hung in early on, caught 4-wide without cover when 3Ls down in 5th at 900 M, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in 4th and at the 200 M, one-paced close home.
3-wide without cover early on and 1L down in 2nd and still wide at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, faded right out.
Awkwardly away, always about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace towards rear through to homestretch, ran on well, never nearer.
Had cover when 3-wide about 4Ls behind the leader in midfield through to home straight, one-paced on the run-in.
Towards rear about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, always held. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
4-wide without cover and worse than midfield when trying to improve from 5Ls off pace at 700 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight, ran on well, nearest at finish.
Always about 4Ls behind the lead and 2-wide through to home straight, ran on fairly in straight without threatening.
Soon led on fence, over a length off home turn, headed 300 M out, faded.
Always towards rear down backstretch and 3-wide and under pressure off home turn when 6Ls down in rear, made some late headway through beaten rivals.
3Ls off pace in 5th and 2-wide at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in 5th, ran on well for 2nd place but never likely to catch winner.
About midfield 4Ls off pace and niggled along on fence to keep up at the 700 M, one-paced thereafter.
Always within 2Ls of the pace on fence in 3rd through to home straight, picked up well to lead 300 M out, driven out, comfortably.
10Ls off pace in 13th at 1000 M, in 12th held up entering home straight when 4-wide and about 6Ls down, ran on very strongly final 300 M when tacking across to stands' rail, just missed.
Never a factor, 2-wide when 8Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, one from rear when 6-wide (widest of all) and 7Ls off pace, no impression.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off the speed in 4th from 1000 M to home straight, found very little under pressure.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 1L until home straight, faded out rapidly.
On fence about 8Ls off pace in 11th at 1000 M, in 10th when 5Ls off pace and held up from final bend to about 300 M out, ran on very strongly once clear, went close.
1L off pace in 3rd when 3-wide without cover at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd and still no cover at 800 M, 3-wide into straight when pressed on to lead, went 1L clear at 200 M, just hung on.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, hung out at 800 M, 2Ls down in 5th off home bend, one-paced thereafter.
Had cover when 3-wide and 3Ls behind in 6th at the 1000 M, 4Ls down in 6th at 800 M and much the same off home turn when under pressure, faded out tamely.
5Ls behind in 8th when 3-wide with cover at 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in midfield, stayed on fairly without troubling principals.
Slowly away, in rear on fence 11Ls off pace at 1000 M, 5-wide off home turn when about 7Ls last, switched inside to finish off fairly well past beaten rivals, never nearer.
Raced half a length off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, about a neck down when 2-wide off home turn, all out to be 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, faded close home.
On fence 4Ls off the speed in 7th at 1000 M, still on fence when 3Ls down in 6th off home turn, stayed on fairly but always a shade outpaced.
Caught 4-wide without cover when 6Ls behind in 10th at 1000 M, gained cover 800 M out, 5-wide into home straight when about 5Ls off pace, stayed on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 6Ls behind in 9th at the 1000 M, only 4Ls behind in midfield off home turn, very one-paced thereafter.
Improved steadily from rear home bend to challenge inside 150 M. Gained upper hand short of line.
Never troubled leaders.
Midfield into straight where he failed to run on.
About 3rd before home turn. Found little when asked 250 M out.
Worse than midfield before making some headway home bend. Stayed on well to hold every chance close home.
About 5th 1000 M before steadied 800 M, losing ground. Renewed effort and recovered some ground close home.
2nd into straight where he kept on same pace.
Was midfield, pulling hard rounding home bend. Kept on without threatening final 150 M.
Was 5th or 6th home bend. Unable quicken to challenge in straight.
Last to straight where he ran on a bit.
Never a factor.
In rear to 200 M. Never nearer.
Clear leader to straight where he could find no more inside 150 M.
Never far off to straight where he kept on till outpaced close home.
Towards rear early from widest draw. Made progress to reach 4th around 700 M. Was bumped twice on straightening. Found no extra 200 M out.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground on the rail when asked inside 400 M.
Took lead soon after start. Was joined home turn. Responded well 300 M to obtain 1L clear 200 M. Held on.
Towards rear. At the tail near 800 M. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Jumped well and led briefly. Kept on in 2nd until weakening out of contention soon after straightening.
Slowly away, last early. Soon picked up some ground to be just behind midfield. Was hampered near 700 M. One-paced.
Near rear. Made up good ground final 200 M, never nearer.
Always prominent. Came to tackle the leader home turn. Was headed passing 300 M. Ran on well final 200 M but failed to pick up when beaten by a neck.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily 800 M out.
Towards rear. Steady progress on 3-wide rounding home bend. Continued to improve from 7th 400 M to take 3rd inside 100 M.
Never in contention.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent. Dropped to 6th after clipped heels and almost fell near 750 M. Faded final 300 M.
Mainly 3Ls 5th and remained in similar position when being checked 750 M. Kept on quite well to obtain 3rd 200 M out but found no extra closing stages. (Saddle shifted.)
Midfield to straight. Made moderate headway down straight without threatening.
Settled wide behind midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Always struggling at the back.
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Never nearer.
Forward of midfield to straight. One-paced.
Soon travelled outside leader. Quickened well to lead shortly after straightening. Easily.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out. (Heat distress.)
Led to straight then quickly overhauled.
Never in contention.
Always towards rear.
Forward of midfield into straight. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Not far off to straight. Kept on same pace under pressure. Jockey fined for failing to ride out to finish.
Gradually moved up to first few far side. Soon faded in straight.
Slowly away, soon recovered some ground to be just behind midfield. Faded on straightening.
Always prominent. Improved to 2nd 600 M. Kept on well until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Made slight progress home turn to be midfield turning in. Kept on without quickening.
In touch early, soon gave ground to midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to gain 3rd but wide on straightening. Found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Well there. Took lead from 1000 M. Weakened when headed 250 M.
Dropped to last despite under whip early. Only ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Pushed along early and soon reached 4th. 1-1/2Ls 3rd final turn. Ran on well to take lead 250 M. Just held off runner-up's late challenges.
Slowly away, near rear. Made up some ground when last at 250 M.
Midfield to straight. Quickened well final 200 M to just miss narrowly at finish.
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped to 8th when steadied near 750 M. Remained in similar position thereafter.
Led briefly shortly after start, was soon 2nd before giving some ground 800 M to be 5th home turn. Ran on a bit inside 200 M.
Always well back. Badly hampered by faller early in straight.
Well back. Made up some late ground in straight.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well down centre of straight to take charge close to home.
Chased leaders until broke down about 300 M out.
Took up running halfway out. Headed into straight. Kept on one pace.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on well in straight but unable to peg back winner.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened under pressure approaching home turn hitting front 200 M out, but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Midfield to straight then gradually faded.
Led to halfway. Regained lead into straight but soon weakened 200 M out.
Never in the hunt. (Bled.)
Towards rear. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened o hold some chance in straight but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield. Lost position into straight when slightly hampered by faller.
Began fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to the tail of the field. Reminded in same position to straight. Unable to make any impression in the straight.

Pushed along to race in a handy position 3-wide without cover through to straight. Only kept on evenly when asked 400 M out, checked near the 200 M when crowded for room and further weakened thereafter.
Jumped fairly and raced in midfield or better 2-wide. Switched out on straightening to find clear running but failed. Charged home when running was obtained 250 M out to snatch win on the line.

Tardy start and steadily eased to a rearward position 3-wide through to straight. Had trouble finding clear running in straight, ran on well when clear running was obtained 150 M out to miss 3rd place narrowly.
Slow to begin and raced in the rear section on rail. Switched out on straightening to find clear running. Under pressure 350 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.

Jumped awkwardly from wide draw and pushed along to race in rear 2-wide but proved difficult to settle. Made steady headway and switched out at home turn. Ran on well in straight and just failed to hold out late challenge.
Slow to begin and ridden along to race in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but became one-paced inside the final 150 M.
Jumped fairly but unable to muster early speed to race in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. Kept on same pace and only ran past several beaten runners in the closing stages.

Broke fairly from widest and steadily came across to race outside the leader through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but only able to run on evenly and slightly weakened over the concluding stages.

Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in a handy position through to straight. Responded fairly when asked 400 M out and near 100 M was crowded for room. Grabbed 3rd place near the line but without troubling the 1st pair.

Began well and soon raced in a handy position 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but failed to quicken and near the 200 M was checked when crowded for room, made no impression thereafter.

Broke well from wide draw and took outright lead on rail near the 1200 M mark with no more than 1L advantage to straight. Kept on well when asked 300 M out but was headed 100 M out and became one-paced thereafter.
Pushed along to race in midfield or worse 4-wide without cover through to straight. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Raced in midfield or better 3-wide. Commenced to lose ground steadily rounding the home turn and made no impression in the straight.
7Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th at the mile pole, 5Ls down in 7th at 800 M and 3-wide when 4Ls behind in 5th off home turn stayed on best of all to lead 50 M out.
6Ls off pace when 2-wide in 6th at 1600 M, 4Ls behind in 5th at 800 M and roughly the same into home straight when under pressure, outpaced thereafter.
Fractious in gates, reared and slowly away, 5Ls behind in 5th at 1600 M, about 5Ls behind in midfield from 1000 M to home straight, weakened steadily.
9Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1600 M, niggled along at 800 M out when 7Ls behind and worse than midfield, 3-wide into the stretch, found very little.
Never a factor, always detached and never closer than 12Ls off pace at any stage.
2Ls down in 2nd on fence at 1600 M, no worse than 2Ls behind in 3rd from 1000 M to home straight, plugged on fairly well.
About 4Ls off pace in 3rd at 1600 M out, 3Ls behind in 4th on fence at 800 M, lost place steadily on the circle and under pressure entering home straight, faded right out.
7Ls off pace in 7th on fence a mile out, tended to race a bit keenly from 1400 M to about 1000 M out when similarly placed, 8Ls down in about 10th off home turn, nothing to give.
4Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th at 1600 M, pressed on from 1200 M to dispute lead out 3-wide without cover at 1000 M, narrow lead at top of home straight, faded from 300 M out.
11Ls behind in 11th at the 1600 M, still towards rear about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace from 1000 M to home straight when 3-wide and under pressure, didn't trouble leaders.
Slowly away and checked at start, one from rear when 12Ls off pace 1600 M out, 3-wide and in rear but only about 7Ls behind at 800 M and off home turn, ran on strongly, just missed 2nd.
On fence when 9Ls behind leader in 9th at 1600 M, about 8Ls down in 13th at 800 M and off final bend, no threat.

Led on fence by 2Ls at 1800 M, briefly hung right about 1600 M out, disputing lead from 1000 M to top of home straight, kept on dourly to be over 1L clear over 200 M out, grabbed 50 M out. (Tendon & suspensory ligament injury.)
11Ls behind in 12th when 2-wide at the 1600 M, mostly 3-wide without cover down backstretch, 6Ls behind in 8th at 800 M and same when 4-wide into home straight, no impression.
Off slowly and raced 3-wide at midfield early stages. Remained 3 to 4Ls behind the lead from 800 M to 400 M. Kept on gamely in the closing stages.
Niggled along behind midfield. Squeezed back further after being crowded 600 M out. Rear section on straightening and never quickened.
Outran early while racing wide. Urged rounding home turn and improved to midfield. Made up some late ground.
Outpaced early despite being pressured. Continued to be pressured rounding home turn but remained near the back on straightening. No rally in the straight.
Had good early speed and took a length's advantage heading into home straight. Remained clear under a drive.
Off awkwardly and raced mostly in rear section. Kept on same pace in the straight.
2-wide and raced 3 to 4Ls off pace until straightening. Lacked the needed rally in the straight.
Ridden along at midfield and wide without cover early stages Closed to within 3Ls at 600 M but remained widest rounding home turn. Tired shortly after straightening.
Off fairly and was hard ridden to race close behind the leaders. Had trouble keeping up rounding home turn and flattened out in the straight. (Lame.)
Trailed field shortly after start and was among last pair to enter home straight. Lacked a response in the straight.
Began well and gradually drifted back to midfield. Pressured at the 600 M. Improved position in the straight without threatening principals.
Forced the pace outside the winner until straightening. Continued willingly in the straight but could not get by.
Detached about 12Ls last at 1200 M, closer but still 8Ls last off home turn, switched off fence at 200 M and ran on without posing any danger.
About 4Ls down and 2-wide in 7th from 1200m to home straight outpaced thereafter.
On fence 4Ls down in 6th at 1200 M, about 5Ls behind off home turn, crowded until about 200 M out but always appeared outpaced anyway, no threat once clear.
8Ls behind in 9th at the 1200 M, 5Ls behind and 4-wide off home turn when 3-wide, quickened up very well and looked the winner when upsides 100 M out, no extra close home.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in about 3rd from 1200 M to home straight when under pressure to lie up, faded out steadily from top of home straight.
3Ls behind when 3-wide without cover in 5th at the 1200 M, 2Ls 4th at 800 M and hard pressed to hold this position on straightening, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at the 1200 M, 3Ls down in 5th at 800 M, lost place slightly turning for home, still 4Ls behind and not much danger at 200 M, weakened further.
Narrow lead on fence at 1200 M, never clear by more than 1L from 1000 M to 600 M, disputing lead off home turn and headed 350 M out, half a length 2nd at 200 M, faded inside final 200 M.
On fence 6Ls behind in 8th at 1200 M, niggled along 800 M out when 5Ls down in 9th, same entering home straight and steadied 300 M out, ran on well, nearest at the finish.
Keen at the 1200 M when 8Ls off pace in 10th, went 3-wide but had cover at 1000 M, pressed on but 4-wide without cover from 600 M to home straight when 4Ls down in 5th, kept on fairly.
Half a length down in 2nd when 2-wide at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M and pressed on from home turn to lead 350 M out, joined by runner-up at 100 M out, rallied gamely, held on.
On fence 6Ls behind in 8th at 1000 M, 2-wide and 4Ls behind in midfield off home turn and same at 200 M, always looked held by leaders but short of room final 50 M and not ridden out.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M and had a nice similar trail through to homestretch, 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M, half a length down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra close home.
Awkwardly away, had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1000 M to home 600 M out, hard pressed to lie up off home turn, failed to quicken up.
On fence 4Ls behind leaders in about 6th from 1000 M to home straight, held up for a run until 300 M out, running on again when steadied 100 M out, looked held by principals in any case.
Disputed lead on fence from 1000 M to top of home straight, very one-paced thereafter.
Awkwardly away, always well behind, 8Ls down in 11th at 1000 M, 6Ls down towards rear off home turn, no impression.
3-wide with cover when 5Ls off pace in 7th at 1000 M, 1L down in 4th off home turn, every chance 200 M out when a neck 2nd, grabbed by chasing pack final strides.
3-wide without cover in 4th when 2Ls off pace at 1000 M, still out 3-wide and no cover disputing the lead off home turn, led 300 M out, kept on gamely under pressure.
One from rear when 10Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1000 M, still towards rear when 5Ls down and 4-wide off home turn, made some nice late ground but didn't trouble leaders.
Hard ridden from gates but failed to lead outright, disputing the lead out 2-wide at 1000 M, marginal advantage from top of home straight, swamped 200 M out, faded.
Slowest away, 10Ls behind leader in 12th at 1000 M out, 6Ls behind in rear off home turn, still about 4Ls down at 200 M in midfield, ran on very strongly late to nick place.
Slowly away, on fence 8Ls off the speed in 10th at 1000 M, about 5Ls down in 10th off home turn, disappointed for running 200 M out and though he ran on fairly he was always outpaced.
12Ls last on fence in 14th at the 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) on straightening when 6Ls last, ran on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
6Ls off speed when 2-wide in 9th at 1000 M, 3-wide with cover at 800 M, 3Ls behind in midfield off home turn, strong on frame.
In rear to straight. Never nearer.
Never far off to straight where he attempted to threaten passing 200 M. Found only one-paced towards finish.
Never in contention.
Towards rear till making up some ground inside final 200 M.
Well there to straight where he failed to get a clear passage along rails for a considerable distance. Ran on strongly to take command when obtaining a run close home.
Towards rear before improving to be alongside leaders approaching home turn. Effort not sustained 200 M out.
Always prominent. Shared lead into straight before gaining upper hand passing 200 M. Unable to hold winner near finish.
Led or disputed lead to 200 M. Faded near finish.
Never on terms despite staying on a bit closing stages.
Well there briefly.
Midfield rounding home bend and similar place on straightening. Stayed on to be nearest at finish.
Soon in midfield and remained there to straight. Plugged on under pressure.
Towards rear before given reminders 300 M. Kept on steadily.
Towards rear. Stayed on inside 250 M.
Slowly away, last to final turn. Made up some ground on inside but was one-paced closing stages.
In touch. Came to join the leader passing 1200 M. Was headed 350 M. Ran on steadily inside 250 M to re-gain advantage final 100 M.
Towards rear soon after start. Was last and widest final turn. Made up good ground 250 M out, just failing to catch the winner.
Around midfield to 500 M. Found no extra.
Always there. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Behind midfield. Made some progress final turn to be 5th early straight. Made no show inside 200 M.
Towards rear early, soon moved up to midfield. Made ground along rail from 1100 M to reach 3rd 1st turn. Kept on when 4th early straight but found no extra 200 M out.
Pushed along to take lead from 1400 M. Was joined passing 1200 M. Gained upper hand 350 M. Only kept on same pace when headed final 100 M.
Prominent from widest draw. Dropped to midfield from 1000 M. Recovered some ground 1st turn to reach 4th but 4-wide 700 M. Gave ground early straight. Tailed off inside 200 M.
Well there. Quickened well to take charge shortly after straightening and hung on well to the line.
Raced wide in mid-division. Quickened to challenge upon straightening but failed to peg back winner.
Behind midfield when checked approaching home bend. Remained in last few thereafter.
Raced in 3rd to straight. Steadied for a stride about 300 M, then kept on steadily to the line.
Midfield to straight despite hampered and lost position 1300 M out. Fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Soon outpaced.
Niggled along towards rear. Dropped out in straight.
Mostly in midfield despite hampered 1300 M out. Weakened upon straightening.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily to claim distant 3rd closing stages.
In similar position throughout. One-paced in straight.
Chased leader to straight. Faded.
Never in contention.
Led to 300 M. Weakened.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. Made ground from 700 M to reach midfield on straightening. Ran on well to win narrowly in a ding-dong battle closing stages.
Prominent. Was 2Ls 4th final turn. Gave ground steadily in straight.
Began awkwardly, last early. Picked up quickly to be just behind midfield. Steadied passing 800 M, then gave ground gradually.
In the last pair from 1200 M. Recovered some ground passing 600 M and was 10th but widest final turn. Ran on well final 300 M and was just beaten marginally.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Towards rear throughout.
Led. Headed 400 M. Dropped back steadily.
Always there. Responded well from final turn to take lead passing 300 M. Kept on but failed to resist challenges from the quinella pair closing stages.
Jumped well from the widest draw, soon taken back to the rear group. Made some minor progress to midfield home turn. One-paced.
Better than midfield. Gave a little ground to midfield when steadied 800 M out. Kept on steadily in straight.
In touch. Weakened steadily 500 M out.
Slowly away, never a factor.
In touch. Moved up to join the leader passing 1000 M. Gained very brief lead early straight. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Made ground on outisde rounding home bend to be in touch final turn. Failed to quicken in straight.
Around midfield throughout.
Forward of midfield and wide to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Wide in midfield throughout.
Led to 350 M then weakened under pressure.
Tracked leader. Hit front shortly after straightening. Collared passing 200 M.
Settled towards rear. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Prominent. Fought on doggedly to hit front close to home.
Never nearer.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on to hold every chance but unable to draw level.
Towards rear most of way.
Never seen with a chance.
Never nearer.
Began awkwardly and never seen with a chance.
Well back to straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced keenly in prominent position far side. Dropped out under pressure home bend. (See Racing Incidents.)

Broke fairly and niggled along to race in a forward position 2 wide. Lost little bit of ground at home turn to be in midfield on straightening. Under pressure 350 M out but kept on same pace to the line. (Blood in trachea.)

Tardy start from widest and soon settled in a rearward position on rail to straight. Switched to the widest in straight to obtain clear running and made up little ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish.

Best out and ridden along to race in a forward position 3 wide through to straight. Ran on well when asked 400 M out but was unable to find an extra gear to overhaul the winner to settle for 2nd place.
From a wide draw was steadily eased to the rear and shifted to the rail. Had a tendency to hang out down back straight and hung out badly at home turn. Made no impression in straight.
Began awkwardly and dropped to the tail of the field on rail. Switched out on straightening to find clear running but failed to make up any ground in straight.

Broke fairly from wide draw but was unable muster early speed to be in midfield out wide without cover. Near the 600 M was heavily bumped and became badly unbalanced. One paced in straight and further weakened final 200 M.

Broke well and hard ridden in the early stages to take narrow lead on rail through to straight. Kept on well when asked 350 M out but was headed shortly after the 200 M mark and became one pace thereafter.

Broke fairly but was slightly outpaced and raced behind midfield around 3 wide. Made steady headway from the outside at home turn. Responded quite well when asked 350 M out but was unable to run down the 3rd placegetter.
Unable to muster early speed and raced in midfield on rail through to straight. No extra in straight and steadily dropped out inside final 300 M.

Broke fairly and pushed along to be box-seated behind the leader. Popped off the rail on straightening to find clear running. Ran on well when clear running was obtained 250 M out to hold onto 3rd place.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or worse 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and only kept on evenly to the line.
Ridden along to race in midfield 2 wide. Near the 600 M whilst proving difficult to settle shifted out, bumped heavily with another runner and became badly unbalanced. Made no impression in straight.

Jumped well and hard ridden in the early stages to race outside the leader through to straight. Responded well when asked 400 M out and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win by a narrow margin.

Tardy start from wide draw and steadily settled in a rearward position 3 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Kept on same pace in straight and only ran past couple of beaten runners inside final 200 M.
In 10th place 12Ls off pace when 3-wide but with cover at 1400 M, 7Ls behind at 800 M and 4Ls behind in 7th when 4-wide on straightening, had every chance but unable to quicken up.
Niggled along when 11Ls off speed in 8th when 2-wide at 1400 M, 6Ls down at 800 M and about 4Ls down in 9th off home turn, kept on at same pace.
12Ls off pace in 11th when 2-wide at 1400 M, raced keenly from 1200 M to 900 M out, unbalanced 600 M out when about 6Ls down and 3-wide with cover, 4-wide into stretch, no impression.
On fence 11Ls off pace in 9th at 1400 M, 7Ls behind and worse than midfield at 800 M, about 5Ls down in 10th off home turn, never troubled principals.
Slowly away, 15Ls last at 1400 M, 4-wide with cover at 600 M when 8Ls last, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Slowest away and lost ground, on fence in 12th place 13Ls down at 1400 M, 9Ls down in rear at 800 M and 6Ls down off home turn, no threat to principals when short of room final 200 M.
2-wide and 9Ls behind pace in 5th at 1400 M, 5Ls down in 5th at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in 6th, could only chase leaders home.
Soon led on fence, 4Ls clear at 1400 M, 2Ls to the good at 800 M, joined at top of home straight, swamped 300 M out and faded.
4Ls off the pace in 2nd on fence at 1400 M, 2Ls down in 2nd at 800 M, disputing lead out 2-wide off home turn, 1L clear at 200 M, stayed on well.
On fence 10Ls off pace in 6th at 1400 M, 6Ls down in midfield on inner at the 800 M, about 3Ls behind in 6th off home turn, same at 200 M when with place chances, no extra.
3-wide without cover 11Ls behind leader in 7th at 1400 M, 5Ls down in 6th and still no cover at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight and 2Ls 4th, every chance 300 M out, faded final 100 M.
Blundered at start, 7Ls behind leader in 3rd when 2-wide at 1400 M, 4Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, 3-wide and half a length at top of home straight and 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra.
Awkwardly away, one from rear 14Ls off speed at 1400 M, 3-wide with cover 9Ls off pace in 12th at 800 M, 4-wide without cover at 600 M and 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, no threat.
8Ls off pace on fence in 4th at 1400 M, still 4th but only 4Ls down at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn and at the 200 M, ran on well but didn't trouble the winner.

Settled in a forward position early stages. Raced 3Ls off the pace in 2nd at 1200 M. Remained in prominent position going into home straight. Quickened well when asked but unable to draw closer to winner final stages.

Hard to settle in the early stages and raced wide and without cover at midfield. Remained wide without cover in back straight. Urged forward home turn and contended until the 400 M. Tired closing stages.
Gained a clear lead shortly after the start. Made the pace until home straight and tired.

Off well and was restrained to race behind leaders early stages. In 3rd place and 5Ls behind the pace at 1200 M. Closed in on leader after 800 M and contested for the lead into home straight. Swamped at the 400 M.

3-wide midfield early stages. Raced in 5th place and 6Ls behind the lead 1200 M out and improved to within a length on straightening. Made a run among contenders at 300 M but couldn't match winner's pace closing stages.
In a forward position early. Settled 6Ls off the pace in 4th place at 1400 M. Kept within 3Ls of the leader home turn. Angled out on straightening, quickened well and took control final 200 M.
Taken back to race at the rear. Trailed field and switched out to be 6-wide on straightening. Failed to threaten in the straight.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. 5Ls behind the pace at 1000 M. Angled out on straightening but failed to respond in the straight.
Settled in a rearward position. Improved steadily in a 4-wide position rounding home turn and reached within 4Ls of the leaders at 400 M. Was outrun in the closing stages.
Settled on fence at midfield. 5Ls behind the lead at 800 M. Advanced into contention final 400 M but could not sustain its bid in the closing stages.
Missed the kick but recovered to midfield shortly after the start. Drifted back slightly and settled behind midfield in the back straight. Little response when asked on straightening.

Raced behind midfield early. Improved to midfield in back straight but 3-wide. Swung 4-wide on straightening to contend for lead. Edged clear at 300 M but unable to hold off pursuers in the closing stages.
Settled mostly in a rearward position. Swung wide on straightening and closed the race off gamely.
4-wide without cover when 10Ls off pace in 13th at 900 M, still towards rear when 8Ls down off home turn, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Crowded at start, pressed on to race 2Ls down in 4th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn when under pressure, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, kept on to lead 100 M out, all out to hang on.
No better than 7Ls off pace when worse than midfield until home straight when 6-wide, never really figured.
Bounded at start and slowest away, towards rear about 7Ls off pace at 800 M, outpaced and much further behind in rear about 7-wide off home turn, soon eased down.
3 back on the fence 4Ls down at 800 M, 3-wide and still 4Ls down in 5th off home turn, picked up well to be 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on well, only narrowly failed.
Crowded at start, in rear group about 9Ls behind at 800 M, same margin behind when 6-wide into home straight, made some late headway past beaten rivals.
Brief lead very early on, 2Ls down in 2nd 900 M out, hung right on circle but still led 500 M out, 2Ls clear at top of home straight but hung left, fading when headed 100 M out. (Lame.)
3Ls down in 5th and 2-wide at the 800 M, lost place on circle and 6Ls down in 7th when 4-wide off home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Hard pressed to lead by 2Ls on fence at 900 M, headed 500 M out and hard ridden when 2Ls down in 2nd from top of home straight, dropped out tamely. (Lame.)
Outpaced early on and 12Ls last at 900 M, never a factor.
Crowded at start and checked, about 9Ls behind in 12th at 800 M, same into home straight and posed no threat.
About 6Ls off the speed in midfield towards the inner from backstretch to homestretch, ran on quite well, never nearer.
6Ls off pace in midfield when 2-wide at 800 M, fading when 5-wide and 7Ls behind off home turn, no impression.
3-wide without cover when 3Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, under pressure to hold this spot off the home turn, weakening when 4Ls down in 4th off home turn, faded right out.
In midfield about 6Ls behind the speed down in backstretch, about 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, always well held from that point on.
10Ls off the speed when 2-wide in 13th at 1200 M, 7Ls last off home turn when 4-wide, never a factor.
2-wide and 8Ls off the pace in 10th at 1200 M out, 5-wide into home straight when about 5Ls down in 12th place, very one-paced thereafter. (Lame.)
On fence about 4Ls behind in 5th at 1200 M, 5Ls behind in 6th at the 800 M, 3Ls down in midfield off home turn, kept on well without seriously troubling principals.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 2Ls down in 3rd at 1200 M, about 3Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, hard pressed to maintain prominent spot on turning for home, faded out.
Pressed on to lead by half a length out 2-wide at 1200 M, 2Ls clear at 800 M, under pressure when headed at top of home straight, faded right out.
Slowest away, about 11Ls last on fence at 1200 M, about 5Ls down in 11th at top of home straight, no impression.
Had cover when 3-wide and 8Ls off the pace in 11th at 1200 M marker, 5-wide into home straight when about 6Ls down in 13th place, no threat.
6Ls off pace in 8th when 2-wide at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 7th at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when still in midfield about 3Ls behind, no chance with winner but ran on well for 2nd.
3-wide without cover when about 3Ls down in 4th at 1200 M, 2-wide and 4Ls down in 4th at 800 M, head up and hung out turning for home when 1L down in 3rd, faded out.
Keen 1400 M out, 2-wide when 4Ls behind in 6th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 5th at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when about 1L down in 4th, 2Ls down in 2nd at 400 M, no extra.
8Ls off pace and 4-wide without cover in 12th at 1200 M, 3-wide without cover when 5Ls down in 7th, 5-wide into home straight but quickened up well to lead 300 M out, pulled clear, big effort.
Brief lead on fence at 1400 M, soon headed and 2Ls down in 2nd at 800 M, led again at top of home straight but headed about 300 M out and faded steadily.
About 8Ls off pace in 9th on fence at 1200 M, much closer about 5Ls off pace off home turn but short of room until 350 M out, found very little once clear.
Never a factor.
Led before joined by INVERNESS turning into straight. Regained 1/2L advantage 200 M before finding no extra close home.
Midfield at best.
Well there to straight where he quickened inside final 200 M to threaten near finish.
Towards rear till making up considerable ground in straight to lead towards finish.
Unseated rider at start. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never troubled leaders.
Was 5th 1200 M and similar place turning for home. Soon beaten.
Midfield into straight where he kept on same pace.
2nd last 1000 M and remained in rear to 200 M where he stayed on quite well.
Was prominent before finding no extra inside 100 M.
In rear to 200 M where he ran on strongly, doing best work at the finish.
Ran 4th to halfway, and was 3rd 400 M. Found little when asked.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. Made progress rounding home bend to be just behind midfield in 5-wide turning in. Ran on under pressure to gain 2nd closing stages.
Well there. Led briefly passing winning post first time. Headed passing 1200 M and was 2Ls 3rd far side. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Midfield or slightly better. Gave a little ground turning into back straight. Failed to recover thereafter.
Never a factor.
Prominent on inside. 1-1/2Ls 2nd far side. Failed to hold place when weakened 200 M out.
Well there from widest draw. Took lead passing 1200 M. With 2Ls advantage final turn. Won going away.
Always at the back.
Slowly away, last early. Remained in the rear to 300 M. Recovered some ground inside 200 M.
Jumped well and led briefly early. Then remained 4th and was 4-wide final turn. Found no extra final 150 M.
Midfield or slightly better. Made ground under pressure in straight. Just missed 2nd close home.
Towards rear. Slightly inconvenienced on the rail passing 600 M. Made gradual progress in straight while steadied for a run 100 M out.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Steady progress to midfield stable bend. Crowded for room 600 M. Was checked turning for home. Faded.
Began slowly. Settled towards rear. Swung wide into straight. Ran home steadily past beaten horses.
Settled towards rear. Went wide into straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Midfield most of way.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled inside final 200 M.
Prominent to straight. Gradually weakened.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Disputed lead before dropped to some 2Ls off pace approaching 1000 M bend. Faded into home straight.
3-wide in midfield to straight. Went wider turning in. Found nothing.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled at the back. Snuck up on rails turning in. Not clear run throughout straight. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Commenced run making swift progress around field home bend. Sustained effort down straight to assert authority over 200 M out.
Midfield. Came under pressure home bend. Found nothing.
Slowly away, at the rear. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Midfield or behind from widest draw. Made no show in straight.
Behind midfield. Crept closer order final turn. Kept on well from 6th early straight but found not much room final 100 M.
Always thereabout. Kept on same pace in straight.
Settled 5th and was mainly 3Ls behind lead. Ran on when under pressure 200 M, just failed to catch the winner.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Near rear before making up some ground from home turn.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit to 4th halfway. Wide turning into straight. One-paced.
Towards rear. Only made minor progress final turn. Soon found no extra.
Soon 2nd. Kept on well early straight but failed quicken to challenge closing stages.
Behind midfield. Checked at 400 M. Never recovered.
Made all. Just held off runner-up's challenges closing stages.
Never in contention.
Slightly slow out. Quickly recovered to rear of midfield. Took closer order far side. Found nothing from midfield into straight. (Lame.)
Towards rear in straight. One-paced.
Prominent. Faded gradually in straight. (Lame.)
Settled at the back. Commenced run rounding home bend. Ran on steadily under pressure down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled just off the pace. Ran on steadily along rails in straight to hit front close to home.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Niggled along towards rear. In last few into straight. Kept on steadily.
Midfield. Made modest progress in straight without threatening.
Settled within striking distance. Held every chance in straight but shifting ground throughout.
Broke well. Settled behind leaders. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish. Had to switched out for a run in the process 200 M out.
Led to 200 M. No extra.
Settled at the back. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish, despite steadied for a stride inside 200 M.

Broke fairly and soon asked to race in midfield on rail. Switched to 4-wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Ran on well when asked 250 M out but was unable to match speed with the winner to settle for 2nd.
Tardy start and soon dropped to the tail of the field on rail. Switched to the widest on straightening to obtain running. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.

Best out and soon raced in a prominent position on rail. Switched out and made little headway rounding the home turn. Kept on well in straight but was unable to trouble the 1st pair to settle for 3rd.

Slightly slow to begin from wide draw and soon settled in worse than midfield 2-wide. Steadily switched to the outside turning for home to obtain clear running. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 250 M out.
Ridden along to race in better than midfield 2-wide. Pushed along to maintain position going up the Rock. Commenced to give ground at home turn and dropped out in straight.

Unable to muster early speed to race in a rearward position on rail. Near the 1400 M was checked when crowded for room. Stayed in similar position to straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail. Made steady headway rounding home turn to be 1L off pace on straightening. Under pressure 300 M out and charged home to win comfortably.
Soon settled in midfield 2-wide. Switched out to obtain clear running turning for home. Unable to make any impression in straight.
Niggled along to race in a prominent position 2-wide and hung in for major part of the race. Gave ground steadily rounding the home turn and tailed out in straight.
Broke well from widest and ridden along to race in a prominent 3-wide without cover. Ridden along to maintain position at home bend. No extra in straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M.

Tardy start from wide draw and soon settled in worse than midfield on rail. Switched out on straightening to find clear running. Made up steady ground when clear running was obtained 200 M out but without threatening the placegetters.

Began well and pushed along to take up running on rail with no more than 1-1/2Ls through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out but only able to keep on evenly and further weakened over the concluding stages.
Forced wider 1000 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls off pace in 6th at 700 M, niggled along to hold this spot at 500 M, no threat in home stretch.
Keen and headed up at 1000 M, soon settled 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th at the 700 M, 3Ls down in 5th off final bend and at 200 M, one-paced closing stages.
Disputed lead early on, had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd form 700 M to home straight, led 100 M out, stayed on well.
3-wide without cover at 800 M when half a length down in 2nd, same off home turn, weakening when 2Ls down at 200 M, faded.
Disputed lead early on, led by half a length on fence at 700 M, same margin clear off home turn and at 200 m, headed 100 M out, no extra.
3-back on the fence 4Ls behind leader in 7th when 700 M out, 4Ls down in midfield off home turn and at 200 M, always held by principals.
Slowest away, on fence 6Ls off pace in 7th at 700 M, 5Ls down in 9th off home turn, stayed on well to nick a place close home.
8Ls off pace and 2-wide at 800 M in rear, 6Ls down in 11th on fence off home turn, stayed on past a few beaten rivals.
Slowly away, caught 4-wide without cover when 6Ls off pace in 11th at 700 M, looped field from 600 M to be 4-wide into stretch when 4Ls off pace in midfield, soon petered out.
Crowded at start, keen early on, checked at 800 M, 5Ls off pace when 2-wide at 700 M, always outpaced.
Crowded at the start, keen when badly checked 800 M out, head up and hung out 600 M when about 5Ls off pace in 10th, 8Ls last off home turn, never dangerous.
5-wide without cover early on, 3-wide without cover when 2Ls down in 4th at 700 M, 3-wide when 2Ls down in 4th of home turn, soon beaten. (Sore wither area.)
Settled on fence in a rearward position through to home straight. Made up ground steadily in the straight to be closest at finish.
Lagged to the home straight. Made up ground steadily before getting stuck in traffic over the final 100 M.
Settled on fence at midfield. Responded well when pressured on straightening, kept on gamely for a minor placing despite being held up in the closing stages.
Made the pace along the fence. Held a 2Ls advantage into home straight. Kept on well but failed to hold off pursuers inside the final 100 M.

Ridden to a forward position and settled behind the leaders in the early stages. Kept within 3Ls of the pace in the back straight. Ridden hard from 500 M out and stayed on well over the concluding stages.

Urged from the gates to race upside the leader early stages. Took a sit behind the pace at 1200 M and raced within 2Ls of the leader until home straight. Wore down leader in the final 100 M and held on.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield until being pressured at 400 M. Kept on steadily in the straight before being crowded before the line.
2-wide at midfield. Picked up well on straightening and continued to gain steady ground over the closing stages. Ran out of ground to catch winner.
Settled 2-wide in rear section. Swung wider rounding home turn, lacked the needed rally in the straight.
Settled behind midfield and was among last few to enter home straight with 8 to 9Ls to make up. Closed the race off with a mild rally.
Raced 3-wide and without cover at midfield until home turn. Had nothing left in the straight.
No more than 3Ls off the pace until 800 M. Struggle to keep pace entering home turn and weakened on straightening.
Soon near rear. Made up some ground inside 200 M.
In touch early, gave ground steadily to behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Lost ground at start, last early. Towards rear before recovering some ground to be behind midfield 400 M. Kept on without quickening.
In touch early. Dropped back a bit to 6th 900 M. Remained in similar position thereafter.
Better than midfield from widest draw. Gradual progress to 4th 800 M. 3-wide 3rd passing 600 M. Kept on until one- paced inside 200 M.
Mainly 5th to 300 M. Faded.
Towards rear. Lack of daylight on inside soon after straightening. Failed to improve.
Towards rear and was wide. Last 300 M out. Raced greenly throughout.
Mainly midfield. Stayed similar on outside in straight.
Led briefly early, then settled 3rd within 2Ls behind leader. 1L 2nd final turn. Ran on to re-gain advantage 200 M. Won convincingly.
Well there. Took lead from 1000 M. Held 1L advantage 600 M. Held on until headed 200 M. Failed to match speed with winner.
Near rear. Made ground steadily in straight for a remote 3rd.
Last to 250 M. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Well there. Gave some ground to 4th rounding home bend. Weakened soon after straightening.
Slowly away. Trailed field into straight. Never a factor.
Never on terms.
Chased leader to straight, then faded.
Well back into straight. Made up good late ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Wide throughout. Mostly in midfield before taking closer order around home bend. With leaders turning in but soon faded.

Settled in rear of midfield. Commenced run passing 800 M making steady headway around field to be close up 4-wide turning in. Sustained progress to hold every chance but just failed to peg back winner.
Settled in forward of midfield. Moderate effort rounding home bend. Kept on same pace in straight.
Around midfield. Gave ground under pressure rounding home bend.
Always prominent. One-paced in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Never far off to straight. Fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Never better than midfield.
Never better than midfield.
Virtually made all. Hung on under pressure to fend off runner-up's late challenge.
Raced 5th before taking a remote 4th passing 200 M.
Shifted out abruptly soon after start, never able to feature in the race.
Always prominent. Came to tackle winner inside 400 M. Just failed to prevail narrowly. (Whip knocked off 100 M.)
Checked soon after start, always at the back.
Always prominent. Kept on well but unable to catch the first pair.
Bumped at start but still prominent. Took lead at course proper. Kept on gamely to hold off challenges final 200 M.
Shifted in baruptly after start, led field to course proper. Raced 4th until dropping back steadily inside 200 M.
Broke well and led onto course proper. Gradually weakened.
Towards rear throughout.
Rear early. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Around midfield. Fought on under pressure closing stages.
Held slender lead onto course proper. Headed about 150 M out. No extra.
Never seen with a chance. Ran past beaten horses late.
Always well there. Found winner too good.
Never far off to 200 M. No extra.
Soon out-paced.
Always prominent. Kept on same pace.
Settled off the pace. Responded well under pressure final 200 M to take charge closing stages.
Prominent briefly. Gradually weakened from halfway.
Well there to 200 M. Outsprinted.
Prominent briefly. Weakened halfway out.
Broke fairly from wide draw and ridden along to race in a forward position 3 to 4 wide without cover to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M and only able to keep on evenly to the line.
Slow to begin and soon became detached. From the 1000 M mark until straightening regained some lost ground. Made up little ground in early part of straight but became one- pace inside final 150 M.

Ridden along to race in midfield around 2 wide. Near the 800 M was crowded for room. Unable to see clear daylight until 250 M out and proved difficult to ride out whilst hanging out. Only ran on evenly to the line.

Jumped well and hard ridden along in the early stages to race in a forward position on rail. Shuffled back to midfield at home turn. Short for room from 400 M to 200 M, found the line well final 100 M to grab 2nd at finish.
Hard ridden along to race in a prominent position 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Shortly after the 400 M was crowded for room and failed to make any impression thereafter.

Began fairly and soon settled in midfield or better around 2 wide through to straight. Responded fairly when asked 350 M but was unable to match speed with 2nd placegetter in the closing stages to be overhauled on the line.

Tardy start and soon recovered to race in a forward position 2 wide. After the 1000 M edged forward to share the lead on rail to straight. Kept on well when asked 400 M out but was overhauled by 2nd and 3rd placegetters near the line.
Jumped fairly and soon settled in midfield 3 wide with cover. Making the turn at 800 M was crowded for room. Under pressure 350 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.

Best out from widest and steadily eased to behind midfield closer to the rail. Steadily switched to the outside and made little headway turning for home. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M out but just failed to get into the placings.
Hard ridden along in early stages to race in a forward position 2 wide. After the 1000 M nudged forward to share lead to straight. No extra in straight and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly from wide draw and steadily settled in midfield or worse 3 wide with cover. Switched out and made steady headway at home turn. Closed the race off strongly when asked 400 M out to win convincingly.
Began fairly from wide draw and hard ridden along to race in midfield or better out wide without cover through to straight. No extra in straight and tailed out.

On jumping bounded in the air and soon became detached. From the 1000 M mark until straightening made up steady ground from the outside. Unable to sustain effort in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Led by 1L on fence at 1600 M, same at 800 M, kicked on 550 M out and 2Ls clear at top of home straight, pressed on to draw 3Ls at 200 M, well clear when eased final 50 M.,
Caught 4-wide without cover when 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1500 M, had cover when 4-wide and 4Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, tiring when 5-wide off home turn when 8Ls off pace, stayed on steadily.
A little slowly away, 7Ls off pace and 2-wide in rear at 1200 M, 6Ls down in rear at 800 M, 5-wide into home straight when 10Ls last, very weak.
2-wide when 1L down in 2nd at 1600 M, niggled along 900 M out, 3Ls down in 3rd off home turn, very one-paced thereafter.
Steadied at 1600 M, 4Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th at 1500 M, 7Ls down in 11th off home turn, no impression.
A little keen 1600 M out, had the run of the race on fence in about 3rd from 1500 M to 800 M, under pressure over 2Ls down in 2nd off home turn, kept on at same pace and lost 2nd about 100 M out.
3Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 6th at the 1500 M, 4-wide and 2Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M when niggled along, lost place on circle and 7Ls down off final bend, no threat.
7Ls off speed when one from rear at 1200 M, 6Ls down at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when about 9Ls down in rear bunch, no chance.
Awkwardly away, 3 back on the fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield from 1600 M to 800 M, 4Ls down in 4th when 3-wide off home turn, no chance with winner but stayed on best of the rest.
Awkwardly away, raced keenly until about 1400 M out when about 6Ls off speed on fence in 12th, about 5Ls down in 5th off home turn and hard ridden, stayed on at same pace.
5Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover in 10th at the 1400 M and same at 800 M, 8Ls down in 12th off home turn when 6-wide off final bend, stayed on slowly down the centre of the track.
Keen early on, 6Ls off pace when 2-wide in 11th at 1400 M marker, 5Ls behind in 10th at 800 M, always well outpaced from 600 M out but plugged on past a few tired rivals.
Slowly away, keen early on, pressed on 5-wide without cover when 5Ls off pace in 9th at 1400 M to dispute lead out 3-wide at 1000 M, faded on circle, beaten before home turn.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1400 M, keen at 1200 M, still prominent at 800 M, faded badly on the circle and beaten before home turn.
Niggled along at midfield in back straight. 6Ls off pace 800 M out. Closed the race off fairly.
Detached in the early stages. Rejoined the field at the home turn and ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.
Broke well and opened up a clear lead 1st turn. Held a 3Ls advantage in the final 200 M. Dug in gamely and just failed to hold off the winner.
Taken back from a wide draw and raced in a rearward position. Shifted out to race wide in the back straight. Made some ground rounding home turn but had no closing response.
Caught widest 1st turn and then settled wide at midfield in the back straight. Drifted back slightly 800 M and kept on same pace in the straight.
Off slowly and settled behind midfield. Advanced making the home turn with 7Ls to make up on straightening. Responded when roused and finished gamely.
Off slowly. Raced along the rails in 3rd place 3 to 4Ls behind the leader in the back straight. Continued well rounding home turn but failed to respond when asked on straightening.
Ridden out of the gates. Within 5Ls of the leader in 4th place in the back straight. Struggled from 700 M out and finished tailed out.
Settled at midfield. Gave ground despite being hard ridden halfway through the back straight. Among last few to enter home straight and found nothing thereafter.
Settled behind midfield. Ridden from 800 M out without much response and gave way in the straight.
Stalked the pace until 800 M. Remained in 2nd place and 3Ls behind leader on straightening. Gave chase throughout home straight but couldn't step up a notch.
Niggled along the fence at midfield. Hard ridden to stay on 600 M out and entered home straight with a 6Ls deficit. Quickened nicely on straightening and ran down the leader just before the post.
Raced towards the rear. Checked at 700 M whilst making ground and was among last few to enter home straight. Made up little ground in the straight.
2Ls behind lead in 4th at 1200 M, 1L down in 3rd and going well off home turn, led 150 M out, ran on well.
10Ls behind on fence in 12th at 1000 M, about 6Ls behind off home turn in 9th, one-paced thereafter.
Raced 3-wide with cover about 7Ls off pace in 9th until 800 M out when left without cover from there until home straight when 5Ls down in 8th, no impression.
2-wide and 4Ls behind in 5th at 900 M, 3-wide when about same margin behind in 6th off home turn, no impression.
Led by a neck when 2-wide at 1200 M, niggled along when 2Ls down in 2nd at 800 M and same off home turn, 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M, always held by the winner.
Slowest away losing 2Ls, on fence 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 5th off home turn, 2Ls down on fence at 300 M and every chance of a place, couldn't sustain effort.
On fence 8Ls off speed when 2-wide in 11th at 1000 M, 6Ls behind and still worse than midfield off final bend, didn't reach leaders.
10Ls behind when one from rear at 1000 M, 8Ls last and widest off home turn, plugged on slowly down centre of track.
4-wide without cover when a neck down in 3rd at 1200 M, pressed on to lead by 1L on fence at 800 M, joined at top of home straight, faded right out from 300 M out.
8Ls behind leader on fence at 1000 M when in 10th place, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls behind in midfield, made a little late ground but no threat.
On fence a neck off the pace in 2nd at 1200 M, about 1L down in 2nd at 800 M and improved to dispute lead on straightening, clear lead 300 M out but headed 150 M out and no extra.
5Ls off pace in 6th at 900 M, improved to be 2-wide and 3Ls down in 5th on straightening, outpaced by principals from 200 M out.
11Ls behind in rear at 1000 M, 8Ls behind in 13th off final bend, never posed any sort of danger.
5Ls behind in 7th when 3-wide with cover at 900 M, 3-wide into home straight when still 5Ls behind but under pressure, faded badly. (Heart irregularity.)
3-wide with cover and disputed lead at 1000 M, a neck down in 3rd at 800 M, faded on circle and 5Ls down into home straight, faded right out.
Didn't break that well, one from rear when 8Ls off pace on fence at 900 M, 7Ls behind off home turn, made some late headway past beaten rivals.
Always detached in rear, never a factor. (Lame.)
Disputed lead when 4-wide without cover at 1000 M, 1L down in 4th when still 4-wide off home turn, 5-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in 5th, tired very quickly.
2Ls off speed in 7th when 3-wide with cover at 1000 M, 3Ls behind and niggled along at 700 M, worse than midfield when 5Ls behind and 4-wide into home straight, dropped out.
Slowest away, 5Ls behind when 3 and 4-wide with cover in 10th at 900 M, 5-wide into home straight when about 6Ls behind in 9th, no threat thereafter.
2Ls off pace on fence in 5th at 1000 M, improved to be 1L down in 2nd off home turn and almost upsides 300 M out, failed to go with winner but still well clear of 3rd home.
5Ls behind leader when 3-wide with cover in 9th at 900 M, niggled along 700 M out, still 5Ls behind in midfield off home turn, well outpaced by principals but stayed on better than most.
Awkwardly away, 2Ls off pace in 6th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 5th when 3-wide into home straight, very one-paced thereafter.
6Ls behind the leader when 2-wide in 11th at 900 M, roughly the same into home straight, soon no chance.
Disputed lead on fence at 1000 M, half a length clear at 800 M and 1L to the good off home turn, travelling well when almost joined 300 M out but quickened away again, readily.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 8th at 900 M, 3Ls down in 4th off final bend, no chance with quinella pair but had little trouble taking 3rd place.
2-wide when a neck off speed in 4th at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M and niggled along, over 2Ls down in 3rd and under pressure when unbalanced off home turn, faded.
Had cover when 3-wide and 8Ls off speed in 12th at 900 M, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 7Ls down, very weak.
Ran 4th into home bend before failing to hold place approaching straight and faded rapidly.
Never far off to straight, where he failed to quicken early on. Kept on finish.
Was 5th or 6th when steadied 800 M, losing ground. Never recovered.
About 5th into straight. Stayed on till finding no extra towards finish.
Towards rear before making up some ground final 250 M.
2nd or 3rd into straight where he failed to get a clear passage 250 M out. Obtained clear run 150 M and soon took command to win readily.
Made no show.
Unable to keep in touch despite ridden hard early. Among rear group into straight where he ran on a bit closing stages.
Never better than mid-division.
Never a factor.
Trailed field in last to straight. Never nearer.
Ridden to lead soon after start and was in front till close home when he failed to hold first 2.
Always prominent. Held every chance but unable to resist winner close home.
Well there. 2Ls 3rd final turn. Gave ground when lacked of galloping room on inside final 200 M.
Took lead to 200 M. Faded.
Made no show.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear group when inconvenienced 1400 M. Never recovered.
Tardy start, never a factor.
In touch. Responded well from 4th 300 M to take slender advantage passing 200 M. Just beaten narrowly final strides.
In touch. Improved to 3rd passing 1200 M. Moved up to 2nd 600 M. Failed to hold place inside 200 M.
Shifted in from widest draw to be 2-wide 5th from 1400 M. Ran on early straight to pipe up with the runner-up passing 150 M. Just got up at finish.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Remained in rear to straight. Made ground when asked inside final 250 M. Never nearer.
Midfield or slightly behind. Made ground steadily from 7th final turn. Ran on under pressure inside 200 M. Just missed.
Midfield. Steady progress far side to be 4th or 5th turning in. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Stayed on a bit final 150 M.
Always in last few.
Broke well and led, crossing to rails gradually. Won unchallenged.
Never better than mid-division.
Always prominent, niggling along far side. Ran home one-paced.
Midfield before dropped out passing 500 M.
Never on terms.
Settled behind lead. Failed to quicken to threaten in straight.
Never in contention.
Slightly outpaced early. Picked up to midfield before home bend. Fought on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Always well there but failed to quicken to threaten.
Never better than mid-division.
Never better than midfield. No extra in straight.
Led field to final turn. Weakened steadily.
In touch. Widest final turn. Faded.
Near rear. Became last when blundered near 1000 M. Just ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Towards rear. No improvement.
Near rear throughout.
In touch from a wide draw, soon dropped to the midfield. Ran on from outside early straight but was one-paced closing stages.
In touch. Advanced to 3rd final turn. Unable to quicken final 200 M.
Held 8th to straight. Steadied for a run 200 M when improving. Ran on well but just failed to catch the winner.
Tracked leader until taking over on straightening. Kept on to hold off runner-up's challenges closing stages.
Ridden along to be in midfield. Crept closer order on inside turning into straight. Failed to quicken inside 200 M.
Never rear. Made ground steadily in straight, never nearer.
Midfield or slightly better. Ran on from 5th early straight without threatening.
Always prominent. Kept on steadily closing stages without threatening.
Settled in midfield. Ran on under pressure down straight to be nearest at finish.
Attempted to make all. Tired badly inside 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Never better than midfield.
Tracked leader. Disputed lead turning in but soon weakened.
Settled at the back. Made significant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Close up. Slightly hampered turning in. Held every chance passing 200 M but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Hung wide around stables bend and soon pulled up.
Midfield early. Made some headway rounding home bend. Dropped out quickly under pressure upon straightening.
Settled in rear. Commenced move passing Rock. Sustained progress from midfield into straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield to straight. Quickened well to hit front 200 M out and hung on under pressure to prevail.

Broke fairly and pushed along to race 1L off pace around 2-wide through to straight. Responded fairly when asked 250 M out but was unable to match speed with the 1st pair inside the final 150 M to settle for 3rd place.

Slowly away and was then crowded for room. Ridden along to recover some lost ground to be in midfield on rail to straight. Made good impression inside final 200 M but just failed to run down the winner.

Slow to begin and hard ridden to lead narrowly on rail from 700 M through to straight. Responded well when asked 250 M out and fended off late challenge from 2nd placegetter to cling onto the winner spot.
Slowly away and soon raced at the tail on rail through to straight. Made no impression in the straight.

Tardy start and soon recovered to race in midfield 2-wide through to straight. Slightly held up in early part of straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when clear running was obtained 200 M out.
