Jumped slowly and was then crowded for room. Niggled along to race in midfield 4-wide without cover. Rounding the home turn hung in badly and tailed out in the straight.
A bit slow to the jump from widest and soon raced in a rearward position on rail to straight. Unable to make any impression in the straight.
Began well but failed to muster early speed to be behind midfield on rail to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and made up little ground inside final 150 M to be closest at finish.
Best out but was beaten for speed to race around 1-1/2Ls off pace 3-wide through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 250 M out and just failed to catch the 3rd placegetter.
Broke well and ridden along to lead 2-wide up to 700 M. Only able to run on evenly when asked 250 M out and slightly weakened over the concluding stages.
Ridden along to race in midfield 3-wide with cover through to straight. Stayed one-paced when asked 250 M out and weakened inside final 150 M.
Broke fairly from wide draw and steadily settled in worse than midfield 2-wide to straight. Under pressure 250 M out but only able to keep on evenly to the line.
Broke through gates beforehand, soon restrained, away well, always about 2Ls off pace in 3rd on fence until home straight, led 150 M out, driven out, always holding on.
Outpaced early on and 6Ls off pace in 8th at 600 M, 7Ls behind off home turn and at 200 M, made some good late headway but never troubled leaders.
Soon led out wide, led by 2Ls on fence at 600 M, 1L clear at the 200 M, headed 150 M out and swamped inside final 100 M.
Awkwardly away, detached and 8Ls behind at 700 M, still 7Ls behind at 200 M out, ran on very strongly final stages, nearest at the finish.
About 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in 5th or 6th on fence through to home straight, still 3Ls down in 5th at 200 M, stayed on strongly on fence close home but always looked held by winner.
Within 4Ls of the pace in 4th or 5th until the home straight and under pressure from 600 M, very one-paced thereafter.
About 2Ls down in 2nd and 2-wide until 600 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 1L down in 2nd, soon outpaced.
Caught 3-wide without cover when about 3Ls down in 4th at 600 M, 4-wide (widest of all) into home straight, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, no extra.
About 5Ls or 6Ls off pace when worse than midfield until straightening, stayed on well late, never nearer.
Slowest away, detached in rear and at least 9Ls off the pace at 600 M, made some late headway in the home straight, never threatened.
Raced close to the early pace before settling 2-wide at midfield after 1400 M. Ran on steadily and just missed a minor placing.

Travelled along the fence at midfield. Drifted back after being crowded at 800 M but recovered shortly. Checked at 250 M whilst making a run and kept on evenly in the closing stages. (Dropped whip 250 M.)

Raced close up off the rail early stages. Eased back slightly 1400 M to race 5Ls off pace in 4th place. Closed to within 3Ls at 800 M and was ridden hard rounding home turn. Failed to quicken in the closing stages. (Mucus.)
Pressed the pace 2-wide before sliding in behind the leader at 1300 M. Remained just off the pace until straightening. Unable to step up a notch in the straight and faded in the closing stages.

Dropped back at the start to race at the rear until back straight. Went wide and without cover after 900 M and advanced to be within 5Ls of the leader at 700 M. Widest at home turn and had no response when roused.
Settled at midfield. Advanced to be within 3Ls of the leader at 800 M and was 3-wide making home turn. Kept on same pace in the straight.

Raced 3-wide in a forward position early. Tucked in behind the leaders at 1400 M to race in 3rd place. Remained within 2Ls off the lead rounding home turn. Lacked the needed response in the closing stages.
Wide without cover in a forward position early. Eased back to race in a rearward position from 1600 M through to home straight. Swung wide on straightening and kept on steadily to line.
Hustled to the front and made the pace into home straight with a length's advantage. Headed inside final 200 M but dug in gamely to hold a minor placing.
Unhurried and trailed field until 800 M. Improved along the outside rounding home turn and swung to the extreme outside on straightening. Blazed past the field and won easily.
Settled behind midfield. No response when asked at home turn. Weakened home turn and finished tailed out.
Raced 2-wide behind midfield. Turned out on straightening and made a good rally.
2-wide and 5Ls off speed in 6th at 1100 M, niggled along at 500 M when 5Ls down in 9th, no threat thereafter.
On fence 9Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, keen 900 M out, 7Ls down in rear off home turn, stayed on strongly on fence and never nearer.
Slowest away, 7Ls behind when 2-wide in 9th at 1100 M, niggled along at 900 M, 6Ls down in 11th off home turn when 3-wide, no impression.
Never much of a factor, 7Ls off pace in 8th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 10th on fence on the swing for home, no danger.
Pressed on to lead on fence by 1L at 1200 M, 2Ls clear from 1100 M to 700 M, 1L clear from 600 M to 200 M, all out and hung on gamely.
Had a nice spot on fence about 2Ls off pace in 2nd through to home straight, went 1L 2nd at 200 M and with every chance, faded final 100 M.
4Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th at 1100 M, well placed when 3Ls down in 5th off home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Bounded at start, 3 back on the fence throughout about 4Ls off pace in about 5th, picked up well to be 2Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, stayed on strongly failed only narrowly.
Caught 3-wide without cover when 6Ls off pace in 7th at 1100 M, pressed on out wide to be 2Ls down in 4th at 700 M, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in 4th, beaten 200 M out.
Tried to lead early on but had to settle 2-wide and 2Ls off pace from 1200 M out to home straight, soon faded.
3-wide with cover when 9Ls behind and one from rear at 1100 M, improved to 4Ls off pace in midfield at 600 M, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in 7th, one-paced on the run-in.
2-wide and 10Ls off pace in rear at 1100 M, 7Ls last at 800 M, 5Ls down in 9th off home turn when 5-wide (widest of all) ran on very strongly, nearest at the finish.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. 4-wide turning in. Made ground steadily inside 300 M.
Bounded at start, losing some ground. Remained at rear before making steady ground from 1000 M to be 5th final turn. Faded 350 M out.
In touch to final turn. Faded.
In touch early from widest draw, soon gave a little ground to midfield. Kept on early straight but found no extra inside 200 M.
Soon near rear. Made very minor progress from 12th on straightening.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped back steadily 1000 M out. Wide.
Near rear soon after start. Crept closer to 9th final turn. Ran on well final 300 M to grab 3rd near finish.
Slightly better than midfield early. Gave ground gradually to 10th or 11th final turn. Very minor recovery in straight.
Midfield. Steady progress from 1000 M to reach 3rd 800 M. Around 3Ls behind lead early straight. Came to tackle winner 200 M but effort not sustained.
Behind midfield. Gave some ground when crowded 850 M. Made improvement on inside final turn. Ran on steadily in straight.
Prominent. Dropped back to 5th 900 M. Made no show from home bend.
Slowly away, last to home turn.
Led briefly early, then set outside leader (winner) to straight. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Led field from 1200 M. Held 1-1/2Ls advantage 400 M. Kept on well when being challenged final 200 M.
Niggled along early travelling mainly some 3Ls off the pace. Fought on steadily down straight without threatening.
Contested early lead and took up running approaching home bend. Held one length advantage upon straightening and hung on well to finish.
Never better than midfield. No response under pressure in straight.
Raced freely behind midfield far side. Midfield rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Amongst leaders early, then settled just off the pace to straight. Found nothing.
Always struggling at the back.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Recovered good ground on outside from 800 M to reach 3rd or 4th 500 M. Faded soon after straightening.
Jumped well from widest draw, settled 5th. 4th 450 M. Kept on but failed to maintain position final 200 M.
Last soon after start. Ran past a couple of beaten horses in straight.
Never a factor. (Bled.)
Led field until joined final turn. Kept on gamely but was beaten narrowly at finish.
In touch. 2Ls 4th rounding home bend. Found no extra soon after straightening. (Lame.)
Prominent. Set outside leader until joining the lead final turn. Kept on gamely to gain upper hand narrowly at finish.
Pushed along early to be prominent. 2Ls behind the leading pair on straightening. Kept on without threatening.
Behind midfield. Under pressure 450 M. Ran on inside 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Bounded at start, last early. 10th rounding home bend. Recovered good ground in straight. One-paced closing stages.
Around midfield throughout.
Around midfield to straight then gradually weakened.
Towards rear. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never nearer.
Midfield into straight. No extra.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Waited with. Made significant progress down centre of straight to get up on line.
Rear into straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield. No clear run early in straight. One paced under pressure final 200 M.
Well there to 200 M then faded under pressure.
Raced wide from poor draw with leaders far side. Gained slender advantage home bend. Still in front early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Sluggish at start. Made no show.
Midfield throughout.
Broke well and disputed lead far side. Lost touch upon straightening and faded gradually.
Raced 4-wide in prominent position. Kept on one pace without quickening final 200 M.
Began fairly and soon raced in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M but was unable to fend off late challenge from 2nd placegetter to settle for 3rd.
Tardy start and pushed along to race in a rearward position around 2 wide through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 400 M out.
Best out from wide draw, steadily eased to midfield or better 3 wide and proved difficult to settle. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but became one-pace inside final 200 M.

Slightly slow into stride and soon raced in midfield wide without cover. Near the 1000 M went forward to race 1L off pace 3 wide to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but became one-pace over the final 100 M.
Broke fairly from wide draw and ridden along to race in a forward position on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but was unable to quicken and kept on evenly to the line.
Slowly away and raced at the back on rail. Near the 800 M was shuffled further back. Made no impression in the straight.
Broke fairly and soon raced in midfield 3 wide with cover through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 400 M out and weakened slightly inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly and soon raced in midfield on rail through to straight. Found nothing in the straight and steadily faded inside final 250 M. (Mucus.)

On jumping blundered and outpaced in the early stages to race towards the rear on rail. Near the 800 M whilst hanging out clipped heels and blundered. Switched wide in straight for clear running. Made good impression 200 M.

Broke well from wide draw and ridden along to take up running on rail from the 1200 M with no more than 1L advantage to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M and pulled away from the rest inside final 200 M.

Tardy start and steadily eased to race in a rearward position around 2 wide. In early part of straight was held up. All out 300 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to grab 2nd place near the line.
Slightly slow to begin from widest and soon raced at the tail around 2 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Unable to make any impression in straight.
Tardy start from wide and ridden along to race outside the leader from the 1000 M to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Began fairly and soon settled in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Unable to respond when asked 400 M out and steadily weakened out of the race inside final 250 M.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in midfield at 800 M and same when under pressure and 4-wide into home straight, stayed on without troubling leaders.
Slowly away, on fence 5Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 5th at 800 M and off home turn, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on well and nicked 2nd final strides.
2-wide and a neck off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, still prominent 2Ls off pace at 800 M, dropped out rapidly on the circle and beaten before home turn.
About 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, checked repeatedly from 600 M to about 500 M, 3-wide and 6Ls down and worse than midfield off home turn, no impression.
4-wide without cover when 6Ls off pace in midfield at 1200 M, pressed on without cover at 800 M, 3-wide and 3Ls off pace into home straight, soon beaten.
Fractious in gates, 2-wide and 6Ls off pace in midfield at 1200 M, soon driven along to lie up, struggling in rear before home turn and soon beaten.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, gained cover 800 M out and about 4Ls down in 4th or 5th off home turn, soon faded out.
10Ls last 1400 M out, still last 7Ls off pace at 800 M, never better than midfield.
No worse than 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1400 M to 600 M, 2Ls down in 2nd off home turn, led 150 M out, ran on well.
Had cover when 3-wide and about 5Ls off pace in midfield from 1000 M to 600 M out, 5-wide into home straight, all out to be 3Ls down in 4th at 200 M out, faded thereafter.
On fence 7Ls off the pace in 11th when 2-wide at 1400 M, 6Ls down in about 10th at 800 M and on straightening, made some late headway on run-in.
Slowest away, 9Ls off pace in 12th and 2-wide at 1400 M, under pressure at 600 M when 7Ls down in rear bunch, 4-wide into home straight, never dangerous.
Led by a neck at 1400 M, 1L clear at 800 M and 2Ls up off home turn, headed 150 M out, no extra and lost 2nd final strides.
10Ls off pace in 13th at 1400 M, raced about 4-wide down the back straight in rear when often without cover, 6-wide (widest) into home straight when 7Ls down in rear, no impression.
Settled towards the rear. 3-wide rounding home turn and quickened well on straightening. Tried gamely but could not get past the winner closing stages.
Settled 3 to 4Ls off the lead in 2nd place. Made steady ground on leader in the straight and took over the lead final 100 M. Kept on well final stages and prevailed under a hard drive.
Raced on fence in 3rd place and 4Ls off the pace. Kept similar position on straightening but failed to quicken in the home straight.
Best out and was eased back to race 5Ls off the pace in 4th. Maintained similar position home turn and swung out on straightening. Kept on well in the straight.
Off slowly and settled at midfield until straightening. Failed to muster a rally in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and was allowed to drift back to rear section. Among last few to enter home straight. Made a run through rivals and closed the race off well.
On fence at midfield. Drifted slightly back at 1000 M but soon recovered. Lacked the needed rally in the closing stages.
Opened up a clear lead shortly after start and held a 3Ls lead into home straight. Kept on gamely but unable to withhold the top pair in the closing stages.
Off slowly and then trailed field all the way into home straight. Little response until making a belated run in the final 200 M to make up some ground.
Slowly away and raced in rear section early stages. Advanced to 3rd place and within 5Ls of the lead at 800 M. Continued in same position into the straight but found nothing thereafter.
Awkwardly away, 10Ls last at 1200 M, often 3 and 4-wide without cover in rear until 800 M out, 4-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 6Ls last, always well held.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 8th at 800 M, 4Ls down in 5th off home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Slowest away, on fence 9Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, 7Ls down in 9th at 800 M, 5Ls down one from rear off home turn, tight for room at 300 M, ran on strongly to take 2nd on line.
On fence 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, 2Ls off pace on fence with the run of the race in 3rd at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, outpaced thereafter.
4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 5th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 4th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, every chance at 300 M, didn't quicken up.
Soon led but didn't cross to fence until 1000 M out when 2Ls clear, headed at top of home straight, soon beaten and eased final 200 M.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, 2-wide and over 1L down in 2nd at 1000 M, led 400 M out, 1L clear at 200 M out, headed final strides and lost 2nd on the line.
6Ls off pace on fence in 8th at the 1200 M, 3-wide when 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, picked up well to be 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, stayed on well to lead final strides.
2-wide and 6Ls behind leader in 7th at 1200 M, 3-wide without cover at 1000 M when 5Ls behind in midfield, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in 5th, one-paced thereafter.
3Ls off pace on fence in 4th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, always outpaced by principals.
4Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 3rd at 800 M and 3Ls down in 3rd off home turn, all out to be 2Ls down in 2nd at the 200 M, no extra.
Couldn't lead so raced on fence 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 2nd off home turn, very tired when 3Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, soon swamped.
Awkwardly away, on fence 4Ls off speed in 3rd at 1200 M, 5Ls off pace in 5th on fence entering homestretch, soon beaten.
14Ls last at 1200 M, 8Ls down in rear bunch and 5-wide off home turn, staying on 4Ls down in midfield in the centre of track at 200 M, kept on strongly to lead final 20 M.
Raced freely when 12Ls off the speed on fence in 11th at 1200 M, 8Ls down in rear bunch on fence on straightening, one-paced thereafter.
Led by 1L out 2-wide at 1200 M, didn't cross to fence until 800 M out, 3Ls clear off home turn and 2Ls up at the 200 M, grabbed by winner about 20 M out.
On fence 7Ls off the speed in 5th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 4th and 2-wide on straightening, steadied when beaten 100 M out.
Niggled along when 11Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, 8Ls off pace when 3-wide into home straight, always outpaced.
Hung out badly, 7Ls off pace and 3-wide without cover in 6th at 1200 M, 4-wide no cover at 600 M, 6-wide (widest) into home straight when 8Ls off pace in rear bunch, soon beaten.
In midfield when 9Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1200 M, 3-wide into home straight when about 6Ls down in midfield, checked 200 M out when staying on at the same pace.
14Ls off pace and one from rear at 1200 M, 10Ls last and held up when 4-wide into home straight, soon clear and ran on well but too late.
12Ls behind leaders when 2-wide in 12th at 1200 M, 4-wide into home straight when about 8Ls off the speed in 10th place, no impression.
In 9th place when 10Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1200 M, 3-wide on straightening when about 6Ls down in midfield, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
On fence 9Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, 2-wide on straightening when about 6Ls down in midfield, made some late ground but never troubled leaders.
Prominent to straight where he failed to run on.
Midfield to straight where he kept on to reach 3rd 200 M.
Never far off to straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Towards rear till staying on a bit final 250 M.
Never a factor. (Lame.)
In touch to 300 M. Soon beaten.
Was 8th 1000 M and similar place on straightening. Ran on strongly to take charge near finish.
In rear to straight. Never nearer.
Never in the hunt.
6th or 7th into straight where he quickened well along rails to lead 200 M out. Found winner too strong.
Ran well to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
1st or 2nd to straight where he could find no extra 250 M.
Last to 900 M and worse than midfield into straight. Kept on without threatening under pressure.
Never troubled leaders though improving a bit closing stages.
Slowly away, recovered ground steadily to be 3rd 1000 M out. Ridden along rounding home bend. Faded inside 400 M.
Midfield or behind. 9th final turn. Made up some ground in straight.
2Ls 2nd before giving some ground to 4th far side. Renewed effort 400 M to tackle leader 200 M. Effort not sustained.
Slowly away, soon recovered some ground to be midfield or better along the rail. Kept on quite well in straight.
In touch. Improved to 2nd from 1000 M. 1-1/2Ls behind leader turning in. Soon found no extra.
Pushed along from widest draw to take lead 1400 M. Found no extra when headed 100 M out.
Towards rear. Steady progress rounding home bend to be 7th final turn. Ran on under pressure to take control inside 100 M. Never threatened. (Lame.)
Steadied soon after start and was difficult to settle. Raced mainly in midfield, widest final turn. Gave ground steadily. (Saddle shifted.)
Towards rear. Steadied turning for home. Made ground steadily in straight, doing best work final 200 M.
Near rear. Ran past a few beaten runners in straight.
Midfield early, dropped back gradually to the rear group. No progress.
Never a factor.
Took up running far side. Never headed.
Led before headed halfway. One-paced in straight.
Never in contention.
Always in last few.
Behind midfield. Took closer order far side. Made no further impression from midfield into straight.
Prominent to home bend. Weakened.
Settled in midfield or behind. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield.
Always prominent. Kept on steadily in straight.
Settled in midfield. Did not find much room in straight.
Settled at the back. Ran on well down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out inside final 200 M.
Rear. 2nd last to 150 M. Ran on from outside to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Made some moderate progress in straight.
Towards rear. Dropped out approaching 600 M. Tailed off in straight.
Towards rear. Steady progress far side to reach 7th final turn. Ran on when asked 200 M out to take 3rd closing stages.
Midfield or better. Weakened passing 400 M.
Led briefly early, 3rd from 1000 M. 4th rounding home bend. Made no show soon after straightening.
Well there. Led briefly approaching 1000 M. Then in a short margin 2nd before re-gaining advantage passing 800 M. Kept on well until headed close home.
Around midfield to 400 M where he made progress to 4th turning for home. Ran on under pressure to claim victory close home.
Better than midfield. 2Ls 3rd passing 600 M. 2nd 400 M. Failed to hold place final 200 M.
Well there. Led field from 1000 M. Headed 700 M. Held 2nd to 400 M. Faded 200 M out.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit inside 200 M.
Better than midfield. Dropped back a bit to behind midfield far side. Recovered some ground inside in straight.
Settled at the back. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Slightly sluggish at start. Settled towards rear. Midfield far side. Ran on well down centre of straight to get up on line.
Midfield to straight. Made no progress.
Led or disputed lead. Unable to sustain effort under pressure in straight.
Towards rear to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Settled in rear. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Given reminders early. Raced mostly in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Never better than midfield.
Well there. Weakened into straight.
Midfield early. Moved up to join leader rounding stable bend. Dropped out under pressure in straight.
Never seen with a chance.

Tardy start from wide draw, raced in midfield or worse 2-wide and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Under pressure 250 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M without threatening the winner.

Began well but was slightly outpaced to race in midfield 2-wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Only able to keep on evenly in straight and slightly weakened in the final stages.
Began fairly from wide draw and raced in midfield or worse around 3-wide through to straight. No extra in straight and tailed out inside final 200 M.
Tardy start and unable to muster early speed to race at the tail on rail through to straight. Only kept on one-paced when asked 250 M out and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Began well and raced in a forward position 3-wide in the early stages. Shortly after the 1000 M eased to race 2Ls off pace 2-wide to straight. Unable to quicken when 250 M out and only kept on evenly to the line.
Began fairly and soon settled in a rearward position on rail through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Broke well and niggled along to race around 1L off leader 2-wide through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 250 M out but was unable to fend off late challenge from 2nd placegetter to be overhauled in final stages.
On jumping bounded in the air and pushed along to race in midfield or worse on rail. Hard ridden to maintain position at home bend and only able to run on evenly in the straight.

Began well and ridden along to take up running on rail with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Responded well when asked 250 M out and pulled away from the rest inside final 200 M to win comfortably.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race 2Ls off pace on fence through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 250 M but was crowded for room near the 200 M and became one-paced thereafter.
Jumped fairly from widest and steadily settled in a rearward position 2-wide through to straight. Unable to make any impression when asked 250 M out.
Broke well from wide draw and slightly outpaced to race in midfield 3-wide without over through to straight. Found nothing when asked 250 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 7th at 1100 M, about 6Ls down in 9th off home turn, was short of room final 200 M but never looked a likely challenger.
Raced freely on fence 7Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1100 M, left 3-wide without cover at 700 M and pressed on to be about 2Ls off pace and 3-wide into home straight, soon faded out.
Never better than midfield or 6Ls off the speed at any point.
Detached in rear about 15Ls off the speed at 1100 M, always struggling.
Pressed on to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1100 M, 1L clear at the home turn, headed 150 M out and faded final 50 M.
On fence 8Ls off pace on fence in 10th at 1100 M, same into home straight and never a factor.
5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th at stable bend, 3Ls down in 5th and 2-wide on the circle, gained to be just 1L down in 4th at 200 M, led 150 M out, driven out.
8Ls off pace when 3-wide without cover in 8th at 1100 M, gained cover 700 M out and 3-wide into home straight when 5Ls off pace in midfield, ran on very strongly late for 2nd.
2Ls off pace in 2nd on fence at 1100 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, a neck 2nd and with every chance 200 M out, no extra final 100 M.
Slowest away, 9Ls off pace and one from rear at 1100 M, improved on the circle but 6Ls down and 4-wide (widest) off home turn in 8th, stayed on well, nearest at the finish.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 3rd at 1100 M, headway to be 1L down in 2nd off home turn, all out to be 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, faded markedly close home.
6Ls off pace on fence in about 5th from 1100 M to home turn, switched back inside to challenge at 200 M but always outpaced.
Duelled for the lead until 600M. Stayed 1/2L behind the leader going into home straight and tired shortly after.
Raced 2-wide and kept within 2Ls of the pace until home straight. Weakened on straightening.
Eased back to a rearward position. Among last pair to enter home straight. Switched out for the stretch run and improved position without threatening.
Off well from widest draw and was eased back to a rearward position. Improved rounding home turn in a 3-wide position. Closed the race gamely to just miss.
Stayed behind midfield until straightening. Responded well in the straight and was closest at finish.
Travelled better than midfield. Stayed within 4Ls of the lead rounding home turn. Switched out on straightening and kept on well to line.
Raced near midfield until home straight. Kept on same pace to line.
Off slowly and failed to muster speed. Trailed through to home straight and found nothing in the straight.
Raced on fence behind the leaders. Continued to be in a prominent position rounding home turn and stayed on well over the concluding stages to grab a minor placing.
Off awkwardly and lost ground at the start. Remained in a rear section until straightening. Made up some ground in the straight.
In a forward position early but dropped back to midfield after being crowded 900 M. Ridden to maintain position after the Rock. Lacked a rally in the straight.
Broke well was in a disputed lead until 700 M. Held a slight advantage going into the straight. Kept on gamely in the straight and proved narrowly best.
Slowest away, 8Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover in 10th at the 1200 M, still well behind when niggled along 600 M out, 6-wide into home straight and soon beaten.
7Ls behind in 9th and 2-wide at 1200 M, roughly the same into home straight, never figured.
Soon led, clear by 1L on fence from 1200 M to home straight, still a length up at 200 M, hung on gamely.
Tried to lead but settled 1L off pace in 2nd when 2-wide at 1100 m out, under pressure to hold this position from 600 M out, 4Ls behind in 5th and beaten off home turn.
Had cover when 3-wide and 6Ls off the speed in 8th at 1200 M, under pressure on the circle and 5-wide into home straight when about 7Ls off pace in 9th, no impression.
Switched toward fence from wide gate, 2-wide and 10Ls last at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover at 700 M, 7-wide (widest of all) and 9Ls last into home straight, no danger.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, tended to hang out throughout, about 4Ls down in 6th off home turn, ran on strongly but couldn't catch the winner.
On fence 8Ls off pace and one from rear in 11th at 1200 M, improved to be 6Ls down on fence in 8th on straightening, 3Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, kept on well.
Steadied 1300 M out and 4Ls behind and 2-wide in 5th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 4th on fence entering straight, could only stay on at same pace.
On fence 2Ls off pace with the run of the race in 2nd or 3rd from 1200 M to 600 M out, 1L down in home straight with every chance, failed to quicken up and weak inside final 200 M.
3Ls behind when 2-wide in 4th at 1200 M, about 3-wide into home straight when under pressure and cover 2Ls off pace in 3rd, always outpaced.
4Ls behind when 3-wide without cover 1200 M in 6th, gained cover at 1000 M when 5Ls down in 6th, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls down in midfield, one-paced thereafter.
Towards rear. Made some improvement passing 900 M. Widest turning in. Ran on well final 250 M, just lost 2nd final stride.
In touch. Moved up on 3-wide from 1000 M to be 2nd outside leader 600 M. Took advantage 250 M out until headed 100 M when finding no extra.
Slowly away, soon recovered ground to be prominent. Dropped back steadily from 4th early straight.
Towards rear. Steady progress rounding home bend to be 6th final turn. Ran on quite well to claim victory passing 100 M. Held on.
Towards rear. Last early straight. Soon tailed off.
Began awkwardly, last to 400 M. Made ground steadily when asked 300 M.
Mainly 5th to straight. Weakened 200 M out. (Mucus in trachea.)
Slowly away, raced in midfield or slightly behind. Widest turning in. One-paced.
Well there, took clear lead passing 1400 M. Found no extra when headed 250 M out.
Led briefly from widest draw. Sat outside leader to final turn. Faded.
Behind midfield on inside. 10th 400 M. Made up good ground 300 M out, never nearer.
Held 6th to final turn. Weakened.
Slowly away, near rear. No significant improvement.
Began awkwardly, near rear. Made ground soon after straightening, doing best work final 200 M.
Broke well and attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort and headed nearing finish.
Chased leader to straight and weakened.
Rear. Made some late impression in straight.
Settled in last few. Ran on well down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in prominent position. Held every chance inside final 200 M but soon outsprinted.
Well back. Made up good late ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Waited with. Romped home down centre of straight to assert authority close to home.
Midfield. Made moderate progress without threatening.
Prominent. Faded gradually in straight.
Midfield. Dropped out into straight.
Wide in midfield. One-paced in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Raced keenly in prominent position to straight then weakened.
Well there. Dropped out under pressure in straight. (Distressed.)
Started awkwardly, near rear. Checked approaching 300 M. Ran on to recover good ground to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Crept closer order on inside to 5th 400 M. Ran on well final 200 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Slowly away, near rear. Crept closer order on inside final turn. Continued to make ground in straight, never nearer.
Better than midfield. Faded soon after straightening.
In touch early, dropped back gradually from 1100 M to be 2nd last home bend. Held up when found no room to improve early straight. Recovered some ground when in clear final 200 M.
Well there. Took lead 850 M to 450 M. Weakened from 3rd at 200 M.
Well there early. Dropped back steadily from 1100 M, towards rear rounding home bend. Last turning in. Recovered some ground on outside in straight.
Towards rear. Short-lived effort on outside rounding home bend. Weakened 450 M.
Last early, soon picked up along rail to be just behind midfield. Continued to make progress home bend to be 2Ls 3rd final turn. Sustained effort in straight to take lead 200 M. Just held on.
Ridden along to take lead briefly passing 1200 M. 1L behind lead at 800 M. Regained advantage final turn. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Ridden along early to reach 5th 1000 M. Dropped back a bit to midfield 500 M. Recovered ground to 4th early straight. Ran on under pressure 250 M but failed quicken to challenge closing stages.
Midfield or slightly better. Made no show in straight.
Ridden early to sit outside leader. 2Ls 3rd 800 M out. Dropped back steadily from 600 M. Checked near 300 M out when weakening.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield upon straightening. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled at the back. Made up good late ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield.
Never seen with a chance.
Well there. Quickened well to hold every chance in straight. Denied victory narrowly.
Led to 400 M. Dropped out.
Settled in rear. Obtained split over 200 M out and sustained effort to assert authority close to home.
Well back into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Well there. Failed to quicken under pressure in straight.
Prominent. Faded gradually upon straightening.
Prominent briefly. Wide in midfield into straight. No extra.
Mainly in midfield. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Prominent. Quickened to gain slender advantage early in straight but unable to sustain effort and swamped closing stages.
Outpaced in the early stages to race behind midfield on rail. Hung out at home turn and near the 600 M was checked when crowded for room. Unable to make up any ground in the straight.
Unable to muster early speed to race behind midfield 2 wide through to straight. Unable to make any impression when asked 400 M out.
Slightly out-paced in the early stages to race worse than midfield 4 wide without cover. Made steady headway from the outside at home bend. Weakened steadily from 4th at 250 M.
Began fairly and pushed along to race in midfield on better on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M and only ran on evenly to the line.
Ridden along to race in midfield 2 wide. In the middle stages commenced to hang out and near the 600 M was steadied away from heels. No extra in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Began well from widest and niggled along to race in midfield or better 3 wide to straight. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in midfield 2 to 3 wide with cover through to straight. Hung in in straight and proved difficult to ride out. Only kept on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.

Slightly slow out of the gates and hard ridden in the early stages to take lead on rail from 900 M. Kept on fairly in early part of straight but was headed near the 200 M and became one-pace thereafter.

Tardy start from wide draw and soon settled at the back on rail. Made little headway and switched out rounding the home turn. Under pressure 400 M out and cruised home to take charge inside final 150 M.
On jumping bounded in the air and stumbled. Soon recovered to race in worse than midfield 3 wide. Hung out rounding the home bend. Made no impression in the straight.

Best out and ridden along to lead on rail until the 900 M. Dropped back to race 1L off pace to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but without threatening the 1st pair. (Lame left front leg.)
Broke well from wide draw and pushed along to race in a forward position 3 wide without cover to straight. Unable to move up a gear when asked 400 M out and only kept on same pace to the line.

Broke fairly and hard ridden along to race in a forward position 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Responded quite well when asked 350 M but was unable to match speed with the winner inside final 150 M to settle for 2nd.

Jumped fairly from wide draw but unable to show early speed to race in a rearward position 3 wide. Switched to the outside at home turn to obtain clear running. Failed to show any running in the straight.
About 6Ls off pace in 10th when 2-wide at 800 M, still towards rear and held up from home straight to 200 M when 3Ls down, finished off very strongly and joined leader on line.
Always about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield until straightening, no impression from then on.
Tended to hang out throughout, 5Ls off pace and 3-wide at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in midfield, same margin down at 200 M, one-paced.
Towards rear throughout and never better than 7Ls off pace at any stage.
Steadied 800 M out when 4Ls down in 6th at 800 M, closer off home turn when only 2Ls down in 4th, stayed on strongly and narrowly missed out on a place.
Pressed on to race 3Ls off pace at 800 M, tended to lay out off home turn, led 300 M out, stayed on well but was headed final strides.
Good speed to lead on fence by 2Ls at the 800 M, joined at top of home straight, headed 300 M out and soon beaten.
Led early on but headed at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 2nd at the 800 M, on terms on straightening and all out to be about 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra.
Broke through gates at first, raced 3-wide without cover when 4Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M, 1L down in 4th and 3-wide off home turn, outpaced thereafter.
About 8Ls down in 12th at the 800 M, 5-wide into home straight when about 5Ls down and worse than midfield, one-paced thereafter.
Very awkwardly away losing about 4Ls at the start, about 7Ls off pace in 11th at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when about 5Ls off pace in 10th, no impression.
5Ls off pace at 800 M in midfield on fence, closer on straightening and 2Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, kept on well to lead final strides.
Slowly away, 10Ls down in rear at the 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when about 6Ls down in 13th, always held.
4Ls off the pace in about 5th down the backstretch, 2Ls down in 4th on straightening and at 200 M, kept on well for strong pressure and only narrowly missed out on a place.
Off slowly, trailed field through to home straight and unable to produce a closing account.
Settled 2-wide at midfield until straightening. Lacked the needed rally in the straight.

Raced along the fence at midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader rounding home turn. Switched out before straightening quickened well. Fought for the lead at 200 M but unable overcome winner over closing stages.
Travelled near the rear and was among last pair to enter home straight. Made no impression thereafter.
Dropped back shortly after the start and remained in a rearward position until home straight. Responded well over the final 300 M to be closest at finish.
In rear section until home straight. Only ran past a weakening runner.
Settled behind midfield. Pressured near 500 M and quickened nicely over the final furlong to capture a minor placing.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Improved slightly after 1000 M and was within 5Ls of the leader on straightening. Responded only fairly in the straight.

Among leaders early before settling behind the pace in a 2-wide position. Switched out 3-wide after 700 M to challenge for lead. Every chance 300 M but was unable to sustain effort in the closing stages.
In a forward position early and improved gradually to race in a disputed lead after 1200 M. Moved into a 1/2L lead at home turn. Held a slim lead until being swamp in the closing stages.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield. Improved a bit rounding home turn but faded shortly after straightening.
Settled 4Ls off the pace in 5th place. Responded only fairly when pressured at 500 M. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Improved gradually after the start and settled in a prominent position behind the leaders. Moved into a disputed lead with ease 300 M out and drew off over the final 200 M.
Urged to the lead. Remained the leader until being joined at 1200 M. Continued to be in forward position before weakening in the home straight.
Checked badly at start, unbalanced and unseated rider.
Led by half a length at 1200 M, disputing lead off home turn headed 300 M out and soon no extra.

Crowded at start, raced 3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, under pressure 600 M out, 3-wide into home straight when over 2Ls down in 5th, faded quickly. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off the speed in 4th until home straight, failed to quicken up off home turn.
On fence 3Ls off the pace in 5th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 7th off home turn, one-paced on the run-in.
Checked at start, at least 10Ls off the pace in rear down the backstretch, never dangerous.
5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 8th at the 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, 3-wide into home straight when still 4Ls down in midfield, a neck 4th 200 M out, led final strides.
Blundered at start, 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M turn, led 150 M out, grabbed final strides.
Crowded and checked at the start, 9Ls off pace and 2-wide in 12th at 1200 M, inconvenienced 500 M out and 7Ls down in 11th off home turn, ran on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
On fence 4Ls behind leader in midfield at 1200 M, head up 900 M out, still 4Ls down in midfield on straightening, always held.
Flat-footed at the start and slowly away, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, 3-wide into home straight when 7Ls down in 12th; ran on strongly without troubling principals.
Crowded at start, 7Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1200 M, 2-wide into home straight when 5Ls down and worse than midfield off final turn, didn't threaten.
Veered sharply left exiting gates causing severe crowding, keen on fence when 6Ls off pace at 1200 M, 5Ls down in midfield at 400 M, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide and half a length off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, disputing lead off home turn, a neck clear at 200 M, headed 150 M out, no extra.
Switched from wide gate to fence 7Ls off pace in 12th at 1200 M, 7-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 5Ls off pace in 10th, quickened up very well to lead 200 M out, impressive.
Sometimes keen when 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in about 4th through to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
3-wide and 5Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, 4Ls down and 4-wide into home straight in midfield, no chance with winner but still ran on well for a clear 2nd.
Caught 4-wide without cover when 5Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls off pace in 9th, ran on fairly.
Keen early on when 2-wide and 4Ls behind leader in 9th at 1200 M and at 800 M, no better than midfield and all out when 3Ls off pace at 200 M, no extra.
2Ls behind on fence in 3rd at 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield on fence from 800 M to home straight, still 4Ls down and one-paced at 200 M, weakened further.
Disputed lead out 2-wide at 1200 M, led by half a length out 2-wide at 900 M, disputing lead again off home turn, headed 300 M out, soon beaten.
Disputed lead on fence at 1200 M, 2Ls in 3rd at 800 M and into home straight, kept on gamely for 3rd.
3-wide with cover when 4Ls behind in 8th at 1200 M, left 4-wide without cover from 800 M out when disputing 3rd place 3Ls down off home turn and at 200 M, weakened.
Slowly away; on fence 4Ls off the pace in 7th at 1200 M, about 6Ls behind and one from rear off home turn, never competitive.
3-wide with cover when 2Ls off the speed in 6th at 1200 M, vying for 3rd place out 3-wide at 800 M, lost position on circle and beaten over 300 M out.
Caught 4-wide without cover when 2Ls behind in 5th at 1200 M, a neck 2nd and 2-wide at 800 M, disputing lead off home turn and led 300 M out, headed 200 M out and weak thereafter.
Switched from wide gate to fence, 10Ls last at 1200 M, 6-wide and 6Ls off pace in rear into home straight, made some late headway past beaten rivals.
At back to straight where he ran on quite well closing stages.
4th or 5th before home turn. Could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Never in the hunt.
Led soon after start before headed 300 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Never troubled leaders.
In touch in 3rd into straight. Kept on under pressure.
Midfield to straight where he made up some ground from the 250 M.
Made no show.
Behind midfield into straight. Kept on and was doing best work at the finish.
About 6th rounding home bend. Found nothing when asked in straight.
Always handy. Took charge 300 M and won comfortably.
Never on terms.
Never far away to straight. Kept on without quickening under pressure.
Towards rear into straight where he ran on well to take 2nd near finish.
Prominent. 3-wide 2nd 700 M. More than 2Ls behind lead turning in. Soon faded.
Behind midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Always there. 2-1/2Ls behind lead rounding home bend. 4-wide turning in. Ran on steadily but failed to catch the winner.
Always at the back. Just ran past a few tiring horses in straight.
Among the front runners early, then sat outside leader (winner) until failing to hold place soon after straightening.
Dropped back steadily to behind midfield. No progress.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield. Remained there until making up good ground 200 M out.
Led field soon after start. Obtained more than 2Ls advantage early straight. Held on closing stages.
Prominent early, soon settled slightly better than midfield. 5-wide in similar position final turn. Ran on.
Made no show.
Moved up progressively and was soon in touch. 3Ls behind lead on inside turning in. One-paced.
Towards rear. Made up some ground from 11th turning into straight.
Midfield. Failed to obtain clear run passing 600 M and inclined to lay in early straight. Kept on inside 250 M.
Began very awkwardly, losing significant ground. Never seen with a chance.
Driven to hold rail position sharing pace far side. Gained slender advantage around home bend. Drifted out a bit upon straightening. No extra under pressure inside 200 M.
Amongst leaders early settling within striking distance before home bend. Gradually weakened out of contention over 200 M out.
Settled in midfield or worse. Towards rear into straight. Responded well under reminders to take charge inside final 100 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Broke well, settling in forward of midfield. Ran home one paced under pressure.
Never nearer.
Well there most of way. Overhauled final 200 M.
Ridden to contest early lead. Forced to race outside leader rounding home bend. Fought on to hold some chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort close to home.

Slightly sluggish at start but soon picked up to prominent position under pressure before home bend. Obtained rails run after straightening holding some chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Always prominent but raced 3 or 4-wide. Weakened out of contention inside final 200 M.
Settled towards rear mainly 3-wide. Shifted wider turning in and finished off race strongly. Nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Produced good late impression final 200 M for a nice finish.
Broke slowly. Travelled behind midfield most of way. One-paced.
Soon dropped to tail-end. Made up a lot of late ground inside final 200 M.
Settled slightly better than midfield from widest draw. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Steady progress from 300 M, doing best work closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear. Soon recovered ground to be in midfield. Faded in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Raced 2Ls 4th before dropping back a bit rounding home bend. Ran on quite well final 400 M to win narrowly at finish.
Last to straight.
Towards rear. Stumbled approaching 800 M. Recovered good ground from outside in straight to miss narrowly.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Mostly 2nd and was 1L behind lead 200 M. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to be 3rd turning in. Weakened 250 M out.
Made most. Found no extra when headed final 50 M.
Near rear to straight. Made up good ground 300 M out to be nearest at finish.
Prominent. Found no extra inside 300 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped back a bit when checked approaching 1000 M. Kept on in straight.
Raced wide towards rear. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Never far off in 3-wide position to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled at the back. Made good progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never on terms.
Settled behind midfield. Came to challenge under pressure and quickened up well to assert authority close to home.
Settled in midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Tracked leader. Hit front 200 M out but overhauled final strides.
Held up behind leaders. One-paced in straight before faded near finish.
Forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Prominent. Tightened for room early in straight and soon weakened.
Settled towards rear. Ran on under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear throughout. Made no show.
Made running to 250 M and swamped.
Ridden to midfield early. Weakened badly shortly after straightening.
Settled at the back in the early to middle stages. Crept closer to the pack after the 600 M. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began well and soon raced in a forward position. Did not quicken when asked 300 M out and further weakened inside final 100 M.
Began fairly and raced in mid-division. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and only kept on same pace to the line.
Unable to muster early speed to race in a rearward position. Under pressure 400 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to miss 3rd place by a short margin.
Began very awkwardly and soon recovered to race in a forward position. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and only kept on evenly to the line.

Jumped fairly and raced in a forward position in the early stages. Took outright lead after the 800 M until the 200 M mark. Unable to match speed with 1st pair inside final 200 M and just held onto 3rd place.
On jumping was checked when crowded for room, soon recovered to race in midfield. Ran on well when asked 400 M out and fought off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.
Began fairly and soon settled in midfield or worse. Made up steady ground after 400 M mark. All out 250 M out and responded well but just failed to find an extra gear to overhaul the winner.
Pushed along to race in midfield on better. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and dropped out steadily thereafter.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or worse. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Broke well and niggled along to race in midfield or better. Under pressure 400 M out but kept on same pace and weakened slightly inside final 200 M.
Began well and raced in a prominent position. Shortly after the 600 M pushed along to maintain position. All out 400 M out but failed to respond and gave ground steadily inside final 250 M.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in a prominent position. Kept on same pace when asked 300 M out and further weakened inside final 150 M.

On jumping bounded in the air and lost ground. Steadily recovered lost ground after the 600 M. Went forward to challenge the leader near the 300 M but was unable to sustain effort final 150 M. Weakened close home.
Very keen down backstretch when 2-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed in mid-division, under pressure to take closer order on straightening, no impression.
Soon led, crossed to fence to lead by 2Ls at 1000 M, less than 1L clear off home turn, headed 300 M out, faded fast.
Tracked winner in rear about 8Ls off pace down the backstretch, 4-wide and 6Ls last off home turn, ran on well without really threatening to figure in the money.
Caught 4-wide without cover when 4Ls down in 5th at 1000 M, 4-wide off final bend when about 2Ls off pace and vying for 4th place, found no more and beaten 200 M out.
Awkwardly away and steadied at start, raced keenly towards rear about 6Ls off the speed, never much of a factor.
Worse than midfield on fence when about 7Ls off the speed at 1000 M, about 4Ls down in midfield on inner off home turn, stayed on okay without posing any danger.
3-wide but with cover in 9th when 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, 4-wide into home straight and 3Ls down in midfield, quickened up to dispute lead about 100 M out, outgunned final strides.
Raced 2 and 3-wide in midfield about 6Ls off pace down the back, niggled along turning for home when 5Ls down in 9th place, no impression.
Awkwardly away, never better than midfield or closer than 5Ls to the pace at any stage.
On fence about 5Ls off the speed in midfield at 1000 M, close enough on straightening when 1L down in 3rd, failed to quicken up.
Keen early, settled about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace down backstretch, 5Ls down and 4-wide into stretch, quickened up well to be 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, kept on well to lead close home.
2-wide and 3Ls down in 3rd at 1000 M, carried wider at 800 M, 3-wide and hanging in turning for home when 2Ls off pace in about 4th place, emptied right out.
Raced 3-wide with cover between 3Ls and 5Ls off pace in 5th or 6th through to home straight, kept on at the same pace only.
On fence 2Ls down in 2nd at 1000 M, hung out at 800 M, 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd off home turn, clear lead by 1L at 200 M, joined 100 M out, couldn't fend off quinella pair.
Away quickly and settled on fence behind midfield. Lacked the needed rally in the closing stages.
Settled 4-wide behind midfield. Near the rear and continued to be widest rounding home turn. Made a brief rally on straightening but failed to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled 3-wide at midfield until straightening. Kept on without threatening.
Quickest out from widest draw and was taken back to race near the rear. Among last few to enter home straight and made up some ground final stages.
Unhurried early and settled at the rear before making its move inside final 300 M. Closed the race off impressively to claim victory in the final strides.
Raced one off the fence at midfield. 3-wide rounding home turn. Ran on well but was no threat to principals.

Began well. On fence and stayed within 3Ls of the leader. Advanced gradually to settle behind the leader on straightening. Responded well and took a brief lead inside 200 M. Failed to hold off the top pair final stages.
Among leaders until home straight. Unable to pick up when asked final 400 M and weakened.

Began well. Caught 3-wide without cover in a forward position. Within 2Ls of leader on straightening and quickened when asked final 300 M. Battled for lead final 200 M. Failed to hold off winner final stages.
Away awkwardly and was pressed forward. Settled 2-wide and within 2Ls off the pace after 1000 M. Lost ground gradually on straightening when held behind a weakening runner. Kept on evenly to line.
Jumped to an early lead and maintained a length's advantage on straightening. Continued to lead until being swamped final 200 M.
Raced 3-wide with cover when 4Ls off the speed at 1000 M, awkwardly placed entering straight when 3-wide and 4Ls down in midfield, no acceleration, eased when beaten 200 M out.
Nicely placed in 3rd on fence 3Ls off pace at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th off final bend, soon outpaced.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls behind leader in 4th at 1000 M, 3-wide when 2Ls down in 3rd into home straight, half a length down at 200 M, kept on gamely and hindered slightly final 50 M, just held.
Bit slowly away, 5Ls off the speed in midfield on fence at 900 M, 4Ls down on fence on straightening, finished off up the fence but not nearly quickly enough.
Raced 4-wide but had cover until 800 M when 5Ls off pace in about 9th place, pressed on to be 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 3Ls down in 7th, kept on at same pace.
Bumped at start, caught 4-wide without cover down the backstretch and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, driven along entering straight when 4-wide and still 3Ls down in 5th, soon faded out.
Always towards rear and never better than 6Ls or 7Ls off the pace from 1000 M out.
2Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M and entering home straight, perfectly placed to challenge but failed to quicken up.
Soon led, clear by 2Ls at 1000 M, 1L clear off home turn and half a length up 200 M out, hanging on when hung a bit left inside final 50 M, survived stewards' inquiry and objection.
7Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover when worse than midfield at 1000 M, 4-wide into home straight and 5Ls down in 10th off home turn, made a little late headway past beaten rivals.
Always towards rear and never better than 6Ls or 7Ls off the pace from 1000 M out.
Awkwardly away, 5Ls behind leader in midfield when 2-wide, 3Ls down in 6th off the home bend, ran on well without ever looking like catching up with quinella pair.
Switched from wide gate to fence in rear, about 8Ls last at 1000 M, never remotely competitive.
Slowly away, 7Ls off pace in 10th at 800 M, niggled along entering straight in rear group, faded right out.
Prominent about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until 600 M out, ridden along to lie up entering home straight, faded right out.
Always in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until home straight, faded.
Slowly away and checked at start, about 6Ls last down backstretch, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 5Ls last, ran on very strongly down centre of course but too late.
Pressed on to lead early on, never clear by much more than 1L, headed at top of home straight, weakened.
Bumped at the start and forced to race at least 4 and 5-wide without cover down backstretch and clipped heels and pecked 900 M out, still wide off home turn, beaten 300 M out.
Slowly away, in tight midfield bunch until the 600 M on fence, beaten entering home straight.
Worse than midfield and 2-wide about 5Ls off the speed down backstretch, never posed much of a threat but made a little late headway.
Raced freely down backstretch, worse than midfield when 5-wide off home and 4Ls off the speed, picked up well to dispute 3rd place about 2Ls off the pace at the 200 M, no extra.
Raced 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd until 600 M out, led at top of home straight, headed over 200 M out, faded.
Always prominent about 2Ls off pace when 3-wide, 1L down in 3rd off home turn, picked up well to lead over 200 M out, hung a bit left and did enough to hang on.
In tight midfield bunch until the 600 M, no impression in the home straight.
Settled on fence in midfield about 4Ls off pace, keen about 1000 M out, 3Ls down in 6th at top of home straight, faded.
Held up about 5Ls off pace in midfield down back straight, severely checked at 900 M, 5Ls down and 4-wide in 12th off home turn, no chance with leading pair but stayed on well for 3rd.
Hindered at start, towards rear about 6Ls off pace, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in 12th, ran on past a few beaten rivals.
2nd last to straight where he stayed on quite well.
Trailed field to straight. Never nearer.
Settled 5th into straight. Ran on strongly to take command close home. Won convincingly.
Prominent to straight where he dropped out quickly.
Well there before steadily losing ground coming into straight.
Worse than midfield home bend. Kept on early in straight before finding no extra final 100 M.
Close up early and was 2L 3rd swinging into straight. Unable to make any impression on leaders.
Among rear group into straight. Made up some ground closing stages.
Never on terms.
Always prominent. Took charge 300 M and soon went clear. Found winner too strong close home.
Jumped well before settling in midfield and remained there to straight. Kept on to the 150 M where he could find no extra.
In rear to straight where he stayed on steadily for 3rd.
Led early stages. Sat outside leader far side. Held on until finding no extra inside 150 M.
Slowly away from widest draw. Remained 2nd last to final turn. Ran on early straight but was one-paced closing stages.
Not far off to home bend. Wide on straightening. No extra.
Bounded at start, slightly behind midfield. Found not much room on straightening. No progress. (Mucus in trachea.)
Midfield or behind in 3-wide. Dropped to the last when widest on straightening. (Roarer.)
Towards rear. Crept closer on inside final turn. Responded well to assert authority 200 M. Won going away.
Began awkwardly, midfield. Remained in similar position until making up good ground when under pressure in straight. Lost 2nd final strides.
Slowly away, last to final turn. Recovered ground steadily inside 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Mainly 10th and was 3-wide. Ran on steadily from outside final 300 M to grab 2nd near finish.
Prominent. Took lead approaching 1200 M. Weakened when headed 200 M.
Tardy start, soon recovered ground to be 5th. Moved up on 3-wide to 3rd 1100 M. Faded from final turn.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit to 4th far side. Steadied 250 M. Weakened.
Settled in rear. Took closer order gradually far side and rounding home bend. Sustained progress in straight without threatening.
Prominent to home bend. Weakened.
In last few to straight. Never nearer.
Took up running stable bend. Led till headed coming out of back straight. Lost runner-up position about 100 M out.
Midfield to home bend. Faded.
Always in last few.
Never better than midfield dropping to tail-end approaching home turn.
Never far off. Gave ground gradually in straight.
Settled at the back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Commenced run turning in. Tightened for a run on rails 200 M out. No further impression closing stages.
Forward of midfield. Faded under pressure over 500 M out.
Crossed to rail gradually early stages, settling behind leaders. Commenced move rounding home bend establishing some 4L break into straight. Hung on well.
Unbalanced after start, soon picked up pace to be 5th on fence. Remained similar until running on steadily in straight.
Ridden from widest draw to take the lead. Held on well to win unchallenged.
Midfield on 3-wide. Improved passing 600 M to be 4th. Faded on straightening.
Prominent. Mostly 2Ls 3rd to final turn. Kept on until one-paced passing 200 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Severely checked final turn. Run ended.
Lacked early speed and was last to 200 M. Ran on a bit thereafter.
Prominent early. Dropped back to 4th stable bend. Found no extra inside 250 M.
Soon 2nd. Weakened steadily from 400 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer to midfield final turn. Continued to make ground to take 3rd final 100 M.
Near rear. Recovered good ground in straight, never nearer.
Towards rear. Shifted wide on straightening. Made ground moderately on outside in straight.
Around midfield. Gave a little ground home bend. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Settled in midfield. Obtained split 200 M out and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Never a factor.
Never in contention.
Well there to straight. One-paced under pressure.
Settled in forward of midfield. Fought on steadily to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Never better than midfield.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Broke well. Unable to cross to inside rail. Raced mainly 4-wide in prominent position to straight. Faded.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield.
Never on terms.
Always well there. Quickened to hit front early in straight. Held on to the line.
Began fairly and pushed along to take up running on rail from 900 M with around 1/2L advantage through to straight. All out 200 M out and responded well to win comfortably.
Broke well from wide draw and steadily eased to race in midfield out wide without cover to straight. Steadily tailed out in straight.
Slowly away and unable to muster early speed to race in the rear section on rail through to straight. Only able to run past couple of beaten runners in the straight.
Raced in midfield 2 to 3-wide through to straight. Failed to make any impression in the straight.
Best out and soon raced in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 250 M out and weakened slightly inside final 100 M.
Pushed along to race in a forward position 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and responded fairly but became one pace over the concluding stages.

Broke well and was soon box-seated behind the leader through to straight. Saw clear daylight shortly after the 200 M mark and ran on fairly but was overhauled by 2nd and 3rd placegetters near the line.
Began fairly and soon raced in better than midfield 2-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and only kept on evenly to the line.

On jumping bounded in the air and lost ground. Raced in worse than midfield on rail, made little headway at home turn. Responded fairly when asked 250 M out but was held up over the concluding stages.

Began fairly from wide draw and steadily settled towards the rear 2-wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running, make up steady ground inside final 200 M when asked 250 M out to be closest at finish.

Tardy start from widest and soon raced at the tail 2-wide. Made little headway at home turn and switched to the widest on straightening. Ran on strongly inside final 200 M to grab 2nd place near the line.
Began well and soon raced in forward position 2 to 3-wide. Moved up to race outside the leader going up the Rock. Kept on same pace when asked 250 M out and weakened slightly in the closing stages.
Awkwardly away, raced around midfield about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace when 2-wide through to home straight, found nil.
Best away, left with the run of the race from 800 M out to home straight in 2nd or 3rd on fence about 2Ls off pace, picked up well to lead 100 M out, stayed on.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls off pace in 4th or 5th from 800 M to home straight, never looked like reducing this deficit.
2-wide towards rear when about 6Ls or 7Ls behind leader until home straight, never a factor.
Pressed on from wide gate to lead on fence by 2Ls at 800 M, same margin clear turning for home, headed 100 M out, no extra.
Always niggled along in rear about 7Ls or 8Ls of the speed, ran on past a few well-beaten rivals through closing stages.
In midfield about 5Ls off pace at 800 M, checked 600 M out and 7Ls down on fence in 10th off final bend, faded.
Crowded at start, caught 4-wide without cover at 1000 M when disputing 3rd place, got in 2-wide 2Ls off pace at the 600 M outpaced by quinella pair from 300 M but plugged on for 3rd.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace at 700 M when steadied, hung in turning for home, a little short of room at 100 M out but wasn't making much progress in any case.
Had cover when 3-wide about 5Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, much the same into home straight, no impression.
Fractious in gates, slowest away, one from rear when 2-wide and about 8Ls off pace until 600 M, 3-wide into home straight, no chance.
On fence about 4Ls off pace in 4th or 5th from 800 M to home straight, one-paced.

Began fairly and raced just behind the leaders. Settled on fence and raced 4Ls behind the pace in back straight. Swung out on straightening and moved steadily past the leaders to assert authority final 150 M.
Settled towards the back until home straight. Lacked a rally in the closing stages.

Quickest out and contested for lead before settling behind leader after 900 M. Pressured on straightening and challenged for lead. Kept on well before bowing out to the top pair final 100 M. (Dropped whip after straightening.)
Began well and soon took the lead. Held a length's advantage when being challenged on straightening. Stayed on well but unable to hold off winner in the closing stages.
Urged to follow leaders early on. 2-wide and kept within 3Ls of the pace in back straight. Battled for lead at 200 M but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Raced along the fence at midfield. Pressured from 500 M out and made up ground slowly in the straight.
Slowest out. Travelled wide and behind midfield. Made little progress rounding home and didn't pick up in the straight.

Urged to a forward position early stages. Checked at the first turn and dropped to a rearward position. Fell further behind at home turn and was last to enter home straight. Only ran past a weakening runner.
Dropped back from the start. Settled in last place in back straight. Only ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.
Settled 3-wide towards the rear most of the way. Asked for effort at 500 M and was able to make up some ground in the straight.
3-wide at midfield. Made minor progress rounding home turn but had nothing left in the straight.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Pressured on straightening and gain some ground in the closing stages.
Nicely placed 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th from 1100 M to 600 M, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in 5th, particularly weak thereafter, dropping right out.
Slowly away, one from rear when 11Ls off pace 1100 M out, briefly without cover out 3-wide at 700 M, under pressure into straight when 6Ls 10th, made a little late headway.
10Ls down in 10th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 6Ls behind and one from rear off final bend, stayed on fairly through closing stages.
On fence 7Ls behind leader in 7th at 1100 M, 3-wide without cover at 600 M, 5-wide into home straight in 10th when 4Ls behind in 7th, kept on steadily for 3rd.
Pressed on to lead on fence by 1L at 1100 M, half a length to the good entering home straight, headed 200 M out, managed to hang on for 2nd.
At least 12Ls last at 1200 M, niggled on along circle in rear to be 7Ls down still in rear and about 5-wide into home straight, made some fair late headway, never nearer.
Slowly away, 8Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th at 1100 M, 5Ls down and 2-wide into home straight, no impression.
2-wide and 1L off speed in 2nd at 1100 M, hung in at 600 M and 2Ls down in 3rd out 3-wide and under pressure entering straight, faded out.
Always towards rear, 9Ls behind in 9th at 1100 M, 6Ls down on the swing, always toiling.
Settled 5Ls off pace on fence at 1100 M, improved to be 2Ls down in 4th entering home straight, quickened up nicely to lead 200 M out, pulled clear.
Brief lead before taking run of the race when 2Ls down in 3rd on fence from 1100 M to 600 M, a neck 2nd out 2-wide off home turn, one-paced thereafter, was 3rd 20 M out before being swamped.
Bounded at start, 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1100 M, under pressure entering straight when about 3Ls down in 6th, very one-paced thereafter.
Prominent early, soon raced in 4th or 5th. Moved up 300 M out to be close-up 2nd 200 M. Kept on well closing stages.
Jumped well and led briefly early, soon raced in midfield. Ran on in straight until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Dropped to the last after being checked near 900 M. Recovered some late ground inside 200 M.
Prominent. Soon 4Ls 3rd to 300 M. Faded.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield. Dropped back steadily rounding home bend. Tailed off in straight.
Prominent. Took lead approaching 1000 M. With 3Ls advantage final turn. Dropped out 250 M. (Bled.)
Tardy start, last early stages. Improved a bit home bend to be 10th final turn. Continued to make ground in straight, never nearer.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily to be 7th home turn. One-paced.
Slowly away, towards rear. Steadied for a run approaching 200 M. Ran on a bit thereafter.
Never able to feature.
Behind midfield. Ran on well from 7th early straight to win narrowly close home.
Towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Slight progress first turn. Continued to improve from 600 M to be 4-wide 4th 400 M. Responded well to hit front 200 M out. Just lost.
Mainly 2 to 3Ls behind lead to straight. Kept on well until finding no extra 200 M out.
Settled behind leaders. Quickened well to hit front passing 200 M but swamped close to home.
Raced freely towards rear of field. Made up some late ground under pressure closing stages.
Settled mainly 4-wide in midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening and ran on to hold every chance final 200 M but outsprinted close to home.
In rear of midfield to straight. Soon faded.
Chased leader, disputed lead briefly into straight. Soon weakened.
Settled towards rear. Steadied for a stride early in straight. Made up good late ground to be nearest at finish.
Attempted to make all. Joined early in straight. Unable to sustain effort and swamped inside 200 M.
Well there early. Gave ground gradually under pressure rounding home bend.
Mainly in midfield. Made some late impression under pressure closing stages.
Settled at the back. Ran on well through field down home straight to do best work at finish.
Never far off to 200 M. Folded up quickly nearing finish.
Waited with. Romped home down centre of track to grab victory final strides.
Slightly slow out. Quickly picked up to forward of midfield. Remained same into straight and soon weakened.
Towards rear. Shifted out gradually to the outside rail. Made ground half-way to take 2nd near 200 M. Unable to threaten the winner. (Dropped whip 250 M.)
Midfield or slightly behind. Nothing extra passing 200 M.
Midfield or behind. Kept on closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening.
Last throughout.
Prominent. Found no extra passing 200 M.
Midfield to 300 M. Weakened.
In touch. Made progress to 2nd or 3rd passing course proper. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Made all. Won readily.
Behind midfield. Weakened passing 400 M.
Better than midfield. Kept on until weakened closing stages.
Midfield or behind. Dropped to 11th course proper. Ran on quite well closing stages, never nearer.
Well there. Failed to quicken closing stages. Just held on for a minor placing.
Began awkwardly, never a factor.
Midfield to straight. Faded under pressure.
Held narrow lead to straight then gradually weakened.
Settled at the back. Ran on down straight to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Well there. Hit front early in straight but worn down close to home.
Last into straight. Made up late ground to be nearest at finish.
One-paced from midfield into straight.
Held up towards rear. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Held up behind leaders. Took some time to get off the rails for a run early in straight and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on steadily despite racing greenly under pressure.
Midfield into straight. Made no show.
Settled outside leader. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening and hit front final stages.
Around midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Soon settled at the rear section 2 to 3 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. All out 300 M out but was flat and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Soon settled in midfield on rail. Near the 800 M was shuffled back slightly when tight for room. Under pressure 400 M out and made up steady ground but was unable to match speed with winner inside final 100 M.
Began fairly from wide draw and niggled along to race in prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Took lead near the 300 M and kept on fairly but became one-pace inside final 150 M.
Soon settled in the rear section 2 wide. Made little headway from the outside turning for home. Unable to make any impression in straight.

Slow to begin and soon settled at the rear section on rail through to straight. Switched out and made little impression but was held up near the 200 M. Made up little ground in the closing stages when clear.

Broke well from wide draw and pushed along to race outside the leader. Near the 800 M went forward to take up running on rail to straight. Found little when asked 300 out and weakened inside final 200 M.
Soon settled in midfield or worse 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M and made up steady ground, but unable to match speed with the placegetters over the conclusing stages.
Broke fairly and raced keenly in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Unable to respond when asked 350 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.

Began well from wide draw and niggled along to race in midfield 3 wide. Switched out on straightening and made steady improvement. Found an extra gear inside final 200 M to take charge in the closing stages.
Began well and niggled along to lead narrowly on rail. Near the 800 M dropped to 2nd place to straight. Found nothing when asked 300 M out and dropped out steadily inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly from widest and steadily eased to worse than midfield 3 wide. Switched to the outside to obtain clear running on straightening. All out 300 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to miss 2nd narrowly.

Slowly away and soon raced towards the rear section on rail through to straight. Made up little ground in the early part of straight but was short for room near the 200 M, made up little ground inside final 100 M.

Broke well and soon raced in better than midfield 3 wide. Made little headway from a 3 wide position at home turn. Only kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and further weakened in the closing stages.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in prominent position on rail through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but became one-pace over the concluding stages.
Severely checked at 800 M to 6Ls off pace and 2-wide, same into home straight and held up for a run until 300 M out, 2Ls down in 6th at 200 M, stayed on well without troubling quinella pair.
Soon led, a neck in front on fence at 1000 M, 2Ls to the good at the home turn, joined at the 200 M and faded out through closing stages.
