Bounded at start, 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 900 M and much the same into home straight, folded tamely under pressure.
2-wide and about 5Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, travelled well on circle, picked up well to dispute led 200 M out and clear advantage over 100 M out, headed at 50 M, no extra.
Raced 3-wide without cover when 7Ls off pace at 800 M, 5Ls down and 3-wide in midfield off home turn, quickened up to go 1L down in 4th at 200 M, kept on to lead 50 M out, gamely.
Tended to hang in down backstretch when about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in 4th, 3Ls 3rd off home bend, shared 4th place about 1L off pace at 200 M, outpaced through closing stages.
One from rear on fence when 10Ls off pace at 800 M, niggled along to be 8Ls down on straightening, about 4Ls down in 10th at 200 M, kept on at same pace to line.
9Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when 6Ls off pace towards rear, stayed on well but never likely to reach the quinella.
3-wide without cover and a neck 2nd at 1000 M, 2-wide at 800 M, travelled smoothly when 2Ls 2nd into stretch, disputed lead 200 M out, didn't find much under pressure and soon swamped.
A little slowly away, in rear 10Ls off pace and 2-wide at 800 M, 4-wide entering straight (widest of all), ran on fairly well past a few beaten rivals.
3Ls off pace on fence at 900 M, became unbalanced and lost place at 800 M to be 6Ls off speed in 6th, 5Ls down in midfield entering home straight, always held.
Never dangerous, no better than 7Ls behind leader down backstretch, 6Ls down on home turn, outpaced.
Slowly away, checked at 800 M to about 9Ls off pace and 2-wide, hung out entering home straight when about 7Ls off pace in 11th, never troubled principals.

Broke awkwardly and was ridden to a forward position. Kept within a length of the pace before improving into a disputed lead on straightening. Held a slim lead at 300 M but failed to hold off the principals thereafter.
Settled on fence at midfield. Shuffled back slightly rounding home turn. Raced evenly to line.
Began well and was ridden to be close to pace. Gradually drift back towards midfield at home turn. Lacked a rally in the straight.
Midfield early stages and gradually worked its way to the lead at 900 M. Held a slim advantage on straightening before being swamped final 400 M.
3-wide behind midfield. Made some progress along the outside rounding home turn. Continued to close in onto the leaders on straightening. Came up just short in a duel with the winner.
Quickest out and raced in the lead before settling behind the leader at 1000 M. Continued to stay within a length of the pace into home straight. Found no extra in the final stages.
Raced one off the fence at midfield. Made up some ground but unable to threaten in the closing stages.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Responded fairly and made up some ground in the straight.
Raced 3-wide and kept within 2Ls of the leaders. Picked up gradually on straightening and assumed the lead final 200 M. Fought back nicely when challenged final 100 M for a close win.

Raced wide and without cover at midfield early stages. Commenced to improve at 1000 M and joined leaders in a 3-wide position making home turn. Remained in contention before bowing out inside final 300 M. (Mucus.)
3-wide and better than midfield. Improved gradually on straightening and closed to within 2Ls of the leaders. Unable to turn up a notch closing stages.
Raced on fence towards the back and was last to enter home straight. Only ran past a pair of weakening runners.
Bobbled the start and trailed field until straightening. Closed the race off only fairly.
Failed to find speed early and settled in a rearward position. Had trouble getting a clear run 400 M but lodged a late rally to capture a minor placing.
Raced freely early on, 3-wide but had cover 5Ls off pace in 7th at 1100 M, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, hindered, clipped heels and pecked at 300 M, one-paced thereafter.
3-wide with cover 8Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls off pace, hung right when improving to go a neck 2nd at 200 M, found winner a shade too strong.
One from rear when 10Ls off pace on fence at 1100 M, 6Ls down and 5-wide into straight, 3Ls down in midfield at the 200 M and stayed on at the same pace.
Bumped at start, 3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th at the 1100 M, 4Ls down in 4th at 800 M, 3Ls down off home turn and with every chance when a neck 2nd at the 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
Raced 5Ls behind on fence in 5th at 1100 M, 5Ls down on fence at the 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th towards inner off home turn, carried head high but still only 1L 5th at 200 M, no extra.
10Ls off pace when 2-wide in 12th about 1100 M out, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 5Ls down in 12th, finished off closer to stands' rail, never in contention.
Bit fractious in gates, slowly away, 12Ls last at 1100 M, under pressure entering straight when 3-wide and about 8Ls last, 5Ls down at the 200 M in rear, no threat.
Pressed on to lead out 2-wide by 1L at 1200 M, under pressure to dispute lead out 2-wide on straightening, faded out rapidly.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 9th at 1100 M, disappointed for running when 5Ls off pace and 4-wide on straightening, clear over 300 M out, 1L down at the 200 M but couldn't follow through.
Best away and held a brief lead early, on fence 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, disputing lead on straightening and headed 200 M out, weakened.
On fence 9Ls behind leader in 11th at 1100 M, improved to be 5Ls down in 10th off home turn, pushed out to lead 200 M out, kept on well.
On fence 7Ls behind in 8th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, over 2Ls down in midfield at the 200 M, made some further headway close home.
5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 6th at the 1100 M, steadied entering straight when about 4Ls down in 6th, not going well when hampered 300 M, dropped out.

Raced 3-wide without cover when 1L off the pace in 3rd at 1200 M, still 3-wide without cover close-up in 3rd at the 600 M, under pressure to hold this position off home turn, faded out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Was 3rd 1200 M before quickening to take lead home bend. Kept on but failed to sustain effort 200 M out.
Made no show despite staying on a bit closing stages.
1st or 2nd to 200 M where he soon dropped out of contention.
In rear to straight where he kept on to be nearest at the finish.
Headway from rear home bend before hanging out badly approaching straight, losing all his chance.
Ran 5th to halfway before hitting front 200 M. Unable to hold winner final strides.
Worse than midfield into straight. Made up some ground from the 250 M before finding only one-paced near finish.
Towards rear before improving home bend and was just behind midfield into straight. Stayed on to reach 3rd inside final 100 M.
At back to straight. Kept on till outpaced final 100 M.
Among rear group to straight where he ran on well to take charge near finish.
Never far off to 700 M and could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Mostly midfield to home bend. Found little when asked in straight.
Well there to straight where he quickened to challenge 200 M out. Found no extra.
Better than midfield. Steady progress to become 3rd 900 M. Kept on well in straight to be 2nd closing stages.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Found no extra final 400 M.
Mainly 2nd last to home turn. Made ground steadily to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly and rider became unbalanced. Behind midfield before moving up a bit final turn. One-paced.
Prominent. Mainly 3-wide 3rd without cover before dropping to 4th 800 M out. Failed to make any impression final 300 M.
Slowly away, soon moved up to be just behind midfield. Made further progress to 5th far side. Ran on from 4th final turn to take command final 100 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Last to 500 M. Recovered some ground along rail in straight.
Always well there. Sat outside leader until 3rd 100 M out. Unable to ride out close home when awkwardly placed between the quinella pair.
Began awkwardly from widest draw. Soon moved up to be midfield or behind. Dropped back gradually and failed to make any progress.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily far side. No response when given reminders home bend. Tailed off in straight.
Soon led. Found no extra when headed 100 M out.
Nearly made all. Only caught by fast-finishing winner short of line.
Never a factor. Tailed-off halfway out. (Lame.)
Midfield briefly. Soon dropped towards rear.
Settled well back. Widest turning in. Made up some ground down centre of straight.
Raced outside leader to straight. Kept on same pace without quickening under pressure.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening under pressure in straight.
Around midfield. Kept on at the one pace under pressure in straight. (Lame.)
Midfield early stages. Moved up to prominent position around home bend. Weakened upon straightening.
Always wide and never better than midfield.
Lacked early speed. Driven to prominent position before 1000 M bend. Raced 3-wide to straight. Soon weakened.
Raced awkwardly early. Remained towards rear to straight. Hung in and a difficult ride in straight.
Close up early settling in rear of midfield far side. Quickened well under hard driving final 200 M to snatch victory final strides.
Began very awkwardly, last early. Remained behind midfield until making good progress from 400 M. Just missed a placing at finish.
Midfield or behind. Crept closer order on inside turning in. Ran on under pressure to grab 2nd near finish.
Mainly 5th to home turn. Weakened in straight.
Held 3rd to 250 M. Dropped out. (Collapsed as a result of heat stress.)
Mainly 4th or 5th to straight. Failed to quicken.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield or behind. Clipped heels and rider nearly fell turning into straight. Run ended. (Lame.)
Crossed to the fence from widest draw and made all. Won unchallenged.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Steady progress far side. 6th rounding home bend. Ran on despite hanging out from final turn.
Near rear. Crept closer order turning in. Continued to make ground while steadied 250 M.
2nd. 3Ls behind lead final turn. Weakened 200 M out.
Led to 200 M. No extra under pressure.
Well there to halfway. Dropped out of contention quickly.
Towards rear. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Settled in midfield. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Settled behind leaders. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening. Gained upper hand inside final 200 M.
Prominent to straight. Faded under pressure.
Never nearer.
Settled in midfield. Quickened into straight. Forced to steady 200 M out. Sustained progress to the line without threatening.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move turning in. No clear passage early in straight. Failed to respond under pressure closing stages.
Disputed lead to 400 M. Weakened under pressure.
Never in contention.
Settled at the back. Finished off race strongly to narrowly miss 2nd position.
Unable to muster early speed to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and only kept on evenly to the line.
Soon settled in the rear section on rail through to straight. Made up little ground in the closing stages to be closest at finish.
Soon raced in worse than midfield 3 wide through to straight. Took a little while to get going when asked 300 M out, made up good ground inside final 250 M without threatening the placegetters.
Slowly away and soon dropped to the rear on rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made up little late ground to be closest at finish.

Tardy start and pushed along to race in better than midfield on rail. At the 600 M was checked when crowded for room. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M but just failed to run down the 2nd placegetter.

Broke well and niggled along to lead narrowly on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 300 M out, soon headed after the 200 M and fought on doggedly in the closing stages to hold onto 2nd place.
Best out from widest and ridden along to race outside the leader through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 300 M but steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly from wide draw and ridden along to race in a forward position 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and further weakened inside final 100 M.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or better 2 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running under pressure 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 300 M to be closest at finish.
Began well and soon settled in a forward position 2 wide. Responded well when asked 300 M out and took charge shortly after the 200 M mark to win convincingly.
Outpaced in the early stages to race in midfield 2 wide. Near the 500 M whilst hanging in was shuffled back to rear section. Made up little ground over the concluding stages.
Unable to muster early speed to race towards the rear 2 wide. Steadily switched to the widest at home turn to obtain running but failed to make any impression in the straight.
6Ls off pace in 6th when 2-wide at 1100 M, under pressure to take closer order on straightening, 2Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, very one-paced from then on.
Steadied at start, on fence 8Ls off the pace in 7th at 1100 M, similarly placed off home turn, making some late headway when briefly steadied 250 M out, kept on fairly, never nearer.
Led early on fence, headed marginally by AURELIAN as they went a good pace from 1200 M to 600 M, 2Ls clear off home turn, still 1L to the good at 200 M, swamped inside final 100 M.
Never in the hunt, never better than one from rear at any stage or closer than about 8Ls off the pace.
Raced freely disputing lead out 3-wide at 1200 M, a neck in front out 2-wide at 1100 M, continued to over-race until 600 M, ceded advantage on circle, a tired 2nd off home turn, faded out.
4Ls off pace in 3rd on fence at 1100 M, same turning for home, picked up only steadily to lead 100 M out, grabbed 50 M out and quickly missed out on a place.
2-wide when 5Ls off speed in 4th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 4th at 800 M, 5Ls down in 5th entering straight and with place prospects when less than 3Ls 4th at 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
Switched from widest gate to fence upon exiting, 9Ls behind in 9th or 10th from 1100 M to home straight, staying on when 4Ls down at 200 M, kept on well to lead 50 M out, pipped on the line.
On fence 6Ls off pace in 5th at 1100 M, 7Ls down at 800 M, 6Ls down in 5th off home turn, 3Ls down in 5th at 200 M, stayed on well but found quinella pair a shade too strong.
Slowly away, 12Ls off pace on fence in rear at 1100 M, much the same off home turn, 5Ls down in 11th at the 200 M, kept on strongly, nearest at the finish.
8Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th at 1100 M, 7Ls behind in 8th and 3-wide off final bend, 4Ls down out wide in midfield at 200 M, kept on well closing stages, led on line.
2-wide and 9Ls off the speed in 10th at 1100 M, 8Ls down on the swing, still worse than midfield when 4Ls behind at 200 M, ran on okay without troubling principals.
Soon settled in a rearward position. Gradually improved along the inside rail at home turn. Continued to make up ground in the straight.
Raced 2-wide in a forward position before settling back at midfield after 1200 M. Drifted further back near the Rock. Angled out on straightening but lacked the needed rally.
Ridden along to go forward. Hung out and swung wide first turn. Raced within a neck outside the leader back straight. Hung out badly home turn and had nothing left in the straight.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. 5Ls down at 400 M and picked up well on straightening to edge out rival for the runner up spot.

Taken back from a wide draw to race behind midfield. Improved along the inside after 600 M and closed to within 3Ls of the leader on straightening. Kept on but could not match the winner's pace closing stages.
Slowly away and soon trailed the field. Continued to be in a rearward position throughout back straight. Recovered some ground in the straight despite being held up at 100 M.

Settled on fence at midfield. Niggled to improve entering home turn and closed to within 2Ls of the lead at 400 M. Turned out on straightening and charged through to take the lead for good inside final 200 M.
Raced just off the pace in the early stages. Drifted back to midfield back straight. Widest rounding home turn and was carried further out before straightening. Kept on same pace to line.
Soon raced toward the back. No response under the whip at the rock and never got close in the straight.
Led from 1400 M out. Kept a neck's advantage in back straight and continued to lead at home turn. Weakened on straightening.

Ridden along to be 3-wide among leaders early stages. Stayed within 3Ls of leaders in 4th place in back straight. Niggled along rounding home turn but failed to pick up. Found nothing in the straight.

Settled on fence and kept within 3Ls of the pace. Progressed gradually to race just behind the leader home turn. Assumed the lead shortly after straightening but failed to hold off rivals inside final 250 M.
No worse than 2Ls down in 2nd on fence from 900 M to home straight, picked up well to lead about 150 M out, pulled clear, readily.
Bounded and bumped at start, worse than midfield about 6Ls or 7Ls off the speed until turning for home, stayed on at only the one pace.
A little slowly away, 3Ls off pace in about 4th from backstretch to home straight, over 2Ls down in 4th at the 200 M and a bit one-paced, no extra.
Briefly 3-wide without cover disputing 3rd at 800 M, got in 2-wide in 3rd at 600 M, still 3Ls down in 3rd from home straight to 200 M, stayed on quite well to hang on for a place.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off the speed until home turn when steadied momentarily, posed little threat.
2-wide and 2Ls down in 3rd early on, 4Ls down in 5th on straightening, faded out gradually.
Always about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed in midfield until turning for home, stayed on fairly without troubling leaders
Bumped and crowded at start, always at least 6Ls or 7Ls one from rear on fence from 800 M to stretch, never dangerous in straight but he didn't have much room and was not fully tested.
Bumped at the start, always 2-wide and at least 7Ls or 8Ls last from 800 M to home straight, same margin behind at 200 M, made some late headway down the centre of the track.
Fractious in gates, slowly away losing 3Ls on leaders, recovered well to be 5Ls off pace on fence from 800 M to home straight, stayed on okay along the fence but never looked like taking a hand.
Always a bit wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield down the back, 3-wide without cover on the circle and 3-wide turning for home, no impression.
Away well and led by 2Ls on fence from 700 M to home straight, grabbed by the winner about 150 M out, hung on for 2nd without too much trouble.
In touch, 4th early stages. Slightly improved to 2Ls 3rd 900 M. Ran on a bit passing 200 M but failed to catch the winner.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Crowded for room passing 600 M. Was bumped and unbalanced early straight. Ran on quite well inside 200 M.
Held 3rd or 4th to final turn. 4-wide turning in. Soon weakened. (Roarer.)
Towards rear. Short-lived effort early straight. Failed to quicken inside final 200 M.
Led field soon after start. Held 1L advantage final turn. Kept on.
Was last soon after start from the widest draw. Made up some ground from outside final 300 M.
Slightly slowly away, behind midfield. Mainly in 10th before making some progress final turn. Ran on a bit in straight.
Midfield or behind. Made no show in straight.
Behind midfield. Was bumped and unbalanced 350 M. Made ground from 9th 200 M out. Failed to ride out when steadied close home.
Towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Crept closer on inside turning in, improving to 4th 350 M. Kept on well until one-paced closing stages.
Better than midfield. Weakened passing 300 M.
Led briefly early stages. Then remained no more than 1L behind the winner before one-paced closing stages.
Midfield or slightly better. Dropped back steadily soon after straightening.
Settled around midfield. Made steady progress in straight.
Settled in prominent position. Commenced move turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled towards rear. Finished off race well to be nearest at finish.
Chased leaders to straight. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Never better than midfield.
Well back. Made some late progress past beaten horses in straight.
Never nearer.
Settled on rails inside leader. Hit front turning in. Never threatened in straight.
Never far off to straight. Weakened.
Midfield. Faded under pressure into straight.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Led to straight. Weakened.
Tailed-off throughout.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
In touch. Faded soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield. Crept closer order on inside final turn. Improved to 2nd approaching 200 M. Ran on under pressure but failed to catch the winner.
Began very awkwardly, losing ground. Last to 800 M. Crept closer on inside to 8th final turn. Kept on.
In the rear group. Ran on a bit on outside closing stages.
Never a factor.
Towards rear throughout.
Led early, settled 5th. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield from widest draw. Gradually improved to be in the leading pair 800 M. 2nd early straight. Weakened final 250 M.
Led field soon after start. 3rd from 900 M. Kept on same pace for a remote 4th.
Midfield or slightly better. Ran on 4-wide from 7th early straight to take 3rd final 150 M.
4th early. Soon moved up to be in the leading pair passing 900 M. Took clear lead 200 M out. Held on well.
Near rear. Made ground moderately final 400 M.
Tardy start, near rear. Made up some ground inside 250 M.
With leaders to 200 M. No extra nearing finish.
Midfield to halfway. Weakened.
Well back. Made up some late ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Quickened to hit front inside 100 M. Held on to the finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced prominently on inside rails alone. Weakened about 200 M out.
Led or disputed lead. Unable to sustain effort nearing home.
Raced in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Well there in the middle of track to about 300 M. Gradually weakened.
Always thereabouts. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always well there. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Midfield mainly to halfway. Weakened.
Well there. Fought on doggedly under pressure to just fail to get up on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Prominent to 200 M. No extra.
Soon raced in a forward position 3 wide without cover through to straight. Failed to quicken when asked 400 M out and steadily faded inside final 250 M.
Steadily eased to the rear section around 2 wide. Steadily switched to the outside and made up little ground at the home turn. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.
Broke fairly and raced in midfield or worse around 3 wide with cover. Pushed along to maintain position at home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Unable to show early speed to race at the back on rail. Switched to the widest and made little headway at home turn. Made up little ground inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly and steadily settled in midfield or worse 2 to 3 wide with cover through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and responded quite well to thread through the field to claim 2nd place in the final stages.

Soon raced in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and ran on fairly but was unable to fend off repeated challenge from 3rd placegetter to be overhauled near the line.
Began awkwardly and raced in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Kept on same pace to the line when asked 400 M out.
Tardy start and soon settled in worse than midfield towards the outside. Steadily eased back to rear section 3 wide after the 1200 M. Responded quite well when asked 350 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped well from wide draw and niggled along to take lead on rail through to straight. Headed soon after the 400 M mark, found nothing when asked 350 M out weakened steadily inside final 250 M.
Slowly away and pushed along to race in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but became one-pace over the concluding stages.

Began well from wide draw and raced 1/2L off leader in the early stages. Sat around 2Ls off leader on rail soon after the 1400 M. Edged closer at home turn, took charge near the 400 M and galloped away to win comfortably.

Began quite well and soon settled in midfield or better 3 wide with cover. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up little ground inside final 200 M without threatening the placegetters.

Jumped fairly and soon raced in a forward position on rail. Pushed along and switched to a 3 wide position turning for home. All out 350 M out and ran on fairly to grab 3rd place over the concluding stages.
Ridden along to race in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and weakened steadily inside final 200 M.
About 13Ls behind in last at 1200 M, about 9Ls last turning for home, no impression.
Slowly away, on fence when 10Ls off the speed at 1200 M in 12th, always towards rear and never better than 7Ls off the pace at any stage.
Slowly away, 8Ls behind when with cover in 9th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 6th and 2-wide at 800 M, 5Ls down turning for home, ran on past a few beaten ones on the run-in.
Bumped at 1400 M and 9Ls behind and 2-wide in 10th at the 1200 M, 6Ls behind at 800 M, under pressure when 7Ls behind off home turn, faded right out.
3Ls off pace in 2nd on fence at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at the 800 M and same margin behind in 2nd off final bend, 3Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, plugged on and lost 3rd final strides.
8Ls behind when 2-wide in 8th at the 1200 M, 6Ls down on fence at 800 M, 7Ls down in midfield when under pressure off home turn, no threat.
One from rear when 12Ls off the speed in 13th at the 1200 M, 8Ls behind in rear group at 800 M and same into home straight when 3-wide, 6Ls down in midfield at 200 M, nearest at the finish.
Awkwardly away, bumped at 1400 M, 10Ls down in 11th at 1200 M, caught 3 and 4-wide without cover for much of backstretch, 4-wide into straight when 6Ls down, very weak.
4Ls off the speed and 2-wide in 3rd at the 1200 M, pressed on to be half a length down in 2nd at 800 M, under pressure when 3Ls down and 2-wide in 3rd off home turn, weakened.
2-wide and 7Ls behind in 6th at 1200 M, checked when racing freely at 1000 M, about 5Ls down in midfield off home turn when under pressure, one-paced and no threat.
Led by 2Ls on the fence at 1400 M, 3Ls clear at 1200 M, only half a length in front at 800 M but skipped 2Ls clear again turning for home, shot over 3Ls ahead at 200 M, driven out.
5Ls off pace on fence in 5th at 1200 M, steadied at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 5th at 800 M, 4Ls down in 4th turning for home and went about 3Ls down in 2nd at the 200 M, stayed on well.
8Ls behind when 2-wide and 7Ls down in 1200 M, 5Ls down in midfield at 800 M, lost position and further behind off home turn, faded out.
2-wide when 5Ls off the speed in 4th at 1200 M, 3Ls down at 800 M but 4Ls down in 5th and 3-wide turning for home, one-paced and drifted back towards midfield.
Among leaders early before settling behind pace 700 M out. Kept chasing but unable get closer in the home straight.
Raced wide in a rearward position until home straight. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners.
Settled behind midfield. Made a strong rally in the straight to capture a minor placing.
Urged to the lead shortly after start and crossed to the fence 700 M out. Took a 2Ls lead into home straight. Continued to keep a comfortable margin under urging in the closing stages.
Missed the jump and was hard ridden to improve to midfield. Kept niggling to improve at home turn. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Niggled along the fence better than midfield. Found no extra in the straight.
Hard ridden out of the gates to maintain a forward spot. 2Ls off the pace and was wide and without cover through to home straight. Faded final 200 M.
Off slowly and trailed field until home straight. Ran on fairly and made up ground in the straight.
Pressured to be among leaders out of the gates and then raced 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace. Niggled to stay on at home turn and never picked up on straightening.
Raced amongst leaders before dropping to midfield 900 M out. Kept on well in the straight. Made ground steadily but posed no threat to winner.
3-wide at midfield. Responded well on straightening and steadily made up ground.
Settled on fence in a rearward position. Among last few to enter home straight. Ran on steadily and made up some late ground.
Always caught 4-wide without cover until home straight, towards rear about 7Ls behind at 800 M and 5Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, 3Ls behind at 200 M, no extra.
Crowded on fence at 1300 M, 5Ls off the pace in midfield at 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th turning for home, stayed on at the one pace.
Couldn't lead and raced 4Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th down the back, 2Ls down and 3-wide in 3rd turning for home, outpaced thereafter.
Brief lead by 1L on fence at 1200 M, headed at 1100 M, disputing advantage on fence entering straight, shot over 2Ls clear at 200 M, driven out to hold on fairly comfortably.
Raced prominently about 3Ls off the pace on the fence in 3rd or 4th from back to home straight, weakened from 300 M out.
Led 1100 M out and clear on fence by 2Ls at 1000 M, always tended to hang out a bit, joined for the lead turning for home and swamped over 200 M out.
Slowest away, raced freely with head up at 1200 M, in rear bunch about 8Ls off the pace when 3-wide without cover through to home straight, never a factor.
Awkwardly away, raced 3-wide without cover until home straight when 6Ls off the speed in midfield, closer turning for home, failed to finish off with any purpose.
Bumped at start, 2-wide and about 8Ls off pace in rear bunch down backstretch, 6Ls down in 12th on straightening, making some headway when checked at 300 M, didn't recover.
3-wide with cover when 7Ls down in 8th at 800 M, niggled along entering straight when 3-wide and 5Ls down when worse than midfield, didn't trouble principals.
Awkwardly away, 7Ls off the pace and worse than midfield at 800 M, 4Ls down off home turn in midfield, switched outside for a clear run at 300 M, stayed on without threatening.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 6Ls off the pace down the backstretch in mid-division, same turning for home, short of room at the 300 M, always well held.
Settled 8Ls off the pace in rear on fence, 3-wide into straight when still in rear about 7Ls behind, picked up well to go about 3Ls 2nd at 200 M, kept on well but gave winner too great a start.
Awkwardly away, raced freely in places down the back when about 5Ls off the speed in mid-division, all out to be 4Ls down in about 6th place entering straight, weakened rapidly.
4-wide without cover early in rear about 8Ls behind, gained cover from 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when about 7Ls off the speed and still in rear, made some late headway final 200 M.
Never better than midfield at any stage, always about 3-wide and 6Ls off the speed until turning for home when 4-wide, no impression.
Worse than midfield when covered up on fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace through to home straight, stayed on strongly through closing stages, never nearer.
About 8Ls last on fence from backstretch to home straight, ran on past a few tired rivals late on.
Stumbled on exiting, led at 1200 M, never clear by much more than 1L through to home straight, headed 300 M out, no extra and soon passed for place money.
Nicely placed about 3Ls off the speed in 5th and 2-wide from 900 M to home turn, didn't find much off the bridle.
Best away, had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the speed in 3rd until straightening for home, found not a great deal.
On fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off the pace in midfield through to home straight, picked up well to be 2Ls down disputing 3rd at the 200 M, kept on well.
Always very wide and worse than midfield, left 4-wide without cover from 800 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight, faded out.
Slowly away, raced a bit freely at 1000 M, 4Ls behind in midfield when 2-wide at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight, ran on fairly well but never threatened winner.
Raced prominently but 3-wide without cover down the back when 2Ls or 3Ls behind in 4th or 5th, pressed on to be 2Ls down disputing 3rd into straight, all out to be same at 200 M, weakened.
Bounded and lost ground at the jump, briefly 4-wide at 1000 M when 4Ls off pace in midfield, same when 4-wide into home straight and niggled along, beaten over 200 M out.
Always prominent, 1L down in 2nd when 2-wide at the 800 M, led 300 M out and went 1L clear at the 200 M, ran on well.
Slowly away, towards rear about 6Ls off pace down the back and into home straight, made some headway 4Ls down in midfield at the 200 M, couldn't sustain effort.
Worse than midfield of closely bunched field into straight. Was baulked most of straight till close home where he was full of running.
Was midfield before reaching 2nd 1000 M and remained there to straight. Plugged on till bumped and lost balance close home.
Rear early but was in 6th into home bend. Kept on steadily along rails in straight.
Never far off to straight. Kept on till finding no extra towards finish.
Settled in rear before making up some ground in straight.
In rear throughout, staying on when baulked close home.
Was 5th rounding home bend. Stayed on without threatening closing stages.
Behind midfield into straight. Unable quicken early on but was doing best work at the finish.
Always thereabouts. Unable to threaten close home.
Was 2nd early and 4th 800 M. Kept on closing stages but did not find much room.
Never better than midfield.
Made all. Kept on strongly to line.
Slowly away, last to 500 M. Stayed on to run past a few beaten horses in straight.
Crowded soon after start, towards rear. Only made some moderate progress in straight.
Led field soon after start. Held more than 1L advantage final turn. Won unchallenged.
Towards rear. Recovered good ground final 250 M.
Never a factor.
Settled better than midfield. Made ground steadily in straight.
Began awkwardly, soon picked up to be slightly better than midfield. Made no show final 500 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped out on straightening. Wide throughout.
In touch from widest draw. Improved to 2nd 1000 M out. Held on until finding no extra inside 300 M. (Hung in.)
Always 3rd. Gained 2nd briefly early straight. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit to 4th 850 M. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Behind midfield to straight. Made up a little ground closing stages.
Behind midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to be 3-wide 5th final turn. Weakened 200 M out.
Behind midfield. Failed to show any impression in straight.
Well there. Hit front into straight. Made to sustain effort final 100 M.
Soon in rear. Made no show in straight.
Well back. Switched out for a run upon straightening. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Never seen with a chance.
Broke well. Settled just off the pace. Raced on steadily without threatening.
Led to 400 M. Dropped out of contention.
Settled in forward of midfield. Not much room early in straight. Got through tight gap on rails passing 200 M to win well.
Ridden early. Raced wide in forward of midfield. One-paced in straight.
Midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground in straight.
Raced keenly on rails in midfield far side. Midfield into straight. No exta.
Midfield. One-paced in straight.
Settled in last few. Made up some late ground in straight.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Shifted to the inside from the widest draw at the rear. Made up some ground in the straight.
Midfield on inside. Held up and unable to find clear run approaching 200 M. Failed to recover.
Behind midfield. Failed to make progress in straight.
Pushed along early to be prominent. Mainly 2Ls 3rd to 400 M. Ran on while shifting out early straight and 250 M. Reached lead momentarily passing 200 M. Just beaten.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Became last final turn. Just ran past a few tiring horses closing stages.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Made up good ground 200 M out until one-paced close home.
Soon 2nd. Tackled the leader from final turn and took lead briefly near 200 M. Faded.
Around midfield throughout.
Led field to early straight. Dropped out rapidly. (Bled.)
Towards rear. Lacked of daylight on inside 400 M. Shifted out to 4-wide and ran on well soon after.
In touch. 3-wide 4th final turn. Soon faded.
Midfield early. Soon moved up a bit to be 5th. Hampered twice near 400 M and 250 M. Kept on.
Behind the main bunch before moving up a bit to 7th home turn. Ran on to sustain effort through a gap on inside 200 M to win narrowly near finish.
Very slowly away, losing ground. Never able to feature.
Settled towards rear. Not much room early in straight. Obtained split 200 M out. Quickened well to snatch victory final strides. Readily.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Midfield. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening but baulked. Eased inside final 200 M.
Forward of midfield. Weakened into straight.
Settled just off the pace. Quickened well to hit front over 200 M out. Just caught near finish.
Prominent to straight. One-paced.
Settled at the back. Badly baulked early in straight. Gap came late inside final 200 M. One-paced.
Settled in midfield. Switched out for a run upon straightening. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Raced tight between runners early in straight. Made some impression late.
Well there to 300 M. Dropped out.
Never on terms.
Wide in midfield to straight. Kept on well without threatening.
Rear. Made some moderate progress in straight.
Led to 250 M. Weakened under pressure.
Tardy start and unable to muster early speed to race towards the rear on rail to straight. All out 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

On jumping checked and dropped to the rear around 2 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Did not quicken when asked 400 M out and only ran past couple of beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Jumped well from wide draw and raced in better than midfield 2 wide. Made little headway at home turn. Only able to run on evenly when asked 300 M out and weakened slightly in the closing stages.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race in a prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but become one-pace over the concluding stages.
Jumped well from widest but was immediately steadied to the tail on rail to straight. Failed to make any running in the straight.
Began fairly from wide draw and raced keenly in midfield out wide without cover through to straight. Failed to respond when asked 350 M out and dropped out steadily inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or worse 2 wide through to straight. Failed to show any impression in straight.
Hard ridden in the early stages to race in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. Only able to keep on evenly when asked 400 M out and further weakened in the final stages.
On jumping checked and dropped to the rear 2 to 3 wide. Switched to the widest on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up good ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish.
Began well from wide draw and took outright lead on rail shortly after the 1200 M with around 1L advantage to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and kept on well to win convincingly.

Niggled along to race in midfield or worse 2 wide through to straight. Had trouble finding clear running after 400 M. Ran on strongly when running was obtained at 200 M to grab 2nd place near the line.

Began well and niggled along to race in a prominent position on rail through to straight. Responded quite well when asked 400 M out but from the 250 M to 100 M was held up behind the winner and just failed to hold onto 2nd place.
Began fairly and steadily settled in midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but unable to quicken and only able to run on evenly to the line.

On jumping stumbled and raced towards the rear section 2 to 3 wide. Switched wide and made little headway rounding the home turn. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M out but was never in a position to trouble the placegetters.
Raced freely when disputed lead out 3-wide at 1000 M, about a neck 2nd out 2-wide from 800 M to home turn, headed 300 M out and faded very quickly.
Keen early on, on fence 7Ls off the pace in 9th at the 900 M, over 4Ls down in 9th or so off final bend and at 200 M, back-pedalled thereafter.
Prominent through to home straight no worse than 2Ls off the speed and 2-wide in 3rd, every chance from 300 M to 200 M when half a length down in 2nd, faded through final furlong.
Awkwardly away and very intractable throughout, always hanging left when 7Ls or 8Ls off pace when one from rear, always held on run-in down in the centre of track.
On fence 5Ls behind in 6th at 1000 M, took closer order on bend to be 3Ls down in 5th off home turn, checked at 300 M when looking for an inside run, always held thereafter.
Swerved sharply right on exiting gates, 9Ls behind on fence in 12th at 800 M, steadied entering straight when 6Ls down and still towards rear, never dangerous.
Checked at the start, 8Ls off the pace and 2-wide towards rear down the back, under pressure on the swing when 6Ls behind in 11th, never loomed as a possible threat.
5Ls behind leader and 2-wide in 7th at 1000 M, short of room on the circle and 4Ls down in 7th entering straight, short of room at 300 M, good acceleration to lead at 100 M, drew nicely clear.
Badly checked exiting gates, head up early on, 10Ls off pace in rear down backstretch, 7Ls back in rear and 2-wide for home, some headway to be 4Ls down in 10th at 200 M, no extra.
Led by a neck on fence at 1200 M, disputed lead at 1000 M, a neck in front on straightening, headed 300 M out, soon beaten.
2Ls off pace on fence in 4th at 1000 M, always raced a little greenly with head up, under pressure to hold this prominent position at the 600 M, beaten well over 300 M out.
3-wide without cover when 6Ls off speed in 8th at 1000 M, 4-wide on straightening when 3Ls down in 6th, 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M, one-paced through closing stages.
Caught 4-wide without cover when 7Ls behind in 10th at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in mid-division, ran on okay without threatening.
3Ls off pace in 5th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 3-wide into home straight when over 1L behind in 3rd, disputing lead at 300 M and narrow advantage at 200 M, headed 100 M, hung on for 2nd.
Best out but failed to keep pace with leaders. Caught widest at midfield early stages and gradually dropped back to be at rear section rounding home turn. Failed to respond in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield. Dropped back slightly after being severely checked at 800 M but soon recovered. Kept on well in the straight and made up a bit of ground closing stages.
Soon travelled in rear section. Dropped to last place after being severely checked at 800 M. Trailed field into home straight and found nothing thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and was soon in last place. Continued to travel in a rearward position at home turn. Failed to pick up in the straight.

Among leaders early but soon eased off the pace and raced within 3Ls of the leader. Improved to within 2Ls of leader on straightening. Continued well in the straight but couldn't match pace with top pair closing stages.
Slightly slow at the start and travelled 2-wide no better than midfield. Entered home straight with about 4Ls to make up. Kept on without threatening.
Settled no better than 3-wide at midfield until home straight. Angled out on straightening for stretch run but only kept on same pace to line.

Jumped awkwardly and was ridden hard to a forward position. Stalked the pace from a 2-wide position rounding home turn. Remained in contention on straightening but unable to sustain effort inside final 300 M.

Raced close to leaders early stages. Dropped back slightly after 1000 M but remained within 2Ls of the leader in 2-wide position until home straight. Closed in on leader steadily in the straight and took control inside 100 M.

Urged to the lead from wide draw and crossed to the rails heading into the turn. Held a length's advantage going into home straight and kept lead into final 200 M. Stayed on well but failed to hold off the top pair final stages.

Jumped well but soon eased back to race near the rear. Remained in rear section on straightening with a 6Ls deficit at 400 M. Staged an impressive rally final 300 M despite hanging in and was closest at the line.

Jumped well and led briefly in the early stages. Settled 2-wide behind the pace before being carried to 3-wide 800 M out. Clumsy making home turn and fell to midfield before straightening. Couldn't find extra in the straight.
In 9th place when 6Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 6th when 3-wide off final bend, 3Ls down in 4th at 200 M, kept on well for a place.
About 13Ls last at 1200 M, driven along when 7Ls down in 12th entering home straight, kept on for pressure, nearest at the finish.
3Ls behind and 2-wide in 6th at 1200 M, about 2Ls down in 6th on fence on straightening, very one-paced finish along the inner.
8Ls behind leader when 2-wide in 11th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in midfield at 400 M and about 4Ls down at 200 M, continued to make headway without troubling principals.
9Ls off pace on the inside in 12th place at 1100 M, about 6Ls off the speed in 10th or so entering homestretch, found nothing.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, niggled along 700 M out and every chance when 1L down in 4th turning for home, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, tired final 100 M.
5Ls behind on fence in 8th at the 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield and under pressure off final bend, never got any closer.
7Ls off the speed and 3-wide with cover in 10th at 1200 M, without cover at 900 M, 5Ls down into home straight in midfield, ran on well, never nearer.
Disputed lead on fence at 1200 M, about a neck down in 2nd from 800 M to home straight, dropped out rapidly from top of home straight and eased down through final 200 M.
Had cover 3-wide and 4Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, 5Ls down at 800 M, eased closer on the circle and 3-wide when 2Ls off pace in 5th on straightening, nice pick-up to lead 250 M out, pushed out.
Slowly away, over 2Ls behind on fence in 5th at 1200 M, niggled along at 800 M to stay within 4Ls of the speed in 5th, faded on the circle and detached entering straight, soon well behind.
2Ls behind when 2-wide in 3rd at 1200 M, 1L down in 3rd on fence off final bend, brief lead about 300 M out but headed at 250 M, winner too strong but comfortably held 2nd place.
Slowly away losing about 3Ls, about 11Ls off pace and one from rear at 1200 M, 7Ls down in rear and 3-wide turning for home, never dangerous.
Awkwardly away, disputing lead out 2-wide at 1200 M, a neck in front when turning for home, headed 300 M, faded out.
8Ls off pace in 4th when 2-wide at the 1200 M, under pressure to maintain position in 5th at the 600 M, faded from top of home straight.
Towards rear when 4-wide without cover down backstretch, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight, never got involved.
Awkwardly away, held up in rear, still well behind when 5-wide into home straight, made some moderate late headway.
Stayed a respectful 8Ls to 10Ls off the pacesetting CHAMP DRAGON from 1000 M to home turn, plugged on at the one pace and narrowly secured 3rd place.
In midfield through to home turn, 4Ls down in 6th at the 200 M, kept on fairly and only narrowly missed a place.
Switched from widest gate to fence in rear upon exiting, still in rear turning for home, no impression.
6Ls behind leader in 3rd when 2-wide at 1200 M, all out to be 7Ls 3rd at top of home straight, beaten when squeezed for room slightly at the 200 M.
Never better than midfield at any stage.
Raced in 4th place on fence from backstretch to homestretch, had no chance with winner but still ran on well to take 2nd place.
Awkwardly away with head up and lost some ground at the jump, settled in rear on fence through to home turn, made some late progress past beaten horses.
Away well and 3Ls clear on fence at the 1200 M, shot about 10Ls clear 900 M out and with 7Ls advantage entering straight, very tired when grabbed by winner over 200 M out, faded out.
Worse than midfield when 3-wide without cover at 800 M, always well behind.
Settled in midfield down backstretch, same into home straight, picked up very well to lead 180 M out, drew clear, impressive.
Ridden quietly worse than midfield until home straight when 3-wide, kept on at same pace, nearest at the finish.
Always at the back.
Was midfield before outpaced from 350 M.
Always close up and held every chance. Found winner too strong.
Towards rear till making up some late progress close home.
Never far off to halfway. Soon beaten.
Close up and held every chance 300 M. Found no extra.
Just behind midfield till staying on close home for 4th.
With main group to 400 M where he started to lose ground.
Never far off before steadily losing ground closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Unable quicken under pressure.
With main group before being detached from the 250 M.
Among rear group before running on well inside final 200 M to claim 3rd at the finish.
With leaders before failing to hold place final 250 M.
Always prominent. Kept on well final 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Moved up along inside 800 M out to be midfield final turn. Ran on steadily to just get up final stride.
Pushed along to take lead 1000 M out. Weakened when headed 350 M.
Midfield early, soon towards rear. Made some moderate progress soon after straightening.
In touch. Dropped back a bit 700 M to be 5th. Kept on same pace in straight.
Never rear. 2nd last to 400 M. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight. Faded 200 M out.
Towards rear. Made no show in straight.
Behind midfield. Dropped towards the rear group half-way.
Behind midfield from widest draw. Soon moved up on outside to be 3rd 900 M. Came to tackle leaders final turn. Found no extra 200 M out.
Checked soon after start, dropped to the last. Made up some late ground inside 200 M.
Well there. Sat outside leader before taking over 350 M. Kept on well but just lost narrowly at finish.
Jumped well, soon raced in 5th. Made some progress rounding home bend to be 2Ls 4th turning in. Kept on but without threatening.
Raced outside leader. Drew level momentarily turning in. Soon found no extra.
Settled on rails in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily before baulked behind runners final 200 M.
Settled in rear of midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Always in last few.
Held up in rear early. Never seen with a chance.
Settled towards rear. Did not find much room in straight. Kept on steadily to the line.
Midfield most of way. Kept on steadily to finish.
Settled wide in midfield. Quickened well down centre of straight to win easily.
Took up running before home bend. Led till headed over 200 M out.
Held up in midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Raced prominently 3-wide. One-paced in straight.
Prominent to straight. Kept on at the one pace.
In last few into straight. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Last. Made up some ground on inside in straight.
Soon led. Was headed 300 M out. Failed to hold a minor placing when weakened 150 M.
In touch early, soon dropped just behind midfield when steadied 1000 M. Kept on well final 200 M.
Led briefly early. Held 3rd until failing to hold place 500 M after straightening.
Towards rear. Found no clear run and switched out 450 M. steadied again to switch in 300 M. Recovered good ground inside 200 M.
Slowly away, soon recovered ground in midfield. 5-wide behind midfield final turn. Ran on well 200 M out, never nearer.
Towards rear. Crept closer to 6th final turn. Responded well 250 M out to miss narrowly. Hung out final 50 M.
Towards rear. Moved up on outside 1000 M to be midfield rounding home bend. Weakened in straight.
Soon in touch. No more than 2Ls behind lead final turn. Ran on steadily to take command 200 M. Just held off challenges from place-getters closing stages.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made ground under pressure 250 M out.
2nd on inside. Gained lead 300 M to 200 M. Soon found no extra.
Slightly sluggish at start. Well back into straight. Ran on past beaten runners.
Settled in rear of midfield. Quickened well inside final 300 M to hit front over 150 M out. Readily.
Around midfield most of way. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in rear of midfield. Failed to respond under pressure in straight.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Never in contention.
Settled in last few. Not much room about 300 M out before running on between runners to be nearest at finish.
Restrained in prominent position. Hit front briefly over 200 M out. Soon weakened.
Prominent and wide. Moved up to join leader rounding home bend. Soon weakened in straight.
Chased leader. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Towards rear. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Led field to 300 M, then weakened under pressure.
Always thereabouts. Kept on well closing stages.
Never in contention. (Moderate amount of blood in trachea.)

Shortly after the start checked when crowded for room and dropped to the rear section 2-wide through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 350 M out and only able to run past several beaten runners thereafter.
Soon raced in midfield or worse 4-wide with cover. Ridden along at home bend to maintain position. No extra in straight and dropped out.

Soon raced in a forward position on rail and near the 1000 M steadied when awkward on heels. Edged closer to the leaders rounding the home turn. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but without threatening the placegetters.
Broke well and pushed along to race in a forward position 2-wide. Ridden along at home bend but gave ground slightly. Found nothing in straight and steadily faded inside final 250 M.

From the widest draw was immediately steadied to the rear section closer to the rail. Ridden along at home bend and made up little ground. Switched out on straightening to obtain running but only able to run on evenly to the line.

Jumped well and niggled along to race in prominent position on rail. Near the 700 M edged forward to share lead. Plugged on well when asked 400 M out. Headed near the 200 M and was overhauled by 2nd placegetter near the line.

Broke fairly and soon settled in worse than midfield on rail. Made little headway at home turn to be 3Ls off leader on straightening. Under pressure 350 M out and made up steady ground inside 200 M to snatch 2nd near finish.

Broke well and ridden along to race in midfield 4-wide with cover. Ridden along to maintain position at home bend. Under pressure 350 M but unable to quicken and only able to run on evenly to the line.
Broke fairly from wide gate and steadily eased to the tail on rail. Made little headway rounding the home turn. All out 300 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

On jumping blundered and steadily recovered to race in midfield on rail. Made steady improvement rounding the home turn to be 1L off leader on straightening. Ran on well in straight and took charge near the 200 M to win convincingly.
Began fairly and ridden along to race in midfield or better on rail. Commenced to give ground steadily near the 900 M. Failed to make any impression in straight.

Began well from wide draw and ridden along to race in a forward position. Hung out when making the 1st turn. Gave ground steadily rounding the home turn and hung in. Tailed out in straight. (Moderately distressed.)
Began fairly and hard ridden in the early stages to take a slender lead 2-wide to straight. Unable to respond to pressure when asked 350 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Broke well from wide draw and raced in a forward position around 3-wide. Hung out badly when making the home bend and was eased down in straight.
Led by a neck out 2-wide at 1000 M, led on fence about 900 M out, disputing lead off home turn, headed over 300 M out, didn't find much under pressure.
On fence 1L off the speed in 3rd at 1000 M, just over 1L down in 4th off home turn, very one-paced thereafter.
Always about 9th place about 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed through to stretch, never a factor.
On fence 5Ls behind leader in 10th at 1000 M, much the same entering home straight, always outpaced.
Pressed on from midfield to be nicely placed 2-wide and 2Ls down in 4th from 1000 M to 600 M, 3-wide and closer off home turn, led over 300 M out, kept on despite ungainly head carriage.
Slowest away, one from rear about 8Ls off pace at 1100 M, about 7Ls last off final bend, posed no sort of threat.
Bumped at start, 3-wide without cover when a neck 2nd 1000 M, 2-wide and within a neck of the lead from 900 M to home turn, all out to be 1L down in 2nd at the 200 M, weakened close home.
Had cover when 3-wide 4Ls behind in 8th at 1100 M, 4-wide on the swing when 3Ls down in 7th, stayed on at same pace.
No worse than 2Ls or 3Ls off the speed between 4th and 6th place through to home straight, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, no extra thereafter.
Caught 4-wide without cover when 4Ls off pace in midfield at 1100 M, hung out turning for home when 5-wide (widest) turning for home, finished off tamely.
Bounded in air at start, 9Ls off pace in rear at 1100 M, 4-wide into home turn when about 6Ls behind in rear, no impression.
Raced 3-wide without cover when 2Ls down in 5th at 1000 M, hard ridden when 4-wide off home turn to maintain this prominent position, faded fast.
About 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed on fence from 1000 M to 600 M when in 8th place or so, under pressure to lie on straightening, dropped out rapidly.
Bumped at start, settled towards rear about 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls down in mid-division, kept on without quickening but still nicked a place close home.
Stalked the leader before improving into a disputed lead at the home turn. Duelled with winner in early part of the straight but failed to keep pace in the final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and was eased to the back. Trailed field through to home straight and only ran past a few beaten runners.
Best out and led by no more than 1/2L until 800 M. 2-wide and in disputed lead rounding home turn. Failed to keep pace on straightening and gradually dropped out in the straight.

Bounded in air on jumping, then was checked and soon trailed field. Ridden along to improve to race behind midfield at 800 M. 3-wide and under pressure rounding home turn. Found nothing in the straight.
Began fairly and was ridden hard to be at midfield. Kept niggling rounding home turn and was 3Ls behind leaders on straightening. Only kept on same pace to line.
Soon settled towards the rear. Pressured midway through home turn and responded well. Continued to give chase on straightening and made up ground in the straight.
Niggled to a forward position but was 4-wide. Continued to race wide rounding home turn and commenced to lose ground. Near the back on straightening and never recovered.
3-wide and just off the pace early stages. Improved into a disputed lead in a 3-wide position rounding home turn. Continued to travel well and took the lead for good at 200 M.
Ridden early. Kept within 3Ls of the leaders through to home straight. Kept on well in the home straight but unable to gain meaningful ground on winner.
Jumped well from widest draw. Raced wide and without cover with leaders early but gradually dropped back after 1000 M. Midfield and caught widest rounding home turn. Weakened in the straight.
Off slowly and was urged forward to travel within 2Ls of leaders. Failed to keep up after 600 M and dropped out in the straight.
Raced mostly towards midfield. Travelled well near the fence rounding home turn. Made up ground steadily in the straight.
Crowded at start, 3Ls down in midfield when ridden along to take closer order about 400 M out, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M when hanging, continued to hang out but led 100 M out, stayed on.
Always well behind, never better than 8Ls off the pace after first 800 M marker.
Prominent early on but came under pressure halfway and was well beaten over 200 M out.
Soon led on stands' rail, under pressure from half way to maintain prominent spot, faded out very quickly.
Towards stands' rail when about 3Ls behind in midfield until the 200 M when all out to hold position, faded a little close home, improved effort nonetheless.
Crowded at the start, no better than midfield or 4Ls off the pace until the 200 M, gave ground.
Always in first four or so and within 2Ls of the speed until 200 M out, outpaced through final stages.
No worse than 1L off pace in 2nd or 3rd until the 200 M pole, no extra.
Slowly away, always trailed well behind against far rail, never in the hunt.
Away well, always in lead or disputing lead on far rail, 1L clear 400 M out, headed 100 M out, kept on, creditable effort.
Always tended to hand out, about 3Ls or 4Ls behind in midfield until the 200 M, lost further ground close home.
Away fairly well and about 2Ls behind on stands' rail early on, bumped and became unbalanced at 400 M, soon gave ground and beaten over 200 M out.
In leading bunch near stands' rail about 2Ls behind until 200 M out, lacked a kick thereafter.
About 2Ls or 3Ls behind in midfield until the 200 M, flattened out through final stages.
Always 2-wide and 3Ls behind in 4th for most of back stretch, 3-wide taking closer order turning for home, didn't pick up and beaten over 200 M out.
Tracked leader in 2nd no worse than 2Ls off pace from 1000 M to 600 M out, sent on to lead turning for home, shot over 3Ls clear 200 M out, stayed on strongly.
Always 3-wide without cover down the back when 5Ls off pace in mid-division, under pressure on the swing when 6Ls down and 5-wide, faded out.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off the speed through to home straight when driven along, make some late headway, crowded and not ridden out final strides.
Always in midfield about 5Ls off speed through to home turn, outpaced by principals.
Better behaved in gates and broke well, about 8Ls or 9Ls off pace towards rear until home straight when 6-wide (widest), ran on strongly through final 200 M, narrowly missed 2nd.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off pace in 3rd through to home straight, perfectly placed but found very little under pressure.
Awkwardly away, raced in 5th on fence about 4Ls off pace until final bend, 4Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, no extra close home.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 1L until about 500 M out when headed, faded out markedly from top of home straight.
Towards rear and about 8Ls or 9Ls behind through to home straight, ran on quite well late, crowded and not ridden out final strides, never nearer.
About 7Ls behind down back stretch and worse than midfield, similarly placed when 3-wide off home turn, folded tamely.
5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 9th or 10th until the home stretch, same margin behind when 4-wide into home straight, stayed on well despite hanging right through final 150 M out.
Fractious in gates, slowly away and checked at start, always at least 10Ls last until home turn, ran on strongly towards stands' rail and nearest at the finish.
Awkwardly away, about 6Ls behind in mid-division through to home turn when under pressure, no impression.
Mostly behind midfield into straight where he ran on well to lead near finish.
Made steady headway from rear before home turn. Stayed on to challenge inside 350 M. Found winner too strong.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear before making up some ground in straight.
Soon in rear where he stayed.
Led soon after start and held 1/1-2L advantage 200 M. Found one-paced close home.
Midfield to straight. Kept on without quickening under pressure.
Well there to straight where he kept on to threaten 150 M.
Never a factor.
Clear last 1200 M and among rear group into straight. Kept on close home.
Ran 4th into straight where he made no show.
Always thereabouts. Plugged on final 150 M.
Never far off before failing to hold place 200 M out.
Prominent to straight. Found no extra approaching 200 M.
Soon led. Held 1-1/2Ls advantage final turn. Found no extra when headed 250 M.
Better than midfield. About 3Ls behind leader early straight. Made ground steadily under whip but failed to threaten the first pair.
Towards rear throughout.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Began awkwardly, soon prominent. 4-wide 3rd turning into straight. Weakened 300 M out.
In touch. Steady progress to 3rd 1000 M. 1-1/2Ls 2nd final turn. Ran on to take lead 250 M out. Just got up on the line in a ding-dong battle closing stages.
Towards rear. Made minor progress inside 250 M.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield. Recovered a little late ground closing stages.

Slowly away, in rear early. Gradually recovered ground to be in midfield. Crept closer to 5th turning in. Ran on well under pressure to tackle the winner 100 M out. Just beaten by the narrowest margin.
Prominent early but wide, soon settled in midfield. Remained in similar position until making some moderate progress final 400 M.
Pushed along early to sit outside leader from 1400 M. Dropped to 4th final turn. Soon faded.
Rear. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Last from 1000 M. Ran past a couple of beaten horses in straight.
Behind midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Well there. Gained slender advantage around home bend. Kept on before fading final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Well there. Hit front into straight. Worn down about 150 M out.
Last into straight. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Finished off race well.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened well to take charge over 150 M out.
Rear and wide. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there to straight. One-paced under pressure.
Around midfield to straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Midfield. Gradually weakened in straight.
Ridden along for early pace. Settled in rear of midfield. Made short-lived effort coming out of back straight. Ran home one-paced.
Prominent and 4-wide. Weakened in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Led far side. Narrowly headed around home bend. Soon weakened in straight.
Towards rear. Short-lived effort final turn to early straight. Soon found no extra.
Soon towards rear from widest draw. Recovered some late ground closing stages.
Near rear. Kept on a bit closing stages.
Prominent on 3-wide. Came to tackle leader 900 M. Remained there until failing to hold place when weakened 200 M.
Behind midfield. Made progress on inside rounding home bend to be 5th 400 M. Checked 350 M. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up good ground on outside passing 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear early. Soon recovered ground to be 4th. About 2Ls 3rd rounding home bend. Ran on well passing 300 M to take advantage 150 M out. Held on.
Around midfield. Kept on quite well in straight.
Well there. Dropped back a bit to 4th 800 M. Kept on well in straight, doing best work closing stages.
Led field soon after start. Faded when headed passing 200 M.
Prominent from a wide draw, soon settled behind midfield. Made ground steadily final 400 M.
Around midfield. Ran on steadily in straight, never nearer.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit 1000 M out. Made no show in straight.
Slowly away, never in contention.
Prominent and wide to straight. Dropped out.
Jumped well. Led early settling behind leaders coming out of back straight. Gradually faded out of contention in home straight.
Travelled in rear of midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Raced keenly in forward of midfield. Not much room early in straight. Ran on well final 200 M but unable to draw level.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened well to hit front over 200 M out but swamped close to home.
Settled at the back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Settled in midfield. Baulked for a run early in straight. Raced tight between runners about 200 M out. Ran on steadily closing stages.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Soon took up running. Led to 300 M. Weakened under pressure.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few. Responded well under pressure upon straightening to gain upper hand closing stages. Hung on well.
Settled in last few. Made some progress early in straight. Kept on steadily to finish.
Raced mainly 4-wide in midfield. Made some impression early in straight. Ran home one-paced.

Jumped fairly and soon settled in midfield 2 wide. Near the 600 M was awkwardly placed on heels. Had trouble finding clear running in early part of straight. Made up steady ground when clear running was obtained 200 M out.
Began well and niggled along to lead narrowly 2 wide from the 1200 M. Near the 800 M was headed and dropped to 3rd on straightening. No extra in straight and dropped out steadily inside final 250 M.
Slowly away and soon recovered to race in worse than midfield on rail. Commenced to give ground at the latter part of home turn and tailed out in straight.
Slow to begin and ridden along to race in midfield or worse 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and only able to keep on evenly to the line.

Slow to begin and pushed along to race in midfield or better on rail. Unable to improve on rail rounding the home turn. Under pressure 300 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Began fairly and raced keenly in a prominent position on rail. Was steadily shuffled back at home turn to be in midfield on straightening. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

From a wide draw was immediately steadied to the rear section on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up good ground inside final 200 M when asked 350 M out but just failed to run down the winner.

Broke fairly and steadily eased to the rear section around 2 wide. Switched to the widest and made little headway home turn. Ran on fairly in early to middle part of straight whilst hanging in. One-paced inside 100 M.

Broke well and ridden along to race in better than midfield 3 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but failed to quicken and further weakened inside final 200 M. (Significant amount of mucus.)
Niggled along to race in midfield or worse 3 wide with cover through to straight. Near the 300 M was steadied when disappointed for running. Made up little ground over the final 200 M.

Jumped fairly and soon settled in better than midfield 2 wide. Crept forward at home turn to be 1/2L off leader on straightening. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but slightly weakened over the concluding stages.

Broke well from wide draw and steadily settled in midfield 3 to 4 wide through to straight. Made little progress in early part of straight but effort was short lived and soon became one pace inside final 200 M.

Broke well from wide draw and prominent in 3 wide. Shortly after the 800 M pressed forward to take lead on rail to straight. Kicked away when asked 350 M out, fended off late challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.

From the widest draw was soon eased to the tail 2 wide. Rounding the home bend steadily switched to the outside to obtain clear running. Under pressure 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Settled in rear about 9Ls behind and 2 and 3-wide down the backstretch, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, posed no danger down centre of track.
In midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls behind until 800 M when hanging out a little, 3Ls back in 6th when 2-wide entering straight, soon outpaced.
Always within about 2Ls of the speed in 3rd down the backstretch, 1L back in 4th off final bend when hanging out, one-paced thereafter. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
On fence 8Ls behind in 10th for most of backstretch, under pressure when 6Ls last entering home straight, never a factor.
Threw head up on exiting and settled about 9Ls off pace down the back, 5Ls behind and one from rear taking home turn, switched out and steadied 200 M out, ran on well, never nearer.
Raced 3-wide with cover in 9th about 6Ls off pace until 800 M out, 4-wide and 4Ls down in same spot entering straight, ran on quite well despite weakening final 100 M, improved.
Mostly 2-wide but always tended to hang in towards fence, 3Ls behind in 4th at the 800 M, 2Ls down in 5th turning for home, beaten over 200 M out.
Disputed lead early on fence, settled about 2Ls back in 2nd at 700 M, picked up well off home turn to lead 300 M out, driven out, just hung on.
On fence in midfield no worse than 4Ls or 5Ls off pace (checked slightly at 800 M) through to home straight, not dangerous.
Disputed lead out 2-wide at 1000 M and went 2Ls clear 700 M out, joined by winner turning for home and weakened quickly from 300 M out.
2-wide and about 6Ls behind in 10th along backstretch, closer over 3Ls back in mid-division off final bend, ran on well to nick a place in final strides.
Always niggled along when 2-wide about 8Ls behind in 12th down backstretch, 4-wide on the swing when 5Ls behind, ran on very strongly, failed narrowly.
4Ls behind in 5th when 3-wide without cover at 800 M, 4-wide entering straight and under 1L back in 2nd at the 200 M, lost a place final strides.
Slowest away, 3-wide about 4Ls behind in midfield at 900 M, steadied at 700 M and 4-wide into home straight, no impression.
Began fairly and kept within 2Ls of the leaders early stages. Failed to quicken when asked at 600 M and faded closing stages.
Began well and raced among leaders early. Assumed the lead from 600 M out. Kept on after being headed in the final 200 M.
Kept within a length of the pace before fading out of contention in the final 200 M.
Raced within a length of the leader at 800 M. Outpaced gradually after 600 M. Kept on same pace in the closing stages.
Midfield and within 3Ls of the lead at 800 M. Drifted back towards the rear at 400 M. Responded well when pressured and made a late run to be closest at finish.
Jumped well but was outpaced in the early stages. Settled towards the back until being pressured at 400 M. Made up some ground in the final stages.
Improved steadily after jumping and led by a narrow margin at 800 M. Remained near the pace at 400 M but gradually gave way in the final 200 M.
Niggled along to be at midfield 800 M out. Kept on and was within 3Ls of the lead at 400 M. Faded in the final 200 M.
Off slowly and was 8Ls off the pace at 800 M. Improved gradually to reach within 4Ls of the lead at 400 M. Gained ground steadily in the closing stages and ran down the leader final few strides.
Travelled among leaders early. Remained within 1/2L of the lead at 400 M but faded gradually thereafter.
Slowly away. Remained in rear section despite being pressured early stages. Failed to respond under the whip at the midway point and dropped out.

Raced behind midfield early stages. Slipped to rear section 600 M out. Had to alter course at 400 M after running into traffic but made an impressive rally in the closing stages to grab a minor placing.
Kept within a length of the leader. Quickened well when pressured at the 400 M and hit the lead at 200 M. Kept on well but failed to deny the winner over the last few strides.
Midfield and was 2Ls behind the leader at 800 M. Little response when asked at the 600 M. Only ran past a beaten runner.
Disputed early lead but raced about 2Ls off pace out 2-wide in 2nd at 800 M, about a neck down in 2nd off home turn, failed to dash and shifted out at 100 M, weakened close home.
Had the run of the race about 2Ls off pace on fence in 3rd at 1000 M, still 2Ls down but in 6th or so off home turn, always outpaced.
Led at the 1200 M and over-raced when 2Ls clear at the 1000 M, held narrow advantage turning for home, headed 300 M out and dropped out tamely.
3Ls off pace when 2-wide in 4th at 1000 M, within 1L of the lead when 3-wide off home turn, found nothing under pressure and beaten over 200 M out.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls off the front in 5th down the back, took closer on circle to be 4-wide and half a length down off home turn, led at 300 M, driven out to stave off fast closer in 2nd.
On fence 4Ls off the speed in 6th at the 800 M, over 2Ls behind in midfield entering straight when steadied for a clear run, outpaced by principals but still ran on fairly well.
3-wide without cover when 6Ls behind in 9th or so at 800 M, took closer order on circle to be 5-wide and under a length down off home turn, a neck 2nd at 200 M, stayed on well.
Worse than midfield when 2-wide and 6Ls behind at 900 M, 2-wide and 4Ls behind at top of home straight, couldn't find clear running room until the 200 M, made some late headway. (Mucus in trachea.)
Awkwardly away with head up, head up again at 800 M when about 8Ls back in 12th, still in rear bunch when over 4Ls down off home turn, no danger.
One from rear when 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, 4-wide into stretch when 3Ls back in mid-division, staying on strongly when 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, kept finding, didn't miss by far.
5Ls behind in midfield at the 800 M when 2-wide, only 3Ls down off home turn, stayed on at only the same pace.
On fence about 6Ls behind in 8th through to 700 M, 4Ls down off home turn in much the same spot, posed no threat.
In rear about 8Ls off the pace down the backstretch, 5-wide into home straight in rear bunch when over 4Ls down in rear, stayed on at the one pace down centre of track.
Dropped out 9Ls last on fence at 1000 M, 3-wide into home straight when still 5Ls last and 3-wide, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
2-wide when 1L off speed in 2nd from 1000 M to home turn, disputing lead from 300 M to 100 M when swamped late.
Settled 8Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1000 M, about 5Ls behind in 10th off final bend, held up for a run from 400 M until 150 M out, finished off very strongly, unlucky.
9Ls behind in 12th at 1000 M, 5-wide into home straight when about 6Ls down in 12th, no impression.
6Ls behind when 2-wide in 8th at the 1000 M, 4Ls down in 6th off home turn, ran on well for a place.
Had a nice spot in 5th 2-wide and 3Ls behind lead at 1000 M, over 2Ls down in 3rd off final bend, every chance from 300 M to 150 M, weakened close home.
Caught 3-wide without cover through to home straight when about 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace in about 5th place, dropped out from then on.
Always towards rear, 7Ls behind down the backstretch, about 5Ls down in 12th off final bend, no threat.
In midfield on fence about 5Ls behind until the home straight, tiring and one-paced when steadied at the 100 M.
Slowest away and about 10Ls last until the 800 M, 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home, made a little late headway past beaten runners.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls behind in 4th from 1000 M to home straight, still hanging in there at the 200 M but soon tired.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 1L through to home straight, headed about 200 M out and weakened.
Raced 3-wide but had cover when 5Ls off the speed in 6th at the 1000 M, 4Ls down in midfield when 4-wide, always outpaced.
