Badly squeezed at the start and raced at least 9Ls in rear down the back, 7Ls down in rear bunch entering straight, short of room at 300 M, ran on well, never nearer.
On fence 8Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, 4-back on the fence about 5Ls down in 9th entering straight, quickened up well to lead 100 M out, pushed out.
Among rear group to straight where he ran on strongly to take command close home.
Mostly in 4th to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Never far off to 400 M. Soon beaten.
In rear to straight. Unable to make any impression on leaders.
Mostly in 5th to straight. Kept on till finding no extra close home.
Soon led and made to 150 M where he could find no extra.
Prominent to straight. Chased leader unavailingly and found no extra close home.
Well there till failing to hold place final 250 M.
About 9th rounding home bend. Plugged on under pressure.
Settled midfield to straight before quickening from 300 M to dispute lead 150 M. Found winner too strong.
Last into straight. Made up some late ground final 200 M.
Midfield at best.
Worse than midfield to straight where he ran on quite well closing stages.
Made no show.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit when steadied near 400 M. Made up a little ground inside 200 M.
Led. With 2Ls advantage final turn. Fought on when headed passing 200 M.
Rear. Widest turning in. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Near rear. Crept closer order while shifting to the inside turning in. Ran on steadily to claim 3rd 150 M.
In touch. Dropped back a bit to 5th far side. Made no show in straight.
In touch. Mainly 2Ls 3rd before taking 2nd passing 600 M. Ran on in straight to take command inside 200 M to win readily.
Towards rear. Last final turn. Ran past a couple of tiring horses in straight.
Mainly midfield. Unbalanced when bumped the rail 550 M. Recovered ground to 4th 350 M. Soon found no extra.
2nd. Mostly within 2Ls off lead to 600 M. Given reminders when 3rd home bend. Dropped back steadily.
Began awkwardly towards rear. Ran wide turning for home. Made ground steadily to take 4th at finish.
Better than midfield on 3-wide. Moved up passing 1200 M to be 3rd far side. Gave ground 400 M.
Slowly away, towards rear on inside. Checked when 7th soon after straightening. Kept on.
Settled in rear of midfield. Produced some late impression in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Pushed along early. Settled in forward of midfield. Shifted out for a run early in straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Prominent. Quickened well to take charge inside 200 M. Hung on well.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort and headed inside final 200 M.
Well back. Improving when checked 150 M out. No further impression.
Lacked early pace. Never nearer.
Disputed lead early. Chased leader into straight. Swamped closing stages.
Raced wide in midfield. Made up some ground in straight.
Never in contention.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Better than midfield. Improved from 5th 400 M and was 5-wide turning in. Ran on but just missed 2nd.
Never able to feature.
Jumped very well from the widest draw and made most. Was beaten close home.
Midfield from widest draw. Dropped back rounding home bend. (Wide throughout.)
In touch on inside. 1-1/2Ls 3rd passing 600 M. Held 2nd early straight. Failed to maintain position inside 150 M.
Behind the main bunch. Kept on in straight.
Midfield early, settled towards rear. Made up good ground from 7th 250 M, never nearer.
Sat outside leader soon after start. Weakened steadily from 3rd 300 M.
Hard ridden early to be in touch. Failed to maintain position 200 M out.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Made no show.
Began awkwardly, last early. Soon recovered some ground on inside to be midfield 600 M out. Ran on steadily from 4th 300 M to claim victory close home.
In last few to straight. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move turning in. Ran on doggedly under hard driving to get up on line.
Tracked leader. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening. Soon weakened.
Held narrow advantage to straight. Dropped out of contention quickly.
Last into straight. Made up some ground on rails in straight.
In last few. Saved ground on inside turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Always prominent. One-paced in straight.
Close up. Hit front under pressure over 200 M out. Caught near finish.
Raced wide in rear of field. Never nearer.
Prominent. Raced keenly when wide far side. Dropped out turning in.
Midfield most of way. Kept on same pace to finish.
Raced wide towards rear. Made short-lived effort rounding home bend. Soon weakened in rear.

Broke well and ridden along to race in better than midfield 2-wide. Crept closer to the leaders rounding the home turn and switched out on straightening. Ran on well when asked 300 M out but just failed to match speed with winner.

Led briefly on rail in the early stages and eased to race 1/2L off leader down the back straight. Plugged on fairly when asked 300 M out, headed soon after the 200 M mark and became one-paced thereafter.
Began awkwardly and ridden along to recover lost ground. Took narrow lead 2-wide down back straight. Unable to respond when asked 300 M out and dropped steadily inside final 200 M. (Bled.)
Unable to muster early speed to race in midfield 3-wide. Ridden along at home turn to maintain position. Found nothing in straight and gave ground inside final 200 M.
Shortly after the start was crowded for room and raced in the rear section 2-wide to straight. Only ran on evenly when asked 300 M and thread through some beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to the tail closer to the rail through to straight. Unable to make any impression in straight.
Began well and soon raced in better than midfield on rail. Made the home turn awkwardly and hung out. Kept on fairly in early part of straight but steadily weakened inside final 150 M.
Pushed along to race in midfield 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out but failed to quicken and only able to keep on evenly to the line.

Jumped fairly and steadily settled in rear section on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly in the early to middle part of straight but was held up around the 150 M. Made little ground when clear in final stages.
Began fairly and pushed along to race in midfield on rail. Ridden along at home bend and made little headway. All out 250 M out and responded well to take charge 150 M to win convincingly.
Broke fairly from widest and soon settled in midfield around 4-wide without cover through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 300 M out but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.

Began fairly and soon eased to the rear section 3-wide with cover through to straight. Slightly flat footed in the early part of straight, made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Had the run of the race on fence in 3rd 2Ls off the speed until home straight, 1L down at 200 M in 4th, checked 150 M out, didn't recover.
In 10th about 8Ls off the speed at 1000 M, 7Ls behind in 9th off home turn, ran on fairly, never nearer.
8Ls off pace on fence in 9th at the 1100 M, still towards rear 6Ls behind off final bend, making some late headway when steadied 100 M out, nearest at finish.
2-wide and 2Ls off the speed in 4th from 1200 M to final bend, every chance when 1L down at the 200 M, fizzled out final 100 M.
2-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls behind leader in 8th from 1100 M to home straight, stayed on well to nick a place, nearest at finish.
Always about 3Ls off pace in 6th through to home straight, no clear run 1L down on fence at 200 M, got through 150 M out, every chance, no extra.
On fence 5Ls or 6Ls behind leader in 7th from 1100 M to home straight, picked up well to lead 100 M out, driven out.
Soon led on fence, over-raced a bit early on, a neck 2nd on fence from 1000 M to home straight and 200 M out, was swamped final 100 M.
Slowly away, 10Ls behind in rear until 600 M out, 8Ls last off home turn, kept on fairly, nearest at finish.
3Ls down and 2-wide in 5th at 1100 M, 3-wide into stretch when similarly placed, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, couldn't sustain effort.
Slowly away, 11Ls last at 1000 M, went 3-wide without cover to make some progress on the circle, finished tamely.
Caught 4-wide without cover and unbalanced passing stands, pressed on to lead by a neck out 2-wide at 1000 M, all out to remain in front at 200 M, headed 100 M out, no extra.
Off slowly and soon trailed field. Continued to race at the rear until being urged at 500 M. Switch to the outside on straightening for its run and made a good rally to be closest at finish.

Rode along after jumping. Settled on fence at midfield after being checked at the first turn. Maintained similar position until being shuffled back to rear section when crowded at 600 M. Found nothing in the straight.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Moved out to 4-wide and improved position slightly at 800 M. 3Ls behind on straightening and contended for the lead at 200 M. Failed to find extra in the closing stages.

Hustled to the front but caught 4-wide first turn. Raced 2-wide alongside the leader in backstraight. Took the lead before straightening but started to fade 300 M. Struck heels and nearly fell 200 M. Never recovered.

Raced on fence in a disputed lead early stages. Steadied from heels at 1000 M and settled behind the leaders through to home turn. Contended for the lead at 200 M and kept on well over the final stages despite hanging out.

Settled on fence behind midfield after checking at the first turn. Steadied at 600 M and drifted back to the rear rounding home turn. Had to alter course 300 M out whilst making its run. Ran on without threatening.

Best out and raced among leaders before easing back at 1100 M. Crowded at 1000 M and raced 2-wide at midfield along backstraight. Shuffled back to rear section when crowded again 600 M. Didn't quicken much in the straight.

Settled in a rearward position early. Gradually moved to be near midfield 700 M. Ridden hard at home turn to improve in a wide position. Kept on well, had the lead until final 100 M. Failed to deny winner.
Jumped awkwardly and was caught wide at midfield. Allowed to stride forward after 900 M and joined leaders in a 3-wide position making home turn. Had every chance until fading final 200 M.
Settled on fence in a rearward position. Improved nicely in a 3-wide position at home turn. Kept a good rally in the straight to edge out rival closing stages.

Kept close to the leaders in a 2-wide position early stages. Never more than 2Ls off the pace backstraight and was just behind the lead at 400 M. Quickened well and had a brief lead 200 M but unable to sustain effort to line.
Niggled to a forward position but was 3-wide into first turn Asked to take the lead 1100 M and maintained a 1/2L lead until being joined at home turn. Weakened on straightening.
Caught 3-wide without cover when 2Ls off the speed in 3rd at 1100 M, pressed on to be 2-wide and about half a length 2nd from 900 M to 200 M out when all out, faded thereafter.
Had cover when 3-wide and 4Ls off the pace in 7th at 1100 M, left 3-wide without cover from 800 M to home turn when driven along to be 1L down in 3rd, soon petered out.
Slowly away, on fence 6Ls off the speed in 9th at 1100 M, 4Ls behind and 2-wide off home turn, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
On fence 4Ls off the speed in 6th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in midfield off home turn, stayed on well without threatening principals.
Soon led on fence, never more than 1L clear through to home straight, hanging left when headed at 100 M, no extra.
Slowly away, switched to fence and 8Ls last until 600 M out, 6Ls down in 10th off home turn, made some late progress, never nearer.
Never dangerous, slowly away, 5Ls behind in 8th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 9th off final bend, weakened.
2-wide and 3Ls behind in 5th at 1100 M, raced 3-wide down back straight but had cover, 3Ls down in 6th when 4-wide (widest of all) entering straight, every chance 150 M out, no extra.
No better than 7Ls off the pace in rear through to home straight picked up strongly to lead on line.
3-wide without cover early, got in 2-wide 1L off pace in 2nd at 1100 M, 2Ls 4th from 1000 M to circle when under pressure to lie up, rallied gamely to lead 100 M out, headed final strides.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th through to final bend, every chance 300 M out, didn't pick up and hung out final 200 M.
Slowly away, last early. Recovered ground to be 8th 1000 M. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Better than midfield. Soon dropped back to behind midfield 900 M. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield early, soon towards rear. Crept closer to 7th 400 M. Made ground steadily to be 4th 200 M. Hung in closing stages.
Led briefly early, sat outside leader from 1100 M to final turn where he became 3rd. Found no extra 300 M out.
In touch. Within 2Ls 3rd rounding home bend. Ran on from 2nd final turn to take control inside 150 M. Won readily.
Well there early, gradually dropped back to 10th 900 M out. Made ground moderately final 400 M.
Slowly away, ridden along to recover ground and soon became better than midfield. 3Ls 4th turning in. Kept on quite well to gain 2nd close home.
Checked soon after start, in the rear. Slightly hampered on straightening. Ran on moderately in straight.
Midfield to final turn. Dropped back steadily.
Prominent. Took lead 1100 M out. Maintained advantage until headed 150 M. One-paced closing stages.
Began awkwardly, remained at rear. Just ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Towards rear. Recovered good ground on outside in straight.
Midfield. Made progress on outside to 4th 1000 M out. Kept on until one-paced final 200 M.
Always thereabouts. Came to challenge upon straightening and soon gained 2nd position. Unable to sustain effort and lost position late.
Never on terms.
Well there. Hit front rounding home bend. Hung on well to the line.
Never in contention.
Midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening. (Lame.)
Broke well and led till headed coming out of back straight. Fought on under pressure to re-gain 2nd late.
Midfield. Made up good ground on leaders in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never nearer.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent far side. Faded under reminders rounding home bend.
Prominent to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Never in contention.
Prominent on inside. Lacked of daylight when 4th early straight. Soon weakened.
Around midfield to 400 M. Ran on steadily on inside to grab lead final strides.
Towards rear. Recovered a little ground when whipped final 300 M.
Towards rear soon after start. Failed to make any impression.
Prominent. Moved up to 2nd from 1200 M. Held on until failing to maintain position when weakened 250 M out.
Began awkwardly, at the rear. Recovered some ground closing stages.
Midfield or slightly behind. Moved up from 600 M to be 5th turning for home. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Settled a little bit better than midfield from widest draw. Moved up 850 M to be 3rd rounding home bend. Responded well to take lead early straight. Failed to contain the winner near finish.
Towards rear. Crept closer to 7th final turn. Ran on steadily until one-paced closing stages.
In touch. Midfield halfway. Dropped out from home bend.
Led field soon after start. Held on until headed 300 M out. No extra.
Behind midfield. Moved up from outside passing 800 M to be 5th rounding home bend. 5-wide turning into straight. Soon weakened.
Slowly away, near rear. Recovered ground on inside to be midfield 1300 M out. Dropped back towards the rear passing 1000 M. Only made short-lived effort inside 200 M.
Near rear. Made ground from 1000 M to be just behind midfield home bend. Ran on well in straight but failed quicken to challenge close home.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Very slowly away, losing a few lengths. Trailed the field to straight. Made up good ground late.
Prominent. Hampered into straight. Kept on in mid-division before overhauled final 100 M.
Midfield far side. Lost ground rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Always prominent. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground in straight.
Jumped best holding 1L break most of way until worn down near finish.
Behind midfield. Took some time to obtain clear run upon straightening and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Jumped fairly. Settled in midfield. Soon weakened in straight.
Prominent. Soon weakened out of contention in straight.
Tracked leader. Came to challenge under pressure and gained upper hand final 100 M.
Wide throughout. Towards rear early. Gained midfield rounding home bend. Sustained progress down straight.

Began well and shortly after passing the winning post was checked when crowded for room. Raced towards the rear around 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.

Jumped awkwardly from wide draw and niggled along to race in a forward position on rail through to straight. Plugged on fairly when asked 400 M out but was unable to match speed with the placegetters inside final 200 M.

Broke well from wide draw and pushed along to race in midfield 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 400 M out but unable to quicken and kept on evenly to the line.

Broke well and pushed along in the early stages to race in a forward position 2 wide through to straight. All out 350 M out and ran on fairly but just failed to match speed with the placegetters to settle for 4th.
Began well and soon settled in worse than midfield 2 wide to straight. Failed to make any impression in home straight.

Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in a prominent position on rail. Crept up to race outside the leader rounding the home turn. All out 350 M out but was flat and weakened slightly inside final 150 M.
Tardy start and soon dropped to the back of the field on rail through to straight. Unable to make any impression when asked 350 M out.
Tardy start from widest and soon raced in the rear section 2 wide through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 350 M out and ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Switched out on straightening to obtain running, under pressure 350 M out and made good impression final 200 M to miss 2nd narrowly.

Slowly away and ridden along to recover to be in better than midfield on rail. Switched to the middle of the track on straightening to obtain clear running. All out 350 M out and showed good turn of foot to grab victory near the line.

Began fairly from wide draw and ridden along to take lead on rail from the 1600 M with around 1L advantage to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out but was unable to hold off late challenge from winner over the concluding stages.
Began awkwardly and niggled along to race in worse than midfield on rail to straight. Found nothing when asked 400 M and steadily dropped out inside final 150 M.

On jumping was inconvenienced and steadily settled in the rear section on rail through to straight. Took a long while to get going when asked 450 M out, made up some ground inside 150 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly and soon raced at the tail around 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and only able to keep on same pace to the line.
About 9Ls off pace in 9th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 4-wide into straight when 4Ls down in midfield, pushed out to lead final 50 M, cleverly.
Between 2Ls and 4Ls off pace with box-seat run in 4th on fence from 1200 M to home straight, every chance until the 200 M when a neck down in 2nd, no extra.
A neck behind in 3rd when 2-wide at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, 1L down in 3rd when 3-wide into straight, still right there at the 200 M, faded through final 100 M.
Checked at the start, in rear about 10Ls off pace until 600 M out, never competitive.
8Ls behind in 8th at 1000 M, about 6Ls behind off home turn, faded out.
10Ls behind when 2-wide in 11th at 1100 M, 3-wide into home straight when 6Ls off pce and worse than midfield, didn't get much closer.
7Ls off pace in 7th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 3-wide on straightening when 3Ls behind in midfield, always held by principals.
Slowly away, in rear about 10Ls off pace until the 600 M, made little impression.
10Ls off speed in 10th at 1000 M, never on terms.
Too far off the pace in last at 1000 M, 4-wide into straight when 7Ls behind, soon beaten.
Led by 1L on fence at 1200 M, soon headed and 2Ls off pace at 800 M, still on terms entering straight, one-paced thereafter.
Disputed lead out 3-wide without cover at 1100 M, led out 2-wide by 1L at 1000 M, 2Ls clear at 800 M, headed off final bend and soon beaten.
2-wide when 4Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, pressed on 3-wide without cover at 600 M, held narrow lead when 4-wide into straight, headed 100 M out, no extra.
On fence 5Ls behind the pace in 6th at 1000 M, 2Ls down off home turn, steadied when disappointed for running at 300 M, clear when a neck 3rd at 200 M, led 100 M out, headed final 50 M.
Raced behind the leaders in the early stages. Pressured near 400 M but lacked a needed response.
Raced comfortably in the lead without being pressured until inside final 400 M. Quickened when asked at 300 M and easily held off a late challenger.
Off slowly. Settled within 3Ls of the leaders. Quickened well when pressured inside 400 M and made up some ground on winner in the closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Made its run after 500 M and closed the race off well despite hanging in.
Niggled to be among leaders in the early stages. Out-paced from 600 M onwards and faded inside final 400 M.
Raced in a disputed lead until final 400 M. Failed to quicken and faded steadily.
Jumped awkwardly, checked at the start and raced in a rearward position. Gained speed slowly when pressured at 500 M and ran on without threatening.
Settled in last place until midway point. Quickened well when pressured at 400 M and made up some ground in the closing stages.
Raced in a disputed lead until midway point. Unable to keep pace despite being pressured at 400 M and faded out closing stages.
Off slowly but was urged forward to race behind leaders. Pressured 500 M out but failed to gain ground on leader. Faded steadily final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and settled in a rearward position most of the race. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners in the closing stages.
Began fairly and travelled within 3Ls of the leaders. Lacked a response when pressured at 400 M and weakened.
4Ls behind the pace at midfield 800 M out. Never better than midfield rest of the way and did not quicken in the closing stages. (Lame.)
Kept within a length of the pace. Kept on well inside final 400 M but unable to get closer to winner.
4Ls behind when worse than midfield and 2-wide down back straight, 3Ls down in 6th off home turn, staying on well and with every chance when just over 1L down at 200 M, no extra.
Worse than midfield and about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace in midfield on fence until home straight, never threatened.
One from rear about 7Ls off the pace at the 800 M, 6Ls down in 13th entering straight, made some late headway past beaten rivals.
On fence 4Ls off the speed in 8th or 9th or so down the back, niggled along 700 M to take closer order, 3Ls down in 7th off home turn, soon weakened.
Keen about 3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 6th at the 900 M when checked, improved to be 1L down in 3rd off home turn, led 300 M out, stayed on well.
Slowest away, always detached in rear and at least 10Ls off the speed.
Slowly away, 6Ls off pace in 12th at 900 M, 5Ls down off home turn, stayed on quite well, never nearer.
Caught 4-wide without cover when 1L off pace in 5th at the 900 M, hung out from 700 M out and was 5-wide (widest of all) entering straight when 5Ls off pace, soon beaten.
3-wide with cover when about 4Ls off pace in midfield through to home straight, beaten over 200 M out.
Pressed on to lead on fence by 1L at the 900 M, headed at top of home straight, faded out rapidly.
Brief lead early, mostly on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th through to home straight when held up for a run, clear 300 M out, ran on well enough but winner was too strong.
Half a length down in 2nd out 2-wide at 900 M, sent on to lead at top of home straight, headed 300 M out, one-paced through final 200 M.
4-wide but mostly had cover in midfield about 4Ls off pace through to home straight, soon beaten.
Pressed on to be 3-wide (had cover) when 1L off pace in 3rd at 900 M, 4-wide when 1L down in 4th off final bend, still thereabouts (1L down) at 200 M but weakened close home.
About 5Ls off pace in midfield and 2-wide at 800 M, crowded and checked at 700 M, no danger in straight and eased final 200 M.
Led by 1L on fence at 900 M, much the same in front off final bend, no extra when headed 100 M out.
Worse than midfield when 3-wide with cover and 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed until home turn, 4Ls down in 6th at 200 M, made some more late ground.
Midfield or better about 3Ls or 4Ls behind leader until homestretch, went 2Ls down 3rd at 200 M, continued to stay on strongly but winning post came too soon.
Raced 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd until the 800 M, lost place and under pressure turning for home, soon faded out.
Fractious in gates, very keen early on, 6Ls behind and 2-wide in 10th at 800 M, checked at 700 M, still 6Ls down off home turn, ran on strongly, never nearer.
6Ls or 7Ls off pace towards rear until home straight when 4-wide, made some late progress down centre of course, never nearer.
Always caught 3-wide without cover about 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed in 5th or so through to home straight when under pressure, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, always held by principals. (Mucus.)
Very keen on fence until 800 M when 6Ls behind in 8th or so, never looked like landing a blow in the straight.
About 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in 4th or 5th spot through to home turn, same at 200 M, kept finding all the way to the line.
Slowly away and checked at the start, never better than 6Ls or 7Ls behind until home straight, nearest at the finish.
Slowly away and checked at the start, got well back about 10Ls last until home straight, made some good late headway until final 20 M when checked and not ridden out.
Towards rear about 6Ls or 7Ls off the speed until turning for home, ran on well, nearest at the finish.
Raced 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 3rd at 800 M, about 1L down in 2nd at the 400 M, sent on to lead narrowly at 100 M, all out to hang on.
Led or shared pace to 300 M where he dropped out of contention.
Jumped awkwardly, losing ground at start. Worse than midfield turning for home where he kept on well under pressure final 250 M.
Midfield 1200 M and remained there to home turn. Kept on without reaching winner final stages.
Shared lead from 1200 M to 300 M where he could find no more.
Well there and was upsides leaders at 400 M. Took lead briefly 200 M and plugged on under pressure.
Worse than midfield to straight. Stayed on till finding no extra near finish.
Became last approaching 1200 M and remained there to straight. Made up some late ground closing stages.
2nd last to straight where he made up good ground final 250 M.
About 6th halfway and soon beaten on straightening. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
About 9th rounding home bend. Kept on from 250 M and was nearest at finish.
Never far off to straight. Kept on till finding only one-pace near finish.
In rear to straight. Stayed on without threatening close home.
Well there before failing to hold position halfway down the straight.
Settled midfield to straight where he ran on well to lead inside final 150 M.
Began awkwardly, near rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Led briefly early. Dropped back to midfield 1000 M. Ran on solidly inside 250 M.
Soon behind midfield. Crept closer order final turn. Weakened closing stages. Wide throughout.
Never on terms.
Towards rear. Widest (5-wide) final turn. Made ground moderately in straight.
Moved up from widest draw to be 3rd approaching 800 M. Was 2nd briefly final turn. Faded rapidly soon after straightening. (Bled.)
In touch. Kept on without quickening.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from outside final 200 M.
Prominent. Gave a little ground to just better than midfield rounding home bend. Lacked of galloping room home turn. Ran on quite well in straight.
In touch. Made progress final turn to tackle the winner early straight. Always held by the winner and lost a minor placing close home.
Slowly away, towards rear. Effort early straight but found not much room 250 M. One-paced closing stages.
Well there soon after start. Joined the lead till 1-1/2Ls 3rd passing 800 M. Kept on well closing stages to grab 2nd final stride.
Last to straight. Ran past a couple of beaten horses inside 200 M.
Soon among front runners. Obtained clear lead passing 800 M. Was challenged early straight. Held on well to maintain advantage inside 200 M.
Held up in midfield. Made steady progress final 400 M to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Prominent early. Weakened under pressure from 300 M.
Always well there. Quickened well to assert authority about 100 M out.
Prominent to 300 M. Weakened.
Never better than midfield. Faded out of contention halfway out.
Attempted to make all. Swamped closing stages.
Settled behind leaders. Came to challenge under pressure inside final 200 M but unable to quicken to threaten.
Tailed off halfway out. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Mainly in forward of midfield. One-paced in closing stages.
Jumped fairly. Ridden along just off the pace. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Midfield early. Dropped out of contention from halfway.
Prominent to halfway. No extra.
Began awkwardly. Niggled along towards rear. Made up some late ground.
Settled at the back. Ran on steadily closing stages without threatening.
Towards rear. Crept closer to 8th turning in. Steadied for a run passing 400 M. Kept on well in straight.
Never a factor.
Mainly 3Ls 5th to 250 M. Weakened.
2nd last to 500 M. Switched to the outside and made up some ground final 300 M.
Behind midfield early. Picked up gradually on inside to be 3rd approaching 1000 M. Held up when found not much room final turn. Kept on.
Last from widest draw. Recovered some ground on outside 200 M out.
Behind midfield. Steadied for a run 300 M. Ran on under pressure inside 200 M to obtain a minor placing at finish.
Near rear. Made some progress to 9th on outside passing 900 M. Dropped out in straight. (Heart irregularity.)
Midfield or slightly better. Made progress rounding home bend to be 4th or 5th 500 M. Held up when lacked of daylight on straightening. Kept on without quickening when in clear.
Well there. Sat outside leader to straight. Kept on well to take command close home.
Began awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Made moderate progress in straight.
In touch. 3-wide 4th or 5th on straightening. Faded soon after.
Led field soon after start. Held 1-1/2Ls advantage to 150 M. One-paced when headed close home.
Well back. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Wide in midfield. Took closer order around home bend. Came under pressure upon straightening but soon weakened.
Settled on rails in midfield. Saved ground on inside turning in. Angled off rail upon straightening to challenge and ran on to grab 2nd late.
Wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Well back. No clear run early in straight. Produced good late impression final 200 M.
Attempted to settle in close up position on rails early, but raced keenly in front with 2Ls break coming out of back straight and around home bend. Folded up quickly shortly after straightening.
Led early before settling behind leader which raced freely. Hit front upon straightening but worn down about 100 M out.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Raced in last few. Last into straight. Ran past beaten horses.
Jumped slowly. Soon raced towards rear. Not much room early in home straight. Made up good late ground final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made moderate headway early in straight. One-paced close home.
Settled in forward of midfield. Weakened shortly after straightening. Beaten when hampered.
Settled in 3rd some 3 or 4Ls off the pace. Came to challenge upon straightening and took charge about 100 M out.
Towards rear throughout. One-paced.

Soon eased to the back on rail, near the 500 M was checked when disappointed for running. At rear on straightening and took a while to obtain clear running. Made up good ground inside final 200 M but just failed to catch the winner.

Began well from wide draw and hard ridden along to race in a forward position 2 wide. Soon after the 1200 M went forward to share lead. Under pressure at home bend to maintain position, dropped out in straight.

From the widest was immediately steadied to the rear closer the rail. Went forward down the back straight to be in midfield turning for home. Ran on well when asked 350 M out and took charge after the 200 M to win convincingly.
Began well and soon raced in a prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 350 M out and slightly weakened inside final 150 M.

Jumped well and niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Had trouble finding clear running in the early to middle part of straight. Only able to run on evenly when running was obtained 200 M out.

Began fairly and steadily settled in midfield or worse around 2 to 3 wide. Made little headway from the outside turning for home. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but failed to keep up with placegetters in the closing stages.

Began well and race in midfield but became unbalanced passing winning post the 1st time. Dropped to the rear section 2 wide, switched wide on straightening and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped fairly and ridden along to race in prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Responded fairly when asked 350 M out but became one-pace inside the final 150 M.

Tardy start and pushed along to race in midfield on rail. Steadily switched to the outside turning for home to find clear running. All out 350 M out and made good progress but unable to match speed with 1st pair in the final stages.
Soon eased to the rear section on rail through to straight. Failed to make any impression when asked 350 M out.

Broke well from wide draw and hard ridden along to race 1/2L off leaders 3 wide from around the 1100 M. Took slender lead turning for home, kept on fairly in straight but was headed near the 200 M and weakened thereafter.

Hard ridden along in the early stages to take lead on rail. Joined by another runner down the back straight, headed near the 400 M mark. No extra in straight and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.
Began awkwardly from wide draw and steadily settled in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but unable to quicken and weakened closing stages.
Tardy start and pushed along to race in midfield 2 wide. Commenced to give ground rounding the home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Held up in rear group about 10Ls off pace at 1200 M, much closer about 4Ls off pace in midfield off home turn, 3Ls down in 7th at the 200 M, kept on fairly well without threatening principals.
2-wide when 4Ls off pace in 6th at the 1000 M, 5Ls down in 4th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th on straightening, one-paced inside final 200 M.
No speed early, worse than midfield and no better than 7Ls off pace until 800 M out, 4Ls down and 3-wide entering straight, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, kept on well to lead 50 M out, stayed on.
In 6th place about 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, niggled slightly at 800 M, took closer order on circle to be 3Ls down entering straight, quickened to lead at 200 M, headed 50 M out, no extra.
3-wide without cover throughout when about 10Ls off the speed in rear through first half of race, never got much closer.
3Ls off pace in 3rd at 1400 M, 4Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, improved to lead at top of home straight when hanging out, carried head awkwardly and headed 200 M out, no extra.
In rear group on fence at least 10Ls off pace down the back straight, steadied 600 M out and about 6Ls down and worse than midfield on straightening, never dangerous.
Slowly away and checked at start, about 10Ls last down the back straight and always niggled along, 5-wide off home turn when 7Ls behind in rear, no impression.
Led early about 1800 M but went 1L 2nd on fence at 1500 M, 2Ls 2nd at 800 M, disputing lead at top of home straight but swamped about 200 M out.
Travelled smoothly on fence in 5th about 6Ls off pace through to 800 M, went well only 2Ls down on inner on the swing, found nothing under pressure and beaten over 200 M out.
Awkwardly away, worse than midfield when 2-wide about 8Ls behind down backstretch, driven along when 4-wide entering home straight when 6Ls behind in 10th, faded out.
On fence about 6Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, 3Ls down and 2-wide in 5th off home turn, still only 1L down at 200 M, outpaced close home.
About 12Ls last at 1000 M, 7Ls down in 13th off home turn, never a factor.
Factious in gates, led by 1L at 1500 M, 2Ls clear 800 M out, headed at top of home straight and dropped out rapidly.

Slowly away, hard ridden to make up ground but got no better than midfield. Caught behind a weakening runner 700 M out and was shuffled back to be among last few into the straight. Made up ground in the straight.
Began awkwardly and became detached in the early stages. Niggled along to catch up with field before straightening with more than 8Ls to make up. Made up a bit of ground in the straight.
Off well but steadily dropped to be in rear. Improved to midfield from a 3-wide position rounding home turn. Gave chase in the straight but posed no threat to the top pair.
Began well and raced at midfield. 3-wide and no more than a length off the pace rounding home turn. Quickened nicely and took the lead easily final 100 M.
4-wide at midfield. Made progress steadily to race just behind the leaders at 800 M. Continued to be 4-wide making the turn and was one paced in the straight.
Jumped well from widest draw and was ridden along to race alongside the leader after 1000 M. Took the lead briefly at 200 M before being headed by the winner.
Near the back early. Made progress along the outside to reach within 2Ls of leaders rounding home turn but was widest and without cover. Dropped out shortly after entering home straight. (Lame.)
Hard ridden out of the gates to take the lead after 1000 M. Dug deep to hold its lead in the straight but got its head up and not striding well after being headed final 200 M.
Best out from wide draw. Failed to cross to the lead and settled wide behind midfield. Lacked a response when pressured at 600 M and only ran past beaten runners.
Soon travelled in rear section. Made progress in a 4-wide position at 600 M but failed to continue on in the straight.
Niggled along behind the leaders until the turn. Struggled 700 M out and commenced to lose ground. Weakened and tailed out. (Blood in trachea.)
Ridden along early. Settled on rails behind the leaders from 800 M through to straightening. Only kept same pace to line.
Best away, checked 1400 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 5th off home turn, switched right to share lead at 200 M, every chance, no extra close home.
Had a nice spot on fence about 3Ls off pace in 3rd down backstretch, 2Ls down in 3rd into straight, all out to be 1L down in 4th at the 200 M when bumped to the right, no extra.
On fence 8Ls off the pace in 9th at 1200 M, 3-wide into stretch when 7Ls behind, 4Ls down and making some headway when knocked sharply sideways at the 200 M, did not recover.
Always 3-wide with cover down the backstretch, 8Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, driven along entering straight when 4-wide and 8Ls behind towards rear, soon outpaced.
On fence 6Ls behind lead in 7th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 6th entering straight, upsides leaders at the 200 M, fought toe-to-toe with runner-up only to assert through final 25 M.
On fence 9Ls behind in 10th at 1200 M, only a little closer entering straight, 4Ls down in 7th and making good headway when knocked sideways at 200 M, recovered well, ran on.
One from rear about 11Ls off the speed down the back, 8Ls behind in rear off home turn, ran on quite well to be nearest at the finish.
9Ls behind and 2-wide in 11th at the 1200 M, 5-wide (widest of all) on straightening when 7Ls down towards rear, severely hampered at the 200 M when making steady headway, run ended.
Keen early on and no worse than 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide through to 600 M, upsides leader at the 400 M and 200 M, faded inside final 200 M.
Led by 1L on the fence at the 1400 M, never clear by much more than 1L and joined at top of home straight, all out to hold a share of lead at 200 M, weakened final 100 M.
About 12Ls last down back straight, 9Ls last and 3-wide into the stretch, moderate headway when steadied at the 200 M, no danger.
2-wide and 3Ls behind in 4th at the 1200 M, same entering home straight, outpaced when hindered and nearly fell, eased down. (Lame.)
Raced freely when 6Ls behind leader in 6th at 1200 M, 3-wide from 600 M to home straight when 5Ls behind in 7th, beaten when steadied 200 M out, eased close home.
Slowly away, 6Ls behind in 11th at 1200 M, over 2Ls down in 6th entering straight, stayed on well without threatening principals.
Had cover when 5Ls off the speed in 9th at 1200 M, lost place on circle and 5-wide into home straight in rear about 6Ls off the speed, soon well beaten.
Head up at the 1600 M, on fence one from rear 8Ls behind lead at 1200 M, about 4Ls down in 9th entering stretch when 2-wide, picked up very well to lead 150 M out, ran on strongly.
Awkwardly away, 5Ls off speed when 2-wide in 10th at 1200 M, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in 10th, quickened up well to be a neck 2nd at 200 M, no extra close home.

Switched from widest gate to be 7Ls off pace and 2-wide in 12th at 1200 M, closer but wider on circle and 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight, every chance when upsides leaders at 200 M, just held.
2-wide and 2Ls behind leader in 5th at 1400 M, left 3-wide without cover and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 5th at top of home straight, faded out very quickly.
Bumped at start, on fence 4Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, niggled along when 2Ls down in 4th turning for home, ran on fairly, one-paced near finish.
On fence 2Ls off pace in 4th at the 1400 M, 1L down in 3rd entering straight, led 300 M out, headed 150 M out, found no more.
Broke awkwardly and settled about 10Ls last for most of backstretch, about 6Ls behind in rear off final bend, ran on past some beaten rivals.
Led by 1L on fence at 1400 M, headed 900 M out and 1L behind in 2nd at 600 M, led again at top of home straight, headed again 300 M out, soon faded.
Keen early on, 3Ls off pace when 2-wide in 7th at 1200 M, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls off pace in midfield, all out to be 2Ls down in 6th at 200 M, always held.
Keen early on when prominent, 4Ls behind when 6th at the 800 M, disappointed for running 600 M out, 3Ls down off home turn, soon beaten.
Caught 5-wide without cover until 1000 M out, pressed on to lead at 900 M, led on fence by 1L at 800 M, headed at top of home straight, dropping out rapidly when checked at 200 M.
Had cover when 4-wide and 2Ls off pace in midfield at 1200 M, lost position on circle and under pressure turning for home when 5Ls off pace towards rear, dropped out. (Mucus.)
Towards rear when held for run 300 M. Improved a bit final 150 M.
Just behind midfield into straight where he failed to get a clear run from 300 M to 150 M. Stayed on at the finish.
Always at the back.
Ran 2nd into straight where he faded rapidly.
Headway from midfield 1100 M and was well there turning for home. Could make no impression on leaders final 300 M.
Among rear group into straight. Made up some late ground to be nearest at the finish.
Close up before taking charge from 1200 M and made rest.
Midfield at best.
Always well there. Kept on to dispute for 2nd placing inside final 150 M.
Well there before dropping to 7th 1000 M. Made no show on straightening.
Never far off to straight. Stayed on well closing stages despite not reaching winner.
Midfield rounding home bend. Kept on steadily final 200 M.
Worse than midfield approaching home turn. Stayed on under pressure closing stages.
About 5th halfway and was 4th 200 M out. Kept on to dead-heat for 3rd final stride.
Made no show.
Led field soon after start until 800 M. Kept 1L 2nd and tried to fight back passing 150 M. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Behind midfield. Short-lived effort early straight until one-paced inside 150 M.
Began very awkwardly, never in contention. (Hung in.)
Checked soon after start, dropped to the last. Ran on very well from final turn to take charge closing stages.
In touch. Gave a little ground 650 M 4-wide and was behind midfield final turn. Soon weakened.
Midfield or slightly better. Crept closer to 5th on 4-wide turning in. Steady progress early straight, ran on under pressure closing stages.
Towards rear. Steady progress in straight. Steadied when failed to find clear passage inside 100 M, unable to ride out.
Well there. Took lead from 800 M until headed on straightening. Kept on well until one-paced closing stages.
In touch from widest draw, settled towards rear. Made up good ground from outside final 250 M.
Soon prominent. 2Ls 3rd to home turn while hanging out. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Better than midfield. 4th rounding home bend. Weakened inside 200 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Always in last few.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened out of contention.
Jumped early. Travelled in third last to straight. Improved steadily on rails to be nearest at finish.
Made all. Just held on to the line.
Always thereabouts. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to miss narrowly.
Raced 3-wide in midfield. Dropped out turning for home.
Jumped slowly. Travelled in rear of midfield. Commenced move turning in but not much room early in straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Midfield to straight. One-paced. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Travelled in rear of midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Always prominent. Kept on same pace in straight without quickening.
Tracked leader and was within 2Ls behind. Weakened steadily soon after straightening.
Behind midfield. Kept on quite well in straight but was crowded for room passing 200 M.
In touch early, settled just behind midfield. Ran on from 6th early straight to grab 2nd at finish.
Flat-footed at start, losing significant ground. Always at the back.
Never a factor.
Lost significant ground at start, towards rear throughout.
Slightly better than midfield on the rail. Switched to 3-wide final turn and crept closer order to 2nd. Ran on well to take command 200 M. Held on.
Took lead to 200 M. Found no extra.
Towards rear. Crept closer to 8th turning in. One-paced.
Held 3rd on inside. Kept on to obtain 2nd briefly closing stages.
Midfield from widest draw. Dropped back steadily from final turn.
In touch. Mainly 4th before giving a little ground to midfield final turn. Kept on same pace in straight.
Wide in rear of midfield. No extra in straight.
Chased leader to straight. One-paced under pressure.
Steadied to rear of midfield early. Failed to quicken under pressure in straight.
Well back. Made up good ground between runners in straight but did not find much room closing stages.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Made all. Just held on under pressure.
Settled in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Sustained progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Kept on at the same pace in straight.
Wide throughout. Midfield to straight. Ran on home one-paced.
Raced wide in midfield. Made modest progress down straight without threatening.
Settled in rear. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight. Kept on same pace.

Hard ridden along in the early stages to race in midfield or better 3-wide without cover. Switched to the outside on straightening to obtain clear running. Unable to make any impression in straight. (Significant amount of mucus.)

Shortly after the jump was checked away from heels and raced in worse than midfield on rail to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 250 M out but after the 200 M was crowded for room. Continued to run on fairly thereafter.
Broke well and pushed along to lead in the early stages. Eased back to race 1/2L off leader down back straight. Hung out badly making the home turn and tailed out in straight.
Began fairly from wide draw and steadily settled towards rear around 4 to 5-wide to straight. Worked home well inside final 200 M to be closest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or worse 2 to 3-wide through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 250 M out and weakened slightly over the concluding stages.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and ridden along to race in a handy position 2-wide through to straight. Responded fairly when asked 250 M out but unable to fend off challenge from 1st pair in final stages and just held onto 3rd.

Began well and steadily settled in midfield or worse 3-wide without cover. Found cover rounding the home turn. For some distance approaching the 200 M was held up, only kept on evenly when running was obtained inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly and steadily settled in worse than midfield 2-wide. Pushed along at home turn and made little headway. All out 200 M out and made good impression but unable to match speed with winner in final stages.

Shortly after the start was checked away from heels and made the 1st turn very awkwardly. Soon recovered to race in a handy position on rail to straight. No extra in straight and steadily gave ground.

Broke fairly and hard ridden to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Slightly held up for running in early part of straight, only able to run on evenly when clear running was obtained inside final 150 M.

Jumped well and ridden along to take lead on rail from the 900 M with around 1/2L to 1L advantage to straight. Kept on evenly when asked 250 M out, headed soon after the 200 M mark and further weakened in final stages.
From the widest was immediately steadied to the rear on rail through to straight. Responded well when asked 300 M out and charged through the field to grab the lead over the concluding stages.
Bumped at start, 3-wide without cover when 1L off pace in 3rd 1300 M out, got in 2-wide a neck 2nd at 1100 M, a neck 2nd at home turn and disputing lead at 200 M, no extra close home.
Led on fence 1400 M out, never clear by more than 1L and joined off home turn, stayed on gamely but was grabbed final strides.
In 4th place when 3Ls off the speed at the 1100 M, 2-wide and still close up turning for home, one-paced thereafter, always held.
8Ls behind in 9th when 2-wide at 1100 M, head up at 600 M and caught widest of all (4-wide) on the swing, little hope thereafter.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1100 M, driven along 500 M and 3-wide into home straight when 2Ls behind in 4th, very one-paced final 200 M.
2-wide when 4Ls off the speed in about 5th from 1200 M to home turn, briefly loomed a threat on outer when 3Ls down at 250 M, very one-paced in the finish.
Switched from wide gate to sit 11Ls last on fence at 1100 M, about 8Ls back off home turn, never a factor.
Checked soon after exiting gates, 2-wide and 6Ls off the speed in 7th at 1100 M, much the same off final bend, made some decent late headway, never nearer.
On fence 7Ls behind leader in 8th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in midfield off home turn, stayed on without threatening principals.
On fence 5Ls off the speed in 6th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 5th and still on inner off home turn, switched out to challenge when 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, ran on to lead final strides.
Awkwardly away, about 10Ls off pace in rear until 600 M, not much closer on straightening, no danger.
Slowly away, 8Ls off the speed in 9th or 10th on fence from 1100 M to home straight, never threatened.
Jumped awkwardly and was among last few early stages. Swiftly improved to take up a prominent position behind the leader after 800 M. Kept a good run final 200 M and took over final 50 M.
Ridden to take the lead. Held a 1/2L advantage into the home straight. Led by a length final 200 M but failed to hold off the top pair.
Began only fairly and was ridden to a forward position. Kept within a length of the leader through to home straight. Responded only fairly when asked and faded last 100 M.
Raced 4-wide behind midfield. Fell further back after checking at 600 M. Made up ground steadily in the straight and finished well.
Raced 4-wide and 3Ls behind the pace. Closed to within 2Ls entering home turn but weakened from 400 M out.

Jumped well and raced in a disputed lead before taking a sit at 800 M. 3-wide and kept within 2Ls of the lead through to home straight. Kept on well in the straight but had to be steadied from heels few strides before the line.
On fence at midfield and 3Ls behind the pace at 800 M. Remained in similar position going into home straight. Kept on same pace to line.
Quickest out from wide draw and raced widest at midfield. Severely hampered and was carried wider at the turn. Unable to quicken in the straight. (Dropped whip 100 M.)
Settled at midfield. Hung out badly making the turn and dropped to the rear after checking at 500 M. Last to enter home straight and ran past a few beaten ones.
Dropped back from widest draw. Made up ground rounding home turn to reach within 5Ls of the leader at 400 M. Switched out on straightening, made a good rally but was not enough to overtake winner.
Slowly away and trailed field through to home straight with a 8Ls deficit. Made up a bit of ground in the home straight.
Off well and dropped steadily to midfield and 3-wide. Severely hampered 600 M and was taken wider at the turn. Showed little in the straight.
Slowly away, one from rear when 9Ls off pace at 1100 M, headway when inconvenienced at 500 M, 4-wide (widest of all) into home turn, ran on, nearest at finish.
Awkwardly away and threw head around, wide and 10Ls last at 1200 M, pressed on when very wide (4-wide) from 700 M to be 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, soon petered out.
Settled 9Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, about 6Ls last entering straight, no danger.
Had the run of the race in 3rd from 1100 M, through to home straight, picked up well to lead at 150 M, headed strides later but kept on well to line.
On fence 6Ls off pace in mid-division at 1100 M, nearer last when 4Ls down at the 200 M, made some late ground without threatening principals.
7Ls off the pace in 9th at 1000 M, 6Ls behind when one from rear at the final turn, never looked likely.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 8th at 1000 M, improved 3-wide without cover from 700 M to be 4Ls behind in midfield off home turn, ran on strongly to lead on line.
6Ls off pace in 6th when 2-wide at 1000 M, about 3Ls down in midfield turning for home and over 2Ls down when short of room at 200 M, switched inside and finished off well.
Caught a bit wide until crossing to 2-wide position 1L off pace from 1000 M to home turn and at 200 M when all out, weakened.
On fence about 4Ls behind leaders in 5th from 1100 M to home straight, steadied when 2Ls down at 150 M, ran on along fence once clear final 100 M.
Soon led, never clear by much more than 1L through to home straight, headed 150 M out but rallied gamely to lead again, foiled right on the line.
2-wide when 4Ls behind in 4th at 1100 M, about 2Ls down in 5th off home turn and at 200 M, no extra thereafter.
Midfield. Improved on far side to be 3-wide 3rd 800 M. Responded well early straight to take brief lead 200 M, then one-paced.
5th early. Dropped back steadily to be 8th far side. 3Ls behind lead passing 400 M. Made ground in straight but without threatening.
Always there. 2Ls 4th early straight. Kept on.
Led field on inside. Was joined final turn. Found no extra when headed 200 M out.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily from 1000 M to be midfield rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Last from widest draw. Ran past a few beaten horses inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Improved on outside to be just better than midfield far side. Widest turning in. Weakened.
Slowly away, towards rear. Steadied on inside passing 1300 M. Remained in the rear till making up some ground from top of straight.
Prominent. 1/2L 2nd approaching 1200 M. Failed to hold place soon after straightening.
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Midfield. Crept closer to 4th final turn. Ran on steadily to take control passing 200 M. Held on.
Prominent. Did not find much room behind runners in straight.
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily behind runners in straight.
Wide in midfield early. Made steady headway down outisde of back straight. Prominent turning in but only kept on at the same pace. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to get up on line.
Well there. Weakened into straight.
Settled in first few. Quickened to hit front shortly after straightening. Unable to sustain effort and headed in the shadow of the post.
Settled in rear of midfield. Made steady progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Attempted to make all. Just headed inside 200 M.
Well back. Made up some late ground in straight.
Never in the hunt.
Midfield or slightly behind. Kept on steadily on inside to obtain a minor placing very marginally at finish.
Crossed to the fence gradually and took lead from 1400 M. Was joined from final turn. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Soon last. Crept a bit closer turning in. Ran on strongly under pressure to take control passing 200 M. Won unchallenged.
Soon 2nd from the widest draw. Mainly 1/2L outside leader to 200 M. Weakened.
Led early. 3rd from 1400 M. 2Ls 4th far side. Held up on inside from 300 M to 150 M. Not recovered.
Towards rear. Steadied when closed to heels 1300 M. Widest turning into straight. Made ground steadily to just miss 3rd narrowly.
Mainly 8th to straight. Held up when found no clear passage 250 M. Kept on when in clear final 150 M.
Mainly 5th, short-lived effort early straight to reach front briefly 200 M. Soon one-paced.
In touch. Weakened in straight.
Midfield on 3-wide. Ran on a bit on outside in straight until one-paced closing stages.
2nd last to final turn. Checked on inside when lacked of galloping room early straight. Ran on when in clear final 150 M.
Towards rear. Last 400 M out. Tailed off in straight.
Last into straight. Made up late ground past beaten horses.
Prominent. Gave ground into straight.
Disputed lead to straight. Weakened.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight.
Settled in midfield. Raced tightly between runners early in straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Well there. Quickened well to hit front upon straightening only to be headed final strides.
Led to straight. Weakened.
Niggled along behind midfield. Making ground when not much room closing stages.
Towards rear. Ran on stoutly down inner of straight to just get up on line.
Always prominent. One-paced in straight.
Settled at the back. Switched wide into straight and ran on down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in forward of midfield. Weakened into straight.
Tardy start and unable to muster early speed to race in worse than midfield around 2 wide to straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M without threatening the placegetters.
Shortly after the start became hardly unbalanced and dropped to the back on rail to straight. Failed to make up any ground in straight.
Began fairly from wide draw and soon raced in midfield or better 3 wide through to straight. Unable to find an extra gear in straight and kept on same pace to the line.
Began fairly but was outpaced and raced in rear section around 2 wide to straight. Unable to make any impression when asked 250 M out. (Lost right front plate.)
Jumped well and hard ridden along to take lead on rail from 800 M with around 1/2L to 1L advantage to straight. Headed shortly after the 200 M and only kept on same pace thereafter.

Began awkwardly and raced towards the rear out wide in the early stages. Around the 700 M commenced to make headway from the outside to be in midfield on straightening. No extra in straight and stayed on same pace to the line.
Began fairly from wide draw and hard ridden along to race 1L off leader on rail through to straight. Took charge shortly after 200 M and cruised home to win comfortably.
Slightly slow to begin and soon recovered to race in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. All out 250 M out and responded fairly to fend off late challenge from 3rd placegetter.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 250 M out and steadily weakened inside final 150 M. (Graze to right hind.)

Best out from widest and hard ridden along to lead in the early stages. Eased back to race 1/2L to 1L off leader 2 wide after the 800 M. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and only able to keep on evenly to the line.

Jumped awkwardly and soon settled in worse than midfield 3 wide to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made up steady ground whilst hanging in inside final 200 M to miss 2nd placegetter by a narrow margin.
Began awkwardly and shortly after that checked away from heels. Dropped to the tail of the field on rail to straight. Failed to show any running when asked 250 M out.
Driven to lead on fence by 1L at 1200 M, headed about 700 M and disputed advantage from 600 M to 200 M when tiring and headed again, weakened.
No speed early on, about 6Ls behind in 9th at 1100 M, 7Ls last off final bend, never properly involved.
2-wide when 1L down in 2nd at 1100 M, awkward head carriage and hung out from 600 M to line, 3Ls down in 4th off home turn, weakened thereafter.
3-wide without cover when 3Ls down in 5th at 1100 M, without cover for much of backstretch and 3-wide when 5Ls down in midfield off home turn, faded out.
Crowded at start, on fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1100 M, in same spot when checked at 600 M, 4Ls down in 5th off home bend, picked up well on inner to lead 200 M, all out, grabbed close home.
Slowly away, 6Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, not much closer on straightening, made some late ground, nearest at finish.
Had a nice spot 2-wide and 2Ls off the speed in 4th at 1100 M, unbalanced when under pressure to stay within 5Ls of the lead at 600 M, all out when 3Ls down in 5th at 200 M, faded.
Deep on track in several places, 4-wide without cover and 5Ls off pace in 8th at 1100 M, 4-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 6Ls down in 10th, no impression.
Had the run of the race in 3rd about 2Ls off pace from 1200 M to 600 M when under pressure and checked, 3Ls behind in 4th off final bend, every chance when 1L down in 4th at 200 M, no extra.
5Ls off pace in 7th when 2-wide at 1100 M, travelled well off home turn when covered up in 8th place 6Ls off pace, clear 250 M, quickened up very well while hanging right, led close home.
Settled in rear about 7Ls last on fence from 1200 M to home turn, stayed on well, never nearer.
Keen in rear about 6Ls behind at 1200 M, pressed on from 900 M 4-wide without cover to lead at 700 M out 2-wide, still disputing lead off final bend, all out at 200 M, very weak final 200 M.
Jumped well but was allowed to drift back. Raced 3-wide at midfield without cover in back straight. Widest turning in and only kept same pace in the straight.
Dropped to last place shortly after start. Trailed field until home turn. Zig-zagged through rivals in the straight and closed the race off strongly.
Off fairly from widest draw and was slow to muster speed. Wide into first turn and worked its way into a disputed lead. Had a 1/2L lead at the home turn but weakened quickly on straightening.
Ridden along in the early stages to be in a forward position. 2-wide and raced behind the leader in back straight. Failed to quicken on straightening.
Settled in rear section. Remained 8Ls behind the leader at 400 M. Rallied nicely in the straight and nearly caught winner at the line.
Settled on rails behind midfield. 6Ls behind the leader at 800 M and remained in similar position entering home straight. Lacked the needed rally in the straight.
Settled on fence towards midfield. Never more than 4Ls off pace in back straight. Continued to gain ground in the straight despite hanging in over the closing stages.
Quickest out and led on fence into 1000 M turn. Joined by a rival after 800 M but never more than 1/2L down. Regained lead 400 M out and stayed on gamely in the straight to deny late charging rivals.
Dropped to rear section and remained towards the rear until home straight with an 8Ls deficit. Ran on well and made up some ground closing stages.
Slowly away and soon raced near the rear. Remained at the back and was last to enter home straight. Never picked up in the straight.
Behind midfield early stages. 2-wide and 6Ls off the pace at 800 M. Made some progress at 400 M. Kept on same pace to line.
Ridden out of the gates before settling behind the leader into first turn. Continued to race in a prominent position until straightening. Kept on well but unable to gain ground on rivals.
No speed early and 8Ls last at 800 M, 5Ls last and 2-wide on the home turn, ran on okay without threatening.
Caught 3-wide without cover when 1L off the speed through to home straight when 3rd, about to be swamped when severely checked at the 200 M, eased down.
Disputed advantage out 2-wide from back to home straight, under pressure when still on terms but hanging repeatedly left from 300 M to 200 M, weak thereafter.
On fence about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace on fence in about 5th through to home straight, outpaced by principals but still stayed on fairly.
Awkwardly away, about 5Ls down in 7th until 600 M, about 3Ls down off home turn, stayed on at same pace on fence.
3-wide with cover down the back and 6Ls behind in 9th at 800 M, 5-wide (widest) into straight when 3Ls down, quickened up well while hanging right to lead at 200 M (survived protest).
About 7Ls off pace at 800 M, 4Ls behind in 10th and keen when 3-wide on straightening, 1L down and challenging when checked at 200 M, kept on well for second (lodged protest - overruled).
Slowly away, about 7Ls behind and one from rear at 800 M, 5Ls behind off home turn, always outpaced.
5Ls down in 6th until 600 M, hung out at 600 M, 3Ls down off home turn, about 3Ls down off home turn when 2-wide, 2Ls behind in 9th when twice severely checked at the 200 M, eased down.
3-wide with cover when 3Ls off pace in 6th down the backstretch, 4-wide without cover at 500 M, hung right when 1L down at the 200 M in 3rd, no further progress.
Disputed lead on fence until the 200 M, lacked gears of Quinella pair close home.
About 2Ls off pace in 4th or 5th through to home straight when 2-wide, about 1L off pace when badly checked at the 200 M, didn't recover.
On fence 5Ls off the pace in 7th at 1100 M, 3Ls back in 5th on straightening, over 1L back in 5th at 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
Raced freely when 3Ls off pace in 4th on fence at 1100 M, bumped rail at 600 M, 2Ls down in 3rd on straightening and half a length down at 200 M, weakened close home.
Soon led on fence, disputing lead from 1200 M to 200 M when all out, faded.
Caught 3-wide without cover throughout, 5Ls behind in 6th at 1100 M, hard pressed to lie up at 600 M, well beaten turning for home.
Never travelled well, niggled along when 2-wide and 3Ls off pace at 1000 M, about 6Ls last and struggling off home turn, soon beaten.
Ridden along early, one from rear on fence 9Ls off pace at 1100 M, about 6Ls behind in rear off home turn, made some late progress on fence, not ridden out final strides when short of room.
Awkwardly away, 5Ls off speed in 8th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 3-wide into home straight when 4th and 3Ls off pace, always outpaced from then on.
2-wide and 7Ls behind in 9th at 1100 M, forced 4-wide 500 M out and 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight, no danger.
Had the box-seat run on fence in 3rd about 2Ls off pace until 500 M out, disputed lead off home turn and at 200 M, no extra inside final 150 M.

Settled on fence in rear about 10Ls last at 1200 M, 2-wide and 11th at 700 M, improved on circle and 5-wide into straight 4Ls back in mid-division, stayed on well while hanging right, led final 100 M.
Pressed on to dispute lead out 2-wide from 1200 M to 600 M when under pressure to keep up, faded 500 M out, well beaten.
On fence 7Ls behind in 10th at 1100 M, 2-wide and 4Ls back in 5th off final bend, staying on well when 1L down at 200 M in 3rd, couldn't match winner's late burst.
Never on terms.
Made all. Just held on under pressure.
Midfield approaching back straight and same position turning for home. Stayed on a bit towards finish.
Always at the back.
Never in contention.
In rear to straight. Never nearer.
Tracked leaders from 1200 M before finding no extra passing 200 M.
Ran 5th behind leaders rounding home bend. Ran on to challenge inside final 200 M, doing best work at the finish to fail narrowly.
Midfield into straight where he kept on same pace.
In touch before losing ground shortly on straightening.
Never a factor.
Always well there. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Prominent on inside. 2Ls 3rd or 4th rounding home bend. Held up when lacked of room 250 M. Failed to quicken when clear.
Began very awkwardly, never a factor.
Towards rear. Shifted to the inside early straight. Made up good ground 200 M out, never nearer.
Soon behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Well there. 1L behind lead to straight. Kept on well but lost 3rd close home.
Jumped quite well but soon dropped towards the rear.
Towards rear. Crept a bit closer to 7th final turn. Ran on from outside final 200 M, never nearer.
Jumped well and was in the front early, soon raced in 4th. 4Ls 5th rounding home bend. Ran on steadily in straight to take lead close home.
Tardy start, picked up gradually to be slightly better than midfield. Ran on steadily 200 M out to obtain a minor placing close home.
Lost ground at start, remained at rear. Recovered a little ground 1st turn. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Behind midfield. Made progress from 800 M to be 3rd or 4th rounding home bend. 5-wide turning into straight. Weakened 150 M.
Prominent. Took lead passing 1000 M. Always maintained 1L advantage until headed close home.
Settled in last few. Shifted out for a clear run early in straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Always at the back.
Improved to close-up position around home bend. Found no extra in straight.
Midfield to straight. Faded gradually.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace in straight.
Always prominent. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Never far off. Ran on down straight to assert authority close to home.
Nearly made all. Caught final strides.
Settled towards rear. Finished off race well.
Well back. Made up some ground on rails in straight.
Midfield to straight. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Travelled behind leader. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Midfield from widest draw. Kept on evenly to the line.
In touch. Advanced to 2nd 900 M. Held on until weakening out of contention final 200 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Began very awkwardly, losing ground. Remained in the rear group until making up some ground inside 200 M.
Began awkwardly, never seen with a chance.
Led field soon after start. Was joined 200 M. Kept on but failed to contain the winner close home.
Prominent on inside. Shifted to the inside early straight. Kept on well until one-paced closing stages.
Jumped well and led briefly early, soon raced 2-3Ls 4th to straight. Ran on well in 4-wide to join the lead 200 M. Gained upper hand close home.
Slightly better than midfield. Ran on when 5th 200 M to take 3rd 50 M out.
Towards rear. Ran on final 150 M.
Tardy start, soon last. Ran past two weakening horses passing 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield or slightly behind. Kept on under pressure in straight.
Midfield. Gave ground steadily in straight.
Made no show.
Settled at the back. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Settled in rear of midfield. Produced steady progress early in straight. Came home strongly closing stages but badly baulked.
Midfield to straight. Kept on one pace.
Attempted to make all. Caught final strides.
Raced keenly early. Midfield or worse to straight. Recovered some late ground in straight.
Stalked leader. Came to challenge under pressure turning in. Asserted authority close to home.
Prominent. Fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Well back. Made short-lived effort rounding home bend. No further progress.
Settled in midfield. Made only modest progress in straight.
Prominent to 200 M. Weakened. (Bled.)

Began well from wide draw and ridden along to race in a forward position 3-wide without cover. Pushed along at home bend to maintain position whilst hanging out. No extra in straight and kept on one pace to the line.

Disputed lead in the early stages and shortly after the 1200 M eased back to 1L off leader 2-wide. Under pressure at home turn to maintain position. No extra in straight and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.

Broke well from wide draw and raced in a forward position in the early stages. After the 1300 M steadily eased back to midfield on rail. Made headway rounding the home turn. Responded fairly in straight and just failed to grab 2nd.
Began well and niggled along to take up running on rail from 1100 M with around 1L advantage to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and ran on well to win convincingly.

Slow to begin from widest and soon raced at the back closer to rail. Made little progress from a 3-wide position going up the Rock. Kept on same pace in straight and ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Raced in a rearward position 3-wide in early stages. After the 1200 M steadily improved to midfield 3-wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running and only kept on fairly in straight without threatening placegetters.
Soon settled in a rearward position on rail through to straight. Near the 250 M was checked when rightful running was lost, made no impression thereafter.

Began awkwardly and ridden along to race 1-1/2L off leader on rail through to straight. Responded quite well when asked 300 M out but unable to find an extra gear to match speed with winner and just held onto 2nd.
Shortly after the start was crowded for room and raced in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and only able to run on evenly to the line.

Began fairly and soon raced in midfield or better 2-wide through to straight. Shortly after straightening was checked when disappointed for running. Made little progress when clear running was obtained inside final 200 M.
Began fairly and steadily settled in a rearward position around 2-wide through to straight. Unable to make any progress when asked 200 M out.
Prominent early, sent on to lead by 1L on fence at 1200 M, set slow pace until home turn, all out when headed at 200 M, weakened rapidly.
Best away, 2-wide and 3Ls behind in 4th at 1100 M, driven entering straight when 2Ls off pace, every chance when half a length down at the 200 M, no extra.
Caught 4-wide early stages, 2-wide and 1L 2nd from 1100 M to home turn, one-paced and weakened final 200 M.
Never a factor, always at least 8Ls off the speed in rear.
On fence 7Ls back in 8th from 1100 M to home turn, never troubled principals.
On fence 3Ls off pace in 5th until 600 M out when under pressure to lie up, folded tamely in home straight.
Raced too freely in rear about 10Ls behind at 1100 M, hard ridden in rear entering straight, no impression.
In midfield 7Ls behind at 1100 M, driven when 3-wide into straight and 5Ls down, plugged on at same pace, nearest at finish.
Checked at start, 9Ls off pace on fence in 10th at halfway, 7Ls down in 10th off final bend, made a little late ground.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 6th at halfway, shuffled a little further back entering stretch, 3Ls behind and no clear run at 200 M, switched wider 50 M, finished well.
Keen early, soon relaxed and travelled well 2-wide 5Ls off pace in 7th at 1100 M, 4Ls back in 5th on straightening, picked up well to lead 100 M out, driven out.
Disputed lead early on fence, had box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to home straight when blundering slightly, all out to be 1L 2nd at 200 M, faded.
Allowed to be drifted back to settle in a rearward position. Gained ground steadily from 400 M and closed the race off well.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Picked up well on straightening and was closest at finish.
Jumped well and led all the way into home straight. Kept on well but unable to hold off top pair final 100 M.
Slow to muster speed and trailed field until final 200 M. Closed the race off strongly to be closest at finish.
Ridden out of the gates and raced on fence at midfield. 6Ls off the lead in 5th at 800 M. Made up some ground home turn and kept on strongly in the straight.
Settled on fence just behind midfield. Failed to quicken in home straight.
Settled 2-wide and kept within 3Ls of the leader. Unable to quicken and faded inside 200 M.
Raced on fence behind midfield. Made a good run in the straight but lost all chances after checking inside final 100 M.
Niggled to a forward position. 2-wide and kept within a length of the leader until home straight. Weakened final 200 M.
Lost ground at start and raced 2-wide towards the rear. 8Ls down at the 400 M. Made a brief run at 200 M before being steadying at 100 M.

Settled 2-wide at midfield. 7Ls behind the pace in 6th at 800 M. Travelled well rounding home turn to close to within 5Ls of leader on straightening. Charged home strongly to claim victory final 100 M.
Soon settled on rails behind the leader. Kept within 2Ls of the leader in 3rd until home straight. Found no extra thereafter.
Settled about 10Ls behind in 10th at 1200 M, 6Ls behind in 9th off home turn, no chance with winner but ran on well to take 2nd place final 50 M.
Switched from wide gate to fence, about 14Ls last at 1100 M, 7Ls behind in rear on straightening, never troubled principals.
2-wide when 2Ls off the speed in 3rd at 1100 M, all out to hold this position 500 M out, dropped quickly from top of home straight.
Slowest away, 10Ls behind in 9th on fence at 1200 M, about 8Ls last entering straight, no threat.
9Ls behind in 8th at 1100 M, 7Ls behind and still worse than midfield on straightening and at 200 M, faded.
On fence about 6Ls back in 6th at 1100 M, 3-wide into home straight when 4Ls behind in 5th, improved to be 2Ls behind in 2nd at 200 M, weakened final 100 M but comfortably hung on for a place.
On fence 8Ls off pace in 7th passing stables bend, 4Ls back in mid-division off home turn and at 200 M, couldn't sustain effort.
Soon led on fence, clear by 2Ls from 1200 M to home straight, headed 250 M out, dropped away quickly.
