4Ls behind in 5th when 2-wide at 1100 M, closer when 3-wide into home straight, picked up well while hanging left to lead 250 M out, commanding win but continued to shift left.
Best away, 4Ls behind in 4th at 1100 M, much the same into home straight, one-paced thereafter.
2Ls off pace on fence in 2nd through to home straight, lacked acceleration and no danger.
Never on terms, always in rear at least 7Ls off the speed.
Lost ground at start, soon improved from outside to join the lead 850 M. Held on until weakened 250 M.
Never a factor.
2nd last to final turn. Recovered a little ground early straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made up good ground inside 200 M.
Well there. Took lead approaching 1000 M. Was joined 850 M. Headed near 300 M. Soon faded.
Behind midfield on inside. Given reminders final turn. Kept on.
Well there early, soon raced in 4th with 2Ls behind lead. Kept on well along rail final 400 M.
Moved up gradually from the rear at start to be 3rd 900 M. Still 2Ls 3rd at 3-wide final turn. Quickened well to take lead near 300 M. Just held on.
Always there. Remained 5th until making progress in straight to be 2nd 200 M out. Kept on but lost a placing closing stages.
Soon in midfield or a little bit behind. Slightly held up approaching 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Towards rear. Improved to just behind midfield the first turn. Ran on from 8th 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Slow into stride, last. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Led briefly early, dropped back steadily to 6th near 1000 M. Found not much room while improving early straight. Ran on when in clear 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Ran on under pressure down centre of straight to miss by a narrow margin.
Lacked pace early. In last few into straight. Finished off race very well.
Niggled at early, travelling in midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Broke well. Led briefly. Settled behind leaders home bend. Shifted in for a run shortly after straightening. Failed to respond under pressure.
Rear. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Reluctant to jump. Never in the hunt.
Held up in midfield. No clear passage first 100 M in straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
With leaders. Came under pressure upon straightening. Weakened badly.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Amongst leaders far side. Tightened and taken back to 4th rounding home bend. Came to challenge after straightening. Fought on dourly to get up on line.
Took up running coming out of back straight. Fought on to resist challenges early in home straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Sluggish at start. Never in contention.
Well there. Dropped back steadily rounding home bend. Tailed off in straight.
In touch. Under pressure final turn, improved to 2nd 400 M. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Jumped well and led briefly early, settling midfield. Dropped towards the rear final turn. Recovered good ground 200 M out.
Never better than midfield. Weakened closing stages.
Midfield. Slightly improved rounding home bend to be 5th turning in. Ran on solidly to take charge closing stages.
Towards rear. Made progress rounding home bend to be just behind midfield but widest turning in. One-paced thereafter.
Better than midfield from widest draw. Moved up steadily in 3-wide without cover to be 3rd 900 M. Held on until finding no extra 250 M out.
Towards rear. Improved to 6th in 4-wide final turn. Ran on well but failed to overtake the winner closing stages.
Began badly, made no show.
In touch. Dropped to 5th 900 M. Found no extra final 300 M.
Last to home turn. Ran on to make up some ground final 200 M.
Soon led. Held 1-1/2Ls advantage early straight. Was headed closing stages. Kept on for 3rd.
Midfield. Weakened under hard driving in straight.
Settled in midfield on rails. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Settled in midfield. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in rear. Went off the track home bend. Never recovered.
Never in contention.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled just better than midfield. Kept on early in straight before no extra closing stages.
Always worse than midfield.
Drawn poorly. Circled field stables bend to take 5th position far side. Remained wide throughout and gradually weakened under pressure approaching home straight.
Chased leader to straight. No extra.
Made all from best draw.
Settled in midfield. No much room on rails early in straight. Ran home well late.
Well there. Soon lost touch upon straightening.
Settled in last few. Ran past well beaten horses in straight.

Broke well but was steadily eased to worse than midfield around 2 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 400 M out and responded well but just failed to match speed with the 1st pair.
Slowly away from wide draw and niggled along to race in midfield or worse 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but unable to step up a gear and only kept on same pace to the line.
Began well from widest and steadily settled in midfield around 4-wide with cover through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and steadily gobbled up the field to take charge inside final 150 M.
Soon settled in worse than midfield around 3 wide with cover through to straight. Unable to show much running in home straight.

Began well and pushed along to race in front of midfield 4 wide without cover. Near the 800 M steadily edged forward to race outside leaders. Only kept on same pace when asked 350 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Began well and soon raced in better than midfield on rail. Commenced to give ground rounding the home bend and tailed out in straight.
Jumped well and ridden along to take up running on rail with 3/4L advantage. Was headed around the 500 M, only able to run on evenly when asked 400 M out and weakened slightly inside final 150 M.
Tardy start and niggled along to race in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 250 M.

Began fairly and soon raced midfield or better around 2 wide. For some distance after 1200 M proved very difficult to settle. Rounding the home turn was shuffled back to worse than midfield. Ran on well when asked 400 M out.

Began fairly and steadily eased to the tail of the field on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and took a while to get going, made up good ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Slow to begin from wide draw and hard ridden to race in worse than midfield 4 wide with cover to straight. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and steadily faded out thereafter.

Best out from wide draw and ridden along to race 3/4L off leader 2 wide. Edged in front rounding the home turn, kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but was headed near 150 M and weakened slightly thereafter.

Began fairly and raced in better than midfield on rail. After the 1200 M became unbalanced and dropped to worse than midfield. Only kept on evenly in straight and ran past couple of beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Jumped fairly and soon raced in midfield or better 3 wide with cover whilst proving difficult to settle in early to middle stages. Ran on quite well when asked 400 M out and just failed to get into the placing.
Niggled along early, in midfield and 2-wide no worse than 3Ls or 4Ls behind leader through to home straight, always held by principals.
On fence 6Ls off pace in 12th through to 800 M, one from rear and 6Ls down off home turn, held up about 300 M out, ran on strongly once clear, never nearer.
Raced 2-wide worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace until home straight, nearest at the finish without fully landing a blow.
Slowly away, 4Ls or 5Ls off pace on fence in about 8th place through to midfield, no acceleration and beaten 200 M out.
Caught 3-wide without cover about 4Ls off pace in 5th or 6th down backstretch, closer off home turn, stayed on quite well until no extra final 100 M.
At least 7Ls last down backstretch, not much closer entering straight, made some late ground past beaten rivals.
Raced too freely about 5Ls off pace in midfield when 3-wide with cover down backstretch, brief progress to be 3Ls back in 5th at the 200 M, no extra.
Raced 1L off pace out 2-wide in 2nd from 1000 M to home turn, still 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, asserted to take advantage close home.
Crossed from wide gate to be 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off final bend, stayed on without quickening.
Soon led by 1L but couldn't cross to fence until 800 M, 1L off home turn and at 200 M, headed close home.
Always the deepest on the track, 4-wide without cover when 5Ls off pace in 10th at 800 M, 5-wide (widest) into home straight when 3Ls down in midfield, soon faded out.
Had the run of the race in 3rd on fence from 1000 M to home straight, dropped out very tamely.
Three back on the fence in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until the 600 M when tending to hang out, weakened in the homestretch.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide with cover and about 7Ls off pace towards rear down the back, 5Ls down in 11th on straightening when 4-wide, ran on strongly to nick a place final strides.
Eased back at start to race in the rear, shifted out on straightening and closed the race off strongly.
Raced midfield on the rail never quickened and weakened final 200 M.
Went forward raced outside leader, remained there but found no extra when placed under pressure final 200 M.
Eased back to a rearward position on rail to straight. Ran on fairly when placed under pressure 400 M out but had no clear running inside final 200 M.
Raced towards rear from wide draw. Widest turning in found no extra in straight.
Slowly away then driven hard to obtain position behind leader on rail. Never quickened when asked and one-pace to the line.
Raced midfield with cover. Quickened from 300 M closed off quickly but just failed.
Began fairly from wide draw and soon settled in worse than midfield 3 wide with cover. Made steady progress in straight but became one pace inside the final stages. (Bled.)
Began best straight to front held narrow lead throughout. Held off late challenge.
Began well from wide draw and went forward but trapped 3 wide. Under pressure on straightening but never threatened.
Raced in behind midfield, held up slightly rounding home turn. However, found nothing when placed under pressure.
From wide gate raced 3 wide no cover outside leaders. Held on gamely in the straight.
Two back on the fence about 3Ls behind in 5th through to 600 M, 1L down in 3rd entering straight, led 250 M out, all out to hang on gamely.
Had cover when 3-wide about 4Ls off pace in 9th or 10th through to home straight, 5-wide into home straight when 4Ls back in 9th, progress to be 2Ls back in mid-division at 200 M, no extra.
3Ls off pace when 2-wide in 7th at 900 M, 3Ls down in 5th entering straight, ran on well without fully getting to grips with quinella pair.
Disputed lead or led by about half a length until the 800 M, led by 1L at entrance to home straight, headed by winner 250 M out, one-paced thereafter.
Prominent within 2Ls of pace in 3rd or 4th through to home straight, all out to stay within 1L of the lead at 200 M, faded.
Detached at least 10Ls off pace down the back straight, 5-wide into home straight and 8Ls last, made a little late ground but never on terms.
Had cover when 3-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 3Ls off pace and under pressure to lie up off home turn, soon faded out.
Three back on the fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield through to the home straight, ran on strongly, just failed.
Caught 5-wide without cover early, still very wide when allowed dispute lead at 1000 M, lost action about 700 M out, back-pedalled very quickly and keeled over. (Bled.)
About 7Ls last at 1000 M, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls behind in 9th, ran on very strongly down centre of track, nearest at the finish.
About 5Ls off pace towards rear down the back, 3Ls down in midfield off home turn and same at 200 M, weakened.

3-wide with cover when 1L off pace in 3rd at 900 M, hampered at 600 M, 3-wide into straight when 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, very weak through final 200 M. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Slowest away, always in rear at least 9Ls off pace through to 600 M, never really on terms.
In rear early on, 7Ls behind when checked at 800 M, made some headway from final bend to 200 M when 4Ls behind on fence in 10th, no extra.
2-wide and half a length or 1L off pace through to 600 M, struggling to lie up off home turn, beaten at the 200 M.
Had box-seat on run on fence 2Ls off speed in 4th through to home straight, led 350 M out, headed 250 M out, battled back well to assert final 50 M.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 1L until home turn, headed 350 M out, faded out.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in midfield down backstretch, shuffled back to near last entering straight, never dangerous thereafter.
Three back on the fence in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace through to home straight, failed to quicken up.
Always 4 and 5-wide, sometimes without cover, 4Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, closer in mid-division when 5-wide into straight, 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M, couldn't sustain effort.
Had cover when 3-wide about 5Ls off pace worse than midfield down backstretch, steadied 600 M out, 4-wide into home straight, 3Ls down and held when crowded and checked at 100 M.
Bumped and crowded at start, in 12th place when 3-wide with cover 6Ls behind at 1000 M, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls back in 11th, stayed on well, never nearer.
3-wide without cover when 1L down in 3rd at 800 M and same into home straight, faded steadily thereafter.
Settled about 5Ls towards rear on fence at 800 M, steadied at 700 M, no clear run and checked at top of home straight when 4Ls back in about 10th, ran on very well for a place once clear.
Caught 4-wide without cover down backstretch, 3Ls back in 5th at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 2Ls back in 5th, led 250 M out, headed again inside final 100 M, no extra.
Always close up 2-wide and about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 5th or 6th through to home straight, failed to match principals kick in stretch.
Slowly away, towards rear early on, severely checked at 800 M, 7Ls last when 5-wide into home straight, made some late headway, never nearer.
Well there to straight where he stayed on to threaten passing 200 M.
Mostly midfield to straight. Plugged on under pressure.
Never far off to straight where he ran on strongly to take command close home. Won readily.
Jumped awkwardly, losing ground at start. Never in contention.
In rear to straight. Never nearer.
Midfield 1/2 way. Could make no impression on leaders in straight.
About 5th into straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Towards rear till making up some ground final 200 M.
Never a factor.
Never on terms.
Tracked leader to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Led soon after start. Kept on till headed inside final 150 M. Just held on for 2nd.
About 6th into home bend. Kept on till finding no extra near finish.
Worse than midfield to home turn. Ran on quite well inside final 100 M.
Prominent. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made good progress from 400 M to be 5th on straightening. Kept on but failed to ride out when lacked of room on inside closing stages. (Dropped whip final turn.)
Midfield from the widest draw. Widest turning into straight. Weakened.
Slightly behind midfield. Was crowded for room and checked passing 600 M. Remained in similar position thereafter.
Always prominent. Ran on steadily from 2nd early straight to take charge 100 M out.
Slowly away, in the last pair before making up some ground to 9th passing 600 M. Ran on well 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Tardy start, always at the back.
Mainly 5th on inside. Hung out rounding home turn. Made up good ground inside 200 M but without threatening.
Soon led. With 3Ls advantage final turn, found no extra when headed 100 M out.
Never in contention.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped well and led briefly early, then raced 3Ls 4th on 3-wide. Kept on same pace in straight.
Towards rear. Went off the track rounding home bend. Never recovered.
Raced keenly just off the pace. Gradually weakened in straight.
Settled at the back. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few. Made up good late ground on rails in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Mainly in midfield. Only produced modest effort under pressure in straight.
Prominent to 400 M. One-paced in straight.
Settled in midfield. Fought on well under pressure to gain upper hand final strides.
Pulled hard. Towards rear early. Made swift headway when wide without cover around 1000 M bend and far side. Dropped away quickly from prominent position after 500 M mark.
Towards rear. No extra shortly after straightening.
Midfield. Took closer order after Rock. Weakened into straight.
Nearly made all. Just pipped at post.
Jumped well and in the leading pair from 800 M. Obtained slender advantage from 600 M. Went 2Ls clear inside 200 M. Held on well.
Always thereabout.
Led early, then sat 2Ls behind the leading pair. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Well there. In the leading pair from 800 M. Closed up 2nd from 600 M but failed to match speed with the winner inside 200 M.
Midfield. 5th 600 M out. Found no extra final 100 M.
Very slowly away, never a factor.
Behind midfield. Hung out badly throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear from the widest gate. Widest final turn. Only made moderate progress in straight.
Began awkwardly, near rear. Soon recovered some ground to be 8th on inside. Short-lived effort final turn and was soon one-paced.
Better than midfield. Ran on from 6th 200 M out to just miss 2nd narrowly at finish.
Towards rear. Made up some ground closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Produced modest impression under hard driving early in straight but unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Well back into straight. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well in straight to narrowly miss placing.
Settled in rear. Not much room early in straight. Kept on well closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Finished strongly inside final 200 M to snatch victory short of line.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Improving when forced to steady inside 200 M. Sustained progress to finish.
Led field early. Headed at halfway mark. Regained lead 500 M out. Soon weakened after straightening.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Settled in 4th and just better than midfield. Produced some impression early in straight before coming one-paced closing stages.
Disputed lead or led. Dropped out of contention passing 400 M. (Bled.)
Settled in 3rd mainly 4Ls off the pace. Quickened to hit front into straight. Caught close home.

Began best and pushed along to take up running on rail with around 1L advantage through to straight. All out 200 M and responded well to fight off late challenge from 2nd placegetter to hang on to the winning spot.
Lost ground at start, raced in worse than midfield whilst proving difficult to settle. No extra in straight and gave ground inside final 200 M.
Soon settled in worse than midfield 2-wide. Shifted out on straightening to obtain clear running and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to miss 3rd place by a narrow margin.

Hard ridden along in the early stages to race in midfield on rail and was inconvenienced near the 1200 M. Under pressure at the home turn, did not respond well and only kept on evenly in straight. (Lost left front plate.)
Broke fairly from widest and soon raced in prominent position 2-wide through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 300 M out and further weakened inside final 100 M.
Began fairly from wide draw and settled in a rearward position 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 300 M and only able to run on evenly to the line.
Jumped awkwardly and dropped to the tail, switched wide on straightening and kept on evenly to the line.

Tardy start and soon recovered to race in better than midfield 2 to 3-wide with cover to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made good impression inside final 200 M but just failed to run down the winner. (Lost left hind plate.)
Raced in a rearward position on rail through to straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M without threatening.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race in midfield 2-wide through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 300 M out to be closest at finish.

Jumped well and niggled along to race in prominent position on rail whilst proving difficult to settle in the early stages. Placed under pressure 300 M out and ran on fairly but unable to match speed with 1st pair in closing stages.
On fence 6Ls behind in about 8th from 1100 M to home straight, made a little late ground but no danger. (Lame.)
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1200 M, never clear by more than 1L from 1000 M to 600 M, joined by KIDDYLAND entering straight and at 200 M, rallied well but grabbed by winner final strides.
Squeezed at start, on fence 9Ls behind in 11th at 1200 M, always in rear.
Slowest away, 10Ls last at 1200 M, 8Ls last on straightening, never a factor.
Brief lead early, keen 1200 M out, had run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1000 M to home straight, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, grabbed final strides by pursuers.
3Ls off pace when 2-wide at 1100 M, 2-1/2Ls back in 4th off final bend, stayed on fairly well but no extra close home.
Raced a little freely on fence 3Ls off the speed in 4th at 1100 M, same off final bend, soon outpaced.
6Ls behind in 7th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 6th on straightening, ran on strongly to nick a place on the line.
1L off pace in 2nd when 2-wide from 1000 M to 600 M, disputed lead off home turn to 200 M, one-paced and swamped closing stages.
9Ls off pace when 2-wide in 10th at the 1200 M, 6Ls back in 10th off home turn, ran on well, nearest at the finish.
Squeezed at start, 7Ls off pace in 9th when 2-wide at 1100 M, switched out to challenge when 5Ls back in 7th off home turn, quickened up very well to lead final strides.
On fence 4Ls down in 6th at 1100 M, much the same into home straight, finished off fairly without really threatening.
Broke well and soon settled in midfield 3-wide with cover. Switched out on straightening. Under pressure 250 M out and charged home inside final 200 M.
Raced in midfield or better 3 to 4-wide with no cover from back straight. Found nothing when asked 250 M out and steadily faded inside 200 M.
Raced in a rearward position on rail to straight. Only able to run on evenly when placed under pressure 250 M out.
Began well and niggled along to take lead with 1/2L advantage to straight. Kept on same pace in straight and further weakened in the closing stages.
From wide draw was hard ridden along to race outside the leader to straight. No extra when asked 250 M and steadily faded inside final 150 M.

Slowly away and raced behind midfield 2-wide. Made little headway and steadily shifted out at home bend. Near 300 M was checked when crowded for room. Rattled home inside final 200 M to miss 2nd by narrow margin.
Bounded in the air at start and hard ridden to race in midfield on rail to straight. Ran on well inside final 200 M to fend off late challenge from 3rd placegetter.
Broke well from widest and niggled along to race in midfield 4 to 5-wide without cover to straight. Unable to make any impression when asked 300 M out.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in a rearward position 2-wide to straight. Kept on same pace and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Jumped best and pushed along to race in a forward position on rail through to straight. Ran on quite well when asked 250 M out but just failed to get into the placing.
Jumped awkwardly from wide draw and dropped to the tail of the field on rail to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made some impression inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Soon raced in midfield 2 to 3-wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running, ran on fairly in straight but unable to match speed with placegetters in the closing stages.
About 9Ls off pace in 9th through to 600 M, 6Ls down in 8th off home turn, nearest at finish without really threatening.
3Ls behind in 3rd when 2-wide at 1100 M, over 1L down in 2nd off home turn, stayed on well but just couldn't get there.
11Ls last at 1200 M, 8Ls last off home turn, made no ground (shifted out and dislodged rider after line). (Lame.)
6Ls behind in 6th on fence at 1100 M, 5Ls back in midfield off final bend, held in midfield when checked at 100 M.
8Ls off pace when 2-wide in 8th at 1200 M, 3-wide without cover from 800 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 6Ls down towards rear, faded right out.
About 10Ls off pace in rear at 1000 M, a little closer off home turn, never much of a factor.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace through to home straight, could only stay on at the same pace.
On fence 10Ls off speed in 10th 7Ls down one from rear on straightening, ran on well down centre of track to be nearest at the finish.
4Ls off the speed in 4th or 5th through to homestretch, stayed on only fairly.
Awkwardly away, on fence 8Ls off pace in 7th at 1100 M, 3-wide without cover at 500 M and 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, outpaced slightly at 300 M but ran on strongly close home.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1200 M, held same margin through to home straight, same clear at 200 M, hung on gamely.
2-wide and 5Ls behind in 5th at 1100 M, closer entering home straight, 3Ls down in 4th at 200 M, stayed on strongly but couldn't overhaul leader.
Held 4th to 400 M. Ran on early straight to take command 250 M. Was headed momentarily passing 200 M. Sustained effort while under pressure to re-gain advantage closing stages.
Midfield to 400 M. Faded.
Prominent. 2Ls 3rd rounding home bend. Kept on until finding no extra 200 M out.
Midfield early from a wide draw, soon dropped back to the rear. Tailed off in straight.
Slowly away, near rear. Ran on a bit in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent. 2Ls 2nd from 1000 M. Weakened out of contention soon after straightening.
Slightly better than midfield. Found no extra from 500 M.
Soon last from widest draw. 12th turning into straight. Made up good ground inside 250 M.
Slowly away, behind midfield. Steady progress on the rail to be 5th final turn. Responded well early straight to take brief lead passing 200 M. Failed to resist winner's fighting back closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered some ground far side. Crept closer order to 6th early straight. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Ridden along to take lead from the first turn. Weakened when headed 250 M.
Towards rear on 3-wide. Widest final turn. Made steady progress to take a distant 3rd inside 200 M.
Better than midfield early stages. Dropped back to behind midfield far side. Made no show in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Raced in last few. Never nearer.
Well back. Racing freely when clipped heels rounding home bend. Never recovered.
Made all. Pushed out.
Settled in prominent position from poor draw. Kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
Midfield. Gradually weakened under pressure in straight.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Settled in midfield. Produced moderate late progress past beaten horses in closing stages.
Travelled in rear. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Raced wide in midfield. Faded into straight. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Close up. Failed to quicken to challenge in straight.
Chased leader. Kept on at the one pace without quickening in straight.
Never better than midfield. Found no extra in straight.
Restrained in prominent position. Failed to quicken to threaten in straight.
Prominent early, soon dropped to midfield. Recovered ground on outside to be 5th home bend. Kept on well until one-paced close home. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Lost ground at start, never a factor.
Soon towards rear. 4-wide turning in. Ran on to take 2nd closing stages.
In touch. Dropped back 600 M out.
Jumped well and led briefly. Raced 3rd to home bend where he came to tackle the leader. Kept on until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Took lead soon after start. Held on until headed 100 M out.
Near rear. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Prominent. Sat outside leader to home bend. Kept on from 3rd final turn until finding no extra inside 250 M.
Towards rear from widest draw.
In touch. Progressed to 4th rounding home bend. Ran on well in straight to take control 100 M out. Won readily.
Towards rear. Improved home bend to be 6th final turn. Steadied 300 M out. Kept on one pace thereafter.
Slowly away, soon recovered some ground along rail to be in midfield. Weakened in straight. (Mucus.)
Led early. Headed coming out of back straight. Settled just off the pace around home bend. Not much room early in straight. Kept on same pace to finish.
Around midfield. Weakened into straight.
Settled in midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Finished off race well to snatch victory short of line.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Close up. Took up running coming out of back straight. Headed over 250 M out. Faded gradually.
Always in last few. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Gradually improved far side and around home bend to gain slender lead into straight. Headed about 200 M out. One-paced.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Made no show.
Prominent. Quickened to hit front about 200 M out. Caught near finish.
Well back. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Jumped well. Settled in forward of midfield. Weakened badly into straight. (Lame.)
Never in contention.

Broke well and raced in better than midfield around 3 wide but proved difficult to settle. Ridden along near the 600 M but unable to hold position. Found nothing in straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Broke well and soon box-seated behind the leader. Shifted out on straightening to obtain clear running. Responded well when asked 350 M out and took charge around 250 M.

Began fairly from wide draw and pushed along to race in better than midfield 4 wide no cover. Near the 800 M pushed along to go forward to dispute lead. No extra in straight and dropped out final 200 M.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and raced in better than midfield around 4 wide. After the 1000 M went forward to race outside leader. No extra in straight and kept on same pace to the line.
Ridden along to race in worse than midfield around 2 wide through to straight. Unable to make any impression when asked 400 M out.
From the widest draw raced in worse than midfield out wide without cover to straight. Tailed out in straight.

Broke fairly and pushed along to take up running on rail. Disputed lead rounding the home turn. Kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but was headed near 250 M and became one-pace thereafter. (Laceration to left hind.)
Unable to muster early speed and raced in a rearward position on rail through to straight. All out 300 M out and made steady progress but was checked after 100 M when disappointed for running.

Soon settled in worse than midfield 3 wide and over raced in the early stages. Allowed to stride forward at home turn to be 2Ls off pace. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and stayed on same pace to line.
Jumped awkwardly and ridden along to race in midfield 2 wide. At the 800 M began to over-race and checked. Only able to run on evenly in the straight. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Jumped awkwardly and soon recovered to be in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and plugged on gamely to miss 3rd by a short margin.
Shortly after the start was crowded for room and raced at the rear 2 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 400 M out and only kept on fairly to the line.

From the wide draw was steadily eased to a rearward position around 3 wide with cover. Made steady progress from the outside turning for home. Made good impression in straight to miss the winner by a short margin.

Broke fairly from wide draw and soon raced in a forward position 2 wide. Near the 600 M was steadied when crowded for room and dropped to midfield. Ran on well when asked 400 M out but unable to match speed with 1st pair.
5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 7th at 1000 M, smooth headway on circle but forced 5-wide (widest) into straight, led on the bridle at 250 M, all out when headed at 50 M, no extra.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at 900 M, came off fence at 500 M and 4-wide into homestretch when 3Ls down in mid- division with chances, lacked the pace of principals.
Couldn't lead, settled for box-seat position on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until final bend, soon struggling.
Slowly away, 6Ls behind in 8th at 1000 M, 4Ls behind into home straight, without running room at 300 M and steadied, clear 200 M out, no chance with quinella pair but ran on well for 3rd.
Led by 1L on fence at 1000 M, skipped 2Ls clear at top of home straight, headed over 200 M out, weakened final stages.
On fence 7Ls behind in 10th at the 900 M, 7Ls behind off final bend, no impression.
Never on terms with leaders, 8Ls off pace in 11th at 1000 M, only got a little closer in the straight.
Bumped at start, 8Ls off the speed in 12th at 1000 M, 2-wide off final bend when about 6Ls behind in rear bunch, ran on through a few tired rivals.
On fence one from rear 9Ls off pace at 1000 M, about 7Ls last into home straight, ran on strongly, nearest at the finish.
7Ls behind leader when 2-wide in 9th at 900 M, quietly handled 4Ls off pace entering straight, clear run 300 M out, quickened up well to lead at the 50 M, ran on strongly.
Driven early to hold nice spot on rails 3Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, much the same into home straight but soon outpaced.
Caught 3-wide without cover when 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, keen at 800 M, 3Ls down in 3rd off home turn, crowded when beaten at the 200 M, faded.
No worse than 1L or 2Ls off pace out 2-wide in 2nd from 1000 M to home straight, failed to kick.

Jumped well and pressed forward. 2-wide and disputed lead from 1000 M onwards before regaining a length's advantage at 600 M. Held a slight lead into straight but was swamped shortly after straightening.
Jumped well from wide draw and was eased back to be 3-wide in last place. Trailed field into home straight and only ran past a weakening runner.
3-wide behind midfield. Shifted wider making home turn but had little response to pressure. Made up little ground final 200 M.
3-wide and niggled along in 5th place early stages. Ridden hard to stay on at home turn and weakened in the straight.

Missed the kick and was ridden along to be in 4th place and 5Ls off the lead. Continued to make progress rounding the turn and challenged for the lead final 200 M. Found no extra when headed by top pair final stages.
Soon raced towards the rear. Little response when ridden rounding the turn. Made no progress in the straight.
Niggled along in 3rd place and 4Ls behind the pace. Closed to within 2Ls of leader at 400 M. Kept on before fading final 100 M.
Ridden out of the gates and raced in a disputed lead from 1000 M. Lost the lead at 500 M before regaining it shortly after straightening. Kept on well but failed to hold off principals final 100 M.
Jumped fairly and steadily dropped back to race behind midfield. Quickened well in the straight and made good progress over closing stages despite encountering traffic 200 M.
Niggled along at midfield. Improved to be within 4Ls of the lead at 400 M. Quickened well and swept past rivals with ease inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly and drifted back to race near the back. Remained towards the rear until straightening. Made no impression in the straight.
Away awkwardly and was ridden along until 600 M to improve to midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Always prominent, about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 4th from 1600 M to home turn, led 300 M out, headed by winner at 100 M and lost 2nd final strides.
On fence 4Ls off the speed in 5th at 1600 M, under pressure to be 3Ls back in 6th on straightening, beaten over 200 M out.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 1L through to home turn, headed at 300 M, faded steadily.
2-wide and 5Ls behind in 6th at 1600 M, 4Ls down in 5th or so entering straight, plugging on at one pace when checked at 200 M, eased down.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1600 M, upsides on straightening, soon came under pressure and wilted markedly final 200 M.
6Ls off pace in 7th at 1600 M when checked, 4Ls down off home turn in 8th, briefly threatened when 3Ls down in midfield at 300 M but soon back-pedalling.
Always about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace in 8th or so from 1600 M pole to home turn, one-paced when hindered at 200 M, always held.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the speed in 3rd from 1600 M to home turn, failed to kick and beaten 200 M out.
Awkwardly away, 11Ls last at 1600 M, about 6Ls last entering straight, kept on well to take 2nd final strides.
Settled 8Ls off pace at 1600 M in 9th, travelled well entering straight when 5Ls down in 9th, picked up well to lead at 100 M, readily.
9Ls off pace in 10th on fence at 1600 M, closer off home turn and 4Ls behind in rear at the 200 M, weakened thereafter.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1000 M to home straight, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, just a little one-paced through final 100 M.
Carried head high throughout, 1L clear on fence at 1000 M and same off home turn, headed at 100 M, no extra.
Very keen early on with head up, 2-wide when 6Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, same position on straightening, short of room at 200 M, ran on again final stages. (Bled.)
4Ls off the speed in 6th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 3-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in midfield, stayed on fairly well, nearest at the finish.
3-wide without cover when 5Ls off pace in 7th at 1000 M, 4Ls behind in midfield when 4-wide into home straight, all out when 2Ls down in midfield at 200 M, faded close home.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 4th and dangerous off home turn, all out when 2Ls down in 5th at the 200 M, soon swamped.
Awkwardly away, on fence 8Ls off pace in 11th at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 9th entering straight, no impression.
Slowly away, on fence 6Ls off the speed in 8th at the 1000 M, 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, steadied for a run when 3Ls behind in mid-division at 200 M, no further headway.
Had cover when 3-wide 9Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, took closer order on straightening out 5-wide (widest of all) in 12th, failed to match winner's kick but still ran on well to nick 2nd on line.
8Ls off pace in 10th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls off pace worse than mid-division, good acceleration to lead 100 M, decisively.
10Ls off pace when one from rear at 1000 M, 3-wide into home straight when 7Ls off pace in rear, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Couldn't lead, raced 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide from 1000 M to home turn, all out to be 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, 3Ls back in 5th off home turn, very one-paced thereafter.
11Ls last on fence at 1000 M, 7Ls behind in rear at final bend, making some late ground when steadied for a run at about 100 M out, didn't recover.
Ran 5th into straight. Plugged on under pressure closing stages.
Soon in last and remained there to home turn. Stayed on to be nearest at finish.
Shared 3rd into home bend before dropping out steadily in straight.
In rear to straight where he ran on before finding no extra near finish.
Always prominent. Quickened to lead 200 M, keeping on well to line.
Never far off to straight. Kept on to take 3rd inside 100 M. Found one-paced towards finish.
Midfield halfway. Could make no impression on leaders on straightening.
In rear to straight where he was steadied 200 M. Kept on finish.
Just behind midfield rounding home bend. Made no show on straightening.
Towards rear and wide into straight. Never on terms.
Led till headed 200 M and faded after.
Midfield into straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Towards rear when checked 150 M, dropping to last.
Well there to straight. Chased winner unavailingly inside final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout. (Bled.)
Led narrowly early until first turn, then raced prominently in the far side. 1L 3rd on 3-wide final turn. Took lead 250 M. Just managed to hold off challenges closing stages.
Prominent. Came to tackle leader from 900 M. Weakened steadily soon after straightening.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Mainly 6th until gaining ground steadily inside 250 M.
Took lead passing 1400 M. With 1L advantage final turn. Faded inside 300 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made moderate progress home bend. Ran on well from 8th early straight, just failing to catch the winner.
Behind midfield throughout.
Mostly 4th. No more than 2Ls behind lead on the rail 400 M. Kept on well until one-paced closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield on 4-wide. Crept closer order final turn. Found no extra inside 200 M.
In touch early, gave ground steadily to behind midfield. Widest turning in. Made up some ground in straight.
In touch early, soon dropped back to midfield or behind. Made very moderate progress 250 M.
Near rear. Recovered minor ground in straight.
Midfield or slightly better. Steadied for a run 400 M. Kept on steadily thereafter.
Never better than midfield. Faded in straight.
Prominent to halfway. Steadied over 1000 M out. Weakened from midfield into straight.
Never far off in similar position. One-paced in straight.
Wide in last few early. Made rapid progress down centre of back straight to be 2nd just behind leader home bend. Held every chance early in straight but found no extra nearing finish.
Well there. Took leader over 1200 M out, setting slow pace. Soon found no extra upon straightening and overhauled over 300 M out.
Towards rear. Hung in early in straight. Kept on steadily under pressure closing stages.
Never seen with a chance. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Settled in midfield. Took closer order approaching home bend. Sustained progress to hit front into straight. Fought on doggedly to retain narrow advantage to finish.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground down straight.
Midfield. Gave ground from approaching home bend. No further impression in straight.
Settled just behind midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Quickened well early in straight to hold every chance but unable to draw level.
Soon took up running. Racing awkwardly when passed over 1200 M out. Just behind leaders turning in. Faded inside final 200 M.
Towards rear. Commenced move round home bend. Ran on down centre of straight to do best work at finish.
Never better than midfield. One-paced.
Began awkwardly, near rear throughout. (Bled.)
Slightly slowly away, soon picked up gradually on inside to be 4th 400 M. Kept on but found no extra 250 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Recovered ground gradually to be behind midfield 600 M. Ran on a bit inside 200 M.
Midfield or slightly behind. Ran on steadily 200 M out to gain 3rd close home. Hung out.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered ground to midfield course proper. Ran on well inside 200 M to just miss narrowly.
Made all. Just held off runner-up's challenges closing stages.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground final 150 M.
In touch to 200 M. Dropped back steadily.
In touch to 250 M. Weakened.
Near rear. Made up good ground on outside final 250 M, never nearer.
Prominent. Weakened from 3rd at 200 M.
Never a factor.
Prominent on inside. Came to tackle the winner when under pressure 300 M. Lost a minor placing when one-paced closing stages.
Led till overhauled by fast-finishing winner over 100 M out.
Mainly in midfield, with moderate improvement closing stages.
Close up. Weakened badly over 200 M out.
Always prominent. Unable to quicken to threaten closing stages.
Never better than midfield. Weakened close home.
Prominent early. Dropped back to midfield onto course proper. Just kept on same pace under pressure to the line.
Well there to 200 M. Weakened under pressure.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Prominent. Drifted out passing 400 M. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses closing stages.
Behind midfield early. Faded halfway out.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened well to assert authority over 100 M out. Won convincingly.
Prominent to 200 M. Faded steadily.
Towards rear throughout.

Disputed lead in the early stages and eased to race 1L off leader after the 1300 M. Pushed along to maintain position after the 1000 M and commenced to give ground rounding home bend. Tailed out in straight.

Broke fairly from wide draw and soon settled in a rearward position around 2-wide. Shifted out on straightening to obtain clear running and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Broke best and niggled along to take lead on rail from 1300 M with around 1L advantage to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.
Ridden along in the early stages to race in midfield 2-wide. Pushed along and made steady headway rounding the home turn. Kept on well in straight but was overhauled by 3rd placegetter on the line.

Jumped well and soon settled in worse than midfield 2-wide. From the 1000 M made up steady ground to be 4Ls off leader on straightening. Ran on fairly whilst hanging out when asked 350 M out to be closest at finish.
Broke fairly from wide gate and steadily settled in midfield 3-wide with cover. Ridden along at home turn and made little headway. Under pressure 350 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.

Jumped fairly and raced in midfield 3-wide in the early stages. Went forward to race around 1L off leader down back straight. Ran on well when asked 350 M out but unable to find an extra gear to overhaul the winner.

Jumped fairly and soon raced in midfield or worse on rail. Pushed along and made little headway at home turn. All out 350 M out and made up steady ground inside the final 200 M to miss the placing by a short margin.
Slowly away and raced in the rear section through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and kept on fairly without threatening.
Began fairly and soon raced in a forward position 2-wide through to straight. Fought on gamely in straight to grab 3rd near the post.

Soon eased to worse than midfield on rail, near the 1200 M was checked to avoid heels and dropped to the rear section. On straightening steadied to avoid heels, closed the race off well but ran out of room in the closing stages.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and raced towards the rear out wide without cover. Made little headway from the outside at home bend but found nothing in straight and steadily dropped out.

Broke well from widest and hard ridden to race in midfield out wide. Went forward down back straight to be 1-1/2Ls off pace 3-wide. Plugged on fairly in straight but slightly weakened inside final 100 M.

Hard ridden in the early stages to race in better than midfield on rail. Unable to maintain position down back straight to be in worse than midfield on straightening. Ran on fairly in straight but one-paced inside final 150 M.
3-wide and 3Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield at 400 M, one-paced.
Awkwardly away, 5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 11th at 1200 M, same when steadied entering straight, never had that much running room, nearest at the finish.
Switched from widest gate to be 2-wide and 9Ls off pace in 13th at 1200 M, 7Ls last on straightening, no impression.
4-wide without cover when 5Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, edged closer out deep from 800 M to be 4-wide and 2Ls down in 4th at 400 M, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, stayed on well.
Caught 3-wide without cover when 2Ls down in 3rd at 1200 M, 1L 2nd and 2-wide from 800 M to home straight, same position when all out at 200 M, lost a place final strides.
On fence 3Ls off speed in 5th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield on straightening, beaten over 200 M out.
Had the run of the race on fence in 2nd or 3rd 2Ls off pace from 1200 M to home straight, failed to kick and didn't really threaten despite the good trip.
9Ls last at 1200 M on fence, 7Ls down in 13th on the swing, made good headway until being short of room at 50 M, never nearer when checked right on the line.
Led at 1400 M, clear by 1L on fence at 1100 M, never clear by more than 1L through to home straight, kept on gamely to score.
Had cover when 3-wide 5Ls off the speed in 10th at 1200 M, same margin behind when 4-wide into home straight, made a little late ground without being dangerous.
Awkwardly away, raced keenly and greenly in places, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, still prominent on straightening, soon weakened.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 12th at 1200 M, 3-wide into straight when 5Ls down in 12th, ran on strongly to claim 2nd final strides.
4Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, steadied at 800 M, same distance off lead on straightening, ran on fairly, narrowly missed a place.
3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 7th at 1200 M, same off final bend, one-paced to line.
Dropped to the back shortly after start. Remained at the rear and was 7Ls down on straightening. Ran on and made up a bit of ground in the straight.
Jumped fairly and was allowed to drift back to rear section. Trailed field 700 M onwards whilst hanging in. Only managed to work past a beaten runner.
Sluggish start and then was ridden along to make up ground. Travelled near midfield but failed to respond 600 M out and had nothing left in the straight.
Soon raced on fence in a prominent position. 2Ls behind the leaders at 400 M and quickened well once gotten into the clear 300 M out. Assumed the lead 200 M out and cruised to the line.
No more than a length off the pace early stages. Struggled to stay on 500 M out and tired shortly after straightening.

Best out from wide draw. Failed to cross to the lead and ended up settling 4-wide better than midfield. Continued to be wide making the turn and was 3Ls down on straightening. Kept on well in the straight.
Sluggish start from widest draw. Remained wide in rear section until the turn. Widest turning in and stayed on one-paced in the straight.
Pressed forward to lead. Held a slim advantage on straightening and continued to vie for the lead until fading final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and raced 3-wide at midfield. Lack a response when pressured at home turn and weakened in the straight.
Raced 3-wide in a forward position. A length off the lead on straightening. Stayed on well closing stages and just lost 2nd place at the line.
Travelled wide behind midfield early stages and shifted across to the fence after 800 M. 5Ls down at 400 M and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Ridden early stages to travel alongside leader at 800 M. Continued to stalk leader into home straight and had the lead briefly at 200 M. Unable to hold off other rivals closing stages.
In mid-division when 4Ls off pace on fence at 1200 M, closer on straightening and switched off fence to challenge 350 M out, always outpaced.
On fence 9Ls off the speed in 11th at 1000 M, 6Ls down and one from rear off final bend, never dangerous.
Bounded at start, 12Ls last at 1200 M, 5Ls behind in 12th when 4-wide into home straight, posed little danger.
9Ls off pace in 11th at 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 3Ls off pace in midfield, kept on fairly without threatening.
Over-raced in places with head carried high, 3Ls behind in 4th at 1200 M when 2-wide, closer turning for home, one-paced from then on.
Couldn't lead, 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd until 600 M, swamped at top of home straight and soon beaten.
3-wide without cover when 3Ls behind in 5th at 1200 M, gained cover at 1000 M, pressed on steadily to lead out 3-wide at top of home straight, always maintained a 1L advantage from 300 M.
Always wide and without cover, 4-wide in 6th when 5Ls behind at 1200 M, pressed on to be 1L down in 3rd off final bend, briefly threatened before fading inside final 200 M.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, 3Ls down and worse than midfield on the swing, ran on steadily to be nearest at the finish.
Always a fair way behind, 9Ls down in 10th at 1200 M, detached and 8Ls at 1200 M, no danger.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, went half a length 2nd at top of home straight, 2Ls down and tiring at 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
5Ls off pace in 8th when 3-wide with cover at 1200 M, 2Ls down in about 5th at the 400 M, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, always held by winner but hung on well for 2nd.
Soon led, always about 2Ls clear until 600 M out, headed at top of home straight, dropped out rapidly.
5Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, checked at 800 M, 3Ls down and bunched in midfield off home turn, checked at 350 M, soon faded out.
Took slender lead to straight where he failed to hold advantage 250 M. Found no extra.
In rear throughout.
Settled behind midfield to straight where he ran on strongly to take command near finish.
About midfield turning for home. Unable to improve when coming under pressure.
Never far off to straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Was prominent before losing ground approaching 250 M.
Jumped awkwardly, losing ground at start. Towards rear of closely bunched field into straight where he made up some ground.
Always prominent. Took lead 250 M but found winner too strong close home.
In touch to straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
About 5th early in straight. Kept on without threatening first 2.
Among rear group turning for home. Kept on closing stages.
5th or 6th halfway. Made no show on straightening.
Never a factor, staying on a bit final 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Tracked leader. Soon hit front after straightening. No extra when swamped inside 200 M.
Settled in rear of midfield. Baulked for a run for most of straight. Kept on same pace to the line.
Always in last few. Kept on one pace to the line.
Broke well and raced freely in the lead. Overhauled shortly after straightening.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground between runners in straight to be nearest at finish.
Wide in midfield. Weakened inside final 200 M.
Never far off. Came to challenge under pressure turning in. Sustained effort to take charge about 100 M out.
Always prominent. Shared 3rd position into straight. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Last to 200 M. Finished off race very well.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well inside final 200 M to do best work at finish.
Well back into straight. Ran on down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Close up. No clear run on inside early in straight. Sustained progress late inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield or behind. Found no room in straight.
Lost a few lengths at start. Trailed the field to straight. Improving when baulked for a run final 200 M.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily closing stages.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Restrained some 3Ls behind pacemaker. Held some chance briefly upon straightening before dropped away quickly.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield. Ran on steadily without quickening.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well in straight to take charge close to home. Won cleverly.
Towards rear. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back to straight. Made up some late ground final 200 M.
Settled in rear. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in prominent position. Quickened to hold 2Ls break shortly after straightening. Unable to sustain effort and swamped close to home.
Soon took up running, going some 3Ls clear around home bend. Soon dropped out after straightening. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Towards rear early. Quickly rushed up to prominent position before home bend. Soon dropped out in straight.
Prominent to straight. Weakened gradually.
Settled in rear. Circled field rounding home bend. With leaders and 5-wide into straight. Held every chance. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well back. Made up good ground down straight.
Forward of midfield in bunched field. One-paced in straight.
Rear into straight. No clear run early on. Finished off race very well.
Well there. Brief lead into straight. Dropped out quickly.
Always well there. Quickened to hold 0.5L advantage upon straightening. Unable to sustain effort and caught close home.
Settled at the back. Tight behind runners early in straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Not much room early in straight before faded.
Settled in midfield. Shifted out for a clear run turning in. Ran on well to snatch victory short of line.
Well there to straight. Kept on before finding no extra final 200 M.
Midfield. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Wide behind midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Held slender lead under restrain far side before hampered 1000 M out. Recovered to be joint leaders turning in but soon weakened.
Settled in rear of midfield. No room early in straight. No further impression closing stages.
Pushed along to race in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to find an extra gear when asked 350 M out and only able to keep on same pace to the line.

Began well from wide draw and niggled along to race in midfield 2 wide. Switched out on straightening, ran on quite well inside final 200 M but was short of room near the line and just missed 3rd place.
Slowly away and niggled along to race in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but unable to quicken and only ran on evenly to the line.
Bounded in the air at the start and lost ground. Soon recovered to race in worse than midfield on rail. Took a while to find clear running in straight. Closed the race off fairly inside final 200 M.

Began fairly and soon raced in better than midfield 3 wide without cover. Niggled along at home turn and went forward to join leaders. Kept on same pace when asked 350 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Raced keenly in midfield out wide no cover. Around the 1500 M was allowed to stride forward to take lead on rail from 1200 M. Kept on fairly in straight but was headed near the 200 M and became one-pace thereafter.
Tardy start from widest and steadily settled in a rearward position closer to the rail. Shifted out on straightening to obtain clear running but was unable to show any impression in straight.
Raced towards the rear 2 to 3 wide. Ridden along at home turn and made little headway from the outside. No extra in straight and dropped out.
Niggled along to race in midfield 3 wide with cover. Crept closer to the leader rounding the home turn. All out 300 M out and found the line well and fended off late challenge from 2nd placegetter.
Began fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to the tail on rail to straight. Unable to show any running in the straight.
Soon raced in a forward position 2 wide through to straight. Found nothing when asked 350 M out and steadily dropped out inside final 250 M.

Broke well from wide draw and steadily settled in midfield or worse 3 wide with cover. Shifted out on straightening to obtain clear running, made up good ground inside final 250 M and just missed out in a ding-dong finish with winner.
From the wide draw soon found the rail running in midfield to straight. Responded quite well when asked 400 M out and didn't see clear daylight in early part of straight to be closest at finish.

Jumped well and pushed along to take lead on rail. Shortly after the 1400 M was headed and raced around 2Ls off pace to straight. Under pressure 400 M and kept on well to hold onto 3rd by a narrow margin.
Disputed lead out 4-wide without cover early, 2-wide when 1L off speed in 2nd at 700 M, pressed on to lead at 300 M, headed about 200 M out but rallied gamely to lead final 50 M, kept on.
Slowest away with head up, on fence 5Ls off the speed in 9th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in about 10th on straightening, finished off well, never nearer.
5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 11th at 1000 M, about 5Ls behind rear off home turn when 3-wide, finished tamely.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, 4-wide into home striaght when 4-wide and 3Ls down in midfield, one-paced thereafter.
On fence 7Ls off speed in rear at 1000 M, steadied twice when about 4Ls behind in 11th off final bend, making some headway when checked at 100 M, ran on again but much too late.
Disputed lead out 2-wide at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th at 800 M, struggling to lie up off home turn, soon well beaten.
Disputed lead on fence at 1000 M, had box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th or so from 700 M to home turn, could only plug on at same pace.
Over-raced early, 2Ls off speed in 6th when 3-wide with cover at 1000 M, niggled along at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when 1L down in 3rd, failed to kick and beaten over 200 M out.
3Ls off pace when 2-wide in 7th at 900 M, 3Ls behind in 6th at top of home straight, half a length down with every chance at 200 M, kept on well but couldn't poke his head in front.
No speed early, one from rear and 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, 5Ls behind in 13th when 4-wide entering home straight, no impression.
Never any better than midfield, on fence 4Ls off speed in 8th at 900 M, 3Ls down on inner in midfield off home turn, always held by principals.
5-wide without cover for most of backstretch, 2Ls off pace in 5th at 900 M, 4-wide without cover at 600 M, 4-wide into home straight, led 200 M out, headed at 50 M, no extra.
Had cover when 3-wide and 5Ls off speed in 10th at 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) entering home straight, 2Ls down in midfield down centre of track at 200 M, faded close home.
Disputed lead out 3-wide (had cover) at 1000 M, led on fence by 1L at 700 M, headed over 300 M out, weakened inside final 200 M.
Dropped back to rear section shortly after start. 8Ls down at 400 M and made a nice late rally to grab a minor placing.

Led shortly after start. Took a sit behind the leader first turn. Remained 2 to 3Ls behind the lead and 6Ls ahead of others in 2nd place backstraight. Stayed in contention but unable to find extra inside final 200 M.
Soon raced in rear section. Shifted to be 4-wide before straightening for its run. Quickened well in the straight but failed to find extra to get closer to winner inside final 200 M.

Midfield early stages. Settled in 4th place 8Ls behind the pace at 1400 M. Gradually closed-in onto the leader home turn and was 4Ls down 400 M. Moved into the lead without being pressured and drew clear final 100 M.
Began fairly and strode forward to take the lead first turn. Opened up a big lead in the middle stages. Advantage diminished gradually rounding home turn and kept on before being swamped final 200 M.
Travelled along the rails at midfield. Little response when asked on straightening and was one-paced in the straight.
Settled 2-wide and just behind midfield for majority of the race. 5Ls down at 400 M and kept on without threatening closing stages.
Raced 3-wide and without cover until straightening. Failed to quicken in the straight and weakened.

Among leaders early. Settled 8Ls behind the pacesetter in 3rd place 1200 M out. Closed in gradually rounding home turn to be within 3Ls 400 M. Led briefly 200 M out but unable to hold off principals closing stages.
Soon trailed field. Remained racing in last place heading into home straight. Only ran past a few beaten runners.
On fence 4Ls off the pace in 5th at the 1200 M, tended to hang out on the circle, 4-wide and 5Ls off pace in 5th when hampered off final bend. (Finished 5th, placed 4th.)
Settled about 10Ls off pace in 13th at 1200 M, 9Ls behind in rear when 3-wide into home straight, ran on well, never nearer.
On fence 9Ls off the speed in 12th at 1200 M, 8Ls behind off home turn, didn't trouble leaders.
Soon led on fence, raced too freely early on, never clear by more than 1L until the home straight, headed 250 M out, soon faded.
On fence 5Ls off pace in mid-division at 1200 M, about 4Ls off pace in 4th when shifting out at 400 M, ran on fairly well late. (Finished 4th, placed 6th.)
3-wide without cover and keen early on when 1L off pace in 3rd, sent on to be 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide at 800 M and same into home straight, led over 200 M out, ran on well.
2-wide and half a length off pace in 12th at 1200 M, box-seat run on fence at 800 M in 3rd, 4Ls down in 3rd and losing touch off home turn, faded.
5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 6th at 1200 M and same at 400 M when severely hampered, checked again when 5Ls behind at 200 M, still finished off well in 6th, placed 5th.
6Ls or 7Ls off pace when 3-wide mostly with cover in 9th or 10th down backstretch, 4-wide into home straight when 7Ls off pace, made some moderate late headway.
6Ls behind the speed in 8th when 2-wide at 1200 M, 3-wide and under pressure entering straight when 7Ls down, very one-paced.
Slowest away, 12Ls last at 1200 M, 9Ls down off home turn in 13th, no impression.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 9th place at 1200 M, 6Ls down in midfield off home turn, ran on fairly well and just hung on for a place.
Held up 8Ls off pace when 2-wide in 11th at 1200 M, same margin behind when 4-wide into home straight, ran on very strongly late to take 2nd place close home.
Over-raced early on when prominent 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, all out when 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls down in midfield, dropped away quickly.
Half a length off pace in 2nd when 2-wide at 1200 M, raced freely in places, a neck 2nd at the home turn when travelling well, found nothing off the bridle from 350 M out, faded.
Had cover when 3-wide in 9th at the 600 M at 1200 M, 3-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in midfield, just over 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra.
On fence 3Ls off the pace in 6th at 1200 M, 2-wide at 1000 M, 1L down in 3rd when 3-wide off home turn, led 300 M out, just hung on at the winning line.
Raced freely early on when half a length clear on the fence, held neck margin turning for home, soon under pressure and dropped out tamely.
On fence 9Ls off pace in 13th at 1200 M, improved to 4Ls off pace in 10th off home turn, stayed on strongly on fence, nearest at finish and lost 3rd right on the line.
Had the run of the race in 3rd 2Ls off pace from 1200 M to 600 M when niggled along to stay in touch, folded tamely from top of home straight.
Detached in rear 11Ls off pace at 1200 M, 8Ls last off home turn, made some minor late ground.
2-wide when 6Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 9th at top of home straight, switched into clear running room at 300 M, couldn't catch principals. (See Racing Incidents.)
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, 3-wide without cover at 1000 M, under pressure to lie up turning for home, soon faded out.
3-wide without cover when 3Ls off speed in 5th at 1200 M, wider and hung in at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in midfield, one-paced thereafter.
8Ls off pace in 12th at 1200 M when 2-wide, under pressure when 3-wide into home straight and 6Ls off pace in 12th, never really threatened.
2-wide when 4Ls off pace in midfield at 1200 M, 3Ls down at the 400 M, ran on fairly but always held.
On fence 8Ls off pace n 11th at 1200 M, niggled along at 600 M when 6Ls down in 12th, ran on very strongly down centre of track to nick third on the line.
A little keen early on, on fence 5Ls off pace at 1200 M in mid-division, improved to be 2Ls down in 6th off home turn, held up at 350 M, ran on strongly once clear, just failed.
Midfield into straight. Kept on till finding only one-paced close home.
Soon in last and remained there to straight. Stayed on to be nearest at the finish.
Never on terms.
Ridden to lead soon after start. Was headed 200 M and dropped out of contention.
Was prominent and held every chance 250 M. Soon beaten.
Well there into straight where he faded quickly final 250 M.
Never a factor though improving a bit in straight.
Was 5th approaching home turn before moving up to lead 200 M. Unable to resist winner near finish.
Never far away to straight. Ridden 300 M to challenge inside final 200 M. Led towards finish.
Well there before steadily losing ground from home bend.
Midfield rounding home bend. Ran on well to take 3rd close home.
Towards rear before making up some ground closing stages.
Among rear group into straight where he was baulked 300 M. Kept on till finding no extra near finish.
Soon prominent. Within 1-1/2Ls 2nd far side. Ran on well in straight to take control 100 M out. Won readily.
In touch early on inside. Gave ground to behind midfield far side. Kept on to make up some ground in straight.
Jumped well and led briefly. Raced in prominent position until giving ground steadily from final turn.
Never better than midfield.
Began awkwardly, near rear. Soon recovered ground to be in midfield or better. 2Ls 4th on outside rounding home bend. Found no extra closing stages. (Blood in trachea.)
Took lead from 1000 M. Held on well until headed 100 M out.
Began awkwardly, near rear and raced greenly throughout.
Slowly away, remained at rear. Recovered good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there and led briefly early stages. Gave steady ground far side to be 6th rounding home bend. Faded 200 M out. (Lame.)
Tardy start, never able to feature.
Prominent early, settled just better than midfield. Responded well from 5th final turn to obtain 2nd while under pressure closing stages.
Made no show.
Midfield, racing freely to Rock. Did not find much room in straight. Kept on steadily to the line.
Mainly towards rear. Made some moderate headway under pressure in straight.
Broke well. Tracked leader. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening. Drew level with leader momentarily before outsprinted by first few final strides.
Never seen with a chance.
Never a factor.
Attempted to make all. Swamped final few strides.
Always prominent. Tightened close to home.
Towards rear. Took closer order around home bend. One-paced without quickening in straight. (Lame.)
Settled in midfield. Quickened to challenge upon straightening holding every chance but narrowly outsprinted.
Prominent to straight. One-paced under pressure.
Well back to straight. Made up some ground late. Did best work at finish.
Settled in midfield. Switched out for a run early in straight. Ran on well to snatch victory short of line.
Tardy start, soon recovered ground to midfield. Dropped back steadily 600 M out.
Sat outside leader before taking over 500 M out. Headed 100 M out. Kept on but lost a minor placing near finish.
Made no show.
Around midfield to home bend. Soon weakened.
Towards rear. Crept closer order to 6th final turn. Kept on without quickening. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Within 3Ls in 4th until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Never a factor.
Last to 100 M out. Remained near rear until running on well in straight.
Better than midfield. Mainly 3Ls 5th to final turn. Ran on solidly to take command 100 M out.
Took lead to 500 M out. Kept on under pressure final 200 M for 2nd.
Towards rear. Recovered good ground on outside to just miss 2nd.
Held 3rd to 200 M. Failed to quicken.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Broke well. Contested lead early. Settled in midfield. Carried wide turning in. Made no impression in straight.
Well back. Made up good ground down straight.
Midfield. Snuck up on inner in home straight hitting front inside 200 M only to be caught in the shadow of the post.
Settled towards rear from poor draw. Made no progress in straight.
Sluggish at start. Soon in midfield. Hampered and forced to move wide 400 M out. One-paced in straight.
Behind midfield early. Took closer order home bend. One-paced from midfield into straight.
Quickly into lead. Passed rounding home bend. Folded up quickly in straight.
Settled in first few. Came to challenge shortly after straightening. Fought on doggedly to gain upper hand short of line.
Waited with. Made up good ground down straight to claim 3rd final strides.
Restrained to dispute the lead. Let go rounding home bend and gained 1/2L advantage turning in. Swamped close to home.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Prominent on 2-wide with cover. Switched out on straightening to obtain running but failed to quicken and dropped out inside final 200 M. (Significant amount of blood and mucus.)

Broke fairly and ridden along to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Responded well when asked 300 M out to overhaul 3rd placegetter near the line but was never in position to trouble the winner.

Broke fairly from widest and soon settled in worse than midfield 3-wide without cover. Switched to the widest on straightening but unable to quicken and only able to run past couple of beaten runners.
From a difficult draw was steadily eased to the rear on rail through to straight. Unable to show any running when asked 250 M out and only ran past couple of weakening runners.
Jumped well and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2-wide. Shifted out on straightening and ran on quite well but was unable to match speed with the 1st pair in the closing stages.
Began well and soon raced in midfield 2-wide. Switched to the outside on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 300 M out and responded well to take charge inside final 150 M.
Jumped awkwardly and pushed along to race in worse than midfield 2-wide through to straight. All out 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Niggled along to take up running on rail with around 1/2L advantage through to straight. Only ran on evenly when asked 300 M out, headed shortly after 200 M and steadily gave ground thereafter.
On jumping was crowded for room and dropped to the rear section 2 to 3-wide with cover. Under pressure 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began fairly and niggled along to race 1/2L off leader whilst proving very difficult to settle in the early to middle stages. Gave ground quickly in the straight.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in a handy position on rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out but unable to quicken and only ran on evenly to the line.
On jumping bounded in the air and soon recovered to race in better than midfield on rail to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 300 M out but became one-paced inside final 150 M.
Led by half a length on fence at 600 M, 1L clear on straightening and lengthened well to score convincingly.
Had a nice run on the fence about 2Ls off pace in 4th or so through to home straight when brushing rail, fairly tame finish.
Didn't lead, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in midfield at 600 M, failed to kick.
Never a factor, detached in rear with head up entering straight, weak effort.
Worse than midfield towards inner when steadied at 600 M, 5Ls down in 9th on straightening, ran on well but never troubled leaders.
4-wide without cover when 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, under pressure when 4-wide into home straight when over 1L down in 3rd, found nothing.
Had cover when 4-wide in midfield down backstretch, 4-wide into home straight when about 4Ls down in 6th, one-paced thereafter.
Always prominent, 1L down out 2-wide entering straight, all out when over 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra.
Prominent on fence early on, crowded at 600 M, 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, posed little threat.
Crowded at 800 M and lost place on fence, 5Ls off the speed in 10th place when 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight no danger.
Slowest away, one from rear and 6Ls off pace off final bend, made a little late ground.
3-wide and 3Ls off pace in 8th at 700 M, about 2Ls down in 5th in 2-wide position off home turn, stayed on well but never likely to catch winner.

Began fairly from wide draw. Eased and slotted across to the rails at midfield 1300 M out. Remained at midfield in back straight and angled out on straightening for its run. Quickened well and drew clear final 100 M.
Settled on fence 2Ls behind the leader. Remained in a prominent position going into home turn. Quickened and challenged for the lead inside 200 M but unable to keep up with winner closing stages.
Pressed forward from widest draw but caught wide first turn. Remained 3-wide and within 2Ls of leader back straight and home turn. Weakened after entering home straight.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. 4Ls behind the leader at 400 M and kept on evenly to line.
Took the lead 1300 M and continued to hold a length's advantage going into home straight. Headed inside final 200 M and hung on for a minor placing.

Behind leaders early stages. Lost ground after being bumped at 1300 M and raced 3-wide behind midfield in back straight. Swung wide on straightening and produced a strong rally to be closest at finish.
Dropped back to race at the rear. Trailed field into home straight with 7Ls to make up. Ran on strongly in the straight and made a nice rally.
Ridden early and raced 3-wide in a forward position first turn. Drifted back to midfield after 1100 M but remained 3-wide in back straight. Widest turning for home and kept on well in home straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Dropped back to race at the rear until home straight and closed the race off fairly.
Settled 2-wide in rear section until home straight. Quickened and closed the race off strongly.
Began well and led briefly. 2-wide and kept within a length of the leader from 1200 M until home straight. Kept on until weakening final 200 M.

Caught 4-wide at midfield first turn. Eased back to race behind midfield 1200 M and found the rail 1000 M. Kept racing behind midfield before making ground home turn. Ran into traffic near 200 M and kept same pace thereafter.
6Ls off pace when 2-wide at 1100 M, left 3-wide without cover at 600 M, 4-wide into home straight when about 4Ls down in 8th, faded.
On fence 5Ls off pace in mid-division at 1100 M, checked at 600 M and 4Ls down in 2-wide spot off home straight, no chance with winner but ran on best of the rest.
Always towards rear, 8Ls behind in 9th when 2-wide at 1000 M, never dangerous.
Disputed early lead on fence but left 2Ls down in 2nd on fence at 1100 M, head up at 800 M, 2Ls down in 2nd off home turn and all out in same position at 200 M, weakened.
5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 6th at the 1100 M, 3Ls down in 6th but forced 5-wide on straightening, failed to pick up.
Checked at start and left 10Ls last at 1000 M, 6-wide (widest of all) into straight when 6Ls last, made some late ground past beaten rivals.
3Ls off pace on fence in 3rd at 1100 M, closer in 4th when 4-wide into home straight, soon beaten.
Jumped sharply left, on fence 4Ls off the speed in 5th at 1100 M, over 2Ls down in 5th off home turn when 3-wide, a bit too one-paced in the finish.
Pressed on to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1100 M, headed at 700 M and struggling to lie up when 1L down in 2nd on straightening, gone 200 M out and eased down.
Hindered at the jump, 8Ls off pace one from rear at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 9th off home turn, ran on quite well for a place.
4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 4th at 1100 M, left 3-wide without cover at 900 M and pressed on to lead by 1L on fence at 600 M and off home turn, kicked clear in stretch, enterprising ride.
Towards rear early, soon moved up to be midfield or slightly better. Kept on same pace in straight.
Pushed along early to be prominent. 2Ls 3rd or 4th rounding home bend. Weakened 200 M out.
Rear from widest draw. Recovered good ground on outside final 450 M.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit inside 200 M.
