Better than midfield. Switched to 4-wide on straightening. Responded well to take command 100 M. Won readily.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Soon prominent. 2Ls 3rd or 4th rounding home bend. Found no extra final 250 M.
Ridden along to be prominent. In the leading pair 1100 M. Gained 1L advantage passing 800 M. Weakened steadily when headed early straight.
Prominent, in the leading pair passing 1100 M. Was 2nd and within 1L behind leader 700 M out. Re-gained advantage early straight. Kept on well but failed to match speed with winner inside 100 M.
Towards rear. Faded in straight.
Towards rear. Made some minor progress closing stages.
Led early stages, soon dropped back to better than midfield. Weakened from 5th final 350 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Crept a bit closer on inside final turn. Weakened 250 M out.
Midfield early, soon gave a little ground to behind midfield. Slightly crowded for room when 9th at 500 M. Made up some ground when clear inside 300 M.
Wide towards rear into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Prominent to straight. Weakened noticeably.
Midfield into straight. No extra. (Bled.)
Close up and 3-wide most of way. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Settled at the back. Ran on past beaten runners in straight.
Well there. Lost touch upon straightening.
Made all. Drew clear upon straightening to win confidently.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Settled in midfield. Baulked for a run shortly after straightening. Finished off race well.
Always prominent. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Midfield most of way. Kept on steadily to the line.
Chased leader. Failed to quicken to threaten in straight.
Well back into straight. Kept on same pace.
Settled towards rear. Never nearer.
Never far off. Cruised to the front 200 M. Won easily.
Well there to 200 M out. Weakened.
Never in contention.
Slightly better than midfield. One-paced.
Better than midfield. Gained 3rd briefly passing 200 M. One-paced closing stages.
In touch on the stand's rail but was hanging in. Saddle shifted back at 500 M. Failed to quicken.
Towards rear. Steadied 400 M. Ran on very well 200 M out, doing best work closing stages.
Around midfield until finding no extra closing stages.
Midfield. Kept on steadily 250 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Kept on under pressure final 200 M.
In touch early, dropped back steadily to midfield halfway. Made no show.
Always there. Took advantage on inside rail 350 M. Was headed 200 M. Unable to match speed with the quinella pair closing stages.
Never able to feature.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily 300 M out.
Quickly took up running and attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort and overhauled over 100 M out.
Began awkwardly, settling in last few. Made moderate progress between runners to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in midfield to straight. No extra.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to 200 M. Faded.
Raced 3-wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Ridden for speed early, settling in 3rd just off the pace. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening. Gained upper hand over 100 M out.
Settled wide in midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening under pressure in straight.
Never better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Midfield most of way. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Prominent in 4th. Produced some late impression final 200 M to reach 2nd late.
Last into straight. Always in last few.
Well back. No clear run early in straight. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Jumped with field from wide draw and settled in better than midfield 3 wide without cover to straight. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and steadily dropped out inside final 250 M.
Broke fairly and steadily settled in midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but only able to run on evenly and ran past couple of beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Broke well from wide draw but was outpaced to race in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Jumped with field and soon settled towards rear on rail. Switched away from the rail at home bend to find running but was held up in early straight. All out 300 M out and ran on strongly to miss the 1st pair by a short margin.
Broke fairly and soon eased to the rear section 3 wide. Shifted out on straightening to obtain clear running. Unable to make any impression in straight. (Significant amount of mucus.)
Jumped awkwardly and raced at back on rail through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.

Began well from wide draw and ridden along to take up running on rail with around 1L advantage to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but was headed near the 200 M and steadily weakened inside final 150 M.

Slow to begin from wide draw and raced towards the rear 2 wide. Switched to the outside on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 400 M out and made up good ground inside final 200 M to lose out in a ding-dong finish.

Slowly away and raced in the rear section 2 wide. Switched out on straightening but had difficulties obtaining clear running in early part of straight. All out 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M.
From the widest gate soon settled in midfield 3 wide with cover to straight. Unable to show much impression when asked 400 M out.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race 1L off pace 2 wide through to straight. Only kept on one pace when asked 350 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Jumped fairly and raced in midfield or better on rail. Near the 1400 M whilst racing keenly was checked away from heels. Shifted out on straightening to obtain running and ran on fairly in straight without threatening. (Bled.)
Raced in better than midfield 2 wide whilst proving difficult to settle in the early stages. Commenced to give ground near the 500 M and tailed out in straight. (Lost right front plate.)

Began fairly and ridden along to be box-seated behind the leader. Switched away from the rail on straightening to make its run, responded well to take charge after the 200 M and fended off late challenge from 2nd placegetter.
Towards rear early on, niggled along when about 8Ls off pace at 700 M and further behind when one from rear off home turn, ran on at same pace, nearest at finish.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield until 600 M when under pressure to lie up, faded out from top of home straight.
Caught 5-wide without cover until 1000 M, 9Ls last at 800 M and same when 3-wide into home straight, made some late ground but never likely to take a hand in the finish.
Nicely placed on fence 3Ls off pace at 1100 M in 4th, much the same into homestretch, failed to kick.
2-wide and about 2Ls or 3Ls off speed in 3rd from backstretch to homestretch, could only plug on at the one pace.
Keen in places, 2-wide in midfield about 5Ls off pace in midfield through to home straight, no danger.
Worse than midfield when 3-wide with cover about 7Ls off pace through to home straight, faded out.
Crossed from wide gate to lead by 1L on fence at 1100 M, 2Ls clear at 600 M, still 1L up at 200 M and no extra when grabbed 50 M out, lost 2nd final strides.
Over-raced when 4-wide without cover in midfield and 3Ls off pace at 1200 M, under pressure entering straight when 3Ls down in 5th, lacked acceleration.
Very awkwardly away losing about 3Ls at start, towards rear about 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, 7Ls down off home turn when 2-wide, finished off very strongly but post came too soon.
Crowded and checked at the start, about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace in 8th or 9th through to home turn, never troubled principals.
3-wide but with cover when about 5Ls off the speed in midfield through to home straight when under pressure, outpaced.
No worse than 2Ls off pace in 2nd through to home straight when travelling sweetly, driven to lead 50 M out, just hung on.
Crowded and checked at the start, 8Ls off pace in 13th at 800 M, never got much closer.
Settled at midfield. Put under pressure at midway point and gradually picked up. Swept past rivals in full throttle final 200 M.
Travelled at midfield. Lacked the needed acceleration when asked 500 M out and was one-paced to line.
Jumped well and raced among leaders. Dropped out quickly inside 400 M.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at the rear. Quickened well at 500 M and closed the race off well.
Out wide in a forward position. Faded gradually after midway point.
Settled behind midfild early stages. Ran on a bit when pressured after 500 M but unable to draw closer closing stages.
Jumped well and raced in a disputed lead. Kept on well at 400 M but fell out of contention inside final 200 M.
Settled quietly in rear section before being put under pressure at halfway point. Kept on well in the closing stages and made up some ground.
Raced in a disputed lead into final 400 M. Quickened well, took the lead near 200 M but could not hold off winner final 50 M.
Raced at midfield. Kept on same pace over the concluding stages.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd through to home turn, outpaced when bumped at the 200 M, faded.
Very awkwardly away jumping left, switched to fence from widest gate, 8Ls off pace in 12th at 1100 M, 5Ls down off home turn, never got much closer.
2-wide and 7Ls off the speed in 11th at 1100 M, still towards rear when 5Ls down off home turn, shifted left into clear running at 350 M, ran on strongly.
Slowly away, niggled slightly when detached about 10Ls last at 1100 M, 7Ls last on straightening, made some late ground, never nearer.
Soon led, clear by half a length on fence at 1200 M, same off home turn, headed over 200 M out, beaten when bumped 150 M out.
Had cover when 3-wide and 7Ls behind in 10th at 1100 M, 4Ls off pace in 8th when 3-wide on straightening, over 1L down in 5th at 200 M, finished off strongly, failed narrowly.
Always 3-wide without cover, 3Ls down in 5th at 1200 M, 1L down in 3rd and travelling well on straightening, a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, lost out on a place in final strides.
Had cover when 3-wide and 5Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, 3-wide when 2Ls down in 6th off home turn, picked up well to lead at 200 M, kept on gamely to just hang on.
Covered up 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield at top of home straight, lacked any pick-up and beaten 300 M out, eased close home. (Lame.)
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, closer but held in a pocket from top of home straight to 200 M when switched inside for a run, finished off well on fence.
On fence 6Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 8th off home turn, 1L down in 5th at 200 M, finished strongly but could not get to the front.
About half a length off the pace out 2-wide from 1200 M to home straight, checked when swamped 200 M out, faded out.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, under 3Ls down in 7th entering straight, same when steadied at 200 M, one-paced through closing stages.
Settled one from rear 8Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 13th off home turn, stayed on only fairly and no danger.
6Ls off pace out 2-wide in 7th at 1200 M, 5Ls off pace and 3-wide still in midfield on straightening, made some steady late headway.
Made all, led by 1L on fence at 1800 M, never clear by more than 2Ls until home straight, 1L clear at 200 M, all out to just hang on.
Awkwardly away, 8Ls off the speed in 10th at 1200 M, 6Ls behind at top of home straight, finished off very strongly on the inner, only just failed.
Had the run of the race about 2Ls off pace on fence in 3rd through to 600 M, under pressure to keep up turning for home, one-paced thereafter.
Awkwardly away with head up, on fence 10Ls off pace at 1200 M in rear group, 8Ls down in 12th off final bend, ran on without threatening.
Pressed on 3-wide without cover early to get in 2-wide 1L off pace at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd and with every chance at 400 M and 200 M, couldn't follow through.
2-wide and 9Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, 4-wide on straightening when 7Ls off pace, finished off well and never nearer.
Over-raced through first half of race when about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed in 5th or 6th, clear running room when 3Ls down in 6th off final bend, failed to kick.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace at 1600 M when trod on by NORTHERNER, 3Ls down in 4th at 800 M and 3rd entering straight, one-paced thereafter.
7Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 1200 M, about 6Ls down in mid-division when 3-wide turning for home, much too one-paced.
On fence 6Ls off the speed in 8th at 1200 M, 5Ls down off final bend, short of running room at 300 M and 200 M, wasn't fully tested, nearest at finish.
12Ls last at 1200 M, under pressure entering straight when 9Ls off the speed, finished off fairly well, never nearer.
About 4Ls off pace in 4th or 5th on fence from 1600 M to home straight when short of running room, checked at 300 M and switched inside at 250 M, one-paced in closing stages.
Settled one from rear about 11Ls off pace at 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) when 9Ls off pace in rear, made up some late ground out wide.
Trailed field throughout.
Never far off to straight. Kept on till finding no extra close home.
Midfield approaching home turn. Kept on steadily to take 3rd near finish.
Towards rear till making up some late ground inside final 200 M.
About 6th 700 M before staying on in straight to dispute for 3rd inside 200 M.
Settled in rear before running on a bit closing stages.
2nd to straight where he chased winner unavailingly.
In touch before failing to hold place 200 M out.
Made no show.
Midfield briefly and faded rapidly coming into straight.
Soon took up running and made rest, keeping on well to line.
Mostly 5th to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
In touch before losing some ground approaching home bend. Could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Never on terms.
Mainly 5th before progressing to 3rd final turn. Ran on well to take lead 100 M out. Just held on.
Midfield. Steady progress to 4th rounding home bend. Kept on until weakening 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground inside 150 M.
Midfield on inside. Gave some ground when checked passing 600 M. One-paced in straight.
Never in contention.
Shared the lead early before taking over rounding home bend. With 2Ls advantage early straight. Weakened when headed 100 M out.
Towards rear. Made up significant ground on outside final 200 M, just failing to prevail.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to take 3rd closing stages.
Last. Ran past a couple of beaten horses closing stages.
Ridden along from a wide draw to share the lead. 2nd rounding home bend. Held on until finding no extra inside 150 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Held up when crowded for room 250 M. Shifted to inside to obtain run and recovered some ground passing 200 M.
Prominent from widest draw. Was 3rd or 4th before weakening out of contention soon after straightening.
Disputed lead and briefly in front approaching home bend. Unable to sustain effort upon straightening.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off the straight. Weakened steadily.
Towards rear to straight. Never nearer.
Well there. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening and hit front inside 200 M.
Mainly in forward of midfield until hampered badly 200 M out. Never recovered.
Lost many lengths at starts. Trailed the field to 200 M. Made up some late ground.
Jumped fairly. Ridden from poor draw to hold midfield position down centre of back straight. Took closer order rounding home bend and sustained progress to the line.
Settled in rear of midfield. Finished off race strongly.
Broke well but soon dropped back towards rear. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Slow into stride. Always in last few.
Jumped best. Led field most of way to straight. Weakened after headed inside 200 M.
In touch on inside. Bumped the running rail twice near 800 M and 600 M. 3rd 400 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Midfield. Weakened 250 M.
In touch, soon 3Ls 3rd until dropping back a bit to 4th final turn. Failed to quicken in straight.
Behind midfield. Made minor progress rounding home bend, crept closer to 5th turning in. Kept on.
Began awkwardly, soon 2nd last. No response when under pressure 300 M. Tailed off.
Better than midfield. Widest (4-wide) turning in. Made no show.
Midfield or behind. Steadied for a run early straight. Kept on without quickening.
Towards rear. Little shift in straight.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Towards rear. Ran on well final 200 M, doing best work closing stages.
Soon led. Held on well to win unchallenged.
Led briefly early, then mainly 2Ls behind the winner. Kept on without threatening.
Always prominent. Ran on steadily inside final 200 M without threatening.
Made all to win unchallenged.
Trailed field to straight. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Wide in midfield to 400 M. Weakened.
Midfield. Came under pressure turning in but only kept on at the one pace.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily from midfield into straight to be nearest at finish.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Faded.
Restrained behind leader. Came to challenge upon straightening but only kept on at the one pace before fading final 200 M.
Towards rear. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Steadied 200 M out before making up late ground closing stages.
Always well there. Kept on steadily without quickening under pressure.
Always in last few.
Raced freely in midfield early. Moved up to dispute 2nd going up Rock. Gradually dropped out from 500 M.
Jumped with field and raced in midfield or better 2-wide. Ridden along at home bend to hold position. Found nothing when asked 250 M out and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.

From a wide draw was immediately eased to a rearward position 2 to 3-wide. Made steady headway from the outside rounding the home turn. Found the line well when asked 250 M out and grabbed the winner spot in a ding-dong finish.
Slowly away and soon raced at back 2-wide. Shifted out on straightening but was unable to show much impression when asked 250 M out.
Tardy start and soon settled in a rearward position on rail through to straight. Whilst closing the race off fairly was crowded for room near the 200 M and continued to run on well thereafter.
Tardy start from widest and soon raced in a forward position 2 to 3-wide with no cover. No extra in straight and dropped out steadily inside final 200 M.

Jumped fairly and steady settled in midfield 2-wide. Near the 500 M was checked when crowded for room. Shifted the widest in early part of straight to make its run and made up good ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Broke fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield 3-wide whilst hanging in. Allowed to go forward to race 1/2L off pace down back straight. Continued to hang in in straight and only kept on evenly to the line.

Broke well and led briefly on rail being fairly steadied to race around 1 to 2Ls off pace from 1200 M to straight. Under pressure 200 M out and plugged on gamely to the line without threatening the placegetters.

Jumped well and niggled along to race in a prominent position on rail. From the 1200 M was awkwarded on heels on couple of occasions. Shifted out on straightening and ran on well but just lost out in a very close finish.
Began fairly and niggled along to take lead on rail shortly after the 1200 M with around 1/2L advantage to straight. Headed shortly after the 200 M and steadily weakened thereafter.
Slow to begin and soon raced at back on rail. Near the 500 M was hampered and was unable to show much running in straight.
Slowly away and ridden along to race in midfield on inner through to straight. Whilst closing the race off fairly was crowded for room near the 200 M and ran on evenly thereafter.
4Ls off pace in 3rd at 1100 M, 2-wide and 2Ls down in 4th at final bend, every chance when a neck second at 200 M, no extra final 100 M.
Soon led, 2Ls clear at 1100 M, joined entering straight and all out at 200 M when a head in front, dropped out quickly.
2Ls off pace in 2nd at 1100 M, 2-wide at 800 M when 1L down in 2nd, upsides entering straight but swamped at 200 M and faded.
Very slowly and awkwardly away, detached in rear 15Ls off the leader at 1200 M, never a factor.
On fence 7Ls off the speed at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 8th off the home turn, ran on well, nearest at finish.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 5th when 2-wide at 1100 M, over 3Ls down in 5th on straightening, 1L down at 200 M on inner, kept on strongly but couldn't lead.
Caught 3-wide without cover in 6th when 5Ls off pace at 1100 M, got cover 2-wide at 700 M, 3Ls down in 4th off home turn, 1L down at 200 M, kept on well, narrowly failed.
10Ls behind in 10th at 1100 M, 7Ls down on straightening, made some nice late ground without threatening.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 8th at 1100 M and same on straightening for home, tame finish.
5Ls behind leader in 4th on fence at 1100 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at entrance to straight when bumping rails, led about 150 M out, kept on well.
Always too far off the pace in rear, 9Ls behind in 9th at 1200 M, nearest at the finish.
Checked at the start, 12Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, pressed on 3-wide without cover at 700 M and 4Ls down in 7th off home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and soon raced at the rear. Continued to race in last place and had nothing to show for in the straight.
Slowly away and was then niggled forward to be 2-wide at midfield. Unable to quicken in the straight and hung in badly.
Jumped well and was steadily eased back. Caught wide in rear section early stages. 2-wide near the back in back straight. Failed to produce a rally in the straight.
Settled on fence behind midfield until home straight. Kept on same pace to line.
Soon settled on fence at midfield. Remained in similar position throughout back straight and was 3Ls down at 400 M. Ran on steadily in the straight.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Swung out on straightening and made a nice rally in the straight to take over inside final 50 M.

Best out and raced behind the leaders. Kept racing in 3rd place 2Ls behind the leader in back straight. Steadily worked its way up along the inside rails in the straight to grabbed 2nd place at the line.
Checked shortly after the start and raced 2-wide in rear section. Quickened well in the straight and closed the race off nicely.
Missed the kick and lost ground. Travelled along the fence in rear section. Picked up steadily on straightening and made up some ground over the closing stages.
Pressed forward after jumping and settled 2-wide better than midfield from 1200M onwards. Kept within 3Ls of the pace until home turn. Moved up to challenge at 200 M and kept on well to line.
Pressed along early stages and took the lead at 1100 M. Held no more than a length's advantage into home straight and faded steadily inside 200 M.

Took the early lead before settling in 2nd place after 1200 M. 2-wide and just behind the leader back straight. Closed in steadily rounding home turn and regained lead 200 M. Stayed on gamely and just lost 2nd place at the line.
6Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 1100 M, same off home turn, kept on fairly, never nearer.
Detached in rear about 15Ls behind at 1100 M, under pressure when tacking on 9Ls last at 600 M, never a factor.
Pressed on to be 1L off pace and 2-wide at 1200 M, hard pressed to hold this position entering straight, soon faded.
4-wide without cover at 1300 M, got in 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, forced 4-wide into home straight when over 2Ls down in 5th, kept on well without really threatening.
Soon led, always about 1L clear through to home straight and same at 200 M, grabbed by winner final strides.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1100 M, pushed off fence at 400 M and 3-wide into straight when 2Ls down in 4th, every chance when 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, couldn't follow through.
Awkwardly away, 8Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 9th off home turn, made some good late headway.
On fence 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 6th on swing for home, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, got up to lead final strides.
10Ls off speed in 11th at 1200 M, a little keen at 1000 M when 3-wide with cover in rear, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight, ran on very strongly but post came too soon.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Niggled along slightly to hold midfield position as early as 1100 M when 5Ls off pace, more pressure and similar spot 3-wide entering straight, gone quickly.
Always 3-wide and without cover, 6Ls off pace in 7th at 1100 M and 5Ls down in midfield when 4-wide into home straight, posed no danger.
Made all.
Towards rear throughout.
Began awkwardly and was checked. Was last until recovering some ground inside 200 M.
Always there. Was 2nd briefly near 400 M. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Prominent to 400 M out. Faded.
Midfield at best. Weakened steadily closing stages.
Behind midfield. Weakened steadily closing stages.
With the leader (winner) until weakening out of contention halfway.
Behind midfield. Steady progress halfway. Ran on quite well final 200 M but unable to threaten the winner.
Never able to feature.
Never far off. Hung out and found difficulty to ride throughout.
Midfield. Ran on inside 400 M to take 3rd close home.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground 200 M out. Raced greenly throughout.
Better than midfield. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Slightly baulked early in straight. Kept on same pace to the line.
Settled in midfield on rails. Did not find much room early part of straight. Obtained split inside 200 M and ran on to do best work at finish.
Never far off. Came to challenge under pressure turning in. Fought on doggedly the length of straight and gained upper hand final stride.
Niggled along behind pace. Gained slender advantage under pressure upon straightening. Fought on to the line but pipped at post.
Settled at the back. Commenced run wide rounding home bend. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Mostly in midfield. Wide rounding home bend. Kept on steadily in straight without threatening.
Soon dropped to the rear. Never a factor.
Soon took up running from widest draw. Led field to straight. Swamped for placing inside final 200 M.
Wide in midfield early. Improved swiftly to prominent 3rd approaching home bend. Dropped out into straight.
Always prominent. Hung in early in straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Always wide in last few. Made no show.
Settled in midfield. Steadied for a stride rounding home bend. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Sluggish when given reminders early. Trailed the field to straight. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
In midfield or behind. Faded under pressure in straight.
Prominent to straight. Found no extra 200 M out.
Never a factor.
In touch early, soon dropped back to behind midfield. 10th final turn. Ran on well from outside to snatch victory near finish.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Crept closer to midfield final turn. Ran on under pressure to miss marginally at finish.
Stumbled at start, soon picked up the field to be 5th about 2Ls behind lead. Responded well early straight to take lead 250 M. Kept on but just lost narrowly at finish.
Ridden along to take lead from 1000 M. Kept on same pace when headed 250 M out.
Bounded at start, losing ground. Soon recovered some ground to be 7th. Kept on in straight.
Towards rear. Made some minor progress in straight.
Soon last from widest draw. Only ran past a couple of well beaten horses.
Slowly away, 2nd last to final turn. Made up some ground final 250 M.
In touch to final turn. Dropped back steadily. (Mucus.)
Prominent. 1L behind leader on 2-wide rounding home bend. Kept on but failed to match speed with the trio closing stages.
Began awkwardly, soon recovered ground to be slightly better than midfield. Faded in straight.
Towards rear. Effort rounding home bend to be midfield but widest turning in. Soon weakened.
Prominent far side. Wide in midfield rounding home bend. Tightened early in straight. Kept on.
Led field to 300 M. Weakened.
Well there to straight. Dropped out.
Settled towards rear. One-paced in straight.
Settled around midfield. Quickening when tightened early in straight. Made up some late ground.
Settled in midfield. Faded out of contention under pressure in straight.
In last few early. Circled field home bend and turning for home. Sustained good progress from midfield into straight to be nearest at finish.
Tracked leader. Hit front over 200 M out. Soon drew clear.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening in straight.
Always in last few.
Jumped best racing in first few. Lost touch turning in and gradually weakened.
Well back. Commenced run turning in. Made significant progress down centre of straight.
Settled just 2Ls off the pace. Improving when hampered for a run over 150 M out. Kept on to the line.
Last into straight. Ran past beaten horses under pressure.
Jumped well from wide draw and niggled along to take lead on rail from around the 1000 M. Headed shortly after the 400 M and steadily faded thereafter.
Broke fairly and steadily settled in rearward position 3 wide with cover. Switched out on straightening and made some progress inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Began awkwardly, towards rear early. After the 1100 M went forward to be in midfield on rail to straight. Only kept on same pace when asked 350 M out. (Laceration to left hind and lost left front plate.)

Jumped fairly and steadily settled in a rearward position 2 wide. Had trouble finding clear running in early part of straight and shifted to the outside. Ran home strongly when clear near the 200 M to miss 3rd narrowly.
Jumped with field and ridden along to race in better than midfield on rail. Shifted out on straightening to find clear running but never saw clear daylight in straight whilst running on fairly.
Tardy start and raced in a rearward position on rail through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Broke well and niggled along to race in a prominent position on rail through to straight. Made steady progress when asked 350 M out but was never in position to trouble the 1st pair.
Jumped with field and soon settled in better than midfield 2 wide. Shifted out on straightening to obtain clear running. Ran on well when asked 400 M out and took charge inside final 100 M.

Broke fairly from widest and niggled along to race in better than midfield out wide with no cover to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but unable to sustain effort after the 200 M and became one-pace.

Jumped with field and raced in better than midfield 3 wide whilst proving difficult to settle in the early stages. Switched to the outside on straightening but failed to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Began well from wide draw and steadily settled in midfield 3 wide with cover through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

Began well from wide draw and niggled along to race in a prominent position 2 wide. Crept forward to join the leader at home turn. Responded well when asked 400 M out but failed to match speed with winner inside final 100 M.

Jumped awkwardly and hard ridden to recover lost ground. Near the 1000 M was awkwardly placed on heels and shifted out to be 2 wide in midfield. Switched out on straightening and made up little ground inside final 250 M.
Soon raced at back around 2 wide, switched to the widest on straightening but failed to show any running in straight.
Checked at 1200 M, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 5th at top of home straight and 2Ls down in midfield at 200 M, one-paced through closing stages.
Disputed lead out 3-wide without cover at 1000 M, checked at 800 M and under pressure to lie up when 1L down in 3rd off home turn, weakened steadily.
On fence 5Ls off the speed in 10th at 800 M, 2-wide but similarly situated on straightening, never troubled principals.
Over-racing when 4Ls off pace in midfield when clipping heels and blundering at 900 M, 5-wide into home straight when 6Ls off pace in rear, faded out.
Bumped at start, on fence about 4Ls behind in midfield down the back, held up entering straight, 2Ls down in the pack at 200 M, kept on well late but hung out noticeably.
Slowly away, 8Ls off pace in rear at 1000 M, 3-wide into home straight when 6Ls down in rear, ran on well, nearest at the finish.
Checked at 1200 M but had the run of the race in 4th on fence 2Ls off pace at 1000 M, struggling to keep in touch at 600 M, gone at top of home straight.
Prominent when checked at 900 M, 5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 11th at 800 M, a little closer off home turn when 4-wide, 1L down in 3rd and all out at 200 M, no extra.
2 and 3-wide down back straight in rear about 7Ls off pace, checked about 900 M out, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 6Ls last, ran on strongly, led on line.
Bumped at start, 5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 8th at 900 M, 3-wide into homestretch when 3Ls down in mid-division, picked up well to lead at 200 M, pipped at the post.
Disputed lead on fence with head up racing too freely until the 500 M, under pressure when 1L down in 2nd off home turn, faded rapidly.
Bumped at start, raced freely disputing lead out 2-wide until home straight, headed 300 M out and dropped away.
3-wide with cover 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, left without cover out 3-wide from 800 M and 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, led 300 M out, headed at 200 M, stayed on gamely.
Slowly away, on fence 7Ls off pace in 12th at 800 M, 6Ls off pace in rear bunch on straightening, making some headway when checked at 300 M and steadied at 200 M, no danger late on.
Off slowly and soon trailed. Remained towards the rear before being pressured at 400 M. Quickened and closed the race off well.
Travelled at midfield and hung in most of the way. Did not quicken when pressed and kept same pace to line.
Off well and kept within a length of leader until 400 M. Unable to find extra in the closing stages to challenge for the lead.
2Ls down at 800 M. Unable to keep up despite being pressured midway through and faded steadily thereafter.
Jumped well and settled within 2Ls of leader early stages. Shuffled back after being crowded at 600 M and never got a clear run in the closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly. Tracked leader until final 400 M but unable to keep pace with it closing stages.
Jumped well and gradually moved across to middle of track. Tracked leader until 400 M and weakened thereafter.
Rear section early and gradually shifted across to outside fence. Remained near the back and kept same pace closing stages.
Kept within a length of the leader. Failed to stay on and weakened inside 400 M.
Settled in rear section. Never picked up when asked 500 M and weakened.
Slowly away and raced at midfield. Unable to pick up when pressured and kept same pace in the closing stages.
Jumped well and led most of the way. Fell short in a duel with the eventual winner closing stages.
Kept no more than a length behind the leader. Remained within striking distance inside final 400 M. Closed-in steadily and ran down the leader final 100 M.
Slowly away, on fence 5Ls behind in 7th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in mid-division on straightening, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, kept on well.
Slowly away, on fence 7Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, 4Ls down on straightening in midfield, 1L down in about 5th at 200 M, kept on well.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, beat a retreat from 350 M.
Never better than midfield, 8Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, 7Ls down in 12th at 400 M, posed no great threat.
Raced keenly early on, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, similar entering home straight and all out to stay within 2Ls of lead at 200 M, faded.
Settled in 13th 9Ls off pace on fence at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 11th on straightening, good headway when no running room at 300 M and steadied again at 100 M, kept on to lead 50 M out, hung on.
Slowest away, 7Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1000 M, niggled along at 700 M, 5Ls down in 10th when 3-wide and under pressure off home turn, finished off very strongly, only just failed.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 1L until the home turn, soon headed and faded out.
3Ls behind lead in 5th at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Best away, about half a length 2nd out 2-wide from 1000 M to home straight, clear lead 350 M out, headed about 150 M out, weakened.
4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 6th at 1000 M, 2Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 6th at 600 M, 4-wide on straightening, led 150 M out but headed at 50 M, no extra.
10Ls last when 2-wide at 1000 M, under pressure when 4-wide and 9Ls last on the home turn, made a little late ground but never really there.
Never on terms, 8Ls off pace in 11th when 3-wide without cover at 1000 M, didn't get much closer.
2-wide when 5Ls off speed in 8th at 1000 M, 3-wide on straightening in similar position, over 1L down in midfield at 200 M but couldn't sustain effort to line.
In 3rd 3Ls off pace on fence at 1000 M, same into home straight, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, led 100 M, ran on well.
Never better than midfield, 8Ls off pace in 12th at 800 M and same on straightening, made a little late ground and nearest at finish.
4Ls off the speed when 2-wide in 4th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 4th off final bend, all out to be in same position at 200 M, finished tamely.
Led early on, 2Ls down in 2nd on fence at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd out 2-wide at 800 M and entering home straight, all out when 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, weakened.
9Ls off pace in rear at 800 M, 4-wide on straightening when 9Ls last, no impression.
Caught 3-wide without when 4Ls off pace in 5th at 900 M, about 5Ls down in mid-division off home turn, always outpaced.
5Ls off the speed when 2-wide in 7th from 900 M to home turn, made some late ground, never nearer, finished 5th, placed 4th after inquiry.
Pressed on from wide gate to lead on fence by 2Ls at 1000 M, about 1L clear off home turn and same at 200 M, headed 100 M out, no extra.
Settled one from rear 9Ls off pace at 800 M, 7Ls down when disappointed for running off home turn, ran on very strongly, nearest at finish, finished 6th, placed 5th after inquiry.
On fence 5Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, about 4Ls down at top of stretch and gaining when 2Ls down at 200 M, switched inside for running room at 150 M, ran on well but couldn't grab winner.
Slowly away, on fence about 7Ls off pace in 10th at 900 M, 5Ls down in midfield off final bend, stayed on well despite carrying head a little high, finished 4th, placed 6th after inquiry.
Deepest on the track throughout, 4-wide without cover when 5Ls behind in 8th at 900 M, hung out on the bend and 5-wide into home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Awkwardly away, 6Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 900 M, driven along at 600 M to stay in touch, 8Ls behind in 13th off home turn, weakened right out.
Awkwardly away, raced freely early on, 7Ls off pace when 2-wide in 11th at 900 M, 6Ls down in 10th on straightening, always held.
Worse than midfield to halfway. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Midfield at best.
Ran 5th into straight where he found nothing.
Mostly midfield to straight. Ridden 350 M and ran on well to take lead inside 100 M. Found winner too strong last few strides.
Never on terms despite staying on slightly final 200 M.
About 3rd or 4th halfway and was struggling before straight. (Bled.)
Never on terms.
About 5th 1200 M and remained in similar place before home turn. Could make no impression on leaders on straightening.
Never near to challenge.
About 10th approaching home turn. Kept on steadily to be nearest at the finish.
Mostly 3rd or 4th to straight. Kept on same pace before finding no extra close home.
Tracked leader to straight where he stayed on to hold some chance passing 200 M. Soon outpaced.
Led before 1400 M and was mostly 2Ls clear into straight. Was headed 100 M and lost ground steadily.
Among rear group into straight where he ran on strongly final 200 M to take command near finish, despite hanging in.
Took 3rd 1000 M out. Weakened out of contention soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Stayed on in straight.
Slowly away, 2nd last to final turn. Steadied for a run near 350 M. Made up some ground when under pressure.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Never a factor.
Settled 5th on the rail. Held for a run early straight. Ran on without threatening.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Pushed along early to be 4th passing 1000 M. Kept on to gain 2nd briefly 200 M. Soon one-paced.
Towards rear throughout.
Took lead approaching 1000 M. Won unchallenged.
Never better than midfield. One-paced.
Slowly away, ridden along to be just behind midfield. Faded in straight.
Jumped quickly and led field early stages. Sat outside the winner until failing to hold place 200 M out.
Midfield throughout. Kept on at the one pace to the line. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Wide in midfield. Dropped out into straight. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Waited with. Finished well between runners down straight to just fail to get up on line.
Well back into straight. Never nearer.
Prominent. Responded well when asked final 200 M to just get up on line.
Towards rear. Came under pressure turning in. Made up some late ground.
Attempted to make all only to be swamped inside final 100 M.
Midfield throughout. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Midfield. Yielded ground from home bend.
Well there. Disputed lead into straight. Unable to quicken further to threaten and kept on steadily to the line.
Never better than midfield. Weakened into straight.
Wide in prominent position to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Always thereabouts. Made moderate progress final 200 M without threatening.
Better than midfield early. Dropped back gradually and was last at final turn.
Slowly away, towards rear. 4-wide final turn. Ran on steadily in straight, never nearer.
Began awkwardly, never a factor.
Midfield. Gradually improved to 5th near 900 M. Kept on quite well to gain 3rd closing stages.
Made all. Held on under pressure final 200 M.
Soon prominent. 1L behind lead final turn. Always held by the winner.
Well there. Tracked leader to final turn where he became 3rd. Kept on one-paced until finding no extra closing stages.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Raced in 10th to home bend. Checked near 500 M while improved to 7th or 8th. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Ridden early to be 4th on 3-wide. 2Ls 3rd on straightening. Soon weakened.
Towards rear soon after start. Never able to feature.
Refused to jump.
Prominent briefly early, soon in midfield. Kept on.
Never better than midfield.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent to straight but faded gradually.
Midfield most of way. Kept on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear. Ran on steadily down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled towards rear. Made up good ground down straight to just get up on line.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Never seen with a chance.
Midfield throughout. Came under pressure from home bend but ran home one-paced.
Well there. Gained slender lead far side. Unable to sustain effort and swamped 200 M out.
Led briefly. Well there to straight. Weakened.
Settled just off the pace. Quickened well into straight to gain 1-1/2L break inside 200 M only to be caught in the shadows of the post.
Prominent to straight. Weakened. (Bled.)
Midfield to straight. Faded.

Broke with field from wide draw and soon raced in midfield around 3-wide with cover. Went forward after the 800 M to be better than midfield on straightening. Made up little ground inside final 250 M to miss 3rd narrowly.
Raced in worse than midfield 3-wide. After the 1200 M went forward from the outside to be in better than midfield. Under pressure 350 M out and kept on fairly but without threatening.

Broke fairly and soon raced in a handy position 3-wide no cover. Near the 900 M went forward to dispute lead. Unable to sustain effort in straight and steadily weakened out of the race inside final 250 M.
On jumping blundered and niggled along to race in worse than midfield 2-wide. Near the 800 M was shuffled back to a rear position to straight. Unable to make any impression when asked 250 M out.

Slowly away and near the 1600 M was asked to avoid heels. Raced keenly in a rearward position 2-wide. After the 1200 M shifted out and was allowed to stride forward. Only kept on same pace to the line when asked 350 M out.
Broke fairly from widest and soon raced in a forward position 2-wide through to straight. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and steadily dropped out inside final 250 M.

Tardy start and soon raced in a handy position on rail. Near the 1000 M was checked when awkwardly placed on heels. At the 700 M checked badly when crowded for room and commenced to give ground. Tailed out in straight.

Niggled along to race in midfield on rail. Near the 1000 M was checked when awkwardly on heels and lost ground. Under pressure 400 M out and made up steady ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish.
Shortly after the start was crowded for room and dropped to a rearward position 3-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and kept on early to the line.

On jumping bounded in the air and soon recovered in worse than midfield on rail. At 1300 M clipped heels and blundered. Near the 1000 M was checked to avoid heels and lost ground. Made up good ground in straight.

Broke fairly, towards rear on rail. Checked 1300 M to to avoid heels. Shifted out and made little headway down back straight. Travelled well at home turn and ran on strongly in straight to take charge 150 M.

Began well and ridden along to take lead on rail. Near the 800 M the lead was being challenged and pulled away from the pack round the home turn. Kept on fairly in straight but was headed near the 150 M and just held on for 3rd.
Broke well and soon raced in handy position 2-wide. Hard ridden along at home bend to maintain position. Dropped out in straight.

Jumped fairly and soon raced at back on inner and near the 1300 M was checked to avoid heels. Switched out at home bend and made steady headway. Under pressure 350 M out and found the line well to be closest at finish.
Had cover when 3-wide and 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, similar at 800 M and 4-wide when 5Ls down into straight, one-paced and beaten when checked at 100 M.
A little keen when 3-wide without cover when 5Ls down in 7th at 1200 M, gained cover at 800 M, 4-wide into straight when 4Ls down in midfield, ran on well late, narrowly missed a place.
2Ls off pace when 2-wide in 3rd at 1200 M, under pressure to hold prominent position turning for home, dropped away.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 10th at home turn, kept on fairly late.
Soon led on fence, clear by 1L until 800 M when a neck clear and same on straightening, headed about 200 M out, faded.
5Ls off speed in 5th on fence at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 6th off final bend when steadied and switched out, ran on well for a place.
7Ls behind and 2-wide in 9th at 1200 M, niggled along at 700 M and under more pressure to improve on straightening, no response.
8Ls behind and 2-wide in 10th at 1200 M, wide but had cover down the back, pushed along at 700 M, 5-wide into home straight when 7Ls down in 11th, made little impression.
Bounded at start, 5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 6th at 1200 M, niggled along at 700 M, 5Ls down in 8th on straightening, stayed on fairly through final stages.
3-wide with cover when about 8Ls off pace through first half, 6-wide (widest of all) when 8Ls down and one from rear at home turn, stayed on well late, nearest at finish.
Without cover throughout, keen when 4-wide 8Ls towards rear at 1000 M, pressed on to be 2Ls off pace in 3rd out 3-wide at 800 M and into straight, kept on to lead 100 M, impressive.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, a neck 2nd at 800 M and 400 M, led 200 M briefly but headed by winner at 100 M, kept on.
Always in rear, detached about 12Ls behind in last at 1000 M, 8Ls last entering straight, very weak.
3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th at 1200 M, closer off home turn but one-paced from then on.
Jumped awkwardly and was ridden to be at midfield. Lacked a response when pressured at home turn. Weakened in the straight.
Quickly showed in front, set the pace along the inside. Lost the lead at 500 M and was 1/2L down at 400 M. Did not pick up on straightening and weakened closing stages.
Began awkwardly, struggled to keep pace after the 1000 M and trailed field. Never recovered and tailed out in the straight.
Dropped to rear section shortly after start. Remained well back on straightening and only managed to get past a few beaten runners.
Slowly away and trailed field in the early stages. 7Ls down 800 M out and kept niggling rounding home turn. Continued well in the straight and made up ground closing stages.
Began well and raced wide in a forward position. Continued to be wide and gradually lose touch 500 M out. Weakened after straightening.
Off well and steadily dropped back to midfield. Niggled along in a 3-wide position making home turn. Improved steadily in the home straight to be closest at finish.
Niggled along in a 2-wide position 4Ls behind the pace and remained in similar position on straightening. Closed the race off with a rush to be up right on the line.

Ridden out of the gates and led briefly. Drifted back 800 M and was 3Ls down in a 2-wide position. Hard ridden rounding home turn and kept pace into final 200 M. Unable to turn up a notch in the closing stages.
Kept within 2Ls behind the leader in a prominent position. Stayed on same pace in the straight and unable to draw any closer.
Midfield early and dropped back slightly after 800 M. 4-wide making home turn and made up some ground in the straight.
Off well and tracked leader into the turn. Moved into the lead at 600 M and held a 1/2L advantage into home straight. Opened up a 3Ls lead inside 200 M but was chased down right on the line.
Had the run of the race in 3rd 2Ls off pace at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd at home bend, led 250 M out, stayed on well.
Wide at first bend, 9Ls off pace and 3-wide but with cover in 10th at 1200 M, under strong pressure when 5-wide into home straight and about 8Ls last, no impression.
Slowly away, 9Ls behind and 2-wide in 11th at 1200 M, 7Ls down when briefly held up for a run entering home straight, posed no threat.
7Ls behind in 8th at 1200 M when on fence, 6Ls down in mid-division off final bend when disappointed for running, stayed on strongly late, nearest at the finish.
5Ls behind when 2-wide in 7th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 5th at home turn, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, stayed on well but winner always had upper hand.
7Ls off pace in 9th when 2-wide at 1200 M, 5Ls down in midfield on straightening when 3-wide, ran on well for a place.
12Ls last at 1200 M, 7Ls down and one from rear off home turn, stayed on well, nearest at the finish.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 6th at the 1200 M, lost place but still 5Ls down on straightening, weakened further.
Caught 3-wide without cover in 5th at 1200 M, under pressure to hold 3rd when 3Ls down off home turn, one-paced to line but didn't drop away entirely.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace in 4th at 1200 M, hard pressed to retain this position turning for home, weakened.
Awkwardly away, 11Ls off pace on fence in 13th at 1200 M, 4-wide into stretch when 7Ls down, made some minor late ground.
Pressed on to be 1L off pace and 2-wide in 2nd at 1200 M, hard pressed to hold this position at 600 M, beaten before home turn and soon tailed off.
Best away and soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 1L until home turn, headed about 250 M out and weakened final stages.
Niggled along as early as 1200 M when 9Ls off pace in 12th, beaten before the 800 M, tailed off.
Shared lead to 900 M, then sat outside leader to straight. Kept on well to gain slender advantage briefly passing 200 M. Was beaten narrowly close home.
Shifted to the inside from the widest gate and raced in rear. Made no impression.
In touch, 2Ls 3rd from 1000 M. Ran on well in straight to just prevail close home.
Slowly away, near rear. Recovered ground on inside to be midfield far side. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Shared lead to 900 M before taking charge. With 1L advantage final turn, kept on same pace when headed passing 200 M.
Mainly 4th to 150 M. Found no extra.
Towards rear. Severely hampered passing the Rock. Made minor progress in straight.
Better than midfield. Dropped back a bit rounding home bend. Failed to quicken in straight. (Mucus.)
Towards rear. Made ground steadily from 8th at 300 M.
Unbalanced and lost ground soon after start, behind midfield. Soon recovered some ground to be 5th far side. Ran on a bit 300 M.
Midfield early, soon dropped towards the rear far side. Made no show in straight.
Soon last. Made up some ground when on the widest inside final 200 M.
Raced mainly 3 or 4 wide in prominent position. Came under pressure turning in. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Well there early. Niggled along in prominent position home bend. Fought on doggedly from 2Ls 5th into straight to just fail to get up on line.
Raced keenly just off the pace. Quickened well to hit front 200 M out only to be caught in the final strides.
Never seen with a chance.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort and swamped over 200 M out.
Forward of midfield to home bend. Weakened.
Midfield to home bend. Faded.
Settled in midfield. Did not have too much racing room early in straight. Ran on steadily closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield to straight. Weakened.
From poor draw, gradually improved to settle outside leader before Rock. Held every chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Sluggish at start. Waited with. Commenced run 400 M out. Shifted out for a run over 200 M out. Ran on well to just get up on line.
Soon dropped to rear. Always remained in last few.
Mainly 4th on 2-wide. 4-wide on straightening. Weakened.
Raced 6th before improving to 3rd 200 M out. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Took lead soon after start. Held 3Ls advantage 200 M, however effort not sustained when beaten narrowly at finish.
Held 2nd or 3rd on 2-wide until fading out of contention from final turn.
Led briefly early, settled 2Ls 3rd on inside. Faded 250 M. (Mucus.)
Was last and within 12Ls off pace to 600 M out. Stayed on quite well in straight.
Mainly 7th before dropping back a bit near 500 M. Stayed on a bit on inside 250 M.
Raced 8th within 10Ls behind lead. Switched to the widest final turn. Ran on strongly to just get up on the line.
Near rear, last from 550 M. Ran past a couple of beaten runners in straight.
Remained 5th on inside. Crept closer order and improved to 2nd 250 M out. Stayed on strongly to miss narrowly at finish.
Tracked leader. Disputed lead into straight. Held every chance until finding no extra final stages.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Raced in 3rd to straight, then gradually weakened under pressure.
Attempted to make all. Fought on to resist challenges final 300 M but over-shadowed by fast-finishing winner near the line.
Settled in rear of midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Settled in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Settled in forward of midfield. Steadied for a run 200 M out.
Well back. Made steady headway past beaten horses in straight.
Always in last few.
Never a danger.
Slowly away. Waited with. Taken to centre of track turning in. Ran on determinedly to snatch victory final strides.
Settled in midfield. Finishing off race well before running out of room 50 M out.
Began fairly and soon settled in midfield or worse 2 wide. Hard ridden along at home turn to maintain position. Failed to make any impression in straight.

From an outside draw was immediately steadied to the rear section around 2 wide. Ridden along and made headway from the outside at home turn. Kept on fairly in straight without threatening the placegetters.

Began awkwardly and pushed along to race in midfield or better around 2 wide. Near the 600 M went forward to be 1L off leader 3 wide on straightening. Kept on well in straight but just failed to match speed with the 1st pair.
From the widest draw was soon steadied to the rear section closer to the rail through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 300 M out.
On jumping was checked and soon recovered to race in midfield 2 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Kept on fairly in straight and near the 50 M was unable to find running.

Jumped awkwardly and soon settled in worse than midfield on rail. Ridden along at home turn and made up little ground. Shifted to the middle to make its run and ran home strongly to miss the winner narrowly.

Broke fairly and niggled along to race in a handy position 2 wide. Near the 700 M went forward to race around 1/2L off pace. Only kept on evenly when asked 300 M out and weakened slightly inside final 150 M.
Slow to begin and soon raced in a rearward position 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 150 M to be closest at finish.
Began fairly from wide draw and ridden along to take lead on rail whilst racing keenly in the early stages. No extra in straight, headed near the 200 M mark and steadily faded thereafter.
Tardy start and soon raced in midfield or worse on rail. Commenced to give ground rounding the home turn and tailed out in straight.

On jumping was checked and soon recovered to race in a prominent position on inner through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and responded well to fend off late charge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.

Broke well and soon raced in a handy position on rail. Near the 600 M whilst attempting to improve position was checked when crowded for room. Ran on fairly in early part of straight but became one-pace inside final 100 M.
Fractious in gates, on fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed in mid-division from 1200 M to stretch, off fence and hindered slightly at 200 M when about 3Ls down in 8th, made some late ground.
Led on fence by 1L from 1200 M to home turn, no extra when headed 150 M out.
Caught 3-wide without cover when prominent until 1000 M when half a length off pace in 2nd out 2-wide, same off home turn and at 200 M, very weak close home.
Slowly away, on fence about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace in 9th or 10th until home straight, staying on well when short of room at 200 M and came off fence, stayed on well for a place.
3Ls or 4Ls off pace and 2-wide in 6th from 1200 M to 500 M when switched wider to challenge, entered straight 5-wide, picked up well to lead 150 M out, driven out to score comfortably.
About 5Ls off pace and 2-wide from 1200 M to home straight, pretty one-paced in the finish.
On fence 10Ls off pace and one from rear at 1200 M, 8Ls behind in 11th off home turn, made some nice late ground from well back.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1100 M to home turn, always held from then on. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Slowly away and badly checked at start, always at least 10Ls off pace in rear and never the remotest of factors.
Niggled along at 1300 M, 8Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1100 M, pressed on 3-wide without cover from 500 M to be all out 6-wide (widest of all) entering straight, never there.
Soon led on fence, headed at 1200 M and had the run of the race in 3rd 2Ls off pace until home straight, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M but very drab from then on. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
3Ls off pace on fence in 5th at 1100 M and same turning for home, one-paced on the run-in.
Jumped to an early lead. Settled behind the pace after 1100 M and remained 2Ls behind the leader back straight. Stayed prominent rounding home turn but weakened shortly after straightening. (Mucus.)
Best out and was held back to race 3-wide in rear section. Hung out wide making home turn and was last to enter home straight. Only ran past a beaten runner.
Pressed forward early stages. Took the lead at 1100 M and held it until entering home turn. 1/2L down into home straight. Kept on well but unable to draw closer final stages.
In a forward position early but was squeezed back to midfield 1200 M. Kept near midfield and swung out on straightening for its run. Strong rally in the straight but just failed.
Raced in a forward position early. Settled 2-wide and 2Ls behind the lead in back straight. Lost a bit of ground at home turn and was one-paced in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield. Shuffled back briefly at the rock and was niggled along the home turn. Ran home without quickening.
Trailed field in the early stages. Made a bit of ground after 1000 M and pressured rounding home turn. Quickened on straightening and closed the race off well.

Away awkwardly. Niggled along and caught very wide 1st turn. 3-wide at midfield 1000 M, rolled forward from 900 M and took the lead at 600 M. Under pressure home turn and took a 1L lead into the straight. Kept on well to line.
Began well and raced behind the pacesetter early stages. Settled on fence at midfield back straight. Rallied along the inside on straightening to take the lead final 100 M.

Checked out of the gates and was niggled to a forward position. Stalked leader back straight and was a length down on straightening. Took the lead briefly inside 200 M but unable to hold off the top pair close to home.
Missed the kick and was hard ridden forward to race behind midfield. Improved steadily after 800 M and reached within 4Ls of the pace at 400 M. Kept on but unable to gain much ground in the straight.
Didn't break well and soon raced near the rear. Trailed field from 800 M out until straightening. Closed the race off well but was disappointed for running 200 M out.
About 5Ls off pace in 11th through to home straight, made some good late ground, nearest at finish.
Detached about 12Ls last at 800 M, about 10Ls last off final bend, made some very nice late ground inside final 150 M, nearest at finish.
3-wide but had cover when better than midfield about 2Ls or 3Ls behind leaders until the home turn, one-paced from then on.
Always in rear two, under pressure to lie up when 8Ls behind in 11th at 500 M, soon beaten.
Between 1L and 2Ls off pace towards inner in 3rd until home straight, switched out to accelerate to the lead at 150 M out, ran on strongly.
Always 4-wide without cover on the track when about 3Ls off pace in midfield until the 500 M, entitled to fade out after very wide trip but still stayed on well.
Disputed lead on fence until home straight and at 200 M, weakened final 100 M.
Worse than midfield and covered up about 5Ls off pace until home straight, never troubled leaders.
On fence about 3Ls off speed in 5th through to home straight when under pressure to lie up, very one-paced from then on.
Awkwardly away with head up, about 4Ls off pace on inner until the 600 M when hard pressed to lie up, kept on stoutly, nearest at finish.
Bounded at start, about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 5th or 6th and 2-wide until home straight, stayed on well in final 200 M for a place.
Best away and disputed lead out 2-wide but could not cross to fence, a neck 2nd out 2-wide at 400 M and narrow lead at 200 M, headed at 150 M out, hung on for 2nd.
Led by 1L at 800 M, on fence at 600 M, 1L clear of home turn, soon quickened away impressively, very easily.
1L off the pace early but 4Ls down in 4th on the swing, folded tamely.
Always in midfield or worse, always outpaced about 6Ls off the speed.
Prominent early but under pressure to stay in touch at the 600 M in 6th, never looked like making much improvement from then on.
Caught 4-wide without cover through, tended to hang out early in midfield about 5Ls off pace, hung out when 6-wide (widest) into home straight, no danger. (Saddle shifted.)
Had cover when 3-wide but towards rear about 10Ls off pace at 600 M, got too far back and only made some small late ground.
Switched towards fence from gate 8 to be about 7Ls down at 500 M, made some fair late ground through a tired bunch.
Awkwardly away, towards rear about 9Ls off pace, never much of a factor.
Had a nice trail on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 600 M, under pressure to hold position off home turn, all out at 200 M when over 3Ls down in 3rd, weak close home.
Tracked winner by 1L in 2nd through to home straight, no chance whatsoever with BILLET EXPRESS but still hung on quite well for 2nd.
About 5Ls or 6Ls off pace and 2-wide from 700 M to home straight, posed little danger.
Prominent with cover early on, 3-wide without cover at 500 M when 4Ls down in 5th, kept on at same pace through final stages.
Never in contention.
Well there and held some chance 150 M. Outpaced soon after.
About 5th turning for home. Ran on well to take charge towards finish.
Made no show.
Towards rear before running on strongly in straight to be closest at the finish.
Midfield into straight where he stayed on quite well.
Was 2nd before ridden to challenge turning into straight. Found no extra close home.
Never troubled leaders.
Never on terms.
Towards rear before making headway after the Rock. Kept on to take lead 150 M but unable to hold winner near finish.
Took lead before stable bend and led field till challenged into straight. Found no extra and dropped out steadily 150 M.
Ran 3rd or 4th to home bend. Soon beaten.
Always at the back. (Bled.)
Midfield. Slightly progress to 5th 600 M. 3rd 250 M. Kept on without threatening the first pair.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Crept closer on inside to 7th final turn. Soon found no extra.
In touch. Around 2-1/2Ls 3rd from far side. Failed to hold place inside 250 M.
Jumped well and soon settled in midfield. Stayed on moderately when asked soon after straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 5th while hanging out 1000 M. Moved up a bit to 4th far side. Hung out again home turn. Kept on until one-paced inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Made no show in straight.
Behind midfield. Dropped back steadily 500 M out.
Set outside winner soon after start. 1-1/2Ls behind rounding home bend. Kept on well but was always held by the winner.
Soon led and made all. Held off runner-up's challenges over final 250 M.
Began awkwardly, near rear. Improved slightly to 9th final turn. Made up some ground in straight.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from 11th early straight.
Wide towards rear. Ran on past beaten horses down centre of straight.
Midfield to Rock. Dropped out from towards rear into straight.
Well there to straight. Kept on and unable to quicken to threaten.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened.
Wide in midfield throughout. One-paced under pressure in straight. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Missed the break by 3Ls. Quickly recovered to midfield before home bend. Commenced move rounding home bend. Ran on steadily from 5th into straight.
Niggled along in midfield early. Quickly improved to prominent position but 3-wide before home bend. Soon dropped out after straightening.
Never better than midfield.
Made all. Careered away in straight for a convincing victory.
Well there. Lost touch under pressure 200 M out.
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening under pressure.
Trailed the field into straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish despite inconvenienced 200 M out. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Raced 9th on 2-wide. Stayed on similar position in straight.
Near rear. Ran past a couple of beaten runners in straight.
Around midfield to home bend. Gave ground steadily.
Never able to feature.
Within 4Ls 5th before dropping back when clipping heels near 550 M.
Mainly 2-1/2Ls 4th on inside. Stayed on well in straight.
10th to final turn. Crept closer on inside to 7th early straight. Checked 250 M. Kept on without quickening thereafter.
Mainly 2Ls 2nd before taking over 650 M out. Held on well to win readily.
Led field to 650 M out. Remained 2nd until failing to hold place final 200 M.
Lost ground at start, soon recovered some ground from last to 8th about 8Ls behind lead. Ran on well from 6th final turn to take 2nd 100 M out.
2Ls 3rd on 2-wide. Gained 2nd very briefly 200 M out. Soon one-paced.
Around midfield. Stayed on final 250 M.
Settled just off the pace. Came to tackle leaders upon straightening hitting front 100 M out but swamped in the shadows of the post.
Well there to 150 M. Weakened under pressure.
Wide in midfield. Weakened into straight.
Rear early. Rushed up to join leaders at 1000 M bend. Hit front into straight but collared 100 M out.
Settled in midfield. Obtained split 200 M out. Responded well under pressure to take charge final strides.
Towards rear throughout.
Never in the hunt.
Soon took up running and led to 200 M. Beaten under a length when tightened and forced to ease final strides.
Midfield to straight. Never nearer.
Settled in midfield. No clear passage until making good late impression inside final 100 M.
Settled in last few. Ran on under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Last into straight. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
From the wide draw soon settled in midfield 2-wide. Ridden along at home bend and made little headway. Switched wide on straightening and kept on fairly without threatening.
Soon raced towards the rear 2-wide to straight. No extra and dropped out inside final 200 M.
Raced towards the rear on rail, hard ridden along at home bend but unable to hold position. Made no impression in straight. (Significant amount of mucus.)
Jumped with field and soon box-seated behind the leader. Was held up rounding the home bend, soon obtained running on straightening and charged home to win convincingly.
Slowly away and dropped to the tail on inner. Switched out and made little headway rounding the home bend. Made little impression inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began fairly from widest and soon raced in midfield or better 3-wide without cover through to straight. Found nothing when asked 250 M out and faded steadily inside final 200 M.
Tardy start and pushed along to race in better than midfield 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and ran on fairly but was never in position to trouble the 1st pair.

Jumped awkwardly and niggled along to take lead on rail with no more than 2Ls advantage to straight. Only kept on evenly when asked 250 M out, headed shortly after the 200 M and steadily weakened thereafter.
Began fairly and soon raced in better than midfield on rail. Near the 500 M was steadied when closed to heels. Kept on fairly to the line when asked 250 M out.

On jumping became unbalanced after being bumped and raced in midfield 3-wide with cover. Steadily edged forward from the outside at home bend. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened steadily inside final 200 M.
Broke with field and soon raced in midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to find running in early part of straight, made up little ground when clear running was obtained after the 200 M mark.

Best out and steadily settled in a forward position 2-wide. Niggled along and made little headway rounding the home turn. All out 200 M out and ran on well but unable to match speed with winner inside final 100 M.
On fence 3Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, closer and still on fence at home turn, over 1L down in 3rd at 200 M but failed to quicken up.
Awkwardly away, 8Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1100 M, 6-wide (widest of all) on straightening when 5Ls off pace and one from rear, never in contention.
1L off pace in 3rd when 2-wide at 1100 M, driven along at 900 M and all out when over 2Ls down in 4th and 4-wide entering home straight, faded out.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1100 M, lost position from 600 M and beaten turning for home.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1200 M to home straight, a neck down in 2nd at 200 M and with every chance, didn't follow through.
Pressed on to dispute lead racing 2-wide from 1300 M, all out to hold position at 500 M, very weak in the home stretch.
Soon led, disputed lead on fence until 400 M when half a length clear, headed 50 M out, no extra.
3Ls off pace in 6th when 2-wide at 1100 M, closer turning for home and unbalanced at 300 M when briefly held up, clear 250 M out, led 50 M out, ran on.
On fence 10Ls last at 1200 M, 7Ls last and driven along entering straight, making modest progress when steadied at the 200 M, no danger.
7Ls behind and 2-wide in 9th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in midfield but 5-wide on straightening, stayed on well to nick a place close home.
Switched to fence from wide gate, 9Ls down in 11th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 10th off final bend, ran on well, nearest at finish.
Slowest away, 6Ls off the speed in 8th on fence, 4Ls down on fence in same position off home turn, always outpaced.
Off slowly and settled on fence in a rearward position. Made up some ground in the home straight.
Jumped well and soon settled on fence behind the pacesetter in 3rd. Remained in a prominent position rounding home turn Stayed on well in the closing stages.
Jumped well and soon led. Took a length's advantage into the straight. Kept on before being headed final 50 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled 2-wide behind midfield back straight. Switched out on straightening and kept on steadily to the line.
Off slowly and raced in a rearward position. Improved along the outside and swung widest on straightening. Closed the race off with a strong rally.
2-wide and kept within 3Ls of the leader until 600 M. Little response when pressured at 400 M and weakened on straightening.
Pressed forward in the early stages. Raced 2-wide and a length behind the pace back straight. No response when ridden home turn and dropped out final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and settled 2-wide in rear section. 7Ls down at 400 M. Made a good closing run in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield. Lacked a response when ridden on straightening and weakened final 200 M.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Checked off heels and was 6Ls down at 400 M. Rallied well in the straight and just missed 2nd.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. 5Ls down at 400 M and quickened nicely on straightening and kicked clear of rivals inside final 50 M.
Dropped to last from wide draw and trailed field all the way into home straight. Checked when crowded inside 200 M whilst making a run and never recovered.
In touch early, dropped back steadily and was near the rear rounding home bend. Stayed on in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, near rear. Improved on outside from 650 M to be midfield on widest final turn. Stayed on steadily in straight.
Midfield to home bend. Dropped back steadily.
In touch. Dropped to 5th when crowded near 800 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Well there, took lead from 1000 M. With more than 2Ls advantage 300 M, kept on to just hold off challenges from the placegetters.
Prominent. Weakened out of contention from 2nd early straight.
Slightly better than midfield. Ran on steadily from 6th early straight, just failing to catch the quinella pair.
Towards rear from the widest draw. Remained there until making up some ground 250 M out.
Well there on inside. 1-1/2Ls 3rd rounding home bend. Faded inside 300 M.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground on outside 200 M out.
Around midfield. Failed to quicken when hanging out in straight.
Last. Slightly impeded on straightening and near 300 M. Made up some ground when in clear inside 200 M.
Near rear throughout. (Mucus.)
In touch early, soon settled in midfield 3-wide with cover. Gradual progress home bend to be 4th final turn. Ran on steadily in straight to just miss narrowly.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Well there. Tightened for a run about 300 M out. Ran home one-paced.
Rear into straight. Ran on past beaten horses closing stages.
Driven to lead, holding some 1L advantage to straight. Weakened.
Towards rear. Ran on late in straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well settling just off the pace. Quickened to lead shortly after straightening, but swamped over 100 M out.
Towards rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Well back. Went off the track rounding home bend.
Midfield to straight. No extra. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Niggled along in midfield before running off the track approaching home bend. (Tongue tie broken.)
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Towards rear into straight. Made moderate progress without threatening.
Prominent. Came to tackle leader upon straightening. Gained upper hand over 100 M out.
Never in contention.
Held 3rd to 1600 M where he improved to 2nd and was within 1L behind leader. Stayed on until failing to maintain position final 300 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Led field in a slow pace. Found no extra when headed 250 M.
Settled towards rear. Gradual progress rounding home bend. 4Ls 8th on 3-wide final turn. Ran on steadily to take 3rd 100 M out.
In the last pair to straight. Made up good ground on outside final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear early, recovered ground steadily to be midfield far side. Unable to quicken from 5th final turn.
In the last pair before moving up a bit to 9th final bend. Made ground steadily in straight.
Never able to feature.
Remained in midfield on inside rail. Switched to 3-wide on straightening. Ran on well to take 2nd 200 M but failed to catch the winner.
Sat outside leader early. 2Ls 3rd with cover 1600 M. Stayed on well but failed quicken to challenge closing stages.
Settled 5th, 3Ls behind lead. Slightly improved to 4th when 2-wide rounding home bend. Responded well in straight to take control 250 M. Stayed on to hold off runner-up's challenges closing stages.
3Ls 4th and 5th to 400 M. Dropped back steadily. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Never in the hunt.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Led the field before joined rounding home bend. Gradually weakened into straight.
Well there. Disputed lead rounding home bend. Gained slender advantage into straight. Swamped inside final 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Midfield throughout. Kept on at the one pace without quickening.
Settled around midfield. Responded well when asked early in straight. Asserted authority over 100 M out. Convincingly.
Settled in last few. Ran on stoutly down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Always at the back.
Midfield. Took closer order home bend. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Settled in rear of midfield. Steadied about 300 M out. Produced good late finish closing stages.
Broke well and travelled nicely in 2nd or 3rd position. Under pressure 350 M out and kicked away from the rest to win with plenty of authority.
Jumped with field and soon settled in midfield or worse. All out 350 M out but failed to quicken and kept on same pace to the line.
Jumped well and steadily settled in midfield. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M out but failed to find an extra gear inside final 200 M to get into the placings.
Began awkwardly and pushed along to race in midfield or worse. Only able to keep on same pace to the line when asked 400 M out.
Jumped with field and niggled along to race outside the leader. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Began well and niggled along to take up a narrow lead. Headed near the 300 M, but able to plug on gamely to hold onto 3rd.
