Soon raced in midfield or better, unable to quicken when asked 400 M out whilst hanging in. Steadily gave ground inside final 200 M and hung in badly over the concluding stages. (Dropped whip 400 M.)
Raced in midfield till the 400 M mark and steadily tailed out thereafter.
Raced in a forward position till the 500 M. Had trouble keeping up with the field from 450 M and steadily dropped out thereafter.
Broke with field and raced in midfield or worse. Commenced to give ground at 450 M and tailed out inside final 250 M.
Began fairly and soon raced in midfield or worse. At the 400 M steadied when crowded for room. Only able to run on evenly to the line.
Ridden along to race in worse than midfield. Unable to make any impression inside the final 400 M.

Began fairly and slightly outpaced in the early stages to be towards the rear section. From the 600 M steadily edged forward to be around 2Ls off pace at 400 M. Ran on well when asked 350 M out to grab 2nd place inside final 150 M.
Jumped awkwardly and outpaced in the early stage to be at the tail. Made up steady ground inside the final 400 M to miss the 3rd placegetter by a short margin.
Raced freely when 3-wide without cover when 3Ls off pace in 4th at the 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at the home turn, led about 200 M out but grabbed and no extra final 50 M.
Checked at start, 7Ls off pace and 2-wide in 12th at 1000 M, 6Ls behind in 11th off final bend, over 2Ls down in 9th at the 200 M, kept on finding but post came too soon.
In 6th place 4Ls off pace when 2-wide at 1000 M, similarly placed off home turn, 2Ls down in midfield at 200 M, no extra close home.
9Ls last at 1000 M on fence, 8Ls last off home turn, made a little late ground.
3Ls off pace when 2-wide in 3rd at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, kept on well in straight despite lacking principals' dash.
3-wide with cover when 4Ls behind in midfield from back to homestretch, picked up to be 1L down in 3rd or 4th at 200 M, couldn't sustain the effort.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide with cover and 5Ls off pace in 9th at 1100 M, much the same entering straight, over 1L down in 6th at 200 M, led at 50 M, ran on well.
Awkwardly away and a bit keen early on, 5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1000 M, under pressure in same spot on straightening, failed to kick.
5Ls off pace on fence in 8th at 1000 M, same into home straight, very one-paced.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1000 M, all out when headed 250 M out, faded out.
On fence 4Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, same entering straight, 2Ls down in 6th or so at the 200 M, one-paced through concluding stages.
Keen at 1200 M, 7Ls off pace on fence in 11th at 1000 M, hung out at 800 M and niggled along at 600 M, very one-paced thereafter.
2Ls off pace on fence in 2nd at 1000 M, same off home turn, brief lead over 250 M out, soon headed but still kept on well.
Jumped awkwardly and soon trailed field. Remained towards rear into home turn. Swung wide on straightening. Rallied strong in the straight to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and was eased back to race in rear section. 3-wide rounding home turn and was 6Ls down at 400 M. Closed the race off with a nice rally.
Eased back to race in rear section and was hard to settle early stages. Remained near the back on straightening and closed the race off fairly.
Began well. Kept within 4Ls of the lead in 4th from 1000 M until straightening. Held up briefly 400 M and kept on well in the straight.
Pressed forward out of the gates to lead the field. Held a length's advantage into the straight and kept on well in the closing stages.
Dropped back from widest draw and raced near the rear. Trailed field from 1000 M and was last to enter home straight. Ran on well and made up ground in the straight.
Off slowly. Travelled on fence in rear section until home straight. Kept on same pace to line.
On fence at midfield early stages. Crowded and shuffled back behind midfield at 1200 M. Failed to quicken on straightening.
Settled 2-wide and within 4Ls of the pace in 3rd. Improved rounding home turn and was 3Ls down at 400 M. Continued well in the straight and took over final 50 M.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield into home turn. Closed to within 4Ls of leader at 400 M but remained 4-wide. Kept on steadily in the straight.
Outpaced early stages and niggled along 3-wide behind midfield. Improved slightly rounding home turn but unable to quicken much in the straight.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Niggled along rounding home turn. Made some headway on straightening but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Slowly away. Raced 2-wide at midfield early stages. Dropped back slightly after being crowded 1200 M. Remained behind midfield on straightening and did not quicken much in the straight.
Pressed forward. Settled behind the leader after 1200 M and tracked leader into home straight. Unable to find extra and kept on same pace to line.
Keen when 2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 12th at 1600 M, over-raced when 4-wide without cover when 3Ls off pace in midfield, 5-wide into home straight when about 1L down in 4th, one-paced in final 200 M.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1600 M, same at top of home straight, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on well without quickening.
Bumped by RAKTI when 3-wide with cover when 8Ls off pace in 11th at 1600 M, pressed on to be 3-wide with cover and 2Ls down in 5th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 5th on straightening, weakened steadily.
3-wide with cover when 6Ls off pace in 9th at 1600 M, towards rear when 4Ls off the pace entering straight, always held.
4Ls off pace and 3-wide in 6th at 1600 M, 3Ls in mid-division and 3-wide with cover at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, 1L down at 200 M, led 100 M out, all out to hang on.
Always without cover, 6Ls off pace in 10th at 1600 M, pressed on to go 2Ls off pace out 3-wide at 1200 M, disputed lead from 800 M to home straight, failed to quicken, beaten over 200 M out.
Slowly away, one from rear 8Ls off pace a mile out, still in rear about 4Ls off pace when 6-wide into home straight, making some nice ground late when checked at 100 M, ran on.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1600 M, disputed lead from 1000 M to home straight, 1L clear at 200 M but headed at 100 M and no extra.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th at 1600 M, 4Ls down 2-wide in 10th at 800 M and same off home turn, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, kept on strongly.
Had the box seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1600 M to 500 M when under pressure, faded out tamely in the stretch.
On fence 4Ls off the speed in 5th at 1600 M, same at 800 M, 2Ls down in 5th on straightening, outpaced thereafter.
Crowded at 1600 M when 6Ls off pace in midfield, 5Ls down in 12th at 800 M, 3Ls down on inner and short of room when checked at 200 M, no chance thereafter.
10Ls off pace in rear a mile out, 7Ls last at 800 M and 5Ls down when 3-wide entering straight, ran on very strongly but hung in all the while, just failed.
4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 5th at the 1600 M, 3Ls down in midfield entering straight when held up, still short of room at 200 M when switched inside to challenge, not fully extended.
In rear to straight. Stayed on well to claim 3rd close home.
Ran 6th to home bend. Kept on without threatening final 200 M.
Prominent to straight where he was checked 250 M. Soon beaten.
Well there to straight where he quickened to threaten approaching 200 M. Soon outpaced and dropped out of contention.
In rear throughout.
Never on terms.
Worse than midfield to straight where he made some slight progress.
Mostly in 5th to straight where he quickened to lead 200 M out. Unable to hold winner near finish.
Was prominent before taking slender lead from 1000 M. Unable to hold advantage 300 M and faded quickly.
Lost ground at start and was last turning for home. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Never a factor.
Midfield to straight where he ran on well to challenge final 200 M. Gained upper hand final strides.
In touch before weakening from 350 M.
Just behind midfield to straight where he made steady headway to line.
Soon in touch. 2Ls 3rd before taking 2nd passing 150 M. Failed to threaten the winner.
Midfield from widest draw. Made up some ground in straight.
Jumped well and led very briefly, settled 4th or 5th. Found no extra in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Led field from 900 M and never headed. Won readily.
Jumped well and soon in midfield. Crept closer to 5th final turn. Kept on for a remote 3rd.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Raced 10th to final turn when widest. Recovered some ground inside 200 M.
Held 2nd to 150 M. Found no extra.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Remained in the rear before making up a little ground final 200 M.
Never able to feature.
Lost ground at start, always at the back.
In touch early, dropped to midfield rounding home bend. No improvement.
Soon took up running and led to 200 M. Faded under pressure.
Dislodged rider at start.
Always thereabouts. Hit front under pressure inside 200 M but soon swamped.
Midfield to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Prominent or better than midfield. Quickened to hold some chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Always in last few.
Settled in midfield on rail. No racing room in straight until late 150 M out. Made up some late ground.
Rear into straight. Ran on past beaten horses to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Commenced run rounding home bend. Kept on steadily from midfield into straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on stoutly in straight to get up close to home.
Settled behind midfield. Improved to midfield into straight. Kept on same pace.
Began awkwardly, soon recovered ground to be 3rd from first bend. Dropped back steadily from final turn.
Held 2nd to final turn. Dropped back steadily.
Slightly behind midfield. Kept on same pace throughout.
Led field to 200 M. Kept on without quickening.
Near rear when moved to the inner rail from the widest draw. Crept closer to 7th early straight. Responded well final 200 M to assert authority inside 100 M.
Towards rear. Last from 1200 M. Recovered some ground on outside 200 M out.
Raced 4th before dropping back a bit to 5th 600 M. Kept on until weakened closing stages.
Never able to feature.
Midfield or slightly better. Moved up on outside passing the Rock to be 3rd approaching 400 M. Kept on well to gain brief advantage 200 M. Effort not sustained.
Began awkwardly, near rear. Recovered some ground to be 8th 1200 M. Found no clear run early straight to 100 M. Ran on when in clear.
Better than midfield on inside. Became unbalanced when bumped the rail rounding 600 M. Held on until making up good ground 200 M when clear run is obtained.
Never far off. Swamped close home.
Slow into stride. Settled at the back. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Towards rear. Kept on same pace in straight.
In last few. Produced good late impression in straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled towards rear. Finished well down centre of straight but winner too strong.
Midfield. Found nothing in straight. (Lame.)
Settled wide in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled just off the pace. Switched inside for a run upon straightening and ran on to hit front inside 200 M. Won convincingly.
Midfield to straight. One-paced.
Ridden to join leader before 1000 M bend. Disputed lead into straight but unable to sustain effort and swamped final 200 M.
Midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Held narrow lead. Headed about 200 M out. Swamped for placing final strides.
Began well and soon box-seated behind the leader through to straight. Responded well when asked 300 M out but was unable to find an extra gear to overhaul the winner to settle for 2nd.

Best out from wide draw and ridden along to take up running on rail with around 1L advantage through to straight. Ran on well when asked 300 M and held off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to secure victory.
Broke with field and soon raced in mid-division 2-wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running but failed to respond to pressure and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at back on rail. Unable to find clear running at 150 M and only able to keep on fairly to the line.
Broke fairly and ridden along to race in better than midfield around 2-wide through to straight. No extra in straight and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Broke well and steadily settled in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and ran on fairly but was never in position to trouble the 1st pair.
Tardy start and soon raced towards the rear on inner through to straight. Failed to make any impression when asked 250 M out.
Began well and niggled along to race around 1L off leader 2-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and only kept on evenly to the line.
Slowly away and raced towards the rear around 3-wide with cover. Switched out and made little headway at home turn. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and ran on same pace to the line.
Jumped with field from widest and soon eased to the rear around 2-wide to straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Jumped with field from wide draw and race wide without cover in midfield whilst proving difficult to settle. Near the 800 M went forward to race around 1/2L off pace 3-wide to straight. Only kept on same pace to the line.
Began awkwardly and ridden along to race in midfield or worse on rail. Only kept on fairly to the line.
Led on fence at 1000 M, headed at 700 M and 2Ls 2nd on fence at 600 M, a neck down and with every chance at 200 M but winner was too strong.
Fractious in gates and slowly away, hung out at 600 M when worse than midfield and about 5Ls off the pace, never in serious contention.
4-wide without cover and disputing lead at 900 M, sent on to lead by 2Ls on fence at 600 M, half a length clear off home turn, fizzled out.
Over-raced when 3-wide with cover early, pressed on to be 3-wide without cover 3Ls off pace in 6th at 600 M, 4-wide (widest) on straightening, soon faded out.
Slowest away, towards rear 6Ls off pace at 800 M, progress on bend and 4Ls down in 6th off home turn when 2-wide, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M and dangerous, couldn't sustain effort.
Slowly away, settled in rear 7Ls off pace until home stretch, made some moderate late headway.
Crowded at start, settled 2-wide and about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace in 11th through to home straight, ran on well, nearest at finish.
4Ls off pace in 7th and going well on fence at 600 M, some headway to be 2Ls down in 7th at 200 M, kept on fairly but never really troubled leaders.
Within 3Ls of the speed in 4th or 5th on fence until home straight, ran on okay but always held by principals.
Keen at 1000 M and prominent, settled 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 600 M, 1L down in 2nd off home turn, faded out fast.
On fence in about 9th place and 5Ls or 6Ls behind through to home straight, made some late ground but never dangerous.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in midfield early on, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn when 3-wide, led over 200 M out, stayed on well.
Ridden out of the gates and had the early lead. Took a seat after being crossed at 1300 M and followed leader through to home straight. Only kept same pace in the straight.
Slow out of the gates. Settled on fence behind midfield until home straight and kept on same pace to line.
In a forward position early stages. Settled in front of midfield and kept within 4Ls of the pacesetter back straight. Stayed on well in the straight to claim a minor placing.
Slowly away and settled 2-wide behind midfield. Drifted further back after 800 M and was among last few to enter home straight. Kept on steadily in the straight.

Dropped back shortly after start and settled on fence in rear section. Checked at 600 M whilst commencing to improve and remained last few to enter home straight. Made a rally in the straight to be closest at finish.
Settled on fence at midfield. Ridden along 700 M out to hold position. Rallied well through traffic in the straight and narrowly missed.
Moved up steadily and took the lead at 1300 M. Held a length's advantage into home straight but was swamped inside final 200 M.
Settled 2-wide at midfield early and middle stages. Drifted back near the Rock and was hard ridden to stay on rounding home turn. Found no extra in the straight.

Off slowly and settled 2-wide in a rearward position. Continued to race at the rear in back straight. Made the home turn wide and was last to enter home straight. Made up some ground in the closing stages.
Niggled to a forward position. Settled 2-wide and a length behind the leader back straight. Struggled to keep pace home turn and weakened thereafter.
Raced 2-wide in front of midfield. Kept 2-wide and within 3Ls of the leader back straight. Taken wide on straightening, ran on well in the straight and took over final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and was eased back to trail field. 7Ls down on straightening and closed the race off strongly.
On fence 9Ls off pace in 8th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 8th on straightening, made some moderate late headway.
Always 3-wide without cover, 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 4th when 3-wide on straightening, soon emptied out.
Three back the fence 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 6th from 1100 M to home straight, made some decent late ground to secure a place close home.
4Ls behind when 2-wide in 5th at 1100 M, much the same off final bend, dropped out rapidly.
10Ls behind leader in 10th on fence at 1100 M, 8Ls down at 800 M, 5-wide into home straight when 7Ls down in 9th, closed off a little bit late.
Settled 11Ls off pace when 2-wide in 11th at 1200 M, improved out 3-wide from 500 M and entered straight out 6-deep (widest of all) when 6Ls down in 10th, ran on fairly to be nearest at the finish.
Fractious in gates, awkwardly away, 7Ls off pace in 7th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in mid-division from 800 M to 400 M, hung in when 4-wide into stretch, ran on well but never likely to catch winner.
2-wide or on fence and between 1L and 2Ls off pace in 2nd from 1200 M to home straight, all out in same position at 200 M, lost out on a place close home.
11Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, same position about 8Ls behind on straightening, never competitive.
Away well and had the run of the race about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace on fence in 3rd from 1100 M to 500 M, under pressure to lie up on straightening, dropped out tamely. (Mucus.)
9Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 1100 M, niggled along to lie up at 700 M, hard driven at 600 M, tailed out badly from top of home straight.
Led on fence 1300 M out, clear by 1L or 2Ls until 400 M when kicked for home, still 2Ls ahead at 200 M, driven out, hung on comfortably.
Led field to 800 M. Held 2nd until re-gaining advantage early straight. Headed 200 M. No match with the winner.
Was 2nd soon after start. Dropped back steadily to 4th after being steadied 900 M. Held on until one-paced inside 200 M.
Towards rear from widest draw. Made ground steadily 200 M out.
Mainly 2Ls 4th to 400 M. Shaken up to take lead 200 M. Won going away.
Bounded at start, losing much ground. Never able to feature.
Towards rear. Difficult to find clear run when trying to improve passing 300 M. Made up some late ground when in clear.
Always thereabout. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped well, soon raced midfield or slightly behind. Made no show in straight.
Midfield. Kept on from 6th at 200 M to obtain a minor placing close home.
Pulled to the front and took lead passing 800 M. Kept on same pace when headed 300 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Checked on straightening. Stayed on but found no extra closing stages.
Midfield to straight. Dropped back steadily.
Towards rear. Not much racing room early in straight. Kept on steadily to the line.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran on under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Attempted to make all. Swamped under pressure inside final 200 M.
Never in contention.
Midfield early. Steadied for a stride rounding home bend and lost some ground. Ran on in straight, doing best work at finish.
Never far off to straight. Not much room early on. Made some impression late.
Settled in last few. Ran on quite well to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Shifted out from heels of runners for a run early in straight. Responded well under pressure over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Midfield. Slight improvement into straight. Soon weakened.
Forward of midfield to straight. Gradually weakened. (Distressed.)
Tracked leader. Hit front inside 200 M. Hung on well to the line.
Midfield throughout. Made modest progress without threatening.
Ridden for pace early. Chased leader to straight. Soon weakened under pressure.
Well there briefly early, soon in midfield. Ran on well early straight to gain advantage briefly 200 M. Soon found no extra. (Bled.)
Better than midfield. Kept on well in straight. Failed to recover when checked near 150 M.
Slow into stride, last to 200 M. Made up good ground from outside to be nearest at finish.
In touch. 3-wide 3rd 600 M. Weakened 200 M out.
Led field from 1000 M. Dropped back steadily when headed soon after straightening. (Mucus.)
Towards rear. Recovered some late ground inside 200 M.
Behind midfield from a wide draw. Ran on well final 300 M and looked like winner passing 100 M. Effort not sustained.
Towards rear. Ran on from 11th 400 M to assert authority close home.
Led briefly soon after start, then raced 1L behind leader. Moved up to gain brief advantage early straight. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Held 3rd to home bend. Failed to maintain position.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered some ground to be midfield final turn. One-paced.
Towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Made up good ground inside 250 M, doing best work closing stages.
Midfield to final turn. Dropped back when steadied early straight.
Restrained in rear jumping out. Remained in last few to straight. Produced for a run 300 M out and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader to 300 M. Weakened.
Attempted to make all. Broke 2Ls clear shortly after straightening. Unable to sustain effort and folded up quickly 100 M out.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Never far off. Ran home to hold some chance inside final 200 M but unable to sustain effort close to line.
Trailed the field. Tailed-off into straight. Never seen with a chance.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on well down inner of straight to win by the narrowest of margins.
Towards rear. Dropped out in straight.
Always thereabouts. Fought on steadily in straight but only kept on without quickening.
Slightly slow out. Quickly recovered to prominent position before home bend. Weakened into straight.
Never in the hunt.
Settled in midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening and ran on well only to miss in bobbing of heads.
Mainly in midfield. Baulked briefly early in straight. Ran on quite well to hold some chance but not match speed of first two.
Settled wide in midfield. Kept on at the one pace in straight.
Broke with field and soon raced in midfield on rail. At the 700 M was checked when crowded for room. Unable to make any impression in straight.

Broke well and soon raced in a prominent position 2 wide. Eased back to midfield or better down back straight. Near the 700 M was steadied when awkward on heels. Only able to keep on same pace after steadying at 300 M.

Began fairly and pushed along to race in midfield 3 to 4 wide. Steadily edged forward down back straight to be 1/2L off pace on straightening. No extra in straight and gave ground steadily inside final 200 M.

Began well and ridden along to race around 2Ls off pace 3 wide no cover. Went forward down back straight to take lead on rail from around 900 M to straight. Kept on same pace to the line when asked 400 M out.
From the widest was soon eased to the back 2 wide. Shifted wide rounding the home turn to obtain clear running. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Jumped awkwardly from wide draw and soon recovered to race in worse than midfield 3 wide with cover. At the 800 M commenced to go forward from the outside. Hit the front briefly at the 200 M but became one-pace near 150 M. (Bled.)
Soon eased to the back on rail. Steadily shifted out to obtain clear running rounding the home turn. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Broke fairly from wide draw and hard ridden along to take narrow lead 2 wide. Eased back to race 1L off pace down back straight. Commenced to give ground at home turn and tailed out in straight. (Bled.)

Slow to begin from wide gate and soon raced in a rearward position 2 wide. Made steady headway from the outside rounding home bend. Responded well when asked 350 M but was overhauled by 2nd placegetter on the line.

Jumped with field and steadily settled in midfield or worse on rail. Switched out and made headway at home turn. All out 300 M out and ran on well to fight off challenges from 2nd and 3rd placegetters to win narrowly.

Broke well from wide draw and raced in midfield 2 wide. Made headway down back straight to join leader rounding the home turn. Kept on same pace when asked 350 M out and weakened quickly inside final 200 M. (Mucus.)

Jumped well and soon eased to a rearward position on rail. Steadily shifted out and made little headway at home bend. No clear running in early to middle part of straight. Closed the race off well when clear running obtained near 150 M.

Tardy start and ridden along to race in midfield 2 wide. Near the 800 M was being ridden along and went forward to be around 1-1/2Ls off pace on straightening. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out and just failed to get the placings.
Began well and hard ridden along in the early stages to race in a prominent position on rail through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Always towards rear, 10Ls behind in 12th at 1200 M, never looked like getting much closer.
Tended to hang out throughout, 2Ls down in 3rd on fence at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 4th from 800 M to home straight when still awkward, drifted back.
4Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, just over 1L down in 4th when 3-wide on straightening for home, a head 2nd at 200 M and with every chance, just held.
Led by 1L out 2-wide at 1200 M, led on fence at 1000 M, hard ridden when headed over 300 M out, faded.
Keen early on, still over-racing when 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, clipped heels and nearly fell at 700 M, 7Ls down in 13th on straightening, soon eased down.
Widest on track at 1400 M, 3-wide without cover in 8th when 5Ls behind at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 3rd but still no cover at 800 M, under pressure to keep up into stretch, soon faded.
5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 7th at 1200 M, 5-wide and still 5Ls down in mid-division, ran on well, nearest at the finish.
10Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M when 3-wide but with cover, tended to hang out while improving to 3Ls behind in mid-division at final bend, still close enough at 200 M but very weak thereafter.
7Ls behind in 9th when 2-wide at 1200 M, no closer and 6-wide on straightening, no danger.
4Ls off pace and 2-wide in 5th at 1200 M, midfield at 700 M when badly checked, 6Ls down in 10th into home straight, one-paced.
3-wide with cover when 8Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, no cover at 800 M when 3Ls down in 5th, 5-wide and 1L down in 3rd on straightening, led at 200 M, won all out, gamely.
Slowly away, 9Ls behind on fence in 11th at 1200 M, held up repeatedly from 700 M to 600 M out, worse than midfield and 6Ls off pace when 5-wide on straightening, no impression.
On fence 6Ls behind leader in 8th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 6th at final bend when 2-wide, unable to quicken.
On fence 1L off pace in 2nd from 1200 M to 500 M, disputing lead off home turn, clear lead at 300 M but headed at 200 M, one-paced in final stages.
Behind midfield. Quickened under pressure 400 M and kept on well over the concluding stages.
Jumped awkwardly and was ridden up to be near midfield early stages. Responded only fairly when pressured 600 M and was outpaced in the closing stages.
Settled near midfield until being put under pressure inside final 400 M. Failed to quicken in the closing stages.
Always kept within 2Ls of the leader. Responded well under pressure 400 M and came up on top in a duel over the final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield early and middle stages. Hard ridden at 400 M but closed the race off only fairly.
Behind midfield in the early stages. Improved to within 3Ls of the leader at midfield 400 M out, unable to find extra to challenge in the closing stages.
Hard ridden out of the gates but still outpaced. Continued to be niggled along the way but unable to improve. Weakened inside final 400 M.
Always kept within 2Ls of the leaders. Unable to quicken inside 400 M and dropped out closing stages.
Kept within 2Ls of the leader. Ridden at the halfway point but only managed to keep same pace to line.
Outpaced in the early stages. Niggled along to improve before closing the race off with a strong rally.
Kept close to the pace before taking the lead final 300 M. Lost a duel with the winner over the concluding stages.
Awkward jump and raced in rear section. Lacked a rally closing stages.
Very sluggish out of the gates and raced well back early stages. Continued to race at the rear and only managed to run past a weakening runner.
Jumped well and led until the midway point. Pressured from 400 M out and unable to find more to hold off challengers inside final 300 M.
8Ls off pace and 3-wide in rear down the back straight, 4-wide and 7Ls down in 13th at final bend, soon outpaced.
Awkwardly away and checked at start, 11Ls off pace in 8th on fence at 1000 M, 5Ls down in about 9th entering straight, ran on well and nearest finish but never troubled principals.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 4th at 800 M and entering straight, well held when short of room through final 150 M.
2-wide and 4Ls off the speed in 5th at 1000 M, 3-wide but similarly placed on straightening, 2Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, kept finding very well, only just failed.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off the speed in 3rd from 1200 M to home straight, all out at 300 M, faded quickly.
A little keen early on, 4Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, 3-wide on straightening when 4Ls down in mid-division, 2Ls down in 4th and with strong place at 150 M, missed the money but still kept on well.
Slow start, sometimes without cover when about 5Ls off pace in 8th down the back, niggled along at 500 M, 4-wide entering straight, staying on well when 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, no extra.
Had cover when 3-wide and 6Ls behind in 10th at 1000 M, similarly placed off final bend, ran on very strongly but post came too soon.
Awkwardly away, 9Ls off pace in rear on fence at 1000 M, still about 7Ls last at 400 M, no clear passage until about 150 M out, made some nice late ground, unlucky.
1L off pace in 2nd when 3-wide without cover at 1200 M, got in 2-wide at 1000 M when still 1L down in 2nd, 2Ls down in 2nd at home turn and at 200 M when all out, weakened.
8Ls off pace in 12th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 7Ls down in 11th at top of home straight, had no room whatsoever on the run-in and not tested at all.
Soon led on fence, always held a margin of about 1L through to the homestretch, about 2Ls clear at the 200 M, just hung on.
Checked at 1300 M, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, same entering straight, stayed on fairly well to be nearest at the finish.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 6th from 1000 M to home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Three back on the fence 4Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in midfield when shut out of a run on the fence at 300 M, switched back out and finished well, nearest at the finish.
One from rear when 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, never got much closer.
Had cover when 3-wide through to home straight when within 3Ls of the lead in mid-division, picked up well to be 1L down in 5th at 200 M, stayed on well but winner always held upper hand.
Couldn't lead but had the box-seat run 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from back to home straight, failed to kick and beaten over 200 M out.
4-wide without cover when vying for lead at 1000 M, tended to hang out throughout, still wide and 2Ls down in 4th at 800 M and steadily lost position on bend, beaten over 300 M out.
10Ls last at 1000 M, made some minor late ground in straight.
Led on fence at 1000 M, clear by 1L until home straight, joined at the 300 M and still there at the 200 M, faded through closing stages.
3Ls off pace in midfield until top of home straight, every chance when 1L down in 3rd at 300 M, outpaced through final 200 M. (Blood in trachea.)
7Ls behind in 12th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 6Ls down towards rear, made up some late ground.
Always within 1L of the pace in 2nd until home straight, upsides and every chance at the 300 M, outpaced by quinella pair final 150 M.
3Ls down in midfield at the 900 M, about 2Ls behind in 3rd entering home straight, outpaced thereafter.
Slipped in well 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 9th despite wide gate, travelled well into straight, clear run 300 M out and quickened up well to lead at 150 M, driven out, slickly.
Worse than midfield and 4-wide but mostly had cover about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until home turn, one-paced to line.
Caught 4-wide without cover at 1000 M when 5Ls off pace in 11th, got in 3-wide with cover at 600 M, 5Ls down in 10th at top of home straight, never troubled leaders.
In rear to straight where he improved a bit final 200 M.
Led to 900 M and was 2nd into straight. Stayed on to take slender lead from 250 M. Unable to retain advantage near finish.
Never far off to straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Well there into straight where he ran on to challenge inside final 200 M, having every chance.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear before making some progress passing 200 M.
Rear early and was midfield home turn. Dropped out shortly on straightening.
Midfield into straight where he stayed on quite well to threaten close home.
Ran 4th into straight. Unable to make any impression on leaders.
Was 2nd before taking charge from 900 M. Headed 250 M and lost ground steadily.
Settled in rear to straight. Ran on to be close up 200 M before finding only one-paced towards finish.
About 6th home bend and was behind midfield into straight. Quickened well from 250 M to lead final strides.
In rear division when baulked for run home bend. Last into straight where he switched out 200 M and ran on nicely.
Among rear group turning for home before making up some ground closing stages.
Led or shared lead before gaining clear advantage on straightening. Headed passing 200 M. No extra. (Mucus.)
Midfield. Dropped back a bit from 600 M. Kept on same pace to finish.
Jumped well and led briefly early. Remained within striking distance to straight. Weakened when steadied 150 M.
2nd last from widest draw. Ran on a bit inside 200 M.
Midfield or slightly better. Crept closer to 5th 300 M. Soon found no extra.
Soon last.
Behind the main bunch. Ran on steadily in straight, doing best work closing stages.
In touch. Faded 200 M out.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Steady progress rounding home bend. Ran on from 5th final turn to take command close home.
In touch. Within 2Ls in 3rd turning in. Ran on steadily to gain upper hand briefly passing 200 M. Effort not sustained.
Well there. Led or shared lead passing 800 M until final turn. Kept on but lost a minor placing close home.
Raced 10th to early straight. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening under pressure.
Made all to win easily.
Midfield to 200 M. Weakened. (Bled and heart irregularity.)
Ridden early but soon dropped to last.
Sluggish at start. Raced wide in midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend. Only produced modest headway closing stages.
Behind midfield. One-paced in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent and wide. Kept on at the one pace without quickening in straight.
Settled in midfield. Commenced run into straight. Fought on under pressure to reach 2nd late.
Never better than midfield.
Travelled outside leader to straight. Dropped out.
Slow into stride. Remained in rear before making good late progress in straight. Did best work at finish.
Never a factor.
Led field to 200 M. Whip was caught final 50 M and failed to ride out close home. (Hung out.)
About 10Ls behind pace in 6th. Crept closer on inside final turn. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on well in straight to gain brief advantage close home, just lost at finish.
Always at the back.
Towards rear. Recovered ground steadily in straight, never nearer.
Settled 4th from widest draw. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Took no part.
Raced 2nd to 1600 M where he became 3rd. Responded well in straight to take brief lead near 100 M. Kept on under pressure but was captured close home.
Behind midfield. Ran on well in straight to just get up at finish.
In touch. Improved to 2nd from 1600 M. 2Ls behind lead early straight. Failed to quicken inside 200 M.
Mainly 5th or 6th. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Well there. Weakened under pressure 200 M out.
Wide in first few. Dropped away quickly 400 M out.
Settled in midfield. Made moderate progress in straight without threatening.
Mainly in midfield. One-paced in straight.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Waited with. Responded well under pressure upon straightening. Weaved his way through field to snatch victory in the shadows of the post.
Midfield throughout making short-lived effort turning in.
Settled wide in prominent positions. Improved under pressure into straight, going more than 1L clear 200 M out only to be pipped at post.
Slow out. Trailed field to straight. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Wide in midfield to 600 M. Weakened.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Well there. Took up running approaching Rock. Headed shortly after straightening and soon dropped out.

Slow to begin from wide draw and swiftly shifted cross to the rail in midfield or worse position. At the 900 M became badly unbalanced when avoiding heels. Failed to quicken in straight and faded inside final 200 M.

Began fairly and raced in midfield or worse 3-wide no cover. Made steady headway down back straight to be around 1-1/2Ls off leader on straightening. Ran on well when asked 250 M out to take charge near 150 M.

Broke well and hard ridden along to race in a forward position. Near the 1400 M clipped heels and blundered. Soon recovered to be in midfield or better 2-wide to straight. Kept on same pace to the finish.

Niggled along to race in a forward position 3-wide and near the 1400 M was checked to avoid heels. Near the 1200 M went forward to race around 1L off leader 2-wide to straight. Only kept on same pace and weakened 200 M.

Jumped with field and niggled along to race in midfield but near the 1400 M was checked to avoid heels. Soon recovered to be in midfield 2-wide and switched out on straightening to obtain running. Ran on fairly but without threatening.
Broke well from wide draw and ridden along to take lead on rail with around 1L advantage to straight. Kept on well when asked 300 M out, headed near 150 M but fought on gamely to hold onto 2nd.
Soon eased to the tail on rail and remain there to home straight. Under pressure 300 M out but only able to run on evenly and ran past couple of beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly and soon raced in midfield on rail through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 250 M out but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.

Shortly after the start was steadied when crowded for room to be in worse than midfield. At the 900 M became badly unbalanced when avoiding heels. Hard to settle going down back straight. Made no impression in straight.

Tardy start and hard ridden along to race around 1-1/2Ls off pace on rail through to straight. All out 200 M and responded quite well but was unable to find an extra gear to overhaul the 2nd placegetter to settle for 3rd.
Began fairly from widest and soon eased to a rearward position closer to the rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Slowly away and raced in a rearward position 2 to 3-wide with cover through to straight. Unable to make much impression when asked 300 M out.
Managed to cross to fence from wide gate and dispute the lead, a neck clear off home turn, headed over 300 M out and soon beaten.
3Ls behind in 9th at 800 M, closer on straightening when 4-wide (widest of all), over 1L behind in 3rd at 200 M, no extra.
Bounded at start and lost ground, had a nice rails run 2Ls off pace through to home straight, 1L down in 2nd and looking held on fence when checked at 200 M, ran on a little late.
5Ls or 6Ls off pace towards rear until home turn, made some fair late ground, never nearer.
Caught 4-wide when disputing lead down the back straight, 1L down in 3rd off home turn when under pressure, emptied right out and eased down from final 300 M. (Heart irregularity.)
Slowly away, about 6Ls behind in rear on fence at 700 M, 4Ls down in 10th off final bend, 3Ls down in 8th at the 200 M, kept on finding, only just held.
Always worse than midfield and no better than 4Ls off the lead at any stage, very weak in stretch.
Worse than midfield about 4Ls behind at 800 M, 3Ls down in 8th on straightening, ran on strongly, failed narrowly.
Head up and steadied at 1000 M, about 3Ls behind in midfield through to home turn, ran on well but lacked kick of principals.
Awkwardly away, within 2Ls of pace in about 4th until home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Had cover when 3-wide in mid-division about 2Ls off pace down the back, a neck down in 2nd when 3-wide on straightening, hung in under pressure when 1L clear at 200 M, all out.
Detached in rear until home straight, moderate late headway but never competitive.
Jumped awkwardly and soon raced in rear section. Remained near the back and trailed field into home straight. Failed to quicken.
Caught 4-wide in rear section 1st turn. Improved to race behind midfield back straight but 3-wide. Ran on fairly in the closing stages.
Jumped well and raced in a prominent position behind leaders. Steadied when disappointed for running at 200 M, kept on well afterwards to grab a minor placing.
Pressed forward to take the lead. Overtaken at 800 M but remained racing inside the leader until home straight. Regained lead briefly at 200 M but unable to hold off rivals final stages.
Settled on fence at midfield. Gradually picked up on straightening but was held up in traffic over last 200 M.
Near midfield. Got carried wider at 1100 M and ended up racing 3-wide without cover until home straight. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Jumped well and raced in a forward position. Raced alongside the leader back straight and held a narrow lead from 800 M until home straight. Unable to keep up inside 200 M and weakened.
Kept within 3Ls of the pacesetter. Moved up to be 2-wide just behind the leaders at 700 M and kept position until straightening. Kept on same pace in the closing stages.
Settled 2-wide at midfield until home straight. Quickened steadily and raced among contenders final 100 M. Failed to hold off principals close to the line.
Slowly away and settled 2-wide behind midfield. Made a strong rally between rivals in the home straight.
Eased back from the start and trailed field. Swung wide on straightening and rallied past rivals to claim victory close to the line.
Slowly away and settled on fence in rear section. Kept on steadily in the straight.
2-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 6th from 1200 M to home straight, 2Ls down in 4th at the 200 M, kept on pretty well for a place.
Had the run of the race in 3rd about 2Ls off pace from 1200 M to home turn, 1L down in 3rd but all out at 200 M, no extra close home.
7Ls off pace in 8th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 7th on straightening, over 2Ls down in 6th at the 200 M, always held.
3-wide without cover early before getting in 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd from 1100 M to 400 M, led 300 M out, grabbed by winner about 100 M out, hung on for 2nd.
About 12Ls last at 1100 M, niggled along in rear at 600 M, 4-wide off final bend, ran on, nearest at finish.
7Ls behind when 2-wide in mid-division at 1000 M, sometimes 3-wide with cover down backstretch, 5Ls down in 8th on straightening, no impression.
Over-raced a bit early on when 10Ls off pace in 10th, 5-wide (widest) and 6Ls down on straightening in 9th off home turn, ran on well, nearest at the finish.
Settled three back on the fence 4Ls off speed in 5th at 1200 M, 3Ls down off home turn, picked up well to lead about 100 M out, comfortably.
Well positioned 2-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls behind leader in 4th until turning for home, lacked a change of gear and beaten over 200 M out.
9Ls off pace in 9th on fence at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 10th entering straight, always outpaced.
Fractious in gates and awkwardly away losing some ground, pressed on to lead on fence by 1L from 1200 M to the home straight when dropping away quickly.
One from rear about 11Ls off pace at 1100 M, 8Ls down in 11th on straightening when 3-wide, making some late ground but not dangerous when checked at 200 M.
Midfield early. Moved forward and was soon in a prominent position. 2Ls 3rd final turn, failed to quicken in straight.
Midfield early, picked up steadily to be prominent rounding home bend. Took lead final turn and won going away.
Towards rear from the widest draw. Made up some ground 200 M out.
Led field to 500 M. Dropped back steadily.
Well there. Gave a little ground passing 1000 M to be just better than midfield on turns. Ran on steadily in straight to obtain 3rd closing stages.
Midfield at best.
Never a factor.
Lost significant ground at start, near rear. Recovered some minor ground 350 M, soon found no extra.
Prominent. Weakened out of contention from 2nd passing 200 M.
Better than midfield. Moved forward on 3-wide to be 4th final turn. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Slowly away, in the rear. Was still 2nd last early straight. Recovered good ground from outside 200 M to take 2nd closing stages.
In touch early, soon dropped to behind midfield. Was 9th early straight, just made up a little late ground close home.
Chased leader to course proper. Weakened.
Soon dropped to rear. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Soon outpaced.
Settled in midfield. Made steady headway under pressure final 300 M without threatening.
Settled in prominent position. Quickened to lead inside 300 M and soon went clear.
Prominent to 300 M. Faded.
Settled just behind midfield. Kept on steadily closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Came to challenge inside final 300 M. Never threatened winner and lost 2nd placing late.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Settled around midfield. Made moderate headway inside final 200 M without threatening.
Broke well. Led to about 300 M. Weakened. (Mucus.)
Jumped badly. Never better than midfield. Faded closing stages.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in rear of midfield. Finished off race well to snatch 2nd short of line.
In touch. Dropped back a bit passing 800 M. One-paced thereafter.
Towards rear. Made up good ground on outside 200 M out.
In touch briefly, soon dropped back steadily to the rear group.
Soon led, with 2Ls advantage final turn. Held on but was one-paced when headed passing 150 M.
Slowly away, made no show.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Prominent, 2Ls 3rd on inside. 2nd 650 M. Kept on well to take lead passing 150 M. Failed to contain winner close home.
Lost ground at start, behind midfield. Steady progress on inside from 600 M to be 6th 400 M. Ran on steadily to assert authority close home.
Better than midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Better than midfield. Steady progress to 4th 600 M out. Kept on but just failed to obtain a minor placing.
Lost significant ground at start, never in contention.
With early speed from a wide draw to sit outside leader. 3rd 650 M. Unable quicken to maintain position soon after straightening.
Midfield to final turn. Found no extra.
Towards rear from the widest draw. Recovered some ground when under pressure 200 M out.
Prominent. Not much room turning in. Ran on steadily inside final 200 M to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Towards rear into straight. Never nearer.
Prominent to 400 M. Faded steadily.
Prominent far side. Lost position coming out of back straight. Continued to give ground around home bend and into straight.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish despite hanging in.
Towards rear. One-paced in midfield when checked 200 M out. Kept on to the line.
In touch and raced keenly early. Dropped out shortly after straightening.
Tracked leader. Quickened to hit front over 150 M out only to be caught close to home.
Midfield far side. Lost some position when hampered 800 M out. Commenced move turning for home and ran on steadily without threatening.
Never in contentuion. (Lame.)
Attempted to make all. Headed over 150 M out. Gradually faded.
Always in last few.
Raced wide in midfield far side. Took closer order rounding home bend. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to gain upper hand close to home.
Slightly slow to begin and hard ridden along to race in better than midfield 2 wide to straight. Found nothing when asked 400 M out. (Blood in trachea and strained right fore suspensory ligament.)

Best out from wide draw and niggled along to take outright lead on rail from 1100 M. Around 1L up on straightening, kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but was headed around 150 M and became one-pace thereafter.
Tardy start and soon recovered to be in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M and plugged on gamely to grab 4th near the line.
Slowly away and hard ridden along to race in a rearward position on rail to straight. Failed to show any running when asked 350 M out and steadily tailed out inside final 250 M.

Began well from widest and steadily eased to a rearward position around 3 wide with cover. Shifted to the outside in straight to obtain clear running. Showed good turn of foot inside 200 M to take charge closing stages.
Broke fairly and soon raced in a forward position on rail through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M and further weakened inside final 150 M.
Broke with field and niggled along to race in a forward position 3 wide without cover through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and slightly weakened inside final 150 M.
Began well and hard ridden along in the early stages to race in a forward position 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and only able to keep on one-pace to the line.
Jumped fairly and soon raced in midfield or better 3 wide with cover through to straight. Only kept on evenly when asked 350 M out and near the 100 M was steadied when crowded for room.

Broke well from wide draw and soon eased to worse than midfield 2 wide. Switched out and made little headway rounding home turn. Responded well when asked 400 M but unable to hold off challenges from winner closing stages.
On jumping got its head up and lost ground. Raced at back around 2 to 3 wide and made little headway from the outside at home bend. No extra in straight and steadily faded inside final 250 M.

Broke with field and soon eased to the rear on inner. Steadily switched out at home bend but prior to straightening was checked when crowded for room. Made good impression inside final 200 M to grab 3rd near the line.

Tardy start and niggled along to race in midfield around 2 wide through to straight. Only saw partial daylight in early to middle part of straight, made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Soon led on fence, always about 1L clear until home straight, headed over 300 M out, faded out steadily.
Niggled along as far as out as 1200 M when with the run of the race 2Ls behind in 3rd on fence, off the bridle at 800 M and losing ground, detached on straightening.
3Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Always 3-wide and often without cover, pressed on from midfield to be 1L down in 3rd at 1000 M, kept on out wide to lead at 300 M, driven out but always in charge, big effort.
8Ls off pace in 12th on fence at 1200 M, always worse than midfield and no great factor.
7Ls of pace in 10th on fence at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 6th on straightening, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, kept on okay for a place.
Keen early, 5Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 5th entering straight, every chance when 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, always held by winner close home.
On fence 5Ls behind in mid-division at 1200 M, niggled along at 1000 M, 8Ls down in rear off home turn, soon well behind. (Mucus.)
Fractious in gates, 2-wide and 1L off pace from 1600 M to 500 M out, held when checked at 200 M, eased down.
9Ls behind and one from rear at 1200 M, 5Ls behind in midfield and under pressure on straightening, 3Ls down at 200 M but one-paced close home.
10Ls last at 1400 M, 6-wide (widest of all) when 7Ls down in 11th on straightening, always about 6Ls down through final 300 M.
2-wide and 7Ls down in 11th at 1200 M, 4-wide without cover at 800 M and 6Ls down in 9th and 4-wide off home turn, never really threatened.
Settled 6Ls behind pace in 9th at 1200 M, not much better off but in midfield on the swing, 3Ls down in 7th at 200 M, always held by principals.
3-wide without cover when 3Ls down in 5th at 1200 M, under pressure to lie up when 4Ls down in 6th at 800 M, struggling entering straight and faded further.
2-wide at midfield early stages. Drifted back slightly 800 M and unable to gain much ground in the straight.
3-wide and raced near midfield early and middle stages. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Sluggish start and dropped to the rear shortly after start despite being ridden along. Continued to trail field into home straight and only ran past a pair of beaten runners. (Mucus.)
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground at the start. Niggled up to be near the pace in 3rd at 1000 M. Lost a bit of ground rounding home turn and weakened on straightening. (Mucus.)
Settled 4-wide at midfield. Caught widest rounding home turn and never quickened in the straight.
Dropped back steadily and raced near the back. Remained in rear section on straightening and was 9Ls down at 400 M. Made up ground in the straight.
Broke well from widest draw and raced among leaders until 1200 M. Took a sit and tracked leader into home straight. Had the lead briefly inside final 200 M before being headed final 50 M.
Jumped well and took the lead after 1200 M. Continued to hold a 1L advantage at 400 M. Kept on well after being headed final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled 3-wide behind midfield 800 M out and made the home turn wide. Made no impression in the straight.
Slowly away and was hard ridden. Moved up steadily along the rails to be at midfield at 1000 M. Improved to within 2Ls of the leader at 400 M and stayed on well to the finish.
Settled 2-wide near midfield. 4Ls down at 400 M and quickened nicely once shifted into the clear. Easily swept past rival in the closing stages.
Raced prominently along the fence within 2Ls of the leader until home straight. Kept on steadily in the straight and grabbed 2nd close to the line.
Ridden out of the gates and raced in a disputed lead early stages. Unable to keep pace with leader after 900 M and weakened steadily in the straight.
Eased back to race in rear section until straightening. Made up ground steadily in the straight.
About 5Ls off pace towards rear when checked at 800 M, 7Ls down and 4-wide in 13th at final bend, ran on well without reaching leaders.
Always a bit too keen until home turn, 4Ls off pace in 8th at 1000 M, closer on straightening but outpaced from then on.
3 and 4-wide without cover for most of the race, 3Ls down in 5th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 5th off home turn, kept on well without reaching leaders.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1000 M to home turn, led 300 M out, headed briefly at 100 M, rallied gamely to lead final 50 M, all out.
In 2nd half a length off pace when 2-wide at 1000 M, about 2Ls down in 3rd and under pressure off home turn, soon beaten.
Covered up about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in mid-division until home turn, outpaced when steadied at 200 M, no headway.
Always quite deep on track but had cover about 3Ls or 4Ls behind in midfield until home turn, failed to kick.
